25Nɛ elishi tetiɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila bezekulu Owusoso Akaa pɛ baazhã ɛdzɛ akɔɛ, kɛlɛ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã gɔgɔɛ nɔ aza taatɔ̃ nɛ alɛ. 26Nɛ balɛ matì matì mɛɛ, kesiakpa ebeshukù gagalĩi akɔ asɛ ɔɖavuɔ itsuru nɔ tsyɛ bashukù. Odunu ɔlɔ koɔ ɔɖavũɔ budulũɔ petee badalɛ, kɛlɛ aka nyia aka yɛɖahuiɛ boele. 27Ɔɖavũ abha eɖiɖi eleteɛ aba nyɛmɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ amɔ asɛ ɔɖavũ dulũɔ dalɛ liɛ, etso yɛ bɛtɛ asɛ tɛ̀ eyì yɛishu ɔmɔsɛ eɖi asɛ ɔɖuvũazazã ebu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ ashɛ. 28Pɔ Paulo abakpɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Tɛkpɛ ishu kibì! Bɔlɔ pete lɛ ɛkɛlɛ.
29Ɔɖavũ abha eɖiɖieleteɛ ebisi asɛ bamana efú, kɛlɛ abhɛtɛ zia vɛ edi zhi ekumu pɛ eshuku gbagbà nɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila otugbà. 30Kɛlɛ Agbana balɛ eyinɔ pɛ ebisi balɛ asɛ, “Bapalete, kɛlɛ mɛbabhɛtɛ pɛ ɛba mɔ ɛkpã?”
31Bebuiliulũ asɛ, “Yɛkɛ Apalete Yesu abha ɔŋã kɛlɛ ɔbɔ mɔ ɛkpã, wɔ nɛ̀ wɔ bɔpã mɛ anɛ.” 32Kɛlɛ baɖɔ Apalete nɛibuiɛ etseɖe yɛ nɛ̀ banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛ bɔpã mɛ. 33Nɛ elishi ɔɖa tatá ɔlɛ mɛɛ, ɔɖavũ abha eɖiɖi eleteɛ agbanà alɛ avɛnɔ adɛbɔ apɔ̃ɔ akɔ alɛ, kɛlɛ tsiɔ̃ ɔlɛ koɔ bakpɛ bulĩ nɛ ɛtakpu akɔɛ nɛ̀ yɛɔpãmɛanɛ. 34Ɔɖavũ abha eɖiɖieleteɛ agbana balɛ avɛnɔ yɛɔpã mɛ pɛ edidzu ɔkpɔlɔ̃ akɔ alɛ, same mɔmɔ eku yɛmɛ ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha ŋã, yɛ nɛ̀ yɛɔpã mɛ anɛ petee. 35Gɛ keliɛ azaa, behukuluɔ akpɛ banɔ gbagbla asɛsɛ ɔɖavũabha eɖiɖi eleteɛ ɔkɔ asɛ, “Shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ banyɛ alɛ shu.” 36Ɔɖavũ abha eɖiɖi eleteɛ etseɖe Paulo asɛ, “Bebhukuluɔ akɔ ɔsha asɛ bɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔ nɛ̀ Sila shu. Otsi alɛ nɔbɔlà ɔshɛ. Nɔgavɛ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ.”
37Pɔ Paulo etseɖe banɔ gbagbla asɛ, “Behuisi bɔlɔ nɛ kɛtsalɛ mɛ pɛ bakpɛ bɔlɔ nɛ ɔɖavũmɛ, bunu Romanɛ, pɔ begikulu kebhu nɛ̀ bɔlɔ. Kɛlɛ otsi bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ shu nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ dzã? Ao! Nɔkɔ baba ɛkɛlɛ tɛ̀ bebebú bɔlɔ eyinɔ nɛ ɔma mɛ.”
38Banɔ gbagbla avɛ adɛkɔ behukuluɔ tititì, kɛlɛ gɛ belũ asɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila enu Romanɛ, kifù dɛ alɛ. 39Babà yɔ balɛ ishumɛ kɛlɛ bagbanà alɛ eyinɔ nɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ, pɛ betseɖe balɛ asɛ bekoeyì nɛ ɔma gbagbala mɛ. 40Gɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila ekoeyì nɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛɛ, bavɛ Lidia bɔpã mɛ ɛkɛlɛ badɛtsyɔa nɛ̀ ɔhaa kɛlɛ bakpɛ balɛ kemi. Kɛlɛ bashɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 17
Content:
Paulo Avɛ Tesalonika
1Gɛ bagã edi yi nɛ Amfipoli nɛ̀ Apolonia nɔ, bebe yi nɛ Tesalonika, ɛkɛlɛ Yudanɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ toli ɔzã. 2Kɛlɛ asɛ gɛ abhɛtɛɛ ana, Paulo avɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ, kɛlɛ nɛ Emoelewui tata abhaa, azagã Owusoso Akaa ebuiɛ mɛ nɛ alɛ, 3pɛ ezebu ebui mɛ pɛ ebu akasɛ asɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ Yesuɔ amɔ bɔtɔ flogo tɛ̀ befeke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ. Aɖɔ asɛ, “Yesu alɛ gɛ yɛibuiɛ mɛɖɔɔ yɛenu Kristoɔ. 4Kesilulũ abakɔ Yudanɛ teli kɛlɛ betsyina atɔnɔ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Helanɛ kpekpèɛ teli gɛ besi Owusoso Akaa nɛifùɔ ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ ɛzãkɔ elete gɛenu badzɛ kpekpèɛ tsyɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana.
5Pɔ kabhã wɔawlɔakɛ afala eku Yudanɛ teli mɛ, kliso bagbana banɔ kpa teli nɛ kedziɛ mɛ pɛ babhɛtɛ kɛza tili gɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔzã balɛ mɛ, pɛ badɛkpɛ kititì lɔlɔ esi nɛ ɔmamɛ. Bebu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ avɛnɔ Yason bɔpã mɛ tɛ̀ badɛpɛɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila tɛ bagbana alɛ amana banɔɛza ɔkɔ. 6Pɔ gɛ bagɛ damɔ alɛɛ, bagbana Yason nɛ̀ ɔhamɛanɛ teli amana balɛ banɔ gbagbla namɛ nɛ̀ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ asɛ, “Banyɛ alɛ gɛ bamana buluhũ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ petee mɛ tsyɛ atɛba ɛkɛlɛ, 7kɛlɛ Yason ayɛkɛ balɛ akpɛ yɛɔpã mɛ. balɛ petee etso Kaizaro Klauda yɛɔshaa, pɛ baaɖɔ asɛ ekusi bhlatɔ alɛ gɛ bekulu yɛasɛ Yesu yɛenu ekusiɛ.” 8Gɛ belũ kibui ɛlɛ, ebela ebeku banɔɛza nɛ̀ ɔma banɔ gbagbla nɛishi. 9Kɛlɛ bakɔ Yason nɛ̀ banɔ gɔgɔɛ abhɛ kɛlɛ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu.
Paulo Avɛ Beroea
10Gɛ keliɛ ebele koɔ, badzya akpɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Sila nɛ Beroea. Gɛ bediku ɛkɛlɛ, bavɛ Yudanɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ. 11Otsi nɔ Beroeanɛ bezhinì balɛ ishu esi ɔdɛ Tesalonikanɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bayɛkɛ kibuiɛ nɛ̀ samè kɛlɛ bazapɔɛ kɛlɛ mɛ kiwui nyiɛ wui tɛ̀ beɖi asɛ kibuiɛ gɛ Paulo aɖɔ kpasɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ana dza. 12Yudanɛ kpekpèɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã, kana ɛzãkɔ elete gɛenu Helanɛ badzɛ nɛ̀ ɛzakɔ elete banyɛ tsyɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã.
13Kibeɛ gɛ Yudanɛ gɛ alɛ Tesalonika elũ asɛ Paulo aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ nɛ Beroea nɔ, bavɛ ɛkɛlɛ tsyɛ, kɛlɛ badaakpɛ ebelà nɛ balɛishi. 14Odunu ɔlɛ badzya akpɛ Paulo asɛsɛ aƒuɔ shu, pɔ Sila nɛ̀ Timoteo xɔnɔ azã Beroea. 15Banyɛ gɛ bagbana Paulo evunɔɔ agbana yɛ avɛnɔ Atene kɛlɛ Paulo akɔ banyɛ ɔklasɔ̃ asɛ tɛ̀ betseɖe Sila nɛ̀ Timoteo asɛ tɛ badɛ taplɛnii odunu ɔlɛ.
Paulo Avɛ Atene
16Kibeɛ gɛ Paulo ezepo Sila nɛ̀ Timoteo nɛ Ateneɛ, kɛbà tɔɖɔ yɛabha gɛ amɔ asɛ ibudi yuku ɔmamɛ. 17Kliso ababhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ̀ Yudanɛ nɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ. Ɔplɛnɔ Helanɛ gɛesi Owusoso Akaa nifùɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ azã budziɛ mɛ kiwui nyiɛ wui ɔlɔkɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 18Epikoroanɛ teli gɛ beshogò ishu ɔplɛnɔ Stoanɛ teli gɛenu bebutìnɛ abakpà kibui wlɔãkɛ nɛ̀ Paulo. Balɛ mɛ beteli ezebisi yɛasɛ, “Kinuvɔ ibui ɖuwoe idi yɛaɖɔ ana?” Bagɔgɔɔ tsyɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Abhɛtɛ asɛ aɖɔaɖɔ tɛ alɔkɔ ebu amadi bhlatɔ ibudi ulũ nɔ.” Baɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ɔmɔsɛ Paulo azaɖɔ kibui gbangbã nɛ Yesu shu, nɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ shu. 19Kɛlɛ bagbana yɛ amana Areopago besheshèɛ kɛtakpu ɔtɔ̃kɔ toli, ɛkɛlɛ betseɖe yɛasɛ, “Ɔtɔɔkɔ buti kibui tili odenɔ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ vɔvɔlɛ gɛ bɔlɛishu wɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dzã? 20Ɔmana ebui teli gɛ bɔkà lũɖi ɔbɔkpɛ bɔlɔ atɔ̃mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bulũ alɛ esi.” 21(Atenanɛ nɛ̀ befùɔ petee gɛ azã ɛkɛlɛ agɛza lɔkɔ balɛ kibeɛ abhɛtɛ kɛnanà nɔ ɔdɛ tɛ̀ baɖɔaɖɔ tɛ̀ bataatɔ̃ nɔ nɛ̀ ebuivɔvɔ alɛ gɛ beluɔ.)
22Paulo aba lɔɛtití nɛ beshesheɛ kɛtakpu ɔtɔ̃kɔ pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Atenanɛ banyɛ, ɛmɔsɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ̀ nɛ kawɔ̃pɛ ka nyia ka. 23Ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛgã fala pɛ iɖi bɔdɔ̃ɔ gɛ nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔɔ, ɛmɔ bɔdɔ̃ ɔpɔɛkɔ toli gɛ bafɔnɔ atɔɖɔ asɛ, akaa gɛ butinyiɛ ɔdɔ̃ ɔpɔɛkɔ. Otsiɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ pɛ nɔotinyi kɛlɛ, ɛba ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kɛlɛ shu ɔkɔ wɔnɔ.
24“Owusoso Akaa gɛ abhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka nɛ kalɛ mɛ yɛenu Apalete akɔ kititiɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa kɛlɛ atɛzã okulukɔ gɛ babhɔ nɛ̀ anɔdzyrame ahɔɛ. 25Kɛlɛ gɛnɛ anɔdzyrame ahɔɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔɛ nɔ, asɛ gɛ onupɛ apɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili ana, ɔmɔsɛ yɛakɔ banɔdzyrameɛ petee ɛkpã, ɔfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka. 26Gana anɔ tenikpo mɛ yɛabhɛtɛ banunɔ petee nɛ̀ amadiɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ beyuku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee. Kɛlɛ yɛatɔɖɔ kibeɛ kɔ alɛ nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ gɛ babazã shu. 27Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ asɛ tɛ banɔ apɛ yɛidzo tɛ̀ bamɔɛ, pɔ gɛnɛ gɛ alɛ odzlolo ɔkɔ nɛ bɔlɔ ɔmayɛmɛ nanà ɔbha flogo. 28Asɛ kana gɛ bagɛ bafatɛ ɛdzɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ aɖɔ asɛ, ‘Ɔmɔsɛ yɛmɛ bɔlɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã pɛ bɔfalà pɛ bɔlɛ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ.’ ‘Yɛmɛ bude koeyì.’
29“Klisoɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ bude koeyiɛ, kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ buziɖi ɔsɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ anɔ nɔ̀ edzi asɛ sikãɛkpã, sikãfufu alo kɛklagbu ana, bɔdɔ̃ tata gɛ anɔdzyrame alɔkɔ yɛahɔɛ abhɛtɛ nɔ. 30Kuku ibeɛ, Owusoso Akaa ezedzini awɔ̃ atɔɖɔ ebui alɛ gɛ noɔtinyiɛ nabha, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔɔ akpɛ ɔsha akɔ aka nyia aka asɛ betsyina nɛ balɛ etúɔ mɛ. 31Ɔmɔsɛ atɔɖɔ kiwuiɛ gɛ ebekulu kebhu nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee nɛ̀ kebhuɔ gɛ kalɛ alɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔgana anunɔ gɛ yɛabha yɛatɔɖɔ ahɔɛ. Ebu kibui ɛlɛ akasɛ banunɔ petee ɔgana yɛ tifefeke odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ shu.”
32Gɛ belũ kibuiɛ odenɔ bekpuɔ tɛlɔlɔ shuɔ, beteli amɔ̃ɛ yɛ, pɔ bagɔgɔ xɔnɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Bɔpɛ ɔsɛ buwlui lũ wɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu kidegba.” 33Kɛlɛ Paulo abashɛ nɛ kazãa ɔbha. 34Banɔ bhlui teli ebedzi Paulo yiedeazazã kɛlɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã. Balɛ mɛ banɔ nɔ teli balɛenu, Dionisio gɛenu Areopago yɛ kɛtakpu ɔtɔ̃kɔ anɔ, nɛ̀ adzɛ teli tsyɛ gɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Damaris nɛ̀ banɔ kasasà tieli.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 18
Content:
Paulo Avɛ Korinto
1Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ niedeɛ, Paulo ashɛ nɛ Atene avɛ Korinto. 2Ɛkɛlɛ yɛadɛ tɔnɔ Yudaeyi teli gɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Akwila, anɔ gɛede Ponto. Yɛnɛ yɛedzini Priskila ede Italia aba ɛkɛlɛ kiwui kadze, ɔmɔsɛ ekusi Kaisaro Klauda akɔ ɔsha asɛ Yudanɛ petee ashɛ nɛ Roma. Paulo avɛ asɛ ediɖi alɛ, 3kɛlɛ gɛ enu anɔ gɛ enyi kagbabhɛtɛ asɛ balɛ soɔ, azã balɛ ɔbha pɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ balɛ. 4Azabhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ aplɛnɔ balɛ nɛ Kimoelewui ka nyia ka abha, pɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ebu ebui mɛ kɔ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Helanɛ.
5Kibeɛ gɛ Sila nɛ̀ Timoteo ede Makedonia aba, Paulo alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ, pɛ adalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ Yudanɛ ete ɔsɛ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ. 6Pɔ gɛ Yudanɛ alɔɛtití nɛ Paulo shu nɛ̀ akwalatu ebui soɔ, eshuku yɛakpɛkpɛ akasɛ balɛ asɛ, “Wɔnɔ dzosu nɔ aba wɔnɔ atakpu nabha! Ɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ. Odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔɔ, ɛbavɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ.”
7Kɛlɛ Paulo ashɛ nɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ avɛ bɔpã gɛlɛ Tito Yusto, anɔ gɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɔɛpa nɔbha mɛ. 8Krispo, anɔ gɛ eɖi ɔtsyɔakɔ nabha, nɛ̀ yɛɔpã petee yɛkɛ Apalete nabha aŋã, kɛlɛ Korintoanɛ kpekpè teli gɛ belũ yɛɔdɔ ayɛkɛ aŋã kɛlɛ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ alɛ.
9Elishi tenikpo Apaleteɛ aɖɔaɖɔ etseɖe Paulo nɛ kɛdɔ̃ mɔmɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Tisì kifù, zã kɛlɛ abha tɛ̀ ɔzɔɖɔ kaɖɔɔ, tɛ̀ dã olugbũ. 10Ɔmɔsɛ ɛlɛ ɔplɛnɔ wɔ, kɛlɛ anɔ nanàa etibè zhieku wɔabha pɛ abakpɛ kɛpɔ̃ nɛ wɔshu, ɔmɔsɛ banɔ kpekpè alɛ mahɔɛ nɛ ɔmã hohoe ɔlɛ mɛ.” 11Kliso Paulo azã ɛkɛlɛ kɛgɔ zɛzɛ nɛ̀ kapɛ, pɛ azakasɛ alɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ.
12Kibeɛ gɛ Galio azaŋã bukusi nɛ Roma kapɛ tieli abha, Yudanɛ abhɛtɛ tenikpo kɛlɛ bezhi eku Paulo abha pɛ bagbana yɛ amana kebhu okulukɔ. 13Kɛlɛ bebhui yɛulũ nɛ̀ kibui ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, “Anyɛ alɛ ebù ebuimɛ ɔkɔ banunɔ asɛ tɛ bakpɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ edzo teli abha gɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɔshaa shu.”
14Kibeɛ gɛ Paulo apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ aɖɔaɖɔ koɔ, Galio etseɖe Yudanɛ asɛ, “Pɛ otɛɔsɛ wɔnɔ Yudanɛ nɔkpamɛ ishu nɛ banɔ yiyí alo kibui kpa tili shuɔ, tsyɛ alo ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ atazã ɛlɛ mɛ akɔmɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛtaatɔ̃ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ. 15Pɔ gɛ kinu kibui gɛ kɛkpà ɔplɛnɔ ebui, enyè nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɔsha shu soɔ, nowoese wɔnɔ ahɔɛ ibui, itɛbadzi anɔ gɛ ɛbakulu kebhu nɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi shu.” 16Kliso akɔ bebu balɛ eyinɔ nɛ kebhuɔ okulukɔ. 17Kɛlɛ balɛ petee etsyina atɔ̃ Sostene gɛenu ɔtsyɔakɔ abha eɖiɖieleteɛ kɛlɛ behuisi nɛ kebhu okulukɔ buvũɔ otugbà. Pɔ Galio xɔnɔ agɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ.
Paulo Etsyina Avɛ Antioxia
18Paulo azã Korinto ɔdɛ nanà kibè tili. Kɛlɛ ashɛ nɛ badzya ɔbha pɛ eku kelĩabhaohu avɛ Siria gɛ agbana Priskila nɛ̀ Akwila aplɛnɔ yɛishu. Flogo tɛ̀ ebeku kelĩabhaohuɔ, akɔ batsɛ kɛtakpuɔ akɔɛ nɛ Kenxrea nɛ bɔdɔ̃ tuli gɛ atanà shu so. 19Bediku Efeso, ɛkɛlɛ Paulo ashɛ ayɔlɔ Priskila nɛ̀ Akwila. Yɛ xɔnɔ avɛ ɔtsyɔakɔ pɛ adɛ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ aplɛnɔ Yudanɛ. 20Kibeɛ gɛ betseɖe yɛ ɔsɛ tɛ azã balɛ ɔbha kɛbɔɛ nɔ, agɛ dɛmɛ tɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha. 21Pɔ gɛ ashɛɛ, atɔɖɔ elú asɛ, “Ɛba tsodzi ba gɛ Onupɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛɛ.” Kɛlɛ eku kelĩabhaohuɔ odenɔ Efeso. 22Kibeɛ gɛ ediku Kaisarea nɔ, ewu avɛ adɛ sɛnɔ ɔhaa, kɛlɛ ezhi avɛ Antioxia.
23Gɛ azã Antioxia odiyinɔ kibè tiliɛ, Paulo azagã kidzo edenɔ ɛkɛlɛ pɛ azakanà nɛ Galatia nɛ̀ Frigia bɔdɔ̃ petee mɛ pɛ akpɛ badɔkpasɛanɛ petee kemi.
24Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ Yudaeyi teli gɛ bezekulu asɛ Apolo, anɔ gɛede Aleksandro tsyɛ aba Efeso. Edzi anɔ gɛ akpasɛ bɔdɔ̃ avɛnɔ otugbà pɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa ebuiɛ piapii. 25Bakasɛ yɛɔdɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ edzo nabha, kɛlɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ bupù mɛ, kɛlɛ akasɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ Kristo shu pɛ bɔɔnà, pɔ Yohanes bulĩkpɛkpɛ ko batɛ kpɛ kɔɛ flogo. 26Abakpà kaɖɔ ɔɖɔ nɛ ɛtsyɔakɔ nɛ kifù masi masi mɛ. Kibeɛ gɛ Priskila nɛ̀ Akwila elũ yɛebuiɛ, bekulù yɛ amana balɛ bɔpã mɛ kɛlɛ bebu ebuiɛ mɛ kɔɛ piapii nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛedzoɔ shu.
27Kibeɛ gɛ Apolo apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ avɛ Axaya, badzya akpɛ yiemi kɛlɛ bafɔnɔ keplukpa asɛsɛ badɔkpasɛnɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bayɛkii. Gɛ avɛ edikuɔ, edidzì apɛplɛnɔ akɔ bagɛ bebhui balɛ ebú pɛ bayɛkɛ aŋãa. 28Ɔmɔsɛ awzalɔ̃akɛ ebui nɛ̀ Yudanɛ nɛ ɔmaɛshi ebuimɛ pɔpɔɛ shu, pɛ azadalɛ ebuiɛ mɛ edenɔ Owusoso Akaa ebui fɔfɔnɔ mɛ ɔsɛ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 19
Content:
Paulo Avɛ Efeso
1Kibeɛ gɛ Apolo azã Koritoɔ, Paulo agã kishitɛbha kidzoɔ avɛ ediyì nɛ Efeso. Ɛkɛlɛ yɛadɛ tɔnɔ badɔkpasɛanɛ teli 2pɛ ebisi alɛ asɛ, “Nɔyɛkɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã kibeɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã dza?”
Bebuiliulũ asɛ, “Oo, bɔkalũ oɖi ɔsɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔlɛ tsyɛ.”
3Kliso Paulo ebisi asɛ, “Kɛlɛ́ɛ bulĩ kpɛkpɛ ɖuwoe edi bakpɛ akɔ wɔnɔ?
Bebuiliulũ asɛ, “Bɔyɛkɛ Yohanes yɛulĩkpɛkpɛ.”
4Paulo aɖɔ asɛ, “Yohanes bulĩkpɛkpɛ lɛkɔ etú mɛ titsyitsyina. Etseɖe banunɔ asɛ tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛabà nɛ yiede nabha ŋã, gɛenu Yesuɔ. 5Gɛ belũ kibui ɛlɛ, bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ alɛ nɛ Apalete Yesu yɛinyeɛ mɛ. 6Gɛ Paulo atɔɖɔ yɛhɔɛ nɛ balɛ abha koɔ, Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔba balɛ abha kɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ beluhũ vɔvɔ mɛ pɛ baɖɔ ebui elú. 7Bɔnɔ alɛ tɛkaklà mɛ bazã asɛ baanyɛ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha ana.
8Paulo etsoku ɔtsyɔakɔ pɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ bupù mɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ bewoele tata mɛ pɛ ezebu ebui mɛ ɔkɔ alɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusiŋaŋã shu. 9Pɔ balɛ banɔ nɔ teli atɔmɛ agagalĩ, bagɛ pɛ asɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã kɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ Yɛedzoɔ shu. Kliso Paulo ashɛ ayɔlɔ alɛ pɛ agbana badɔkpasɛanɛ aplɛnɔ yɛishu pɛ yɛnɛ alɛ bazapɔɛ ebui mɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ mɛ kibe nyia be nɛ Tirano bɔdɔ̃kakasɛ buvũɔ mɛ. 10Kibui ɛlɛ vɛ ɛlɛ abha nɛ agɔ taabha mɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Helanɛ petee gɛazã Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ elũ Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ.
11Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ atsyindzye ebui teli idi aganà Paulo abha, 12gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ apɔtɛ gulũ nɛ̀ agɛ bakpɛ̀ atɔɖɔ kitèmɛ ayɛ nabha gɛehunu yɛtsyɛ, balɔkɔ alɛ avɛnɔ banyanyã, kɛlɛ banyã ebelè pɛ ɛfɔfuĩa kpa tsyɛ koeyì nɛ balɛ mɛ.
13Yudanɛ teli gɛ bazanyɔ akanà pɛ baakakà ɛfɔfuĩa kpa eyinɔ, bazapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bekulu Apalete Yesu yɛinyèɛ atɔɖɔ bagɛ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ zã balɛ abhaa. Baaɖɔ asɛ, “Nɛ Yesu gɛ yɛinyè mɛ Paulo azaɖɔaɖɔ asɛ, ɛkpɛ ɔsha kɔwɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ okoeyì.” 14Skeva gɛenu Yudanɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla yɛeyìanyɛ tegegene teli balaza abhɛtɛ ebui alɛ. 15Kiwui tinikpo kɛlɛ ɔfɔfuĩa kpa lubuiliulũ ɔkɔ alɛ asɛ, “Inyi Yesu, kɛlɛ inyi Paulo tsyɛ, fakɔ anɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ nonu?” 16Kɛlɛ anyɛ gɛ ɔfɔfuĩa kpa ɔzã yɛmɛ alɔatɛɛ eku balɛ abha, pɛ aŋã balɛ petee abha. Ehuisi balɛ ɖɔtɔ ɖɔtɔ gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bebú tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ ekoeyì nɛ bɔpã mɛ kɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ pɛ dzyosu tsyɛ ezeyì nɛ balɛ shu.
17Gɛ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Helanɛ gɛ alɛ Efeso ebelũ kibui ɛlɛ, kifù yialɛ petee, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ hohoe akɔ Apalete Yesu yɛinyeɛ. 18Otsi alɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã bege kpũ balɛishu kɛlɛ babadalɛ balɛ ishumɛ nɛ balɛ ebui kpa gɛ bahɛtɛ shu. 19Banɔ kasasà tieli gɛedzi behuinɛ tsyɛ alɔkɔ balɛ ihuiɛ amana pɛ bapɔɛ ɛlɛ nɛ ɔmaɛshi. Gɛ bakalà ehoeyiɛ gɛ bezĩ nɛ balɛ akpɛnɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ shuɔ, labanà sikãfufu ihotu afɛeti, gɛenu ehoeyi gɛ lavɛ otugbà nɛ kibè ɛlɛ. 20Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ yɛɛvɛ̀ pɛ kɛvɛ̀ kabha nɛ̀ ohumi.
21Gɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ aba ɛlɛ mɛ ebekeɛ, Paulo abatɔɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ adɛgã Makedonia nɛ̀ Axaya tɛ avɛ Yerusalem. Aɖɔ asɛ, “Onupɛ ɛdɛ Yerusalem aba koɔ, ɛbadiɖi Roma tsyɛ. 22Asɛsɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ taabha gɛenu Timoteo nɛ̀ Erasto nɛ Makedonia, gɛ yɛxɔnɔ azã Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ kɛbɔɛ.
Kititì Lɔlɔ Ebuiɛ Gaba Efesoɔ
23Nɛ kibè ɛlɛ kititì lɔlɔ tili babà nɛ Kidzoɔ shu. 24Anyɛ teli gɛedzi sikãfufu axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Demetrio, azabhɛtɛ sikãfufu ibudiuvũɔ ɔlɛ tɛzazã mɛ gɛ bekulu asɛ Artemis, pɛ amana axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa akɔ banɔ gelee. 25Ekulu balɛ eshogò aplɛnɔ baxɔ̃ɛwɔa bhlatɔ gɛ bawɔa axɔ̃ɛ alɛ nɛidi pɛ etseɖe balɛ asɛ, “Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔonyi ɔsɛ bɔɔmɔ ehoeyi piapii odenɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. 26Kɛlɛ nɔmɔ̀ pɛ nɔolũ kana gɛ Paulo anyɛ alɛ etsyina banunɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ, pɛ agbana banɔkpekpèɛ atsaɖakɛ idzo nɛ Efosoɔ nɛ̀ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ petee tsyɛ. Aɖɔ asɛ ibudiɛ gɛ banɔdzyrameɛ abhɛtɛ tinu akaa nanà. 27Kibui ɛlɛ bazĩ bɔdɔ̃, gɛnɛ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa kinyèɛ ete kɛlɛ bayala, pɔ bazakà kpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ obidiuvũɔ Artemis gbagbla nɛ̀ yɛobudiukã tsyɛ, kɛlɛ adzɛobudiɛ tsyɛ gɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ nɛ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee tsyɛ, yɛohuminɔ obokoeyi nɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ.”
28Gɛ belũ kibui ɛlɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ oyialɛ kɛlɛ bakpà ozĩukpɛ̀ asɛ, “Obudi gbagbla ɔlɛonù Efesoanɛ Artemis.” 29Odunu ɔlɛ koɔ, ɔmamɛ oyukù nɛ̀ ozĩ. Banunɔ evũ Gayo nɛ̀ Aristaxo gɛ benu banɔ gɛ bagã kidzo ɔplɛnɔ Paulo odenɔ Makedonia, kɛlɛ bagbanà balɛ odunũ ɔlɛ avɛnɔ ɔma ɔlɛ bɔwufù ɔwɔkɔ. 30Paulo apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ avɛ banɔɛza namɛ pɔ yɛadɔkpasɛanɛ agɛ kɔɛ yɛidzo. 31Banɔ hohoeɛ gɛenu Paulo yɛɔbhia alɛ nɛ kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ asɛsɛ yɛ ɔklasɔ̃ asɛ atɛpɛ kɛwɔawɔa asɛ avɛ balɛ buwufù ɔwɔkɔ.
32Kazã egetì kɛnɔnɔ gɛ babà bhɛtɛɛ, beteli akpɛ ozĩ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ̀ shu, beteli tsyɛ nɛ kɛbhlatɔ shu. Banunɔ teli tsyɛ etinyi kɛgɛ kɛlɛ sopɛ bavɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 33Yudanɛ etii Aleksandro avɛnɔ otugbà, kɛlɛ banunɔ gɛ ebeshogòɔ teli akpɛ ozĩ nɛ yɛabha pɛ bakasɛ yɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ abhɛtɛɛ. Akasɛ balɛ ahɔɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bataatɔ̃ tɛ̀ amɔ kidzo ebú yɛishu ulũ nɛ banunɔ amɛ. 34Pɔ gɛ bamɔ asɛ Yudaeyi yɛenuɔ, balɛ petee akpɛ ozĩ dzlolo kitsù asɛ ɔɖatatá tɛbha ana asɛ, “Obudi gbagbla ɔlɛonu Efesoanɛ Artemis!”
35Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛafɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ akɔ kɛzaa akɔsɛ bataatɔ̃, pɛ etseɖe balɛ asɛ, “Efesoanɛ mɔ, banunɔ petee nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ etinyi asɛ Efosoanɛ balepò Artemis obudiukã nɛ̀ ɔlɛ tɛzazã tɛfafatɛ gɛ wɔlɛ odenɔ kititiɛ. 36Klisoɔ gɛ ebui alɛ enu ebui gbãa, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ nɔtaatɔ̃, tɛ̀ nɔtɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kibui nanà odunũ ɔlɛ. 37Nɔgbanà banyɛ alɛ ɔmana ɛkɛlɛ gɛ begi dezuru ibudiukã mɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà alo pɛ baɖɔ ebusoebui nɛ bɔlɔ adzɛobudiɛ shu. 38Onupɛ kibui tili kpasɛ Demetrio nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ babhɔ bɔdɔ̃ aplɛnɔ yɛɛ nɛ anɔ teli shuɔ, kebhu okulukɔ ɔlɛ, kɛlɛ bagɛ beeɖi ɔma nabha tsyɛ alɛ, babàlà alɔkɔ kibui nɛ alɛ shu avɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ. 39Onupɛ kibui tili pɔ kalɛ gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nofekeɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bavɛnɔ edibu kɛlɛ mɛ nɛ ɔsha mɛ. 40Asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ ana, kifu sisi lɛ kɛlɛishu ɔsɛ babà lɔkɔ kibui nɛ oboɔ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ ebui alɛ shu. Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, bɔtɛ balà bu ishu ulũ nɛ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ ɔlɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ kesilulũ nanà ama kɛlɛishu.” 41Gɛ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ebekeɛ, akakà ɔzãkɔ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 20
Content:
Paulo Axɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Nɛ̀ Makedonia Nɛ̀ Hela Bɔdɔ̃
1Gɛ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ ebuiɛ abafala, Paulo akpɛ banɔ nɛ badɔkpasɛanɛ ɔkɔ, kɛlɛ gɛ akpɛ balɛ kemì ebekeɛ, ebisi kidzo pɛ ashɛ avɛ Makedonia. 2Anyɔ afala nɛ kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ, pɛ alɔkɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ gelee akpɛ banɔ kemi nɔ, gɔgɔɛ nɔ, ediyì nɛ Hela bɔdɔ̃ mɛ, 3ɛkɛlɛ yɛazã bewoele tatá. Ɔmɔsɛ Yudanɛ atɔɖɔ kibui kpa nɛishu kibeɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ eku kelĩabhaohu avɛ Siria, klisoɔ atɔɖɔ asɛ etsodzi adɛgã Makedonia. 4Soparte, Piro gɛede Beroa yɛeyianyɛ azã yiede, nɛ̀ Aristaxo nɛ̀ Sekundo gɛede Tesalonika, Gayo gɛede Derbe nɛ̀ Timoteo, nɛ̀ Tixiko nɛ̀ Trofimo gɛede Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ. 5Banyɛ alɛ eputɔ edeepo bɔlɔ nɛ Troa. 6Pɔ buku kelĩabhaohuɔ odenɔ Filipi nɛ kibeɛ gɛ baŋã kifufulũ gɛ Kɛgɛ Nyanyã Iwuiɛ ebeke, kɛlɛ nɛ ewui tetì edeɛ bɔdɛ taplɛnɔ banɔ gɔgɔ nɛ Troa kɛlɛ bɔzã ɛkɛlɛ ewui tegegene.
Banyɛmɛ Eutixo Denɔ Butsimɛ Nɛ Troa
7Nɛ ɔgɔnɛ ɔlɛ kiwuiɛ gɛiputɔ nabhaa, bɔba shogò ɔkɔ bɔlɔ ɔhakpɛkpɛ ɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã. Paulo azaɖɔaɖɔ ɔkɔ banunɔ ɔmɔsɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ abashɛ nɛ kelizaza mɛ, kliso azaɖɔaɖɔ idiyinɔ elishi tetì. 8Badɛkɛ efù gelee elu kabha buvũɔ mɛ, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ bɔzã kɛtakpu tɔtɔ̃ mɛ. 9Taɖa zibuku anyɛ ayisɔ̃ teli gɛ bekulu yɛasɛ Eutixoɔ, kibeɛ gɛ Paulo azã yɛaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ nabha. Kibeɛ gɛ abavɛnɔ taɖa mɛɛ, abawɔlɛ edenɔ kabha buvũɔ gɛ babhɔ atɔɖɔ bɔtaɖamɛ nabha abadɔ kesiakpa kɛlɛ gɛ befeke yɛ etitsí. 10Paulo ezhi avɛ kesiɛ, alɔkɔ yɛishu atɔɖɔ ayisɔ̃ nabha kɛlɛ alɔkɔ yɛ ɛhɔɛ akpɛ akana yɛishuɔ, pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Nɔotosì kifù, alɛ nɛkpã!” 11Kɛlɛ ezewu avɛ kabha buvũɔ mɛ, pɛ adɛya kifufulũ nɔ atã. Gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ pɛ keliɛ azaa, abashɛ. 12Banunɔ agbana anyɛ ayisɔ̃ avɛnɔ bɔpã mɛ enunù pɛ balɛ kitúɔ mɛ dɔ alɛ fɔ̃ɔ.
Paulo Tɛshɛshɛ Nɛ Efeso
13Bɔvɛ kɛlɛ abha ditsoku kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛ, pɛ bɔvɛ Aso tɛ̀ bɔdɛ tɔnɔ Paulo tɛ ekù kelĩabhaohuɔ aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ. Abhɛtɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔmɔsɛ azã bɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ kidzo abha avɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 14Gɛ abatɔnɔ bɔlɔ nɛ Asoɔ, eku kelĩabhaohuɔ ɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔ, pɛ bɔvɛ Mitilene. 15Gɛ keliɛ azaa, buku kelĩabhaohuɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ pɛ budiyì nɛ Xio. Gɛ keliɛ azazaa, bɔtsakɛ ɔvɛ Samo, kɛlɛ gɛ keliɛ azaa, budiyì nɛ Mileto. 16Paulo atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ tɛ afala nɛ Efeso ɔbhà, tɛ̀ etibèzĩ kibè nɛ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ apɛ zia tɛ̀ ediku Yerusalem, onupɛ abapɛ tɛ̀ azã ɛkɛlɛ nɛ Pentekoste kiwui nabha.
17Denɔ Miletoɔ, Paulo akpɛ banɔ nɛ Efeso ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ ɔkɔ. 18Gɛ bebekuɔ, etseɖe alɛ asɛ, “Noɔnyì kana gɛ ɛzanà mɛkpã, kibeɛ gɛ ɛzã wɔnɔ ɔbha, odenɔ kiwuiɛ gɛiputɔ gɛ ɛbaku Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ. 19Ɛlɛkɔ ishu esi zhizhinɔ hohoe nɛ̀ ɛwɔmɛ kpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ nɔ, gɛ Yudanɛ alɔkɔ kɛtakpu mɛ kpa tɔtɔɖɔ efeke mɛɖi nɔ nyagaa flogo. 20Nɔonyi ɔsɛ igi yide nɛ ebui ɖɔɖɔ nɔnɔ gɛ laba aplɛnɔ wɔnɔ shu, pɔ ɛkasɛ wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛtsalɛ mɛ, nɛ̀ denɔ bɔpã mɛ ɔvɛnɔ bɔpã mɛ. 21Ɛdalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Helanɛ ɔsɛ tɛ betsyina atɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ balɛ etúɔ tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ Apalete Yesu abha aŋã.
22“Kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔ, gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɔɔ gbana mɛɛ, ɛɛtɔnɔ kidzo ɔvɛ Yerusalem kɛlɛ itinyi kɛgɛ babà mɛabha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 23Inyi sɛ nɛ ɔmahohoe ka nyia ka mɛɛ, Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔkpɛ ɔsha kɔmɛ ɔsɛ ɔɖavũmɛ tɛzazã nɛ̀ ebui gagalĩ mɛbà dɛ mɔ. 24Klisoɔ, ɛtɛka lɔkɔ mɛkpã asɛ lɛinu kɛdɔ nanà ɔkɔ mɛ, pɛ ɛtalà kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu akpɛ mɛahɔɛ wɔa bekeɛ, kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ ɛdalɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gɛ kibhui bɔlɔ buɔ shu.
25“Otsi alɛ inyi sɛ wɔnɔ mayɛmɛ nanà ma gɛ mɛnɛ yɛ zɛgã kidzo, alo pɛ bɔzɛɖɔ bukusiŋaŋã shu ebuiɛ azabamɔ mamɛ eɖi. 26Klisoɔ, ɛdalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ kɔ wɔnɔ obuɔ ɔsɛ, onupɛ wɔnɔ mayɛmɛ teli ɛkpã bayalaa, ɛma ɛlɛ mɛ. 27Ɔmɔsɛ ɛgɛ yɔlɔ ebuiɛ petee gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ tɛɖɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ. 28Nɔzanà awɔ̃ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu tɛ nozoɖi ibhoshiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔkpɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ ɔsɛ nɔoɖi ɛlɛ abha. Nodzi ibhoshi agbagbana elete ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa, gɛ edzi nɛ yɛ dzyosu nɔ. 29Inyi sɛ onupɛ ɛbashɛɛ kidegbaa, igulu babà wɔnɔɛshi, kɛlɛ lɛti bàbi ibhoshiɛ ashagabui. 30Nɛ wɔnɔ mɛ tsyɛɛ, banɔ abalɔ́ pɛ babàsɛ asɛnɛ tɛ̀ badɔkpasɛanɛ etsyina tɔnɔ alɛ. 31Kliso nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ̃! Nɔbakà ɔsɛ̀ nɛ agɔ tatá mɛɛ, ɛgɛ yɔlɔ ɔsha kpɛkpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ̀ ɛwɔmɛ bibi mɛ elishi nɛ̀ kemuze.
32“Otsiɛ nɔ, ɛɛlɔkɔ̀ wɔnɔ ɔkpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ yɛibuiɛ gɛ alɔkɔ ebhui bɔlɔ ebuɔ nɔ̀. Kɛlɛ bàbhɔ wɔnɔ wunu kabha pɛ kɛbàkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ badalɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ petee kaŋãsiɛ. 33Ɛgɛ dzã kiwuhũ nɛ ananà sikãfufù, alo sikãɛkpã alo bɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ shu. 34Nɔonyi ɔsɛ mɛahɔɛ alɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ mɛwɔa lɔkɔ pɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɔkɔ mɛishu nɛ̀ mɛɔhagbo alɛ. 35Nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, ɛkasɛ wɔnɔ ɔsɛ̀ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ ɛlɛ nɛidi wɔawɔa mɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔplɛnɔ bagɛ ohumi ɔma balɛ ahɔɛ, ɛɛbakà ebui alɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu aɖɔ asɛ, ‘Tiyuyulà kpasɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ mɛ ɔdɛ kɛdɔ̃ yɛyɛkɛ mɛ.’ ”
36Gɛ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ebekeɛ, yɛnɛ̀ balɛ petee edzu ekluisi esi pɛ bekulu Owusoso Akaa. 37Balɛ petee ebi yoyò nɛ kibeɛ gɛ banyana yɛakpɛ balɛ eteɛ mɛ pɛ bakpɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛoliɛ. 38Kɛgɛ kɔ bamɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔdɛ kɛlɛinu kibuiɛ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ bazakamɔ yiamɛ eɖiɛ. Kɛlɛ bagbana yɛ avɛnɔ kelĩabhaohuɔ shu.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 21
Content:
Paulo Kidzogagã Ɔvɛnɔ Yerusalem
1Kibèɛ gɛ bɔɖɔ ɔsɛ basɛnɛ alɛ o pɛ bɔshɛɛ, bɔdɛgã kelĩabha kidzoɔ pɛ bɔvɛ tĩi diyì nɛ Kos. Gɛ keliɛ azaa, bɔvɛ Rodo, kɛlɛ odenɔ ɛkɛlɛɛ bɔvɛ Patara. 2Bɔmɔ Kelĩabhaohu toli gɛ lɔtsakɛ ɔvɛ Foenisia, kɛlɛ budiku ɔlɛ pɛ bɔtɔnɔ kelĩabha kidzoɔ. 3Kibeɛ gɛ bɔmɔ Kipro sɛsɛ, bɔgã fala nɛ bɔpialɛ ɔkɔ ebeɛ, pɛ budiyì nɛ Siria. Budiku Tiro, ɛkɛlɛ gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ kelĩabhaohuɔ bu ɔlɛ etukuɔ. 4Gɛ bɔmɔ badɔkpasɛanɛ teli nɛ ɛkɛlɛ soɔ, bɔzã balɛ ɔbha ewui tegegene. Gana Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛɛ, betseɖe Paulo asɛ atɛvɛ Yerusalemuɔ. 5Pɔ gɛ bɔlɔ kibeɛ naa, bɔshɛ kɛlɛ bɔvɛ bɔlɔ kidzo gagã nabha. Badɔkpasɛanɛ petee, balɛ edzinì nɛ̀ balɛ̀ eyi alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ azã bɔlɔ kede pɛ bagbana ɔlɔ koeyinɔ nɛ ɔmamɛ, kɛlɛ budzu ekluisi esi nɛ aƒu nɔtɔ̃ pɛ bukulu Owusoso Akaa. 6Gɛ bɔkasɛ bagɔlɔ ahɔɛ ebekeɛ, budi tsoku kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ balɛ tsyɛ etsyina avɛ bɔpã mɛ.
7Bɔzã bɔlɔ kelĩabha kidzogagã nabha odenɔ Tiro pɛ budiyì nɛ Ptolemai, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ bɔsɛnɔ badzyaa kɛlɛ bɔzã balɛ ɔbha kiwui tinikpo. 8Gɛ bɔshɛ kelizaza, budiyì nɛ Kaesarea kɛlɛ bɔdɛzã Filipo gɛ aɖɔ kibuiɛ akana pɛ enu banɔ Tegegeneɛ gɛ bebu nɛ yerusalemuɔ ɔmaɛmɛ tenikpoɔ bɔpã mɛ. 9Beyiadzɛ talɛ gɛ bakazana anyɛ azã yɛahɔɛ gɛ baɖɔ ebui elú.
10Gɛ bɔzã ɛkɛlɛ ewui kɛbɔbhlui nɔ, ebuiɖɔluanɔ teli gɛ bekulu yɛasɛ Agabo ede Yudea aba. 11Gɛ aba bɔlɔ ɔbhaa, alɔkɔ Paulo yɛatsatsatɔɖɔ pɛ alɔkɔ yɛanyã yɛahɔɛ ɛtsɛɖɛ nɛ̀ ɛhɔɛ pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, ‘Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Yudanɛ abanyã atsatsatɔɖɔ alɛ eleteɛ pɛ babà lɔkɔ yɛakpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ.’ ”
12Gɛ bulũ kibui ɛlɛ, bɔlɔ nɛ̀ banunɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ kɔ Paulo kɛtakpu asɛ etì wu avɛ Yerusalemuɔ. 13Kɛlɛ Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Kiɖe sopɛ nɔobiyoyò pɛ nɔyɛɛ mɛ kitúɔ ana? Gɛnɛ mɛ tɛnyanyã ete shu mɛ balɛ ɔkɔ, pɔ ɛbalɛ tsyɛ sɛ tɛ̀ itsi nɛ Yerusalem nɛ Apalete Yesu yɛinyeɛ nɛtakpu.” 14Gɛ etielũ bɔlɔ bulũ tɛwɔɛwɔɛ nɔ soɔ, bɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu pɛ bɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Apaleteɛ tɛpɛpɛ nɔ kɛlɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛ.”
15Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ niediɛ, bɔbalɛ pɛ buwu vɛ Yerusalem. 16Badɔkpasɛanɛ teli gɛede Kaisareanɔ agbana bɔlɔ avɛnɔ ediku Mnason gɛenu adɔkpasɛanɛ tenikpo yɛɔpã mɛ pɛbɔzã ɛkɛlɛ. Enu anɔ gɛede Kipro pɛ edzi adɔkpasɛnɛ gɛiputɔ̀ tenikpo.
Paulo Yerusalem Tikuku
17Gɛ budiku Yerusalemuɔ, baadzya ayɛkɛ bɔlɔ nɛ̀ same. 18Gɛ keliɛ azaa, Paulo nɛ̀ bɔlɔ banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ vɛ diɖi Yakobo, kɛlɛ ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ petee azã ɛkɛlɛ. 19Paulo asɛnɔ alɛ kɛlɛ akɔ alɛ tititì piapi nɛ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ nɛishi ɔganà yɛɔdɔ kakasɛ mɛ.
20Gɛ belũ kibui ɛlɛ, bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinyè nɛitití. Kɛlɛ betseɖe Paulo asɛ, “Madzya, ɖi Yudanɛ ihotu tɛshɛ nɔnɔ gɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ banyana ɔsha mɛ evunɔɔ. 21Bakɔ betì asɛ wɔkasɛ Yudanɛ petee gɛ bakpasɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ nɛishi asɛ betsodzi nɛ Mose ɔshaa niede, pɛ ootsèɖe balɛ ɔsɛ betee bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ balɛ eyi alɛ alo tɛ̀ bazanà ɛkpã nɛ bɔlɔ ɛkɔɔ nulũ. 22Kiɖe kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔbhɛtɛ? Bebèlũ kɛgbã asɛ ɔba xɔɔ, 23klisoɔ bhɛtɛ kɛgɛ butseɖe wɔ. Banyɛ talɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ ishi gɛ batanà bɔdɔ̃ elú. 24Gbanà banyɛ alɛ ɔvɛnɔ, tɛ̀ wɔnɔ alɛ odiplu shu tɛ̀ ɔbuia kɛlɛ shu abhɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bashɛ atakpuɔ ɔkɔ alɛ. Kɛlɛ aka nyia aka ebetì asɛ̀ ebui alɛ gɛ baɖɔ nɛ wɔshuɔ ama alɛ mɛ̀, tɛ̀ kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ̀ wɔtsyɛ oshù ɔshaa. 25Bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ pɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã xɔnɔɔ, bɔtɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ alɛ nɛ kɛgɛ bɔtɔɖɔ shu ɔsɛ, batɛ aŋã bɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɔ ɔkɔ ibudiɛ, dzyosu nɛ̀ kɛdzya gidè bagã gɛ bedzyinì balɛ iliɛ, nɛ̀ tɛ̀ batakaŋã kɛgɔlɔ.”
26Gɛ keliɛ azaa, Paulo agbana banyɛ avɛnɔ ediplu ishu nɛ̀ balɛ. Kɛlɛ avɛ Akaavũɔ pɛ adɛkɔ tititì nɛ kiwuiɛ gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ ishu puplu kiwuiɛ belèɛ pɛ babàkɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ aka nyia aka ulũɔ.
Bevũ Paulo
27Gɛ ewui tegegeneɛ ebelè ebèkeɛ, Yudanɛ teli gɛede Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ adɛmɔ Paulo nɛ Akaavũɔ mɛ. Betsú kifu akpɛ banɔ nɔ petee mɛ kɛlɛ bedivũ yɛ, 28pɛ bakpɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Israelanɛ, nɔplɛnɔ ɔlɔ mɔ! Anyɛ gɛ akasɛ banɔ nɔ petee bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ afalanɔ pɛ alɔɛtití nɛ bɔlɔ banunɔ nɛ̀ ɔshaa shu nɛ̀ ɛkɛlɛ tsyɛ nɛ alɛ. Nɛ kɛlɛ̀ niedeɛ, adɛgbana Helanɛ amana Akaavũɔ shu pɛ akpɛ ɔdadalɛ ɔkɔlɛ̀ bɔtsɔ̃.” 29(Beti eputɔ amɔ Trofimo gɛenu Efeso eyiɛ nɛ̀ Paulo nɛ ɔmã mɛ, gɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ asɛ Paulo yɛagbanà yɛ amana Akaavũɔ shu.)
30Ozĩ oyì nɛ ɔmàmɛ petee, kɛlɛ banɔ nɔ ebu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ ekoeyì edenɔ kawɔ̃pɛ ka nyia ka mɛ aba. Gɛ bevũ Pauloɔ ebekeɛ, betsìi nɛ kesiakpa edenɔ Akaavũɔ shu, kɛlɛ badã budulũɔ odunũ ɔlɛ. 31Gɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ beyi yɛ, ebui alɛ ediku keyuadɛdɛ gɛ agbana Romanɛ keyuizaa natɔ̃ mɛ ɔsɛ kititì lɔlɔɛ ebui eku Yerusalem ɔmã mɛ. 32Tsiɔ̃ ɔlɛ koɔ, kɛlɛ agbana ɛzãkɔ banunɔ nɛ̀ buyuadɛdɛ teli pɛ bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ avɛ banɔɛzaa mɛ. Kibeɛ gɛ banɔɛza amɔ keyuiza otugbà anɔ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ yɛ̀ buyuadɛdɛ, bayɔlɔ Paulo huisì.
33Keyuiza otugbà anɔ nɔ̀ avɛ edivũi, kɛlɛ akɔ asɛ banyã yɛ nɛ̀ ɛɖahui tɛbha. Kɛlɛ ebisì yɛ anɔ nɔɛdi gɛ enuɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛɛ. 34Banunɔ teli nɛ banɔɛza mɛ akpɛ ozĩ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ̀, kɛlɛ beteli tsyɛ aɖɔ kɛbhlatɔ, kɛlɛ gɛ keyuiza otugbà anɔ nɔ̀ agɛmɔ kibuiɛ nɛtakpu nɛ ozĩɛ gɛ loyìɛ soɔ, akɔ ɔsha asɛ bagbana Paulo avɛnɔ buyuadɛdɛ ɔzãkɔɔ. 35Gɛ Paulo ediku gedulũɔ, kana gɛ banunɔ bamɛ atã kifuɔ ebewù kabha soɔ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ buyuadɛdɛ abhasà yɛ ewunɔ kabha. 36Banɔɛza gɛzã balɛ kedeɛ zã ozĩ kpɛkpɛ nabha asɛ, “Noyìi!”
Paulo Aɖɔ Kaɖɔ Akɔ Banɔɛzaa
37Kibeɛ gɛ buyuadɛdɛ agbanà Paulo ebèku buyuadɛ ɔzãkɔɔ, ebisi keyuiza otugbà anɔ nɔ̀ asɛ, “Ɔtɔɔkɔ mɛidzo tɛ ɛɖɔ kibui tili tseɖe wɔ dza?”
Ebisi yɛasɛ, “Olũ Helanɛ buluhũ dza?” 38Gɛnɛ wɔonu Egipte eyiɛ gɛ ɔmana kititì lɔlɔ ebui pɛ ɔgbana batɔmɛ gagalĩ banɔ ihotu tɛlɛ ɔvɛnɔ oxuiɛ kibeɛ tili gɛbafala dza?”
39Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Inu Yudaeyi gɛide Tarso nɛ Kilikia, ɔma gɛ batɛwɔ̀ nɛ ɔlɛ shu mɛ mɛide. Ɛkɔ wɔɛtakpu, kɔ mɛɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔkɔ banɔɛza.”
40Gɛ keyuiza otugbà anɔ nɔ̀ akɔ yɛidzo ebekeɛ, Paulo alɔɛtití nɛ kedulũ okpó nabha pɛ akasɛ banunɔ ahɔɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bataatɔ̃. Gɛ balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ ataatɔ̃ ebekeɛ, aɖɔaɖɔ akɔ alɛ nɛ Aramaik buluhũ mɛ asɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 22
Content:
1“Mɛadzya alɛ nɛ̀ mɛada alɛ mɔ, nɔtaatɔ̃ olũ mɛishu ulũ tibubuɔ.” 2Gɛ belũ yɛaɖɔaɖɔ ɔkɔ alɛ nɛ Aramaik buluhũɔ mɛ soɔ, badɔ kananá.
Kɛlɛ Paulo aɖɔ asɛ, 3“Yudaeyi mɛinu, bamɔ́ mɛ nɛ Tarso nɛ Kilikia, pɔ Yerusalem ɔmalɛ mɛ banyɔnɔ mɛ. Gamaliel yɛadɔkpasɛnɛ mɛidzì pɛ ɛkpasɛ bɔlɔ akaalɛ ɔshaa piapii kɛlɛ ɛzɛwlɔakɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa asɛ kana gɛ wɔnɔ ɔmayɛmɛ aka nyia aka abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ obuɔ ana. 4Ɛtɔnɔ bagɛ bazã Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ɛkpã niede, kɛlɛ ɛkɔ beyí alɛ, gɛ kɛkɔ mɛivũ banyɛ nɛ̀ badzɛ ɔdɛkpɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ, 5asɛ kana gɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla nɛ̀ yɛ besheshèɛ petee abalà aɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛlɛishu ana. Ɛvɛ tsyɛ dɛyɛkɛ buplukpa odenɔ banɔlũazazã gbagbla ɔkɔ ɔsɛsɛ balɛ adzya alɛ nɛ Damasko, kɛlɛ ɛvɛ ɛkɛlɛ dɛgbana banɔ alɛ asɛ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã ana amana Yerusalem asɛ bapɔ̃ batɔ̃ akɔ alɛ.
6“Nɛ kemuze ebe ana gɛ iku Damaskoɔ ebekeɛ, nɛ mɛ matìmatì mɛɛ, kifú tili tsé odenɔ kititíɛ bakana mɛishuɔ. 7Ɛwɔlɛ dɔ kesiakpa, kɛlɛ ilũ kaɖɔ tieli gɛetseɖe mɛ asɛ, ‘Saulo! Saulo! Kiɖeso pɛ ɔtɔnɔ miede ana?’
8Ibisi sɛ, “ ‘Apalete, wɔonu afana?’
Ebuiliulũ akɔ mɛ asɛ, “ ‘Mɛinu Apalete Yesu Nazaretieyiɛ gɛ yiede wɔtɔnɔɔ.’ 9Mɛɔhayɛ amɔ kifúɔ giboeleɛ, pɔ begitì anunɔ gɛ yɛoliɛ mɛ ɔlɔ ɖɔaɖɔ tseɖe mɛ.
10Ibisi sɛ, “ ‘Apalete, kiɖe kɛlɛ ɔsɛ mɛbhɛtɛ?’
Apaleteɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “ ‘Lɔɛtití tɛ̀ ɔvɛ Damasko ɔmamɛ. Nɛ ɛkɛlɛ bebètseɖe wɔ ebuiɛ gɛ bakpɛ wɔahɔɛ ɔsɛ ɔbhɛtɛɛ.’ 11Mɛɔbhia alɛ anyanã mɛ ahɔɛ pɛ bagbana mɛ avɛnɔ Damasko ɔmamɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kana gɛ kifúɔ tséɛ akɔ mɛawuhũɔ epú.
12“Anyɛ teli gɛ bekulu asɛ Anania yɛaba ebeɖi mɛ. Edzi anɔ gɛ ezeshù ɔsha, kɛlɛ Yudanɛ petee gɛazã kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ adɛmɛ yɛibui. 13Anyɛ alɛ yɛaba lɔɛtití nɛ mɛɔbha pɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, ‘Adzya Saulo, tsodzi ɔmɔ!’ Kɛlɛ nɛ kibè ɛlɛ koɔ, kɛlɛ mɛlà mɔyɛ.
14“Kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛ asɛ, ‘Bɔlɔ akaalɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛebú wɔ ɔsɛ tɛ otì kɛgɛ yɛapɛ nɔ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔmɔ Anɔ Dadalɛ, nɛ̀ tɛ olũ ebui edenɔ yɛolugbũ mɛ̀. 15Wɔbodzì anɔ gɛ ɔbɔɖɔaɖɔ ɔdalɛ yɛishu ɔkɔ banunɔ petee nɛ kɛgɛ ɔmɔ pɛ olũɔ shu. 16Kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔpɔ, kiɖe woko opoɔ dza? Lɔ, kɔ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔwɔ nɛ kɛtakpu tɛ̀ beplu wɔ ebui kpa atɛ́ɛ gana yɛinyeɛ tikukulu mɛ.’
17“Gɛ itsodzi ba Yerusalem pɛ izikulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ Akaavũɔ mɛ, ɛbaku taɖa mɛ 18kɛlɛ ɛmɔ Apaleteɛ yɛaɖɔaɖɔ etseɖe mɛ. Aɖɔ asɛ ‘Hɔa! Shɛ nɛ Yerusalem otsiɛ tsiɔ, ɔmɔsɛ batɛ bayɛkɛ wɔɛbuiɛ gɛ ɔbɔɖɔ nɛ mɛishuɔ.’
19“Ibuiliulũ sɛ, ‘Apalete, banɔ alɛ enyi asɛ ɛɛlɔ̀de ɔtsyɔakɔ ɔlɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɔbhlatɔ, pɛ idi huisi bagɛ ayɛkɛ wɔabha aŋã pɛ ɛɛkpɛ alɛ nɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ. 20Kɛlɛ kibeɛ gɛ bazabalɛ̀ Stefano gɛetsi nɛ wɔɛtakpu dzyosu nɔ, ɛzã ɛkɛlɛ pɛ ɛzɛkpɛ balɛ kemi pɛ izipo bagɛ eyi yɛ akpɛkpɛ nɔ.’
21“Kɛlɛ Apaleteɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, ‘Gavɛ, ɛbakpɛ wɔ sɛsɛ fãa nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ.’ ”
Paulo Gɛebedzì Romaeyiɛ
22Banɔɛza zɛtaatɔ̃ nɛ̀ Paulo odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ azaɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ɔsɛ ‘Gavɛ, ɛbakpɛ wɔ sɛsɛ fãa nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ.’ ” Kɛlɛ bakpɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Nɔgbã yɛɔkpɛ nɛ kesiakpa nabha mɔ! Agɛ shɔnɔ asɛ azã nɛ̀ ɛkpã!”
23Kibeɛ gɛ bakpɛ ozĩɛ pɛ batɛ balɛ akpɛkpɛ elú, pɛ batɛ osubhududu nɔ kpɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ mɛɛ, 24keyuiza anɔ gbagbla akɔ ɔsha asɛ bagbanà Paulo avɛnɔ buyuadɛdɛ ɔzãkɔɔ. Akasɛ alɛ asɛ behuisi yɛ tɛ̀ bebisi yɛ, tɛ betì kibui nɔnɔ shu sopɛ banunɔ akpɛ ozĩ ɔlɛ nɛ yɛabha ana. 25Kibèɛ gɛ banyã yɛ ɔsɛ tɛ behuisi yɛɛ, Paulo etseɖe keyuiza anɔ gbagbla gɛ eli ititì nɛ ɛkɛlɛ asɛ, “Ɔsha kɔ kidzo ɔsɛ behuisì Romaeyi gɛ begibu yɛpɔɔ dza?”
26Kibeɛ gɛ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla elũ kibui ɛlɛ, avɛ keyuiza otugbànɔ ɔkɔ adɛ kɔyɛ tititì. Ebisi asɛ, “Kiɖuwoe wɔbɔ ɔbhɛtɛ? Anyɛ alɛ enu Romaeyi.”
27Keyuiza anɔ gbagbla avɛ Paulo ɔbhà pɛ edibisi yɛasɛ, “Tseɖe mɛ, Romaeyi wɔonu dza?”
Ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Ee, yɛ mɛinu.”
28Kɛlɛ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla aɖɔ asɛ, “Kɛbhɛ hohoe mɛxɔnɔ buia flogo pɛ ɛbadzì Romaeyi.”
Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Mɛxɔnɔ Romaeyi bamɔ mɛ.”
29Bagɛ apɛ asɛ ebisi yɛ ebuiɛ, beyidè odunu ɔlɛ. Kifù bayí keyuiza anɔ gbagbla tsyɛ gɛ ebetì asɛ anyã Paulo gɛenu Romaeyiɛ akpɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ.
Paulo Nɛ Ɔhamɛ Besheshèɛ Namɛ
30Gɛ keliɛ azaa, gɛ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ etì kibui nɔnɔ shu sopɛ Yudanɛ alɔkɔ kibui nɛ Paulo shu soɔ, akɔ bebui nɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ kɛlɛ akɔ ɔsha asɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla nɛ̀ ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ petee ebeshogò. Kɛlɛ agbana Paulo amana pɛ akɔ yɛalɔɛtití nɛ balɛ amɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 23
Content:
1Paulo eɖi ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ namɛ pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ sɛ mɛbhɛtɛ petee ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe gbangbã mɛ oboyinɔ obuoɔ.” 2Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ gɛ aɖɔ soɔ, Anania gɛenu banɔlũazazã gbagbla etseɖe bagɛ beli kititì nɛ Paulo ɔbha asɛ behu olugbũ ɔlɛ ɛdɔ̃ akɔɛ. 3Kɛlɛ Paulo etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Owusoso Akaa ebehuwɔ ebho, wɔ kigilì gɛ badzã bɔdɔ̃ fufú akɔ! Ɔzã esì nɛ ɛkɛlɛ pɛ okulu kebhu nɛ mɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũ, pɔ wɔtsyɛ ɔgɛ ɔbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ ɔsha nabha gɛ ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ behu mɛ kɛdɔ̃!”
4Bagɛ balɔɛtití nɛ Paulo ɔbha aɖɔ asɛ, “Kifù tiyìwɔ gɛ ɔkwala Owusoso Akaa anɔlũazazã gbagbla dzã?
5Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛgɛ mɔsɛ yɛenu banɔlũazazã gbagbla, ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elú asɛ, ‘Tɛɖɔ kaɖɔkpa ɔkpɛ agɛ yɛaŋã bukusi nɛ wɔnɔ banunɔ abha shu.’
6Kɛlɛ Paulo, gɛenyi asɛ balɛ mɛ beteli enu Zadukianɛ pɛ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ enu Farisianɛ soɔ, aɖɔaɖɔ gagalĩ etseɖe ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ asɛ, “Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, Farisieyi mɛinu, inu eyianyɛ ɔkɔ Farisieyi. Bekulu kebhu nɛ mɛ ɔmɔsɛ iɖi otugbà mɛ ɔkɔ betsitsíɛ tɛlɔlɔ.” 7Gɛ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ koɔ, kawlɔ̃akɛ ebeku Farisianɛ nɛ̀ Zadukianɛ nɛishi, kɛlɛ kazã ebebu ɔtɔ nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. 8(Zadukianɛ balɛ aɖɔ asɛ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpumɛ bhama, kɛlɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ alo ɔfɔfuĩa nanà tsyɛ ɔma, pɔ Farisianɛ xɔnɔ ayɛkɛ ebui alɛ petee abha ŋã.)
9Ozĩ gbagbla ozoyi tɔɖɔ, kɛlɛ ɔshadɔkasɛ teli gɛenu Farisianɛ abalɔɛtití nɛ̀ kawlɔ̃akɛ ebui gagalĩi. Baɖɔ asɛ, bɔgɛmɔ kibui kpà nanà nɛ anyɛ alɛ shu, kiɖuwoe nɔbɔɖɔ gɛ onupɛ edzi asɛ ɔfɔfuĩa alo axɔ̃ɛdɛ teli yɛaɖɔaɖɔ alɛ etseɖe yɛ dza?” 10Kawlɔ̃akɛ nulũ bagagalĩ gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ kifù bayí keyuiza anɔ gbagbla asɛ banunɔ abatsyɔ̃ɛ Paulo mɛ wluiwlui. Kliso akɔ ɔsha asɛ keyuiza ivolo nɔ ezhi avɛ adɛ yɛkɛ yɛ nɛ balɛ ahɔɛmɛ nɛ tɛgagalĩ mɛ tɛ bagbana yɛ amana buyuadɛdɛ ɔzãkɔɔ.
11Kiwui ɛlɛ elishiɛ, Apaleteɛ abazã Paulo ɔbha pɛ etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Kpɛ kité! Kana gɛ ɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ mɛishu nɛ Yerusalemuɔ, kana kɛlɛ ɔsɛ wɔdɛɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ mɛishu nɛ Roma tsyɛ.”
Tɛtɔtɔɖɔ Kɔ Paulo Tìyiyi
12Kelizaza nɛvɔlɔɔ, Yudanɛ adɛtɔɖɔ kibui kpa nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ kɛlɛ banya olugbũ akɔ balɛishu asɛ batɛ bàŋã bɔdɔ̃ alo babàwɔɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ beyí Paulo. 13Banunɔ gɛ badɛ tɔɖɔ kibui kpa ɛlɛ ekpè adɛ afɛtalɛ. 14Bavɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla nɛ̀ besheshèɛ ɔkɔ editseɖe balɛ asɛ, “Bɔtanà bɔdɔ̃ ɔsɛ, bɔtɛ bàŋã bɔdɔ̃ nanà odiyinɔ ɔsɛ buyì Paulo. 15Kliso otsiɛnɔ, wɔnɔ nɛ̀ ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ ɔkɔ ɔsha ganà keyuiza anɔ gbagbla nabha tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ asɛ nɔkɔpɛ kibui mɛ dadalɛ nɛ yɛibuiɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ shu. Bɔlɔ xɔnɔ bɔbalɛ sɛ bɔ̀ba yii flogo pɛ ebekù ɛkɛlɛ.”
16Pɔ kibeɛ gɛ Paulo yɛada yɛeyianyɛ elũ kibui kpa tɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ, avɛ buyuadɛdɛ ɔzãkɔ editseɖe Paulo.
17Kɛlɛ Paulo ekulu keyuadɛ anɔ gbagbla tenikpo pɛ etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Gbana anyɛ ayisɔ̃ alɛ ɔvɛnɔ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla ɔkɔ, kibui tili lɛ yɛahɔɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ etseɖe yɛ.” 18Kliso agbana yɛavɛnɔ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla ɔkɔ.
Keyuadɛ anɔ gbagbla aɖɔ asɛ, “Paulo gɛenu ɔɖavũmɛ azazã yɛakpɛ banɔ nɛ mɛɔkɔ kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛ asɛ, ɛgbanà anyɛ ayisɔ̃ alɛ mana wɔkɔ ɔmɔsɛ kibui tili lɛ yɛahɔɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ aɖɔ etseɖe wɔ.”
19Keyuiza anɔ gbagbla anyanã anyɛ nuvɔɛ nɔ kahɔkpɔ, agbana yɛavɛnɔ kɛwɔa pɛ edibisi yɛasɛ, “Kibui ɖuwoe wɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ otseɖe mɛ?”
20Aɖɔ asɛ, “Yudanɛ adɛnyã ɛlɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bebisi edenɔ wɔ ahɔɛmɛ tɛ̀ ɔgbana Paulo mana ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ namɛ kivũ tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ asɛ gɛ onupɛ bakaapɛ kibui mɛ pɔpɔ̃ɛ edenɔ yɛɔkɔ ana. 21Tɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛishu kɔ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ banyɛ gɛ ekpè adɛ afɛtalɛ edikpũ pɛ beepoe. Badɛ tanà bɔdɔ̃ asɛ batɛbàŋã bɔdɔ̃ alo pɛ babàwɔɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà ɔvɛnɔ kibèɛ gɛ beyii. Batɛ balɛ eli otsiɛ, pɛ beepo wɔ ɔsɛ tɛ ɔbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ balɛ kibui bibisi nabha.”
22Keyuiza anɔ gbagbla ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ayisɔ̃ shu pɛ akpɛ ɔsha akɔɛ asɛ, “Titseɖe ananà asɛ ɔbɔkɔ mɛ kibui ɛlɛ tititì.”
Balɔkɔ Paulo Asɛsɛ Kaesarea
23Kɛlɛ ekulu yɛ buyuadɛ anɔ gbagbla taabha pɛ akɔ alɛ ɔsha asɛ, “Nɔbalɛ buyuadɛ akpã taabha, bagɛ bekũ ɛsɔ afɛtegegene, nɛ̀ bagɛ atà ɛpɔ̃ɛ tsyɛ akpã taabha tɛ̀ bavɛ Kaesarea oboɔ elishi ɛɖa tizhita mɛ. 24Nɔpɛ ɛsɔ ɔkɔ Paulo tsyɛ tɛ̀ azã yɛabha asɛ tɛ̀ bagbana yɛavɛnɔ Felike gɛenu kɛmadi ekusiɛ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ.”
25Afɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ asɛ,
26Klauda Lisia, yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ,
Ɛlɔkɔ sɛsɛ wɔ bɔlɔ kɛmadi ekusiɛ Felike anɔ gɛ adzã kiwuhũ.
Ɛsɛnɛ wɔ.
27Yudanɛ evũ anyɛ alɛ, kɛlɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ beyìi, pɔ mɛ nɛ̀ mɛ keyuiza bayɛkɛ yɛ nɛ balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ̀, ɔmɔsɛ ɛbatì ɔsɛ Romaeyi yɛenu. 28Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ mɛiti kibui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛlɛ sopɛ bebhui yɛulũɔ, kliso ɛgbana yɛ mana balɛ ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ ɔkɔ. 29Ɛbamɔ ɔsɛ yɛulũɔ gɛ bebhuiɛ enu ebui bibisi yɛ nɛ balɛ ɔshaa shu, pɔ kibuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ nanà ma gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ beyii, alo tɛ̀ bakpɛ yɛ nɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ishu. 30Gɛ bakɔ mɛitì nɛ kibui kpa gɛ batɔɖɔ nɛ anyɛ alɛ shu soɔ, ɛɛlɔkɔ̀ yɛ sɛsɛ wɔ tsiɔ̃ ɔlɛ. Mɛtsyɛ kɔ bagɛ behui yɛulũ ɔsha asɛ, balɔkɔ kibuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ebhui yɛulũɔ mana wɔkɔ.
31Kliso gɛ buyuadɛ, abhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ kɛgɛ betseɖe alɛ nabhaa, bagbana Paulo aplɛnɔ balɛishu elishi alɛ kɛlɛ bavɛnɔ yɛ nɛ kitsí asɛ Antripatre ana. 32Gɛ keliɛ azaa, bakɔ bagɛ bedò ɛsɔ nɔ avɛ ɛplɛnɔ yɛ, kɛlɛ balɛ xɔnɔ etsodzì etsyina aba buyuadɛdɛ ɔzãkɔ. 33Gɛ bagɛ bedo ɛsɔ nɔ ediku Kaesarea nɔ, balɔkɔ keplukpa akɔ kɛmadi ekusiɛ kɛlɛ balɔkɔ Paulo tsyɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔɛ. 34Kɛmadi ekusiɛ abakalà keplukpa kɛlɛ ebisì yɛ kawɔ̃pɛ nɔnɔ gɛ edeɛ. Gɛ ebetì asɛ Kilikia yɛedeɛ, 35aɖɔ asɛ, “Ɛbàlũ wuɛbuiɛ gɛ onupɛ bagɛ bebhui wɔlũɔ ebekù ɛkɛlɛ.” Kɛlɛ akɔ ɔsha sɛ̀ bezaepò Paulo nɛ Romanɛ ekusi Gbagbala ɔpã mɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 24
Content:
Kɛmadi Ekusi Felike Kebhu Kukulu Nɛ̀ Paulo
1Ewui teti edeɛ, banɔlũazazã gbagbla Anania nɛ̀ Besheshèɛ teli abavɛ Kaisarea ɔplɛnɔ ɔshaetinɛ teli gɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Tertulo, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ ebuiɛ gɛ bebhui Paulo ulũɔ nɔ amana kɛmadi ekusiɛ. 2Gɛ bedi kulu Paulo amanaa, Tertulo aɖɔ yɛulũ bhui bhui ebuiɛ etseɖe Felike asɛ, “Kibè dzololo nɛ ɛlɛ gɛ bɔkpasɛ wɔ esi nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ ɔmɔ otugbàa mɛ sɛsɛ soɔ, ɔkɔsɛ bɔmɔ tìtsyitsyina gelee nɛ bɔlɔ kɛmadi ɛlɛ mɛ. 3Nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ nɛ̀ kidzo ka nyia ka abha, Felike anɔ gɛ adzã kiwuhũ, bɔmɔ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ wɔbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ buhu wɔahɔɛ nɛ ɛlɛ takpu popopo. 4Pɔ tɛ ɛtɛ kpɛ wɔluhũ vɛnɔ otugbàa, ɛba bisi odenɔ wɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔlɔkɔ ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛ̀ ɔtaatɔ̃ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ kibui ɖɔɖɔ gulũi.
5“Bɔbamɔ anyɛ alɛ asɛ enu anɔ gɛ akpɛ banɔ buluhũ, amana kititì lɔlɔ ebui nɛ Yudanɛ ishi nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee. Enu Nazaretianɛ batɔ̃mɛ gagalĩ otugbà zazã anɔ teli 6kɛlɛ apɛ tsyɛ asɛ tɛ̀ akpɛ Akaavũɔ nɔtsɔ̃, kliso buvũi kɛlɛ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bukulu kebhu niyɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũ. 7Pɔ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla Lisia alɔkɔ tɛgagalĩ awlɔakɛ yɛ ayɛkɛ nɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ mɛ, 8pɛ akɔ ɔsha sɛ̀ bagɛ bebhui yɛulũɔ aba wɔkɔ. Onupɛ ɔnyɔ̃ yɛishuɔɔ, ɔbɔmɔ kibui gbã gɛ kpasɛ ebui alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ nɛishuɔ mɛ.”
9Yudanɛ akpɛ olugbũ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ebhui yɛulũɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ beetuilɛ akpɛ asɛ ebuiɛ alɛ enu ebui gbã.
10Kibeɛ gɛ kɛmadi ekusiɛ akasɛ Paulo ahɔɛ asɛ aɖɔaɖɔɔ, ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Inyi ɔsɛ agɔ kpekpè nɛ alɛ gɛ okulu kebhu nɛ kɛmadi ɛlɛ mɛ, kliso pɛ ɛlɔkɔ same babu mɛishu ulũ. 11Asɛ gɛ olũ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, aka fala ewui lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha, gɛ ɛvɛ Yerusalem tɛ̀ mɛ dɛkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Akaa. 12Bagɛ ebhui mɛulũɔ agɛ bamɔ asɛ̀ ili wlɔãkɛ kibui nɛ̀ anana nɛ Akaavũɔ mɛ, alo sɛ ɛɛkpɛ ebelà nɛ banɔɛza nɛishi nɛ ɛtsyɔakɔ, alo ɔmamɛ ɔkɔ nanà tsyɛ. 13Kɛlɛ batɛ balà ebù ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ balɔkɔ ebhui mɛulũ otsiɛ nɔ akɔwɔ. 14Pɔ, ɛdɛmɛ tɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha asɛ ɛɛkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ bɔlɔ akaalɛ Owusoso Akaa asɛ anɔ gɛ etsiɖi Kidzo ɛlɛ gɛ bekulu otsiɛ sɛ̀ Nazaretianɛ batɔ̃mɛ gagalĩ otugbà zazã kidzoɔ. Ɛdɛmɛ tɔɖɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ɔsha ɖɔɔ nabha, gɛ kɛlɛ bafɔnɔ elú nɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ keplukpa mɛ, 15kɛlɛ kidzo tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛ mɛtsyɛ iɖi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa asɛ banɔ alɛ ana, asɛ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpùmɛ alɛ akɔ banɔ dadalɛ nɛ̀ atakpu mɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ. 16Kliso ɛwlɔãkɛ kibe nyia be ɔsɛ tɛ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ adalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ nɛ̀ anɔdzyrame shu.
17“Gɛ agɔ kpekpè teli abafalaa, ɛba Yerusalem ɔsɛ tɛ ɛbakɔ betsyuitsyuiɛ bɔdɔ̃, nɛ̀ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ tuli tsyɛ kpɛ ahɔɛ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ. 18Mɛishu dalɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũ kibeɛ gɛ bamɔ mɛ nɛ Akaavũɔ shu pɛ ɛbhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ. Banɔɛza nanà agɛzã mɛɔbha, pɛ ebedzi asɛ ɛmana ebelà ebui tsyɛ. 19Pɔ Yudanɛ teli ede Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ aba, gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bazã ɛkɛlɛ tɛ̀ bebhui mɛulũ nɛ wɔamɛ, gɛ onupɛ kibui tili lɛ balɛ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛishu flogo. 20Pɛnɔsɛ bagɛ balɛ alɛ ɛkɛlɛ, baɖɔ kibui kpa nɔnɔ gɛ bamɔ nɛ mɛishuɔ kibèɛ gɛ ɛlɔɛtití nɛ ɔhamɛ besheshèɛ amɛ- 21kibui nanà ma ɔdɛ kibui tinikpo ɛlɛ gɛ ɛzɛkpɛ ozĩ ɖɔ nɛ kibèɛ gɛ ɛlɔɛtití nɛ balɛ amɛ ɔsɛ, ‘Tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ shu ibui sopɛ bekulù kebhu nimɛ nɛ wɔamɛ obuɔ.’ ”
22Kɛlɛ Felike anɔ gɛenyi Kidzo ɛlɛ piapii nɔ, alɔkɔ kebhuɔ atɔɖɔ kiwui bhlatɔ abha. Aɖɔ asɛ, “Onupɛ Lisia gɛenu agɛ yɛagbanà buyuadɛdɛ aba edenɔ Yerusalemuɔ tsyɛ, ɛbàɖi kibhuiɛ gɛ ɛbabhui wɔɛbuiɛ mɛ.” 23Akpɛ keyuadɛdɛ anɔ gbagbla ɔsha asɛ tɛ̀ akɔ bazã epó Paulo piapii, pɔ akɔ yɛazã yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ tɛ̀ akɔ yɛbhia alɛ ebeɖi yɛabha nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛapɛɛ nɔ.
24Ewui gelee edeɛ, Felike nɛ̀ yɛedzinì Drusila gɛenu Yudadziɛ aba. Akpɛ banɔ nɛ Paulo ɔkɔ kɛlɛ azataatɔ̃ niyɛ kibeɛ gɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛlɛ Yesu Kristoɔ mɛ shuɔ. 25Kibeɛ gɛ Paulo azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ishu dadalɛ, ishu abha ŋaŋã nɛ̀ kebhu kukuluɔ gɛ abaa, kifù yi Felike kɛlɛ abaɖɔ asɛ, “Abɔ otsiɛ gbɔ! Ɔbɔlà ɔshɛ. Onupɛ ɛbamɔ kibè tsyɛ ɛbà kpɛ banɔ nɛ wɔkɔ.” 26Kibè ɛlɛ tsyɛ ezeɖi kidzo mɛ asɛ Paulo abakɔɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ asɛ tɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu, kliso azakpɛ banɔ nɛ yɛɔkɔ ziazia pɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ niyɛ.
27Gɛ agɔ taabha abafalaa, Porkio Festo ebedzì kɛmadì ekusi nɛ Felike ede, pɔ gɛ Felike apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ekù Yudanɛ awɔ̃ soɔ, ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ Paulo shu asɛ azã ɔɖavũɔ mɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 25
Content:
Paulo Akɔ Asɛ Balɔkɔ Yɛibuiɛ Avɛnɔ Romanɛ Ekusiɛ
1Ewui tata ede gɛ ediku kesiakpa nabha, Festo alɔ ede kaisarea ewu avɛ Yerusalem, 2ɛkɛlɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla nɛ̀ Yudanɛ otugbà banunɔ aba yɛɔkɔ nɛ̀ ebuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ebhui Paulo ulũ nɔ. 3Odunu ɔlɛ bebisi Festo kɛtɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bekù yɛawɔ̃ tɛ̀ akɔ bebú Paulo asɛsɛ Yerusalem, ɔmɔsɛ bazã tikpukpũ mɛ pɛ bezepo yɛ, tɛ̀ beyii nɛ kidzoɔ mɛ. 4Festo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Paulo akpasɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ nɛ Kaisarea, kɛlɛ mɛtsyɛ ɛvɛ ɛkɛlɛ otsiɛ tsiɔ̃. 5Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ otugbànɛ teli aba aplɛnɔ mɛ, tɛ̀ bɔlɔkɔ ebuiɛ nɛishu nɛ ɛkɛlɛ, tɛ̀ buɖì ɔsɛ̀ kibui kpa tili lɛ yɛishu dza.”
6Gɛ aŋã ewui asɛ tasɛ alo kɛfɔ̀ nɛ balɛ ɔbhaa, ezhi avɛ Kaisarea nɛ̀ besheshèɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ keliɛ azaa, ɛkulu kebhu kazãa, kɛlɛ akɔ ɔsha asɛ bagbana Paulo amana yɛamɛ. 7Kibeɛ gɛ Paulo ebekuɔ, Yudanɛ gɛede Yerusalem abaa ebeshogò nɛishu, pɛ balɔkɔ ebui gagalĩ nɛishu, ebuiɛ gɛ batɛ alà alɛ mɛ ebú tsyɛ.
8Kɛlɛ Paulo ebu yɛishu ulũ asɛ, “Ɛgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà nɛ Yudanɛ ɔsha, alo Akaavũɔ alo Kaisaro shu.”
9Festo gɛapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ekù Yudanɛ awɔ̃ soɔ, etseɖe Paulo asɛ, “Ɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ owù ɔvɛ Yerusalemuɔ tɛ mɛidì kulu kebhu nɛ̀wɔ nɛ ebui alɛ gɛ balɔkɔ nɛ wɔshuɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ dza?”
10Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Kaisaro yɛ kebhu okulukɔ mɛ lɛ otsiɛ, ɛkɛlɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bekulu kebhu nɛ mɛ. Ɛgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà nɛ̀ Yudanɛ shu, asɛ gɛ nɔonyi piapii nɔ. 11Onupɛ edzi asɛ kibui kpa tili mɛbhɛtɛ pɛ kɛshɔnɔ ɔkɔ butsì tsyɛ elo, ɛgɛɖɔ ɔsɛ ititsì. Pɔ onupɛ edzì asɛ ebuiɛ gɛ Yudanɛ alɔkɔ nɛ mɛishu etinu ebui gbãa, anɔ nanà agɛmɔ kidzo tɛ̀ alɔkɔ mɛ akpɛ balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ. Ɛkɔ wɔ Kaisaro kɛtakpu ɔsɛ tɛ olũ mɛ kibui ɛlɛ!”
12Kibeɛ gɛ Festo adɛtɔ̃ kɛtakpu nɛ̀ yɛ ɔmaesheshèɛ ebekeɛ, adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ, “ɔkɔ kɛtakpu ɔsɛ kebhuɔ avɛ Kaisaro ɔkɔ kliso, Kaisaro ɔkɔ wɔbɔ̀ vɛ!”
Festo Adɛtɔ̃ Kɛtakpu Nɛ̀ Ekusi Agripa
13Ewui gulũi tieli edeɛ, Ekusi Agripa nɛ̀ Bernike ebekù Kaisarea tɛ̀ badɛ sɛnɔ Festo. 14Gɛ babàzã ɛkɛlɛ ewui kpekpè mɛ soɔ, Festo adɛ tsaɖakɛ Paulo ebuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ nɛishuɔ nɛ̀ Ekusiɛ. Aɖɔ asɛ, “Anyɛ teli alɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Felike ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ elù asɛ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã. 15Kibeɛ gɛ ɛbawù ɔvɛ Yerusalemuɔ, banɔlũazazã gbagbla nɛ̀ Yudanɛ besheshèɛ alɔkɔ ebui nɛ yɛishu, kɛlɛ bezebisi kidzo asɛ tɛ̀ beyìi.
16“Itseɖe balɛ ɔsɛ, kitinu Romanɛ ɔkɔ̀ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ balɔkɔ anɔ nanà akpɛ ahɔɛ tɛ̀ atsyɔa kitemɛ bamɛ nɛ̀ bamɛ, nɛ̀ bagɛ bebhui yɛuluɔ flogo tɛ̀ amɔ kidzò edibu yɛishu ulũ, nɛ̀ ebuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ nɛishuɔ. 17Gɛ mɛ nɛ alɛ ba ɛkɛlɛ̀, ɛgɛ kɔ kebhuɔ awɔ̀ kidè, pɔ ikulu kebhu kazãa nɛ kelizaza mɛ pɛ ɛkɔ ɔsha sɛ̀ bagbana anyɛ amana. 18Kibeɛ gɛ bagɛ bebhui yɛulũ alɔɛtití asɛ tɛ baɖɔaɖɔɔ, bagɛ ìbhui yɛulũ nɛ̀ kibui kpa nanà shu asɛ kana gɛ ɖiɛ ana. 19Pɔ, ebuiɛ teli gɛ lakpà aplɛnɔ balɛ ɛkɔɔ baza wlɔãkɛ niyɛ, nɛ̀ anyɛ teli gɛetitsí pɛ beekulu yɛasɛ Yesuɔ shu, anɔ gɛ Paulo xɔnɔ aɖɔ asɛ akalɛ nɛkpã. 20Itinyi kɛgɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi mɛ nyɔnyɔ̃ shu, kliso ibisi yɛ ɔsɛ, adɛmɛ asɛ abavɛ Yerusalemuɔ tɛ̀ bedi kulu kebhu niyɛ, nɛ̀ ebui alɛ gɛ balɔkɔ nɛ yɛishuɔ dza? 21Kibeɛ gɛ Paulo ebisi asɛ tɛ̀ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu ɔkɔ kɛmadi ekusi gbagbla tɛ̀ ebhui kibui mɛ kɔyɛɛ, akɔ ɔsha asɛ, batɛ̀ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu odiyinɔ ɔsɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ yɛ sɛsɛ Kaisaro.”
22Kɛlɛ Agripa etseɖe Festo asɛ, “Mɛtsyɛ bapɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ilũ anyɛ alɛ ebuiɛ.” Ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Kivũ tsyɛ òbolũ yɛebuiɛ.”
Paulo Avɛ Agripa Amɛ
23Gɛ keliɛ azaa, Agripa nɛ̀ Bernike aba, nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ gbangbã mɛ̀, kɛlɛ yɛ nɛ̀ ɛzãkɔ ɖaɖama eleteɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ baagbanà ɔmaa etsoku buvũɔ mɛ gɛ bebèlũ kibuiɛ. Nɛ Festo ɔshakɔkɔ mɛ̀ koɔ, kɛlɛ badɛgbanà Paulo amana. 24Festo aɖɔ asɛ, “Ekusi Agripa, nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ bɔlɔ ɔbha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ, nɔɔmɔ anyɛ alɛ dza! Yudanɛ petee, ebhui yɛulu nɛ Yerusalem nɛ̀ Kaisarea ɛkɛlɛ, nɛ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ shu gɛ kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ewlui azã nɛkpã. 25Ɛbamɔ ɔsɛ̀ agɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà, gɛ kɛshɔnɔ ɔkɔ butsí, pɔ gɛ ebisi asɛ kɛmadi Ekusi Gbagbla elũ yɛibuiɛ soɔ, ɛbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ɔsɛ ɛbalɔkɔ yɛ sɛsɛ Roma. 26Pɔ kibui nanà pɔtìi ma mahɔɛ gɛ ɛba fɔnɔ nɛishu sɛsɛ Ekusi Ohumi eleteɛ. Kliso ɛgbana yɛ mana wɔnɔ petee amɛ, asɛ wɔ Ekusi Agripa amɛ ana, sɛ tɛ̀ odenɔ kibui ɛlɛ mɛ nyɔnyɔ̃ niyɛɛ, ɛbà mɔ kibui tili fɔnɔ. 27Ɔmɔsɛ gɛnɛ bubuti ibui kinù ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã ɔsɛsɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛgɛ mɔ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ balɔkɔ ebhui yɛulũ nɔ.”

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 26
Content:
1Kɛlɛ Agripa etseɖe Paulo asɛ, “Kidzo lɛ kɔwɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔɖɔ kaɖɔ obù wɔshu ulũ nɔ̀.” Kliso Paulo ebú yɛɔhɔɛ akasɛ pɛ akpà yɛishu ulũ bú asɛ, 2Ekusi Agripa, ɛmɔsɛ mɛtakpu pɛ̃, gɛ ɛlɔɛtití nɛ wɔamɛ oboɔ, pɛ ibù mɛishu ulũ nɛ ebuiɛ petee gɛ Yudanɛ alɔkɔ ebhui mɛulũɔ nɔ shu, 3ɛɖɔ anà ɔmɔsɛ, onyi Yudanɛ ɛkɔɔ piapii nɛ̀ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɛlɛ shu. Klisoɔ, ɛkɔwɔ kɛtakpu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ olù kitu esi tɛ̀ olũ mɛ kibuiɛ.
4“Yudanɛ petee enyi kana gɛ ɛzanà mɛkpã odenɔ mɛ kinuvɔbè gɛ ɛkpɛ mɛkpã esi, nɛ mɛ kesiakpa nabhaa nɛ̀ Yerusalemuɔ tsyɛ. 5Benyi mɛ kibè dzlolo nɛ ɛlɛ, kɛlɛ babalà aɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ kɛlɛ shu, onupɛ badɛmɛ, sɛ idzì Farisieyi, banɔ gɛ bagagalĩ nɛ ɔshaa gɛ̀ ɛlɛ kpà plɛnɔ bɔlɔ ɛkɔɔ shuɔ mɛ. 6Kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔ, kidzoɔ mɛ gɛiɖi ɔkɔ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ elú akɔ bɔlɔ akaalɛ sopɛ beekulu kebhu nɛ̀ mɛ oboɔ. 7Kibui tɔtɔɖɔlu ɛlɛ shù, bɔlɔ egbogbo lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha eɖì kidzo mɛ ɔsɛ kɛbà ba ɛlɛ mɛ sopɛ baakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa kemuze nɛ̀ elishi. O Ekusi, kibui ɛlɛ gɛ buɖì kidzo mɛ kɔ sopɛ Yudanɛ alɔkɔ kibui nɛ mɛishu. 8Kiɖeso pɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ ɔmayɛmɛ teli, akɔ ɛlɛ kɛsɛnɛ ibui ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa efeke bekpuɔ?
9“Mɛtsyɛ kibui ɛlɛ gɛikù mawɔ flogo, kliso ɛbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia gɛ ɛbalà tɛ ɛlɔɛtití nɛ Yesu Nazaretieyiɛ shu. 10Kibui ɛlɛ mɛzɛ bhɛtɛ nɛ Yerusalemuɔ. Ɔganà banɔlũazazã gbagbla nabhaa, ɛkpɛ banɔ dadalɛ gelee nɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ bezeyi alɛ, ɛzɛ tɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kɛlɛ abha. 11Ewuimɛ ewuimɛɛ, ɛlɔ odenɔ ɛtsyɔakɔ ɔvɛnɔ ɛbhlatɔ ɔsɛ tɛ bapɔ̃ batɔ̃ akɔ alɛ, kɛlɛ izitũilɛ kpɛ balɛulũ asɛ tɛ̀ baɖɔ ebusoebui. Mɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ nɛ balɛishu soɔ, ɛtɔnɔ baliede vɛ amadi bhlatɔ tsyɛ mɛ.
12“Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ tinikpo gagã mɛɛ, ɛzã kidzo mɛ ɛvɛ Damaskoɔ nɛ banɔlũazazã gbagbla ɔsha kɔkɔ ulũ. 13Oo, ekusi asɛ ɛɖàtata lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛbha mɛ anaa, gɛ itsiɖi kidzo nabha vɛɛ, ɔmɔ kifù odenɔ kititiɛ gɛ kitsè dɛ kiwuiɛ, pɛ kɛba kanà mɛ nɛ̀ mɛɔbhia alɛ. 14Bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ wɔlɛdɔ kesiakpa, kɛlɛ ilũ kaɖɔ tieli gɛ ketseɖe mɛ ebuiɛ nɛ Aramaik buluhũɔ mɛ asɛ, ‘Saulo, Saulo, kiɖe sopɛ ɔtɔnɔ miede ana? Abagagalĩ akɔwɔ tɛ ɔlɔkɔ wɔtsɛɖɛ tá ɔɖà tsɔtsɔ̃.’
15“Kɛlɛ mɛibisi ɔsɛ Apalete, wɔonu afana?’
Apaleteɛ ebuiliulũ asɛ, ‘Mɛinu Yesu, anɔ gɛ yiede wɔtɔnɔɔ.’ 16‘Otsi alɛ lɔzã wɔɛtsɛɖɛ abha. Ibu mɛishu kasɛ wɔ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ibu wɔ asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ, nɛ̀ asɛ anɔ gɛ abaɖɔaɖɔ, nɛ kɛgɛ wɔmɔ nɛ mɛishuɔ, nɛ̀ kɛgɛ ɛzɛbà bùkasɛ wɔ shu. 17Ɛbà yɛkɛ akɔwɔ odenɔ wɔanunɔ, nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ahɔɛ mɛ. Ɛɛkpɛ̀ wɔ nɛ balɛ ɔkɔ 18tɛ̀ ɔkpà balɛ awuhũɔ, tɛ̀ otsyinà alɛ odenɔ otumũ mɛ̀, ɔmana kanɔ dadalɛ mɛ̀, nɛ̀ odenɔ Satana yɛohumi ahɔɛ mɛ̀, ɔmana Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Sɛ tɛ̀ balɔkɔ ebui kpa etsye alɛ, tɛ̀ bamɔ ɔzãkɔ nɛ bagɛ badalɛ balɛ ishu ɔganà mɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.’
19“Kliso nɔ̀, Ekusi Agripa, ɛgɛ gagalĩ batɔ̃mɛ nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bebu akasɛ mɛ odenɔ kititíɛ shu. 20Iputɔ dɛ bagɛ alɛ Damasko ɔkɔ, kɛlɛ ɛbavɛ Yerusalem nɛ̀ Yudea petee, nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ tsyɛ, ɛɖɔ kibuiɛ tseɖe balɛ ɔsɛ̀ tɛ betsyina avɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, tɛ̀ bakasɛ balɛ tìtsyitsyina ɔganà ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. 21Kibui ɛlɛ shu sopɛ Yudanɛ evũ mɛ̀, nɛ Akaavũɔ shu, pɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ beyì mɛ. 22Pɔ Owusoso Akaa aplɛnɔ mɛ, oboyinɔ obo kiwui ɛlɛ abha, kliso ɛlɔɛtití nɛ ɛkɛlɛ pɛ ɛdalɛ ebui mɛ ɔkɔ bunɔ bhlui bhlui nɛ̀ behohoeɛ petee shɔshɔɛ. Ɛtɛɛɖɔ kibui nanà falanɔ kɛgɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ nɛ̀ Mose aɖɔ elúɔ asɛ kɛbàba ɛlɛ mɛ shu, 23sɛ Kristoɔ abamɔ bɔtɔ, kɛlɛ asɛ anɔ gɛiputɔ gɛ abàlɔ edenɔ bekpuɔ nɛishi, abaɖɔ kanɔ mɛ dadalɛ ɛbui etseɖe yɛanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ.”
24Gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ eku ɛkɛlɛ, Festo abaɖɔaɖɔ ebhui Paulo kibuiɛ nulũ. Akpɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Paulo, ɔma piapii, wɔ bɔdɔ̃ gbagbla tɛkpakpasɛ pɛ sɛ kɔ wɔamɛ ezĩ.”
25Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Mamɛ etiezĩ, bɔlɔ Ekusi Gbagbla Festo, kibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔɔ, nu kibui gbã kɛlɛ kesilulũ alɛ kɛlɛ mɛ. 26Ekusiɛ enyi ebui alɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbalà ɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ alɛishu kɔɛ fãa. Inyi sɛ ebui alɛ ɔmayɛmɛ nanà ama matì mati mɛ ɔkɔɛ, ɔmɔsɛ batɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ nɛ okpukpũ ɔkɔ. 27Ekusi Agripa, ɔyɛkɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ nabha aŋã dza? Inyi sɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã.”
28Kɛlɛ Agripa ebisi Paulo asɛ, “Ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã asɛ nɛ kibè gulũi ɛlɛ mɛɛ, ɔbɔlàwɔɛ mɛulũ pɛ ɛbàdzi Kristoeyi dza?”
29Paulo ebuiliulũ asɛ, “Kibeɛ dzi gulũio kizidze tsyɛ elo, itikulù Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ wɔ ete, pɔ ikului ɔkɔ bagɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ mɛ oboɔ petee ɔsɛ tɛ bazã asɛ mɛ ana, pɔ batɛ̀kpɛ̀ ɛɖahui ɛlɛ nɛ balɛ xɔnɔ shu.”
30Ekusiɛ alɔ, yɛ nɛ̀ kɛmadì ekusiɛ nɛ̀ Bernike ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ bazã ɛkɛlɛ aplɛnɔ alɛ. 31Bekoeyì nɛ buvũɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ bazaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ mɛɛ, baɖɔ asɛ, “Anyɛ alɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ kibui nanà gɛ shɔnɔ ɔkɔ butsí alo ɔɖavũmɛ zazã.”
32Kɛlɛ Agripa etseɖe Festo asɛ, “Pɛ otɛɔsɛ anyɛ alɛ agɛ vɛnɔ kibuiɛ nɛ Romanɛ Ekusi Gbagbla ɔkɔɔ, tsyɛalo bɔtà shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛishu.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 27
Content:
Paulo Agã Kelĩabha Kidzo Avɛ̀ Roma
1Kibeɛ gɛ bebhui kibui mɛ ɔsɛ bɔbàgã kelĩabha kidzo ɔvɛ Italia nɔ̀, balɔkɔ Paulo nɛ̀ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã anɔ teli kpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla gɛ alɛ buyuadɛdɛ akpã ulũ pɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Yulio ahɔɛ mɛ, anɔ gɛ ewuli akà kpasɛ keyuiza ovolo toli mɛ. 2Buku kelĩabhaohu odenɔ Adramiteo, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bɔgã aƒuɔ ogbogboɔ nɛ kelĩabhahuɔ ɔtɔkɔ gɛlɛ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔbàlɔ tɔnɔ aƒuabha idzoɔ. Aristaxo gɛenu Makedonia eyì gɛede Tesalonika tsyɛ azã aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ.
3Gɛ keliɛ azaa, budizhi nɛ Sidon, kɛlɛ Yulio abhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã akɔ Paulo, kɛlɛ akɔ yɛidzo asɛ avɛ yɛɔbhia alɛ ɔkɔ tɛ̀ bakɔyɛ kɛdɔ̃ nɔnɔ gɛ apɛɛ nɔ̀. 4Denɔ ɛkɛlɛ, bɔzɛlɔ tɔnɔ kelĩabha kidzoɔ kɛlɛ aƒuilɛ nɔ lɔkɔ ɔlɔ ɔvɛnɔ Kipro ogbogbòɔ ɔmɔsɛ aƒuilɛ nɔ̀ yalɛ̀ bɔlɔ. 5Gɛ bɔgã tsakɛ aƒuɔ gɛ akpasɛ Kilikia ogbogbò ibeɛ nɛ̀ Pamfilia nɔ̀, budizhi nɛ Mira gɛ akpasɛ Likia mɛ. 6Ɛkɛlɛ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla amɔ Aleksandro kelĩabhaohu gɛ lɔvɛ Italia, kɛlɛ akɔ bukù ɔlɛ. 7Bɔgã kidzoɔ kɛbɔɛ ɛbɔɛ nɛ ewui gelee mɛ kɛlɛ bɔmɔ bɔtɔ flogo pɛ̀ budiku Knido. Gɛ kɛlɛɛ fufùɔ gɛkɔ bɔlɔ kidzò ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bɔvɛ̀ otugbàa, bɔgã Kreta aƒuɔ ogbogbòɔ gɛ lotsyinà kede ɔkpɛ Salmoniɛ. 8Bɔgã ogbogbò ɔlɛ nɛ bɔtɔ̀ mɛ, kɛlɛ budiku ɔkɔ toli gɛ bekulu asɛ, Ɔtsɛkɔ Gbangbã gɛ lotsò ɔplɛnɔ Lasea ɔmãa.
9Butizĩ kibè bafala nɔ, kɛlɛ kelĩabha idzo gagã tsyɛ zikuifù, ɔmɔsɛ olugbũ nyanyã gɛonu Tɛdɔdɔfala Kiwuiɛ tɛfala. Kliso Paulo akpɛ ɔshà akɔ alɛ asɛ, 10“Baanyɛ mɔ, ɛmɔsɛ bɔlɔ kelĩabha kidzogagã ɛlɛ bamanà buluhũ, kɛlɛ bɔlɔ kelĩabhaohuɔ, etukuɔ, nɛ̀ bɔlɔ ɛkpã tsyɛ bazĩ.” 11Pɔ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla, gɛ agɛ pɛ asɛ tɛ̀ elũ Paulo ibuiɛ soɔ, avɛ edilũ agɛ yɛegè kelĩabhaohuɔ nɛ̀ ɔlɛ elete nɛibuiɛ. 12Gɛ kelĩabhaohuɔ ɔtsɛkɔ ɔtɛpɛ̃ nɛ ekukù mɛ soɔ, banɔ kpekpèɛ abadɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha sɛ bɔvɛ kidzoɔ tɛgagã nabha, kɛlɛ buziɖi kidzo mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ budiku Foenike tɛ̀ bɔzã ɛkɛlɛ nɛ ekukùɔ mɛ. Ɛkɛlɛ onù kelĩabhaohu ɔtɔkɔ nɛ Kreta gɛ obu bamɛ ɔkpɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ bɔpialɛ gɛɔvɛ kiwuiɛ ɔdɔkɔ ɛbé nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ bɔpiabha ɔkɔ gɛɔvɛ̀ kiwuiɛ ɔdɔkɔ ɛbeɛ.
Kɛlɛɛ Gagalĩ Tifufù
13Gɛ kɛlɛɛ gidè kanɔ nɔ̀ bɔpialɛ ibeɛ kpɛ tifufù esi kɛbɔɛ ɛbɔɛ nɔ, abhɛtɛ balɛ xɔnɔ asɛ bamɔ kɛgɛ bapɛ̀ɛ nɔ̀, klisoɔ bebú ɔɖaa gɛ lɔnyanà kelĩabhaohuɔ kɛlɛ bɔgã kelĩabha kidzoɔ ɔvɛ̀ Kreta ogbogbòɔ. 14Kibè gulũi tili edeɛ, kɛlɛɛ gagalĩ tili gɛ bekulu asɛ, “Kɛlɛɛ nɔ gide kanɔ nɔ̀ bɔpiabha ɔkɔ gɛɔvɛ kiwiɛ otukɔ, “kɛyalɛ̀ odenɔ Kreta aƒu ketukpɔ nabha. 15Kɛlɛɛ nɔ vũ kelĩabhaohuɔ kɛlɛ lɔzɔkɔ̀ làvɛ otugbà kliso bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔlɛ shu pɛ kɛlɛɛ nɔ̀ gbana ɔlɛ̀ vɛnɔ. 16Gɛ bɔdɛ falà nɛ ogbogbò tolì nɛ aƒu kesiakpa gɛ bekulu asɛ Klauda shuɔ, abagagalĩ akɔ bɔlɔ flogo pɛ bɔbà kpakà ɛkpã ohu ɔlɛ. 17Gɛ banyɛ akpakà ɔlɛ elu ebekeɛ, baganà ihuiɛ nɛ kelĩabhaohuɔ niesi pɛ banyana ɔlɛ evunɔ. Gɛ kifù sisi zã ɔsɛ ayisɛ ebevũ ɔlɛ nɛ Libia soɔ, beboele ɛɖaa gɛ kpakà kelĩabhaohuɔ, pɛ kɛlɛɛ nɔ̀ gbanà ɔlɛ vɛnɔ. 18Kɛlɛɛ fufùɔ hɔhɔlɛ bɔlɔ gɛ akɔ asɛ gɛ keliɛ abazaa, bakpà etukuɔ ebú atɛɛ akpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ. 19Nɛ kiwui tramɛ nabhaa, bebu ɛɖaa nɛ̀ ihuiɛ gɛ nyanà kelĩabhaohuɔ ovunɔɔ atɛɛ akpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ nɛ̀ balɛ ahɔɛ. 20Gɛ kiwuiɛ nɛ̀ awɔɛɛ etikekoeyì nɛ ewui gelee mɛ pɛ kɛlɛɛ nɔ̀ pɔ kafùɔ, bɔgaɖi idzomɛ ɔsɛ bɔbà zã nɛ̀ ɛkpã.
21Gɛ banyɛ agɛŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ewui gelee mɛ nɛ kɛlɛɛ nɔ gifùɔ shu soɔ, Paulo abalɔɛtití nɛ balɛishi pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Banyɛ mɔ, nɔotolũ mɛibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔ ɔsɛ tɛ butì gè kelĩabhaohuɔ nɛ Kreta nɔ̀, tsyɛ alo bɔtɔ ɔlɛ̀ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ gizĩ kɔ ɔlɔ gɛtà ba ɛlɛ mɛ ana. 22Pɔ otsiɛ nɔ ɛɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kemì ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔkpɛ kité, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ ɔmaɛyɛmɛ nanà ɛkpã tɛbà yala, kelĩabhaohuɔ ete ɔlɛ obozĩ. 23Kivũɔ elishiɛ, Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ teli gɛ ɛkpɛ kɛtakpu esì ɔkɔɔ ebu yɛishu akasɛ mɛ 24pɛ aɖɔ asɛ, ‘Paulo, tɛosi kifù. Kɛlɛ ɔsɛ ɔbà kebhu mɛ nɛ Romanɛ Ekusi Gbagbla namɛ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa etibhui wɔnɛ bagɛ nɔgã kelĩabha kidzoɔ ɛkpã ebú.’ 25Kliso banyɛ mɔ, nɔzã kitè kpɛkpɛ nabha, ɔmɔsɛ ɛyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha ɔŋã ɔsɛ kɛbà ba ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ kana gɛ etseɖe mɛ ana. 26Pɔ, kɛlɛɛ nɔ̀ bafù bɔlɔ ɔvɛnɔ aƒu kesiakpa tieli abha pɛ aƒumɛ ayisɛ ebevũ bɔlɔ.”
Kelĩabhaohuɔ Tɛyɛyɛ̀ɛ
27Nɛ ɛgɔnɛ tɛbha mɛɛ, kɛlɛɛ nɔ̀ kafu bɔlɔ vɛnɔ, odzinì ɔmanà nɛ aƒu nɛishitɛbhà, asɛ elishi teti flogo pɛ bagɛ balɛ egè kelĩabhaohuɔ abamɔ asɛ beetso aplɛnɔ kesiakpa. 28Batɛɛ ohui tolì gɛ ɔɖa kpasɛ ɔlɛ ulũɔ kpɛ kelĩɛ mɛ kɛlɛ bamɔ asɛ, kalɛ tidzudzuɔ mɛ lɛ asɛ bɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ kɛkpã zɛzɛ nɛ̀ afɛtaabha ana. Kɛlɛ nɛ kibè gulũi edeɛ bazata ɔɖaihui nɔ akpɛ kɛlɛ bamɔ asɛ tidzudzuɔ mɛ lɛ bɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ afɛetezhita ana. 29Gɛ kifùsisi zã ɔsɛ bɔbàdɛ yalɛ̀ ɛxɔa soɔ, batá ihui tɛlɛ̃ɛ gɛ kpakà kelĩabhaohuɔ vunɔɔ akpɛ keliɛ mɛ kɛlɛ buzikulu kititiayɛ asɛ akɔ tɛ̀ kelìɛ aza nɛ̀ ɔlɔ. 30Gɛ bazabhɛtɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ebù tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ekoeyì nɛ kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛ soɔ, kelĩabha adɛdɛ akɔ kelĩabhaohuɔ ozhiku aƒuɔ mɛ kesiɛ, babhɛtɛ kɛlɛ asɛ gɛ onupɛ babàta ihuiɛ gɛ lɛnyanà kelĩabhaohuɔ vunɔɔ ɔganà kelĩabhaohuɔ otugbà ɔkɔ ibeɛ akpɛ̀ kelĩɛ mɛ ana. 31Kɛlɛ Paulo etseɖe keyuiza anɔ gbagbla nɛ̀ buyuadɛdɛ asɛ, “Odiyinɔ̀ ɔsɛ banyɛ alɛ azã kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛɛ, bɔtɛ bazã nɛkpã.” 32Klisoɔ, buyuadɛdɛ ebhuĩ ihuiɛ gɛ nyanã ɛkpã ohuɔ vunɔ kɛlɛ lozhioku keliɛ mɛ.
33Flogo tɛ̀ olizatɔ ɔbɔnaa, Paulo akpalà balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ asɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃. Etseɖe alɛ asɛ, “Ɛgɔnɛ tɛbhà nɛɛlɛ gɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔzã wɔnɔ mɛ pɛ nɔkɔ ɔŋã bɔdɔ̃, nɔgɛŋã kɛdɔ̃ nanà. 34Otsi alɛ ɛkpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ nɔŋã bɔdɔ̃ tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã. Wɔnɔ maɛyɛmɛ nanà kɛtakpu tɛkã tinikpo tsyɛ tɛbà yalà odenɔ yɛtakpuɔ.” 35Gɛ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ebekeɛ, alɔkɔ kifufulũ tili kɛlɛ ehu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɛ ɛlɛ ɛtakpù nɛ balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ amɛ. Kɛlɛ aya ɛlɛ mɛ̀ pɛ akpaatã. 36Kemì kpɛkpɛ ebeku balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ kɛlɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ 37Bɔlɔ banunɔ petee gɛzã kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛ azã akpã taabha nɛ̀ afɛtegegene nɛ̀ tehlo. 38Gɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ asɛ gɛ bapɛ nɔ̀, bebù nikpèe etukuɔ atɛɛ akpɛ bulĩɛ mɛ asɛ tɛ̀ lɔzã foelee.
39Gɛ kiwiɛ bakoeyiɛ, betikènyi kesiakpa gɛ kalɛ abha bekuɔ tsyɛ, pɔ bamɔ ɔkɔ toli gɛ ayisɛ eyukù, ɛkɛlɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ begè kelĩabhaohuɔ adɛ vɔbɔ akpɛ ayisɛ mɛ̀ onupɛ babalàa. 40Gɛ bebhui ihuiɛ gɛ nyana kelĩabhaohuɔ bekeɛ, bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔlɛ shu kpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ abha bebhui ihuiɛ gɛ nyanà kɛpɔtɛ tsyɛ vunɔ nɛ adamɛ ɔkɔɔ. Kɛlɛ basɔ̃ kɛpɔtɛɛ gɛ kɛkɔ pɛ lɔgãa nɛ ɔlɛ shù kɛlɛ bekoeyì nɛ ɔlɛ mɛ aba ogbogbòɔ. 41Pɔ kelĩabhaohuɔ ɔdɛ yalɛ̀ ayisɛ kɛlɛ lɔwɔ́ ɛkɛlɛ. Kelĩabhaohuɔ otugbà ɔkɔ ɔdɛ yalɛ̀ ayisɛ kɛlɛ lɔzɔ lagã, kɛlɛ ɔlɛ kede ɔkɔɔ ibeɛ ɔyɛ̀ɛ wluiwlui nɛ aƒulĩɛ gɛitsùɔ shu so.
42Buyuadɛdɛ anɔ nɔ̀ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ tɛ̀ beyì ɔɖavũmɛ azazã, tɛ balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ anɔ nanà etibè de bulĩɛ tɛ ebù tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ ashɛ. 43Pɔ gɛ keyuiza anɔ gbagbla apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ebù Paulo xɔnɔ eyìnɔ nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ soɔ, agɛkɔ balɛ kidzò. Etseɖe bagɛ babalà bulĩɛ edoɔ asɛ beputɔ̀ atɛɛ ekoeyì nɛ kelĩabhaohuɔ mɛ tɛ̀ bavɛ kesiakpa. 44Bagɔgɔɛ nɔ xɔnɔ azã isikpã nɛ̀ kelĩabhaohuɔ gɛɔyɛɛ nɔ̀ busipɛ̃ nabha, kɛlɛ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, aka nyia aka ezhi eku kesiakpa nabha nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ.

Title: BANƆKPƐKPƐ AXƆ̃Ɛ 28
Content:
Paulo Ediku Malta Ogbogbòɔ
1Gɛ budiku ogbogbòɔ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ koɔ, bɔba mɔsɛ bekulu aƒumɛ ketukpɔ alɛ asɛ̀ Malta. 2Banunɔ gɛ alɛ aƒumɛ ketukpɔ alɛ nabha abhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã akɔ ɔlɔ. Bakpɛ kifú kɛlɛ bekulu bɔlɔ ɔsɛ bɔbaŋãlɛ ɛlɛ ɔmɔsɛ subha adɔ kɛlɛ bɔbɔlɔ zã. 3Paulo eshogò bɔdzrɔbiyì, kɛlɛ gɛ alɔkɔ bɔlɛ aakpɛ kifuɔ mɛ koɔ, eblidza gulũ teli gɛ kifúɔ hunu yɛ pɛ ekoeyì nɛ bɔdzyɛ nɔ mɛɛ, aba akpɛ akanà yɛahɔkpɔ. 4Gɛ banunɔ gɛ betsiɖi aƒumɛ ketukpɔ nabha amɔ eblidza gɛ akpɛ asɔ̃ nɛ yɛahɔkpɔɔ, betseɖe bagɔlɔ asɛ, “Anyɛ alɛ ebedzì anɔ gɛ eyianɔ, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ ebu yɛkpã eyinɔ nɛ aƒuɔ mɛ ebeke tsyɛɛ, beke kulu kebhu nɛ yɛ asɛ tɛ̀ atɛzã nɛkpã.” 5Pɔ, Paulo eshuku eblidza akpɛ kifúɔ mɛ kɛlɛ kɛnanà gɛ bhɛtɛ yɛ. 6Banunɔ ezeɖi asɛ ebèyeke alo ebeglebe adɔ etsì odunu ɔlɛ, pɔ gɛ bazã epo kibè dzloloɔ pɛ bagɛ mɔ asɛ kibui nanà bhɛtɛ yɛɛ, betsyina balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ pɛ baɖɔ asɛ obudì anɔ yɛenu.
7Bevũ teli azã kibe ɛlɛ gɛenu Publio, anɔ gɛ yɛaŋã bukusi nɛ aƒumɛ kesiakpa nabha ayɛ. Ayɛkɛ bɔlɔ akpɛ yɛɔpã mɛ kɛlɛ nɛ ewui tata mɛɛ, akpɛ bɔlɔ samɛ kɛlɛ awɔa bufu akɔ ɔlɔ. 8Yɛakaa adɔ bɔnyã eli bɔdɔ̃ abha, gɛ buwui vũi pɛ azadɛ dzyosu. Paulo etsoku edì ɖii, kɛlɛ gɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa ebekeɛ, atɔɖɔ yɛahɔɛ nɛ yɛabha kɛlɛ yɛishumɛ gagalĩ. 9Gɛ kibui ɛlɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛɛ, banyanyã gɔgɔɛ nɔ̀ nɛ aƒumɛ ketukpɔ alɛ nabha aba, kɛlɛ ebu banyã akɔ alɛ. 10Badɛmɛ bɔlɔ ibui nɛ edzo gelee abha, kɛlɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔbà tɔnɔ̀ kelĩabha kidzoɔ, bakɔ ɔlɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔɔpɛ nɔ̀.
Roma Tikuku
11Nɛ bewoele tata edeɛ gɛ bɔzã ekukùɔ mɛ nɛ aƒumɛ ketukpɔ alɛ nabha, bɔzɛ tɔnɔ kelĩabha kidzo. Kelĩabhaohuɔ gɛ bukuɔ ɔlɛ onu Aleksandro ohu gɛ bekulù ɔlɛ sɛ taabha eyi obudì, Kasto nɛ̀ Pulox. 12Budizhi nɛ Sirakuse ogbogbòɔ, kɛlɛ bɔzã ɛkɛlɛ ewui tata. 13Denɔ ɛkɛlɛ bɔzɛ tɔnɔ kelĩabha kidzoɔ kɛlɛ budiku Regio. Gɛ keliɛ azaa, kanɔ nɔ̀ bɔpialɛ ɔkɔ kɛlɛɛ nɔ zɛkpɛ tifufù esi, kɛlɛ gɛ keliɛ azazaa, budiyì nɛ Puteoli 14Ɛkɛlɛ bɔdɛ tɔnɔ badzya teli gɛ bekulu ɔlɔ asɛ bɔzã balɛ ɔbha ɔgɔnɛ zɛzɛ. Ɛkɛlɛ bɔlɔde pɛ budiku Roma. 15Badzya nɛ ɛkɛlɛ etilũ asɛ bɔɔbà, kliso baba tsyana ɔlɔ avɛnɔ ɔkɔ dzlolo gɛonu Apio kedziɛ mɛ nɛ̀ beefù ɔtsɛkɔ. Gɛ Paulo anyamɔ banyɛ alɛ koɔ kɛlɛ ehu Owusoso Akaa nɛahɔɛ pɛ kemikpɛkpɛ eku yɛ mɛ. 16Gɛ budiku Roma nɔ̀, bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ Paulo shu asɛ tɛ̀ azã yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ tɛ̀ keyuadɛdɛ tenikpo azãpoe.
Bezepo Paulo Pɛ Aɖɔ Kibuiɛ Nɛ Roma
17Ewui tata edeɛ, Paulo ɛkulu Yudanɛ besheshèɛ eshogò. Gɛ beshogò ebekeɛ, etseɖe balɛ asɛ, “Mɛadzya alɛ Israelanɛ mɔ, ɛgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà nɛ̀ bɔlɔ banunɔ alo bɔlɔ ashuĩ alɛ ɛkɔɔ shu flogo, bevũ mɛ nɛ Yerusalem pɛ balɔkɔ mɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ Romanɛ. 18Bapɔɛ ebui mɛ nimɛ kɛlɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛishu, ɔmɔsɛ ɛgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà gɛ bashɔnɔ ɔkɔ butsí. 19Pɔ gɛ Yudanɛ agɛ dɛmɛ ana soɔ, bebètũilɛ akpɛ mɛulũ asɛ ɛvɛ Romanɛ Ekusi Gbagbla ɔkɔ, gɛnɛ gɛ kibui nanà gɛlɛ mahɔɛ gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ nɛ mɛ banunɔ shu flogo. 20Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ wɔ tɛ̀ bɔɖɔaɖɔ. Mɛ awɔ̃ lulu ɔkɔ Israelanɛ so pɛ banyã mɛ nɛ̀ ɛɖahui ɛlɛ.”
21Bebuiliulũ asɛ, “Bɔkà yɛkɛ buplukpa nanà odenɔ Yudea nɛ wɔshu, kɛlɛ badzya ɔmayɛmɛ nanà gɛede ɛkɛlɛ aba, aka kɔ bɔlɔ tititì nanà alo pɛ abaɖɔ kibui kpa nanà nɛ wɔshu. 22Pɔ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bulũ kɛgɛ ɔmɔ nɛ kɛlɛ shuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ banunɔ nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ɔhakpa alɛ shu.”
23Batɔɖɔ kiwui asɛ tɛ babamɔ Paulo, kɛlɛ balɛ anɔ nɔ̀ gɛaba ebekpe atɔɖɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Paulo azãa. Odenɔ kɛvɔlɔ vɛnɔ owlagoɔ, ezebu ebui mɛ pɛ adalɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ŋaŋã shu kɔ alɛ, kɛlɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ etsyina balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ odenɔ Mose ɔshaa nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɛ buplukpa mɛ avɛnɔ Yesu ɔkɔ. 24Beteli ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ebetsyina nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ azaɖɔ shu, pɔ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ xɔnɔ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã. 25Bazawlɔãkɛ ebuiɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ kɛlɛ bakpa ashɛ kibeɛ gɛ Paulo aɖɔ kibui gɔgɔɛ ɛlɛ asɛ, “Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔɖɔ kibui gbã otseɖe wɔnɔ ashuĩ alɛ kibeɛ gɛ aɖɔ gana ebuiɖɔluanɔ Yesaya abha asɛ,
26“ ‘Vɛ banɔ alɛ ɔkɔ tɛ̀ oditseɖe alɛ ɔsɛ,
“Nobozolũ ebuiɛ, pɔ noti bozolũ alɛ esi,
Nɔbɔzɔmɔ bɔdɔ̃ pɔ noti bozolũ bɔlɛ esi.”
27Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ alɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ etibu tɛtsɛɖɛ,
agagalĩ flogo pɛ belũ kibui akpɛ batɔ̃ mɛ,
kɛlɛ badã balɛ awuhũɔ.
Tsyɛ alo balɛ awuhũɔ atamɔ bɔdɔ̃ flogo,
kɛlɛ betelũ nɛ̀ balɛ atɔ̃ɔ,
betelũ ebui esi nɛ̀ balɛ etúɔ
kɛlɛ betetsyinà pɛ ɛtabu banyã ɔkɔ alɛ.’
28“Kliso ɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ notì ɔsɛ basɛsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ bubu lu ɔkɔ ɛkpã nɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ, kɛlɛ balɛ xɔnɔ abà taatɔ̃ nɛ̀ kibuiɛ!”
29Gɛ aɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ ebekeɛ, Yudanɛ ashɛ pɛ baza wlɔãkɛ kibui gagalĩ nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ.
30Paulo azã ɛkɛlɛ agɔ taabha nɛ bɔpã tuli gɛ abuia kɛbhɛ asɛ tɛ̀ azã bɔlɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ayɛkɛ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ bazaba yɛɔkɔ asɛ tɛ bamɔɛ nɔ̀. 31Gɛ ananà egidzu ahɔɛ nɛ yɛabha soɔ, aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa bukusiŋaŋã kibuiɛ nɛ bupù mɛ, kɛlɛ akasɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo shu.

Title: ROMANƐ OTUGBA IBUI
Content:
Otugba Ibui
Paulo afɔnɔ yɛahũ dzadzã eplukpa alɛ asɛsɛ Romanɛ sɛ tɛ babalɛ akɔ yɛɔha tiɖiɖi nɛ Roma. Yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ nu ɔsɛ tɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ Kristo abha aŋãa nɛ kibe gulũi tili mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ baplɛ nii tɛ avɛ Spania. Nɛ ebui dadalɛ mɛɛ, Paulo afɔnɔ keplukpa alɔkɔ ebu ebui mɛ akɔ Romanɛ nɛ kilũ gɛ elũ Kristo yɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã niesi, nɛ̀ ebuiɛ mɛ gɛ Kristoanɛ bazagã nɛ balɛ ɛkpã mɛ. Romanɛ eplukpa alɛ ebu Paulo yɛebuiɖɔɖɔ pete akasɛ.
Gɛ asɛnɔ Romanɛ ɔha pɛ akɔ beti nɛ kikulu gɛ ezekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ balɛ ɛtakpu niedeɛ, Paulo avɛ kɛlɛ abha ebu kibui osiɛ akɔ eplukpa asɛ, “Ɔmɔsɛ gana kibui gbangbã mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa ebu yɛtɛzazã piapi nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame akasɛ. Tɛzazã piapii lɛ nu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui odenɔ kibeɛ gɛiputɔ ɔvɛnɔ kibe gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ.” (1.17)
Paulo azavɛ ɛlɛ abha nɛ̀ kibui osi ɔlɛ. Ebu ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ banɔdzyrameeyiɛ pete, Yudanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tɛ bazã piapii nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ balɛ pete tɛzazã mɛɛ, balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ohumi esi. Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ anɔ asɛ alɛ piapii onupɛ ayɛkɛ Yesu Kristo abha aŋãa. Kidegba azaɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ ɛkpã vɔvɔ gɛlɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ Kristoɔ shu, gɛ kide kishopo vɔvɔ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa mɛ. Anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋãa amɔ tɛyɔyɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa kɛlɛ yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ lobu ayɛyɛkɛŋã odenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ohumi nɛ̀ butsi ahɔɛ mɛ. Nɛ kɛtakpu 5-8 miɛ mɛ̀ɛ, azaɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛgi nu Owusoso Akaa yɛɔsha nɛ̀ yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ohumi nɛ ayɛyɛkɛŋã yɛkpã mɛ. Anɔkpɛkpɛ Paulo azawlɔãkɛ ebui bibisi nɛ kana gɛ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ eku Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lɛ mɛ ɔkɔ banɔdzyrameeyiɛ petee. Gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ aɖɔ asɛ, Yudanɛ Kristo mayɛkɛ mayɛkɛ, nu Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ awɔ̃pɛ tieli, kɛlɛ gana kidzo ɛlɛ nabha sɛ tɛ banɔdzyrameeyiɛ pete amɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ tibhui bhuibu nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ, kɛlɛ Yudanɛ Yesu mayɛkɛ mayɛkɛ tɛbazã kɛlɛ abha ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Paulo afɔnɔ kɛlɛ ehu utɔ̃ nɛ kɛzã gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ Kristo abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã zãa shu, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ zɛdɛɛ, balɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. Aɖɔaɖɔ atɔ̃ nɛ kɛzã gɛ anɔ abazã asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa, nɛ kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ nɛ̀ ɔhagbo, ɔplɛnɔ ishu bibisi olũ ɔsɛ, kiɖuwoe lu gɛpɛ ɔkɔ tɛbhɛtɛ. Gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ, Paulo afɔnɔ yɛahɔɛ ebui teli nɛ̀ ebui gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití nɔ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ebuiɛ nɛ̀ kibui osiɛ 1.1-17
Tibubu idzo tɛpɛpɛɛ 1.18—3.20
Owusoso Akaa idzo ɔkɔ anɔ tibubu 3.21—4.25
Ɛkpã vɔvɔ nɛ Kristo mɛ 5.1—8.39
Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɔkɔ Israelanɛ 9.1—11.36
Kristoanɛ ɛkpã zazãna 12.1—15.13
Paulo ebui gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ sɛsɛnɔ 15.14—16.27

Title: ROMANƐ 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo, Kristo Yesu yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ bekulu asɛ tɛ edzi anɔkpɛkpɛ, pɛ bebu elu akɔ Owusoso Akaa Ibui Gbangbã. 2Kibui Gbangbã gɛ atɔɖɔ elu akpɛ otugbà ɔgana yɛebuiɖɔluanɛ nabha, nɛ Kibui Dadalɛ mɛ 3nɛ Yɛeyianyɛ shu, gɛ nɛ yɛ anɔdzyrame mɛ tɛzazã ulũɔ, David yɛeshui yɛedzi, 4kɛlɛ, gana Ɔfɔfuĩa dadalɛ mɛɛ, bebui akasɛ nɛ ohumi nɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, yɛenu Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi, gana yɛtɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛɛ, yɛenu Yesu Kristo, bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ. 5Gana yɛabha, kɛlɛ nɛ yɛinye mɛɛ, bɔmɔ tibhui bhuibu kɛlɛ budzi banɔkpɛkpɛ sɛ tɛ bukulu banɔ odenɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ pete ishi mana batɔ̃ lulũ gɛ bede tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. 6Kɛlɛ wɔnɔ Romanɛ tsyɛ nɔkpasɛ bagɛ bekulu asɛ bedzi Yesu Kristoanɛ nɛishi.
7Wɔnɔ banɔ dadalɛ pete nɛ Roma gɛ bekulu, pɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔɔ,
Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishuyɔyɔ odenɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ kɔ wɔnɔ.
Paulo Yɛtɛpɛpɛ Ɔsɛ Tɛ Avɛ Roma
8Iputɔ, ihu mɛ Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha, ɔmɔsɛ baɖɔ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui afala nɔ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ. 9Owusoso Akaa, anunɔ gɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ mɛdɛ nɛ̀ mɛitúɔ nyɔ̃ɔ nɛ Yɛeyi Nɛibui Gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛɛ, yɛabà dalɛ mɛishu nɛ kɛbakà gɛ ɛbakà wɔnɔɛbui ibe nyiɛ beɛ 10nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu kiwui nyiɛ wui mɛ, kɛlɛ mɛ tɛpɛpɛ otsi alɛ kɛlɛ nu ɔsɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa adalɛ idzo akɔ mɛ tɛ mɛba wɔnɔ ɔbha.
11Mɛ tɛpɛpɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ mɛmɔ ɔnɔ, sɛ tɛ mɛlɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ tuli kɔ ɔnɔ tɛ nɔmɔ ohumi. 12Kɛgɛ ɛɖɔ, pɛ ɛpɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ inu sɛ tɛ bɔlɔkɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa kpɛ bagɔlɔ ohumi nɔ. 13Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ kɛzã tititì mɛ kɔ ɔnɔ ɔsɛ anɛ obo mɛtɔɖɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ tɛbaba ibui flogo (pɔ ɛgɛzɛmɔ ɛdzo ɔmana otsiɛ) tɛ mɛmɔ ɛdzo tɛ mɛibu atɔwui nɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, asɛ ibu gɛ itibu atɔwui teli gɛ letinu Yudanɛ nɛ ɛkɔ tili ana.
14Kɛxɔ̃ɛ kinu ɔkɔ mɛ sɛ tɛ ibu Helanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Helanɛ, bebuitinɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinyi ibui. 15Kliso pɛ kinu kibui gɛ kɛdzã kiwuhũ ɔkɔ mɛ sɛ tɛ mɛɖɔ ibui gbangbã ɔkɔ ɔnɔ agɛ ɔlɛ Roma tsyɛ.
16Ɔmɔsɛ Kibui Gbangbã tinu kiwuĩbui ɔkɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa yɛohumi ɔkɔ, anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋãa yɛtibubu. Putɔ nɔɔ, ɔkɔ Yudanɛ flogo pɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ. 17Ɔmɔsɛ denɔ Kibui Gbangbã mɛɛ bebu kɛlɔkɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ anɔ teli asɛ enu anɔ dadalɛ, gɛ kinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui odenɔ kesi kpɛkpɛ mɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɔtɔ̃kɔ, asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ ɛlɛ elu asɛ, “Anɔ dadalɛ abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.”
Owusoso Akaa Yɛɔmɔpɔɛ Nɛ Banɔdzyrame Shu
18Bebu Owusoso Akaa yɛɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ betisì yɛifuɔ akasɛ odenɔ kititíɛ ke, kɛlɛ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩeleteɛ gɛ ezhinɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ akpɛ esi ɔgana balɛ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, 19kɛgɛ ɛlɛ sɛ beti odenɔ Owusoso Akaa shu pɔ lɛ tititì mɛ ɔkɔ balɛ kukuku flogo, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa atɛ dalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ akasɛ alɛ. 20Denɔ kanɔ mɛ esi kpɛkpɛ mɛ keɛ, Owusoso Akaa tɛzazã gbangbã gɛlɛ tikpukpũ mɛ, nɛ̀ yɛohumi tihɔɔ nɛ̀ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛzazã mɛɛ, bɔmɔ alɛ mɛ tɛdadalɛ, kɛlɛ esi lulũ alɛ akɔ ebuiɛ odenɔ kɛgɛ babhɛtɛ mɛ, kliso kɛtakpu kɔkɔ ma ɔkɔ anɔ nanà sɛ etinyi ebuiɛ.
21Gɛ benyii ɔmɔ asɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ elo, batɛkpɛ yɛinye nɛ itití alo pɛ behu yɛahɔɛ, balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ bhɛbhɛtɛ edzi kɛlɛ́, kɛlɛ balɛ bɔga dɔdɔ etúɔ mɛ eku otumũ. 22Beɖi asɛ bebuitinɛ benu, pɔ bebedzi baga, 23sɛ tɛ bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ̀ inye nɛititíɛ, betsyina ɛlɛ akɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛlɛ asɛ banɔ tsitsí, bɔzhɔɛ, bagã nɛ̀ bagã gɛ betsì nɛ esiakpa boŋ.
24Kliso nɛ balɛ etúɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ ɔkɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ulũ soɔ, Owusoso Akaa ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu akɔ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui nɛ̀ atsɔ̃ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ. 25Batsrakɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gbangbã nɛ̀ asɛnɛ sɛsɛ, kɛlɛ baakpɛ ɛtakpu esi pɛ baadɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔ banɔdzyrame ɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ, ɔdɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Kititíayɛ gɛ ebu bɔdɔ̃ɔ, anunɔ gɛ kɛlɛ bakpɛ yɛinye nɛitití tihɔɔ nɔ. Amen.
26Nɛ alɛ shu soɔ Owusoso Akaa ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu akɔ awuĩ ebui gɛ badɛmɛ nɔ. Balɛ adzɛ etsyina awɔsɔ̃ nɛ bagɔlɔ, gɛ kitinu agɛ ebu alɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ flogo. 27Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa banyɛ tsyɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛ adzɛ gbagbana shu, pɛ bawɔsɔ̃ nɛ̀ balɛ banyɛ ɔhagbo alɛ. Banyɛ abhɛtɛ atsɔ̃ ebui nɛ̀ balɛ banyɛ ɔhagbo alɛ kɛlɛ bayɛkɛ balɛ atɔ̃pɔpɔ̃ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ kɛma sɛ babhɛtɛ pɛ babhɛtɛɛ shu.
28Otsi nɔ, gɛ bagɛmɔ asɛ kinu ibui gɛ kɛyɛkɛ edzi sɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa bubuti akpɛ ishu mɛ soɔ, etsyina balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ etũ, sɛ tɛ baabhɛtɛ ebuiɛ gɛ lama ɔbhɛtɛ kɔɔ. 29Banunɔ mɛ eyuku nɛ̀ atakpu mɛ gagalĩ, ebui zizĩ, mɛete ɛyɛ tɛpɛpɛ̃ nɛ̀ banɔ tidzyidzyini ɔkpɛ, alɛ ayɛkɛ alɛ mɛ. Ebui kpa bhlatɔ enu awuhũ dzadzã nɛ banɔ shu, banɔ yiyí, ebla pɛpɛ, banɔ wɔɛwɔ̀ɛ nɛ̀ ɔhagbo shu tizizĩ. Benu olugbũedzi agagã anɔ, 30kaɖɔ kpa ɖɔɖɔ nɛ banɔ shu, banɔ gɛ anyana Owusoso Akaa akpɛ ɛya mɛ, banɔ gɛ bakɔala anɔ, befeke ishu pɛ beku ishu awɔ̃, bapɛɛ edzo nɔnɔ abha gɛ babagã abhɛtɛ ibui zizĩ, batɛkpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ balɛ akaa nɛ̀ balɛ elĩ alɛ, 31bubuti nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ma alɛ, betiɖi anɔ ashagabui, pɔɔ bagagalĩ atakpu mɛ. 32Gɛ benyi piapii ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔsha gɛ akɔ ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ bagɛ bazã nɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ, babapɔ̃ balɛ atɔ̃ nɛ̀ butsí tsyɛ elo, bavɛ ɛlɛ abha azã nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa ɛlɛ, kɛlɛ bakɔ asɛ tɛ banɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ azã nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɛlɛ.

Title: ROMANƐ 2
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Yɛebhu Gbangbã Tikukulu
1Klisoɔ wɔɛtakpu kɔkɔ nanà ma, wɔ anunɔ gɛ okulu ebhu ɔkɔ anɔ teliɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kibui nɔnɔ́ idi gɛ ɔlɔkɔ okulu ebhu ɔkɔ anɔ bhlatɔ nɔɔ, kɛlɛ wɔ tsyɛ ɔlɔkɔ obu ishui ipɔ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔanɔ gɛ obhui ibui mɛ tsyɛɛ, ɔbhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ nɛidi. 2Bunyi otsi alɛ ɔsɛ, Owusoso Akaa yɛebhu kukulu nɛ̀ bagɛ babhɛtɛ ebui alɛ nɛidiɛ nu kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nulũ. 3Kliso onupɛ wɔ anɔ wɔ̃a obu banɔɛ ɛpɔ, pɛ wɔ tsyɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi keɛ pɔ, buɖi woɖi ɔsɛ ɔbɔlà obu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ebhu kukulu nulũɔ dza? 4Pɛnɔsɛ mabomabo nɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔɛ nɛ yɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, yɛemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ yɛtɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔɔ shu, pɔ nɔtɛ ɔmɔsɛ yɛyamɛ gbangbã gɛ abhɛtɛɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ notsyina etú mɛɛ dza?
5Pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ atɔ̃ gagalĩ nɛ̀ ɛtúɔ mɛ gɛ nogitsyina shuɔ, noshogò ɔmɔpɔɛ olu ɔkɔ ishu nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ iwui nabha gɛ ebèbu yɛebhu kukulu gbangbã akasɛ. 6Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “ebebhui ibui mɛ akɔ anɔ nyia anɔ nɛ kɛgɛ abhɛtɛ nulũ.” (Psalomo 62.12) 7Bagɛ gana balɛ emi kpɛkpɛ mɛ pɛ baabhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã, pɛ bazapɛɛ inye gbangbã nɛ̀ bobo akɔ Owusoso Akaa, pɛ bazapɛ asɛ tɛ bazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɖaa nɔ, abakɔ alɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ. 8Pɔ bagɛ bapɛ balɛyɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ, pɛ bashɛ nɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ shu pɛ balɛ ebui kpa edeɛ, batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ gagalĩi nɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔlɛ ɔkɔ alɛ. 9Bɔtɔ nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔbɔba anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ azã nɛ ɛkpã zizĩ nabha, banɔ gɛ eputɔɔ enu Yudanɛ, flogo pɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ, 10pɔ ishu dadalɛ, bobo nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ibui gbangbã. Banɔ gɛ eputɔɔ enu Yudanɛ, flogo pɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ. 11Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ etiɖi ananà amɛ.
12Banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ Mose yɛɔsha gɛnyã alɛ pɛ bazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpaa, batɛ balɔkɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ àpɔ batɔ̃ akɔ alɛ nɔ, pɔ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ alɛ Mose ɔsha ɔlɛ nìesi pɛ babhɛtɛ ebui kpaa, babalɔkɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ ekulu ebhu akɔ alɛ nɔ. 13Ɔmɔsɛ anɛ bagɛ belũ ɔshaa balɛ enu banɔ dadalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛamɛ, pɔ bagɛ aabhɛtɛ ɔsha nabhaa, balɛ Owusoso Akaa ebebu akasɛ asɛ benu anɔ dadalɛ. 14(Onupɛ ɔsha ɔlɛ ɔma bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ahɔɛ, pɔ asɛ banɔdzyrame ana pɛ bazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɔsha nulũɔɔ, kɛlɛ bedzi banɔ gɛ bakpɛ ɔsha ɔkɔ ishu, gɛ ɔsha pɔ ɔma balɛ ahɔɛ flogo, 15pɔ nɛ balɛ tɛgagã nɛ ɔsha lũɔɔ, kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ bafɔnɔ ɔsha nɛ balɛ etúɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ balɛ etúɔ mɛ ebui tsyɛ adalɛ alɛ shu, kɛlɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ ebhui alɛ ulũ, kɛlɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa yɛebu balɛulũ tsyɛ.) 16Kɛbàba kɛlɛ mɛ nɛ kiwui nabha gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebekulu ebhu nɛ banɔdzyrame ebui kpukpũɔ, ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha asɛ ɛɖɔɔ gɛ mɛibui gbangbã ɖɔ luɔ ana.
Yudanɛ Nɛ̀ Ɔshaa
17Wɔ, onupɛ okulu ishu ɔsɛ Yudaeyi wonu, pɛ olu awɔ̃ nɛ ɔsha nabha, pɛ ofeke ishu nɛ wɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi dzidzì shu, 18onupɛ onyi Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lu, pɛ ɔdɛmɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ ɔkpasɛ kɛlɛ odenɔ ɔshaa mɛ, 19ɔmɔ ishu ɔsɛ onu awuhũpu agbagbana nɛ̀ kifu ɔkɔ bagɛ balɛ otumũ mɛ, 20gɛ onu adɔkasɛ ɔkɔ bawaga, nɛ̀ adɔkasɛ ɔkɔ bunuvɔɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bùbuti nɛ̀ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔɔ, kɛlɛ kpasɛ wɔ mɛɛ. 21kɛlɛ wɔ gɛ ɔkasɛ banɔ bhlatɔ ɔdɔ̃ɔ, ɔtɛ ɔlà kasɛ wɔshu udɔ̃ dza? Wɔ gɛ ɔsɛ beti zuruɔ, wɔ ozuruɔ dza? 22Wɔ gɛ ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ banɔ batɛ dɛ ɔmamɛɛ, wɔ ɔdɛ ɔmamɛɛ dza? Wɔ gɛ ɔtɛ ɔdɛmɛ obudi ibuiɛ, wɔ ozuru nɛ obudi ukã mɛɛ dza? 23Wɔ gɛ ofeke ishu nɛ ɔsha shuɔ, wɔtɛɛ Owusoso Akaa olu pɛ ɔta esi nɛ ɔsha shuɔ dza? 24Asɛ kɛfɔnɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Wɔnɔ Yudanɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ baɖɔ ebusoebui nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu.” (Yesaya 52.5).
25Kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui pɛ popopo onupɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ tibhui bhui ɔsha nabha, pɔ onupɛ ɔta esi nɛ ɔshaa shuɔ, kɛlɛ ɔshɔnɔ anɔ gɛ egibhui kɛhɔ̃a. 26Onupɛ bagɛ begibhui ahɔ̃a akɔ, pɔ balɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ, kiɖeso pɛ batɛ balɔkɔ alɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ bebhui ahɔ̃a akɔ anaa dza? 27Anunɔ gɛ begibhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ anii, pɔ aagã nɛ ɔsha nabha piapii nɔ, ebebu wɔ gɛ ɔshaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lɛ wɔahɔɛ pɛ onu kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui elete, pɔ onu anunɔ gɛ ɔta esiɛ.
28Anɔ etinu Yudaeyi onupɛ ishupi mɛ ete ko yɛalɛ, pɛnɔsɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ nu ishudzya mɛ ibui ete ko. 29Ao, anunɔ gɛ enu Yudaeyi tututuɔ yɛenu anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu mɛ, kɛlɛ yɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ nu kitúɔ ɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui odenɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ, kɛlɛ anɛ nɛ ɔsha gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ nulũ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidi inye kpɛkpɛ nɛititíɛ, anɛ banɔ ɔkɔ kide pɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ.

Title: ROMANƐ 3
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Abhɛtɛ Atɔɖɔ Yɛibui Nabha
1Otsiɛ nɔ pɔ, kinye yɛyɛkɛ dɛ ɖuwoe gɛ lɛ kɛlɛ̀ mɛ ɔsɛ anɔ teli enu Yudaeyi, alo tɛpɛpɛ̀ dɛ ɖuwoe gɛ lɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui mɛ? 2Ebuiɛ gɛ bamɔɔ, lekpè! Kɛgi putɔ ɔkɔ alɛ onu ɔsɛ, Yudanɛ ahɔɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ yɛebuiɛ akpɛ.
3Kɛlɛ kɛbazã onupɛ balɛ mɛ eteli agɛyɛkɛ aŋã? Balɛ ibui abha mayɛkɛ ŋãa bakɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ abayɔlɔ ɛbui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔɔ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ dza? 4Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! Banunɔ pete edzi asɛnɛ elete tsyɛ elo, Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ atɛba yɔlɔ kɛgɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔɔ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ ɛlɛ elu asɛ,
“Sɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ wɔebui nabha aŋã, onupɛ ɔɖɔaɖɔɔ
kɛlɛ tɛ bebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ wɔ.”
5Onupɛ bɔlɔ ebui abha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ lakɔ asɛ Owusoso Akaa ebui abha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ xɔnɔ awɔ̃ɛ piapii nɔ, kiɖuwoe bɔbaɖɔo? Bɔbaɖɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa agɛna bhɛtɛ onupɛ akpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ ɔlɔ shuɔ dza? (Ɛpɔ̃ɛ ebui mɛ asɛ anɔdzyrame ana.) 6Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! Onupɛ kɛlɛ ɛlɛ̀ mɛ ana pɔɔ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa abalà kebhu ekulu nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ɔ dza? 7Anɔ teli abapɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ mɛasɛ, “Onupɛ mɛasɛnɛ sɛsɛ yɛakɔ asɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa ibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ dalɛ yɛishu gelee nɔ, kiɖeso pɛ beze bebu mɛ ɛpɔ asɛ ebui kpa abhɛbhɛtɛelete mɛinu?” 8Kiɖe pɛ nɔtɛ ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, nɛ kana gɛ bezĩ bɔlɔ shu afalanɔ pɛ baaɖɔ ebui kpa nɛ ɔlɔ shu soɔ, “Nɔkɔ bɔbhɛtɛ ibui kpa tɛ bɔmɔ kɛgbangbã boŋ edenɔ ɛlɛ mɛɛ dza?” Nɛ kɛlɛ nulũɔ, balɛ kɛpɔ bubúɔ lɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ.
Anɔ Nanà Etinu Anɔ Gbangbã
9Otsiɛ nɔ pɔ, kiɖuwoe lu bɔbaɖɔ? Bɔbaɖɔ ɔsɛ bɔpɛ̀ dɛ anɔ teli dza? Ao, kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana kura! Bɔtɛ ibu kɛlɛ mɛ kpɛ otugbà ɔsɛ, bagɛ enu Yudanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ pete alɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ esi. 10Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ,
“Anɔ nanà ama gɛ enu anɔ gbangbã, tenikpo ete tsyɛ ama,
11Anɔ nanà ama gɛ elũ ebui esi,
kɛlɛ tenikpo ete ama gɛ ebisi Owusoso Akaa nɛtɔ.
12Balɛ pete betsyina ɛdzo,
balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ nanà abhama ɛnanà mɛ,
balɛ anɔ tenikpo tsyɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã
tenikpo pɛ tsyɛ ama.”
13“Balɛ ahalukoe nɔ enu idzeɖe gɛ lɛyaka dzi,
balɛ enikeɛ, asɛnɛ ebui laɖɔ.”
“Beblidzya gulũ abɔɛ kalɛ alɛ balɛ olũgbuɔ shu.”
14“Ebui ɖɔɖɔ kpɛ anɔ nɛ̀ agɛ apɔɛ nɔ, alɛ eyuku balɛ ilugbũɔ mɛ.”
15“Bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ akɔ dzyosu esi tɛ babàlɛ,
16bɔdɔ̃ zizĩ nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔlɛ obu alɛ edzoɔ akasɛ nɛ balɛ mɛ,
17Kɛlɛ ishu yɔyɔ ɛdzo xɔnɔɔ, betinyi.”
18“Betisì Owusoso Akaa nɛifu nɛ kɛnanà mɛ.”
19Otsi alɛ bunyi sɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ɔsha ɔɖɔɔ, kinu bagɛ balɛ ɔsha niesi ibui, tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ anɔ nyia anɔ ataatɔ̃, tɛ Owusoso Akaa ekulu ebhu nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ petee. 20Kliso batɛ balɔkɔ anɔ nanà asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, sɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ ɔsha nabha so, pɔ gana ɔsha mɛ boŋuɔ, buuti sɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ alɛ.
Gana Yesu Abhaa Balɔkɔ Anɔ Asɛ Enu Anɔ Gbangbã
21Owusoso Akaa ebu akasɛ ɔlɔ otsi alɛ nɛ kɛlɔkɔ gɛ balɔkɔ anɔ teli asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã, gɛ anɛ ɔsha mɛ kide ba. Ɔsha nɛ̀ Ebuiɖɔluanɛ adalɛ kɛlɛishu. 22Anɔ gbangbã dzidzi alɛ, Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ kide ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã petee. Egibu ananà ɔtɔ, 23ɔmɔsɛ anɔ ka nyia ka abhɛtɛ ibui kpa, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛishu dadalɛ yala nɛ bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ shu, 24kɛlɛ bebhui utsyɔa gbangbã akɔ ɔlɔ ɔgana Yesu Kristo gɛ abalɛ dzyosu nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtakpu nabha. 25Owusoso Akaa, alɔkɔɛ akɔ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ ɔlɔ ebui zizĩɛ etsye ɔlɔ ɔgana yɛdzyosu nabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ ebu yɛebhu kukulu gbangbã akasɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ yɛitú esi lulu mɛɛ, adã awuhũ nɛ ebui kpa gɛ beti bhoso bhɛtɛ nabha. 26Abhɛtɛ ana nɛ kibe ɛlɛ sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ akasɛ asɛ, enu anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ibui nɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. Kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, yɛalɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ Yesu abha aŋã tsyɛ asɛ benu banɔ gbangbã.
27Fakɔ kura ishu fefeke lɛ? Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ. Nɛ idzo ɖuwoe lu abha? Kɛlinu sɛ ɔbhɛtɛ nɛ ɔsha nabha loo? Ao, nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ boŋ. 28Kɛgɛ bɔnyana vunɔ kɛli nu ɔsɛ balɔkɔ anɔ teli asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã onupɛ ayɛkɛ Yesu abha aŋã, etinu asɛ ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. 29Owusoso Akaa pɔ, Yudanɛ ayɛ ete ko yɛenu dza? Anɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ ayɛ yɛenuɔ dza? Ee, bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ ayɛ yɛenu. 30Gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɛ tenikpo ko yɛ alɛ gɛ abalɔkɔ bagɛ benu Yudanɛ asɛ benu banɔ gbangbã nɛ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lũɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ denɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛ. 31Kliso otsi alɛɛ, nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ nulũ soɔ bɔba shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔsha shu dza? Ao, kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana kura! Pɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bɔnyana ɔlɛ mɛ vunɔ gagalĩi.

Title: ROMANƐ 4
Content:
Balɔkɔ Abraham Asɛ Anɔ Gbangbã Ɔgana Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Mɛ
1Otsiɛ nɔ pɔ, kiɖuwoe lu bɔbaɖɔ nɛ bɔlɔ ashuĩ Abraham shu ɔsɛ amɔ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ mɛ? 2Onupɛ kɛgbã, balɔkɔ Abraham asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã nɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa lũ soɔ, kɛlɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili zã yɛahɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛishu yɛalɔkɔ etũ kitelũ nɔ, pɔ anɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛamɛ. 3Kɛlɛ́ Kibuiɛ ɖɔ? “Abraham ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋã kɛlɛ kɔ ɔsɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ nɛishu asɛ kinu ibui gbangbã.”
4Onupɛ anɔ teli awɔɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛɛ, yɛbhɛ babuia nɔ tinu asɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ balɔkɔ akɔɛ ete, pɔ kinu kibui tɔtɔɖɔ olu nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ shu. 5Anɔ teliɛ anɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ yɛagã, pɔ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ abhɛtɛ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩelete yɛedzi anɔ gbangbã nabha aŋãa, yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa tɛkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ edzi anɔ gbangbã. 6David aɖɔ kɛlɛ idi asɛ, anɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã, pɔ anɛ nɛ yɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa lũɔ, enu anɔ yuyula. Aɖɔ asɛ,
7“Eyula akɔ
bagɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ebui kpa etsyeɛ,
bagɛ balɛ ebui kpa abha badã bɔdɔ̃.
8Beyula akɔ anyɛ
gɛ yɛebui kpa shu Apaleteɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ.
9Tiyuyula lɛɛ pɔ, tɛ lɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ enu Yudanɛ ete ko loo, pɛnɔsɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛɛ dza? Bɔzɛɖɔ ɔsɛ Abraham enu anɔ gbangbã nɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa ulũ so. 10Ɛkpã ɖuwoe mɛ yɛazã flogo pɛ balɔkɔɛ asɛ edzi anɔ gbangbã? Kɛhɔ̃a bebhui akɔɛ flogo loo, pɛnɔsɛ gɛ bekebhui ɛlɛ akɔɛ nɛibeɛ dza? Anɛ kidegba ibe, pɔ kɛba kpɛ otugbà. 11Kɛlɛ Abraham ayɛkɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui ibui, gɛ kidzi kɛklagbu tɔtɔɖɔ nɛ yɛanɔ gbangbã gɛ balɔkɔɛ odenɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, gɛ ekebhui kɛhɔ̃a flogo.
