Kɛlɛ yɛedzi Akaa akɔ bagɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã, pɔ begibhui kɛhɔ̃a flogo, denɔ kɛlɛ mɛɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ alɛ asɛ benu banɔ gbangbã. 12Kɛlɛ yɛenu Akaa akɔ bagɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a, gɛ anɛ kɛhɔ̃a ete ko bebhui, pɔ bagã nɛ Abraham yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã idzo ɛlɛ nabha flogo pɛ ebebhui kɛhɔ̃a.
13Anɛ gana ɔsha mɛ flogo pɛ Abraham nɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ bayɛkɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ asɛ kesiakpa ebedzi balɛ aŋãsi, pɔ gana anɔ gbangbã gɛ bedzi odenɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ulũ mɛ. 14Onupɛ bagɛ eshu ɔsha balɛ ebedzi kaŋãsiɛeleteɛ, kɛlɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã dzi kibui ete ko, kɛlɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ oluɔ tsyɛ bha ma kɛnanà mɛ, 15ɔmɔsɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ ibui ɔsha lɔmana. Kɛlɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ ɔsha ɔmaa, kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tsyɛ tɛzã.
16Kliso tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ de tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, sɛ tɛ kidzi asɛ tibhui bhuibu gɛ badɛ mɛ alɔkɔ akɔ bagɛ benu Abraham yɛeyi alɛ pete, anɛ ɔkɔ banunɔ gɛ beshù ɔsha ete ko, pɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã asɛ Abraham ana. Gɛ yɛenu akaa akɔ bɔlɔ petee nɔ. 17Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ ɛlɛ elu asɛ, “Ɛbhɛtɛ wɔ sɛ tɛ odzi Akaa ɔkɔ ɛmadi gelee.” Yɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, anunɔ abha gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã. Owusoso Akaa gɛ akɔ bekpu bamɛ ɛkpã, kɛlɛ ekulu bɔdɔ̃ gɛgɛ̀zã kuku ibeɛ amana otsiɛ.
18Gɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɔɛ ɛlɛ gɛzɛba kɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, Abraham akpɛemi ayɛkɛ aŋã, kɛlɛ kɔ ɔsɛ ebedzi Akaa ɔkɔ amadi gelee, asɛ kitseɖeɛ gɛ betseɖe yɛasɛ, “Kana wɔeyi mɔmɔ alɛ abazãa.” 19Abraham agɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu, pɔ azalɔkɔ yɛishu asɛ anɔ tsitsí ana nɛ kibeɛ gɛ eshè ayɛkɛ asɛ agɔ kɛkpã zɛzɛ, kɛlɛ Sara tsyɛ yɛoputsuɔ otsíɛ. 20Gɛ kɛzã ana tsyɛ elo, ayɛkɛ aŋã asɛ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ akɔɛ bàba ɛlɛ mɛ, azamɔ ohumi atɔɖɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ kɛlɛ aakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití, 21gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã piapii asɛ ohumi ɔlɛ Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ sɛ abalà abhɛtɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ asɛ ababhɛtɛɛ. 22Kɛlɛ soɔ, “Balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akɔɛ asɛ kinu kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ.” 23Ebui alɛ asɛ “balɔkɔɛ ɛlɛ akɔɛɛ” gɛ anɛ yɛ ete bafɔnɔ alɛ akɔ, 24pɔ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ tsyɛ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa balɔkɔ asɛ bunu banɔ gbangbã, bɔlɔ agɛ yɛkɛ yɛ gɛ efeke Yesu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ edenɔ bekpu mɛ abha aŋãa. 25Balɔkɔɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ butsi nɛ bɔlɔ ebui kpa ɛtakpu, pɔ Kitití ayɛ akɔ yɛalɔ nɛ bekpuɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bɔlɔ asɛ bunu banɔ gbangbã.

Title: ROMANƐ 5
Content:
Ishu Yɔyɔ Nɛ̀ Same
1Kliso gɛ balɔkɔ ɔlɔ asɛ bunu banɔ gbangbã ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, ishu yɔyɔ lɛ ɔlɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa nɛishi, ɔgana bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo abha, 2anɔ gɛ yɛabha bɔgã pɛ bɔmɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibu ulɛ mɛ gɛ bɔlɛ otsiɛ. Kɛlɛ samɛ eku ulɔ gɛ buulu awɔ̃ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛishu dadalɛ nabha. 3Anɛ kɛlɛ ete ko, pɔ bɔmɔ same tsyɛ nɛ bɔlɔ ɔtɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ bɔtɔ kɔ sɛ anɔ akpɛemi, 4kɛlɛ kemi kpɛkpɛ akɔ asɛ anɔ azã nɛ ɛkpã gbangbã, kɛlɛ ɛkpã gbangbã ɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ ezelu awɔ̃. 5Kɛlɛ awɔ̃luluɔ atɛwɔɛ anɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ̀ɔ yɛalɔkɔ eyuku bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ nɔ, ɔgana Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ akɔ ɔlɔ mɛ.
6Nɛ kibe gbangbã mɛ gɛ kibui bhɛbhɛtɛ nanà gazã bɔlɔ ahɔɛɛ, Kristo ebetsí nɛ bagɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ɛtakpu. 7Abagagalĩ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ teli etsí nɛ anɔ gbangbã ɛtakpu, pɔ nɛ eyamɛ gbangbãelete teli itakpu xɔnɔɔ, anɔ teli abadɛmɛ asɛ tɛ etsí. 8Pɔ Owusoso Akaa ebu kɛdɛmɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ akasɛ nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabha asɛ, gɛ buwlui zã ɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abhaa, Kristo etsí nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtakpu.
9Otsi alɛ gɛ bebhui utsyɔa akɔ ɔlɔ ɔgana yɛdzyosu nɔ mɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ke yɛebebu ɔlɔ, odenɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ mɛ. 10Ɔmɔsɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔgɛ dɛmɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa, Yɛeyiɛ ebevũ iboe nɛ bɔlɔɛishi, ɔgana yɛutsíɛ mɛ. Gɛ evũ iboe ɛlɛ anaa, kɛlɛ́ pɛ atɛ balà ɔlɔ ebu ɔgana yɛkpã gɛ alɔkɔ eluɔ mɛɛ dza? 11Anɛ kɛlɛ ete ko, pɔ bɔmɔ same tsyɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ ɔgana bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo abha, anunɔ gɛ yɛabhaa bɔgã, pɛ bɔmɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ.
Kɛgɛ Kɔ Ɔsɛ Adam Nɛ̀ Kristo Bagɛ Shɔ̃
12Kliso asɛ gana anɔ tenikpo abha pɛ kibui kpa ku kanɔ nɔ̀ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ gana kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ butsí ba banɔ nyɔ̃ɔ abha, ɔmɔsɛ balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ abhɛtɛ ibui kpa- 13ɔmɔsɛ flogo pɛ bakɔ ɔshaa, kibui kpa zã kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ kukuku. Pɔ gɛ ɔsha gɛzã soɔ bagɛ lɔkɔ kɛlɛ akɔ ananà asɛ abhɛtɛ ibui kpa. 14Klisoɔ butsí zɛŋã ukusi odenɔ Adam ibe ɔmana Mose abha, gɛ bagɛta esi asɛ Adam yɛibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ana tsyɛ flogo. Anunɔ gɛ yɛtɛzazã mɛ lɛ asɛ anunɔ gɛ ababaa.
15Pɔ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ɛlɛ gã ɔtɔ nɛ Adam esitata shu. Onupɛ banɔ gelee betsí aganà anɔ tenikpo alɛ gɛ ata esi soɔ, kiɖeso pɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛtibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gikoeyi odenɔ tibhui bhuibu odenɔ anyɛ tenikpo alɛ, gɛ enu Yesu Kristo, gɛ atsakɛ afala nɛ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ. 16Kɛdɔ̃ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɔ, tinu anɔ tenikpo alɛ ete esi tatá shu ibui. Kebhu kukulu ɔkɔ kibui kpa tinikpo nɔ mana kɛpɔ bubu, pɔ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ xɔnɔ kɔ ɔsɛ banɔ gelee gɛ atá esiɛ, bebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ alɛ. 17Onupɛ gana anɔ tenikpo alɛ esi tatá mɛ butsí ŋã bukusi ɔgana yɛtakpuɔ, kɛlɛ́ kɛbazã ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu gelee nɔ nɛ̀ ɛlɛ ɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ginu ishu dadalɛ ɛkpã ukusi ŋaŋã ɔgana anɔ tenikpo alɛ gɛenu Yesu Kristoɔ abha dza?
18Gɛ gana anɔ tenikpo yɛesi tatá ɛtakpu so bebu banunɔ petee ɛpɔɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, gana anɔ tenikpo yɛibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɛtakpu soɔ, bebu bɔtsyɔa akɔ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ. 19Ɔmɔ asɛ gana anɔ tenikpo alɛ batɔ̃ malũ malu mɛɛ, banɔ petee edzi ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛeleteɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ke gana anɔ tenikpo alɛ batɔ̃ lulũ mɛɛ, babàbhɛtɛ banɔ gele tɛ bedzi banɔ gbangbã.
20Bakɔ ɔsha aplɛnɔ, gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ ɔshaa esi tatá tsyɛ iziwu abha. Pɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ekpè atɔɖɔɔ, tibhui bhuibuɔ tsyɛ ikpè tɔɖɔ gelee ɔdɛ. 21Asɛ kɛŋã gɛ kibui kpa ŋã bukusi nɛ bekpu mɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha tibhui bhuibu tsyɛ baŋã bukusi ɔgana kɛgbangbã mɛ, sɛ tɛ banɔ amɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ ɔgana Yesu Kristo bɔlɔ Apalete nabha.

Title: ROMANƐ 6
Content:
Zã Nɛ̀ Ɛkpã Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
1Kɛlɛ bɔbaɖɔ otsiɛ? Bɔbaavɛ ɛlɛ abha zɛbhɛtɛ ebui kpaa ko, tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ ɔlɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ zikpè tɔɖɔ koɔ dza? 2Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! Gɛ butitsí kɔ kibui kpaa, kiɖeso pɛ bɔbazã kɛlɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ abha vɛnɔ otugbà? 3Pɔɔ, notinyi ɔsɛ bɔlɔ pete gɛ bakpɛ ulĩ akɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu yɛinye mɛɛ, yɛutsíɛ mɛ tsyɛ bakpɛ ulĩɛ akɔ ɔlɔ dza? 4Kliso bavɔbɔ ɔlɔ nii ɔgana bulĩ kpɛkpɛ mɛ ɔvɛnɔ butsí mɛ, sɛ tɛ kɛzã ɔmɔ asɛ kifeke gɛ befeke Kristo edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ ɔgana Yɛakaa ishu dadalɛ mɛɛ, sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ zã nɛ ɛkpã vɔvɔ.
5Onupɛ bɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nii ana nɛ yɛutsíɛ mɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ɛbeɛ, bɔbabhɛtɛ tenikpo nii nɛ yɛtɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ tsyɛ. 6Ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ bakpala bɔlɔ ɛkpã kukuɔ nɛ̀ Kristo tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ishupiɛ gɛ dɛmɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu lu, sɛ tɛ bɔtadzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ ebui kpa- 7ɔmɔsɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ etsíɛ, bebui eyinɔ nɛ ebui kpa ahɔɛ mɛ.
8Kliso onupɛ butsí nɛ̀ Kristoɔ, bɔyɛkɛŋã sɛ bɔbazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã tsyɛ nii. 9Ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ gɛ bakɔ Kristo alɔ edenɔ bekpu mɛɛ, ezeke etsí, kɛlɛ butsí tɛka nu apalete nɛ yɛabha. 10Butsíɛ gɛ etsíɛ, ebui kpa yɛetsí bɔlɛ akɔ, nɛ kibe nyiɛ be ulũ, pɔ ɛkpã gɛ edzinɔɔ, alɛ ɛlɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa.
11Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha lũɔ nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔshu ɔmɔ asɛ banɔ tsitsí ɔkɔ ebui kpa, pɔ nonu anɔ gɛ ɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ. 12Kliso nɔtɛkɔ ɔsɛ ibui kpa aŋã ukusi nɛ wɔnɔ abha tɛ nɔzɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɔtɔɖɔ kibui kpa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ. 13Nɔtɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ishupiɛ shu ɔkɔ nanà ɔkɔ kibui kpa, asɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛwadɔ̃ ɔkɔ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ, pɔ nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔshu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔ asɛ banɔ gɛ bebu edenɔ butsí mɛ ɔmana ɛkpã mɛ ana, tɛ nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ishupiɛ shu ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ ɔkɔɛ, asɛ bɔxɔ̃ɛwɔadɔ̃ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. 14Tɛkɔ ɔsɛ kibui kpa dzi wɔapalete, ɔmɔsɛ ɔma ɔsha niesi, pɔ tibhui bhuibu esi wɔlɛ.
Banɔ Dzidzi Bunu Ɔkɔ Kibui Gbangbã Bhɛbhɛtɛ
15Kiɖuwoe lu otsiɛ mɔ? Bɔbaa bhɛtɛ ibui kpa ɔmɔsɛ bɔma ɔsha niesi, pɔ tibhui bhuibu esi bɔlɛ soɔ dza? Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! 16Notinyi ɔsɛ nɔlɔkɔ batɔ̃ lulũ ɔkɔ anɔ teli asɛ banɔ dzidzi anaa, nonu banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ nolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔɔ, nonu banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kibui kpa gɛ gbanà anɔ ɔvɛnɔ butsí mɛ, alo ɔkɔ batɔ̃ lulũ gɛ gbanà anɔ ɔkpɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ dza? 17Pɔ nohu Owusoso Akaa yɛahɔɛ ɔsɛ, wɔnɔ gɛ nodzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ ebui kpa flogo nɔɔ, nɔbɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ nyɔ̃ɔ nɛ̀ batɔ̃ lulũ ɔyɛkɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ, gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ wɔnɔ. 18Bebu ɔnɔ eyinɔ nɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ otsi alɛ nodzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ.
19Ɛɖɔ kɛlɛ nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛekpeɖekpeɖe ulũ, ɔmɔsɛ nobotsò nɛ wɔnɔ tɛzazã mɛ. Asɛ kɛlɔkɔ gɛ nɔzɔlɔkɔ ɔnɔ ishuɔ ɛkɔ toli ɔkɔ asɛ banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ atsɔ̃ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui tɛ lekpè atɔɖɔɔ, kliso otsi alɛ nɔlɔkɔ ishu ɔkɔ asɛ banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã gɛ gbanà anɔ ɔvɛnɔ tɛdadalɛ mɛ. 20Gɛ nodzì banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛɛ, bebu wɔnɔ eyinɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ ɛgbana anunɔ esi. 21Kiɖe nɔmɔ odenɔ kibe ɛlɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ lenu awuĩ ebui ɔkɔ ɔnɔ otsiɛ nɔ mɛɛ dza? Ebui alɛ agbana anɔ avɛnɔ butsí mɛ. 22Otsi alɛ gɛ bebu ɔnɔ eyinɔ nɛ ebui kpa mɛ, pɛ nodzi Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ dzidziɛ, kɛgɛ nɔbɔ mɔ odenɔ kɛlɛ mɛɛ, kɛba gbana ɔnɔ ɔvɛnɔ tɛdadalɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ badekoeyì nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ badzi ɛkpã tihɔɔ. 23Ɔmɔsɛ kɛbhɛ gɛ babuia ɔkɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, kɛli nu butsí, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ kɛli nu ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ mɛ.

Title: ROMANƐ 7
Content:
Adzɛ Gbagbana Idzo Gbangbã Tɛkakasɛ
1Bunyi notinyiɛ mɔ dza, mɛelɛ alɛ, bagɛ benyi ɔshaa mɛɖɔaɖɔ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ anɔ alɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã koɔ, alɛ ɔsha esiɛ mɔɔ dza? 2Nɛ kibui nulũɔ, ɔsha ɔnyã anyɛedzini nɛ yɛenyine shu nɛ kibeɛ gɛ anyɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã, pɔ onupɛ yɛenyineɛ etsíɛ, kɛlɛ ekoeyì nɛ tɛgbagbana ɔsha ɔlɛ niesi. 3Kliso onupɛ alɔ pɛ adɛzãna anyɛ bhlatɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ yɛenyineɛ akalɛ nɛ ɛkpãa, kɛlɛ edzi ɔmamɛ adɛdɛ anɔ. Pɔ onupɛ yɛenyineɛ etsí xɔnɔ, ekoeyì nɛ ɔsha mɛ, gɛ etikenu ɔmamɛ adɛdɛ anɔ, onupɛ avɛ adɛzãna anyɛ bhlatɔ tsyɛ.
4Kliso mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ tsyɛ notsí ɔkɔ ɔshaa ɔgana Kristo abha, tɛ nodzi tenikpo ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ befeke edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛɛ, tɛ buyu busi eyuyu gbangbã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. 5Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ gɛ kanɔ mɛ ebuiɛ azagbana ɔlɔɔ, ebui nɔnɔ gɛ agbanà anɔ akpɛ ebui kpa mɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ azã ɔlɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ agɛ bɔbhɛtɛ pete agbana ɔlɔ ɔkpɛ butsí mɛ. 6Pɔ otsi alɛ gɛ buzitsí nɛ ɔsha gɛ ɔtɛ nya ɔlɔ oɖi shu oluɔ, bebu ɔlɔ edenɔ ɔshaa mɛ, tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ idzo vɔvɔ abha gana Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ, kɛlɛ kitinu asɛ nɛ kidzo kukuɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ nulũ.
Kawlɔ̃akɛ Nɛ̀ Kibui Kpa Bhɛbhɛtɛ
7Otsiɛ nɔ pɔ, kiɖuwoe lu bɔbaɖɔ? Kibui kpa ɔsha onu dza? Ao, kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! Kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ, ɛgɛ tatì kɛdɔ̃ nɔnɔ gɛ kibui kpa nu, pɔ gana ɔshaa mɛɛ, iti ɛlɛ ana. Tsyɛ alo ɛgɛ tatì kɛgɛ inu kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ anɔ teli idɔ̃ shu, onupɛ ɔsha ɔma ɔsɛ, “Tɛɔdzã kiwuhũ nɛ ɔhagbo ɛdɔ̃ shuɔ.” 8Pɔ gɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ŋã kibuiɛ gɛ ɔsha ɔɖɔ nabha soɔ, kɛkɔ ɔsɛ kawɔ̃kpɛ nɛ anɔ ɛdɔ̃ shu kpasɛ mɛ mɛ̀. Onupɛ ɔsha ɔmaa, kɛlɛ kibui kpa tsyɛ ma. 9Ɛtɛzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɔshaa matimati mɛ iɖi. Pɔ kibeɛ gɛ ɔsha ɔba koɔ, kibui kpa lɔ nɛ ɛkpã, kɛlɛ mɛitsí. 10Ɛmɔ ɔsɛ ɔshaa gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ lɔkɔ mɛ ɛkpãa, ɔlɛ ke ɔlɛ otsyina ɔmana mɛ utsí. 11Pɔ gɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɔɛ idzo nɛ ɔsha nabha soɔ, kibui kpa wɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ butsí ba mabha. 12Klisoɔ ɔshaa nɛ̀ ɔsha kpɛkpɛɛ shu dalɛ, lɔna kɛlɛ lɔpɛ̃.
13Otsiɛ pɔ, kibuiɛ gɛinu kɛgbangbãa kɛli tsyina dzi butsí kɔ mɛɛ dza? Ao kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! Pɔ tɛ kibui kpa bu ishu kasɛ asɛ kibui zizĩɛ, kɛgã kibui gbangbã nabha pɛ kibu butsí bakpɛ mɛ, so gana ɔsha kpɛkpɛ mɛɛ, sɛ tɛ kibui kpa wlui zĩ tɔɖɔ dɛ.
14Bunyi ɔsha ɔsɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛibui lonu, kɛlɛ mɛ pɔɔ anɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛdɔ̃ mɛinu, gɛ ɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ anɔ dzidzì ɔkɔ kibui kpa ana. 15Itilũ kɛgɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ, niesi. Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ, ɛtɛlà kɛlɛ bhɛtɛ, pɔ kɛgɛ ɛgɛdɛ mɛɛ, mɛbhɛtɛ. 16Onupɛ kɛgɛ ɛtɛdɛmɛ sɛ tɛ mɛbhɛtɛ pɛ kɛlɛ mɛbhɛtɛɛ, kɛlɛ ɛdɛmɛ tɔɖɔ ɔsɛ ɔsha ɔpɛ. 17So kɛgɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ otsiɛ nɔ anɛ mɛ alɛ mɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ, pɔ kibui kpaa gɛlɛ mɛ mɛɛ kɛlɛ bhɛtɛ. 18Gɛ anɔdzyrame mɛinu soɔ, inyi sɛ kɛgbangbã nanà ma mɛmɛ̀. Ɔmɔsɛ mɛ tɛpɛpɛ kinu ɔsɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã flogo, pɔ ɛtɛlà kɛlɛ bhɛtɛ. 19Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ, kitinu kɛgbangbã gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛ, ao, kibui zizĩɛ gɛ ɛgɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛbhɛtɛɛ, kɛlɛ abha mɛitsiɖi pɛ ɛbhɛtɛ. 20Onupɛ kɛgɛ ɛgɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛbhɛtɛ pɛ kɛlɛ mɛbhɛtɛɛ otsiɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ anɛ mɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ, pɔ kibui kpa gɛ kpasɛ mɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ.
21Kliso ilũ ɔsha axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa niesi ɔsɛ, onupɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbãa, kibui zizĩɛ lɛ mɛɔbha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 22Nɛ mɛishu mɛ pɔɔ, ɛmɔ same nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔshaa shu flogo, 23pɔ iwlui mɔ ɔsha bhlatɔ gɛ lɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ mɛishu udzyaa mɛ, gɛ lɔlɔkɔ keyu nɛ mɛekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, kɛlɛ lɔkpɛ mɛ ɔɖavũ anɔ ɔkɔ ɔsha kpa gɛ ɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ mɛishu udzya mɛ. 24Ashagabui elete ɖuwoe lu idi nɛ alɛ mɛinuɔ mɔ! Afana gɛ ebebu mɛishupi ɛlɛ eyinɔ nɛ butsi lɛ mɛ? 25Buhu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ-ɔgana bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo abha!
Kliso mɛ xɔnɔ nɛ mɛekpeɖekpeɖe nulũɔɔ, inu anɔ dzidzì ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔsha, pɔ mɛ asɛ anɔdzyrame anaa, inu anɔ dzidzì ɔkɔ ebui kpa ɔshaa.

Title: ROMANƐ 8
Content:
Ɛkpã Nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Nɔ Tɛpɛpɛ Ulũ
1Otsiɛ alɛ, kɛpɔ bubu nanà ma ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ, 2ɔmɔsɛ gana Kristo Yesu abha, ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛkpã ɔsha oboele mɛ odenɔ kibui kpa ɔsha nɛ̀ butsí mɛ. 3Kɛgɛ ɔsha ɔgɛmɔ ohumi ɔbhɛtɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛkpã kpa ŋã ɔlɛ abha soɔ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ aganà yɛahɔɛ Eyiɛ gɛ asɛsɛ nɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ anɔ tɛzazã mɛ, tɛ edzi asɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ ebui kpa ɛtakpu ana. Kliso ebu kibui kpa ɛpɔ nɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ anɔ mɛ, 4tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ kɛpiapi nɔ gɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ kɛna nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ, tɛ bamɔ kɛlɛ nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ. Bɔlɔ agɛ tɛzã nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, pɔ pɛ bɔzã nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛpɛpɛ ulũ. 5Bagɛ bazã nɛ ɛkpã asɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛanɔ anaa, balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ alɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ebui tɛdɛdɛ mɛ nɔ shu, pɔ bagɛ balɛ nɛ ɛkpã nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ alɛ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔdɛ mɛ nɔ shu. 6Kɛgɛinu ebui kpaelete yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔɔ, kɛmana butsí, pɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ lɔgbana xɔnɔ lonu ɛkpã nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ, 7ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe enu kitití lɔlɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu. Atɛ bhɛtɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔsha nabha, kɛlɛ atɛ balà abhɛtɛ tsyɛ. 8Bagɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛkpã gbana, batɛ balà eku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃.
9Wɔnɔ xɔnɔ anɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛkpã kpa ɛlɛ gbana ɔnɔ, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, onupɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ ɔnɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ onupɛ Kristo yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔma anɔ teli yɛahɔɛ, etinu Kristo yɛayɛ. 10Onupɛ Kristo alɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, pɛ wɔnɔ ishupi lɛ tsí nɛ kibui kpa shu tsyɛ elo, wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ xɔnɔ ɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpã, ɔmɔsɛ balɔkɔ wɔnɔ asɛ banɔ gɛ alɛ piapii ana so. 11Kɛlɛ onupɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ ofeke Yesu edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ ɔlɛ wɔnɔ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ yɛ gɛ efeke Kristo edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛɛ, yɛ ke abakɔ wɔnɔ ishupi tsitsí ɛlɛ ɛkpã ɔgana yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, gɛ ɔlɛ wɔnɔ mɛɛ.
12Kliso, mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, kɛxɔ̃ɛ lɛ ɔlɔ shu, pɔ anɛ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, sɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ alɛ ulũ. 13Onupɛ nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ kanɔ alɛ ɛkpã kpa ulũɔ, nobotsí, pɔ onupɛ nɔlɔkɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ oyí kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa gɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɔ̀ɔ, nɔbɔzã nɛ ɛkpã, 14ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔgbanaa, Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ benu, 15ɔmɔsɛ anɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ dzidzi esi ifuɔ ɔlɛ lɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔzã beyi mɛɛ, nɔyɛkɛ. Kliso bɔkpɛ ozĩ ɔsɛ, “Ao, lɔɛitití.” 16Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ bɔlɔ ɔyɛ, pɛ lɔdalɛ bɔlɔ ishu ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ bunu. 17Kliso onupɛ yɛeyi alɛ bunuɔ, kɛlɛ budzi kaŋãsiɛelete-Owusoso Akaa kaŋãsiɛelete ɔplɛnɔ Kristo. Kɛmɔ̀ gɛ bɔmɔ̀ ɔtɔ ɔplɛnɔ Kristoɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha babakpɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ nɛ kitití ɔmɔ asɛ yɛ ana.
Tɛdadalɛ Gɛbaba Kidegbaa
18Nɛ mɛɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ lũɔ, kibe ɛlɛ ɔtɔ tinu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ babalà alɔkɔ ashɔnɔ ishu dadalɛ gɛ bebebu akasɛ nɛ ɔlɔ mɛɛ. 19Kanɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ pete epo nɛ̀ awuhũ dzadzã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ tibubu kasɛ. 20Ɔmɔsɛ bebu Owusoso Akaa kanɔ mɛɔdɔ̃ gɛ ebuɔ nɛ pɔ asɛ, bɔma kɛnanà mɛ, gɛ anɛ yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ kinu, Owusoso Akaa yɛapɛ asɛ kɛzã ana, nɛ awɔ̃ lulu asɛ kɛbàba ɛlɛ mɛ, 21sɛ kiwui tiliɛ kanɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ pete baboele ishu odenɔ nɛ banɔ esi, kɛlɛ beti betsí atsɔmɔ, kɛlɛ babà mana alɛ nɛ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã dadalɛ gbangbã mɛ, gɛ babàkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ.
22Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ mɛɛ, bunyi sɛ kanɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee nimi asɛ kɛtã gɛ ɛya tã ayamunɔ ana ɔlɔkɔ mana oboewui nabha. 23Anɛ kanɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ ete, pɔ bɔlɔ bagɛ buputɔ nimi nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ shu tsyɛ, bunimi nɛ ɔlɔ ishu mɛ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bupo bɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛ ɔmɔ asɛ beyi anà, tɛ bɔmɔ ɔlɔ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã. 24Ɔmɔsɛ nɛ awɔ̃ lulu alɛ mɛɛ, bayɛkɛ ɔlɔ elu nɛ̀ ɛkpã. Pɔ awɔ̃ lulu nɔnɔ́ gɛ alɛ tɛmɔmɔ mɛɛ, letinu awɔ̃ lulu kura. Afana gɛ ezebelu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ kɛlɛ yɛahɔɛ kukukuɔ nabhaa dza? 25Pɔ onupɛ bulu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ kaku ɔlɔ ahɔɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ bulú kitú esi ipo ɛlɛ.
26Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ke Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔplɛnɔ ɔlɔ nɛ ɔlɔ tibobotsò mɛ. Butinyi kɛgɛ bɔbaɖɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔyɛkɛ ebuiɛ nɛ ɔlɔ lu nɛ tininimi gele gɛ olugbũ ɔtɛ bɔlà ɔɖɔɔ mɛ. 27Owusoso Akaa gɛ amɔ pɛ enyi bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, enyi Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔyɛkɛ ebui nɛ banɔ dadalɛ nulũ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ.
Bɔŋã Kabha Ɔdɛ Kɛɖɔ Gɛ Bɔbaɖɔ
28Bunyi nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ ɔsɛ, Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ kidzi kɛgbangbã ɔkɔ bagɛ adɛmɛ nɛ yɛ, bagɛ alɛ yɛekulu nɛ yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɔluɔ. 29Bagɛ Owusoso Akaa enyi elu kukukuɔ, balɛ ke yɛebu asɛ bazã nɛ ɛkpã asɛ Yɛeyiɛ, sɛ tɛ ebedzi Yɛeyi gɛ eputɔ nɛ beyianyɛ gelee ishi. 30Bagɛ balɛishu yɛabhɛtɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ elu akɔɔ, balɛ tsyɛ yɛekulu, bagɛ ekuluɔ balɛ tsyɛ yɛebhui utsyɔa akɔ, kɛlɛ bagɛ balɛ yɛebhui utsyɔa akɔɔ, balɛ tsyɛ shu yɛadalɛ.
31Kiɖuwoe bɔbaɖɔ otsiɛ tɛ bɔlɔkɔ bu kibui ɛlɛ nulũ nɔ? Onupɛ Owusoso Akaa enu ɔlɔ ayɛɛ, afana gɛ abalà alɔɛtití nɛ ɔlɔ shu? 32Owusoso Akaa alɛ gɛ agɛkɔ ɛtakpu asɛ atɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ Yɛeyiɛ shu, pɔ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛishu akɔ ɔlɔ petee nɔ, kiɖeso pɛ atɛ alɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ pete tsyɛ aplɛnɔ akɔ ɔlɔ nɛ̀ sameɛ dza? 33Afana gɛ abalà alɔkɔ kibui nɛ Owusoso Akaa anunɔ gɛ ebu eluɔ shu? Owusoso Akaa yɛebu utsyɔa akɔ banɔ. 34Afana gɛ yɛebu kɛpɔ? Kristo Yesu, anunɔ gɛ yɛetsíɛ, kɛgɛ plɛnɔ ɔdɛɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ befeke edenɔ bekpu mɛ pɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã, adɛzã Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ɛŋã mɛ, kɛlɛ akɔ yɛtakpu tsyɛ nɛ bɔlɔ lũ. 35Afana gɛ ebebhui tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛlɛ bɔlɔ nɛ̀ Kristo ishi? Kɛba dzi bɔtɔ alo banɔ buluhũ kpɛkpɛ alo banɔ edetɔtɔ nɔ alo bɔbhɛ alo kɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ alo kifu ibui alo bɛtɛ̀ɛ dza? 36Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kɛlɛ eluɔ,
“Nɛ wɔɛtakpuɔ, bɔmɔ butsí ɛlɛ nɛ kiwui mɛ pete,
balɔkɔ bɔlɔ asɛ ibhoshi gɛ bedi yí.”
37Ao, nɛ alɛ pete mɛɛ, bɔŋã abha ɔdɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ ɔgana Kristo gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ bɔlɔɔ nabha. 38Ɔmɔsɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã ɔsɛ, onu butsí tsyɛo alo ɛkpã, akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ alo ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ, kibe ɛlɛ alo kɛgɛ babaa, alo ihumi, 39ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ alo odzudzukɔ alo kɛka nyia ka idi nɛ kanɔ alɛ pete mɛɛ, tɛ balà ebhui ulɔ ɔtɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛ mɛ nɔ gɛ akɔ bɔmɔ odenɔ bɔlɔ Apalete Kristo Yesu mɛ shu.

Title: ROMANƐ 9
Content:
Bagɛ Owusoso Akaa Ebuɔ
1Ɛɖɔ kɛgɛ lɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Kristo mɛgɛ ɛtɛsɛ asɛnɛ, mɛitú mɛ ebuiɛ atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kɛlɛ abha nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã mɛ. 2Ɛmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ toli idi kɛlɛ bɔtɔ tii bele mɛitúɔ mɛ. 3Pɔ kɛta dzi mɛ tɛpɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ baɖɔ kibui akpɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ bebhui mɛ atɛɛ nɛ Kristo shu nɛ mɛelɛ alɛ, nɛ̀ mɛepi anɛ, 4gɛenu Israelanɛ, nɛ ɛtakpu. Balɛ Owusoso Akaa etsyina ayɛkɛ asɛ beyi pɛ ebu yɛishu dadalɛ akasɛ alɛ, anya olugbũ nɛ̀ balɛ pɛ bayɛkɛ yɛɔshaa, akasɛ alɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkpɛkɔ, nɛ̀ yɛebui tɔtɔɖɔ olu ɔkɔ alɛ. 5Bashuĩ gbagbla eyimɔmɔ alɛ benu, kɛlɛ balɛ mɛ Kristo edekoeyì asɛ anɔdzyrame ana, bɔbakpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ aŋã kɛka nyia ka abha nɛinye nɛitití ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ tihɔ! Amen. 6Anɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛibuiɛ gɛ wɔa ɛxɔ̃ɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ anɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ ede Israelanɛ ishopoɔ mɛ balɛ enu Israelanɛ. 7Pɛnɔsɛ gɛ bede Abraham yɛigbogbo mɛ soɔ bedzi yɛeyi alɛ. Baɖɔ elu asɛ, “Wɔeyimɔmɔ alɛ ebedekoeyì nɛ Isak yɛeyi alɛ mɛ.” 8Nɛibui mɛ dadalɛ ulũɔ, anɛ beshui ka nyia ka balɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ, pɔ beyiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ elu asɛ bedzi Abraham yɛeyi alɛ, balɛ enu yɛtsyɛ yɛeyimɔmɔ alɛ. 9Kibuiɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ kɛli inu ɔsɛ, “Nɛibe tɔtɔɖɔ lu nabhaa, ebatsyina ba kɛlɛ eyianyɛinuvɔɛ abazã Sara ahɔɛ mɛ.”
10Kɛgɛ zɛplɛnɔ tsyɛ nu ɔsɛ, akaa tenikpo yɛalɛ akɔ Rebeka yɛeyi alɛ, kɛlɛ akaa tenikpo alɛɛ, yɛenu bɔlɔ akaa Isak. 11Pɔ flogo tɛ baba mɔ́ taabhaeyiɛ alo pɛ babhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã tili alo kɛkpa, sɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛtakpu mɛ tɔtɔɖɔ lu nɛ yɛanɔ bubuɔ shu vɛ ɛlɛ abhaa, 12anɛ̀ nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ulũ, pɔ nɛ anunɔ gɛ ekului nɛibui nulũɔ, etseɖe Rebeka asɛ, “Esheshèɛ ebedzi anuvɔ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ.” 13Ɔmɔ asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Yakob yɛenu anunɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, Esau pɔ ɛgɛ dɛmɛ yɛibui.”
14Kiɖuwoe lu bɔbaɖɔ nɛ kɛlɛ shu? Tɛbɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, Owusoso Akaa enu anɔ gɛ eɖi banɔ amɛ dza? Ao, anɛ ana! 15Ɔmɔsɛ aɖɔ etseɖe Mose asɛ,
“Ɛbaɖi ashagabui ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ ɛsɛ iɖi ashagabui ɔkɔ,
kɛlɛ ɛbabhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ɛyama gbangbã ɔkɔ.”
16Kitinu anɔ teli yɛtɛdɛdɛmɛ ulũ alo yɛemikpɛkpɛ ulũ, pɔ kinu Owusoso Akaa yɛashagabui tiɖiɖi ulũ. 17Owusoso Akaa etseɖe Farao asɛ, “Kɛgɛ ɛliso pɛ idzu wɔ bukusi kɛli nu ɔsɛ, tɛ mɛgã wɔabha tɛ mɛibu mɛohumi nɔ kasɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ mɛinye yi fala nɛ kesiakpa nyɔ̃ɔ abha.” 18Kliso Owusoso Akaa eɖi ashagabui akɔ anunɔ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ eɖi ashagabui akɔ, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ apɛ asɛ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ zã yɛ, akɔ ɛlɛ mɛ gagalĩ.
19Wɔnɔmɛ anɔ teli ebebisi mɛasɛ, “Kɛlɛ kiɖeso pɛ Owusoso Akaa ekebu ulɔ ɛpɔ? Afana gɛ abalà lɔ itití nɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ asɛ abhɛtɛ shu?” 20Pɔ, anɔdzyrame, afana wonu sɛ tɛ obu kibui ulũ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa? Pɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili gɛ anɔ teli abhɔ nɛ̀ tɛbhɔɔ balà bisi anunɔ gɛ abhɔ ɛlɛ asɛ, “Kiɖeso pɛ abhɔ mɛ asɛ kɛlɛ gɛ ɛlɛɛ dza?” 21Bɔdɔ̃ abhɔbhɔɔ pɔ, agɛmɔ idzo asɛ tɛ alɔkɔ tisiɛ gɛ etuɔ tili abhɔ kɛdɔ̃ gbangbã tili gɛ kɛpɔ ɖi alo sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ abhɔ kɛka nyia ka idi ɔkɔ kɛlɛ ishu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔaa dza?
22Kɛlɛ onupɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ asɛ tɛ ebu yɛɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ̀ ohumi akasɛɛ, adɔ fɔ̃ɔ akɔ bagɛ alɛ shu yɛakpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, bagɛ abálɛ elu akɔ titsitsíɛ. 23Kɛlɛ kɛbazã onupɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ asɛ tɛ ebu yɛehoeyiudɔ̃ gɛlɛ yɛishu dadalɛ mɛ akasɛ bagɛ eɖi ashagabui pɛ etiputɔ abalɛ elu akɔ yɛishu dadalɛ, 24bɔlɔ gɛinu yɛanɔ kukulu tsyɛ elo, anɛ bagɛ benu Yudanɛ ete, pɔ denɔ banunɔ gɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ mɛɛ dza? 25Asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ aɖɔ elu ɔgana Ebuiɖɔluanɔ Hosea abha asɛ,
“Ɛbaklu balɛ ɔsɛ ‘mɛanɔ benu’ gɛ betinu mɛanɔ flogo,
kɛlɛ ɛbakulu adzɛ sɛ ‘adzɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ’ anunɔ gɛ etinu anɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ flogo,”
26Kɛlɛ,
“Kɛbàba ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ ɛkɛlɛ tututu gɛ baɖɔ etseɖe balɛ asɛ,
‘Gɛnɛ mɛanɔ nonu,’
bebekulu balɛ asɛ, ‘Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ yɛeyi alɛ.’ ”
27Yesaya azakpɛ ozĩ nɛ Israel itakpu asɛ,
“Gɛ Israelanɛ tɛkaklà kpè asɛ ayisɛ nɛ aƒu nɔtɔ̃ tsyɛ elo,
banɔ gɛ bebu eluɔ ete ko.
28Ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ abalɔkɔ
yɛebui gɔgɔɛ mɛ tibhui bhui akɔ esiakpaa nɛ̀ tɛhɔahlɔa kɛlɛ kɛka nyia ka ba bele.”
29Ɔmɔ asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ Yesaya atɛɖɔ afala nɔ asɛ,
“Pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ anɛ Apalete Ohumieleteɛ
gɛ yɛakɔ beteli agɔ̃ akɔ ɔlɔ tsyɛ elo,
alo buti tsyina edzi asɛ Sodom ana
bɔtazã asɛ Gomora ana.”
Israelanɛ Mayɛkɛ Mayɛkɛŋã
30Kiɖuwoe lu bɔbaɖɔ? Gɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ agɛ tɔnɔ tɛzazã piapii ede tsyɛ elo, bamɔ tɛzazã piapii ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, 31pɔ Israel gɛ azatɔnɔ ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ edeɛ, akamɔ tɛzazã piapii nɔ. 32Kiɖuwoe lu so? Ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ lɔkɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã atɔnɔ ɔlɛ abha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ edeɛ, pɔ beɖi asɛ gana balɛ ahɔɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. Kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bakpatà “kɛklagbu gɛ bakpatàa.” 33Asɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ,
“Dio, ilu kɛklagbu gɛkɔ sɛ anɔ akpata pɛ adɔ oboeɛ nɛ Zion
ɔxɔa gɛ lɔkɔ ɔsɛ banɔ bakpata tɛ badɔ oboe,
anɔ gɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ Owusoso Akaa nabhaa, batɛ bakpɛ yɛalɛ awuĩ.”

Title: ROMANƐ 10
Content:
1Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, mɛitú mɛibui tɛpɛpɛ nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ Israelanɛ ɛtakpu kɛlinu sɛ tɛ bebu alɛ. 2Ɛbalà ɖɔ nɛ balɛishu ɔsɛ benu banɔ nɔnɔ́ gɛ bàkpɛ emi nɛ ɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ mɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, pɔ bunyi ko betinyi ɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛidzo. 3Gɛ betinyi tɛzazã gbangbã gɛide Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ soɔ, babhɛtɛ balɛ ahɔɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ebui, gɛitinu itakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛzazã gbangbã. 4Kristo yɛtɛbaba ɔkɔ ɔsɛ ohumi obele nɛ ɔsha ahɔɛ, sɛ tɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋãa, tɛ amɔ tɛzazã gbangbã.
5Mose ebu tɛzazã gbangbã gɛ lɛ ɔsha nulũ asɛ, “Anunɔ gɛ akpɛ emi pɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ abamɔ ɛkpã edenɔ kɛlɛ mɛ.” 6Pɔ tɛzazã gbangbã ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, aɖɔ asɛ, “Tɛɔɖɔ nɛ wɔitúɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, ‘Afana gɛ ebewu avɛ ititíɛ?’ ” (gɛ kɛlɛ esi nu ɔsɛ, tɛ badɛ gbana Kristo amana) 7“pɛnɔsɛ, ‘Afana gɛ ebezhi avɛ ozĩ dzudzuɔ mɛ̀?’ ” (gɛ kɛlɛ esi nu ɔsɛ, tɛ badɛ gbana Kristoɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ amana). 8Pɔ kiɖuwoe koŋ kibuiɛ ɖɔ? Kɛɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Kibuiɛ lɛ wɔbha, kɛlɛ wɔolugbũɔ mɛ, nɛ̀ wɔɛtúɔ mɛ,” kɛlɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔɔ. 9Kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, tɛɔdalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ nɛ wɔolũgbuɔ ɔsɛ, “Yesu enu Apalete,” kɛlɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã nɛ wɔɛtúɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, Owusoso Akaa efeke edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛɛ, bebè bu wɔ. 10Ɔmɔsɛ wɔɛtúɔ wɔlɔkɔ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã nɔ, pɛ bamɔ ɔsɛ onu anɔ gbangbã, kɛlɛ olugbũ wɔlɔkɔ ɔdalɛ ebui mɛ nɔ pɛ bayɛkɛ wɔ elu nɛ ɛkpã. 11Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha aŋãa, kiwuĩ tɛbabà yɛabha oɖi ɖa.” 12Ɔmɔsɛ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ pete nɔ, tenikpo balɛ. Apalete tenikpo alɛ yɛenu Apaleteɛ akɔ balɛ petee, kɛlɛ yɛeyula tutu esi akɔ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔɛ, 13ɔmɔsɛ, “Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ ekulu Apaleteɛ nɛinyeɛ, aba mɛ ɛkpã.”
14So, kɛlɛ́ anɔ abalà ekulu kinye nɔnɔ́ abha gɛ agɛyɛkɛ aŋãa dza? Kɛlɛ́ babàlà yɛkɛ anunɔ gɛ bekelũ yɛɔdɔ̃ eɖiɛ abha aŋãa dza? Kɛlɛ kɛlɛ́ babalà elũ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ onupɛ anɔ nanà atɛ aɖɔ kɛlɛ etseɖe alɛɛ dza? 15Kɛlɛ́ babalà ibuiɛ aɖɔ onupɛ bagɛ kpɛ ananà nɔɔ dza? Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Bagɛ bamana Owusoso Akaa ibui gbangbãa, bagbã ɔtsɛɖɛ gbangbã!”
16Pɔ anɛ Israelanɛ petee balɛ ayɛkɛ ibui gbangbã nabha aŋã, ɔmɔsɛ Yesaya afɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Apalete, afana gɛ ayɛkɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔɔ tseɖe alɛ nabha aŋã?” 17Klisoɔ, odenɔ kibuiɛ tilulũ mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã koeyi, kɛlɛ kibui ɛlɛ bulũ odenɔ Kristo yɛibuiɛ mɛ. 18Pɔ ibisi sɛ. Begilũ dza? Baa nɔ belũ alɛ,
“Balɛ kibuiɛ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ oyi gɛ lɔtsyɔa esiakpa nabha petee,
balɛ ebuiɛ avɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ ɔtɔ̃ kɔ.”
19Iwlui ka bisi sɛ. Kliso Israel egilũ ebuiɛ alɛ mɛɛ dza? Putɔ nɔɔ, Mose aɖɔ asɛ,
“Ɛbakɔ nɔdzã kiwuhũ ɔkɔ bagɛ etinu kɛmadiɛ,
Ɛbakɔ nɔkpɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ̀ kɛmadiɛ gɛitilũ ebui esiɛ.”
20Yesaya akpɛ ité aɖɔ asɛ,
“Bagɛ bagɛzapɛ mɛɛ, balɛ abamɔ mɛ,
kɛlɛ bagɛ begibisì mɛtɔɔ, balɛ mɛibu mɛishu kasɛ.”
21Israelanɛ pɔɔ, aɖɔ nɛ balɛishu asɛ,
“Nɛ kiwuìɛ mɛ pete nɔ, ɛdalɛ mɛahɔɛ mɛ ilu
ɔkɔ bagɛ beti elũ atɔ̃ɔ, nɛ̀ bagɛ balɔ kitití nɛ mɛishuɔ.”

Title: ROMANƐ 11
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Yɛashagabui Ɖiɖi Ɔkɔ Ɛmadi Israel
1Kɛlɛ ibisi sɛ, Owusoso Akaa ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛmadiɛ shu dza? Kɛma kɛlɛ mɛ ana! Israelaeyi mɛinu, kɛlɛ Abraham yɛeshui mɛinu gɛ ide Benyamin yɛigbogboɔ mɛ. 2Owusoso Akaa agɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛmadi Israel shu, banunɔ gɛenyi akpɛ otugbà kukukuɔ. Pɛnɔsɛ notinyi kɛgɛ yɛibuiɛ ɖɔ nɛ Eliya shu-nɛ kibisi gɛ ebisi denɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɛ̀ Israel ɛtakpuɔ shu dza? Aɖɔ asɛ, 3“Apalete, beyí wɔebuiɖɔluanɛ kɛlɛ bàyɛɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha afalanɔ. Mɛ tenikpo ko mɛgɔ̃, kɛlɛ̀ baapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ beyì mɛ.” 4Kɛlɛ̀ kɛlɛ́ Owusoso Akaa ebuiliulũ akɔɛ? Etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Ɛbalɛ̀ banɔ ihotu tigegene gɛ balɛ xɔnɔ begidzu ekluisi esi akɔmɛ Obudi Baalìɛ ɛkɔ mɛishu.” 5Kliso nɛ kibe ɛlɛ tsyɛɛ, banɔ teli bagɔ̃ gɛ bebu balɛ elú ɔgana balɛ tibhui bhuibu mɛ. 6Kliso onupɛ ɔgana tibhui bhuibu mɛɛ, kɛlɛ́ɛ, kɛtɛ kanu ɔsɛ kide balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ̀. Onupɛ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ kide pɔɔ, kɛlɛ kɛtɛ kanu tibhui bhuibu.
7Kiɖuwoe otsiɛ? Kɛgɛ kɛmadi Israel azapɛ nɛ awuhũ dzãdzaa, bagɛ mɔ̃ kɛlɛ, banɔ teli gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu elúɔ xɔnɔ bamɔ ɛlɛ. Akɔ banɔ gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ xɔnɔ bagagalĩ batɔ̃, 8asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Owusoso Akaa akɔ bepu awuhũ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ,
sɛ tɛ batɛlà amɔ̃ bɔdɔ̃
batɔ̃ alɛ balɛ ahɔɛ pɔ sɛ tɛ batɛ elũ kibui,
ɔmana obo kiwui lɛ nabha.”
9Kɛlɛ David aɖɔ asɛ,
“Balɛ bɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã ɔkpɔlɔ̃ obotsyina odzì bɔnyɔ̃ nɛ̀ kɛgbã,
tɛ kidzì kɛdɔ̃ kpakpata nɛ̀ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ɔkɔ balɛ.
10Otumũ ɔbɔdã balɛ awuhũ nabha sɛ tɛ̀ batɛ̀là amɔ
tɛ balɛ budeshiɛ dzyini ku tihɔɔ.
Busi Gɛ Bebhui Atɔɖɔ Busi Abha
11Ezebisì asɛ, Israel akpata bɔdɔ̃ adɔ oboè pɛ azalà alɔ odenɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ dza? Ao, kɛma kɛlɛ mɛ ana! Nɛ Yudanɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ soɔ, tibubu tsyina vɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ sɛ tɛ kidzi awuhũdzadzã ibui ɔkɔ Israelanɛ. 12Onupɛ Israelanɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ etsyina edzì tiyuyulà gelee ɔkɔ kanɔ nɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ balɛ kide vɛvɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu tsyina dzì tiyuyulà ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛɛ, kɛlɛ tiyuyulà ɖuwoe kɛbadzì onupɛ Israelanɛ pete etsyina edzì Owusoso Akaa ayɛɛ dza?
13Ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ. Mɛ asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ ana, ɛwɔa mɛaxɔ̃ɛ 14nɛ awɔ̃lulu sɛ ɛbalà nyɛmɛ mɛ kɛmadiɛ ginu Yudanɛ sɛ tɛ mɛlɔkɔ awuhũ dzadzã tɛ mɛibu balɛ anɔ teli. 15Onupɛ tɛshɛshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu mɛ pɛ babhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀, kɛlɛ bedzini balɛ ayɛkɛ edenɔ butsí mɛ amana ɛkpã mɛ. 16Onupɛ nikpèe nɔ gɛ bebhoso edzyini abakɔ Akaa pɛ yɛishu dalɛɛ, kɛlɛɛ nikpèe nɔ̀ gɛ bebuɔ pete tsyɛ shu dalɛ. Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha onupɛ busiɛ ɔlɛ iguɔ shu dalɛɛ, kɛlɛ bɔshɛ nɔ shu tsyɛ dalɛ alɛ.
17Onupɛ bebhui bɔshɛ nɔ tuli pɛ balɔkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ, pɛ nɔlɛ asɛ kifutù mɛ besi ana, pɛ bebhui wɔnɔ bɔshɛ nɔ atɔɖɔ besidzudzu nulũɔ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔmɔ̃ bɔŋaŋã gɛide besidzudzuɔ balɛ iguɔ mɛ̀. 18Nɔtɛ ofeke ishu ɔsɛ nɔpɛ ɔdɛ bɔshɛ nɔ abha gɛ notsiɖiɛ. Nɔbhɛtɛ anaa, nɔbaka ɔsɛ anɛ wɔnɔ nyana igu ovunɔ, pɔ iguɔ ɛlɛ nyana wɔnɔ ovunɔ. 19Ogilu awɔ̃ɔ, ɔbɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Bebhui busiushɛ nɔ atsɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ mɛ atɔɖɔ bɔlɛulũ.” 20Kɛlɛ kɛlɛ́ mɛ. Pɔ bebhui bɔshɛ nɔ atsɛ ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ aŋã, wɔ xɔnɔ wɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã so pɛ bayɛkɛ wɔedzu. Tɛofeke ishu, kɔ kifu pɔ zã wɔ mɛ. 21Onupɛ Owusoso Akaa egiɖi Yudanɛ gɛ balɛ asɛ besidzudzu bɔshɛ ana ashagabuiɛ, etibeɖi wɔnɔ tsyɛ ashagabui.
22Kliso nɔbaka Owusoso Akaa yɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ yɛahɔɛ gagalĩ nɛ wɔnɔ abha shu. Agagalĩ ahɔɛ nɛ bagɛ betsodzi nɛ yɛedeɛ shu, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ aabhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã akɔ wɔnɔ onupɛ nogitsodzi nɛ yɛedeɛ. Onu gɛna naa, abashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ shu atɛ elu. 23Kɛlɛ onupɛ Israeleyiɛ etsodzi ayɛkɛ aŋãa, bebè dzini balɛ edzu nɛ balɛ ɔzãkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ ohumi ɔlɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛahɔɛ gɛ abalà edzini balɛ edzu nɛ balɛ ɔzãkɔ. 24Wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ, gɛ nɔlɛ asɛ kifutu mɛ busiushɛ gɛ bebhui edzu atɔɖɔ besidzudzu ushɛ abha ana, gɛ balɛ enu Israel ɛmadiɛ. Kliso kitinu kibui gagalĩ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa asɛ tɛ edzini besidzudzu alɛ nɔshɛ bhui bhuiɛ edzu atɔɖɔ besidzudzu alɛ ke abha.
Owusoso Akaa Eɖi Anɔ Ka nyia Ka Ashagabui
25Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛkɔ noti kibui nɛ kibui kpukpũ ɛlɛ shu, tɛ notɛ ofeke ishu ɔsɛ nonyi ibui popopo. Kibuiɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, nɛ Israelanɛ teli atɔ̃ gagalĩ ibeɛ, kinu tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɔsɛ onupɛ bamɔ̃ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tɛkaklàa gɛ aapɛ nɔɔ anaa, babàba Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. 26Klisoɔ, babà yɛkɛ akɔ Israel pete, ɔmɔ asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Anunɔ gɛebebu banunɔ ebede Zion,
ebebu kɛtakpu makpɛ makpɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa eyinɔ nɛ Yakob yɛɔpã mɛ.
27Kɛlɛ mɛolugbũ nyanyã nɛ alɛ onu ɔsɛ,
gɛ ɛlɔkɔ balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tsye alɛ.”
28Nɛ Kibui Gbangbã nulũɔ, Israelanɛ benu banɔ gɛ bagɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa. Pɔ nɛ balɛ ashuĩ alɛ ɛtakpu soɔ, Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ balɛ ibui pɛ ebu alɛ, 29ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛbɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ anɔ nɛ̀ yɛ banɔ tikukuluɔ titsyina ɖa. 30Ɔmɔ asɛ nɛ kuku kibeɛ gɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ nodzi batɔ̃ malũ maluanɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, pɔ otsiɛ nɔ eɖi wɔnɔ ashagabui nɛ Yudanɛ atɔ̃ malũmalũɔ so. 31Balɛ tsyɛ bedzi batɔ̃ malũ malũanɔ otsiɛ, sɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa eɖi alɛ ashagabui nɛ ashagabuiɛ gɛeɖi wɔnɔ nɛ takpu. 32Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ banunɔ pete asɛ tɛ bagagalĩ batɔ sɛ tɛ alà eɖi alɛ ashagabui.
Kpɛ Owusoso Akaa Nɛinyè Nɛitití
33Owusoso Akaa yɛehoeyiudɔ̃ mɔmɔ̃ɔ kpè mɔ lo! Kɛlɛ yɛubutiɛ nɛ̀ ebuesi lulũɔ mɛ edzu mɔɔ dza!
Kiɖuwoe gɛlɛ anɔ teli ahɔɛ akɔɛ onupɛ aɖɔaɖɔ pɛ ebhui ibui mɛ?
Kɛlɛ afana gɛ abalà elũ yɛɔgã mɛ niesi?
34Afana gɛelũ Apaleteɛ yɛekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ niesi?
Pɛnɔsɛ afana gɛenu anunɔ geuhu buluhũ akɔɛ?
35Afana gɛ atɛkɔ Owusoso Akaa kɛdɔ̃ tili eɖi,
sɛ tɛ yɛtsyɛ edzini kɛlɛ kɛbhɛ abuia akpɛ kɛliulũ akɔ anunɔ?
36Owusoso Akaa yɛabhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka, kɛlɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ lalɛ, kɛlɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ lagã.
Kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ inu yɛyɛ́ tihɔɔ! Amen.

Title: ROMANƐ 12
Content:
Kɛtakpu Esi Kpɛkpɛ Nɛidi Gɛ Apaleteɛ Adɛmɛɛ
1Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛashagabui nɛidi gɛeɖi ɔlɔ nɔ soɔ, ɛkpalà ɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ishu ɔbhɛtɛ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gɛlɛ nɛkpã ana, gɛ ɛlɛishu dalɛ pɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔɔ, kɛlɛinu wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ. 2Nɔtɛ ɔzã nɛkpã asɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛanɛ, pɔ nɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛetsyina wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ yɛedzi avɔvɔ. Kɛlɛ̀ bakɔ ɔsɛ nɔpɔ̃ɛ Owusoso Akaa ebui tɔtɔɖɔɔ mɛ oɖi, kɛgɛ ɛpɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛadɛmɛ nɔ, pɛ kɛlɛ ná piapii nɔ.
3Nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ bakɔ mɛ nulũɔ, itseɖe wɔnɔ ɔmɛ anɔ ka nyia ka asɛ atɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu asɛ yɛadɛ. Nɛ kɛlɛ inye mɛɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ ishu esi zhizhinɔ ɛkpã zazãna shu boŋ, tɛ anɔ nyia anɔ ebhui ibui mɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛidi gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa akɔ nɔɔ shu. 4Asɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ gɛ ishupi bɔwɔ̃pɛ lɛ bɔlɔ mɛ anɔ aka nyia aka ahɔɛɛ, pɔ anɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ idi tinikpo bɔwɔa, 5kana ɛbe gana Kristo mɛɛ, bɔlɔ banɔ kpekpè alɛ pete bɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo, kɛlɛ bɔlɔ ishupi ɔwɔ̃pɛ nɔ kpɛ olũgbu nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ. 6Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ediedi alɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ bakɔ ɔlɛ nulũ. Anunɔ gɛ yɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ aɖɔ ebui eluɔ, aɖɔ alɛ elu nɛ kɛkɔ gɛ bakɔɛ nɛ yɛibui tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nulũ. 7Onupɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ anunɔ ayɛkɛɛ, nɔkɔ yɛadɛ ɛlɛ, kana ɛbe onupɛ kinu bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ anɔ teli tsyɛ ayɛkɛ, nɔkɔ yɛakasɛ bɔdɔ̃ɔ, 8onupɛ anɔ teli yɛyɛ́ kɛlinu sɛ tɛ akpɛ banɔ emiɛ, nɔkɔ yɛakpɛ banɔ emi, anunɔ gɛ àkɔ bagɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà ma balɛ ahɔɛɛ, azakɔ balɛ nɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã, onupɛ banɔ gbagbana ɛxɔ̃ɛ anunɔ ayɛkɛ, agbana banunɔ piapii, kɛlɛ onupɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi anunɔ ayɛkɛ tsyɛɛ, eɖi ashagabuiɛ nɛ same mɔmɔ mɛ.
Tɛdɛdɛmɛ Nɛ Banɔ
9Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ banɔ nɔ̀ ode ɛya gbangbã mɛ. Nɔtɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ kibui zizĩ, nɔnyana kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ovunɔ. 10Nɔlɔkɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ mɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ bélɛɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ ana. Nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ ɔdɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ ishu. 11Nɔtɛ shrɛrɛ nɛ wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, pɔ nɔkɔ kifu zã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ, ɔkɔ axɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ. 12Awɔ̃ lulu azã wɔnɔ same mɔmɔ mɛ, tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ banɔ luhũ ikpɛ ibe, nɔlɔkɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã okulu Akaa nɔ. 13Nɔplɛnɔ ɔhamɛeyi nɔnɔ́ gɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà ma yɛahɔɛ. Nɔzã ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ abha ɔkɔ befu.
14Noyula tutu esi ɔkɔ bagɛ atɔ̃nɔ wɔnɔ edeɛ, noyula ɔkɔ alɛ, pɔ nɔtɛɖɔ kibui ɔkpɛ alɛ. 15Nɔmɔ same nɛ̀ bagɛ amɔ same, kɛlɛ nobi yoyo nɛ̀ bagɛ ebieyoɔ. 16Nɔzã nɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ. Nɔtɛ ozofeke ishu, pɔ nɔdɛmɛ tɛ nɔzã tenikpo nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ wɔnɔ esiɛ. Nɔtɛ ɔlɔkɔ ishu asɛ bebutianɛ nonu.
17Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ ibui kpa ɔkpɛ ibui kpa lũ ɔkɔ anɔ na nà. Nolu awɔ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ibui gɛinu kɛgbangbã nɛ anɔ ka nyia ka amɛ. 18Onupɛ kɛbalà de wɔnɔ kawɔ̃pɛ mɛɛ, tɛnɔzã nɛ̀ anɔ ka nyia ka nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. 19Mɛɔbhia alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ obisi otití ɔkɔ ishu, pɔ nobu kidzo ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ, “Mɛxɔ̃ɛ kinu ɔsɛ tɛ mɛibisi otití nɛ wɔnɔ ulũ, tɛ mɛpɔ̃ batɔ̃,” Apaleteɛ yɛaɖɔ ɛlɛ. 20Nɛ kɛlɛ nɛinye mɛɛ,
“Onupɛ bɔbhɛ iyi anunɔ gɛ atɛ dɛmɛ nɛ wɔɔ, wɔ kɔɛ ɛŋaŋã yɛaŋã,
onupɛ oluwɔ̃ɛ oyi yɛɛ, kɔɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili yɛawɔ̃ɛ.
Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, kɛbazã asɛ gɛ ɔlɔkɔ afɔɛifu ɔtɔɖɔ yɛada mɛ.”
21Nɔtɛkɔ kibui kpa ŋã wɔnɔ abha, pɔ nɔkɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ŋã kibui kpa nabha boŋ.

Title: ROMANƐ 13
Content:
Batɔ̃ Lulũ Ɔkɔ Bekusi
1Kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ nyia anɔ elũ batɔ̃ akɔ bekusiɛ gɛ aŋã bɔlɔ abhaa, ɔmɔsɛ kabha ŋaŋã na nà ma gɛ anɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛedzu alɛ. Kabha ŋaŋã gɛ alɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa yɛedzu alɛ. 2Kliso onupɛ anɔ gɛ alɔɛtití nɛ agaŋã abha shuɔ, kɛlɛ anɔ alɛ alɔɛtití nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛbui tɔtɔɖɔ luɔ shu, kɛlɛ banunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ anaa, bebèkulu ebhu nɛ alɛ. 3Banunɔ gɛ baŋã abhaa, betiku ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛelete nɛifu, pɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛeleteɛ ko. Ɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɔzã tɛ anunɔ gɛ aŋã abha etiku wɔɛifu dza? Kɛlɛ bhɛtɛ kibui gɛ ɛpɛɛ tɛ akpɛ wɔɛinye nɛitití. 4Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛenu sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ kibuiɛ gɛ ɛpɛɛ akɔ ɔnɔ. Pɔ ɔbhɛtɛ kibui kpaa, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ kifu yi wɔ ɔmɔsɛ bɛtɛ̀ alɛ yɛahɔɛ akɔ yɛishu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛenu, gɛ alɛ yɛinye mɛ sɛ tɛ apɔ batɔ̃ akɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛelete. 5Kliso kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ bagaŋã abha, anɛ sɛ nɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ɛtakpu ete so, pɔ kinu ɛkpã gbangbã gɛ lɛshɔnɔ ɔkɔ tɛzazã. 6Kɛlɛ́ nɛtakpu tsyɛ so pɛ nɔbuia ɔmɛadzɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bagaŋã abha enu Owusoso Akaa yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ, gɛ balɔkɔ balɛ kibe akɔ nɛ esiakpa abha axɔ̃ɛ abha tiɖiɖi mɛ. 7Anɔ ka nyia ka shu gɛ nɔdɔ ɛbhɛ tiliɛ, nɔbuia ɛlɛ ɔkɔɛ, ɔmɛa dzyɔ awɔ wɔnɔ shuɔ, nɔbuia alɛ, kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɔnɔ ɛtakpu gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔbuia kadzyɔɔ, nɔbuia alɛ, anunɔ gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ nosi yɛifuɔ, tɛ nosii, kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ yɛɛ, nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔɛ.
Kiwuiɛ Tsu Ba Nɔdɛmɛ Nɛ̀ Bagɔlɔ
8Nɔtɛkɔ ɛbhɛ na nà zã ɔnɔ shu, ɔdɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bagɔlɔ ete ko, ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛɔhagbo nɔɔ, kɛlɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ ɔsha pete abha. 9Ɔsha ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Tɛɔdɛ ɔma mɛ,” “tɛoyi anɔ,” “tɛozuru,” “Tɛɔdzã awuhũ nɛ wɔhagbo ɛdɔ̃ shu,” nɛ̀ ɔsha bhlatɔ pete nɛ ɛtakpu ibuiɛ gɛ kihu alɛ ɔtɔ̃ nu ɔsɛ, “Dɛmɛ nɛ wɔhagbo asɛ wɔshu ana.” 10Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ anɔ tɛmana kibui kpa nɛ ɔhagbo ishi. Kliso ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ibui nu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ anɔ.
11Nɔbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ tɛ nolũ kibeɛ mɛ gɛ bɔkpasɛ otsiɛ nɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ na ɔkɔ ɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔnyɛmɛ odenɔ wɔnɔ taɖa dɔdɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ tibubu ibeɛ itsu plɛnɔ ɔlɔ ɔdɛ kibeɛ gɛ bulũ kibuiɛ pɛ bɔyɛkɛŋãa. 12Elishibeɛ fala, kɛlɛ keli aza nɛ ɔlɔ ebeke, kliso nɔkɔ bɔshɛ nɛ ahɔɛ nɛ otumũ mɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, tɛ bɔlɔkɔ keyudɔ̃ dadalɛ kpàta. 13Nɔkɔ bɔzã nɛ ɛkpã gbangbã asɛ kiwui dadalɛ mɛ ana, tɛ bɔta bhɛtɛ agbagbà ebui asɛ bɔmɔ same, tɛ bɔzɛwɔ̃ɛ bunũ tizì buku, tɛ bɔɔbhɛtɛ banyɛ nɛ̀ badzɛ ebui pɛ bɔbaatɛ ishu lu esi. Kɛgɛ pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bɔɔkpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ tɛ bɔzɛpɛ ebalá alo tɛ bɔzɛdzã awuhũ nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. 14Nɛ alɛ nɛinye mɛɛ, nɔkɔ bɔlɔkɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo kpɛ ishu asɛ akpɛkpɛ ana, tɛ bɔta zɛbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ kɛmɔ gɛ bɔmɔ same nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu.

Title: ROMANƐ 14
Content:
Bagɛ Bakpɛ Ogù Nɛ̀ Bagɛ Agɛkpɛ Nɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Mɛ
1Nɔyɛkɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa kakpɛ oguɔ tsyɛ ɔkpɛ wɔnɔishi, tɛ nɔtɛ ozokulu ebhu nɛ ebui wawlãkɛ shu. 2Anɔ teli nɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lũɔ, adɛmɛ aŋã kɛka nyia ka, pɔ anɔ teli gɛ aka kpɛ ogù nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, yɛ xɔnɔ tɛgã ete ko yɛaŋã. 3Anunɔ gɛ aŋã kɛka nyia kaa, eti bu olugbũ mɛ nɛ agɛ yɛatɛ abhɛtɛ ana shu, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ atɛ aŋã kɛka nyia kaa, atɛ tɛ̀ɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛaŋã kɛka nyia ka elú, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ yɛenu. 4Afana wonu pɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ okulu ebhu nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ? Apaleteɛ ete ko yɛenyi asɛ alɛ piapii alo agɛpɛ. Abalà azã piapii, ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ abalà bhɛtɛ asɛ tɛ akpɛ ogù.
5Kana ɛbe anɔ teli tsyɛ alɔkɔ kiwui tili asɛ kɛlɛ shu dalɛ dɛ tili. Anɔ bhlatɔ pɔ alɔkɔ ewuiɛ nyɔ̃ɔ asɛ lashɔ̃. Kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ anɔ ka nyia ka abhɛtɛ yɛekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ kɛgɛ aɖɔɔ shu. 6Anunɔ gɛ alɔkɔ kiwui tili asɛ kɛlinu kɛgɛ dzã kiwuhũ dɛɛ, abhɛtɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ Apalete nɛinye nɛitití nɔ. Kana ɛbe anunɔ gɛ atã kɛdzyaa, abhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ akpɛ Apalete nɛinye nɛitití, ɔmɔsɛ ehu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɛ kɛŋaŋã nɛ ɛtakpu, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ atɛ aŋãa tsyɛɛ, abhɛtɛ ana akɔ Apaleteɛ tɛ alɔkɔ ehu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɔ. 7Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ ɔmayɛmɛ na nà atɛ azã nɛ ɛkpã ɔkɔ yɛahɔɛ ishu ete, kana ɛbe bɔlɔ ɔmayɛmɛ anɔ na nà atɛ etsí akɔ yɛahɔɛ ishu ete. 8Onupɛ bɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpãa, bɔlɛ ɛlɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ, kɛlɛ onupɛ butsí tsyɛɛ, butsí ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ, kliso bɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpã alo butsí tsyɛɛ elo, Apaleteɛ ayɛ ko bunu.
9Kɛlɛ̀ nɛ̀ ɛtakpu so ko pɛ gɛ Kristo etsíɛ, alɔ pɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã sɛ tɛ edzi Apalete akɔ bavɛvɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpãa. 10Wɔ pɔ, kiɖeso pɛ okulu ebhu nɛ̀ wɔelee? Alo kiɖeso pɛ oɖi wɔele nɔ sɛ etinu kɛdɔ̃ na nà nɔ dza? Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ pete bɔbazã bebèkulu ebhu nɛ ɔlɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa na mɛ. 11Bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Apalete aɖɔ asɛ, ‘Gɛ ɛnya lɛ nɛ ɛkpã koɔ,’
anɔ nyia anɔ ebedzu ekluisi esi akɔ mɛ,
kɛlɛ olugbũ ka nyia ka ɔbɔdalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ mɛinu Owusoso Akaa.’ ”
12Kliso bɔlɔ mɛ aka nyia aka ebebu yɛishu lũ akɔ Owusoso Akaa.
13Kɛlɛ̀ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔyɔlɔ bubhu tikuklu nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ. Nɛ kɛlɛ́ nɛinye mɛɛ, anɔ na nà atɛ lɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ bakpata alo tɛ abhɛtɛ kibui alɔkɔ ebhui idzo mɛ akɔ yɛadzya nɔ. 14Mɛ, asɛ anɔ gɛ alɛ Apalete Yesu mɛɛ anaa, kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔkɔ mɛ piapii ɔsɛ, kɛŋaŋã kpa na nà ma nɛ kɛlɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ. Pɔ anunɔ gɛ amɔ kɛŋaŋã tili asɛ kɛlɛishu gɛ dalɛɛ, kɛlɛ anɔ alɛ kɛgɛ dalɛ ɔkɔ. 15Onupɛ kɛgɛ ɔŋãa, kɛkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ wɔele akpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ ɔtsakɛ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ elé idzo abha. Tɛkɔ ɔsɛ wɔɛŋaŋã kizĩ anɔ teli yɛkpã, anunɔ gɛ yɛtakpu so pɛ Kristo ebetsíɛ. 16Tɛkɔ kaɖɔ zizĩ na nà eyi nɛ kibui tili gɛ wɔ oɖi ɔsɛ kɛpɛ pɛ ɔbhɛtɛ shu. 17Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ŋaŋãa, itinu bɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ wɔɛwɔɛ ibui, pɔ kinu tɛzazã piapii, ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ same mɔmɔ nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã mɛ ibui. 18Ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Kristo nɛ idzo ɛlɛ nɛidi abhaa yɛibui Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ banɔ tsyɛ adɛmɛ atɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha.
19Kliso nɔkɔ bɔkpɛ emi tɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ bamana ishu yɔyɔɔ, tɛ bɔbhɛtɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bɔba lɔkɔ kpɛ bagɔlɔ ohumi nɔɔ nɔ̀. 20Tɛkɔ ɔsɛ kɛŋaŋã so tɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛxɔ̃ɛ izĩ. Kɛŋaŋã ka nyia ka shu dalɛ, pɔ kɛgɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ aŋã kɛdɔ̃ nɔnɔ́ gɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ teli etso dzi nɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã niede. 21Kɛpɛ dɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɔtɛtã kɛdzya alo ɔwɔɛ bunu alo ɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ tɛ wɔɛle nɔ etso dzi nɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã niede.
22Kliso kɔ kɛgɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋãa nɛ ebui alɛ shuɔ azã wɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ete ko ishi. Tiyuyula kinu ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ atɛ ebu yɛibuiɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kɛlɛ abhaa, nɛpɔ. 23Pɔ anunɔ gɛ yɛitúɔ mɛ kpɛ yɛuluhũ flogo pɛ aŋã kɛŋaŋã tiliɛɛ, aŋã ɛpɔ, ɔmɔsɛ anɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ yɛalɔkɔ aŋã kɛŋaŋãa nɔ, kɛlɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ gide koeyi nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, kinu kibui kpa.

Title: ROMANƐ 15
Content:
1Bɔlɔ agɛ kpɛ ogù nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bɔyɛkɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ lɔma alɛ ahɔɛ, kɛlɛ kɛma sɛ tɛ bɔɔ bhɛtɛ kɛgɛ iku ɔlɔ awɔ̃ɔ. 2Kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ ɔmayɛmɛ aka nyia aka abhɛtɛ kɛgɛ baku yɛɔhagbo awɔ̃, pɛ ebeshe atɔɖɔ nɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. 3Ɔmɔsɛ Kristo tsyɛ elo, agɛ babhɛtɛ kɛgɛ yɛadɛmɛ nɔ akɔ yɛishu, pɔ asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ, “Akwalatuɔ gɛ banunɔ alɔkɔ akwala wɔ nɔɔ, aba yalɛ̀ mɛ.” 4Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛibui ka nyia ka gɛ bafɔnɔ elu nɛ kibeliɛɛ, bafɔnɔ kɛlɛ elu asɛ tɛ kɛkasɛ ɔlɔ bɔdɔ̃, sɛ tɛ gana kitèkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kemikpɛkpɛ mɛɛ, tɛ bɔyɛkɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ idzo mɛ buɖi nabha ɔŋã.
5Owusoso Akaa gɛ akɔ kemikpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kité kpɛkpɛɛ, akɔ ɔnɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔfɔfuĩa asɛ banɔ gɛ alɛ Yesu ede anaa, 6sɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ kitú tinikpo nɛ̀ olugbũ tonikpo ɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa, gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo Yɛakaa nɛinye nɛitití.
7Kliso nɔyɛkɛ bagɔlɔ asɛ kɛyɛkɛ gɛ Kristo tsyɛ ayɛkɛ ɔnɔɔ, tɛ kɛkpɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛinye nɛitití. 8Ɛkɔ noti ɔsɛ Kristo ebedzi axɔ̃ɛdɛ akɔ Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛibui gbangbã nɛinye mɛ, sɛ tɛ atɔɖɔ ɛklagbu nɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ elu akɔ balɛ ashuĩ alɛ nabha, 9sɛ tɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ tɛ bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití nɛ yɛashagabui ɖiɖiɛ shu, asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Kliso ɛbakpɛ wɔɛnye nɛitití nɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ nɛishi,
kɛlɛ ɛbazhã ɛdzɛ nɛ wɔɛnye nɛtakpu.”
10Tɛfɔfɔnɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ,
“O! Wɔnɔ bagɛ notinu Yudanɛ, nɔkpɛ same nɛ̀ yɛanunɔ.”
11Kɛlɛ bazafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Nɔkpɛ Apaleteɛ nɛinye nɛitití, wɔnɔ bagɛ otinu Yudanɛ petee,
kɛlɛ wɔnɔ pete nɔzhã ɛdzɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití.”
12Kɛlɛ Yesaya tsyɛ azaɖɔ asɛ,
“Isai yɛyamɛeyi teli ebekoeyì aba,
gɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ abá baŋã ukusi nɛ ɛmadi nabha,
bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ, bebèlu awɔ̃ nɛ yɛabha.”
13Owusoso Akaa nabha gɛ nolu awɔ̃ akɔ asɛ tɛ same nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ yuku unɔ ɔgana Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ohumi nɔ mɛ.
Paulo Avɛnɔ Kibui Gbangbã Nɛ Bagɛ Betinu Yudanɛ Ɔkɔ
14Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, ɛmɔ kɛlɛ idenɔ mɛishu mɛ ɔsɛ, nodzi banɔ gbangbã nɛ bubuti mɛ, kɛlɛ nɔna gɛ nɔbɔlà kasɛ bagɔlɔ ɔdɔ̃. 15Ɛfɔnɔ ebui gelee kpɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ nɛ̀ kitèkpɛkpɛ sɛ tɛ iwlui báka ɔnɔ, nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebhui mɛebuɔ shu, 16ebu mɛ asɛ tɛ mɛidzi Kristo Yesu yɛibui gbangbã axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ, kɛlɛ asɛ banɔlũazazã anaa, tɛ mɛɖɔ Owusoso Akaa Ibui Gbangbã tseɖe bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ, sɛ tɛ bedzi asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gbangbã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, gɛ bɔlɛishu Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔdalɛ ana.
17Kliso mɛinye wui abha nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ nɛ̀ mɛxɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛtakpu. 18Ɛtɛbapɛ ɛwɔawɔa sɛ ibu olugbũ mɛ tɛɖɔ kibui na nà ɔdɛ kɛgɛ Kristo abhɛtɛ aganà mɛabha, sɛ tɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ tɛ belũ atɔ̃ akɔ Owusoso Akaa, ɔgana kɛgɛ ɛɖɔ pɛ ɛbhɛtɛ mɛ- 19ɔgana ohumi udɔ̃ bubu kasɛ nɛ̀ atsyindzye ebui, ɔgana Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ohumi mɛ. Kliso denɔ Yerusalemuɔ, ɛgã kana Iliriko pete batsyɔa, pɛ ɛzɛɖɔ Kristo Ibui Gbangbã, gɛ kɛna piapii. 20Kidzi mɛtakpu tɔtɔɖɔ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛɖɔ Kibui Gbangbã nɛ ɛklɛ gɛ betinyi Kristoɔ, sɛ tɛ mɛtɛ kpɛ ɛtakpu nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ anɔ bhlatɔ teli atɛkpɛ ibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ esi akɔ banunɔ. 21Asɛ kɛfɔ̀nɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ kibuiɛ elu asɛ,
“Banunɔ gɛ bakaɖɔ yɛibuiɛ etseɖe eɖiɛ, babàmɔɛ,
kɛlɛ banunɔ gɛ bekelũɔ, bebèlũ kɛlɛ esi.”
22Kɛlɛ so pɛ ɛtɔɖɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ tɛbaba ibui flogo pɛ kɛtɛ shɔ̃.
Paulo Yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ Sɛ Tɛ Avɛ Roma
23Otsi alɛ gɛ mɛaxɔ̃ɛ ebelè pɛ ɛtɛkadɛ ɔkɔ na nà nɛ kɛma ɛlɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ agɔ gelee nɛ alɛ gɛ kinu mɛ tɛpɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛbaɖi unɔɔ, 24ɛtɔɖɔ sɛ tɛ mɛba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛvɛ Spania. Kibui tɔtɔɖɔ kinu ɔsɛ tɛ mɛiku wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛfala pɛ ɛvɛɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ mɛbabisi tɛpɛplɛnɔ odenɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ kidzoɔ tɛgagã mɛ, onupɛ ɛzã wɔnɔ ɔbha kɛbɔɛ nɔ. 25Otsiɛ xɔnɔ ɛkpasɛ idzo mɛ ɛvɛ Yerusalem, sɛ tɛ mɛdɛkɔ banɔ dadalɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 26Makedonianɛ nɛ̀ Axayanɛ beshogò bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ same sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ aplɛnɔ betsyuitsyuiɛ galɛ banɔ dadalɛ nɛishi nɛ Yerusalemuɔ. 27Batɔɖɔ akɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ same, kɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛbhɛ gɛ badɔ nɛ balɛishu ana. Onupɛ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ amɔ bɔdɔ̃ gbangbã odenɔ ɔfɔfuĩa tiyuyula gɛinu Yudanɛ ɔyɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ badɔ ɛbhɛ nɛ Yudanɛ shu gɛ kɛlɛ kɔ alɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ɔ gɛ bamɔ̃ edenɔ tiyuyula mɛɛ, aplɛnɔ Yudanɛ nɔ. 28Kliso onupɛ ɛdɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ, pɛ iɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɔlɛ ku balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ ebekeɛ, ɛba bàgã wɔnɔ ɔkɔ fala vɛ Spania. 29Inyi sɛ ɛbaku wɔnɔ ɔkɔɔ, ɛbalɔkɔ Kristo yɛtiyuyula gɛ lɛ Yɛibui Gbangbã mɛ mana wɔnɔ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ.
30Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, ɛkpalà ɔnɔ ɔgana Apalete Yesu Kristo abha, nɛ̀ Yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ banɔ mɛɛ, tɛ nɔplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ lɛ mɛ, tɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ mɛtakpu. 31Nokulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ ebu mɛ eyinɔ nɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Yesu abha aŋã nɛ Yudea nɔ ahɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ vɛnɔ nɛ̀ mɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nɛ Yerusalemuɔ leku bagɛ balɛishu badalɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ awɔ̃, 32sɛ tɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛɛ, ɛbaku wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ same kɛlɛ mɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ pete nɔ, tɛbɔkpɛ same nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. 33Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛakɔ ishu yɔyɔ azãplɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee. Amen.

Title: ROMANƐ 16
Content:
Paulo Yɛɔsɛsɛnɔ Ɔsɛsɛ Romanɛ
1Ɛbaka bɔlɔ ada Foebe ibui kɔ ɔnɔ, gɛenu ɔha axɔ̃ɛdɛ gbangbã teli idi nɛ Kɛnxren ɔha mɛ. 2Ibisi denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ sɛ tɛ nɔyɛkɛ yɛ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ. Nɔyɛkɛ yɛ asɛ kɛyɛkɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ banɔ dadalɛɛ ana, kɛlɛ nɔkɔɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ ka nyia ka gɛ apɛ edenɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛenu akɔ banɔ gelee, gɛ mɛ tsyɛ inu balɛmɛ anɔ tenikpo.
3Nɔsɛnɔ Priskila nɛ̀ Akwila, mɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔhagbo alɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ. 4Bálɔkɔ balɛ ɛkpã akɔ nɛ mɛtakpu. Anɛ mɛ ete, pɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ɔhamɛanɛ pete tsyɛ ezehu alɛ ahɔɛ.
5Sɛnɔ bahá gɛ atsyɔa nɛ balɛ ɔpã mɛɛ tsyɛ. Ɛsɛnɔ Epaineto, anɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ. Yɛedzi anɔ nɛ Asia gɛ eputɔ etsyina edzi Kristoanɔ.
6Sɛnɔ Maria, gɛ edzi anunɔ gɛ azawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ̀ kemikpɛkpɛ akɔ ɔnɔ.
7Sɛnɔ mɛeshopo alɛ Androniko nɛ̀ Yunio, balɛ nɛ̀ mɛ bɔzã ɔɖavũ. Banɔkpɛkpɛ enyi alɛ piapii gɛ bedzi Kristoelete akpɛ otugbà akɔ mɛ.
8Sɛnɔ Ampliatus, anunɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.
9Sɛnɔ Urbano, anunɔ gɛ azadɛ Kristo axɔ̃ɛ nɛ̀ mɛ, nɛ̀ Staxis anunɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ.
10Sɛnɔ Apeles, anɔ gɛ eshè nɛ̀ ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ.
Sɛnɔ Aristobolo nɛ̀ yɛɔpãmɛanɛ tsyɛ piapii.
11Sɛnɔ mɛeshopo Herodion.
Sɛnɔ Narkiso nɛ̀ yɛɔpãmɛanɛ gɛ balɛ ɔha kpɛkpɛ mɛ nɛ̀ Apalete Kristoɔ.
12Sɛnɔ Trifaena nɛ̀ Trisofa gɛ benu banunɔ gɛ bazadɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔ Apaleteɛ.
Sɛnɔ mɛɔbhia Persis, anɔ gɛ akpɛ emi nɛ Apalete nɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ.
13Sɛnɔ Rufo, anɔ gɛ bebu elu akɔ Apaleteɛ, nɛ̀ yɛelĩ gɛenu mɛ tsyɛ mɛelĩɛ.
14Sɛnɔ Asinkrito, Flego, Herme, Patroba, Herma nɛ̀ baadzya gɛ balɛ wɔbha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ.
15Sɛnɔ Filologo nɛ̀ Yulia, Nerea, yɛada nɛ̀ Olimpa ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ ɔhamɛeyi bhlatɔ pete gɛ balɛ alɛ ɔbha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ.
16Nɔsɛnɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ same, nɛ ahɔɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ.
Kristo yɛɔhamɛeyiɛ pete basɛnɛ wɔnɔ piapii.
17Mɛelɛ alɛ mɔ, ihu buluhũ kɔ ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nolú awɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɛ bamana kishi zizĩ nɛ banɔ ishi, pɛ babhɛtɛ ebui gɛ etsu awuhũ, pɛ lagã ɔtɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bɔkasɛ pɛ nɔkpasɛ shu. Nɔtɛkpɛ alɛ ɔha. 18Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ, anɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Kristo anɔkpɛkpɛ benu, balɛ evũ shu axɔ̃ɛ baadɛ. Balɔkɔ ebui dzyɛdzyɛ nɛ̀ banɔ balɛ enye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití, pɛ balɔkɔ awɔɛ banɔ gɛ batɛ abhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ kibuiɛ shuɔ nɔ. 19Anɔ nyia anɔ elũ kibui nɛ wɔnɔ batɔ̃ lulũ shu, kɛlɛ kinu kibui gɛ iku mɛ same nɛ wɔnɔ shu, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ̀ ɛpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ nodzi bebutinɛ nɛ kibui gbangbã shu, kɛlɛ nɛ ebui kpa shu pɔɔ, nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ ladalɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka shu.
20Ishu yɔyɔ Owusoso Akaa abayɛ Satana ohumi akpɛ wɔnɔ ɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ esi tsaitsai.
Apalete Yesu yɛtibhui bhuibuɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ wɔnɔ.
21Timoteo gɛ adɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ nɛ̀ mɛɛ, Lukio, Yawson nɛ̀ Sesipatro gɛ benu mɛeshopo alɛ tsyɛɛ, basɛnɛ wɔnɔ piapii.
22Mɛ, Tertio gɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ tsyɛɛ, ɛsɛnɛ wɔnɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ nɛinye mɛ.
23Gayo gɛ yɛɔkɔ bɔzã pɛ edzi bɔlɔ nɛ̀ ɔha pete apaleteɛ asɛnɛ ɔnɔ.
Erasto, gɛ abalɛ ɔma ehoeyiɛ, nɛ̀ bɔlɔ adzya Kuarto basɛnɔ ɔnɔ piapii. 24Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ ɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ. Amen.
25Anunɔ gɛ yɛalà ayɛkɛ wɔnɔ edzu nɛ ɛkpã ɔgana Kibui Gbangbã gɛ ɛkasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo shu, nɛ̀ kibu gɛ bebu ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ lalɛ alɛ ɔzãkɔ odenɔ kuku ibeɛ, 26pɔ otsi alɛ bebu alɛ akasɛ, kɛlɛ buti alɛ ɔgana ebuiɖɔluanɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ luɔ mɛ, nɛ̀ ɔgana ɔsha gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ ɛmadiɛ pete bayɛkɛ aŋã, kɛlɛ tɛ belũ batɔ̃ɔ akɔɛ, 27sɛ tɛ bɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu ebuitinɛ tenikpo nɔ nɛitití tihɔɔ nɛ Yesu Kristo yɛinye mɛ! Amen.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Paulo afɔnɔ yɛeplukpa gɛeputɔ asɛsɛ Korintoanɛ tɛ̀ kaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ bɔtɔ gɛlɛ Kristoanɛ ɛkpã zazãna nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebuiɛ gɛakpɛ̀ ɛtakpu nɛ ɔhaa gɛ Paulo edzu nɛ Koritoɔ mɛ. Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ mɛɛ, Korinto edzi kedzi ɔma gbagbla akɔ Helanɛ, gɛ lodzi Romanɛ ekusiɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Axaya bɔdɔ̃ mɛ. Bakpɛ ɔmã ɔlɛ awɔ̃ elu nɛ ɔlɛ kedzi gagã ebuiɛ, ɔlɛ mɛ ɛkpã zazãna, ɔlɛ mɛ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ ɛha ediediɛ gɛ azã ɔlɛ mɛ shu.
Kɛgɛ ɛlɛ shu banɔkpɛkpɛ alɔkɔ tili nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ kɛlɛinu bɔtɔ ebuiɛ asɛ ɔtɔbubu nɛ̀ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui nɛ ɔhaa mɛ, nɛ̀ ebui bibisi nɛ anyɛ nɛ̀ adzɛ tɛwɔwɔsɔ̃ nɛ̀ adzɛ gbagbana, ebui gɛ azakpɛ banɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ uluhũ, ɔha mɛ ebui tɛtɔtɔɖɔ, Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔlɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpu mɛ. Nɛ ebui esi lulũ gɛedzuɔ mɛɛ, akasɛ kana gɛ kibui gbangbã ɖɔaɖɔ bu ebui alɛ ulũ. Kɛtakpu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ ɛtramɛ (13) gɛ ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shu asɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛpɛ̃ ɔdɛ ɔkɔ yɛanɔ nɔ̀ɔ, kɛlɛinu kibui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛyɛkɛ kedzì ɔdɛ nɛ keplukpa mɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-9
Bagɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɔhaa shu1.10—4.21
Kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui bɔpã mɛ ɛkpã zazãna 5.1-7-40
Kristoanɔ nɛ̀ ibudi eleteɛ8.1—11.1
Ɛkpã zazãna nɛ ɔhaa mɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ11.2—14.40
Kristo nɛ̀ bayɛyɛkɛŋã tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ15.1-58
Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ Kristoanɛ nɛ Yudea16.1-4
Ishu ahɔɛ mɛ ebui nɛ̀ ebui gɔgɔɛ16.5-24

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo gɛ bekulú asɛ tɛ idzì anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, nɛ̀ bɔlɔ adzya Sostenese yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ.
2Ɛfɔnɔ kalɛ sɛsɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔha gɛalɛ Korinto, nɛ̀ bagɛ badalɛ balɛishu nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ pɛ balɛishu dalɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ bagɛ balɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ pɛ beekulu Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ inyeɛ, anɔ gɛenu balɛ Apaleteɛ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ ayɛ.
3Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ mɛpɛɛ kɔ wɔnɔ odenɔ Kititiayɛ gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ.
Ahɔɛhuhu
4Iihu Owusoso Akaa yɛahɔɛ kibe nyia be nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu, nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ akɔ wɔnɔ nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛɛ shu. 5Ɔmɔsɛ gana Kristo abha, nodzi ehoeyi elete nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, nɛ wɔnɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ kibui titì mɛ petee, 6ɔmɔsɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔ nɛ Kristo shuɔ awɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã mɛ. 7Klisoɔ, nɔtɛ ɔpɛɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nanà gɛ noɖì kidzo mɛ gagalĩi ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛ tibubu kasɛɛ. 8Abakɔ nɔzã gagalĩ ɔvɛnɔ kiwui gɔgɔ nabha, kɛba kɔsɛ nɔtɛ bɔmɔ bamɛ tsitsí nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛiwui nabha. 9Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ akɔ ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo gɛenu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ, enu kibui gɛlɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ abhɛbhɛtɛ elete.
Ɔtɔbubu Nɛ Ɔha Mɛ
10Mɛelé alɛ mɔ, ɛkɔɔ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛinye mɛ sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ nɔ ozolũ bagɔlɔ esi, tɛ̀ ɔtɔbubu nanà ɔtɔzã wɔnɔɛshi, tɛ̀ nɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo piapii nɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe nɛ̀ ebui tɔtɔɖɔ mɛ. 11Mɛelé alɛ mɔ, banɔ teli nɛ Kloe bɔpã mɛ akɔ mɛitì sɛ ebla ebui akpasɛ wɔnɔɛshi. 12Kɛgɛ mɛɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ tenikpo aaɖɔ asɛ, “Paulo ede mɛlɛ.” Anɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ asɛ, “Apolo ede mɛlɛ.” Teli tsyɛ asɛ, “Kefa ede mɛlɛ” kɛlɛ anɔbhlatɔ tsyɛ aɖɔ asɛ “Kristo ede mɛlɛ.”
13Pɔ, bayɛɛ Kristoɔ mɛ akpɛ bɔwɔ̃pɛ mɛɛ dza? Paulo bakpalà nɛ butsi osiɛ shu akɔ wɔnɔ dza?, pɛnɔsɛ Paulo inye mɛ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ wɔnɔ dza? 14Ihú ahɔɛ ɔsɛ, ɛgɛ kpɛ bulĩ kɔ wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nanà ɔdɛ Krispo nɛ̀ Gayo, 15kliso anɔ nanà atɛbà làɖɔ asɛ mɛinye mɛ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ wɔnɔ. 16(Ee, ɛkpɛ bulĩ kɔ Stefana nɛ̀ yɛɔpã mɛ anɛ tsyɛ, nɛ kɛlɛ edeɛ, ɛgaa baka sɛ̀ ɛzɛkpɛ bulĩ kɔ anɔ nanà.) 17Ɔmɔsɛ Kristo agɛkpɛ mɛasɛ tɛ̀ ɛdɛkpɛ bulĩ, pɔ tɛ̀ mɛdɛɖɔ kibui gbangbãa, gɛnɛ nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛ bubuti mɛ, onu gɛnanaa, Yesu butsi osiɛ ohumi nɔma kɛnanà mɛ.
Kristo Yɛenu Owusoso Akaa Bubuti Nɛ̀ Yɛohumi
18Butsi osiɛ shu ebuiɛ enu bɔga ebui ɔkɔ bagɛ bayalàa, pɔ bɔlɔ bagɛ baayɛkɛ elu nɛkpã xɔnɔɔ, lɛenu Owusoso Akaa ohumi ɔkɔ bɔlɔ. 19Ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elú asɛ,
Ɛbazĩ bebuti eleteɛ balɛ bubutiɛ,
ɛba futsù bagɛ eɖi asɛ bubutì lɛ balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ balɛ bubutiɛ mɛ kpɛ.”
20Fakɔ ebutinɛ alɛ? Fakɔ buplukpaeleteɛ alɛ. Fakɔ bagɛ apɛɛ obo kanɔ nɔ̀ bubutì idzoɔ alɛ dza? Owusoso Akaa egitsyina kanɔ alɛ mɛ bubutiɛ budzi bɔga dɔdɔ dza? 21Nɛ Owusoso Akaa bubuti nulũ soɔ, kanɔ alɛ mɛ gana kalɛ bubutiɛ mɛ betinyi yɛ, bɔwɔaga kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ tɛ bebù bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã elu nɛkpã ku Owusoso Akaa nɔ awɔ ɔdɛ. 22Yudanɛ ebisi atsyindzyeɛ ebui tɛ̀ bamɔ, kɛlɛ Helanɛ xɔnɔ atɔnɔ bubuti ede, 23pɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔɔ, Kristoɔ gɛ bakpalà nɛ butsi osiɛ shu nɛibui bɔɖɔ, kibui gɛ kinu kɛdɔ̃ kpakpatà ɔkɔ Yudanɛ pɛ bɔga kibui kinu ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ xɔnɔ, 24pɔ bagɛ Owusoso Akaa ekulu xɔnɔ, Yudanɛ nɛ̀ Helanɛ petee, Yesu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa yɛohumi nɛ̀ bubutì. 25Owusoso Akaa yɛ bɔgadɔdɔ nu bubutì ɔdɛ anɔdzyrame yɛubutì, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa tibobotsòɔ gagalĩ ɔdɛ banɔdzyrame ohumi.
26Mɛele alɛ mɔ, nɔbakà kɛzã gɛ nɔzã flogo pɛ bekulu wɔnɔ. Gɛnɛ wɔnɔ banɔ kpekpèɛ balɛ edzi bebutinɛ nɛ banɔdzyrame bɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ ulũ, gɛnɛ banɔ gelee gɛazã wɔnɔɛshiɛ balɛ edzì bagɛ eku banɔ awɔ, gɛnɛ wɔnɔ banɔ gelee balɛ ede baapã gbangbã mɛ. 27Pɔɔ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ bɔga dɔdɔ ebuiɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ sɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ akpɛ bebutinɛ nawuĩ nɔ. Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bubotsoɔ akpɛ bɔgagalĩ nawuĩ nɔ. 28Alɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛmã kɛnanà mɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ pɛ banɔ etie ɖi akpɛ kɛnanà mɛ, nɛ̀ ebuiɛ gɛ legi yi kɛdɔ̃ nanàa, ebù ebuiɛ gɛalɛ eyinɔ, 29sɛ tɛ̀ ananà etibe feke yɛishu nɛ yɛamɛ. 30Yɛ sopɛ nɔkpasɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛakɔ ɔlɔ bubuti odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, gɛ kɛlɛinù bɔlɔ tɛzazã piapii, ishudadalɛ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ tibubuyinɔ odenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. 31Kliso asɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ, “Anunɔ gɛ asɛ efeke yɛishuɔ, tɛ efeke ɛlɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.”

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 2
Content:
1Mɛelé alɛ mɔ, gɛba wɔnɔ ɔbha, ɛgɛba asɛ anɔ gɛenyi kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ piapii alo asɛ anɔ gɛ yɛ bubutì vɛ otugbà ana, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ itseɖe wɔnɔ ebuiɛ gɛ ɛzɛ mɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu. 2Ɔmɔsɛ gɛzã wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ, ɛbhɛtɛ mɛishu asɛ itinyí kɛnanà ɔdɛ Yesu Kristo, nɛ̀ kana gɛ bakpalà yɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu. 3Ɛba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ tibobotsò nɛ̀ kifusisi mɛ, nɛ̀ tishushukù gbagbagbà mɛ. 4Mɛ ebuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shuɔ, etinu bubutì nɛ̀ ebui gɛ batɛ elũ alɛ esi, pɔ lenu ebui gɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ohumi nɔ obu ɔkasɛ, 5sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tɛbà zã banɔdzyrame bubuti abha, pɔ tɛ lɔzã Owusoso Aka yɛohumi nabha boŋ.
Bubutiɛ Gide Ɔfɔfuĩa Nɔ Mɛ
6Bɔkaaɖɔ bubuti ebui alɛ nɛ bagɛ batɛ kpɛ iguɔ nɛishi, pɔ gɛnɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ bubuti alo bagɛ baaŋã bukusì nɛ kalɛ mɛ, gɛ beti bedzi kɛdɔ̃ nanà. 7Oo, Owusoso Akaa bubutiɛ gɛ bukpũɔ shu bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ, bubutìɛ gɛ bekpũ bɔlɛ pɛ Owusoso Akaa abalɛ elú akɔ bɔlɔ shu dadalɛ flogo pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ abakpɛ kesi. 8Kanɔ alɛ mɛ beekusi nanà egilũ bɔlɛ esi, ɔmɔsɛ pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ belũ bɔlɛ kesiɛ tsyɛ alo, bagɛ takpalà Apaleteɛ gɛ yɛishu dalɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu. 9Asɛ kana gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ,
“Ebuiɛ gɛ awuhũ nanà akamɔ eɖiɛ,
pɛ batɔ̃ eke elũ eɖiɛ,
pɛ kɛka ba ananà ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ tsyɛ eɖiɛ,
alɛ Owusoso Akaa abalɛ elu akɔ bagɛ badɛmɛ yɛibuiɛ”
10pɔ Owusoso Akaa ebu alɛ akasɛ bɔlɔ xɔnɔ ganà yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ.
Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔpɔ̃ɛ ebuiɛ petee mɛ, Owusoso Akaa yɛebui dzudzuɔ mɛ tsyɛ. 11Afana gɛ akpasɛ banɔishi pɛ ebeti kɛnɔnɔ gɛ kɛkpasɛ anɔ bhlatɔ yɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ɔdɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɔ kpasɛ yɛ mɛɛ dza? Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha ananà etinyi kɛnɔnɔ gɛ kpasɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ɔdɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ete. 12Gɛnɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛode kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ bɔyɛkɛ, pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛode Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ bɔyɛkɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bulũ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ bɔlɔ kɛbhɛ mabuia mabuia niesi. 13Ebui alɛ bɔɖɔ, gɛnɛ banɔdzyrame ebui nɛ̀ bubutì balɔkɔ akasɛ bɔlɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ, pɔ gana ebuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ kasɛ bɔlɔ abha, gɛ ladalɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ebuiɛ gɛ lakpasɛ alɛ mɛ ɔganà ɔfɔfuĩa ebuiɖɔɖɔ mɛ. 14Anunɔ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ma yɛmɛɛ, atɛyɛkɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ ede Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ lenu kɛwɔaga ibui ɔkɔɛ, kɛlɛ atɛ balà elũ alɛ esi ɔmɔsɛ ɔfɔfuĩa balɔkɔ elũ alɛ esi nɔ. 15Anunɔ gɛ akpasɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛɛ, ekulu kebhu nɛ ebuiɛ petee shu, pɔ yɛxɔnɔ ananà atɛlà kebhu ekulu niyɛ.
16“Ɔmɔsɛ afana gɛenyi kɛgɛ Apaleteɛ atɔɖɔ
pɛ abalà kasɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ɔ dza?”
Bɔlɔ xɔnɔ, Kristo yɛibui tɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛ kpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 3
Content:
Ɔtɔbubu Nɛ Ɔhamɛ Shu
1Mɛelé alɛ mɔ, ɛtɛɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ asɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ anɔ, pɔ asɛ anɔdzyrame ana, asɛ beyì vɔvɔ gɛ akpasɛ Kristo mɛ ana. 2Ɛkɔ wɔnɔ kɛmɔlĩ, gɛnɛ bɔŋaŋã, ɔmɔsɛ nɛɔko oshè pɛ nɔbɔ ŋã bɔlɛ, kibui gbã nɛɔkɔ balɛ otsiɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɛ tɛŋaŋã. 3Kanɔ mɛ banɔ ete nonu. Gɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ̀ ebela ebui akpasɛ wɔnɔɛishiɛɛ, kɛlɛ kanɔ mɛ anɔ nonuɔ dza? Nɔtɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ebui ɔmɔ asɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ banɔ nɔ ete dza? 4Kliso onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ asɛ, “Paulo ayɛ mɛinu,” pɛ anɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Apolo ayɛ mɛinuɔ pɔ,” kɛlɛ anɛ kanɔ mɛ banɔ ete nonuɔ dza?
5Alɛ petee niedeɛ pɔ, afana gɛenu Apolo? Kɛlɛ afana tsyɛ gɛenu Paulo? Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ ete gɛ balɛ akɔ asɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã asɛ kɛkpɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ akpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɛ balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ aka nyia aka ahɔɛ ana. 6Mɛɖa bɔdɔ̃eyiɛ, Apolo yɛakpɛ bulĩ nɛ bɔlɛ shu, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛakɔ bushè. 7Klisoɔ gɛnɛ agɛ yɛaɖa bɔdɔ̃eyiɛ pɛnɔsɛ agɛ yɛakpɛ bulĩɛ nɛ bɔlɛ shuɔ yɛabhɛtɛ̀ kɛnanà, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛakɔ bɔdɔ̃eyiɛ eshè. 8Tɛtɔtɔɖɔ tinikpo kɛlɛ ɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛaɖaa bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛakpɛ bulĩɛ nɛ bɔlɛ shuɔ ahɔɛ, kɛlɛ babà buia kɛbhɛ kɔ aka nyia aka nɛ yɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa shu. 9Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ nu Owusoso Akaa kɛxɔ̃ɛ tinikpo awɔawɔa, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ onu Owusoso Akaa yɛɔyà, nɛ yɛ̀ buvũɔ.
10Nɛ kibhuiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebhui mɛebuɔ, mɛkpɛ buvũ niesi asɛ buvũdzudzu gbangbã elete ana, kɛlɛ anɔbhlatɔ yɛaba bhɔ bɔlɛ atɔɖɔ. Pɔ anɔ nyia anɔ eɖi piapii nɛ̀ kɛbhɔ gɛ abhɔɔ yɛuvũɔ. 11Ɔmɔsɛ ananà azakalà buvũ vɔvɔ kesi akpɛ ɔdɛ bɔgɛ batɛ kpɛ bɔlɛ esi eluɔ, gɛenu Yesu Kristo. 12Onupɛ anɔ teli alɔkɔ sikãɛkpã, sikãfufu, aklagbu gɛ layɛkɛ kedzi, osi, ekeɖè alo bushìi abhɔ ɔlɛ atɔɖɔɔ, 13yɛxɔ̃ɛ bakasɛ kɛgɛ yɛalɔkɔ abhɔ bɔlɛ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Kiwuiɛ babu ɛlɛ kasɛ. Bebebù ɛlɛ akasɛ nɛ̀ kifú, kɛlɛ kifúɔ badalɛ aka nyia aka yɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa shu. 14Onupɛ kɛgɛ yɛabhɔ eluɔ zã nɛ̀ ɛkpãa, aba yɛkɛ yɛbhɛ babuia. 15Onupɛ kɛtãa, yɛbhɛ tã, yɛxɔnɔ babà yɛkɛ yɛ elu nɛ̀ ɛkpã, pɔ kɛbazã asɛ anɔ gɛebu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ ekoeyì odenɔ kifù mɛ ana.
16Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɔonu pɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ dza? 17Onupɛ anɔ teli ayɛɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ, Owusoso Akaa ebezĩ yɛ tsyɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ shu dalɛ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ onu Owusoso Akaavũ lɛ.
18Nɔtɛ̀ wɔɛ wɔnɔshu. Onupɛ abhɛtɛ wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli asɛ enyi kibui nɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ bubutì ulũɔ, etsyina edzì “awɔaga” sɛ tɛ̀ ebedzi ebutinɛ. 19Ɔmɔsɛ kanɔ mɛ bubuti ɛlɛ nu bɔga dɔdɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. Asɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elú asɛ, “Eevũ bagɛ eɖi asɛ benyi kibuiɛ nɛ balɛ bɔshɛ̃ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ” 20kana bewlui aɖɔ asɛ, “Apaleteɛ enyi asɛ bagɛ eɖi asɛ benyi kibuiɛ bubutiɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ.” 21Kliso ananà ete feke yɛishu! Bɔdɔ̃ petee wɔnɔ ɔyɛ bunù, 22onupɛ edzi asɛ Paulo, Apolo pɛnɔsɛ Kefa tsyɛɛ, kanɔ mɛ alo ɛkpã alo butsí alo obo kanɔ nɔ̀ pɛnɔsɛ kagɛ kabàa, bɔlɛ petee wɔnɔ ɔyɛ bunù, 23kɛlɛ Kristo ayɛ nonu, kɛlɛ Kristoɔ tsyɛ enu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 4
Content:
Kristo Yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ
1Klisoɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ aka nyia aka alɔkɔ bɔlɔ asɛ Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ ana, nɛ̀ asɛ bagɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛebui kpũkpũɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ alɛ ana. 2Kliso bebisì edenɔ bagɛ balɛ ahɔɛ balɔkɔ, ebuiɛ akpɛ asɛ tɛ bamɔ alɛ sɛ babhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. 3Ɛgɛ lɔkɔ nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ gɛ onupɛ wɔnɔ, alo anɔdzyrame kebhu okulukɔ toli okulu kebhu nɛ̀ mɛ, kibui gbã itikulù kebhu nɛ mɛishu. 4Mɛ kitúɔ mɛ dalɛ, pɔ kɛgɛ kasɛ ɔsɛ anɔ gbangbã mɛinu. Apaleteɛ yɛebe kulu kebhu nɛ̀ mɛ. 5Kliso nɔoti kulu kebhu kpɛ otugbà flogo tɛ̀ kibeɛ ba na, nɔzã opo odiyinɔ ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ aba. Yɛaba ebu ebui kpukpũ nɔnɔ gɛ akpasɛ otumũɔ mɛ oyinɔ amana ɔtɔ̃, kɛlɛ ebebu ebuiɛ gɛ lakpasɛ anɔdzyrame yɛitùɔ mɛ akasɛ. Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa aba kpɛ bagɛ kɛlɛ sɛ akpɛ nititíɛ.
6Mɛdzya alɛ mɔ, mɛ nɛ̀ Apolo lɔkɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ̃ shu, ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkpasɛ bɔdɔ̃ odenɔ bɔlɔkɔ tɛ nolũ ebui alɛ niesi ɔsɛ “Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ ɔfalanɔ kɛgɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ shu.” Sɛ tɛ notibo feke anana owunɔ kabha ɔdɛ yɛɔhagbo. 7Ɔmɔsɛ afana gɛ abhɛtɛ wɔ pɛ ɔgã ɔtɔ nɛ banɔ bhlatɔ shu? Kiɖe gɛlɛ wɔ ahɔɛ pɛ gɛnɛ bɔyɛkɛ wɔ yɛkɛ ɛlɛɛ dza? Kɛlɛ onu pɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɛlɛɛ, kiɖe so pɛ ofeke ishu ɔmɔ asɛ gɛnɛ bɔkɔ bakɔ wɔɔ dza?
8Putɔnɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔpɛɛ nɔ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ xɔɔ! Kɛlɛ nɔotsyina odzi ehoeyielete! Nɔodzi bekusi, gɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ tsyɛ akpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ. Ɛtapɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nodzi bekusi kɛgbã tɛ bɔŋã bukusiɛ plɛnɔ wɔnɔ! 9Kidzì kɔmɛ xɔnɔ asɛ Owusoso Akaa agbana bɔlɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ amana ɔmɔ asɛ banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɛ banɔdzyrame ishi ana, asɛ banɔ gɛ bebu alɛ ɛpɔ asɛ tɛ̀ beyi alɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ oɖikɔ ana. Babhɛtɛ bɔlɔ budzì bɔdɔ̃ gɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ eɖi, nɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ banɔdzyrameɛ amɛ. 10Budzi baaga nɛ Kristo ɛtakpu, pɔ bebutinɛ nɔonu nɛ Kristo mɛ! Bubotsò, pɔ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ ɔgagalĩ. Baakpɛ wɔnɔ kinyè nɛitití, pɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔ batɛ̀ɛ ɔlɔ lu esi! 11Boyinɔ otsiɛ nɔ, bɔbhɛ nɛ olũwɔɛ oyi ɔlɔ xɔnɔ, bɔdɔ̃ tsatsã mɛ bɔkpasɛ, beehuisi ɔlɔ, kɛlɛ bɔpã tsyɛ mã ɔlɔ ahɔɛ. 12Bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ. Onu baɖɔ kibui akpɛ bɔlɔɔ, bɔlɔ xɔnɔ yula tutu esi kɔ alɛ, onupɛ batɔnɔ bɔlɔ ɛkpã niedeɛ, bɔkpɛ kemi nɛ kɛlɛishu, 13onupɛ banɔ aɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ ɔlɔ shuɔ, bubù ebui mɛ kɔ alɛ nɛ̀ eyamɛ gbangbã. Boyinɔ oboɔ, budzì kɛtɔ abha ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ kanɔ mɛ tɛwɔnɔ̃.
14Ɛtɛɛ́ fɔnɔ ebuiɛ alɛ kɔ ɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ kpɛ wɔnɔ awuĩ nɔ, pɔ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ kpalà wɔnɔ, ɔmɔ asɛ mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ ana. 15Gɛ banɔ asɛ ihotu lɔfɔ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ tsyɛ elo, wɔnɔ akaa alɛ egikpè, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ Yesu Kristoɔ mɛ, ɛbadzì akaa ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔgana kibui gbangbã mɛ. 16Kliso ɛkpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkpasɛ mɛ. 17Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ ɛsɛsɛ Timoteo nɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, mɛ eyianyɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, anɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. Yɛaba abaka wɔnɔ nɛ kɛzã gɛ ɛzã nɛkpã nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ, gɛ kɛshɔnɔ kɛgɛ ɛkasɛ wɔnɔ nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ nɛ ɔhaa ka nyia ka mɛ.
18Wɔnɔ mɛ beteli ezefeke balɛishu, asɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛka bà wɔnɔ ɔbha oɖi ana. 19Ɛbaba wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ kibè gulũi mɛ gɛ onupɛ Apaleteɛ adɛmɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbatì kaɖɔ nɔnɔ ɛdi gɛ banɔ alɛ gɛ befeke balɛishuɔ aɖɔ, nɛ̀ ohumi nɔnɔ gɛ ɔlɛ balɛ ahɔɛ. 20Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ŋaŋã ma kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛ, pɔ ohumi mɛ bɔlɛ. 21Kiɖuwoe nɔpɛ ɔdɛ? Ɛba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ kishìi, tɛ ɛba ehuisi wɔnɔ, pɛnɔsɛ ɛba nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa gɛ ɔlɛ ishumɛ yɔɔ dza?

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 5
Content:
Nɔobú Adzya Gɛaŋã Kɛgɔlɔ Oyinɔ Nɛ Wɔnɔɛshi
1Bakɔ bɔlɔ tititì nɛ wɔnɔ shu sɛ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui akpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, kibui gɛ ibudi elete tsyɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ. Anyɛ teli ayɛkɛ yɛakaa edzini. 2Kɛlɛ nofeke wɔnɔ ishu! Gɛnɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ boŋ ɔlɔtɔzã wɔnɔ mɛ pɛ notobu anyɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ oyinɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ dza? 3Gɛ ɛma wɔnɔ ɛshi nɛ ishudzya mɛ tsyɛ elo, ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ. Kɛlɛ itiputɔ kulu kebhu nɛ̀ anunɔ gɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ, asɛ gɛ ɛbabhɛtɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛlɛ ɛkɛlɛ ana. 4Onupɛ noshogò nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu kinyeɛ mɛ, pɛ ɛkpasɛ wɔnɔɛ ishi nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛɛ, pɛ bɔlɔ apalete Yesu ohumi nɔ tsyɛ ɔlɛ wɔnɔɛ shiɛ, 5nɔlɔkɔ anyɛ alɛ ɔkpɛ ahɔɛ ɔkɔ Satana, sɛ tɛ̀ ezĩ yɛ ushudzya tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ olu nɛkpã nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu kiwui nabha.
6Wɔnɔ ishuɔ gɛ nofekeɛ gɛ pɛ. Nɔoti nyi ɔsɛ amɔwɔ tsɔtsɔ̃mɔ bhlui teli yɛakɔ avɔvɔ gɛ ekpéɛ tsyɛ atsɔmɔ̃ɔ dza? 7Nɔlɔkɔ amawɔ kuku tsɔtsɔ̃mɔ ɔtɛɛ sɛ tɛ nɔodzi amɔwɔ vɔvɔ gɛ kɛdɔ̃ tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ ma yɛmɛ, asɛ kidziɛ gɛ nodziɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ balɔkɔ Kristoɔ gɛenu Tɛdɔdɔ fala obhoshi eyiɛ abhɛtɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ nɔ. 8Klisoɔ nɔkɔ bɔbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ kiwui ŋaŋã nabha, gɛnɛ kɛdɔ̃ tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ kiyi kukuɔ, kiyiɛ gɛ manà ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ bhɛbhɛtɛ ebui, pɔ nɔzã asɛ kifufulũ gɛ bagɛ kpɛ kɛdɔ̃ tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ kiyi nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ, kifufulũ gɛ bagɛ kpɛ kɛdɔ̃ tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ nɛ yɛ mɛ pɛ kinu kibui gɛ kɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ.
9Ɛfɔnɔ ɔsɛsɛ wɔnɔ nɛ mieplukpa mɛ ɔsɛ, nɔtɛ kpɛ ɔha nɛ banɔ nɔ̀ gɛ baŋã agɔlɔ, 10gɛnɛ asɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ anunɔ gɛ balɔkɔ ishu akɔ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã, mɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ elete, bagɛ edzyinì banɔ akpɛ alo ibudi elete ana. Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ nɛidi shuɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ shu. 11Pɔ, otsiɛnɔ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ wɔnɔ sɛ, kɛma sɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ anunɔ gɛ ekulu yɛishu sɛ adzya yɛenu flogo pɛ aka aŋã kɛgɔlɔ apɛ yɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ, anɔ gɛ eshu ibudi ɔkɔ̀ alo anɔ gɛ ezĩ banɔ shu, enuwɔ̃ɛ alo anɔ gɛ edzyinì banɔ akpɛ. Nɔtɛŋã bɔdɔ̃ ete tsyɛ nɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidi.
12Kitinu mɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ikulu kebhu nɛ bagɛ bama ɔha mɛɛ. Gɛnɛ bagɛ alɛ ɔhaa mɛɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ikulu kebhuɔ nɔ dza? 13Owusoso Akaa yɛebe kulu kebhu nɛ bagɛ ama ɔha mɛ. “Nɔkakà atakpu mɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ nɔ wɔnɔ ɛshi.”

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 6
Content:
Bayɛyɛkɛŋã Kebhu Okulukɔ Dɛdɛ
1Onupɛ kibui ku wɔnɔ mɛ banɔ teli ishiɛ, atɛ lɔkɔ yɛavɛnɔ bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa balɛ kebhu okulukɔ, pɔ alɔkɔ yɛavɛnɔ bayɛyɛkɛŋã ɔkɔ. 2Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ bagɛ enu bayɛyɛkɛŋã balɛ ebekulu kebhu nɛ kanɔ mɛ banɔ nɔɔ dza? Kɛlɛ onupɛ wɔnɔ obokulu kebhu nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, nɔgɛ ná sɛ tɛ nokulu bubhu bhlui bhlui lɛ nɛidiɛ dza? 3Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ bɔlɔ ba kulu kebhu nɛ̀ Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ dza? Kɛlɛ so pɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui alɛ bɔtalà okulu kebhu nɔ dza? 4Klisoɔ, onupɛ ebela aba nɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi shuɔ, nɔlɔkɔ banɔ gɛ ɔzãkɔ ma balɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ asɛ bebhukulu ana! 5Ɛɖɔ ebui alɛ sɛ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ kpɛ wɔnɔ awuĩ nɔ. Kɛpɛ otsiɛ sɛ ebutinɛ nanà atɛzã wɔnɔ ɛshi gɛ abalà kebhu ekulu nɛ bayɛyɛkɛŋã nɛishi dza? 6Pɔ, nɔlɔkɔ bagɔlɔ ɔvɛnɔ kebhu mɛ, kɛlɛ nɔbhɛtɛ alɛ nɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã amɛ!
7Gɛ kɛgbã sɛ̀ nɔlɔkɔ bagɔlɔ ɔvɛnɔ kebhu soɔ, kɛtɛ kasɛ ɔsɛ baŋã wɔnɔ abha xɔɔ. Kiɖe so pɛ nɔtɔkɔ yɛabhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ wɔnɔ boŋ shu? Kiɖe so pɛ nɔtɔkɔ balɛ boŋ ete dzyini wɔnɔ akpɛɛ dza? 8Nɛ kɛlɛ inye mɛɛ, wɔnɔ boŋ wono dzyini bagɔlɔ ɔkpɛ pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ebui kpa, nɛ wɔnɔ adzya alɛ shu.
9Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ atakpu mɛ gagalĩ eleteɛ atɛba vɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ɔŋãkɔɔ dza? Nɔtɛkɔ bawɔɛ wɔnɔ, bagɛ baŋã kɛgɔlɔ tsyɛ, ibudi eleteɛ, bagɛ badɛ ɔmamɛ, banyɛ gɛ bawɔsɔ̃ nɛ̀ balɛ banyɛ ɔhagbo alɛ, 10nɛ bezĩɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ basɛ balɛ ete ko abaŋã nɛ beenuwɔɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ aɖɔ banɔ ishu tibuiɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ edzyinì banɔ akpɛɛ batɛ bavɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ɔŋãkɔ. 11Ebui alɛ wɔnɔ mɛ banɔ teli aza abhɛtɛ. Pɔ beplu wɔnɔ ishu, badalɛ wɔnɔ shu, kɛlɛ bebhui bɔtyɔa akɔ wɔnɔ nɛ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɛinyeɛ mɛ.
Kɛgɔlɔ Tɛŋaŋã
12“Bakɔ mɛ kidzo sɛ tɛ̀ ɛbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka,” pɔ gɛnɛ kɛka nyia ka kɛlɛ pɛ ɔkɔ anɔ. Bakɔ mɛ kidzo sɛ tɛ̀ ɛbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka,” pɔ ɛtɛbakɔ sɛ tɛ kɛka nyia ka dzi apalete nɛ mɛabha. 13“Bɔŋaŋã lɛ kɔ kevũɔ, kɛlɛ kevũɔ tsyɛ alɛ kɔ́ bɔŋaŋã,” pɔ Owusoso Akaa ebezĩ balɛ taabha. Bagɛ bhɛtɛ ishudzyaa kɔ́ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui, pɔ Apaleteɛ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ akɔ, kɛlɛ babhɛtɛ Apaleteɛ tsyɛ akɔ ishudzya. 14Nɛ yɛ Ohumi nɔ mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa efeke Apaleteɛ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, kana yɛebe feke bɔlɔ tsyɛ. 15Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ shudzyaa nu Kristoɔ ɔyɛ dza? Pɔ kɛpɛ̃ sɛ ɛlɔkɔ mɛ ishudzyaa gɛinu Kristoɔ ɔyɛ bhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ kedulũ azazã eleteɛ dza? Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana! 16Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ anyɛ nɔnɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ adzɛ gɛ azã kedulũɔ, abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ yɛ nɛ ishudzyaa mɛɛ dza? Ɔmɔsɛ baɖɔ ɛlɛ lú asɛ, “Balɛ taabha ebedzi ishudzya tenikpo.” 17Pɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ Apaleteɛ, alɛ tenikpo nɛ yɛ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ.
18Nɔobu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ɔshɛ nɛ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui shu. Ebui kpa ka nyia ka gɛ anɔ abhɛtɛ, abhɛtɛ alɛ nɛ ishupi niede, pɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa odenɔ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã mɛɛ xɔnɔɔ, abhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ yɛahɔɛ ishudzya shu. 19Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ ishupiɛ nu Owusoso Akaavũɔ ɔkɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã, gɛ lɔkpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, anunɔ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔɔ dza? Nɔma ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu, 20budzi bedzi wɔnɔ nɛ kedzi tieli. Klisoɔ, nɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛ kititi nɛ wɔnɔ ishupiɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 7
Content:
Adzɛ Gbagbãna Shu Bɔdɔ̃kakasɛ
1Otsiɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ shu nɔfɔ̃nɔ bɔdɔ̃ɔ, apɛ akɔ anyɛ sɛ tɛ̀ atɛ gbana adzɛ. 2Pɔ gɛ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebuiɛ bekpe soɔ, adzɛ azã anyɛ ka nyia ka ahɔɛ, kɛlɛ anyɛ tsyɛ azã adzɛ ka nyia ka ahɔɛ. 3Adzɛ enyineɛ abhɛtɛ tɛgbagbana ɛbuiɛ ɔkɔ yɛedziniɛ, adzɛ tsyɛ abhɛtɛ ana akɔ yɛ enyineɛ. 4Adzɛ yɛishupiɛ tinu yɛ tenikpo ɔyɛ, pɔ bɔlɛ ɔkɔ yɛenyineɛ tsyɛ. Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, adzɛ enyineɛ ishupiɛ tinu yɛ tenikpo ɔyɛ, pɔ bɔlɛ ɔkɔ yɛedziniɛ tsyɛ. 5Nɔtɛ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu kanà bagɔlɔ, ɔdɛ sɛ nɔ tɔɖɔ kɛlɛ elú ana ɔkɔ kibè tili, sɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔshu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu. Kɛlɛ nɔ bhɛtɛ tenikpo sɛ tɛ Satana atɛ ba efeke wɔnɔ eɖi sɛ gɛ nɔtɛɔ là wɔnɔ shu abha ŋã so. 6Ɛɖɔ ebui alɛ sɛ tɛ ɛkɔ wɔnɔ kidzo nɛ alɛ shu, gɛnɛ ɔsha mɛ ɛkpɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ. 7Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ tsyɛ alo anyɛ ka nyia ka atazã asɛ mɛ ana. Pɔ anyɛ ka nyia ka nɛ kɛgɛ bakɔ yɛ edenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, anɔ alɛ bakɔ yɛ kɛdɔ̃ ɛlɛ, abhlatɔ tsyɛ bakɔ yɛ kɛlɛ.
8Otsiɛ nɔ itseɖe bagbalugba nɛ̀ bavɛvɛ edziniɛ asɛ, kɛpɛ kɔ alɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bazã nɛ̀ kɛgbà, asɛ mɛ ana. 9Pɔ onupɛ batɛ balà balɛ ishu abhaa aŋãa, kɛlɛ sɛ bazana anyɛ, ɔmɔsɛ apɛ̃ asɛ tɛ̀ ɔzanà anyɛ ɔdɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ wɔshumɛ zɛlɔ nɛ anyɛ shu.
10Nɛ bagɛ agbana adzɛ shuɔ mɛ ɛkɔ ɔsha lɛ asɛ, (gɛnɛ mɛkpɛ ɔshaa, pɔ Apaleteɛ) Adzɛ agɛ mɔ kidzo sɛ tɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛenyine shù. 11Pɔ onupɛ abhɛtɛ ana, azã nɛ̀ kɛgbà alo tɛ etsodzi abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ yɛenyineɛ. Anyɛ tsyɛ atɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛedzini shù.
12Wɔnɔ bagɔgɔ mɛitseɖe kibui ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, (kɛlɛ xɔnɔ mɛɖɔ ɛlɛ, gɛnɛ Apaleteɛ) Onupɛ ɔhamɛ anɔ teli agbana adzɛ gɛetinu anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ adɛmɛ sɛ abazã nɛ yɛɛ, atɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu. 13Kɛlɛ onupɛ adzɛ edzini anyɛ gɛetinu anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ adɛmɛ asɛ abazã nɛ yɛ, atɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛishu. 14Ɔmɔsɛ yɛenyineɛ gɛ agɛ ayɛkɛ ŋãa, atɛmɔ ishu dadalɛ ɔgana yɛedzinì nabha, kana adzɛ tsyɛ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ ŋã atɛmɔ ishu dadalɛ ɔgana yɛenyineɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã nabha. Onu gɛnɛ ana wɔnɔ eyi alɛ shu tɛba dalɛ, pɔ asɛ gɛ kɛlɛ ana, balɛ shu dalɛ.
15Pɔ onupɛ anunɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã pɛ asɛ ashɛɛ, nɔkɔ yɛagavɛ. Ɔsha gɛ nyã anyɛ nɛ adzɛ nɔnɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã nɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi mɛ, Owusoso Akaa ekulu lɔ́ sɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛishu yɔyɔ mɛ. 16Anyɛ edzini, otinyi, ɔsɛ wɔ ɔbɔlà obu wɔenyineɛ dza? Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha wɔ adzɛ enyine tsyɛ otinyi ɔsɛ ɔbɔlà yɛkɛ woedziniɛ elu nɛ ɛkpãa dza?
17Kɛkpasɛ kɛlɛ mɛ pɔ, anɔ ka nyia ka anyana ɔzãkɔ gɛ Apaleteɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa ekulu yɛakɔ evunɔ. Ɔsha lɛ nabha mɛidzu ɔhaa petee tɔɖɔ. 18Bebhui kɛhɔ̃a ɔkɔ anyɛ teli flogo pɛ bekulú yɛ dza? Eti dzí anɔ gɛ begi bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ. Anyɛ teli alɛ gɛ begi bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ yɛ flogo pɛ etsyina dza? Beteke bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔɛ. 19Kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui tinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà, kɛhɔ̃a gɛ begi bhui tsyɛ itinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà. Owusoso Akaa ɔshaa nabha tɛbhɛ bhɛtɛ kɛlɛinu kɛgɛ pɛ ɔdɛ. 20Anɔ ka nyia ka azã kɛzãa gɛ azã flogo pɛ Owusoso Akaa ebekulú yɛ. 21Anɔ dzidzi wɔonu flogo pɛ bekulú wɔ̀ dza? Tɛkɔ kɛkpɛ wɔ buluhũ, onupɛ edzi asɛ ɔbɔlá yɛkɛ wɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazãa, bhɛtɛ ana. 22Ɔmɔsɛ anɔ gɛedzi anɔ dzidzì flogo pɛ Apaleteɛ ebekulú yɛ, enu Apaleteɛ yɛanɔ ishu ahɔɛmɛ azazã, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha anunɔ gɛ azã yɛishu ahɔɛmɛ flogo pɛ bekulu yɛ, edzì Kristo yɛanɔ dzidzi. 23Bedzi wɔnɔ nɛ̀ kedzì tieli, nɔoti tsyina odzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ banɔdzyrame. 24Mɛ adzya alɛ, anɔka nyia ka, gɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛɛ, azã kɛgɛ kɛlɛ mɛ Owusoso Aka ekulu yɛakpɛ.
25Otsiɛ nɛ bubiteɛ gɛ betinyi anyɛ shuɔ, ɛgɛ yɛkɛ ɔsha nanà odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ, pɔ ikulu kebhu asɛ anɔ gɛ denɔ Apaleteɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi mɛɛ bayɛkɛ yɛabha aŋã. 26Nɛ otsiɛ bɔtɔ lɛ shu soɔ, kɛba pɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ sɛ nɔzã asɛ gɛ nɔ ɔlɛ ana. 27Ɔgbana adzɛ dza? Nɔtɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. Odzi nɛ kɛgbàa dza? Tɛ pɛɛ adzɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɔgbanà. 28Pɔ edzi asɛ onupɛ ɔtɛ gbana adzɛɛ, ɔgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa, kɛlɛ onupɛ kebiteɛ gɛ etinyi anyɛ pɛ azana anyɛɛ, agɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa. Pɔ ba agɛ bagbana bagɔlɔ babamɔ bɔtɔ nɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛtɛpɛɛ sɛ ebui alɛ aba wɔnɔ abha.
29Mɛ adzyaa alɛ, kɛgɛ mɛɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, kibeɛ dzi gulũi. Denɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ, bagɛ bagbana adzɛ bazã asɛ gɛ adzɛ ama balɛ ahɔɛ ana, 30bagɛ ebieyio, asɛ betie bi, bagɛ amɔ sameɛ, asɛ batiamɔ same, bagɛ edzi kɛdɔ̃ tiliɛ, asɛ kitinu balɛ kɛdɔ̃ babalɛ́, 31bagɛ balawɔa kanɔ alɛ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ shu axɔ̃ɛ, asɛ gɛ onupɛ butinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà akɔ alɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ asɛ gɛ kalɛ otsiɛ nɔ ulũ fala.
32Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ adɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ kɛka nyia ka shu. Anyɛ nɔnɔ gɛ agɛ gbana adzɛɛ alɔkɔ̀ tili nɛ Apaleteɛ ebui mɛ, nɛ kɛdɛmɛ gɛ abadɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ. 33Pɔ anyɛ gɛ agbana adzɛ xɔnɔ yɛebui tɔtɔɖɔ bazã kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ebuiɛ shu, nɛ kana gɛ ebekù yɛedzini awɔ̃ 34kɛgɛ kɔ yɛamɔ sameɛ bagã ɔtɔ. Kebite nɔnɔ gɛ aka zana anyɛ, alɔkɔ tili nɛ Apaleteɛ ebui mɛ, Yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ yɛishu ashɔ akpɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ nɛ ishupi nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ. Pɔ anyɛedzini xɔnɔ yɛebuitɔtɔɖɔ bazã kanɔ alɛ mɛ ebuiɛ shu-kana gɛ ebekù yɛinyine awɔ. 35Ɛɖɔ ebui alɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ̃, anɛ sɛ tɛ̀ itsodzi wɔnɔ, pɔ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ kidzo gbangbãa gɛ kɛgɛ gã ɔtɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ zazã shu.
36Onupɛ abhɛtɛ anyɛ teli ɔsɛ atɛ alà agã nɛ kebiteɛ gɛ akpɛ bulũwɔa akɔ asɛ tɛ̀ agbanà shuɔ, pɛ adzɛ agɔ pɔ eekpè atɔɖɔ gɛ apɛasɛ tɛ agbanà adzɛɛ, abhɛtɛ asɛ kana gɛ apɛ nɔ. Agɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpá. Bagbana bagɔlɔ. 37Pɔ anyɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ebui alɛ abha nɛ yɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, pɛ gɛnɛ ananà yɛatɔɖɔ kɛlɛ akɔɛ sɛ abhɛtɛ pɔ nɛ yɛahɔɛ tɛpɛpɛ̃ ulũɔ, pɛ abhɛtɛ yɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ sɛ atɛ agbana kebite alɛ, anyɛ alɛ tsyɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛ kɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. 38Klisoɔ, anunɔ gɛ yɛagbana kebiteɛ abhɛtɛ piapii, pɔ anunɔ gɛ agɛ gbana kebiteɛ abhɛtɛ kɛgɛ pɛ̃ ɔdɛ.
39Ɔsha ɔnyã adzɛ nɛ yɛenyine shu nɛ kibeɛ gɛ anyɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã. Pɔ onupɛ yɛenyine etsiɛ xɔnɔ, ɔsha ɔkɔ kidzo sɛ tɛ̀ azãna anyɛ nɔnɔ gɛ yɛibui zã yɛuliɛ, pɔ kɛlɛ sɛ anyɛ azã Apaleteɛ mɛ. 40Nɛ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ ulũɔ, same ebekù yɛ ɔdɛ gɛ onupɛ awɔ kɛgba, kɛlɛ ɛmɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ otsiɖi mɛ tsyɛ abha.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 8
Content:
Bɔdɔ̃ Kakasɛ Nɛ Bɔŋaŋã Gɛ Batɔkɔ Akɔ Ibudi Shu
1Otsiɛ nɛ bɔŋaŋãa gɛ batɔ akɔ ibudiɛ shuɔ, bunyi ɔsɛ kɛlɛ tititì mɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ petee. Bubutì kɔ befeke ishu, pɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ xɔnɔ bhɔ banɔ ewunɔ kabha. 2Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ yɛ asɛ enyi kibui tiliɛ, eketì kɛlɛ asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ etiɛ. 3Pɔ Owusoso Akaa enyi anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛ.
4Kliso nɛ bɔŋaŋã gɛ batɔ akɔ ibudi shuɔ, bunyi ɔsɛ obudì otinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa nanà abha ma ɔdɛ tenikpo alɛ ete. 5Onupɛ edzì asɛ-baaka teli alɛ gɛ bekulu balɛ nɛ kititiɛ alo nɛ kesiakpa nabha (asɛ gɛ kɛkpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ sɛ “baaka” nɛ̀ “baapalete” kpekpè teli alɛ ana), 6pɔ nɛ bɔlɔkɔ xɔnɔ, Owusoso Akaa tenikpo yɛalɛ, Akaa, gɛ denɔ yɛabha kɛka nyia ka de koeyì, pɛ yɛ bɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpã ɔkɔɔ, pɛ kana Apalete tenikpo tsyɛ yɛalɛ gɛenu Yesu Kristo, gɛ gana yɛabha kɛka nyia ka de koeyì pɛ ganà yɛabha bɔlɛ nɛ ɛkpã.
7Pɔ gɛnɛ aka nyia aka yɛenyi kibui ɛlɛ ana. Banɔ teli gɛ ibudi ebui akakpasɛ balɛ mɛ, gɛ onupɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ lɛ nɛidi gɛ batɔ akɔ obudiɛ, pɔ gɛ ebuiɛ gɛ akpasɛ balɛ etúɔ mɛ ebotso soɔ, bakpɛ bɔŋaŋãa nɔtsɔ̃. 8Pɔ bɔŋaŋã tɛ gbana bɔlɔ mana Owusoso Akaa bha, bɔgɛ ŋã bɔdɔ̃ɔ, kigizĩ kɛnana nɛ bɔlɔ shu, kana onupɛ bɔŋã tsyɛɛ, bɔgɛ pɛ dɛ ananà.
9Nɔoɖi piapii, sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã gɛ nɔmɔɔ tidzì kɛdɔ̃ kpakpatà ɔkɔ bagɛ bakakpɛ iguɔ. 10Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ anɔ teli gɛ akakpɛ igu nɛ yɛitúɔ mɛ abamɔ wɔanɔ gɛ bubuti lɛ wɔahɔɛ pɛ ɔŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ibudi bɔkã mɛɛ, kɛtɛ bakɔ sɛ yɛ tsyɛ avɛ adɛ ŋã bɔdɔ̃ lɛ gɛ batɔ akɔ ibudi nɛ ishu fefekeɛ mɛɛ dza? 11Klisoɔ ozĩ adzya alɛ gɛ ebotsoɔ yɛkpã nɛ̀ wɔbutiɛ, gɛ yɛtakpu sopɛ Kristoɔ ebetsíɛ. 12Onupɛ ɔbhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ wɔadzya alɛ shu nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, pɛ ɔkpɛ kɛpɔ nɛ balɛ kitúɔ gɛ kibotsoɔ shuɔ, ɔbhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ Kristo shu. 13Klisoɔ, onupɛ kɛgɛ ɛŋãa kɔ sɛ tɛ̀ mɛadzya ezhi eku kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, ɛzakatã kɛdzya ɖi, sɛ tɛ̀ ɛtɛ bakɔ yɛadɔ oboe.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 9
Content:
Banɔkpɛkpɛ Ohumi Nɛ̀ Axɔ̃ɛdɛdɛ
1Itinu anɔ gɛ alɛ mɛishu ahɔɛ mɛɛ dza? Itinu anɔkpɛkpɛ dza? Ɛgɛ mɔ Yesu gɛenu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ tsyɛ dza? Gɛnɛ wɔnɔ onu kɛdɔ̃ gidekoeyì nɛ mɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔàwɔa nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ dza? 2Onupɛ gɛnɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ mɛinu ɔkɔ babhlatɔ ete tsyɛɛ, inu anɔkpɛkpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ! Ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ onu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ balɔkɔ adã nɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gidzì nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ nulũ.
3Bulũbubuɔ gɛ lɛ mɛahɔɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ azã kesi nɛ kebhu mɛ nimɛ nɛ alɛ. 4Bɔgɛ mɔ kidzo sɛ tɛ̀ bɔŋã bɔdɔ̃ alo tɛ bɔwɔɛ bɔdɔ̃ dza? 5Bɔgɛ mɔɛdzo sɛ tɛ̀ bɔgbanà bɔlɔ edzini nɔnɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã ovunɔ ɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔ asɛ kana gɛ banɔkpɛkpɛ gɔgɔɔ nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ yɛadza alɛ nɛ Kefa abhɛtɛɛ ɛlɛ dza? 6Pɛnɔsɛ mɛ nɛ Barnaba ete kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ tɛ̀ bɔpɛ kɛŋaŋã ɔkɔ ishuɔ dza?
7Keyuadɛ ɖuwoelu gɛ awɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ pɛ azabuia kɛbhɛ akɔ ishu dza? Afana gɛ adɛ wain bɔyɛ pɛ atɛ aŋã yɛ eyuyuɔ dza? Afana gɛ elú ibhoshì pɛ atɛ awɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ kɛmɔlĩɛ dza? 8Ɛɖɔ ebui alɛ ete nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛɔdɔ mɔmɔ ulũ dza? Gɛnɛ alɛ nɛidi ɔshaa tsyɛ ɖɔ dza? 9Bafɔnɔ ɛlɛ elú nɛ Mose ɔshaa mɛ, “Tɛnyã olugbũ ɔkɔ nɛntsyɔɛ enyè nɔnɔ gɛ ehuisi amɔ.” Nɛntsyɔɛ nyè bui kɛlɛ dzã kiwuhũ ɔdɛ Owusoso Akaa? 10Kibui gbã bɔlɔ yɛaɖɔ ebui alɛ etseɖe? Kibui gbã, bɔlɔ bafɔnɔ ebui alɛ elú akɔ, ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ayadɛ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛetù amɔ ebetu amɔ́ɔ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ babhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ aka nyia aka amɔ ɔŋãkɔ nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. 11Onupɛ bɔɖa ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ eyí kpɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ, gɛpɛ falanɔ kifu gɛ onupɛ bɔmɔ bɔdɔ̃ denɔ wɔnɔkɔ dza? 12Onupɛ bɔkɔ banɔ bhlatɔ amɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ kidzo ɛlɛ nɛidi denɔ wɔnɔkɔ, kɛlɛ pɛ bɔtaamɔ kɛlɛ dɛ ana dza?
Pɔ bɔgɛ gã kidzo ɛlɛ nɛidi abha. Nɛ kɛlɛ shuɔ, bɔyɛkɛ kɛka nyia ka ɔkɔ ishu sɛ tɛ̀ kidzo tɛdã ɔkɔ Kristo yɛibui gbangbã. 13Nɔotinyi ɔsɛ bagɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ mɛ bamɔ bɔŋaŋã edenɔ ɛkɛlɛ dza, kɛlɛ osubha gɛ ɔlɛ abha banɔ nɔ apɔɛ bɔdɔ̃, gɛnɛ ɛkɛlɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ edenɔɔ dza? 14Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, Apaleteɛ akɔ alɛ ɔsha sɛ bagɛ baɖɔ kibui gbangbã bamɔ balɛ ɔŋãkɔ odenɔ kibui gbangbã mɛ.
15Pɔ mɛxɔnɔ gɛ wɔa ohumi ɔlɛ nanà shu kɛxɔ̃ɛ. Kɛlɛ ɛtɛ fɔnɔ kibui lɛ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbhɛtɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi ɔkɔ mɛ. Kɛbapɛ ɔkɔ mɛ sɛ tɛ̀ mɛitsí ɔdɛ sɛ tɛ anɔ teli ayɛkɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ kɛlɛishu mɛifeke ishuɔ nɛ̀ mɛahɔɛ. 16Pɔ onupɛ ɛɖɔ kibui gbangbã, ɛtɛ balà feke mɛishu, ɔmɔsɛ batɔɖɔ ɛlɛ akɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ. Abagagalĩ akɔ mɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛgɛ ɖɔ kibui gbangbã. 17Onupɛ ɛlɛkɔ mɛishu kɔ kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ, kɛbhɛ babuia bazã kɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ mɛ, onupɛ gɛnɛ mɛishu mɛlɔkɔ ɔkɔ kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ, kibuiɛ gɛ bakpɛ mɛ ahɔɛ sɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ete mɛbhɛtɛ. 18Kiɖuwoe gɛinu mɛ kɛbhɛ babuia nɔɔ dza? Kɛlɛ̀ ete ɔsɛ, tɛ̀ onupɛ ɛɖɔ kibui gbangbã, ɛtɛ bayɛkɛ kɛbhɛ babuia nanà, kɛlɛ ɛtɛba yɛkɛ kɛnanà nɛ kɛlɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛ, kliso ɛgɛ lɔkɔ mɛ ohumi nɔ gɛɔlɛ mɛahɔɛ kpɛ kibuiɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛ.
19Ɛlɛ mɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ ɛma ananà esi tsyɛ elo, ɛlɔkɔ mɛishu asɛ anɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ aka nyia aka, sɛ tɛ̀ ɛkɔ banɔ kpekpèɛ amɔ ɛkpã. 20Onupɛ ɛlɛ Yudanɛ nɛishiɛ, ɛbhɛtɛ mɛishu asɛ Yudaeyi sɛ tɛ̀ ibu alɛ. Nɛ bagɛ akpasɛ Mose ɔsha niesi soɔ, ɛbhɛtɛ mɛishu asɛ anɔ gɛ akpasɛ ɔsha niesi, (pɔ mɛxɔnɔ ma ɔsha niesi flogo) sɛ tɛ̀ ibu bagɛ akpasɛ ɔsha niesi so. 21Nɛ bagɛ ama ɔsha niesi nɛishiɛ, ɛbhɛtɛ ishu asɛ balɛ mɛ anɔ teli, (ɛma Mose ɔsha gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ɔsha niesi tyɛ elo, ɛkpasɛ Kristo ɔsha niesi), sɛ tɛ mɛibu bagɛ akpasɛ ɔsha niesi. 22Onupɛ ɛkpasɛ bagɛ ebotso nishiɛ, ɛzã asɛ balɛ sɛ tɛ ibu alɛ. Idzi kɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka ɛdi kɔ anɔ ka nyia ka sɛ tɛ gana kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ mɛibu balɛ banɔ teli. 23Nɛ kibui gbangbã nɛtakpu so ɛbhɛtɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ mɛtsyɛ ɛmɔ tiyuyula nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ.
24Nɔ otinyi ɔsɛ nɛ tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ tibubu mɛɛ, banɔ nɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ebu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ, pɔ anɔ tenikpo ko yɛaŋã kabha dza? Nɔobu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛ kɛlɛ abha nɔbɔmɔ kabha ŋaŋã.
