25Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ awlɔ̃akɛ nɛ bɔwufu lɛ nɛidi mɛɛ, akpasɛ bɔlɛ piapii. Babhɛtɛ alɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ kikutuɔ gɛtɛ bazã tihɔɔ nɔ, pɔ bɔbhɛtɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ sɛ tɛ̀ bɔyɛkɛ kikutuɔ gɛ bazã tihɔɔ nɔ. 26Klisoɔ, itibu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nanà ma yɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ ɛtɛta ekpili tsyɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ ehuisi kɛlɛɛ nɔ ana. 27Kɛmaɛlɛ mɛ ana, ɛkpɛ mɛ ishupiɛ bɔtɔ pɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ishu asɛ anɔ dzidzì ana, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ ɛɖɔ kibui gbangbã ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ̀ bekeɛ, betibè bumɛ eyinɔ ɔsɛ ɛgɛ na ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɛyɛkɛ kikutuɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 10
Content:
Betseɖe Nɛ̀ Anɔ Nɛ Ibudi Ɔkɔ Dɛdɛ Shu
1Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, pɔ ɛgɛpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ kɛzã tikpukpũ mɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ sɛ, bɔlɔ ashuĩ alɛ petee azã ɔmɔlɔ niesi, kɛlɛ balɛ petee agã aƒuɔ mɛ ekoeyì. 2Bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ alɛ asɛ Mose ede azazã ana nɛ ɔmɔlɔ̃ nɔ nɛ̀ aƒuɔ mɛ. 3Balɛ petee aŋã ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɔŋaŋã lɛ tunikpo 4kɛlɛ bawɔɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɔdɔ̃ tunikpo ɔlɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bawɔɛ bɔlɛ edenɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛklagbuɔ gɛgbanà alɛ vunɔɔ mɛ, kɛklagbu ɛlɛ kɛlɛinu Kristoɔ. 5Kɛkpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ana pɔ, Owusoso Akaa agɛmɔ samɛ nɛ balɛ mɛ anɔ kpekpèɛ teli shu, balɛ ishudzya petee pɔɛ kanà nɛ oxuiɛ mɛ.
6Ebui alɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ ana ɔsɛ tɛ̀ kidzì kibui mɔmɔlu, tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔtakà lɔkɔ bɔlɔ etúɔ tɔɖɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha asɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ ana. 7Nɔotidzì ibudielete, asɛ gɛ balɛ mɛ banɔ teli dzi ana, asɛ kana gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Banunɔ azã kesi sɛ tɛ̀ baŋã tɛ̀ bawɔɛ kɛlɛ babhɛtɛ ibudielete ebui. 8Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã ebui, asɛ kana gɛ balɛ mɛanɔ teli abhɛtɛɛ ana, pɛ balɛ mɛ anɔ ihotu afɛtaabha nɛ̀ tata etsi nɛ kiwui tinikpo abha. 9Kɛma ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bufeke Apaleteɛ eɖi, asɛ gɛ balɛ mɛ anɔ teli abhɛtɛ pɛ beblidzya atá alɛ betsiɛ. 10Kɛlɛ nɔtɛzɔ kpamɛ ishu, asɛ kana gɛ balɛ mɛanɔ teli abhɛtɛ pɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛezĩ bɔdɔ̃ ebeyi alɛ ana.
11Ebui alɛ aba balɛ abha sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ amɔ elu, kɛlɛ bafɔnɔ alɛ elú sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ etseɖe nɔ nɛ bɔlɔ, bɔlɔ bagɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ aba bɔlɔ abha. 12Klisoɔ, onupɛ abhɛtɛ wɔ asɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã piapii nɔ, ɖi piapii ɔsɛ tɛ ɔtɛdɔ oboe. 13Kibui nanà tifeke wɔɖi ɔdɛ kibui nɔnɔ gɛŋã anɔ ka nyia ka abha. Pɔ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ abhɛtɛ kibui gbã, atɛ bakɔ tifefekeɖi nɔnɔ gɛ kɛbà dɛwɔ ba wɔabha. Pɔ onupɛ befeke wɔ eɖiɛ, abapɛ kidzo nɔnɔ abha gɛ ɔbɔgã pɛ obokoeyì nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ.
Obudi Bɔdɔ̃ Nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ Bɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã
14Klisoɔ mɛɔbhia alɛ, nɔobu tɛtsɛɖɛmɛ nɛ ibudi ebui shu. 15Ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ asɛ bebutinɛ ana, nɔokulu kebhu ɔkɔ ishu nɛ̀ kɛgɛ mɛɖɔɔ. 16Ahɔɛhuhu kayintse nɔ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ huahɔɛ nɔ pɔ, gɛnɛ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ tili nɛ Yesu dzyosu nɔ mɛ soɔ dza? Bɔŋaŋã gɛ bɔya tsyɛ pɔ, butinu tili gɛ bɔlɔkɔ nɛ Kristo ishupiɛ shuɔ so dza? 17Ɔmɔsɛ gɛ bùkpèe, pɛ kifufulũ tenikpo pɔ kɛlɛ lɛɛ, so budzi ishupi tunikpo, pɛ bɔlɔ petee tã kifufulũ tinikpo alɛ.
18Nɔolu awɔɖi Israelanɛ. Gɛnɛ bagɛ bawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃pɔpɔɛ osubha nabha balɛ aŋã bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ nɔ nɛ ɔlɛ abha dza? 19Bɔɖɔ mɛɖɔ sɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bapɔɛ akɔ ibudiɛ nu kɛdɔ̃ tili, pɛnɔsɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili obudiɛ onuɔ dza? 20Gɛnɛ ana, pɔ ibudi eleteɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ nɔ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akɔ, gɛnɛ Owusoso Akaa balɔkɔ ɔlɛ akɔ, kɛlɛ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ nɔ ɔkpɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ ebui mɛ. 21Otibɔ la ɔwɔɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ kayintse nulũ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa zizĩ tsyɛ kayintse nulũ, kana otibɔ là ɔzã Apaleteɛ ɔkpɔlɔ̃ nɔ shu pɛ ɔzɔbɔ zã ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ ɛlɛ ɔkpɔlɔ̃ nɔ tsyɛ ishu. 22Bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ Apaleteɛ alɔkɔ kabhã wawlãkɛ dza? Bɔgagalĩ ɔdɛ yɛ dza?
Bayɛyɛkɛŋã Ishu Ahɔɛmɛ Zazã
23“Bakɔ kibui ka nyia ka shu kidzo,” pɔ gɛnɛ kɛka nyia ka kɛlɛ vɛnɔ anɔ nɛ otugbà. “Bakɔ kibui ka nyia ka shu kidzo-pɔ gɛnɛ kɛka nyia ka kɛlɛ pɛ̃kɔ anɔ. 24Ananà atɛpɛ yɛ tenikpo tɛpɛpɛ̃, pɔ apɛ kɛgbangbã akɔ babhlatɔ tsyɛ.
25Nɔŋã kɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka gɛ baadɛ nɛ kedziɛ mɛ, pɔ nɔtɛ kɔ kɛkpɛ wɔnɔ bulũhũ tɛ nodi bisi kɛliesi olũ, 26Ɔmɔsɛ kesiakpa nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ kpasɛ kalɛ mɛ nu Apaleteɛ ɛyɛ.
27Onupɛ anɔ teli gɛetinu anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã ekulu wɔnɔ sɛ nɔbɔ ŋã bɔdɔ̃ pɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ ɔvɛɛ, nɔŋã kɛka nyia ka gɛ bedzu wɔnɔ otugbà tɛ̀ nɔtɛ kɔ kɛkpɛ wɔnɔ bulũhũ tɛ nodi bisi kɛlɛ esi olũ. 28Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli etseɖe wɔnɔ asɛ, “Balɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ ɛlɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ obudiɛ, kɛlɛ nɔtɛ ŋã, tɛ kɛtɛ bakpɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛetseɖe wɔnɔ kibuiɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ buluhũ, 29tɛ kɛtɛ bakpɛ anɔ bhalà ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ uluhũ gɛnɛ wɔ ɔyɛ. Pɔ kiɖeso pɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ anɔ bhlatɔ alɔkɔ yɛekpeɖekpeɖeɛ ekulu kebhu nɛ̀ mɛishu ahɔɛmɛ zazãa dza? 30Onupɛ ɛŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ ahɔɛhuhuɔ pɔ, kɛlɛ so pɛ bebumɛ kɛpɔ nɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ kɛlɛ takpu mɛihu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɛ kɛlɛ takpuɔ shuɔ dza?
31Klisoɔ, onupɛ nɔŋã bɔdɔ̃ alo bɔwɔɛ alo kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ tɛ̀ bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinyè nɛitití. 32Nɔtɛ kɔ sɛ anɔ nanà akpatà bɔdɔ̃, edzi asɛ Yudanɛ o, Helanɛ, pɛnɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɔhaa 33asɛ gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛiku aka nyia aka awɔ̃ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abhaa. Gɛnɛ mɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ̃ mɛpɛɛ, pɔ banɔ kpekpèɛ tɛpɛpɛ̃, ɔsɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ alɛ elù nɛkpã.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 11
Content:
1Noɖi mɛ ɛkpã tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ ɛlɛ ulũ, asɛ gɛ mɛtsyɛ lɔkɔ Kristo ɛkpã dzinɔ ana.
Bɔdɔ̃ Dadã Nɛ Kɛtakpu Nɛ Kɛtakpu Esi Kpɛkpɛ Mɛ
2Ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kinyè nɛitití nɛ kɛbakà gɛ nɔbaka mɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ nɔnyanã bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ ovunɔ asɛ kɛkasɛ gɛ ɛkasɛ wɔnɔ ana.
3Otsiɛnɔ, ɛpɛ sɛ nɔoti ɔsɛ̀ anɔnyɛ yɛ kɛtakpuɔ kɛlɛinu Kristo, kɛlɛ anɔdzɛ yɛ kɛtakpuɔ kɛlɛinu anɔnyɛ, kɛlɛ Kristoɔ tsyɛ yɛtakpúɔ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa. 4Anyɛ ka nyia ka gɛ adã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛtakpu flogo pɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa alo aɖɔ ebui elúɔ, atɛ yɛ kɛtakpuɔ gɛinu Kristoɔ elu esi. 5Kɛlɛ anɔdzɛ ka nyia ka tsyɛ gɛ agɛnyã yɛtakpúɔ flogo pɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa alo pɛ aɖɔ ebui eluɔ, atɛ yɛenyinè gɛenu yɛtakpúɔ elu esi, gɛ edzi asɛ onupɛ bashɛ yɛtakpúɔ ana. 6Onupɛ anɔdzɛ agɛdã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ yɛtakpúɔ, akɔ batsɛ yɛ kɛtakpu tɛkãa, kɛlɛ onupɛ kinu kiwuĩ ɔkɔ anɔdzɛ sɛ tɛ batsɛ yɛ kɛtakpu tɛkãa, alo tɛ bashɛ kɛlɛ, adã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛlɛ abha. 7Kɛma sɛ tɛ anɔnyɛ xɔnɔ adã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ yɛtakpuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛzazã nɛ̀ yɛishu dadalɛ mɛ, pɔ anɔdzɛ xɔnɔ enu anyɛ yɛishu dadalɛ. 8Ɔmɔsɛ anɔnyɛ egide koeyi nɛ anɔdzɛ mɛ, pɔ anɔdzɛ yɛ edekoeyì nɛ anɔnyɛ mɛ, 9kana bagɛ bhɛtɛ anyɛ tsyɛ akɔ adzɛ, pɔ adzɛ bahɛtɛ akɔ anɔnyɛ. 10Nɛ kibui ɛlɛshu, nɛ̀ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ shu soɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ anɔdzɛ amɔ ohumi nɛ yɛ kɛtakpu tɛkã nabha.
11Nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ tsyɛ, adzɛ ama yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ anyɛ shu, kana anyɛ tsyɛ ama yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ adzɛ shu. 12Ɔmɔsɛ kana gɛ anɔdzɛ edekoeyì nɛ anɔnyɛ mɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha adzɛ tsyɛ yɛamɔ́ anyɛ. Pɔ kɛka nyia ka de Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. 13Nɔobhui kibui mɛ ɔkɔ ishu ɔsɛ, kɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ anɔdzɛ sɛ tɛ̀ eze kulu Owusoso Akaa gɛ agɛdã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛtakpuɔ dza? 14Kanunɔ kesi ɔkpɛkɔ ogitseɖe wɔnɔ sɛ onupɛ anɔnyɛ elú yɛ kɛtakpu tɛkã kisheɛ, kinu kiwuĩ kɔ yɛ, 15kɛlɛ onupɛ anɔdzɛ kɛtakpu tɛkã dzeɛ, kinu ishu dadalɛ kɔ yɛ dza? Ɔmɔsɛ bakɔ yɛ kɛtakpu tɛkã dzlolo sɛ tɛ kɛdã yɛ kɛtakpuɔ. 16Onupɛ anɔ teli apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ awlɔ̃akɛ kibui ɛlɛ, kibui nanà bha má bɔlɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa xɔnɔ ahɔɛ bɔɔ bhɛtɛ̀.
Apaleteɛ Ɔwlago bɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã
17Nɛ ebui gɛ ɛbabà tseɖe wɔnɔ otsiɛ nɔɔ, ɛtɛba kpɛ wɔnɔ kinyè nɛitití, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ tɛtsyɔatsyɔa manà ebui kpa ɔdɛ agbangbã. 18Putɔ nɔɔ, ilũ ɔsɛ onupɛ nɔba oshogò asɛ ɔhaa ana, ɔtɔbubú ɔkpasɛ wɔnɔɛishi, kɛlɛ nɛ ebuiteli shu soɔ, ɛyɛkɛ kɛlɛ abha ŋã. 19Ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɔtɔbubu ɔzã wɔnɔɛishi, tɛ̀ kɛkasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ anunɔ abha gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ. 20Onupɛ nobo shogòɔ, gɛnɛ Apaleteɛ Ɔwlago Bɔdɔ̃ nɔŋã, 21ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ nɔŋãa bɔdɔ̃ɔ, wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka aŋã bɔlɛ eputɔnɔ gɛ etie po ananà. Anɔ teli gɛ bɔbhɛ yiyɛɛ, teli xɔnɔ atɛ wɔɛ ebuku. 22Bapã mã wɔnɔ ahɔɛ gɛ nɔbɔ ŋã pɛ nɔbɔwɔɛ bɔdɔ̃ dza? Alo sɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa olú, tɛ nɔtɛɛ bagɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà má balɛ ahɔɛ olu kesiɛ dza? Kiɖe nɔpɛ ɔsɛ ɛɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ? Nɔsɛ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kinyè nɛitití nɛ alɛ nɛidi shu dza? Kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ ana ɖa!
23Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ mɛ yɛkɛ odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ mɛ ɛtsyɛ lɔkɔ kpɛ ahɔɛ ɛkɔ wɔnɔ. Elishi alɛ, gɛ bakpɛ Apalete Yesu ahɔɛ, alɔkɔ kifufulũ, 24kɛlɛ gɛ ehu ahɔɛ nɛ ɛlɛ ɛtakpuɔ ebekeɛ, ayá kifufulũɔ mɛ kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Mɛishu dzya nɔ ɔlɛ, gɛ ɛlɔkɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, nɔbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔbaka mɛ nɔ.” 25Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha gɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ ebekeɛ, aza alɔkɔ kayintse nɔ, kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Kaiyintse alɛ kɛlɛ enu olugbũ nyanyã vɔvɔ gɛ ɛnyã nɛ wɔnɔ nɛ mɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ, kibe nyia be gɛ nɔwɔɛ nɛ kalɛ ulũɔ, tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔbaka mɛ nɔ.” 26Kibe nyia be gɛ nɔtã kifufulũ alɛ pɛ nɔwɔɛ nɛ kayintse alɛ nulũɔ, nɔ ɔɖɔɛ ɛlɛ ɔkanà nɛ Apaleteɛ yɛutsiɛ shu odiyinɔ sɛ etsyina aba.
27Klisoɔ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ aatã kifufulũ ilɛ, alo pɛ aawɔ̃ɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ kayintse alɛ nulũɔ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛ kɛma ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ abhaa, aatà esi nɛ Apaleteɛ yɛishudzya nɛ̀ dzyosu nɔ shu. 28Kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ avɛ yɛishu mɛ oɖì piapii flogo tɛ atã kifufulũ ilɛ, alo tɛ̀ awɔɛ nɛ kayintse alɛ ulũ. 29Ɔmɔsɛ anɔka nyia ka gɛ aŋã pɛ awɔɛ pɛ atɛ abakà Apaleteɛ yɛishudzya mɛeɖi piapii nɔ, atã kɛlɛ awɔɛ kebhu kukulu elu akɔ yɛishu. 30Kliso so pɛ wɔnɔ mɛ banɔ teli ebotsò pɛ baanyã, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ mɛ banɔ teli tsyɛ etsí. 31Pɔ onupɛ bukulu kebhu nɛishuɔ, beze eke kulu kebhu nɛ bɔlɔ. 32Onupɛ Apaleteɛ ekulu kebhu nɛ bɔlɔ, apɔ́ batɔ̃ akɔ bɔlɔ sɛ tɛ̀ beti bebu bɔlɔ ɛpɔ ɔplɛnɔ kanɔ nɔ̀.
33Mɛ adzya alɛ, kliso, onupɛ nobo oshogò pɛ nɔŋã bɔdɔ̃ɔ, nɔzãopo bagɔlɔ. 34Onupɛ bɔbhɛ yì wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teliɛ, baŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ bɔpã mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ nɔbɔ tsyɔaa, kɛtɛbà tsyina dzì kebhu kukulu.
Kɛlɛ onupɛ ɛzɛ ba wɔnɔ ɔbhaa tsyɛɛ, ɛba tseɖe wɔnɔ kɛgɛ nɔbɔ bhɛtɛɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 12
Content:
Ɔfɔfuĩa Mɛ Kɛdɔkɔkɔ
1Mɛ adzya alɛ, otsiɛ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ shuɔ, ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ̀ kɛzã tikpukpũ mɛ kɔ wɔnɔ. 2Nɔonyi ɔsɛ gɛ nodzì ibudi eleteɛ, bawɔɛ wɔnɔ agbanà avɛnɔ ibudiɛ gɛ lɛtɛ ɖɔ kaɖɔɔ ɔkɔ. 3Klisoɔ, itseɖe wɔnɔ sɛ anɔ nanà gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ atɛ baɖɔ asɛ, “Baɖɔ kibui akpɛ Yesu,” kɛlɛ ananà tsyɛ atɛbàla aɖɔ asɛ, “Yesu yɛenu Apaleteɛ,” ɔdɛ sɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔkpasɛ yɛ mɛ.
4Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ lɛ ediedi, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ xɔnɔ tonikpo lonu. 5Axɔ̃ɛdɛdɛ ediedi alɛ, pɔ Apaleteɛ xɔnɔ tenikpo. 6Axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ediedi tsyɛ alɛ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ tenikpo yɛ awɔa alɛ nɛ banɔ nɔ petee mɛ.
7Otsiɛnɔ anɔka nyia ka bakɔɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɔkɔ kɛgbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. 8Anɔ teli bakɔɛ bubutì kaɖɔɖɔɖɔ ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ, anɔbhlatɔ tsyɛ bakɔɛ kibuititì ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ, 9anɔbhlatɔ tsyɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ mɛ, anɔ teli tsyɛ bɔnyã bubu kɔanɔ nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo ɔlɛ mɛ, 10anɔ teli tsyɛ bakɔɛ ohumi gɛ lɔbhɛtɛ ebui gɛ labhɛtɛ kibì, teli tsyɛ kibui ɖɔɖɔlu, teli tsyɛ tɛ̀ amɔ Ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛinu ɛgbangbã nɛ̀ ɛkpa, teli tsyɛ kaɖɔɖɔɖɔ nɛ beluhũ bhlatɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ teliɛ tsyɛ tɛ ebu beluhũ vɔvɔ huhuɔ niesi. 11Alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ enu Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ tonikpo ɔlɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, kɛlɛ akɔ anɔka nyia ka nɛ kana gɛ apɛ nulũ.
Ishupi Tunikpo, Bɔwɔ̃pɛ Xɔnɔ Kpè
12Ishupiɛ ɛlɛ tinikpo, pɔ babhɛtɛ ɔlɛ akpɛ bɔwɔ̃pɛ ediedi mɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ bɔlɛ bɔwɔ̃pɛ gelee mɛ tsyɛ elo, bunu ishupi tunikpo. Kana kɛlɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ. 13Ɔmɔsɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo balɔkɔ akpɛ bulĩ akɔ bɔlɔ nɔ, edzì asɛ Yudaeyi alo Helaeyi, anɔ dzidzì alo anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, Ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo ɔlɛ bakɔ bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ɔsɛ bɔwɔ̃ɛ.
14Klisoɔ ishupiɛ ma tenikpo, pɔ bɔwɔ̃pɛ gelee balɔkɔ abhɛtɛ ɔlɛ nɔ. 15Onupɛ ɔtsɛɖɛ ɔɖɔ sɛ, “Gɛ itinu ɔhɔɛ soɔ, ɛma ɔkɔ ishupiɛ,” gɛnɛ kibui ɛlɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ shu so pɛ, ɔhɔɛ obobu ɔtɔ nɛ ishupiɛ shu. 16Kɛlɛ onupɛ batɔ̃ aɖɔ asɛ, “Gɛ itinu kiwuhũ soɔ, ɛma ɔkɔ ishupiɛ,” gɛnɛ kibui ɛlɛ tɛɖɔɖɔ shu so pɛ batɔ̃ ebebu ɔtɔ nɛ ishupiɛ shu. 17Onupɛ ishupiɛ petee tsyina dzi asɛ kiwuhũ ana pɔ, fakɔ kɛgɛ kɔ belũ bɔdɔ̃ bazã dza? Kɛlɛ onupɛ ishudzya petee lɛ asɛ batɔ̃ ana pɔ, fakɔ kɛgɛ ɛkɔ belũ bɔdɔ̃ bazã mɔɔ dza? 18Pɔ nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ bɔwɔ̃pɛ ɔwɔ̃pɛ abhɔ ishupiɛ nɔ, bɔlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ, nɛ kana gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bɔzã nulũ. 19Onupɛ bɔlɛ nyɔ̃ɔ nu kawɔ̃pɛ tienikpo nɔ pɔ, fakɔ ishupiɛ bazãa dza? 20Asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ, bɔwɔ̃pɛɛ kpè, pɔ ishupi tunikpo.
21Kiwuhũɔ tɛbalà tseɖe ɔhɔɛ ɔsɛ, “Ɛtɛ pɛɛ wɔ!” Kɛlɛ kɛtakpuɔ tsyɛ tɛbalà tseɖe ɛtsɛɖɛ ɔsɛ, “Ɛtɛ pɛɛ wɔ!” 22Kana nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, batɛ balà shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ishupi bɔwɔ̃pɛ ɛlɛ gɛibotsoɔ shu, 23kɛlɛ sɛ bɔbhɛtɛ bɔwɔ̃pɛ ɛlɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ bɔlɔ asɛ bɔma kɛnanà mɛɛ tɛ bɔlɛ tsyɛ zã piapii. Kɛlɛ tɛ bɔlɔkɔ nɛ tilì mɛ ɔkɔ bɔwɔ̃pɛ ɛlɛ tsyɛ gɛibotsoɔ, 24gɛ bɔgɛ lɔkɔ kabha ɖiɖi idi nanà ɔkɔ ishupiɛ ɛkɔ tili tsyɛ elo, Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ eshogo ishup ɛlɛ gɛibotsoɔ pɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ nɛitití, 25sɛ tɛ̀ ɔtɔbubu ɔtɛbɔzã ishupiɛ mɛ, pɔ sɛ tɛ̀ bɔwɔ̃pɛ petee lɔkɔ tili nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ. 26Onupɛ kawɔ̃pɛ tienikpo tieli amɔ bɔtɔɔ, bɔwɔ̃pɛ petee mɔ bɔtɔ ɔplɛnɔ kalɛ, onupɛ bakpɛ kawɔ̃pɛ tienikpo nɛititíɛ, bɔwɔ̃pɛ petee mɔ samè ɔplɛnɔ kalɛ.
27Otsiɛnɔ wɔnɔ onu Ishupiɛ ɔkɔ Kristoɔ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ petee onu kawɔ̃pɛ tieli ɔkɔ ɛlɛ. 28Kɛlɛ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ tsyɛ, Owusoso Akaa eputɔ ebu banɔkpɛkpɛ, babhalà balɛenu ebuiɖɔluanɔ, batramɛ balɛenu badɔkasɛ, flogo pɛ bagɛ abhɛtɛ̀ ebui gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ ibì, ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ bɔnyã bubu nɛ̀, baagɛ aplɛnɔ banɔ, bagɛ bazã banɔ ulũ nɛ̀ bagɛ behu beluhũ vɔvɔ. 29Pɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ balɛ petee enuɔ dza? Ebuiɖɔluanɔ balɛ petee enuɔ dza? Ebui gɛ labhɛtɛ kibì balɛ petee enuɔ dza? 30Balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ bakɔ bɔnyã tibubu ɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔɔ dza? Balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ ehu beluhũ vɔvɔ dza? Balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ balɛ ebu beluhũ vɔvɔ niesiɛ dza? 31Pɔ nɔpɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gigboglo ɔdɛ.
Kɛlɛ otsiɛnɔ ɛbakasɛ wɔnɔ kidzoɔ gɛ pɛ ɔdɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 13
Content:
Tɛdɛdɛmɛ Nɔ
1Onupɛ ihu beluhũ vɔvɔ petee gɛ banɔdzyrameɛ nɛ̀ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tsyɛ ehuɔ, pɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ ama mɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ mɛ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ edzi asɛ ɔgã alo kesipɛ̃ kpá gɛ kalɛ tiyiyi pɔɛ banɔ atɔ̃ mɛ ana. 2Onupɛ kibuiɖɔlu kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛbalà ebui kpukpũ nɛ bubutì ebui bukasɛ lɛ mɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛbalà betu akpa ebu lɛ mɛahɔɛ, pɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ma mɛahɔɛ elo, itinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà. 3Onupɛ ɛlɔkɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee gɛlɛ mɛahɔɛ kɔ́ bahɔɛkpà eleteɛ pɛ ɛlɔkɔ mɛishu kɔ bapɔɛ awɔwɔɔ tsyɛ, pɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔmá mɛahɔɛ, ɛtɛba mɔ kɛdɔ̃ nanà.
4Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nu ɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ. Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛkpɛ̀ anɔ awɔ̃, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ titũ ahɔɛ nɛ kitelũ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tifeke ishu. 5Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛbhɛtɛ̀ awuĩ ebui, tɛtɛ pɛ mɛ ete yɛ tɛpɛpɛ, tɛtɛ kpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ̀ anɔ, tɛtɛ balɛ ebui kpa lu ɔkɔ anɔ. 6Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛkpɛ same nɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, pɔ tɛ kpɛ samɛ nɛ kibui gbã shu. 7Tɛplɛnɔ anɔ, tɛkɔ bayɛkɛ anɔ abha aŋã, tiɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã, tɛkpɛ kemi.
8Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛ wɔɛ anɔ. Pɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ ebuiɖɔlu ebuiɛ alɛ, alɛ ulũ bafala, ɛkɛlɛ gɛ beluhũ vɔvɔ huhu alɛɛ, alɛ ulũ bazɔkɔ yɔlɔ, ɛkɛlɛ gɛ kibuititì tsyɛ lɛɛ, kɛlɛ ulũ bafala. 9Ɔmɔsɛ ebui bhlui ete bunyi, kɛlɛ ebui kawɔ̃pɛ ete bɔɖɔ lu, 10pɔ onupɛ ebuiɛ gɛaná ebekoeyìɛ, agɛ agɛna abayalà. 11Kibeɛ gɛ idzi anuvɔ, ɛzɛɖɔ kaɖɔ asɛ anuvɔ ana, ɛzɛ bhɛtɛ mɛebui tɔtɔɖɔ asɛ anuvɔ ana, ɛzɛ bhɛtɛ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ tsyɛ asɛ anuvɔ ana. Kibeɛ gɛ ɛbadzì anɔ sheshèɛ, ɛshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ bunuvɔme ebuiɛ shu lu. 12Otsi buɖi ebuikukuɔ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ gɛeɖì ɔlɔ pɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ iɖì yɛanà, kɛlɛ bɔbàɖi bamɛ nɛ̀ bamɛ. Otsiɛ ebuiɛ kawɔ̃pɛ ete mɛinyi, kɛlɛ ɛbàtì alɛ petee, asɛ kana gɛ benyi mɛtsyɛ ana.
13Kliso otsiɛ nɔ ebui tatá alɛ alalɛ, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, kidzo mɛɖiɖi nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ. Pɔ kɛgɛ gbogbolo ɔdɛ nɛ alɛ nɛishiɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 14
Content:
Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ Gɛinu Kibuiɖɔlu Nɛ̀ Beluhũvɔvɔ Tihuhu
1Nɔtɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ kidzoɔ ede gagalĩ, tɛ̀ nɔpɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ, asɛ kibuiɖɔlu bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ana. 2Ɔmɔsɛ anɔka nyia ka gɛ ehu beluhũ vɔvɔ, gɛnɛ banɔ yɛehu bɔlɛ akɔ pɔ Owusoso Akaa. Kibui gbã, ananà etielũ kɛgɛ yɛaɖɔ niesi, aɖɔ ebui gɛ labhɛtɛ kibì nɛ̀ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ohumi. 3Pɔ anɔka nyia ka gɛ aɖɔ kibui elu xɔnɔ, aɖɔaɖɔ akɔ banɔ sɛ tɛ̀ akpɛ balɛ ohumi, tɛ̀ akpɛ balɛ kemi nɛ̀ tɛ ayɔ balɛ ishumɛ. 4Anunɔ gɛ ehu beluhũvɔvɔ xɔnɔ, yɛishu ete shu yɛabhɔ ewunɔ kabha, pɔ anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ kibui elu xɔnɔɔ, ɔhaa yɛabhɔ ewunɔ kabha. 5Ɛbapɛ sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka ezehu beluhũ vɔvɔ, pɔ kɛbapɛ ɔkɔ mɛ ɔdɛ gɛ onupɛ nɔɖɔ kibui olu boŋ. Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ kibui elùɔ egbogblo adɛ anunɔ gɛ eehu beluhũ vɔvɔ, ɔdɛ ɔsɛ ebu kɛgɛ yɛaɖɔ niesi sɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ abhɔ ɔhaa ewunɔ kabha nɔ.
6Mɛadzya alɛ, otsiɛnɔ onupɛ ɛba wɔnɔ ɔbhà pɛ ihu beluhũ vɔvɔɔ, kɛgbangbã ɖuwoe mɛbadzì ɔkɔ wɔnɔ, ɔdɛ ɔsɛ ɛmanà wɔnɔ kibui tili gɛ bebu akasɛ mɛ alo kibuititì alo kibui gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ alo kibui gɛ baɖɔ alɔkɔ akpalà banɔ nɔ dza? 7Nɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ ɛkpã ma bɔlɛ mɛ, pɛ bɔɔkpɛ ozĩ asɛ baabe nɛ̀ sangũ tsyɛ, afana gɛbetì ɔdzɛ nɔnɔ gɛ beebhoɔ onupɛ iliɛmɛ ediedi gibu ɔdzɛ kasɛ gikoeyiɛ dza? 8Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, onupɛ kexoele nɔ tsyɛ oliɛmɛ ɔgɛ dalɛ, afana gɛ aba balɛ asɛ avɛ keyuɔ dza? 9Kana kibui ɛlɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ kawɔ̃pɛ mɛ. Odiyinɔ sɛ nɔlɔkɔ kinekeɛ ɖɔ bubutì ebui nɔ, afana gɛ ebelũ kɛgɛ nɔɖɔ niesiɛ dza? Kɛlɛɛ́ nɔ mɛ ete wɔbɔzɔɖɔ kaɖɔ kpɛ xɔɔ. 10Kibui gbã kinu sɛ beluhũ ediedi alɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ xɔnɔ, pɔ buluhũ nanà ma gɛ kesilulũ ama akɔ bɔlɛ. 11Klisoɔ onupɛ igilũ kibui tili esi gɛ anɔ teli aɖɔɔ, efu ete mɛinu ɔkɔ agɛ yɛaɖɔaɖɔ, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ enu efu akɔ mɛ ana. 12Kana kibui ɛlɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ kawɔ̃pɛ mɛ. Gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔyɛkɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ soɔ, nɔkpɛ kemi tɛ̀ wu kabha nɛ bɔdɔ̃kɔkɔ nɔnɔ gɛ bɔbà bhɔ ɔhaa wunɔ kabha mɛ.
13Nɛ kibui ɛlɛshu soɔ, anunɔ gɛ yɛehu beluhũvɔvɔ, ekulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ̀ alabù kɛgɛ yɛaɖɔ niesi. 14Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ beluhũvɔvɔ mɛ, mɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɔ kulu Owusoso Akaa, pɔ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ xɔnɔ atɛamɔ eyuyù nanà denɔ kɛlɛ mɛ. 15Kliso kiɖe mɛbabhɛtɛ dza? Ɛbalɔkɔ mɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ kulu Owusoso Akaa nɔ, kɛlɛ iwlui bakulù Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ tsyɛ, ɛbazhã ɔdzɛ nɛ̀ mɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, kɛlɛ iwlui bazhã ɔdzɛ nɛ̀ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ tsyɛ. 16Onupɛ ɔɔkpɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití nɛ wɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, kiɖe anunɔ gɛ akpasɛ bagɛ begilũ kɛliesi mɛ abaɖɔ sɛ “Amen” ɔkɔ ahɔɛ gɛ ohuɔ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ egilũ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛlɛ wɔɖɔ niesiɛ dza? 17Obozohu ahɔɛ piapii xɔnɔ, pɔ ɔgɛbhɔ anɔbhla xɔnɔ ewunɔ kabha.
18Ihu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ ɔsɛ iihu beluhũ vɔvɔ ɔdɛ wɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ. 19Pɔ nɛ ɔhaa xɔnɔ mɛɛ, ɛbapɛ sɛ tɛ̀ mɛɖɔ bubutì ebui teti tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ kpalà bagɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔ ɔdɛ ebui ihotù lɔfɔ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ beluhũ vɔvɔ mɛ.
20Mɛadzya alɛ, nɔyɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ asɛ bunuvɔɛ ana. Nɛ ebui kpa tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu xɔnɔ, nɔzã asɛ bunuvɔɛ ana, pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ xɔnɔ nɔzã asɛ banɔ sheshè ana. 21Nɛ ɔshamɛ, bafɔnɔ elú asɛ,
“Ɔgana beefu gɛ beehu beluhũ vɔvɔ abhaa,
kɛlɛ odenɔ beefu olugbũɔ mɛ
ɛbaɖɔaɖɔ ɔkɔ banɔ alɛ,
pɔ nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ, batɛbà taatɔ̃ nɛ mɛ,”
kana Apaleteɛ aɖɔ.
22Beluhũvɔvɔ xɔnɔ, kibui bubukasɛ kinu, gɛnɛ kɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã, pɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã, kibuiɖɔlu xɔnɔ, kɛlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋãa, gɛnɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋãa. 23Kliso onupɛ ɔhaa petee ebeshogòɔ pɛ aka nyia aka ehu beluhũvɔvɔ, pɛ bagɛ betielũ kɛlɛ esiɛ, alo pɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋãa teli ebekoeyìɛ pɔ, batɛ baɖɔ sɛ nɔmà piapii dza? 24Pɔ onupɛ anɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋã, alo anunɔ gɛ etielũ buluhũ niesi ebekoeyì nɛ kibeɛ gɛ anɔ ka nyia ka aaɖɔ kibui elu xɔnɔɔ, ebelũ ɛlɛ esi ɔsɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete yɛenu kɛlɛ babalɔkɔ ebui alɛ petee ekulu kebhu nii nɔ̀, 25kɛlɛ ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ akpasɛ yɛitúɔ mɛ ebebu alɛishu kasɛ. Klisoɔ ebezhi nì ekluisi esi pɛ abakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛitití nɛ̀ ozĩ asɛ, “Owusoso Akaa akpasɛ wɔnɔɛishi kɛgbã!”
Kidzo Nabha Gɛ Bakpɛ̀ Kɛtakpu esi
26Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kiɖe buwlui zɛbaɖɔ dza? Onupɛ nobo shogòɔ, ɔdzɛ zhazhã ɔlɛ aka nyia aka ahɔɛ alo kibui gɛ balɔkɔ akpalà anɔ, kibui bubu kasɛ, beluhũ vɔvɔ tihuhu nɛ̀ bɔlɛ esi bubu lɛ aka nyia aka ahɔɛ. Kɛlɛ sɛ babhɛtɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ tɛ ledzi ohumi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ ɔhaa. 27Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ beluhũ vɔvɔ mɛɛ, banɔ taabha, alo pɛ bekpè ana tataa-betihu buluhũɔ nɛ kibè tinikpo mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ̀ anɔ bhlatɔ ebu kɛlɛ esi. 28Onupɛ agɛ yɛebebu kɛlɛ esi ama, anunɔ gɛ yɛaɖɔaɖɔ ataatɔ̃ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ tɛ̀ aɖɔaɖɔ ɔkɔ yɛishu nɛ̀ yɛ Owusoso Akaa ete.
29Ebuiɖɔluanɛ asɛ taabha alo tata baɖɔaɖɔ, kɛlɛ tɛ̀ bagɔgɔ banyɔ kibuiɛ gɛ kɛlɛ yɛaɖɔ shu piapii. 30Kɛlɛ onupɛ bebu kibui tili kasɛ anunɔ gɛ edzi kesiɛ, anɔ gɛiputɔ gɛ yɛaɖɔaɖɔ azɔkɔ yɔlɔ. 31Ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ɔbɔlà ɖɔ kibui olu, sɛ tɛ̀ aka nyia aka amɔ kibui denɔ kɛlɛ mɛ plɛnɔ kemikpɛkpɛ. 32Ebuiɖɔluanɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkpasɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ niesi. 33Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa etinu Akaa gɛ efutsù pɔ ishu yɔyɔ anɔ yɛenu.
Asɛ gɛ kɛlɛ banɔ dadalɛ ɔha petee mɛ ana, 34baadzɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ. Bagɛ kɔ balɛidzo asɛ tɛ̀ baɖɔaɖɔ, pɔ bezhinì balɛ ishu esi, asɛ gɛ Ɔsha ɔɖɔ ana. 35Onupɛ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bebisi kibui tili mɛelũɔ, bebisi balɛ enyine alɛ nɛ bɔpã mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kinu kiwũi ɔkɔ anɔdzɛ asɛ tɛ̀ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ɔha mɛ.
36Wɔnɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa kibuiɛ de baa dza? Pɛnɔsɛ wɔnɔ ete ɔkɔ kɛtɛba kuɔ dza? 37Onupɛ abhɛtɛ anɔ teli asɛ enu ebuiɖɔluanɔ alo ayɛkɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔɔ, nɔkɔ yɛetì asɛ kibuiɛ gɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nu Apaleteɛ ɔsha kpɛkpɛ. 38Onupɛ agɛ yɛkɛ kibui ɛlɛ, batɛbà yɛkɛ yɛtsyɛ.
39Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔkpɛ kemi tɛ̀ nɔɖɔ kibui elú, kɛlɛ nɔtɛ zɔkɔ kaɖɔɖɔ ɔyɔlɔ nɛ beluhũ vɔvɔ mɛ tsyɛ. 40Pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka tɛ̀ kɛshɔ kɛlɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛ bashɔrɔ elúɔ nabha.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 15
Content:
Yesu Tɛlɔlɔ Odenɔ Bekpuɔ Mɛ
1Klisoɔ otsiɛnɔ mɛadzya alɛ, ɛpɛsɛ bakà wɔnɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã gɛ ɛɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ shu, kibuiɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ pɛ nɔotsiɖi kɛlɛ abha. 2Ɔgana kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ mɛ bebú wɔnɔ ɛkpã, gɛ onupɛ nɔnyanã kibuiɛ gɛ itseɖe wɔnɔ mɛ vunɔ gagalĩ. Onu gɛnanaa, wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ma kɛnanà mɛ.
3Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ mɛyɛkɛ kɛlɛ mɛtsyɛ etseɖe wɔnɔ asɛ kibui gɛiputɔ kɛdzã kiwuhũ ana, sɛ Kristoɔ ebetsí nɛ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛtakpu nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ nulũ, 4kɛlɛ bavɔbɔ yɛ, kɛlɛ befeke yɛ nɛ kiwui tramɛ nabha nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ nulũ, 5Kɛlɛ ebu yɛishu akasɛ Petro nɛ̀ banɔ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha. 6Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ, ebu yɛishu akasɛ badzya gɛ bekpè adɛ akpã teti nɛ kibè tinikpo mɛ, beeteli nɛ balɛ mɛ akalɛ nɛkpã, pɔ beteli xɔnɔ etitsí. 7Kɛlɛ ebu yɛishu akasɛ Yakobo, nɛ̀ banɔkpɛkpɛ petee, 8kɛlɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ ebebú yɛishu akasɛ mɛ gɛ bamɔ asɛ anɔ gɛ agɛzã piapii ana.
9Ɔmɔsɛ mɛinù banɔkpɛkpɛ balɛ agɔgɔɛ nɔ gɛ ɛgɛ shɔnɔ ɔsɛ bekulu mɛ asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ flogo, ɔmɔsɛ ɛzɛtɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔhaa niede. 10Pɔ nɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebhui mɛ ebuɔ shu soɔ, idzi kɛdɔ̃ nɔnɔ gɛ kɛlɛ mɛinu oboɔ, kɛlɛ yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ wɔa axɔ̃ɛ. Oo, ɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ ɔdɛ balɛ petee, pɔ gɛnɛ mɛ, Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ kɛlɛ zã ɔplɛnɔ mɛ so. 11Kidzi asɛ mɛ alo balɛ tsyɛ, kibui ɛlɛ bɔɔɖɔ, kɛlɛ kibui ɛlɛ abha nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã.
Bɔnɔ tsitsíɛ Tɛlɔlɔ
12Pɔ onupɛ baɖɔ kibuiɛ sɛ befeke Kristoɔ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, kiɖuwoe so pɛ wɔnɔ beteli ɔbɔɖɔ sɛ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpumɛ ma dza? 13Onupɛ banɔ tsitsiɛ tɛlɔlɔ ma, kɛlɛ begi feke kristoɔ tsyɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ. 14Kɛlɛ onupɛ begi feke Kristoɔ tsyɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔlɔ kibui ɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ma kɛnanà mɛ. 15Ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ ɔdɛ ana, budzì banɔ gɛ bɔɖɔ kɛsɛnɛ ibui nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu. Ɔmɔsɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu sɛ efeke Kristo edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ. Pɔ egifeke yɛ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, gɛgbã bekpuɔ azalɔ. 16Pɔ onupɛ bagɛ kɔ bekpuɔ alɔɔ, kɛlɛ begi feke Kristoɔ tsyɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ. 17Kɛlɛ onupɛ begi feke Kristoɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛɛ, wɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ma kɛnanà mɛ, nɔkɔ kpasɛ wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. 18Kɛlɛ banɔ nɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ betsí nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ tsyɛ ayala. 19Onupɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ete shu so pɛ bulũ awɔ nɛ Kristo abhaa, kɛlɛ bunù ashagabui elete ɔdɛ anɔnyianɔ.
20Pɔ kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ befeke Kristoɔ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, yɛedzì anɔ gɛiputɔ gɛ alɔ akɔ bagɛ betsiɛ petee. 21Pɔ asɛ kana gɛ butsì gã anɔ abha baa, tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ tsyɛ gã anɔ abha ba. 22Asɛ kana gɛ denɔ Adam mɛ bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ tsiɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha gana Kristo abha banɔ nɔ nyɔ̃ɔ tsyɛ bamɔ ɛkpã. 23Pɔ anɔ nyia anɔ nɛ yɛibè gɛ batɔɖɔ akɔɛ. Kristo gɛenu anɔ gɛiputɔ, gɛ onupɛ etsodzi aba ebefeke bagɛ benu yɛayɛ. 24Kɛlɛɛ́ kibè gɔgɔɔ babà, gɛ onupɛ ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ bukusi ŋaŋã shu akɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Yɛakaa nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ayɛɛ bukusiɛ petee, ɔshaeleteɛ nɛ̀ ohumi balɛ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ. 25Ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ aŋã bukusi ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ edzu ɔtsɛɖɛ nɛ bagɛ batɛ adɛmɛ yɛibuiɛ petee abha. 26Kɛdɔ̃ kpa gɔgɔɛ nɔ gɛ ebezĩɛ kɛlɛinu butsí. 27Ɔmɔsɛ “atɛkpɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ yɛtsɛɖɛ esi.” Otsiɛnɔ onupɛ kibuiɛ ɖɔ sɛ bakpɛ “kɛka nyia ka” nɛ yɛesiɛ, kɛlɛ, kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ akpɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ Kristo esiɛ ama kɛlɛ mɛ. 28Onupɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana, kɛlɛ Yɛeyianyɛ akpɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ yɛesiɛ abazã yɛesi, sɛ tɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa edzì kɛtakpu akɔ kɛka nyia ka. 29Kliso otsiɛ onupɛ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpumɛ kɛma, kɛlɛ so pɛ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ alɛ nɛ banɔ tsitsíɛ nɛtakpu? Onupɛ begi feke bekpuɔ, kɛlɛ so pɛ bakpɛ bulĩ akɔ alɛ? 30Kɛlɛ bɔlɔ xɔnɔ, kɛliso pɛ bɔkpɛ ishu nɛ kibui zizĩ mɛ ɔɖatata ka nyia ka mɛ dza? 31Ɛtɔnɔ butsí kibe nyia be-mɛadzya alɛ kibui gbã mɛɖɔ-asɛ kana gɛ ɛmɔ same nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo mɛ. 32Onupɛ ɛta keyu nɛ̀ bagãhoe nɛ Efeso nɛ anɔdzyrame ebui shu tsyɛ elo, kiɖe mɛmɔ odenɔ ɛlɛ mɛ? Gɛ onupɛ begifeke bekpuɔ,
“Nɔkɔ bɔŋã tɛ̀ bɔwɔɛ,
ɔmɔsɛ kivũ ko butsi.”
33Nɔtɛkɔ bawɔɛ wɔnɔ, “Ɔhakpa tɛkpɛkpɛ zĩ ɛkpã zazãna gbangbã.” 34Nɔotsodzi ɔba wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ asɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ nɔbhɛtɛ, tɛ̀ nɔyɔlɔ ebui kpa tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, ɔmɔsɛ banɔ teli etinyi asɛ Owusoso Akaa alɛ-ɛɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ kpɛ wɔnɔ kiwũi nɔ.
Tɛlɔlɔ Denɔ Bekpuɔ Mɛ
35Pɔ anɔ teli xɔnɔ ebebisì asɛ, “Kidzo ɖuwoe abha befeke bekpuɔ dza? Ishupi ɖuwoe edì babà lɔkɔ amana dza?” 36Bɔga kibui ɖuwoe di nɛ ɔlɛ! Kɛnanà ma gɛ ɔɖa pɛ kɛgi tsiɛ pɛ kɛbà zã nɛkpã. 37Onupɛ nɔɖa kɛdɔ̃, nɔtɛɔ ɖa ishupiɛ gɛ bazã, pɔ kɛdɔ̃yi ete kinu, asɛ agɔ̃lɛ alo kɛdɔ̃ɛyi ka nyia ka ɛdi ana. 38Pɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ ɛlɛ ishupi asɛ gɛ apɛ ana, kɛlɛ akɔ kɛdɔ̃ɛyi ka nyia ka nɛ̀ kɛlɛ ishupi. 39Ishupiɛ petee gɛshɔ̃, ishupi tinikpo ɛdi lɛ banɔdzyrame ahɔɛ, bagã tsyɛ ayɛkɛ bɔbhlatɔ ɛdi, bɔzhɔɛ nɔ tsyɛ yɛkɛ tuli idi kɛlɛ akpa nɔ tsyɛ ayɛkɛ bɔbhlatɔ. 40Kititì ishupi lɛ, kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ishupi tsyɛ lɛ, pɔ tɛpɔpɔɖiɛ gɛlɛ kititì ishupiɛ shuɔ nu tinikpo ɛdi, kɛlɛ tɛpɔpɔɖiɛ gɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ishupiɛ tsyɛ shuɔ nu bɔbhlatɔ. 41Tɛpɔpɔɖi tili idi lɛ kiwuiɛ ahɔɛ, kɛlɛ tɛpɔpɔɖi bhlatɔ lɛ woele nɔ tsyɛ ahɔɛ nɛ̀ awɔɛ, kɛlɛ kɛwɔɛ gã ɔtɔ ɔkɔ kɛwɔɛ gɛ tɛpɔpɔɖi lɛ ɛlɛ ahɔɛ.
42Kana kɛbazã nɛ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ shu. Ishudzya gɛ baɖa nu kɛdɔ̃ tsɔtsɔmɔ̃, pɔ bebe feke ɛlɛ gɛ kɛzakà tsɔmɔ̃, 43baɖa ɛlɛ nɛ awuĩ mɛ, kɛlɛ befeke ɛlɛ nɛ ishudadalɛ mɛ, baɖa ɛlɛ nɛ tibobotsò mɛ, kɛlɛ befeke ɛlɛ nɛ ohumi mɛ, 44baɖa ɛlɛ asɛ ishudzya ana, pɔ befeke ɛlɛ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ.
Onupɛ ishudzya lɛɛ, kɛlɛ ɔfɔfuĩa tsyɛ ɔlɛ. 45Asɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “anyɛ gɛiputɔ gɛedzì adam abazã nɛkpã”, Adam gɔgɔɛ nɔ yɛedzì-ɔfɔfuĩa gɛ lɔkɔ ɛkpã. 46Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ anunɔ egiputɔ ba, pɔ ishupiɛ ɛlɛ putɔ flogo pɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ba. 47Anyɛ gɛiputɔ edzì osubhududu odenɔ kesiakpa mɛ, kɛlɛ anyɛ abhalà ede kititì aba. 48Kana gɛ kesiakpa abha anyɛ azã, kana bagɛ betsiɖì kesiakpa nabha tsyɛ alɛ, kɛlɛ asɛ kana gɛ kititì anyɛ edziɛ, kana bagɛ balɛ kititiɛ tsyɛ alɛ. 49Asɛ kana gɛ bamɔ bɔlɔ budzì asɛ kesiakpa abha anɔ nɔ̀ɔ, kana bɔbà zã asɛ anunɔ gɛ ede kititiɛ.
50Mɛadzya alɛ, ɛkɔ notì ɔsɛ ishupi ɛlɛ nɛ̀ dzyosu atɛba mɔ Owusoso Akaa bukusi bɔpã, pɛnɔsɛ kɛdɔ̃ gizĩɛ bamɔ ɔŋãkɔ odenɔ kɛdɔ̃ gitiziɛ ɔkɔ. 51Nɔtaatɔ̃ tɛ̀ mɛitseɖe wɔnɔ kibui kpukpũ ɛlɛ. Bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ tɛbàtsí, pɔ bebètsyina bɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ, 52nɛ odunu mɛ, nɛ tɛwɔsɛ tɛdadã mɛ, gɛ babɔ̀ kexoele gɔgɔɛ nɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ kexoele nɔ abàbɔ, babà nyɛmɛ bekpuɔ gɛ bezeke tsì eɖi, kɛlɛ bebètsyina bɔlɔ. 53Ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛbaziɛ lɔkɔ kɛgɛ tɛbàziɛ akpɛkpɛ akpɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ̀ ishupiɛ gɛbàtsɔmɔ lɔkɔ ɛgɛ tɛbatsɔmɔ akpɛkpɛ ɔkpɛ. 54Onupɛ balɔkɔ ishupiɛ gɛtɛ bàtsɔmɔ akpɛkpɛ akpɛ akɔ ishupiɛ gɛbà tsɔmɔ̃ɔ, pɛ balɔkɔ ishupiɛ gɛbàzã tihɔɔ akpɛkpɛ akpɛ kɔ ishupiɛ gɛtɛ bàzã tihɔɔ nɔ, kɛlɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elúɔ babà kɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Bamɛnɔ butsi edenɔ kabhaŋaŋã mɛ.”
55Oo butsí, fakɔ wɔ kabhaŋaŋã alɛɛ dza?
Oo butsí, fakɔ kɛgɛ ɔlɔkɔ ɔtá banunɔ lɛ dza?
56Kɛgɛ butsì lɔkɔ ɔtà banɔ nɔ kɛlɛinu kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, kɛlɛ kibui kpa kɛlɛ ohumi nɔ ɔlɛ onù ɔsha. 57Pɔ ahɔɛ huhu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ! Yɛakɔ bɔlɔ kabhaŋaŋã ɔganà Apalete Yesu Kristo abha.
58Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔzã gagalĩ. Nɔtɛkɔ kɛnanà tii wɔnɔ. Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu petee ɔkɔ Apalete nɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ tɛbàdzì kɛlɛɛ etee.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 1 16
Content:
Bɔdɔ̃ yɛyɛkɛ Kɔ Owusoso Akaa Nɔnɔ
1Otsiɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃yɛyɛkɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɔ shuɔ. Nɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ itseɖe Galiatia ɔhaa asɛ babhɛtɛ̀. 2Nɛ ɔgɔnɛ ka nyia ka ɔlɛ kiwui gɛiputɔ mɛ abhaa, anɔka nyia ka abalɛ ehoeyi teli elu edenɔ yɛɔdɔ mɔmɔ mɛ, azabalɛ alɛ elú, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ ɛbakuɔ bazaka yɛkɛ ehoeyi nɛ ananà ahɔɛ. 3Klisoɔ onupɛ ɛbakuɔ, ɛbakɔ bagɛ nɔobuɔ olúɔ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ buplukpa, kɛlɛ ɛbakpɛ balɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ avɛnɔ Yerusalem. 4Onupɛ kɛpɛ ɔkɔ mɛ tsyɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɛvɛ nɛ alɛ, babà gbana mɛ avɛnɔ.
Kɛdɔ Bibisi Ɔkɔ Ishu
5Onupɛ ɛgã koeyì nɛ Makedonia nɔ, ɛbaba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ ɛdɛgã Makedonia mɛ koeyì. 6Ogilu awɔ̃ɔ ɛbazã wɔnɔ ɔbha ɔvɛnɔ kibè tili, alo ɛbazã wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ subhà ɛdɔbe, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔlà plɛnɔ mɛ nɛ mɛidzo gagã mɛ nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ gɛ ɛvɛɛ. 7Ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɛmɔ wɔnɔ otsiɛ, tɛ̀ iɖi wɔnɔ ete tɛ̀ ɛfala, ɛbapɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ɛbazã wɔnɔ ɔbha kɛbɔɛ gɛ onupɛ Apaleteɛ adɛmɛ. 8Pɔ ɛbazã Efeso odiyinɔ Pentekoste kiwui nabha, 9ɔmɔsɛ kidzò gbagbla tili dalɛ ɔkɔ mɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, kɛlɛ banɔ kpekpè alɛ gɛ balɔɛtití nɛ mɛishu.
10Onupɛ Timoteo abaa, nɔoɖi ɛlɛ kɔ ɔsɛ etisì kifu nɛ kibui nanà shu, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ alɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha, ɔmɔsɛ awɔa Apalete nɛxɔ̃ɛ asɛ mɛ ana. 11Ananà atɛɖɔ asɛ atɛa yɛkɛ yɛ. Nɔkpɛ yɛidzo sɛsɛ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ etsodzi aba mɛɔkɔ. Iɖì yɛ nɛ badzya idzomɛ.
12Otsiɛ nɛ bɔlɔ adzya Apolo shuɔ, ɛkpalà yɛ gagalĩi sɛ avɛ nɛ̀ wɔ nɛ̀ badzyaa. Tsyɛ alo agɛ pɛ asɛ tɛ̀ avɛ otsiɛ flogo, pɔ abavɛ gɛ onupɛ kibeɛ kɔ kidzoɔ.
13Nɔoɖi wɔnɔ shu abha piapii, nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, nɔodzi banyɛ gɛ bakpɛ̀ kemi, nɔzã gagalĩ. 14Nɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.
15Nɔonyi ɔsɛ Stefana yɛɔpã mɛ anɛ balɛenu banɔ gɛ beputɔ pɛ etsyinà nɛ Axaya, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ balɛishu akpɛ banɔ dadalɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. Ɛkpalà wɔnɔ, badzya, 16ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi asɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidi nɛ̀ anɔ aka nyia aka tsyɛ gɛ afala eku kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛlɛ mɛ pɛ aatɔ nɛ ɛlɛ shuɔ. 17Same eku mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ Stefana, Fortunato nɛ̀ Axaiko ebekuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bakɔ wɔnɔ kɛgɛ nɔpɛ nɔ. 18Ɔmɔsɛ bakɔ mɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔnyɛmɛ. Kɛlɛ sɛ bɔbakà banyɛ alɛ nɛidi.
Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
19Ɔhaa gɛ ɔlɛ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ. Akwila nɛ̀ Priskila basɛnɔ wɔnɔ piapii nɛ Apaleteɛ inyeɛ mɛ, kana ɔhaa gɛ baatsyɔa nɛ balɛ bɔpã mɛ tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. 20Badzya nɛ ɛkɛlɛ petee asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. Nɔsɛnɛ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ ɔhɔɛ dadalɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ oli.
21Mɛ, Paulo mɛfɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ sɛsɛnɔ ɔlɛ nɛ̀ mɛahɔɛ.
22Onupɛ anɔ teli agɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ, kibui ɖɔɖɔ ɔkpɛ anɔ zã yiede. O, Apalete, ba!
23Apalete Yesu yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ wɔnɔ.
24Mɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ zãplɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee nɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ. Amen.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Paulo afɔnɔ yɛ keplukpa bhalà sɛsɛ Koritoanɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ yɛɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ɔhaa nɛ Korintoɔ aba gagalĩ. Banɔ teli nɛ ɔhaa mɛ abalɔkɔ kawlɔ̃akɛ ebui teli nɛ Paulo shu yɛamɔ, nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ azabhɛtɛ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ shu, pɔ akasɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ɔkɔ tenikpo tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ ɔhaa kɛlɛ abamɔ same gɛ ebui alɛ aba alɛ mɛɛ.
Nɛ keplukpa kawɔ̃pɛ gɛiputɔ mɛɛ, Paulo agã ebui mɛ nɛ yɛɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ɔhaa nɛ Korinto nɔ shu, kɛlɛ ebu ebui mɛ nɛ kɛnɔnɔ shu so pɛ ezebu ebui ulũ gagalĩ ɔkɔ ɔhaa nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɔhaa mɛ anɛ teli abalɔɛtití nɛishu pɛ bakwala yɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ, kɛlɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ̀ same sɛ ebui gagalĩ alɛ tɛlɔlɔkɔ alamana kitemɛ tsyitsyina ebui nɛ̀ tenikpo tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. Kidegba abakɔ ɔhaa kɛtakpu asɛ babhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛ bakɔ Kristoanɛ gɛ bapɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ Yudea nɔ. Nɛ keplukpa atakpu gɔgɔɛ mɛɛ, Paulo ebe bu yɛishu ulũ ɔkɔ banɔ kasasà teli nɛ Korinto nɛ yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ tidzidzi shu, banɔ gɛ balɔkɔ balɛishu asɛ balɛenu banɔkpɛkpɛ gbangbã pɛ balɔ́ kititì nɛ Paulo shu asɛ yɛenu asɛnɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-11
Paulo nɛ̀ ɔhaa nɛ Korinto 1.12—7.16
Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ Kristoanɛ nɛ Yudea8.1—9.15
Paulo ebu yɛishu ulũ nɛ̀ ohumi asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ ana 10.1—13.10
Ebui gɔgɔɛ 13.11-14

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 1
Content:
1Paulo gɛedzi anɔkpɛkpɛ akɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, nɛ̀ Timoteo gɛenu bɔlɔ adzyaa,
Mɛ sɛsɛ Korintoanɛ ɔhaa keplukpa alɛ ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ bagɛ bayɛkɛ aŋã nɛ Axaya petee asɛ, 2Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ode Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ kɔ wɔnɔ.
Owusoso Akaa gɛ Ayɔ Banɔ Nyɔɔ Ishumɛ
3Nɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Apalete Yesu Yɛakaa nɛinye nɛitití, Akaa gɛ ebi ashagabui nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa gɛ ayɔ banɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ishumɛ, 4anɔ gɛ yɛayɔ bɔlɔ ishumɛ odenɔ bɔlɔ bɔtɔ petee gɛ bɔmɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ lɔkɔ ishumɛ yɔyɔ gɛ bɔmɔ denɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ yɔ ishumɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ bamɔ bɔtɔ. 5Kɛba gɛ Kristo yɛ bɔtɔ ba bɔlɔ ɛkpã mɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha gana Kristo abhaa, ishumɛ yɔyɔ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ yuku balɛ. 6Onupɛ kibui tɔɖɔ bɔlɔ abhaa, kinu wɔnɔ ishumɛ yɔyɔ nɛ̀ tibubú, onupɛ bayɔ bɔlɔ kitúɔ mɛɛ, wɔnɔ bayɔ kitúɔ mɛ akɔ, gɛ kɛmana tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, kemikpɛkpɛ odenɔ bɔtɔ tunikpo ɔlɛ gɛ bɔtɔ mɛ. 7Bɔlɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔlɛ gagalĩ, ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ kana gɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ ɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha nɔmɔ ishumɛ yɔyɔ tsyɛ ɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔ.
8Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, bɔpɛ sɛ nɔotì ebui alɛ, nɛ bɔtɔ gɛ bɔmɔ nɛ Asia bɔdɔ̃ mɛ shu. Bɔgã bɔtɔ gbagbla tuli mɛ gɛ fala bɔlɔ kemikpɛkpɛ, gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ ɛkpã zazãna batɔ̀ bɔlɔ. 9Kibui gbã, nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, bɔmɔ ɛlɛ asɛ butsí bɔtsyɔa bebhui akɔ ɔlɔ. Pɔ kɛba ɛlɛ mɛ ana ɔsɛ tɛ̀ butì sɛ bɔtɛ balà ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zã ɔdɛ Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ mɛ, agɛ yɛakɔ bekpuɔ alɔ edenɔ bekpù mɛ. 10Ebú bɔlɔ odenɔ butsí ɛlɛ nɛidì mɛ̀, kɛlɛ ezebè bu ɔlɔ. Yɛabha bulu awɔ̃ sɛ abàzã kɛlɛ abha pɛ ebebu bɔlɔ, 11asɛ gɛ nɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔ nɛ wɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ̀ ana. Kɛlɛ́ banɔ kpekpè ebehu ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ kɛtakpu nɛ tibhui bhuibu gbangbã gɛ ebhui bɔlɔ ebuɔ nɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ gɛ bekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ bɔlɔ kɛtakpu so.
Paulo Etsyina Yɛibui Tɔtɔɖɔ
12Pɔ otsiɛ nɔ butũ kitélũ ɔsɛ, bɔlɔ kitú mɛ ebui etseɖe bɔlɔ ɔsɛ bɔnyãna bɔlɔ shu piapii nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ bɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ̀ wɔnɔ, nɛ tɛdadalɛ kibui gɛlɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ tɛɖɔɖɔ kide Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Gɛnɛ kesiakpa abha bubutì bɔlɔkɔ bhɛtɛ ebui alɛ nɔ, pɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu mɛ boŋ. 13Ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛ fɔnɔ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ nɔtɛ bɔlà ɔkalàa, alo pɛ nɔtɛ bɔlà kɛlɛ esi ulũɔ ɔsɛsɛ ɔnɔ. Kɛlɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã ɔsɛ, 14asɛ kana gɛ nɔolũ ɔlɔ esi nɛ ebuiɛ teli mɛɛ, nobolũ alɛ petee esi pɛ nobotũ etelũ nɛ bɔlɔ ɛtakpu asɛ kanà gɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ tũ etelũ nɛ Apalete Yesu kiwuiɛ nabha.
15Kliso ɛyɛkɛ kɛlɛ abha ɔŋã, ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbaɖí wɔnɔ putɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔmɔ ebui gbangbã taabha odenɔ kɛlɛ mɛ. 16Ɛtɔɖɔ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɛbaɖí wɔnɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛvɛ Makedonia nɔ, tɛ mitsodzi bà wɔnɔ ɔbha gɛ ide Makedonia nɔ baa, tɛ nɔkpɛ mɛidzo mɛvɛ Yudea. 17Kibeɛ gɛ ɛtɔɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ, kibui ete mɛtɔɖɔ dza? Pɛnɔsɛ ɛbhɛtɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ kanɔ mɛ anɔ ana gɛ aɖɔ asɛ “Ee, ee,” pɛnɔsɛ “Oo, oo nɔɔ dza”?
18Pɔ asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ kibui gbãa, kana bɔlɔ kibui ɖɔɖɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ itinu “Ee nɛ̀ Oo.” 19Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi Yesu Kristoɔ gɛ yɛibui mɛ nɛ̀ Silvano nɛ̀ Timoteo bɔɖɔɔ tinu ɔsɛ “Ee” alo “Oo” pɔ odenɔ yɛmɛ, kibe nyia beɛ kɛka nyia ka lɛ ɔsɛ “Ee.” 20Kikpè gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebui ɖɔɖɔ luɔ zikpè kɔ ɔlɔ tsyɛ elo, lɛenu “Ee” nɛ Kristo mɛ. Kliso ɔgana yɛabhaa, bɔɖɔ “Amen” ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye shu tɛdadalɛ. 21Otsi nɔ, Owusoso Akaa yɛabhɛtɛ ɔlɔ pɛ budzi gagalĩ nɛ Kristo mɛ. Asra bɔbɔ akɔ ɔlɔ, 22alɔkɔ adadã gɛ akasɛ asɛ yayɛ bunuɔ adã bɔlɔ ulũ nɔ, kɛlɛ alɔkɔ yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ akpɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ̀ asɛ kɛdɔ̃ gɛ alɔkɔ atɔɖɔ kɛklagbu nɛ kɛgɛ baba nabha.
23Ikulu Owusoso Akaa asɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ abhalà akɔ mɛ, sɛ kitinu mɛ tɛpɛpɛ ɔsɛ ibhui wɔnɔ bho nɛ kibeɛ gɛ itsyina ba Korinto nɔ. 24Gɛnɛ sɛ buutũ kɛlɛ kpɛ wɔnɔ ulũ ɔsɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã, pɔ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ plɛnɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ samè mɔmɔ, ɔmɔsɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɛlɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 2
Content:
1Kliso ɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ sɛ ɛzaka ba wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ishumɛ pɔpɔɛ mɛ. 2Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, afana gɛ alɛ pɛ abakɔ mɛmɔ same ɔdɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ ɛkpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ dza? 3Ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa asɛ kana gɛ ɛbhɛtɛ sɛ onupɛ ɛbaa, ɛtɛba nyɔnɔ awɔ nɛ bagɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bakpɛ mɛ sameɛ shu. Ɛyɛkɛ wɔnɔ petee abha ŋã, sɛ wɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ wɔnɔ ɔbɔmɔ samè ɔplɛnɛ mɛ. 4Ɔmɔsɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gbagbla, kibui tɔtɔɖɔ anɔ abha nɛ̀ ɛwɔmɛ mɛ̀ mɛlɔkɔ fɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɔ, gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, pɔ tɛ nɔmɔ mɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gbagbla ɔkɔ wɔnɔ.
Tɛlɔlɔkɔ Tsye Kibui kpa Bhɛbhɛtɛ Elete
5Onupɛ anɔ teli amana ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, agɛ kpɛ mɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ asɛ kana gɛ akpɛ wɔnɔ petee ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ, nɛ kidzo tili abhaa, ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ mɛvɛ kɛlɛ abha faanɔ. 6Batɔ pɔpɔ gɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ atɛpɔ̃ kɔɛ nɔ ekpè akɔɛ. 7Pɔ otsiɛnɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ otsye yɛ tɛ nɔyɔ yɛishu mɛ, sɛ tɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gbagbla ɔtɛbɔ ŋã yɛabha. 8Kliso ɛkpalà wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔkɔ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔɛ kpè tɔɖɔ. 9Kibui nɔnɔ shu so pɛ ɛfɔnɔ kibui ɛlɛ kɔ wɔnɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ mɛiɖi sɛ nɔbɔ làzã tifefekeɖiɛ ulũ pɛ nobolũ batɔ̃ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ dza. 10Onupɛ nɔlɔkɔ tsye anɔ teliɛ, kɛlɛ mɛtsyɛ lɔkɔ tsye yɛ. Kɛlɛ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ tsyeɛ, onupɛ edzi asɛ kibui tili lɛ sɛ balɔkɔ etsye tsyɛ elo, ɛlɔkɔ kɛlɛ itsye nɛ Kristo amɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu so, 11sɛ tɛ Satana atɛ bàwɔɛ wɔnɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ butinyi kɛgɛ yɛatɔɖɔɔ.
Bagɛ Bawɔaxɔ̃ɛ Kɔ Olugbũnyanyã Vɔvɔɔ
12Kibeɛ gɛ ɛvɛ Troa tɛ mɛdɛɖɔ kibuiɛ nɛ Yesu shu pɛ ɛmɔ sɛ Apaleteɛ adalɛ kedulũ tieli akɔ mɛɛ, 13mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ agɛzã dɔ akɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ɛgɛ dɛ mɔ mɛadzya Tito nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. Kliso ibisi kidzo nɛ balɛ ɔkɔ pɛ ɛshɛ vɛ Makedonia.
14Pɔ ahɔɛhuhu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ, anɔ gɛ agbana bɔlɔ kibe nyia be sɛ tɛ bɔŋã kabha nɛ Kristo mɛ, kɛlɛ gana bɔlɔ abhaa yɛ bubutì kɛlɛɛ huhuhuɔ fu vɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ. 15Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɛinu Kristo yɛ tɛlɔlɔ̃ huhuhuɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa asɛ nɛ bagɛ bayɛkɛ elu nɛkpã nɛ̀ bagɛ balɛ atɔwuiɛ ayala nɛishi ana. 16Nɛ anɔ teliɛ amɛɛ, bɔlɛinu tɛlɔlɔ̃ gɛ mana butsí, kɛlɛ banɔ teli tsyɛ tɛlɔlɔ̃ ɛlɛ dzì ɛkpã ɔkɔ balɛ. Afana gɛ ashɔnɔ pɛ abalà kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ awɔa? 17Asɛ gɛ beteli abhɛtɛɛ, bɔlɔ xɔnɔɔ, bɔtɛwɔa Owusoso Akaa nɛxɔ̃ɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔkɔ pɛ bɔdɔ̃ nɔ. Nɛ kidzo bhlatɔ abhaa, bɔɖɔ kibui gbã nɛ Kristo mɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, asɛ banɔ gɛ bakpɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ ana.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 3
Content:
1Bɔzɛba wlui kpɛ bɔlɔ ishu nɛitití mɔɔ dza? Buplukpa bade banɔ teli ɔkɔ kɔ wɔnɔ tububu kasɛ alo bɔlɔkɔ, ɔkɔ wɔnɔ inyeɛ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛititiɛ dza? 2Wɔnɔ onu bɔlɔ keplukpa gɛ bafɔnɔ nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ nabha, gɛ aka nyia aka enyi pɛ akalàa. 3Nɔkasɛ ɔsɛ Kristo keplukpa nɔonu, kɛgɛ kɔ sɛ bɔlɔ axɔ̃ɛ avɛ kabhaa, gɛ bagɛ fɔnɔ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ balɔkɔ afɔnɔ kalɛ nɔ. Bagɛ fɔnɔ alɛ nɛ ɛklagbu abha, pɔ banɔdzyrame etú aklagbu nabha bafɔnɔ alɛ atɔɖɔ.
4Banɔ abha yɛyɛkɛŋã alɛ nɛidiɛ nu bɔlɔ ayɛ ɔgana Kristo abha vɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa amɛ. 5Etinu asɛ gɛ bɔna nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bɔyɛkɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà kɔ bɔlɔshu, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛakɔ bɔlɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã tɛwɔawɔa ɛlɛ nɛidi. 6Yɛakɔ bɔlà kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã wɔawɔa nɛ̀ olugbũ nyanyã vɔvɔ ɔlɛ, anɛ ɔsha keplukpa ɔkɔ kide, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ keplukpa xɔnɔ eyì banɔ, pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ xɔnɔ lɔkɔ ɛkpã.
Tɛdadalɛ Gɛlɛ Olugbũ Nyanyã Vɔvɔ Shu
7Otsiɛ nɔ, onupɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ mana butsí, gɛ bafɔnɔ atɔɖɔ ɔsha buplukpa nɛ̀ kɛklagbu abhaa, ba nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ sɛ tɛ Israelanɛ atɛlà eɖi Mose amɛ nɛ gɛ kitséɛ shu, gɛ kalɛ ulũ pɔ bafala flogo, 8kidzi ana pɔ, bɔlɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛede Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔmɛ ishu taadalɛ ɔdɛ ana dza? 9Onupɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛebu banɔ kɛpɔ shu dalɛɛ ana pɔ, kɛlɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ mana ishu dadalɛ pɔ ba zã dza? 10Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ buɖi sɛ kɛlɛishu dalɛ, tɛka lɛ ana, gɛ onupɛ bɔlɔkɔ shɔnɔ tɛdadalɛ gɛ bazã tihɔɔ nulũ. 11Kɛlɛ onupɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ ulũ bafalàa ba nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ pɔ, kɛlɛ tɛdãdalɛ gɛba zã tihɔɔ nɔ bazãa mɔɔ dza?
12Kliso gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ebui alɛ, kifù tiyi bɔlɔ. 13Bɔlɔ butidzi asɛ Mose ana, gɛ abalɔkɔ kɛpɔtɛ adã yɛamɛ asɛ tɛ̀ Israelanɛ atɛmɔ tɛdadalɛ gɛ ɛlɛ ulũ falàa nɛ yɛamɛ. 14Pɔ babhɛtɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ yɛazã yɔɔ, ɔmɔsɛ oboyinɔ otsiɛnɔ kɛpɔtɛ wɔ balɛ amɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bakà akalà olugbũ nyanyã kukuɔ. Bagɛ tsɛ ɛlɛ nɛ balɛ amɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kristo mɛ ete babà tsɛ ɛlɛ ashɛnɔ. 15Boyinɔ obuɔ onupɛ bakalà Mose ɔsha keplukpa, baka adã kɛpɔtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ alɛ etúɔ nabha. 16Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli tsyina avɛ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔɔ, kɛlɛ́ batsɛ kɛpɔtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ yɛamɛ. 17Otsiɛ Apaleteɛ yɛenu Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, kɛlɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ lɛɛ, ɛkɛlɛ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã tsyɛ azã. 18Kɛlɛ bɔlɔ gɛ bagɛ tɔɖɔ kɛpɔtɛ nɛ bɔlɔ amɛ butsé nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ tɛdadalɛ, betsyina bɔlɔ akpɛ yɛ tɛzazã mɛ, nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ gɛikpè tɔɖɔ, gɛide Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ, anɔ gɛenu Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkɔɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 4
Content:
Ehoeyi Bɔdɔ̃ Gɛ Kpasɛ Butsukpu Mɛ
1Klisoɔ, gɛ gana Owusoso Akaa ashagabui ɖiɖi mɛ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ soɔ, bɔlɔ etúɔ ohuiɛ otio bhui. 2Pɔ, bɔtɛ badɛmɛ tɔɖɔ ebui kpukpũ nanà tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ awũi edzo abha, bɔgɛ lɔkɔ tɛwɔɛwɔɛ ebui, alo pɛ butsyina Owusoso Akaa yɛibuiɛ tũ. Pɔ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, bɔlɔkɔ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ bɔlɔkɔ ɖɔ kitú mɛ kibui, nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. 3Kɛlɛ onupɛ kidzi asɛ badã kibui gbangbã nɔdɔ̃ tsyɛ elo, badã kɛlɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɔkɔ bagɛ balɛ ɛkpã yalaa. 4Obo kanɔ nɔ̀ ibudiɛ pú awuhũ akɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã, sɛ tɛ batɛmɔ tɛdadalɛ gɛlɛ Kristo yɛibuiɛ shu, anɔ gɛ alɛ asɛ Owusoso Akaa ana. 5Ɔmɔsɛ anɛ bɔlɔ shu kibui bɔɖɔ, pɔ Yesu Kristoɔ bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ shu bɔɖɔ kaɖɔɔ, kɛlɛ budzi asɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ akɔ Yesu ana. 6Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “Nɔkɔ kifu dɛkɛ nɛ otumũɔ mɛ,” nɔkɔ yɛifúɔ dɛkɛ nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ, tɛ kɛdɛkɛ kɔ bɔlɔ asɛ bubuti kifù ana tɛ kɛkɔ Owusoso Akaa shu dalɛ nɛ Kristo amɛ.
7Pɔ ehoeyi bɔdɔ̃ bɔlɛ lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ gɛkpasɛ butsukpu mɛ tɛ kɛkasɛ sɛ ohumi ɔlɛ gɛ ɔdɛ ɔka nyia ka ogide bɔlɔkɔ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ lode. 8Bamɔnɔ bɔlɔ akpɛ gagalĩ nɛ kawɔ̃pɛ ka nyia ka mɛ, pɔ begihu bɔlɔ esi, kɛkpɛ ɔlɔ buluhũ pɔ bɔlɔ shu mɛ gɛgbã, 9batɔnɔ ɔlɔ ede, pɔ bagɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ shu, behu ɔlɔ esi pɔ bugitsí. 10Bɔlɔkɔ Yesu butsiɛ kpɛ ɔlɔ ishuɔ mɛ ɛkanà bɔlɛ falanɔ kibe nyia be, sɛ tɛ bebu ɛkpã gɛ Yesu azã akasɛ nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ. 11Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ bagɛ lɛ nɛkpã, butsi kpɛ bɔlɔ ɛkpã nɛifu nɛ Yesu kɛtakpu sɛ tɛ bebu yɛkpã zazãna mɛ akasɛ nɛ bɔlɔ ishupiɛ gɛbatsiɛ mɛ. 12Klisoɔ, butsí wɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, pɔ ɛkpã ɛlɛ wɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ mɛ. 13Bafɔnɔ kɛlɛ elú asɛ, “Ɛyɛkɛŋã, kliso pɛ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔɔ.” Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo ɔlɛ mɛɛ, bɔlɔ tsyɛ yɛkɛ ŋã kliso pɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ, 14ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ agɛ yɛanyɛmɛ Yesu denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ yɛaba nyɛmɛ bɔlɔ aplɛnɔ Yesu kɛlɛ abagbana bɔlɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ avɛnɔ yɛamɛ. 15Kɛlɛ petee lɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ̃ so, sɛ tɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ bavɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ ɔkɔ gɛ bamana ahɔɛhuhu gɛbà yuku gbangbã Owusoso Akaa tɛdadalɛ.
16Kliso bɔlɔ kitúɔ tibhui. Nɛ ɔtɔ̃ɔ, bɔwɔɛ asɛ bɔlɔ ishudzya botso, pɔ nɛ bɔlɔ kɛmɛ xɔnɔɔ, bɔmɔ ɛkpã tsyitsyina vɔvɔ kiwui nyia wui. 17Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ bɔtɔ lɛ gidzi foele pɛ bɔfalà gulũi nɔ, bakɔ bɔlɔ̀ tɛdadalɛ gɛbazã tihɔɔ gɛ dɛ kɛka nyia ka. 18Klisoɔ bɔtɛ ilu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛgɛ bamɔ nɛ̀ awuhũɔ nabha, pɔ buulu awɔ̃ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɛ amɔ nabha. Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ bɔmɔ nɛ̀ anwuhũɔ tɛzã kibe dzlolo, pɔ kɛgɛ batɛmɔ nɛ̀ awuhũɔ kɛlɛ zã tihɔɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 5
Content:
Bɔlɔ Kititì Ɔzãkɔ
1Otsi alɛ bunyi sɛ onupɛ bezĩ kesiakpa abha kagbaa gɛ kalɛ mɛ bɔkpasɛ, ɔzãkɔ ɔlɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, bɔpã tihɔɔ, gɛ anɛ anɔdzyrame ahɔɛ balɔkɔ edzu bɔlɛ nɔ. 2Pɔ otsiɛ nɔ atɛatsɔ akɔ bɔlɔ tɛ bakɔ bɔlɔ kititì ɔzãkɔ 3ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ balɔkɔ bɔlɛ akɔ ɔlɔ, bɔtɛ bazã kɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ. 4Pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ gɛ bɔkpasɛ kagba alɛ mɛɛ, atɛatsɔ akɔ bɔlɔ, kɛlɛ kɛtɔɖɔ bɔlɔ abha, ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛpɛ sɛ tɛ bebu kɛdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ ginu bɔlɔ ɔzãkɔ nɛ bɔlɔ shu, pɔ tɛ bakpɛ kɛpɔtɛ ginu kititì ɔzãkɔ nɛ bɔlɔ shu sɛ tɛ̀ ɛkpã ŋã kɛdɔ̃ gitsíɛ nabha. 5Otsiɛ nɔ, Owusoso Akaa yɛabhɛtɛ bɔlɔ akɔ kibui tɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ kɛlɛ akɔ bɔlɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa alɔkɔ elú tɛ̀ kɛkasɛ kidzo ɔkɔ kɛgɛ babaá.
6Klisoɔ buɖi kidzo mɛ kibe nyia be, kɛlɛ bunyi tsyɛ sɛ gɛ bɔkpasɛ ishudzya bɔpãlɛ mɛɛ soɔ, bɔlɛ odzlolo ɔkɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ shu. 7Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ bɔlɔkɔ dzi nɛ ɛkpã nɔ, anɛ nɛ kɛdɔ̃ ɖiɖi ulũ. 8Ɛɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ bɔyɛkɛ bɔlɔ shu abha ŋã, kɛlɛ bɔba pɛ sɛ tɛ bukoeyi nɛ ishudzya ɛlɛ mɛ tɛ bɔdɛzã Apaleteɛ bɔpã mɛ. 9Klisoɔ, kinu kibui gɛ bɔtɔɖɔ sɛ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ buku yɛawɔ, gɛ onupɛ edzi asɛ bɔkpasɛ bɔpãlɛ ginu ishudzya alo onupɛ bɔma bɔlɛ mɛ tsyɛ. 10Ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔ petee ba Kristo kebhu kuklu kegbu namɛ, sɛ tɛ aka nyia aka ayɛkɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bakɔɛ, nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kibeɛ gɛ azã ishudzya mɛ, onupɛ kinu kibui gbangbã pɛnɔsɛ kibui kpa tsyɛ.
Kɛxɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Ɔkɔ Tenikpo Bhɛbhɛtɛ
11Denɔ kibe ɛlɛ gɛ bɔbatì sɛ kɛlɛ sɛ busi Apaleteɛ nɛifu soɔ, bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ bubu ebui mɛ kɔanɔ. Owusoso Akaa enyi kɛgɛ bunùɔ, kɛlɛ inyi tsyɛ sɛ kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ebuesilulũ. 12Bɔtɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ bɔlɔ shu kɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ bɔpɛ sɛ nɔmɔ kidzo tɛ nofeke ishu nɛ bɔlɔ kɛtakpu. Sɛ tɛ nɔlà bu kibui ulũ ɔkɔ bagɛ befeke ishu nɛ kɛgɛ bamɔ shu ɔdɛ kɛgɛ kpasɛ kitúɔ mɛ. 13Onupɛ bɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ama piapii tsyɛ elo, Owusoso Akaa shu so pɛ kɛlɛ ana, onupɛ bɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ alɛ piapii nɔ, bɔlɛ ana kɔ wɔnɔ. 14Ɔmɔsɛ Kristoɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tĩi bɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ kɔ bɔlɔ sɛ anɔ tenikpo etsí kɔ bɔlɔ petee, klisoɔ bɔlɔ petee tsí. 15Kɛlɛ etsí akɔ bɔlɔ petee, sɛ tɛ bagɛ alɛ nɛkpã atakazã nɛkpã akɔ balɛishu pɔ tɛ̀ bàzã nɛkpã akɔ agɛ yɛetsí nɛ balɛ kɛtakpuɔ pɛ beze feke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ.
16Kliso denɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔɔ, bɔtɛ kaɖì ananà nɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ ɖiɖi ulũ. Kɛkpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, butiɖi Kristo ana oɖi, pɔ bɔtɛka bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana. 17Klisoɔ, onupɛ anɔ teli akpasɛ Kristo mɛɛ, enu kɛdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ vɔvɔ, kɛdɔ̃ kukuɔ tɛba fala, kɛvɔvɔ ba otsi alɛ! 18Alɛ petee ede Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, anɔ gɛ yɛabhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ bɔlɔ ɔgana Kristo abha kɛlɛ akɔ bɔlɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, gɛ mana tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ, 19sɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ɔgana Kristo abha, gɛ atɛa kalà banɔdzyrame ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ kɔ alɛ. Kɛlɛ asɛsɛ bɔlɔ kibuiɛ gɛ bamana tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ. 20Klisoɔ bunu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa agã bɔlɔ abha pɛ aɖɔaɖɔ etseɖe wɔnɔ. Kliso bubisi denɔ wɔnɔkɔ nɛ Kristo kinye mɛ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa. 21Owusoso Akaa bhɛtɛ anɔ nɔ gɛ yɛishu kibui kpa ma sɛ tɛ edzi kibui kpa nɛ bɔlɔ kɛtakpu, sɛ tɛ gana yɛabhaa, budzi Owusoso Akaa anɔ dadalɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 6
Content:
1Asɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaxɔ̃ɛwɔa anaa, bɔkpalà wɔnɔ sɛ nɔtɛ yɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ asɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛdɔ̃ ana. 2Ɔmɔsɛ aɖɔ asɛ,
“Nɛ kibeɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã kɔ wɔnɔ, ilũ wɔnɔ atɔ̃,
kɛlɛ nɛ anɔ tibubu iwui nabhaa, ɛplɛnɔ wɔnɔ.”
Itseɖe wɔnɔ sɛ kibe ɛlɛ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa ɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ kiwuiɛ, otsiɛ ɔlɛ onu tibubú kiwuiɛ.
Bɔtɔɔ Gɛ Paulo Amɔɔ
3Bugilu kɛdɔ̃ kpakpata nɛ anɔ nanà kidzo mɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ bɔlɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa etibedzi kɛlɛɛ ete. 4Pɔ asɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ ana, bɔlɔkɔ bɔlɔshu kɔ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha, nɛ̀ kemi kpɛkpɛ gbagbla, bɔtɔ nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ mɛ, 5nɛ tihuhuisi mɛ, ɔɖavũmɛ zazã nɛ̀ ebelà ebui mɛ, nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ tɛwɔawɔa mɛ̀, elishi taɖa madɔ madɔ nɛ bɔbhɛ mɛ, 6nɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe gbangbã mɛ, ebui esi lulũ, kitú esi lulu nɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã mɛ tɛzazã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gidzuɔ mɛ̀, 7nɛ kibui gbã tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛohumi nɔ mɛ, tɛ bɔlɔkɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ keyutadɔ̃ nɛ kɛŋã nɛ̀ kɛblɛkpɛ mɛ̀, 8ɔgana ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ awũi ebui mɛɛ, kibui kpa tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ kibui gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ anɔ shu mɛ, bɔna pɔ balɔkɔ bɔlɔ asɛ butinu anunɔ gɛ yɛ bɔɖɔ sɛ yɛ bunuɔ, 9benyi bɔlɔ pɔ babhɛtɛ asɛ betinyi bɔlɔ ana, abhɛtɛ asɛ butsi pɔ bɔlɛ nɛkpã, behuisi bɔlɔ pɔ begiyì bɔlɔ, 10ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ kpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, pɔ bɔmɔ same kibe nyia be, bɔdɔ̃ kitsyui, pɔ bɔkɔ banɔ kpekpèɛ amɔ ehoeyi bɔdɔ̃, kɛdɔ̃ nanà ma bɔlɔ ahɔɛ, pɔ kɛka nyia ka lɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ.
11Bɔdalɛ ishumɛ ɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ Korintoanɛ, kɛlɛ bɔdalɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ petee kɔ wɔnɔ. 12Bɔgɛ nyanã bɔlɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ovunɔ, pɔ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ ɔnyana wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ovunɔ nɛ bɔlɔ shu. 13Tɛ itiɖì banɔ amɛɛ, ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ kɔ wɔnɔ asɛ mɛeyi alɛ ana, kliso wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔdalɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ.
Nɔtɛkɔ Bakpɛ Kakɔ Nɛ Wɔnɔ Oli Ɔplɛnɔ Bagɛ Agɛ Yɛkɛ Aŋã
14Nɔtɛkɔ bakpɛ kakɔ nɛ wɔnɔ oli ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã. Ɔmɔsɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɖuwoe gɛ akpasɛ kibui gbangbã nɛ̀ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ishi? Pɛnɔsɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɖuwoe gɛ akpasɛ kifu nɛ̀ otumũ ishi? 15Tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɖuwoe gɛ akpasɛ Kristo nɛ̀ anɔzizĩ ishi? Tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɖuwoe gɛ akpasɛ agɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã nɛ̀ anɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋã ishi dza? 16Kibui nyanyã ɖuwoe gɛ kpasɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɛ̀ ibudi ishi? Bɔlɛinu buvũɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ. Asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “Ɛbazã plɛnɔ balɛ kɛlɛ ɛbagã nɛ balɛishi, kɛlɛ ɛbadzi balɛ Owusoso Akaa, kɛlɛ bebèdzi mɛ banunɔ.”
17Klisoɔ nokoeyi nɛ balɛishi
tɛ nobu ɔtɔ,
kana Apaleteɛ aɖɔ.
Nɔoti hunu kɛnanà gɛ kɛlɛishu gɛdalɛ,
kɛlɛ ɛbayɛkɛ wɔnɔ.”
18“Ɛbadzi Akaa ɔkɔ wɔnɔ
kɛlɛ nɔ obodzi mɛeyianyɛ nɛ̀ beyiadzɛ alɛ,
kana Apaleteɛ gɛenu Ohumi petee eleteɛ aɖɔ.”

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 7
Content:
1Mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, gɛ batɔɖɔ ebui alɛ elú akɔ bɔlɔ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔdalɛ bɔlɔ shu odenɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ kɛkpɛ̀ kibò nɛ bɔlɔ ishudzya nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ shu, tɛ bɔlɔ shu dalɛ tɔɖɔ nɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.
Paulo Yɛ Same Mɔmɔ
2Nɔbhɛtɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ. Bɔgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ anɔ nanà shu, bugi tuturu ananà, bugi dzyini ananà tsyɛ ɔkpɛ. 3Ɛtɛɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ bù wɔnɔ kɛpɔ nɔ, ɛtɛɖɔ ɛlɛ ɖi sɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔlɛ nɛidi ɔlɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ gɛ bakɔ sɛ bɔzã nɛkpã alo tɛ̀ butsì plɛnɔ wɔnɔ. 4Ɛyɛkɛ wɔnɔ abha aŋã, kɛlɛ itũ mɛitelũ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu. Kemi kpɛkpɛ gbagbla alɛ mɛahɔɛ sɛ nɛ bɔlɔ bɔtɔ gelee mɛ tsyɛ, ɔtɔ̃kɔ nanà ma ɔkɔ mɛ samè mɔmɔ.
5Ɔmɔsɛ gɛ bɔba Makedonia nɔ, bɔlɔ ishudzya ɛlɛ gimoele ɖi, pɔ bazã kpɛ bɔlɔ buluhũ nɛ kɛka nyia ka bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, ebela pɛpɛ ebui nɛ ɔtɔ̃ɔ, kɛmana kifu sisi nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ. 6Pɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛ ayɔ ishumɛ akɔ agɛ yɛ bezhini akpɛ kesiɛ, alɔkɔ Tito tɛbaba ayɔ bɔlɔ ishumɛ nɔ, 7kɛlɛ gɛnɛ yɛtɛbaba ete, pɔ nɛ ishumɛ yɔyɔ gɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔɛ shu so. Etseɖe bɔlɔ kana gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔmɔ mɛɛ, wɔnɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gbagblaa, kanà gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ mɛishuɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ mɛ samɛ mɔmɔ ekpè adɛ kana gɛ azã.
8Onupɛ nɔmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ebui nɛ keplukpa gɛ ɛfɔnɔ sɛsɛ wɔnɔ mɛ tsyɛ elo, kɛgɛ tɔɖɔ mɛabha. Gɛ kɛtɔɖɔ mɛabha flogo tsyɛ elo-ɛmɔsɛ mɛ keplukpa mɛ ebuiɛ apɔɛ wɔnɔ, pɔ kɛba zãna ɔkɔ kibè gulũi ete- 9pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ same eeku mɛ, gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ kɛtɔɖɔ wɔnɔ abha so, pɔ gɛ wɔnɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gbana wɔnɔ ɔkpɛ etú titsyitsyina ebuiɛ mɛ so. Ɔmɔsɛ nɔbɔ mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ, klisoɔ gɛnɛ bɔlɔ bhɛtɛ kibui gɛ kɛkpɛ kibì nanà nɛ wɔnɔ shu. 10Ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ mɔmɔ gɛode Owusoso Akaa mɛɛ, lɔmana kitú mɛ tsyitsyina gɛ gbana anɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtɔwui bubu mɛ gɛ kitinu kibui gɛ dɛ mɛulũ, pɔ kanɔ mɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ xɔnɔ lɔmana butsí. 11Noɖi kɛgɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ ɔbhɛtɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã mɛ, akɔ asɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ kibui shu ɔdɛ, akɔ asɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ, akɔ asɛ nɔkpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ kɛgɛ gɛpɛ̃ɛ shu, akɔ asɛ notisi kifù, akɔ asɛ noɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ebui teli, akɔ asɛ nɔlɔkɔ tili nɛebui mɛ, akɔ asɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bapɔ̃ batɔ̃ akɔ anɔ gɛ atɛa bhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã. Nɛ ebuiɛ alɛ petee mɛɛ, nɔkasɛ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ nɛ alɛ shu. 12Kliso gɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa kɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ elo, gɛnɛ anɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa shu so alo anunɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛishuɔ so, pɔ sɛ tɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, tɛ nɔlà mɔ ebuiɛ ɔkɔ ishu nɛ kana gɛ nɔmɔ kibè ɔkɔ bɔlɔɔ. 13Nɛ ebui alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ, bɔmɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ.
Ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ bɔlɔ kemikpɛkpɛ, kɛzã bɔlɔ uli nɛ kɛmɔ gɛ Tito tsyɛ amɔ sameɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ petee nɔkɔ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ lodzi ɔvɔvɔ. 14Itũ mɛishu kitelũ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu kɔɛ, kɛlɛ nɔgɛ kpɛ mɛ buluhũ. Pɔ asɛ kana gɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ butseɖe wɔnɔ lɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kitelũɔ gɛ butũ nɛ wɔnɔ shu ɔkɔ Tito nɔ, kasɛ sɛ kinu kibui gbã. 15Kɛlɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ zɛbà gbogblo dɛ gɛ onupɛ abakà ɔsɛ wɔnɔ nyɔ̃ɔ olũ batɔ̃, pɛ nɔyɛkɛ yɛ nɛ̀ kifusisi nɛ̀ tishushukù mɛ. 16Same eku mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbalà yɛkɛ wɔnɔ abha ŋã.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 8
Content:
Kɛmi Kpɛkpɛ Kristoanɛ Tɛbakɔ Anɔ Ɔdɔ̃
1Mɛ adzya alɛ, otsiɛ nɔ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ notì gibhuiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebhui Makedonia ɔhaa ebuɔ. 2Ɔganà tifefekeɖi gagalĩ gɛ dɛ mɛɛ, balɛ sameɛ gɛ bamɔ nɛ balɛ ahɔɛ kɛdɔ̃ mazamazã mɛ tsyɛ elo, badalɛ ɛyamɛ pɛ bakɔ bɔdɔ̃. 3Ɔmɔsɛ ɛdalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ sɛ bakɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ kɛlà gɛ babalà akɔ nulũ, kɛlɛ bazakɔ adɛ kana gɛ babalàa. Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ɔlɛ petee de balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ, 4bakɔ bɔlɔ kɛtakpu odunu ɔlɛ sɛ bɔkɔ balɛ tsyɛ kidzo tɛ̀ balɛ tsyɛ amɔ tili edenɔ bɔlɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ gɛ balɛishu dalɛ mɛ̀ 5Kɛlɛ bagɛ bhɛtɛ asɛ gɛ bɔpɛ nɔ, pɔ beputɔ alɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ Apaleteɛ nɛ bɔlɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ. 6Kliso bɔkpɛ Tito Kemi ɔmɔsɛ yɛatɛkpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ niesi sɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ kɛlɛ amana kɛlɛ ɔtɔ̃kɔ soɔ avɛ kɛlɛ abha tɛ awɔa kɛlɛ ebeke. 7Pɔ asɛ kana gɛ nɔmɔ otugbà vɛvɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ-nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ̀, kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛ̀, bubutì mɛ̀, nɛ̀ tɛpɛplɛnɔ ɔkɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɛ kɛdɛmɛɛ gɛ nɔdɛmɛ bɔlɔ kibuiɛ-noɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɔdɛ nɛ tibhui bhuibu bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ mɛ.
8Gɛnɛ ɔsha mɛkɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ ɛpɛsɛ tɛ̀ mifeke wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɖi sɛ kɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ dza, kliso pɛ ɛlɔkɔ banɔ bhlatɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛ shɔnɔ bagɔgɔ ɛyɛ nɔ. 9Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi kibhuiɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu ebhui bɔlɔ ebuɔ, pɔ gɛ edzi ehoeyi elete tsyɛ elo wɔnɔ shu so pɛ ebedzi etsyuitsyui, sɛ tɛ nɔmɔ ehoeyi bɔdɔ̃ ɔgana yɛitsyui dɔdɔ mɛ.
10Mɛuluhũɔ gɛ ɛbà hu nɛ kɛgɛ pɛ̃ɔdɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ alɛ. Kɛgɔanàa wɔnɔ odzì banɔ gɛiputɔ, anɛ sɛ tɛ nɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ ete, pɔ kide wɔnɔ kitú mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ɔ. 11Otsiɛ nɔwɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ obekè, tɛ kanà gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ ɔwɔa ɛlɛ kɔ ɔsɛ nɔwɔa ɛlɛ obekè, odenɔ kɛgɛ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ. 12Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ tɛpɛpɛ ɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ lɛɛ, baba yɛkɛ kɛgɛ ɔlàkɔ nɛ kɛgɛ lɛ wɔahɔɛ mɛ, gɛnɛ kɛgɛ ma wɔahɔɛ pɛ ɔtɛbɔlà kɔ shu.
13Bɔlɔ tɛpɛpɛɛ kɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ bagɔgɔ atɛ̀ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ, pɛ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ ebui atɔɖɔ wɔnɔ abha, pɔ bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka shɔ̃ piapii. 14Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ mɛ, wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ kpekpèɛ banà kɔ alɛ, sɛ tɛ balɛ tsyɛ akɔ wɔnɔ kɛgɛ nɔpɛ nɔ. Kɛlɛ ebuiɛ petee abashɔ̃, 15asɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elú ana asɛ, “Anunɔ gɛ yɛeshogo bɔdɔ̃ gelee nɔ bɔdɔ̃ gelee tɛzã yɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛeshogo bɔdɔ̃ ɛbɔɛ nɔ, anɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɛbɔɛ bɔlɛ zã yɛahɔɛ.”
Bakpɛ Tito Nɛ Korinto
16Ihu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛakpɛ kɛgɛ mɛpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ̀ Tito tsyɛ yɛituɔ mɛ. 17Ɔmɔsɛ gɛnɛ bɔlɔ kibuiɛ ete Tito amana wɔnɔ, pɔ aaba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ kemikpɛkpɛ gbagbla nɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ ebui teli tsyɛ shu. 18Kɛlɛ bɔɔkpɛ adzya teli plɛnii gɛ ɔhaa petee adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛ kibui gbangbã axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa shu so. 19Kɛgɛ zɛdɛɛ, ɔhaa yɛebú yɛ asɛ tɛ atɔnɔ bɔlɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃kɔkɔ vɛnɔɔ, bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔdɛkɔ tɛ̀ bɔkpɛ̀ Apaleteɛ kinyè nɛitití, nɛ̀ tɛ bɔkasɛ ɔsɛ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bɔplɛnɔ. 20Bɔgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ baɖɔ kibui kpa nanà nɛ kana gɛ bɔkɔ ɛyamɛ gbangbã bɔdɔ̃ ɔlɛ shu. 21Ɔmɔsɛ bɔkpɛ kemi pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ kɛgɛ pɛ nɔ, gɛnɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ namɛ ete, pɔ nɛ banɔdzyrame tsyɛ amɛ.
22Ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔɔ, bɔɔkpɛ̀ bɔlɔ adzya gɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ bɔmɔ sɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ awɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ asɛsɛ, kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔ akapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ awɔa kɛlɛ atɔɖɔ ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ wɔnɔ abha aŋã. 23Tito xɔnɔɔ, enu mɛɔbhia gɛenu mɛ axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔhagbo nɛ wɔnɔɛishi, bɔlɔ badzya alɛ xɔnɔɔ, benu banɔ gɛ ɔhaa akpɛ asɛ tɛ bazã balɛ inye mɛ tɛ bakpɛ̀ Kristo kinyeɛ nɛitití. 24Klisoɔ, nɔkasɛ banɔ alɛ ɔsɛ nɔdɛmɛnɔ nɛ alɛ, nɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛishu so pɛ butũ ahɔɛ nɛ kitelũ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpuɔ tɛ̀ ɔhaa balà amɔ ɛlɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 9
Content:
1Kɛbha ma ɔsɛ tɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ebui alɛ nɛ banɔ dadalɛ shu. 2Ɔmɔsɛ inyi kana gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔplɛnɔ, kɛlɛ itũ ahɔɛ kitelũ nɛ kɛlɛishu ɔkɔ Makedonianɛ, pɛ itseɖe balɛ̀ sɛ̀, denɔ kɛgɔanàa wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔlɛ̀ Axaya ɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔkɔ banɔ bɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ kana gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ɔ abhɛtɛ akɔ asɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ tsyɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ bakɔ kɛdɔ̃. 3Pɔ ɛɛkpɛ badzyaa sɛsɛ tɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ gɛ butũ kitelũ nɛ wɔnɔ shu nɛ kibui ɛlɛ mɛɛ tìdzi kɛlɛɛ, pɔ nɔbalɛ olu asɛ kana gɛ itsèɖe balɛ nɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ, itseɖe alɛ sɛ nɔbɔ balɛ olu. 4Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ Makedonia eyì teli atɔnɔ mɛ aba ɛkɛlɛ pɛ abamɔ wɔnɔ ɔsɛ nɔgɛ balɛ̀ oluɔ, bɔlɔɔ xɔnɔ bɔtɛ baɖɔ kibui nanà nɛ wɔnɔ shu, ɔmɔsɛ kiwũi bayi bɔlɔ nɛ kana gɛ bɔyɛkɛ wɔnɔ abha ŋãa shu. 5Klisoɔ aabhɛtɛ mɛasɛ kɛpɛ sɛ bɔkpalà badzya tɛ bebèɖi wɔnɔ kpɛ otugbà tɛ̀ bakpɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛ nɔtɔɖɔ olúɔ. Kɛlɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ kibeɛ bana, batɛbà akɔ ɔlɛ nɛ amumu mɛ.
Bɔdɔ̃ Ɖaɖa Nɛ̀ Ɛyamɛ Gbangbã
6Nɔbakà kibui ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, anɔ gɛ aɖá bɔdɔ̃ bhlui nɔ, kɛdɔ̃ bhlui yɛaba apɔ̃. Kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ aɖa bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã abapɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã 7Kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ ka nyia ka akɔ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ asɛ akɔ edenɔ yitúɔ mɛ̀, gɛnɛ gana kibui tɔtɔɖɔ ɔkɔ banɔ abha, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ gɛ akɔ kɛdɔ̃ nɛ̀ same. 8Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa abalà kɔ wɔnɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ kpè tɔɖɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɛ ebuiɛ pete mɛ nɛ kibè ka nyia ka mɛɛ, gɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔpɛ nɔ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ soɔ, nɔbɔ lɔkɔ wɔnɔshu ɔkpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã ka nyia ka wɔawɔa mɛ. 9Asɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ elú asɛ,
“Apɔ̃ɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ mɛ akanà asɛsɛ bètsyuitsyuiɛ,
yɛ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ lɛ tihɔɔ.”
10Otsi nɔ, anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛalɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃eyi akɔ anɔ gɛ yɛahɔɛ bɔdɔ̃eyi nɛ̀ kɛŋaŋã gɛ baŋã, yɛabakɔ asɛ wɔnɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ bɔdɔ̃eyi ɔbalɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɛ̀ɛ ɔtɔɖɔ, kɛlɛ abakɔ asɛ wɔnɔ tɛzazã piapi nɔ tsyɛ ba gbogblo ɔtɔɖɔ. 11Babà bhɛtɛ wɔnɔ nobodzì ehoeyielete nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ wɔnɔ ɛyamɛ pɛ̃ kibè nyia bè, kɛlɛ gana bɔlɔ abhaa, wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ badzi ahɔɛhuhu akɔ Owusoso Akaa.
12Axɔ̃ɛ alɛ gɛ nɔɔdɛ atɛakɔ bagɛ balɛenu Owusoso Akaa anɔ nɔ̀ ete bɔdɔ̃, pɔ buyuku balɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ehu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ nɔ. 13Nɛ axɔ̃ɛ gɛ alɛishu nɔkpɛ kemiɛ pɛ nobu ishu kasɛ, banɔ abakpɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití nɛ wɔnɔ batɔ̃ lulũɔ gɛ akpà plɛnɔ wɔnɔ ebuimɛ dadalɛ nɛ Kristo shu, nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɛyamɛ gbangbã gɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ alɛ nɛ anɔ ka nyia ka. 14Kɛlɛ nɛ balɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ wɔnɔɛtakpu soɔ, balɛ etúɔ mɛ abazã wɔnɔ shu, nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛdɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ akɔ wɔnɔ shu so. 15Ahɔɛhuhu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ nɛ yɛɔdɔ kɔkɔ gɛ bɔtɛ balà ɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ bɔlɛ shuɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 10
Content:
Paulo Awlɔ̃akɛ Yɛaxɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Nɛtakpu
1Gana mɛishu esi zhizhinɔ nɛ Kristo mɛɛ, ibisi ɛlɛ denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ, mɛ Paulo ɛbhɛtɛ ebui asɛ “anɔ gɛ esi kifú” nɛ wɔnɔ bamɛ pɔ ɛkpɛ kité gɛ onupɛ ɛlɛ kitsí nɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha. 2Ɛkɔ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu sɛ onupɛ ɛbaa, ɛtɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ibú mɛishu kasɛ wɔnɔ asɛ anɔ gɛ etisì kifù tɛ ɛyɛkɛ̀ mɛishu abha ŋã. Pɔ abhɛtɛ wɔnɔ mɛayɛmɛ teli asɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ bubùti bɔlɔkɔ bhɛtɛ̀ ebuiɛ nɔ. 3Gɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ bɔlɛ tsyɛ elo, bɔtɛ lɔkɔ keyù asɛ kana gɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ anɛ abhɛtɛ̀ɛ. 4Keyuta ɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔɔtà keyuɔ nɔɔ butinu kanɔ mɛ keyuta ɔdɔ̃. Nɛ kidzo bhlatɔ abhaa, ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ohumi ɔlɛ balɛ ahɔɛ ɔsɛ tɛ balɔkɔ ayɛɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ebui gagalĩ nɔ. 5Butũ ɔtsɛɖɛ kpɛ kawlɔ̃akɛ nɛ̀ asɛnɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɔɛtití nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛubutiɛ shuɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ bɔŋã ekpeɖekpeɖe nɔnɔ gɛ atɛakɔ pɛ bɔbàlũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ Kristoɔ nabha. 6Kliso bɔbazã nɛ̀ awɔ sɛ tɛ bɔpɔ̃ batɔ̃ ɔkɔ batɔ̃mɛ gagalĩ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka ɛdi, gɛ onupɛ wɔnɔ batɔ̃lulũ aba anaa.
7Wɔnɔ xɔnɔ kabha ebuiɛ ete nooɖì. Onupɛ anɔ teli ayɛkɛ yɛishu abha aŋã sɛ enu Kristoɔ ayɛ, ewlui eɖi kɛlɛ mɛ tɛ̀ amɔ asɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ lɛ Kristo mɛ asɛ kɛlɛ gɛ alɛ ana. 8Onupɛ itũ ahɔɛ itelũ nɛ ohumi nɔ gɛ Apaleteɛ akɔ bɔlɔ gɛ bɔlɔkɔ bhɔ wɔnɔ wunɔ kabha ɔdɛ sɛ tɛ buzhini wɔnɔ esiɛ, kiwũi tɛba yimɛ nɛ ɛlɛ shu. 9Ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ asɛ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kifù nɛ̀ mɛ buplukpaa. 10Ɔmɔsɛ beteli aɖɔ asɛ, “Bupù kpasɛ yɛ buplukpa mɛ kɛlɛ butũ kibui ɔkpɛ banɔ ulũ, pɔ nɛ yɛɔkɔɔ xɔnɔ atɛ akpɛ̀ banɔ kemi kɛlɛ yɛebuiɖɔɖɔ tsyɛ atɛ avɛ ɔkɔ nanà.” 11Kɛlɛ sɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidi etì asɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ bɔɖɔ nɛ bɔlɔ buplukpa mɛ gɛ onupɛ bɔmaa ɛkɛlɛ, bɔbà bhɛtɛ̀ alɛ abha gɛ onupɛ bɔlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbhaa.
12Bɔtɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ̀ lɔkɔ bɔlɔshu shɔnɔ beeteli gɛ bakpɛ balɛishu nɛitití ana. Onupɛ balɔkɔ balɛishu asɛ banɔ gbagbla pɛ balɔkɔ balɛishu ashɔnɔ ishuɔ, betinu bebutinɛ. 13Bɔlɔ xɔnɔɔ, tɛbàtũ ahɔɛ nɛ etelũ falanɔ kifú, bɔbà lɔkɔ etelũɔ gɛ butũɔ kpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɔnɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ bɔlɔ mɛ, axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ leku wɔnɔ kɔɔ tsyɛ. 14Bɔtɛbà tũ etelũ falanɔ kifú faanɔ, asɛ gɛ kɛbà ba ɛlɛ mɛ gɛ onupɛ bɔgɛ ba wɔnɔ ɔbha ana, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ lɔkɔ Kristo kibui gbangbã mana wɔnɔ. 15Buti tũ ahɔɛ bɔlɔ etelũ falanɔ kifù faanɔ nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ banɔ bhlatɔ awɔa shu. Kɛgɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ kɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, kibeɛ gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã bakpe tɔɖɔɔ, bɔlɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nɛ wɔnɔɛishiɛ tsyɛ banɛɛ tɔɖɔ. 16Sɛ tɛ bɔla ɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ nɛ busiakpa gɛ lɛ wɔnɔ kede ɔkɔ ɔlɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛpɛ sɛ tɛ butũ ahɔɛ etelũ nɛ axɔ̃ɛ nɔnɔ gɛ banɔ bhlatɔ awɔa nɛ busiakpa bhlatɔ abha. 17Pɔ “Anunɔ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ etũ ahɔɛ nɛ etelũɔ, etũ ahɔɛ etelũ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ.” 18Ɔmɔsɛ gɛnɛ anunɔ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ akpɛ yɛishu nɛititíɛ yɛabha batɔɖɔ ahɔɛ, pɔ anunɔ gɛ Apaleteɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛishuɔ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 11
Content:
Paulo Nɛ̀ Asɛnɛ Anɔkpɛkpɛ
1Iɖi kidzo mɛ sɛ nɔbɔ kpɛ kemì nɛ mɛ bɔgadɔdɔ ɔlɛ shu kɛbɔɛ, pɔ nɔvɛlɔ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ. 2Ɛlɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ tɛzazã wɔlãkɛ kabhã nɛ wɔnɔ shu. Ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ lu kɔ wɔnɔ sɛ nɔzanà anyɛ tenikpo gɛenu Kristoɔ, sɛ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ wɔnɔ kpɛ ahɔɛ kɔɛ asɛ adzɛ gɛ etinyi anyɛ ana. 3Pɔ kifu yimɛ sɛ asɛ kana gɛ eblidzya alɔkɔ bɔshɛ edzo awɔɛ Eva nɔ, babà tsyina wɔnɔ tsyɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ashɛnɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ Kristoɔ shu. 4Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ anɔ teli aba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ pɛ abaɖɔ kibui nɛ Yesu teli shu ɔdɛ agɛ yɛ shu bɔɖɔ kaɖɔɔ, alo onupɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔfɔfuĩa bhlatɔ ɔdɛ ɔgɛ ɔlɛ nɔtɛyɛkɛ shuɔ, alo kibui gbangbã bhlatɔ gɛ kɛgã ɔtɔ denɔ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ nɔtɛ yɛkɛ shuɔ, kɛlɛ notsyina tsiɔ̃ faanɔ. 5Pɔ batɛbà lɔkɔ mɔzãkɔ ɔlɔ ashɔnɔ bagɛ nokulù ɔsɛ “Banɔkpɛkpɛ alɛ gɛ balɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔɖama.” 6Itinu anɔ gɛ kpasɛ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ piapii, pɔ kibuititì xɔnɔ lɛ mɛahɔɛ. Bɔkɔ sɛ kibui ɛlɛmɛ dalɛ̃ kɔ wɔnɔ piapii nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha.
7Kibui kpa kinu ɔkɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ izhinì mɛishu esi tɛ ɛbhɛtɛ wɔnɔ nowu kabha ɔganà Owusoso Akaa kibuiɛ gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ otseɖe wɔnɔ kɛbhɛ mabuia mabuia mɛ dza? 8Gana tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ ɛyɛkɛ denɔ ɔhaa bhlatɔ mɛɛ ɛlɔkɔ ba plɛnɔ wɔnɔ nɔ. 9Kɛlɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛzã wɔnɔ ɔbha pɛ ɛzɛpɛ kɛdɔ̃ tiliɛ, igidzi bɔtɔ ɔkɔ ananà, ɔmɔsɛ badzya gɛede Makedonia nɔ bakɔ mɛ mɛɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ nɔ. Ɛgɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛidzì bɔtɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ nɛ kidzo nanà abha, kɛlɛ ɛbazã kɛlɛ abha zɛbhɛtɛ ana. 10Gɛ kibui gbã Kristo kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ kpasɛ mɛmɛ soɔ, anɔ ka nyia ka gɛede Axaya bɔdɔ̃ mɛ atɛ balà aɖɔ asɛ kibuiɛ gɛ itũ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛitelũɔ ɖɔ ma ɛlɛ mɛ. 11Kiɖe so? Pɛnɔsɛ ɛgɛ dɛmɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ibui soɔ dza? Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ enyi asɛ ɛdɛmɛ wɔnɔɛ ibui! 12Kɛlɛ ɛbazã ɛlɛ abha zɛbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ mɛbhɛtɛɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ mɛibu bagɛ bapɛ kidzo asɛ tɛ̀ balɛ nɛ bɔlɔ shɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ shu butũ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtelũɔ yinɔ.
13Ɔmɔsɛ banyɛ alɛ nɛidi enu basɛnɛ Kristo banɔkpɛkpɛ, baxɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ bawɔɛ banɔ, gɛ babhɛtɛ balɛishu asɛ Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ benu ana. 14Kɛlɛ kɛgɛ bhɛtɛ kibi, ɔmɔsɛ Satana tsyɛ abhɛtɛ̀ yɛishu asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ dadalɛ ana. 15Klisoɔ kɛgɛ bhɛtɛ ibì gɛ onupɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ abhɛtɛ balɛishu asɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gbangbã ana. Babà yɛkɛ kɛgɛ shɔnɔ asɛ bayɛkɛ nɛ balɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛdɛ alɛ niede.
Paulo Etũ Ahɔɛ Yɛetelũ Nɛ Yɛɔtɔ Shu
16Ɛkaɖɔ sɛ, Ananà atɛ lɔkɔ mɛasɛ awɔaga mɛinu. Pɔ onupɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana, kɛlɛ nɔyɛkɛ mɛ asɛ gɛ nɔbɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ awɔaga ana, sɛ tɛ ɛlà tũ ahɔɛ mɛitelũɔ kɛbɔɛ. 17Nɛ ishu abha ɛlɛ gɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ mɛitelũɔ gɛ itũ shuɔ, ɛtɛɖɔ kaɖɔ asɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ abaɖɔ, pɔ asɛ awɔaga ana. 18Gɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ etũ ahɔɛ nɛetelũ asɛ kanɔ mɛ elete ana soɔ, mɛtsyɛ batũ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛitelũ. 19Nɔlɔkɔ same ɔzã plɛnɔ bawɔaga ɔmɔsɛ bebutinɛ nonu so! 20Nɛ kibui gbã mɛɛ, nɔzã ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ abhɛtɛ wɔnɔ asɛ banɔ dzidziɛ kura tsyɛ, pɛ bedzyinì wɔnɔkpɛ alo pɛ bamɔ̃ kidzo nɛ wɔnɔ shu so, alo pɛ bafala eputɔ pɛ amanà wɔnɔ kɛdɔ nɛ bamɛ. 21Kiwũi kinu ɔkɔ mɛ tɛ ɛdɛmɛ tɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha sɛ buzhi esi ana popopo!
Kibui ka nyia ka gɛ anɔ teli alà etũ ahɔɛ etelũ akɔɔ, mɛxɔnɔ ɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ awɔaga ana, mɛtsyɛ balà tũ kitelũ nɛlɛ shu. 22Anɛ Yudaeyi benuɔ dza? Yudaeyi mɛtsyɛ inu. Anɛ Israelanɛ benuɔ dza? Israeleyi mɛtsyɛ inu. Anɛ Abraham yɛeshui alɛ benuɔ dza? Abraham Yɛeshui mɛtsyɛ inu. 23Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ benuɔ dza? (Ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ asɛ kɛtakpu tsitsí elete ana.) pɔ igbogblo dɛ alɛ. Ɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ ɔdɛ balɛ, ɛzã ɛɖa buvũ mɛ gelee ɔdɛ balɛ, behuisi mɛ ɖɔtɔɖɔtɔ dɛ balɛ, kɛlɛ ɛzakɔ butsi kibe nyia be. 24Buhuisi titì behuisi mɛ gɛ ɛyɛkɛ bushi afɛata nɛ̀ tuzhita odenɔ Yudanɛ ahɔɛ mɛ. 25Buhuisi tɛtà behuisi mɛ nɛ̀ ɔɖaɛshi, bututinikpo behu mɛ aklagbu, bɔyɛɛ tɛtà kelĩabha ohu ɔyɛɛ nɛ mɛ, ɛzã aƒu nabha kiwui tinikpo nɛ̀ elishi tenikpo, 26ɛzã kidzo gagã abha kibe nyia be. Ɛzã butsi nɛ ɛkpã ishi, odenɔ bulĩukekpù mɛ, banɔ kpa, ɛzã butsi nɛ̀ ɛkpã ishi odenɔ mɛahɔɛ banɔ nɔ tɛhɔɛ mɛ, nɛ̀ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ tɛhɔɛ mɛ, ɛzã butsi nɛ̀ ɛkpã ishi odenɔ ɔma gbagbla mɛ, nɛ̀ bayàa mɛ, nɛ aƒu nabha, nɛ̀ badzya gɛenu basɛnɛ elete mɛ. 27Ɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ, kɛlɛ ɛmɔ bɔtɔ, kɛlɛ ɛzɛ gbã tɛwɔnɔ̃, ɛzanà bɔbhɛ nɛ̀ oluwɔɛ, kɛlɛ ɛzɛ fala kɛdɔ̃ maŋamaŋã, bɔbɔlɔ ziyi mɛ kɛlɛ ɛzã kɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ. 28Nɛ alɛ petee edeɛ, ɔhaa ebuiɛ akɔ ɛgɛzɛ mɔ ɔhɔɛ nanà. 29Afana gɛ ebotsò pɛ mɛ xɔnɔ gɛibotsoɔ dza? Afana bagbana akpɛ kibui kpa mɛ pɛ kɛtɛ pɔɛ mɛishuɔ mɛɛ dza?
30Onupɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ itũ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛitelũɔ, ɛbatũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ akasɛ ɔsɛ ibotsoɔ shu. 31Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa ɔkɔ Apalete Yesuɔ, agɛ yɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bakpɛ yɛinye nɛitití tihɔɔ nɔ enyi ɔsɛ ɛtɛ sɛ asɛnɛ. 32Nɛ Damasko, kɛmadi ekusiɛ gɛ akpasɛ ekusi gbagbla Aretas esiɛ akɔ sɛ bazãepo Damasene ɔmagbagbla sɛ tɛ bevũ mɛ so. 33Pɔ balɔkɔ mɛ akpɛ kashɔ mɛ pɛ bezhinì mɛ aganà kedulũ bhlui nɔ gɛ akpasɛ kigiliɛ mɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 12
Content:
Paulo Yɛɔlalazaza Nɛ̀ Yɛiwuɔ Giɛtsuiɛ
1Kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ɛzã kɛlɛ abha tɛ itũ ahɔɛ nɛ mitelũ. Kɛnanà ma gɛ ɛbamɔ nɛlɛ mɛ pɔ, ɛbazã kɛlɛ abha bhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ mɛɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ nɛ tibubukasɛ gɛide Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ nabha. 2Inyi anyɛ teli gɛ akpasɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ gɛ asɛ agɔ lɔfɔ nɛ talɛ nɛ alɛ befeke yɛ avɛnɔ kititi tramɛ mɛ. Onupɛ ishupi mɛ alo gɛnɛ ishupi mɛ o, mɛxɔnɔ itinyi, Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ enyi ɛlɛ. 3Kɛlɛ inyi sɛ anyɛ alɛ, onupɛ ishupi mɛ alo gɛnɛ ishupi mɛ o, mɛxɔnɔ tinyi, Owusoso Akaa ete yɛenyi ɔsɛ 4bavɛnɔ yɛ nɛ paradiso mɛ. Elũ ebui gɛ atɛ balà alɛ esi bu, ebui gɛ bagɛ kɔ anɔ kidzo sɛ tɛ alà aɖɔ. 5Ɛbatũ mɛitelũ nɛ anyɛ alɛ nɛidi shu, pɔ ɛtɛ batũ kitelũ ɔkɔ mɛishu, ɔdɛ mɛ bɔtɔ shu ete. 6Onupɛ edzi asɛ ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛitũ ahɔ nɛitũ tsyɛ elo, ɛtɛ badzi awɔaga ɔmɔsɛ ɛbazã ɛlɛ abha zɛɖɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. Pɔ ɛzakà tũ mɛitelũ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà etì beɖi mɛ asɛ mɛinu anɔ gbagbla ɔdɛ ɔganà kɛgɛ ɛbhɛtɛ pɛ ɛɖɔ shu. 7Tɛ kibu mɛ oyinɔ denɔ ishu fefeke mɛ gɛ, nɛ ebui gɛ labhɛtɛ kibi alɛ gɛ bebu akasɛ mɛ so, balɔkɔ kiwú akpɛ mɛishuɔ mɛ, gɛenu Satana yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ sɛ tɛ̀, ahɔhɔlɛ mɛ. 8Bɔtɛ tɛtà mɛkɔ Apalete nɛtakpu sɛ tɛ ebu mɛ eyinɔ edenɔ kɛlɛ mɛ. 9Pɔ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Mɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ kpè kɔ wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ mɛ ohuminɔ ɔna denɔ tibobotsòɔ mɛ.” Klisoɔ ɛbatũ mɛitelũ tɔɖɔ nɛ̀ same nɛ mɛ tibobotsò nulũ, sɛ tɛ Kristo yɛohumi nɔ zã mɛabha. 10Kliso pɛ nɛ Kristo yɛtakpuɔ, ɛmɔ same nɛ tibobotsò mɛ, nɛ akwalatu mɛ, nɛ ebui gagalĩ mɛ, nɛ banɔede tɛtɔtɔnɔ mɛ nɛ̀ bɔtɔ mɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ibotsoɔ, ɛkɛlɛ mɛmɔ tɛgagalĩ.
Kɛgɛ Paulo Apɛ Akɔ Korintoanɛ
11Ɛdɔ bɔwɔaga, pɔ wɔnɔ gbana mɛɔkpɛ bɔlɛ tɛdɔdɔ mɛ. Tsyɛ alo kɛlɛ sɛ nɔɖɔ kibui gbangbã nɛ mɛishu flogo ɔmɔsɛ itinu agɔgɔɛ ɔkɔ “banɔkpɛkpɛ gɛ balɛ ɔzakɔ gbagbla” pɔ mɛxɔnɔ tinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà kɔ alɛ flogo. 12Kɛgɛ kɔ bamɔ anɔ ɔsɛ enu anɔ kpɛkpɛ yɛenu ebui bubukasɛ, ebui gɛ abhɛtɛ ibi nɛ̀ atsyindzye ebui alɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi nɛ kemikpɛkpɛ. 13Kɛlɛ nɔzã asɛ banɔ bhlui ɔkɔ ɔhaa bhlatɔ, gɛ idzi bɔtɔ kɔ wɔnɔ flogo nɔɔ dza? Nɔlɔkɔ kesitata alɛ tsye mɛ!
14Otsiɛ nɔ ɛbalɛ beke sɛ tɛ̀ ɛbaɖi wɔnɔ bɔtramɛ, kɛlɛ ɛtɛ badzi bɔtɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ gɛnɛ wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ nɔmɔ mɛpɛ, pɔ wɔnɔ mɛpɛ. Nɛ alɛ nyɔɔ edeɛ, gɛnɛ bunuvɔɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ beɖi balɛ elĩ nɛ̀ balɛ akaa alɛ nabha, pɔ beyi akaa nɛ̀ beyielĩ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ beɖi balɛ eyi alɛ abha. 15Klisoɔ ɛbalɔkɔ same zĩ kɛka nyia ka gɛlɛ mɛahɔɛ ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ mɛishu nɛ wɔnɔɛtakpu. Onupɛ ɛdɛmɛ wɔnɔɛbui tɔɖɔ, wɔnɔ xɔnɔ ɔbɔ dɛmɛ mɛibui bhlui dza? 16Asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ ana, itinu bɔtɔ kɔ wɔnɔ. Pɔ bɔshɛ mɛ anɔ mɛinu, kliso ivũ wɔnɔ nɛ mɛ bɔshɛ wɔawɔa mɛ! 17Idzyini wɔnɔkpɛ gana banyɛ teli gɛ ɛkpɛ nɛ wɔnɔkɔ mɛ dza? 18Ɛkpalà Tito sɛ tɛ aba wɔnɔkɔ, kɛlɛ ɛkpɛ ɔlɔ adzya plɛnɔ yɛ. Tito egidzyini wɔnɔ akpɛ, alo edzyini wɔnɔ akpɛɛ dza? Bɔgɛ bhɛtɛ ebui gana ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo abha pɛ bɔzã kibui tinikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ abha dza?
19Aabhɛtɛ wɔnɔ sɛ bɔpɛ asɛ tɛ bubu bɔlɔshu ulũ nɛ wɔnɔ amɛ dza? Bɔɔɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa amɛ asɛ banɔ gɛ akpasɛ Kristo mɛ ana, mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, kɛka nyia ka gɛ bɔbhɛtɛ, bɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩ. 20Ɔmɔsɛ kifù yimɛ sɛ onupɛ ɛba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, ɛtɛbà mɔ wɔnɔ asɛ kana gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ nɔzã, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔtɛbɔ mɔ mɛ asɛ kana gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛzã. Kifù yimɛ ɔsɛ ebelà pɛpɛ ebui, kabhãwawlakɛ ebui, ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ, ɔhakpa yaya, kaɖɔ kpa tɛɖɔɖɔ, banɔ shu tizizĩ, ishu fefeke nɛ̀ kawlɔ̃akɛ ebui ebeku wɔnɔ mɛ. 21Kifù yimɛ sɛ onupɛ ɛzɛba, mɛ Owusoso Akaa abakɔ mɛizhini mɛishu esi nɛ wɔnɔ amɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbàmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ denɔ banɔ gelee gɛ batɛ bhɛtɛ ebui kpa akpɛ otugbà pɛ begitsyina nɛ balɛ etúɔ mɛ odenɔ atsɔ̃bui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, ebui asɛ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ nɛ̀ bunu tibubuku ebui gɛ balɔkɔ balɛishu ashɔkpɛ mɛ.

Title: KORINTOANƐ 2 13
Content:
Titsetseɖenɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
1Kɛlɛ badzi bɔtramɛ gɛ ɛba wɔnɔ ɔbha. “Nɛ kibui ka nyia ka tɛyɛyɛkɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ banɔ taabha alo tata aɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ kɛlɛ shu flogo.” 2Ɛti tseɖe nɛ̀ wɔnɔ bafala nɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ bɔbhalà. Ɛka wlui ɖɔ ɛlɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛma wɔnɔ ɔbha. Onupɛ itsyina ba, ɛtɛba bi bagɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa bafala nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔgɔɛ tsyɛ ashagabui, 3gɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ oti kɛgbã sɛ Kristo aɖɔaɖɔ ɔgana mɛabha. Kristo egi botso nɛ kɛnanà bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ wɔnɔ, pɔ ohumi ɔlɛ yɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi. 4Tɛ kɛzã tititì mɛ, bakpalɛ yɛ nɛ butsi osi shu nɛ tibobotsò mɛ, pɔ alɛ nɛkpã nɛ Owusoso Akaa ohumi mɛ. Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha bɔlɔ tsyɛ bubotso nɛ yɛ mɛ, pɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ohumi mɛ bɔbàza plɛni tɛ bɔdɛ axɔ̃ɛ kɔ wɔnɔ.
5Nɔvɛ wɔnɔ ishumɛ oɖi sɛ nɔlɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ dza, nɔ ofeke wɔnɔ ishu oɖi. Nɔtɛɔ mɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ Yesu Kristo akpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ, pɛnɔsɛ nofeke wɔnɔ shu oɖi pɛ nɔmɔ ɔsɛ nɔgɛ naa dza? 6Kɛlɛ ɛyɛkɛ ŋã sɛ nɔmɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔŋã kabha nɛ tifefekeɖiɛ mɛ. 7Otsi nɔ bukulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ nɔtɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà. Gɛnɛ gɛ banɔ abamɔ̃ asɛ bɔŋã kabha nɛ tifefekeɖiɛ mɛ so, pɔ sɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kibui nɔnɔ gɛpɛ̃ onupɛ edzi asɛ bɔgɛ ŋã kabha tsyɛ. 8Ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛ balà bhɛtɛ kibui nanà gɛlɔ kititi nɛ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ shu, pɔ kɛgɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ ete. 9Same eku ɔlɔ gɛ onupɛ bubotsoɔ, pɔ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ ɔgagalĩ, kɛlɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu lɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ̃. 10Kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛma wɔnɔ ɔbha, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɛbaa, ɛtɛba lɔkɔ ɔsha tũ kibui kpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɔ, ɔsha gɛ Apaleteɛ akɔ mɛ asɛ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ bhɔ wɔnɔ wunɔ kabha nɔ, gɛnɛ tɛ ɛlɔkɔ ɔlɛ zhini wɔnɔ kpɛ kesi nɔ.
Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
11Otsi alɛ mɛ adzya alɛ, ɛshɛ mɔ̃ o. Nɔoɖi kɛgɛ bakɔ nɔbɔ pɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɔkɔ, nɔolũ mɛibuiɛ gɛ ibisi denɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, nɔzã ekpeɖekpeɖe tenikpo mɛ, nɔzã ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ alɛ ɔkɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ mɛɛ abazã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ.
12Nɔsɛnɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ ahɔɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ oli gɛ adalɛ. 13Kristoanɛ petee asɛnɛ ɔnɔ asɛsɛ.
14Tɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ, Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɛ̀ ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔzã ɔplɛnɔ ɔnɔ petee.

Title: GALATIANƐ OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Gɛ bakpà kibui gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ nɛ Yesu shu pɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ akpà ɛlɛ ɔyɛkɛɛ, ebui bibisi ebekoeyì nɛ Yudanɛ gɛ etsyina edzi Kristoanɔ ulũ, sɛ kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ Mose ɔsha nabha flogo tɛ edzi Kristoayɛ gbangbã. Paulo awlɔ̃akɛ kibui ɛlɛ asɛ kɛtɛ bàshɔ̃ ana, asɛ nɛ kibui gbã mɛɛ, kɛgɛ bapɛ ɔkɔ ɛkpã zazãna nɛ Kristo mɛ kɛlɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, gɛ ɛlɛ bakɔ sɛ tɛ anɔ anà nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. Pɔ nɛ Galatianɛ ɔhaa nɛishiɛ, banɔ teli ede ɛmadi bhlui nɛ Asia mɛ aba lɔɛtití nɛ Paulo shu pɛ baaɖɔ asɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ pɛ betsyina eku Kristo mɛɛ babhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ Yudanɛ ɔsha nabha flogo tɛ banà nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ.
Paulo afɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ akɔ Galatianɛ sɛ tɛ edzinì tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛinu kibui gbã manà bagɛ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ akakasɛ agbana alɛ tsrakɛ idzoɔ. Paulo akpa yɛishu ɛtakpu wlɔ̃akɛ ɔsɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ bekulu yɛasɛ Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ yɛenu. Aɖɔ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha asɛ yɛ tikukulu ɔsɛ tɛ ebedzi anɔkpɛkpɛ ide Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, gɛnɛ anɔ nanà yɛɔsha kɔkɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ pɔtìi bakpɛ yɛ. Kɛlɛ akpà kibui ɛlɛ ɔwlɔãkɛ ɔsɛ, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ete kɛlɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ banɔ anà nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, gɛnɛ ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ. Nɛ atakpu gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ, Paulo akasɛ asɛ Kristoanɛ ɛkpã zazãna lɛbà denɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɛ anɔ gɛide Kristo abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-10
Ɔsha gɛ bakɔ Paulo asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ ana 1.11—2.21
Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gibhui anɔ bu 3.1—4.31
Kristoanɛ ishuahɔɛmɛ zazã nɛ̀ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ sɛ babhɛtɛ 5.1—6.10
Ebuigɔgɔɔ6.11-18

Title: GALATIANƐ 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo, anɔkpɛkpɛ gɛ anɛ baanɔ alo anɔ yɛasɛsɛ mɛ, pɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, gɛ yɛefeke yɛ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ- 2nɛ̀ ɔhamɛ anunɔ petee gɛ alɛ mɛɔbhaa,
Bɔlɔ sɛsɛ keplukpa alɛ nɛ Galatia ɔha mɛ.
3Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ, 4anɔ gɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ bɔlɔ ibui kpa nɛtakpu, ɔsɛ tɛ ebu ɔlɔ odenɔ obo kanɔ alɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, nɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ gɛide Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa ɔkɔ, 5yɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ badalɛ yɛishu odenɔ tihɔɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ mɛ. Amen.
Kibui Gbangbã Nanà Bha Ma
6Kɛbhɛtɛ mɛibi ɔsɛ tsiɔ̃ ɔlɛ koɔ, nɔ vɛlɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛekulu ɔnɔ amana Kristo yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ mɛ shu olú, pɛ nɔ otsyina ɔvɛ ebui bhlatɔ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ shu, 7gɛ letinu kibui gbangbã kuraa. Kɛba wɔ̃ɛ ɔsɛ, banɔ teli balɛ eetsyina wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ baapɛ asɛ tɛ bezĩ Kristo yɛibui gbangbã. 8Pɔ onupɛ bɔlɔ, alo axɔ̃ɛdɛ teli gɛede owusoso nɔ mɛ abaɖɔ kibui gbangbã tili gɛ kɛgã ɔtɔ nɛ kɛgɛ bɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ shuɔ, kɛlɛ bebu anɔ alɛ ɛpɔ tihɔɔ! 9Asɛ gɛ bɔtɛ ɖɔ bafala nɔ anaa, ɛkaaɖɔ ɛlɛ otsiɛ tsyɛ ɔsɛ, Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ kibui gbangbã bhlatɔ tili nɛ kɛgɛ nɔtɛ yɛkɛ niedeɛ, kɛlɛ bebu anɔ alɛ ɛpɔ tihɔɔ!
10Banɔ mɛpɛ otsiɛ ɔsɛ baɖɔ atɔɖɔ mɛibuiɛ nabha pɛnɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa dza? Pɛnɔsɛ banɔ mɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛiku alɛ awɔ̃ dza? Onupɛ ɛka pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛiku banɔ awɔ̃ɔ, kɛlɛ ɛtɛ balà dzi axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ Kristo.
Owusoso Akaa Yɛekulu Paulo
11Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔotì ɔsɛ, kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ gɛ ɛɖɔɔ kitinu banɔdzyrame ebui fafatɛ. 12Ɛgɛ yɛkɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ ananà ɔkɔ, pɛ ebedzi asɛ bɔkasɛ bakasɛ mɛ ɛlɛ, pɔ ɛyɛkɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ kibui bubu kasɛ gɛide Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ mɛ.
13Ɔmɔsɛ nɔotilũ mɛ ɛkpãa gɛ ɛzã bafala nɔ nɛ Yudanɛ ɛkɔɔ tishushuɔ shu, kɛtɔnɔ gɛ ɛzɛ tɔnɔ ɔha niede gagalĩi pɛ ɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ mɛyɛ yɛɛ. 14Ɛzɛmɔ otugbà vɛvɛ nɛ Yudanɛ ɛkɔ mɛ ɔdɛ Yudanɛ gelee gɛ bɔnɛ alɛ kpasɛ agɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛzã mɛakaa alɛ ɛkɔɔ tishushu ebuiɛ nabha gagalĩi. 15Pɔ Owusoso Akaa anɔ gɛ yɛebu mɛ elu flogo pɛ baba mɔ mɛ, pɛ yɛekulu mɛ akpɛ yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ mɛɛ, same ebekui 16ɔsɛ tɛ ebu Yɛeyi Anyɛɛ akasɛ ɔgana mɛabha, tɛ mɛdɛ ɖɔ yɛibuiɛ nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ nɛishi, ɛgɛ yɛkɛ kibuititì odenɔ ananà ɔkɔ, 17kɛlɛ igi wu ɔvɛ Yerusalem tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛdɛ mɔ bagɛ eputɔ edzi banɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ mɛ, pɔ tsiɔ̃ ɔlɛ ɛshɛ vɛ Arabia kɛlɛ kidegbaa izitsyina ba Damasko.
18Kɛlɛ nɛ agɔ tata edeɛ, ɛbawù ɔvɛ Yerusalem ɔsɛ tɛ mɛ nɛ Petro butì bagɔlɔ, kɛlɛ ɛzã yɛɔbha ewui lɔfɔ nɛ̀ teti. 19Ɛgɛ mɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ alɛ mɛ anɔ nanà—ɔdɛ Yakobo ete, gɛenu Apaleteɛ yɛadzya. 20Ɛtɔɖɔ kɛklagbu nɛ̀ ɛlɛ abha kɔ ɔnɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ ɔsɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ ɔnɔ, tinu kɛsɛnɛ ibui. 21Kidegbaa, ɛfala ɛdɛ Siria nɛ̀ Kilikia tsyɛ. 22Ɔhaa gɛ ɔzã Kristo mɛ nɛ Yudea nɔ egitì mɛ. 23Bulũ bhui bhui ɛlɛ ete belũ nɛ mɛishu asɛ, “Anyɛ gɛ aza atɔnɔ bɔlɔ ede abafala nɔɔ, otsi alɛ xɔnɔ yɛtsyɛ aɖɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibuiɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ ayɛɛ afalanɔ flogo.” 24Kɛlɛ bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití nɛ mɛtakpu.

Title: GALATIANƐ 2
Content:
Banɔkpɛkpɛ Ayɛkɛ Paulo
1Nɛ agɔ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ talɛ edeɛ, iziwu ɔvɛ Yerusalem, otsi alɛ xɔnɔ mɛ nɛ Barnaba. Ɛgbana Tito tsyɛ plɛnɔ mɛishu ɔvɛnɔ. 2Ɛdɛ ɛkɛlɛ nɛ kibui bubu kasɛ tili shu, kɛlɛ ɛɖɔ kibui gbangbã gɛitseɖe bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ tseɖe alɛ. Pɔ ɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ̀ ete ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ otugbà ɔkɔ banunɔ, nɛ kifu sisí mɛ ɔsɛ ɛzɛdɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ alo ɛkaadɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ kpɛ ɛlɛɛ mɛ. 3Pɔ Tito gɛedzi Helanɔ pɛ azã mɛɔbha tsyɛ elo, ananà agɛ tɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔɛ. 4Kibui ɛlɛ bayì ɔmɔsɛ asɛnɛ badzya teli aba afala eku bɔlɔ ɛzãkɔɔ tɛ belu awɔ̃ eɖi ɔlɔ ishuahɔɛmɛ zazã gɛ lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ, tɛ̀ betsyina ɔlɔ budzì banɔ dzidzi. 5Bɔgɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ bɔlɔ shu kɔ alɛ nɛ kibe nanà mɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ kibui gbangbã gɛlɛ kibui gbã shuɔ zã ɔnɔ ɔkɔ.
6Bagɛ awɔ̃ɛ anɔ asɛ ɛzãkɔ lɛ balɛ ahɔɛ xɔnɔɔ, kɛka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ benu tsyɛ elo, kitinu kibui gɛ gã ɔtɔ ɔkɔ mɛ, Owusoso Akaa etiekulù kebhu nɛ kana gɛ bɔmɔ anɔ shu, banɔ alɛ agɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà ɔplɛnɔ mɛ ibuiɛ. 7Nɛ kidzo bhlatɔ abhaa tsyɛ, bamɔ asɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛdɛ ɖɔ kibui gbangbã tseɖe bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Petro tsyɛ adɛ Yudanɛ ɔkɔ ana. 8Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔplɛnɔ Petro asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Yudanɛ anaa, yɛawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ mɛ tsyɛ asɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ. 9Yakobo, Petro nɛ̀ Yohanes gɛenu kibuiɛ kɛlɛ bubhi kashàa, bakɔ mɛ nɛ̀ Barnaba ahɔɛ ɔkɔ kɛdzyà bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bamɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ bakɔ mɛ. Badɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha asɛ tɛ̀ bɔvɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ɔkɔ, tɛ balɛ tsyɛ avɛ Yudanɛ ɔkɔ. 10Kɛgɛ bebisi odenɔ bɔlɔkɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ bɔzã ɛlɛ abha tɛ bɔzɛ bakà betsyuitsyuiɛ tsyɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ ɛlɛ mɛpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ.
Paulo Agɛ Dɛmɛ Atɔɖɔ Petro Ibui Bhɛbhɛtɛ Abha
11Kibeɛ gɛ Petro aba Antioxia nɔ, mɛ Paulo ɛgɛ dɛmɛ tɔɖɔ yɛebui bhɛbhɛtɛ abha nɛ yamɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ata esi. 12Flogo tɛ banyɛ teli ebede Yakobo ɔkɔ abaa, azaŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ. Pɔ gɛ bebekuɔ, akpà kide yi pɛ ebu yɛishu ɔtɔ nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ kifu ziyi yɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ azã kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui kɛzaa mɛ. 13Yudanɛ bhlatɔ tsyɛ azã yiede nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu, kɛlɛ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ bagbana Barnaba tsyɛ atsrakɛ idzo.
14Kibeɛ gɛ ɛmɔsɛ batɛ agã nɛ kibui gbangbã gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nabhaa, itseɖe Petro nɛ balɛ nyɔ̃ɔ amɛ ɔsɛ, “Yudaeyi wɔonu, pɔ odzi nɛ̀ ɛkpã asɛ anɔ gɛetinu Yudaeyi, wɔɛkpã ma asɛ Yudaeyi ana. Kiɖe so pɛ otũ ɛlɛ ɔkpɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ulũ xɔnɔ ɔsɛ beze shu Yudanɛ ɛkɔ dza?
15“Bɔlɔ gɛinù Yudaeyi mɔmɔ, gɛ butidzi asɛ ‘Bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ gɛ balɔkɔ alɛ asɛ ebui kpa babhɛtɛ eleteɛ’ 16bunyi ɔsɛ beti bhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ anɔ nɛ yɛ ɔsha abha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu, pɔ ɔganà tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Yesu Kristo abha mɛ. Klisoɔ, bɔlɔ tsyɛ lɔkɔ bɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kpɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Kristo abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, gɛnɛ nɛ ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu so, ɔmɔsɛ ganà ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, betibe bhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ anɔ nanà.
17“Onupɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Kristoɔ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete bunu. Pɔ kɛlɛ esi nu ɔsɛ Kristo atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ebui kpa tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ abha dza? Gɛnɛ ana! 18Onupɛ idzini kɛgɛ izĩɛ woeseɛ, kɛlɛ ɛkasɛ ishu ɔsɛ anɔ gɛ atɛ bhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ ɔsha abha mɛinu. 19Ɔmɔsɛ gana ɔsha nabha, itsí nɛ ɔsha shu, ɔsɛ tɛ mɛ zanà ɛkpã ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. 20Bakpalà mɛ ɔplɛnɔ Kristo nɛ butsi osiɛ shu kɛlɛ gɛnɛ mɛ kalɛ nɛkpã, pɔ Kristoɔ yɛakpasɛ mɛ mɛ̀. Ɛkpã gɛ ɛlɛ mɛidzinɔ nɛ ishudzya mɛɛ, idzi nɛ ɛlɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyianyɛ mɛ, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ mɛibui pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ mɛtakpu. 21Ɛgɛ lɔkɔ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ lu ɛwɔ̃a, ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ babàmɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ɔgana ɔshaa mɛɛ, kɛlɛ Kristoɔ etsí bɔwɔ̃a kua!”

Title: GALATIANƐ 3
Content:
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Pɛnɔsɛ Ɔsha Nabha Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ
1Wɔnɔ Galatianɛ awɔaga! Afana gɛ atã ɔnɔ nɛ̀ ohui ana dza? Nɛ wɔnɔ amɛɛ, nɔmɔ piapii ɔsɛ bakpalà Yesu Kristo nɛ butsi osiɛ shu. 2Ɛba pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ mɛ ɛkpasɛ kibui tinikpo odenɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ nɔyɛkɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, pɛnɔsɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ kɛgɛ nɔolũ nabha soɔ dza? 3Bawɔaga nɔonu ana dza? Gɛ nɔkpɛ esi nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ bekeɛ pɔ, otsi nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔmɔ kɛgɛ nɔpɛ nɔ ɔgana anɔdzyrame ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ dza? 4Bɔwɔã tɔ nɔtɔ̀ ɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ nanà mamɔ mamɔ dza, gɛ onupɛ kɛgbã kinu ɔsɛ bɔtɔ ɔlɛ ma kɔ kɛdɔ̃ nanà dza? 5Pɔ bɔlɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ akɔ ɔnɔ pɛ abhɛtɛ yɛ atsyindzye ebui nɛ ɔnɔ ɛshi nɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɔshaa nabha so, pɛnɔsɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ kɛgɛ nolũ nabha ɔŋã soɔ dza?
6Nɔolu awɔ̃ oɖi Abraham, “Ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋã, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ nɛishu asɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ kinu.” 7Nɔolũ ɛlɛ esi ɔsɛ, bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã enu Abraham yɛeyi alɛ. 8Kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ tɛmɔ putɔ nɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa ebe bhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ odenɔ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, kɛlɛ eputɔ akɔ Abraham etì kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ elu ɔsɛ, “Gana wɔabha, bebe yulà akɔ amadiɛ petee.” 9Klisoɔ beyulà akɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã aplɛnɔ Abrahamuɔ, anyɛ gɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ yɛahɔɛ.
