10Bagɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ ɔsha nabha tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ xɔnɔ, baɖɔ kibui akpɛ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Baɖɔ kibui akpɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ agɛ zã ɛlɛ abha abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bafɔnɔ akpɛ ɔsha keplukpa mɛ.” 11Kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔsɛ bagɛ lɔkɔ ɔsha ebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ananà nɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, ɔmɔsɛ, “Bagɛ enu ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.” 12Ɔshaa ɔgɛ kpà plɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa, nɛidzo bhlatɔ tsyɛ abhaa, “Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui alɛ nɛidiɛ abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɛlɛ shu.” 13Kristo ebu ɔlɔ odenɔ kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ akpɛ ɔlɔ ɔsha niesi, kɛlɛ yɛebedzi kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ akpɛ ɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Baɖɔ kibui akpɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ akpɛ ohui oli nɛ busi mɛ.” 14Ebu ɔlɔ ɔsɛ tɛ tiyuyula gɛ balɔkɔ akɔ Abrahamuɔ ba bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ ɔkɔ ɔgana Kristo Yesu abha, ɔsɛ tɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, bɔba yɛkɛ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tɔɖɔ lu kɔ ɔlɔ.
Ɔshaa Nɛ̀ Kɛgɛ Batɔɖɔ Eluɔ
15Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔkɔ mɛɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ lɔkɔ shɔnɔ kiwui nyia wui ɛkpã zazãna shu. Asɛ kana gɛ ananà atɛ balà ebu, alo pɛ abalà lɔkɔ kɛdɔ̃ nanà aplɛnɔ anɔdzyrame olugbũ nyanyã nɔnɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ akɔɛ nɔ, kana ibe kɛlɛ nɛ kibui ɛlɛ tsyɛ mɛ. 16Baɖɔ ebuiɛ gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ etseɖe Abraham nɛ̀ yɛeshui alɛ. Kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ gɛɖɔ ɔsɛ “ɔkɔ wɔ beshui alɛ” gɛ kɛlɛ esi kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ banɔ kpekpèɛ, pɔ kɛɖɔsɛ, “nɛ̀ wɔ eshui nɔ,” gɛ kɛlɛ esi ɔsɛ enu anɔ tenikpo, gɛenu Kristoɔ. 17Kibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔɔ niesi nɛ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, Ɔshaa, gɛ bakpɛ elu asɛ agɔ akpã talɛ nɛ̀ afɛata nɛ alɛ (430), logibu olugbũ nyanyã gɛ Owusoso Akaa eputɔ anyã elu ɔtɔ ɔsɛ tɛ ebu kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ atɛ́ɛ. 18Onupɛ ganà ɔshaa mɛ babà yɛkɛ kaŋãsiɛ alɛ, kɛlɛ kɛtɛ kanu ɔsɛ kɛgã tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lu mɛ, pɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ ulũɔ, alɔkɔ ɔsha akɔ Abraham ganà tɛtɔtɔɖɔ luɔ mɛ. 19Kiɖuwoe shu so pɛ ɔshaa ɔlɛ otsiɛ dza? Bakɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ aplɛnɔ nɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu so, odiyinɔ sɛ Eshui nɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ ebui alɛ elu akɔ abekoeyì. Agɛ yɛevũ iboe alɔkɔ ɔsha kpɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ ɔgana baxɔ̃ɛdɛ nabha. 20Anɔ gɛevũ iboe, atɛzã akɔ kawɔ̃pɛ tienikpo, pɔ Owusoso Akaa alɛ tenikpo.
21Ɔshaa pɔ, bafɔnɔ ɔlɛ alɔkɔ alɔɛtití nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛibuiɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ shu dza? Gɛnɛ kana kɛlɛ! Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ bakpɛ ɔsha toli olu gɛ lobo tsyina banɔ ɛkpãa, kɛlɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ tade koeyi nɛ ɔshaa mɛ xɔ̃ɔ. 22Kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ mɛ dalɛ ɔsɛ, kanɔ nɔ̀ petee alɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ohumi esi, ɔsɛ tɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ luɔ gɛ kpa plɛnɔ Yesu Kristo abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, dzì bagɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha ŋã nɛdɔ̃.
23Flogo pɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɛlɛ babaa, ɔshaa nyanà ɔlɔ ovunɔ asɛ ɔɖavũmɛ azazã ana, lɔnya bɔlɔ olú ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ bebu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã akasɛ. 24Klisoɔ bakpɛ ɔshaa elu asɛ tɛ lɔgbana ɔlɔ ɔvɛnɔ Kristo ɔkɔ, ɔsɛ tɛ balɔkɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ɔlɔ nɔ. 25Otsiɛ alɛ gɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã bakoeyiɛ, bɔbha ma ɔshaa ɔlɛ anɔ abha ɖiɖi esi.
Bagɛ Enu Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi Alɛ
26Beyì wɔnɔ petee onu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ ɛlɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ, 27ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ agɛ bakpɛ ulĩ akɔ petee nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ, nɔkpɛ akpɛkpɛ akɔ ishu ɔplɛnɔ Kristo. 28Yudaeyi alo Helaeyi nanà abha ma, anɔ dzidzi alo anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ, anyɛ alo adzɛ abha ma, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ petee odzi tenikpo nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ. 29Onupɛ onu Kristo ayɛ, kɛlɛ onu Abraham yɛeshui, nɛ̀ kaŋãsi elete nɛ kɛgɛ batɔɖɔ elu nulũ.

Title: GALATIANƐ 4
Content:
1Kibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, gɛ agɛ abaŋã kaŋãsiɛ ekenu anuvɔɔ soɔ, agɛ gã ɔtɔ nɛ anɔ dzidzi shu, gɛ bevũɔ petee pɔ enu yiayɛ flogo. 2Akpasɛ bagɛ anyɔ̃nìi nɛ̀ bagɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ kpasɛ alɛ ahɔɛ mɛ niesi, odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ yɛakaa atɔɖɔ eluɔ kɔɛ. 3Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ budzi bunuvɔɛ nɔ, budzi banɔ dzidzi gɛ bɔzã ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ ebui tɔtɔɖɔ gɛazã kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ niesi. 4Pɔ gɛ kibeɛ petee bana nɔ, Owusoso Akaa akpɛ yɛeyianyɛ, gɛ anɔdzɛ yɛamɔ yɛ, gɛ bamɔ yɛ nɛ ɔsha niesi, 5asɛ tɛ ebu bagɛ akpasɛ ɔshaa niesi, tɛ bɔyɛkɛ kɛgɛ lɛ ɔkɔ beyì anyɛ. 6Gɛ beyì anyɛ nonu soɔ, Owusoso Akaa asɛsɛ Yɛeyianyɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ nɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ okulu bɔdɔ̃ ɔsɛ, “Mɛakaa.” 7Klisoɔ, oti konu anɔ dzidzi, pɔ eyì anyɛ wɔonu, kɛlɛ gɛ eyì anyɛ wɔonu soɔ, Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ wɔ tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ odzì kaŋãsi elete.
Kɛgɛ Paulo Alɔkɔ Nɛ Ɛlɛ Mɛ Akɔ Galatianɛ
8Kibeɛ gɛ bafala, pɛ nɔogitì Owusoso Akaa, nɔodzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ tuli gɛinu ibudì. 9Pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ gɛ nɔonyi Owusoso Akaa, alo gɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ enyi ɔnɔ soɔ, kiɖe so pɛ nozo otsyina ɔvɛ ebuiɛ gɛ ama kɛnanà mɛ pɛ leku ashagabuiɛ shuɔ dza? Nɔkɔ pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nowlui odzi banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ alɛ dza? 10Nɔ olu awɔ̃ oɖi ewuiɛ nɛ̀ bewoele nɔ, kibeɛ nɛ̀ agɔɔ gɛetsyina xɔɔ! 11Isi ifu kɔ ɔnɔ, ɔsɛ ɔdɛ tsyɛ izĩ mɛibe nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu.
12Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛkɔ ɔnɔ ɛtakpu ɔsɛ, nɔzã asɛ mɛ ana, ɔmɔsɛ ɛtɛzã asɛ wɔnɔ oɖi. Nɔgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà mana mɛ ɔkɔ. 13Asɛ gɛ nɔonyi ana, bɔnyã bɔlɛkɔ so pɛ iputɔ ɖɔ kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ tseɖe ɔnɔ. 14Gɛ mɛ bɔnyã dɔdɔ dzì tifefekeɖi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ elo, ɛgɛ iku wɔnɔ ɛnyɛnyɛ̃. Pɔ, nɔyɛkɛ mɛ asɛ onupɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ mɛinu dza, asɛ gɛ onupɛ mɛinu Kristo Yesuɔ dza. 15Kiɖuwoe gɛ ba nɛ wɔnɔ same mɔmɔ petee abha dza? Ɛba là dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ nɔbhɛtɛ anaa tsyɛ alo, nɔtɔ obù ɔnɔ awuhũɔ ɔlɔkɔ kɔ mɛ. 16Otsi alɛ idzì anɔ gɛ atɛa dɛmɛ wɔnɔ ibui so pɛ itseɖe ɔnɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ dza?
17Banɔ alɛ apɛɛ gagalĩi asɛ tɛ baŋã wɔnɔ abha, pɔ gɛnɛ kɔ kibui gbangbã nanà so. Kɛgɛ bapɛ kilɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ bebu wɔnɔ ɔtɔ nɛ ɔlɔ shu, ɔsɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩi ɔplɛnɔ alɛ. 18Kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩi, gɛ onupɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ nɔtɔɖɔ pɛ̃, kɛlɛ nɔzã ɛlɛ abha ana kiwui nyia wui, gɛnɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛlɛ ɔnɔ bha ete. 19Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, gɛ wɔnɔ shu so pɛ ɛya ɛlɛ katã mɛ odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ Kristo afala eku wɔnɔ mɛ flogo, 20tsyɛ alo ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛzã ɔnɔ ɔbha otsiɛ tɛ mɛitsyina mɛebui ɖɔɖɔ flogo, ɔmɔsɛ mɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ aka dɔ nɛ wɔnɔ shu!
Hagar Nɛ̀ Sara
21Nɔotseɖe mɛ, wɔnɔ bagɛ ɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔzã ɔsha niesi, pɔ nɔotinyi kɛgɛ ɔshaa ɔɖɔɔ dza? 22Ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, beyianyɛ taabha azã Abraham ahɔɛ, adzɛ dzidziɛ amɔ̃ tenikpo, kɛlɛ adzɛ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ tsyɛ amɔ̃ tenikpo. 23Bamɔ̃ yɛeyianyɛ gɛ ede ekoeyi nɛ adzɛ dzidziɛ mɛ, asɛ gɛ bamɔ anɔ ana, pɔ yɛeyianyɛ gɛ ede ekoeyi nɛ adzɛ gɛ azã yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ xɔnɔɔ, bamɔɛ nɛ kibui gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ shu. 24Babà lɔkɔ ebui alɛ asɛ bubuti ebui ɖɔɖɔ, ɔmɔsɛ badzɛ taabha azã olugbũnyanyã tɛbha ulũ. Olugbũ nyanyã tonikpo ode Sinai Ketukpɔ nabha kɛlɛ lɔ mɔ beyiɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bedzi banɔ dzidzi. Hagar nɛ alɛ. 25Otsiɛ nɔ, Hagar ashɔnɔ Sinai Ketukpɔ nɛ Arabia gɛ abhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ obo ɔma gbagbla Yerusalem, ɔmɔsɛ yɛ nɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ edzì banɔ dzidzi. 26Pɔ Yerusalem ɔma gɛɔlɛ kititíɛ xɔnɔ ɔlɛ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ yɛenu bɔlɔ elĩɛ. 27Ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ,
“Mɔ same, O adzɛ gɛ ɔtɛ ɔmɔ eyi,
adzɛ gɛ atɛ ɔmɔ beyi nanà,
lɔ tsiɔ tɛ ɔkpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ,
wɔ gɛ ɛya katã wɔ oɖi,
ɔmɔsɛ adzɛ gɛ yɛishu bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ yɛeyi alɛ ekpè
ɔdɛ adzɛ gɛ anyɛ alɛ yɛahɔɛ.”
28Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, otsiɛ nɔ, asɛ Isak ana, nɔonu beyi gɛ batɔɖɔ kibui elu akɔ. 29Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ, eyianyɛ gɛ bamɔ asɛ gɛ bamɔ̃ kanɔ mɛ anɔ ana, atɔnɔ eyianyɛ gɛ bamɔ edenɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ ohumi mɛ niede. Kana kidzi otsiɛ tsyɛ. 30Pɔ kiɖuwoe Kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ luɔ ɖɔ dza? “Kakà adzɛ dzidziɛ nɛ̀ yɛeyianyɛ oyinɔ, ɔmɔsɛ adzɛ zidziɛ yɛeyianyɛ atɛ ba mɔ ɔŋãkɔ nɛ kaŋãsiɛ mɛ ɔplɛnɔ adzɛ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ yɛeyianyɛ eɖi.” 31Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, butinu beyi ɔkɔ adzɛ dzidziɛ, pɔ bunu beyianyɛ ɔkɔ adzɛ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ.

Title: GALATIANƐ 5
Content:
Ishu Ahɔɛmɛ Zazã Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
1Ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã shu so pɛ Kristo akɔ ɔlɔ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã. Kliso nɔzã gagalĩi, kɛlɛ nɔtɛ ɔkɔ kɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ zã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ banɔ dzidzi ɛkɔɔ shu.
2Nɔ olu awɔ̃ nɛ̀ mɛebuiɛ! Mɛ, Paulo, itseɖe ɔnɔ sɛ onupɛ nɔkɔ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔɔ, Kristo ezeke edzi kɛdɔ̃ nanà akɔ ɔnɔ kuraa. 3Iwlui ka dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ anyɛ ka nyia ka gɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ asɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔshaa petee abha. 4Wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ balɔkɔ ɔshaa bhui bɔtsyɔa akɔ ɔnɔ ɔnɔɔ, nobu ishu ɔtɔ nɛ Kristoɔ shu, nɔshɛ nɛ ɔnɔ tibhui huibuɔ niede. 5Pɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, budzi ipo tɛzazã piapi nɔ gɛ buɖi kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ gagalĩ. 6Ɔmɔsɛ nɛ Kristoɔ Yesu mɛɛ, kɛnanà ma kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui alo kɛhɔ̃a mabhui mabhui mɛ. Kɛgɛ ɛlɛ sɛ beɖiɛ kɛlɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛibu ishu kasɛ ɔgana tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.
7Nɔzɔ̀ dɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã. Pɔ afana gɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ nɛ wɔnɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔ otolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ dza? 8Bulũ wɔɛwɔɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi gɛide agɛ yɛekulu ɔnɔ ɔkɔ. 9“Kɛdɔ̃ɛyi bhlui nɔ gɛ nyanyã ɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ kɔ pɛ mɔwɔɛ nɔ petee anyanyã.” 10Ilù awɔ̃ nɛ Apalete nabha sɛ nɔtɛ bɔmɔ kibui ɛlɛ ɔgana kidzo bhlatɔ abha. Anunɔ gɛ etsyinà ɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ, aba buia ɛlɛ shu ɛbhɛ, anunɔ ɛdi gɛ yɛenu tsyɛɛ o. 11Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ itsiɖi ɛlɛ abha ɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ shuɔ pɔ, kiɖeso pɛ baka atɔnɔ miede? Nɛ Kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, kibui kpa gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shuɔ batsà odì akpɛ ɛlɛ mɛ. 12Nɛ banɔ alɛ gɛ beetũ ebuiɛ kpɛ shu xɔnɔɔ, ɛta pɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ balɛ xɔnɔ agã kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ̀ badɛ tsaɖà balɛishu flogo!
13Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, bekulu ɔnɔ asɛ nɔzã ishu ahɔɛ mɛ. Pɔ nɔtɛ lɔkɔ ɔnɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazãa lɔkɔ ɔgana kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, pɔ nɔplɛnɔ agɔlɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. 14Bebhui ɔshaa petee gulũi nɛ̀ ɔsha kɔkɔ tonikpo ɔlɛ ɔsɛ, “Dɛmɛ nɛ wɔhagbo asɛ gɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɛ wɔshu ana.” 15Onupɛ nɔ onemì agɔlɔ asɛ tɛ̀ novũ agɔlɔ mɛnɔ ana, nɔoɖi piapii onu gɛnɛ ana, noboyì agɔlɔ.
Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Nulũ
16Kliso ɛɖɔ sɛ, nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nulũ, kɛlɛ nɔzɔkɔ kpɛ same nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ebui kpa tɛpɛpɛ nɔ shu. 17Ɔmɔsɛ kɛgɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa adɛmɛ nɔ agã ɔtɔ nɛ agɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ shu, kɛlɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ tsyɛ ɔgã ɔtɔ nɛ kɛgɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui kpa adɛmɛ nɔ. Balɔɛtití nɛ bagɔlɔ shu, sɛ tɛ ɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ɔpɛɛ nɔ. 18Pɔ onupɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɔ gbanà wɔɔ, ɔma ɔshaa niesi.
19Ebuiɛ gɛ akpà ɔplɛnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ edzoɔ awɔ̃ɛ asɛ, ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ, atsɔ̃bui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa tɛŋaŋã, 20ibudi ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ banɔ tatã, anɔ nyanyana kpɛ ɛyamɛ, ebela pɛpɛɛ, kiwuhũ dzadzã, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ kpɛkpɛ, mɛ ɛyɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ̃, kibui esi malũ malu, kititì lɔlɔ nɛ agɔlɔ shu 21nɛ̀ kawɔ̃kpɛ, bunù tibubuku, edzo kpa ede tɛtɔtɔnɔ, nɛ agɛ dzi asɛ alɛ nɛidi. Ɛkpɛ ɔnɔ ɔsha, asɛ gɛ ɛtɛ kpɛ bafala nɔ ɔsɛ, banɔ gɛ edzi nɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ batɛ bavɛ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ŋaŋãa mɛ.
22Pɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ eyuyuɔ yɛenu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, same mɔmɔ, ishu yɔyɔ, tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, kibui gbã tɛɖɔɖɔ, 23ishu nyanyãnà, nɛ̀ ishu abha tɛŋaŋã. Ɔsha nanà ɔgɛnyã ebui alɛ nɛidi. 24Bagɛ enu Kristo Yesu ayɛ xɔnɔ, bakpalà balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ badɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ bapɛ nɔ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu. 25Gɛ budzi nɛ ɛkpã nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔgã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. 26Nɔtɛ kɔ buzi feke ɔlɔ ishu, tɛ bɔzɛ kpɛ bagɔlɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃.

Title: GALATIANƐ 6
Content:
Kibui Gbangbã Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ Ɔkɔ Aka nyia aka
1Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ bevũ anɔ teli nɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, wɔnɔ bagɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ kpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛɛ, nɔohu buluhũ ɔkɔɛ nɛ kidzo gbangbã abha tɛ etsyina aba. Pɔ noɔlu awɔ̃ nɛishu, ɔsɛ tɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔtɛmɔ̃ tifefekeɖi ɛlɛ. 2Nɔplɛnɔ agɔlɔ nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, nɔbɔ bhɛtɛ ɔtɔɖɔ Kristo yɛɔshaa nabha. 3Onupɛ anɔ teli eɖi asɛ enu kɛdɔ̃ tili pɔ ama kɛnanà mɛɛ, ishu yɛawɔɛ. 4Anɔ ka nyia ka elu awɔ̃ eɖi yɛebui bhɛbhɛtɛ. Kɛlɛ abalà etũ yɛahɔɛ itelũ, gɛ atɛbà lɔkɔ yɛishu ashɔnɔ anɔ nanà, 5ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ ka nyia ka alɔkɔ yɛɔtɔ etuku.
6Anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ edenɔ Akaa nɛibuiɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ yɛ tsyɛ akɔ yɛadɔkasɛ amɔ ebui gbangbã edenɔ yɛɔkɔ.
7Nɔtɛkɔ bawɔɛ ɔnɔ, ananà atɛba là akpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɔga. Kɛgɛ anɔ aɖaa, kɛlɛ yɛebe edzyinì. 8Anunɔ gɛ aɖa bɔdɔ̃ sɛ tɛ eku yɛebui kpa gɛ abhɛtɛ nawɔ̃ɔ, denɔ kibui kpa ɛlɛ mɛɛ, ebedzyinì butsí, anunɔ gɛ aɖa bɔdɔ̃ sɛ tɛ eku Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ awɔ̃ɔ xɔnɔɔ, denɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛɛ, abamɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ. 9Kliso nɔtɛ kɔ bubotsò nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ kibè lɛ ɛbà gɛ bɔbà pɔ̃ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ onupɛ bɔgɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shuɔ. 10Kliso, gɛ kibè lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã kɔ anɔ ka nyia ka, asɛ bagɛ ede bayɛyɛkɛŋã eshopo mɛ ana.
Gɛnɛ Kɛhɔ̃a Bhuibhui Pɔ Ebui Vɔvɔ Gɛ Babhɛbhɛtɛ
11Nɔoɖi bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ gbagbla ɛlɛ nɛidi gɛ ɛlɔkɔ fɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ ɔlɛ kɔ ɔnɔ nɛ mɛahɔɛ!
12Bagɛ eetũ ɛlɛ akpɛ ɔnɔ ulũ sɛ tɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ, benu bagɛ akasɛ ishu pɛ beetũ itelũ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui shu. Babhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ batɛkɔ batɔnɔ alɛ ede nɛ Kristo butsi osiɛ nɛtakpu. 13Bagɛ bebhui ahɔ̃a akɔ alɛ tsyɛ elo, batɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔshaa nabha, pɔ bapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ̀ betũ itelũ nɛ ɔnɔ ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ kɔ alɛ sɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ shu.
14Kɛnanà tɛkɔ mɛitũ mɛitelũ ɖi, ɔdɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛ butsi osiɛ shu ibui ete, gɛ ɔgana yɛabhaa bakpalà kanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu akɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ mɛtsyɛ kɔ kanɔ nɔ̀. 15Kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui nɛ̀ kɛhɔ̃a mabhui mabhui tinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà, kɛgɛ pɛɔdɛ kɛlɛinu ebui vɔvɔɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ. 16Ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ ashagabui ɖiɖi ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ idzo vɔvɔ ɛlɛ niedeɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ Israelanɛ gɛenu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ tsyɛ azã ɔsha ɔlɛ niesi.
17Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ ɔkɔ anɔ nanà akpɛ mɛ bɔtɔ, ɔmɔsɛ apɔ̃biɛ gɛ alɛ mɛishu akasɛ ɔsɛ inu Yesu ayɛ. 18Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ ɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. Amen.

Title: EFESOANƐ OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Paulo eplukpa gɛ afɔnɔ asɛsɛ Efesoanɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ “Owusoso Akaa ebui tɔtɔɖɔ shu sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ kititiɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa nabha akpɛ itsù tɛ kɛtakpu tinikpo zã alɛ ulũ, gɛenu Kristoɔ.” (1.10) Kinu kibui bibisi ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa pɛ bazãnà ɛkpã nɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ hohoe ɔkɔ banɔdzyrameɛ petee tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha.
Nɛ Efesoanɛ eplukpa kawɔ̃pɛ gɛiputɔ, adɔfɔnɔ afɔnɔ yɛibui nɛtakpuɔ ɔkɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ pɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛ ɛlɛ abha Owusoso Akaa agã pɛ ebu yɛanɔ nɔ̀, kana gɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ebui kpa etsye pɛ bakɔ alɛ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã ɔgana Yesu Kristo gɛenu Eyianyɛ nabha, nɛ kana gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔtɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ aɖɔ eluɔ nabha. Nɛ kawɔ̃pɛ bhalà mɛɛ, ebisi edenɔ bagɛ aba kalà keplukpa ahɔɛ mɛ asɛ bazãnà ɛkpã nɛidzo nabha gɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ alɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ badzi kibui gbã nɛ alɛ ɛkpã zazãna itsù mɛ.
Baɖɔ ebuikpekpè teli nɛ buluhũ sheshè mɛ tɛ balɔkɔ akasɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ lakpasɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ɔplɛnɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ Kristoɔ, ɔhaa edzi asɛ ishudzya ana, pɛ Kristo yɛenu ɔlɛ takpuɔ, alo asɛ buvũ ana, pɛ Kristo yɛenu bɔlɛ idekrekpu ɛklagbuɔ, alo asɛ adzɛ ana, pɛ Kristo yɛenu yɛenyine. Keplukpa alɛ aɖɔaɖɔ ebu ebui hohoe mɛ ɔmɔsɛ ebui alɛ, alɛ gbanà adɔfɔ̃nɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ avɛnɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ Kristo mɛ. Bamɔ kɛka nyia ka nɛ Kristo yɛifuɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ tsye, ebui tɛlɔlɔkɔ tsye anɔ, tibhui bhuibu, nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibui1.1-2
Kristo nɛ̀ ɔhaa1.3—3.21
Ɛkpã vɔvɔ gɛ kpasɛ Kristoɔ mɛ4.1—6.20
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ6.21-24

Title: EFESOANƐ 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo gɛedzi anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Kristo Yesuɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ,
Mɛ sɛsɛ̀ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã nɛ Efeso pɛ bakpasɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ keplukpa alɛ,
2Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ.
Ɔfɔfuĩa Mɛ Tiyuyula Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
3Nɔkɔ bɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo Yɛakaa nɛinye nɛitití, anɔ gɛ alɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ tiyuyula ka nyia ɛdi gɛ kpasɛ Kristo mɛ eyula akɔ ɔlɔ odenɔ kititiɛ. 4Ɔmɔsɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ sɛ bɔzã yɛ mɛ, flogo pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ aba kpɛ esi, tɛ bɔlɔ shu dalɛ tɛ batɛ mɔ ibui zizĩ nanà nɛ ɔlɔ shu nɛ yɛamɛ. Nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛɛ, 5atɛ tɔɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔsɛ ababhɛtɛ ɔlɔ akpɛ otugbà tɛ budzi asɛ yɛeyi alɛ ana ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha, nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ nɛ̀ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ, 6ɔkɔ yɛinyeɛ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibu dadalɛ gɛ alɔkɔ akɔ ɔlɔ kɛbhɛ mabuia mabuia ɔgana agɛ yɛadɛmɛ nɔ nabha. 7Nɛ yɛ mɛɛ, bebu ɔlɔ ɔgana yɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ, ebui kpa tɛlɔlɔkɔ tsye, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ehoeyi udɔ̃ gɛ alɔkɔ ebhui ɔlɔ ebuɔ mɛ 8gɛ alɔkɔ akɔ nɛ tikpekpè nɛ bubuti nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũ petee mɛ. 9Kɛlɛ akɔ butì ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ akpasɛ yɛ kibui gɛ apɛ, pɛ atɔɖɔ ɔganà Kristo abha, 10sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ ɛlɛ akpɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ gɛ onupɛ kibeɛ bana sɛ tɛ laba alɛ mɛɛ, tɛ balɔkɔ ebuiɛ petee nɛititíɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa nabha akpɛ itsu tɛ lazã anɔ tenikpo esi, anɔ gɛenu Kristoɔ.
11Yɛ mɛ bebu ɔlɔ tsyɛ, gɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ asɛ ababhɛtɛ ɔlɔ akpɛ otugbà nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ, anɔ gɛ yɛawɔa axɔ̃ɛ sɛ labhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ kɛgɛ yɛatɔɖɔ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛapɛ ulũ, 12sɛ tɛ ɔlɔ bagɛ idzì banɔ gɛeputɔ gɛ buɖì idzo mɛ ɔkɔ Kristoɔ, tɛ bɔzã ɔkɔ yɛishu dadalɛ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití. 13Kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔkpasɛ Kristoɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nolũ kibuiɛ gɛinu kibui gbãa, kibui gbangbã gɛ yɛkɛ ɔnɔ lu nɛkpã. Gɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã soɔ, atsà kɛna ɔkɔ ɔnɔ elu pɛ balɔkɔ adadã edere ɔnɔ ulũ, nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ akɔ ɔnɔ, 14gɛenu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ ide ɔkɔ ɔlɔ kaŋãsiɛ odiyinɔ kibeɛ gɛ bebu bagɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛanunɔ ɔkɔ yɛ tɛdadalɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛitití.
Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu
15Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, odenɔ kibeɛ gɛ ilũ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu abha nɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ banɔ dadalɛ petee nɔ, 16ɛka yɔlɔ ahɔɛhuhu nɛ ɔnɔ ɛtakpu ɖi, nɛ̀ ɔnɔ tɛbabakà nɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ. 17Itsiɖi ɛlɛ abha bisi sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ, Akaa gɛ yɛishu dalɛ, sɛ akɔ ɔnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bubutiɛ nɛ̀ kibui bubu kasɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔoti yɛ piapii ɔdɛ. 18Ikulu Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ebui mɛ adalɛ akɔ ɔnɔ etú mɛ awuhũɔ sɛ tɛ nɔotì tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nɔnɔ ɛtakpu so pɛ ekulu ɔnɔ, ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ lɛ ɔkɔ kaŋãsi dadalɛ gɛakpɛ banɔ dadalɛ mɛ, 19nɛ̀ yɛ ohumi hohoe nɔ gɛ batɛ balà lɔkɔ ashɔnɔ ɔnanà, ɔkɔ bɔlɔ bagɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa. Ohumi ɔlɛ odzi asɛ yɛ ohumi gbagbla nɔ gɛ alɔkɔ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɔ, 20gɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ Kristoɔ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ efeke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ pɛ alɔkɔ yɛ edzu yɛ kɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ kitití bukusi ɔŋãkɔ, 21gɛ bɔɖama ɔdɛ bukusi ŋaŋã nɛ̀ ɔsha ka nyia ka ɛdi, ohumi nɛ̀ banɔ abha ŋaŋã, nɛ̀ ɔzãkɔ inye ka nyia ka gɛ babalà akɔ, gɛnɛ obo kanɔ alɛ mɛ ete, pɔ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ gɛ kababáa mɛ tsyɛ. 22Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka akpɛ yɛtsɛɖɛ esi, kɛlɛ ebú yɛ sɛ tɛ edzi kɛtakpu akɔ ɔhaa, ɔlɛ kɛka nyia ka 23gɛinu yɛishu dzyaa, nɛ̀ yɛishuɔ petee gɛ alɔkɔ eyuku kɛka nyia ka mɛ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha.

Title: EFESOANƐ 2
Content:
Bakɔ Wɔ Ɛkpã Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
1Wɔnɔ xɔnɔɔ, notitsí ɔbɔ fala nɛ wɔnɔ kesi tata nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, 2gɛ alɛ mɛ nɔtɛ zã oɖi nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔkpà tɔnɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ edzoɔ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛaŋã bukusi nɛ bukusi ɔpã gɛ kpasɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ mɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ otsiɛ nɛ batɔ̃ gagalĩ eleteɛ mɛ. 3Bɔlɔ petee tsyɛ tɛzã balɛishi ɖi nɛ kibè tili gɛ bafala, pɛ bɔzɛ kpɛ samè nɛ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, kɛlɛ bɔzɛ pɛedzo alɛ pɛ bɔɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ alɛishu. Asɛ gɛ banɔ gɔgɔ̃ɔ aza bhɛtɛɛ, budzi banɔ gɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpa ɔzã bɔlɔ mɛ. 4Pɔ, nɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gi gbogblo ɔkɔ ɔlɔ soɔ, Owusoso Akaa gɛ yɛashagabuiɛ ayɛkɛ kedziɛ, 5akɔ bɔmɔ ɛkpã ɔplɛnɔ Kristo nɛ kibeɛ gɛ butsí nɛ bɔlɔ esi tata mɛ, ashagabui ɖiɖi so pɛ bebu ɔlɔ. 6Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa efeke ɔlɔ aplɛnɔ Kristo kɛlɛ alɔkɔ ɔlɔ adɛzã esi ɔplɛnɔ yɛishu nɛ kititì bukusi ɔŋãkɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ, 7sɛ tɛ nɛ agɔɔ gɛ lababaa mɛɛ, aba kasɛ yɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɛ balà alɔkɔ shɔnɔ bɔnanà ɔgana tibhui bhuibu mɛ, gɛ akasɛ nɛ yɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ. 8Ɔmɔsɛ tibhui bhuibu shu so pɛ bebu ɔlɔ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, kɛlɛ kɛgi de wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛdɔ kɔkɔ kinu, 9gɛnɛ wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, sɛ tɛ ananà atɛ befeke yɛishu. 10Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ ɛdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ bunu, gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ sɛ tɛ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gbangbã, gɛ Owusoso Akaa eputɔ abalɛ elu akɔ ɔlɔ sɛ bɔbhɛtɛ.
Budzì Tenikpo Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
11Klisoɔ, nɔ bakà ɔsɛ kuku ibeɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ bamɔ́ ɔnɔ pɛ nɔotinu Yudanɛ pɛ beze kulu ɔnɔ asɛ “bagɛ begi bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ” banɔ alɛ gɛ ezekulu ishu asɛ “kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui” (gɛ bebhui nɛ ishudzyaa mɛ nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame ahɔɛ) 12nɔ bakà ɔsɛ nɛ kibe ɛlɛ, bebu ɔnɔ ɔtɔ nɛ Kristo shu, kɛlɛ bebu ɔnɔ ɔtɔ sɛ nɔma Israelanɛ nɛ̀ befuɔ balɛ olugbũnyanyã gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ mɛ, gɛ otugbà mɛ ɖiɖi nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa agɛzã bɔlɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. 13Pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛɛ, wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔtɛ zã kitsí oɖiɛɛ, bagbana ɔnɔ ɔplɛnɔ ɔgana Kristo yɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ.
14Ɔmɔsɛ yɛenu ɔlɔ ishu yɔyɔɔ, gɛ abhɛtɛ ɔlɔ ediɛ taabha budzi tenikpo kɛlɛ ezĩ kɛgi bhui bɔlɔ ishiɛɛ, gɛinu kigiliɛ gɛ mana kishi zizĩɛ, 15nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ebu ɔsha gɛ ɔlɛ mɛ yɛazã nɛ ishudzyaa mɛ nɛ̀ ɔlɛ ɛkɔɔ eyinɔ. Yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛinu sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ yɛishu anɔ vɔvɔ tenikpo odenɔ banɔ taabha mɛ, sɛ tɛ amana ishu yɔyɔ, 16nɛ ishudzya ɛlɛ bedzì tinikpo mɛ, sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ taabha tenikpo ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔgana butsi osi nabha, gɛ ɔlɛ abha yɛetsí pɛ ebu kishi zizĩɛ. 17Aba ɖɔ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ebui etseɖe wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔzã odzlolo ɔkɔ, pɛ aɖɔ ishu yɛyɔyɔ ebui etseɖe bagɛ etso aplɛnɔ yɛ tsyɛ. 18Ɔmɔsɛ ɔgana yɛabha bɔlɔ ediɛ taabha mɔ kidzo ɔvɛ Akaa ɔkɔ ɔganà ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo mɛ.
19Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, nɔ otikonu bededeba alo beefù, pɔ nɔonu Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔpãmɛ ayɛ, 20gɛ bedzu atɔɖɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ balɛ ebui nabha, ɔplɛnɔ Kristo Yesuɔ gɛ yɛenu odekrekpu ɛklagbu hohoeɛ. 21Yɛabha babhɔ buvũɔ atɔ̃ atsà, pɛ buwu kabha pɛ bɔba dzì Akaavũɔ gɛ bɔlɛ shu dalɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. 22Kɛlɛ yɛmɛ babhɔ ɔnɔ tsyɛ akpɛ itsù sɛ tɛ nɔodzì ɔzãkɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa abazã nɛ̀ yɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ.

Title: EFESOANƐ 3
Content:
Paulo Yɛebui Ɖɔɖɔ Ɔkɔ Bagɛ Etinu Yudanɛ
1Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, mɛ Paulo, gɛinu buvũazazã ɔkɔ Kristo Yesu nɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔotinu Yudanɛ ɛtakpu-.
2Kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ nɔolũ Owusoso Akaa yɛ tibhui bhuibu ɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ akɔ mɛ akɔ ɔnɔ, 3gɛ kɛlɛinu, kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ bebu akasɛ mɛ, asɛ gɛ ɛtɛ fɔnɔ lu gulũi nɔ. 4Denɔ kibui ɛlɛ tɛkaklà mɛ, nɔobolũ mɛibui ɛlɛ mɛ piapi nɛ Kristo yɛebui kpukpũɔ shu, 5kibui gɛ begi bu akasɛ banɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛtɛ bafala mɛ, asɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ obu ɛlɛ ɔkasɛ Owusoso Akaa anɔkpɛkpɛ dadalɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ. 6Kibui kpukpũ ɛlɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ ɔgana kibui gbangbã nabha, bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ tsyɛ abamɔ̃ kaŋãsiɛ ɔplɛnɔ Israel, gɛ bebedzi banɔ tenikpo gɛede ishudzya tinikpo mɛ, nɛ̀ banɔ gɛ aba yɛkɛ ɔdɔ̃ itsù nɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ lu nulũ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.
7Ɛbadzì axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ akɔ mɛ ɔganà yɛohumi nɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. 8Gɛ mɛinu anɔ bhlui ɔdɛ nɛ bagɛ edzì bhlui nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ petee ishi tsyɛ elo, mɛ ɛyɛkɛ tibhui bhui ebu ɛlɛ, sɛ tɛ mɛɖɔ Kristo ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛ ɔtɛ bɔmɔ nɛ ɔkɔ nanà ibui otseɖe bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ, 9nɛ̀ tɛ mɛ dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ kpukpũ ɛlɛ gɛ asɛ agɔ kpekpè nɛ alɛ bekpũ ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka. 10Yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ kɛlɛ idzì ɔsɛ otsiɛ nɔ, ɔgana ɔha nabhaa, kɛlɛ sɛ bebu Owusoso Akaa bubutiɛ gɛ bukpè tɔɖɔɔ ɔkasɛ bekusiɛ nɛ̀ ihumi eleteɛ nɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ mɛ, 11nɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ ɔkɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ, gɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ebeke ɔgana Kristo Yesu bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ mɛ. 12Nɛ yɛ mɛ̀, nɛ̀ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ yɛabha, bɔba là tso plɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ lulu mɛ. 13Ibisi denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ sɛ, nɔotì yi idè nɛ mɛ bɔtɔ gɛ ɛtɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shuɔ, gɛ bɔlɛinu wɔnɔ ishu dadalɛ.
Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Efesoanɛ
14Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ idzu ekluisi esi nɛ Akaa namɛ, 15ganà anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛabha yɛeshopo alɛ petee, nɛititíɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa ayɛkɛ balɛ inyeɛ. 16Ikulu Owusoso Akaa asɛ odenɔ yɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ dadalɛ mɛɛ, tɛ akɔ nɔ gagalĩ nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ ɔgana yɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, 17sɛ tɛ Kristo azã wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. Kɛlɛ ikulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ igu tɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gagalĩ, 18tɛ ohumi ɔzã wɔnɔ ahɔɛ, ɔplɛnɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã petee, tɛ nɔ nyana kana gɛ Yesu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ anɔ dzeɛ pɛ kɛɖama pɛ kidzuɔ gɛinu Kristoɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ovunɔ, 19sɛ tɛ nɔoti tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɛlɛ gɛ dɛ kibui titì-ɔsɛ tɛ Owusoso Akaa oyuku wɔnɔ mɛ piapii nɛ yɛ kɛlɛɛ gɛ alɛɛ nulũ. 20Otsi nɔ agɛ yɛabhɛtɛ ebuiɛ gɛ batɛ là alɔkɔ shɔnɔ ebui nanà, ɔdɛ agɛ bubisiɛ petee alo pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ alɛ shuɔ, nɛ yɛohumi nɔ gɛ lɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ ɔlɔ mɛ nulũ, 21ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔyɛ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ, nɛ̀ Kristo Yesu mɛ ɔgana kibeɛ petee gɛ babaa mɛ, odenɔ tihɔɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ! Amen.

Title: EFESOANƐ 4
Content:
Tenikpo Bhɛbhɛtɛ Nɛ Kristo Yɛishudzyaa Mɛ
1Asɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ azazã ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ anaa, ɛkpalà ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã nɔnɔ gɛ shɔnɔ tikukuluɔ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ nulũ. 2Nɔ ozhinì ishu esi tɛ nɔ nyanà ishu ovunɔ piapii, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ, tɛ nɔmɔ̃ ɔtɔ mɛ kɔ agɔlɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. 3Nɔgã kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ nɔzã tenikpo nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ ɔgana ishu yɔyɔ gɛ nyanà ɔnɔ ovunɔɔ mɛ. 4Ishudzya tinikpo nɛ̀ Ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo ɔlɔ lɛ, asɛ kana gɛ bekulu ɔnɔ akɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi tinikpo nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bekulu ɔnɔ. 5Apalete tenikpo, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tinikpo, bulĩkpɛkpɛ tunikpo, 6Owusoso Akaa tenikpo gɛenu Akaa ɔkɔ aka nyia aka, anɔ gɛ adɛ alɛ petee, pɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔgana alɛ petee mɛ, kɛlɛ kpasɛ yɛanɔ nɔ̀ petee mɛ.
7Pɔ bɔlɔ mɛ anɔ ka nyia ka, akɔ yɛ tibhui bhuibu asɛ kana gɛ Kristo ayá ɛlɛ akɔ. 8Kɛlɛ so pɛ kibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ,
“Kibeɛ gɛ ewu avɛ kititíɛ faa nɔ,
agbana bagɛ awɔ keyuɔ aplɛnɔ yɛishu
kɛlɛ akɔ banɔ ɔdɔ̃
9(Gɛ “ewu avɛ” kɛlɛ esi enu ɔsɛ ezhi aba kesiɛ gɛenu kesiakpa nabha tsyɛ dza? 10Anunɔ gɛ yɛezhi abaa esiɛ, yɛenu agɛ yɛewu avɛ faã ɔdɛ kitití ɛzãkɔ petee sɛ tɛ eyuku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ.) 11Yɛenu anɔ gɛ akɔ asɛ beteli edzi banɔkpɛkpɛ, tɛ beteli edzi ebuiɖɔluanɔ, beteli tɛ baɖɔ yɛebuiɛ akanà, kɛlɛ beteli tsyɛ tɛ bedzi kibuiɛ aɖɔɖɔ elete nɛ̀ kɛlɛ adɔ̃kasɛ, 12sɛ tɛ babalɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa anunɔ akɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nɛ̀ axɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ, sɛ tɛ babhɔ Kristo yɛishudzyaa ewunɔ kabha 13odiyinɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ petee tɔnɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ kibuititiɛ mɛ pɛ bushè, pɛ bɔlɔ tɛzazã petee tsyinà gɛ ná nɛ Kristo mɛ.
14Kɛlɛ bɔza kazã asɛ bunuvɔɛ ana, pɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ka nyia ka ɛdi bazi fù ɔlɔ falanɔ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ ɔmana ɛkɛlɛ̀ nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame bɔshɛ nɛ̀ banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ edzoɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ eluɔ shu. 15Pɔ bɔɖɔ kibui gbã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, bɔbà shè nɛ ebuiɛ petee mɛ nɛ Kristo anɔ gɛinu ɔlɔ ɛtakpuɔ mɛ. 16Odenɔ yɛ mɛɛ, ishudzya petee, tsà pɛ bazɛɛ anyanã ɛlɛ ovunɔ, pɛ bushè pɛ lɛbhɔ ishu utɔɖɔ nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, asɛ kɛwɔa gɛ kawɔ̃pɛ ka nyia ka awɔa kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛ ana.
Anɔ Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Kanɔ Dadalɛ Mɛ
17Kliso itseɖe ɔnɔ ibui ɛlɛ, pɛ ɛɛtɔɖɔ̀ ɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, nɔtɛɔkɔ zã nɛkpã asɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ, nɛ balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ ama kɛnanà mɛ. 18Balɛ ebui esi lulũɔ mɛ eku otumũ, kɛlɛ bebu ishu ɔtɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛkpã shu, nɛ kibui matì matiɛ gɛ kpasɛ alɛ mɛ, nɛ gɛ bagagalĩ balɛ etúɔ mɛ so. 19Gɛ bagɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ soɔ, balɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ kanɔ mɛ ɔdzyɛ, sɛ tɛ babhɛtɛ atsɔ̃bui ka nyia ka idi, pɛ betsiɖi ɛlɛ abha abhɛtɛ aplɛnɔ.
20Pɔ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ gɛ ba sɛ tɛ nɔotì Kristo nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abha. 21Kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ sɛ nɔolũ yɛɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ bakasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ yɛ mɛ, nɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nɛ Yesu mɛ. 22Bakasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃, nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛ zã ɔbɔ falanɔ shu, sɛ tɛ nɔ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ edzo kukuɔ shu, edzoɔ gɛedzì ebui zizĩ ɔganà alɛ anɔ wɔɛwɔɛ gɛ badɛmɛ nabha, 23sɛ tɛ babhɛtɛ edzo alɛ avɔvɔ nɛ ebui gɛ alɛ ɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ, 24sɛ tɛ nɔodzinì ishu ɔbhɔ avɔvɔ, gɛ babhɛtɛ ɔnɔ sɛ nɔzã asɛ Owusoso Akaa ana nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ mɛ.
25Klisoɔ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka ashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ asɛnɛ sɛsɛ shu, tɛ aɖɔ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ otseɖe yɛɔhagbo, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ petee kpasɛ ishudzya tunikpo mɛ. 26“Tɛbhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ wɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ mɛ”. Tɛkɔ kiwui dɔ nɛ wɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ mɛ, 27kɛlɛ tɛkɔ abosam ɔtsɛɖɛ odzukɔ nanà. 28Agɛ yɛezuruɔ, ayɔlɔ yɛuzĩɛ gɛ ezuruɔ, pɔ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ, tɛ alɔkɔ yɛahɔɛ aza bhɛtɛ kibui tili gɛbà plɛnɔ, sɛ tɛ amɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili akɔ bagɛ apɛ ɛdɔ̃.
29Nɔtɛ kɔ kibui kpa nanà de koeyi nɛ ɔnɔ olugbũɔ mɛ oɖi, pɔ kɛgɛ ba plɛnɔ pɛ nɔ bɔbhɔ babhlatɔ ɔtɔɖɔ nɛ kɛpɛɛ gɛ bapɛ ulũ, tɛ kɛkɔ sɛ bagɛ elũ kibuiɛ amɔ kibui tili edenɔ ɛlɛ mɛ. 30Kɛlɛ nɔtɛ kɔ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔmɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, gɛ ɔlɛ balɔkɔ adã ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ elu nɔ, odiyinɔ kiwuiɛ gɛ bebè bu ɔnɔ. 31Nɔobu ishu mɛ pɔpɔɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ nɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ, banɔ kwɔakwɔala nɛ̀ olugbũ edzi gagã, banɔ shu zizĩ ka nyia ka ɛdi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshi. 32Nɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, nɔlɔkɔ kibui otsye agɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ ɔgana Kristo mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ etsye ɔnɔ.

Title: EFESOANƐ 5
Content:
1Nɔkpasɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛkpã, asɛ bunuvɔɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ ana, 2tɛ nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Kristo adɛmɛ ɔlɔ ɛbui pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛɛlɔ̃ huhuhu nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa.
3Pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ, kɛma sɛ tɛ belũ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ shu, alo atsɔ̃bui ka nyia ka ɛdi shu, alo anɔ gɛ apɛɛ kɛdɔ̃ gbagbla adɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ebui alɛ agɛpɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ dadalɛ. 4Nɔtɛ zɔɖɔ atsɔ̃bui nɛ̀ bɔga ebui nɛ̀ kaɖɔ gɛ kama kalɛ ɔzãkɔ, pɔ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛ huhu ɔkɔ Akaa. 5Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shuɔɔ, nɔ ɔbɔ ɔtɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛlɛ abha ɔsɛ, ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ, ishu madalɛ madalɛ alo anɔ gɛ apɛɛ ɛdɔ̃ akɔ yɛ ete shu, anɔ alɛ nɛidi enu obudi elete, kɛlɛ atɛ bamɔ kaŋãsiɛ galɛ Kristo nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa bukusi ɔŋãkɔ mɛ. 6Nɔtɛkɔ ananà awɔɛ ɔnɔ nɛ ebui gɛ lama alɛ mɛ shu, ɔmɔsɛ ebui alɛ nɛidi shu Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔba bagɛ etielũ atɔ̃ nabha. 7Klisoɔ nɔtɛ kpɛ alɛ ɔha. 8Ɔmɔsɛ nɔ tɛzã otumũ mɛ oɖi, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔɔ nɔonu tɛdadalɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. Nɔzã nɛ ɛkpã asɛ bunuvɔɛ gɛ balɛ amɛ adalɛ ana 9tɛ nɔ pɛɛ kɛgɛ ikù Apaleteɛ sameɛ, 10ɔmɔsɛ busi eyuyuɔ gɛenu tɛdadalɛ akpasɛ ebuiɛ gɛ apɛ̃ petee mɛ, kibui gbagbã bhɛbhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ kibui igbã. 11Nɔtɛ kpɛ ɔhɔɛ nɛ otumũ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɔnɔ gɛ kɛnanà ma alɛ mɛ mɛ̀, pɔ nɔobu alɛ ɔkasɛ boŋ. 12Ɔmɔsɛ kiwũi ibui kinu tsyɛ ɔsɛ tɛ baɖɔ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ bagɛ etie lũ atɔ̃ abhɛtɛ nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ. 13Pɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ tɛdadalɛ bu kasɛɛ, kidzi kɛdɔ̃ gɛ baamɔ̃, 14ɔmɔsɛ kiwuiɛ kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bamɔ̃ kɛka nyia ka. Kliso pɛ baɖɔ asɛ,
“Nyɛmɛ, O wɔ agɛ ɔɔdɔ̀ taɖaa,
lɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ,
kɛlɛ Kristoɔ aba tsé kifu atɔɖɔ wɔabha.”
15Nɔoɖi piapii nɛ kana gɛ nɔodzinɔ wɔnɔ ɛkpã shu-nɔtɛ zã asɛ bagɛ etinyi ibui, pɔ asɛ bagɛ enyi ibui ana, 16tɛ nɔwɔa kibè ka nyia ka shu axɔ̃ɛ piapii, ɔmɔsɛ ewuiɛ enu ewui kpa. 17Klisoɔ nɔotidzì bawɔaga, pɔ nɔolũ kɛgɛ Apaleteɛ apɛɛ asɛ ɔbhɛtɛ. 18Nɔtɛwɔɛ bunu obuku, kɛdɔ̃ gɛ gbana anɔ kpɛ same mɔmɔ falanɔ ɛfú mɛ. Pɔ nɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ zã ɔnɔ mɛ. 19Nɔɖɔ kaɖɔ kpɛ agɔlɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ ɛdzɛ zhazhã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛdzɛ zhazhã. Nɔzhã ɛdzɛ odenɔ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ, 20tɛ nɔozohu Owusoso Akaa gɛ enu Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia ibe ɔkɔ kɛka nyia ka, nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo inyeɛ mɛ.
21nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ agɔlɔ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ kpɛ bagɔlɔ same ɔkɔ Kristo.
Banyɛedzini Nɛ̀ Badzɛenyine
22Banyɛ edzinì mɔ, nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ asɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ ana. 23Ɔmɔsɛ adzɛ enyineɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu ɔkɔ yɛedzinì asɛ kana gɛ Kristo tsyɛ enu kɛtakpu akɔ ɔhaa ana, yɛishu dzyaa, gɛ bɔlɛishu yɛenu agɛ Yɛebu ɔlɔ. 24Nɛ kana gɛ ɔhaa akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ Kristo soɔ, kana ɛbe kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ banyɛ edziniɛ tsyɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ balɛ enyine alɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ.
25Badzɛ enyine, nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Kristoɔ tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɔhaa pɛ alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ nɛ ɔlɛ takpuɔ ana, 26sɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ tɛ ɔlɛ ishuɔ dalɛ nɛ tipuplu nɛ̀ ɔlɛ tiwuwulu nɔ nɛ̀ bulĩ ɔganà kibuiɛ mɛ, 27sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ ɔlɛ akɔ yɛishu asɛ ɔha gɛ lootséɛ, tɛ kibo, ishupi bɔbɔlɔ alo kihututũ nanà tɛzã ɔlɛ shu, pɔ tɛ lɔdalɛ tɛ batɛ mɔ bamɛ tsitsí nana nɛ ɔlɛ shu. 28Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ baadzɛ enyine tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ balɛ edzini alɛ asɛ balɛ ahɔɛ ishupi ana. Anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛedziniɛ, adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛishu. 29nɛ alɛ petee edeɛ, ananà aka nyanà yɛishupiɛ akpɛ ɛyamɛ eɖi, pɔ akɔ yɛishu bɔŋaŋã pɛ eɖi ɔlɛ abha, asɛ kana gɛ kristo tsyɛ abhɛtɛ ɔhaa, 30ɔmɔsɛ bunu yɛishudzya nɔ wɔpɛ̃. 31“Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so anyɛ aba shɛ nɛ yɛakaa nɛ̀ yɛelĩɛ ɔbha, pɛ aba dɛ bhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ yɛedzinì, kɛlɛ balɛ taabha ebedzi ishudzya tunikpo.” 32Kibui gikpũ pɛ kɛlɛ mɛ dzú nɛ ɛlɛ, pɔ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ Kristo nɛ̀ ɔhaa shu. 33Pɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka tsyɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ yɛedzinì asɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛishu ana, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ anyɛ edziniɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ yɛinyineɛ.

Title: EFESOANƐ 6
Content:
Bunuvɔɛ Nɛ̀ Balɛ Elĩ Nɛ̀ Akaa Alɛ
1Bunuvɔɛ nɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ elĩ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ akaa alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ pɛ̃. 2“Nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ akaa nɛ̀ wɔnɔ elĩ,” gɛ ɔlɛ onu ɔsha gɛiputɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ kibui lu aplɛnɔ ɔlɛ, 3“sɛ tɛ apɛ̃ kɔ wɔ tɛ ɔmɔ ɛkpã dzlolo nɛ kesiakpa nabha.” 4Beyiaka mɔ, nɔtɔ kpɛ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ, pɔ, nɔnyɔnɔ alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nulũ.
Banɔ Dzidzì Nɛ Bapalete
5Banɔ dzidzi mɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ esiakpa abha apaleteɛ nɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kifu sisi mɛ, nɛ wɔnɔ etú dadalɛ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ nobolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ Kristo ana. 6Nɔotilũ atɔ̃ kɔ alɛ sɛ tɛ noku balɛ awɔ̃ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi wɔnɔ abha ete, pɔ asɛ banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ Kristo ana, tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ odenɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ. 7Nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi nɛ̀ wɔnɔ etúɔ nyɔ̃ɔ, asɛ gɛ onupɛ Apaleteɛ nɔkpɛ̀ ketakpu esi ɔkɔ ana, gɛnɛ banɔ, 8ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ aba buia kɛbhɛ̃ akɔ aka nyia aka ɔkɔ kɛgbangbã ka nyia ka ɛdi gɛ abhɛtɛɛ, gɛ onu ɔnɔ dzidzi alo ishu ahɔɛmɛ azazã elete yɛenu tsyɛ.
9Kɛlɛ wɔnɔ bapaleteɛ tsyɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ banɔ dzidziɛ nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha. Nɔtɛ kpɛ alɛ ɛkpã ifù, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ agɛ yɛenu wɔnɔ Apaleteɛ nɛ̀ balɛ ayɛ alɛititíɛ, kɛlɛ yɛetiɖi banɔ amɛ.
Owusoso Akaa Ɔɖa Akpɛkpɛ Gɛ Balɔkɔ Epo Ishu Nɔ
10Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ gɛɔdɛ. 11Nɔlɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ gɛ nɔlɔkɔ po ishu nɔ ɔkpɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔlà zã abosam ebui tɔtɔɖɔ nulũ. 12Ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɛ tà keyù nɛ̀ ishupi nɛ̀ dzyosu, pɔ nɛ̀ beekusi, nɛ̀ ɔshaeleteɛ, nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ otumũ mɛ ihumi nɔ gɛ ɛŋã kabha, nɛ̀ ɛfɔfuĩa gagalĩ zizĩɛ nɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ mɛ. 13Klisoɔ, nɔ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ ɔdɔ̃ petee gɛ nɔlɔkɔ opo ishu nɔɔ ɔkpɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ewui zizĩ ebekuɔ, nɔ bɔlà ɔtsyɔa etelũ nɛ alɛ, kɛlɛ onupɛ ewui alɛ abafalaa, nobo wlui ɔzã gagalĩ. 14Klisoɔ nɔzã gagalĩ, tɛ nɔ lɔkɔ kibui gbã atsatsà tɔɖɔ ɔnyã kashɛ nɔ, ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ kitemɛ ɔɖaa akpɛkpɛ gɛ yɛishu kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔkpɛ ɔtɔɖɔ yɛɔzãkɔ 15nɛ̀ tɛ wɔnɔ tsɛɖɛ zã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ nɛ kibui gbangbã gɛ mana ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. 16Ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ ebui alɛ petee nɔ, nɔ lɔkɔ ɔɖaɛtɛ̃ gɛinu tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, gɛ ɛlɛ nɔbɔ lɔkɔ olĩ ɔpɔ̃ɛ ifuɔ gɛide anɔ zizĩɛ ɔkɔ ɔbaa. 17Nɔ lɔkɔ ɔɖaɛkutuɔ gɛ yɛkɛ ɔkɔ anɔ ovunɔ, nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bɛtɛ̀ɛ, gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ. 18Kɛlɛ nɔokulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ kibe nyia be nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ̀ tibibisi ka nyia ka ɛdi. Gɛ alɛ akpasɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpuɔ mɛ soɔ, nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ tɛ nɔzã Owusoso Akaa tikukulu abha ɔkɔ bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã petee.
19Nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa kɔ mɛ tsyɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɛdalɛ mɛolugbũɔ, babàkɔ mɛ ebui ɖɔɖɔ sɛ tɛ ɛdalɛ kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ kpasɛ kibui gbangbã mɛ kifù masi masi, 20gɛ kɛlɛ so pɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ inyè mɛ pɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ. Nɔokulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ ɛlà dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ kifù masi masi mɛ asɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛbhɛtɛ.
Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
21Tixiko, adzyaa gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ pɛ enu axɔ̃ɛdɛ gbangbã nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, ebetseɖe ɔnɔ kɛka nyia ka, sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ otì kana gɛ ɛlɛɛ nɛ kɛnɔnɔ gɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ. 22Kibui ɛlɛ shu mɛ lɔkɔ yɛ sɛsɛ ɔnɔ, sɛ tɛ nɔotì kana gɛ bɔlɛɛ, sɛ tɛ akpɛ ɔnɔ emi.
23Ishuyɔyɔ ɔkɔ badzyaa, nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔplɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã odenɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ. 24Tibhui bhuibuɔ zã ]plɛnɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔ dɛmɛ nɔ ɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛlɛ tihɔɔ nɔ.

Title: FILIPIANƐ OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Paulo afɔnɔ̃ yɛeplukpa asɛsɛ Filipianɛ ɔkɔ ɔha gɛiputɔ gɛ edzu nɛ Yuropan esiakpa nabha, nɛ Romanɛ esiakpa Makedonia mɛ. Bafɔnɔ alɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ anɔkpɛkpɛ azã ɔɖavũ mɛ, nɛ̀ kibeɛ gɛ amɔ̃ buluhũ kpɛkpɛ odenɔ kititì lɔlɔ gɛide Kristoanɛ axɔ̃ɛwɔa bhlatɔ ɔkɔ ɔmana yɛishu, kɛlɛ amɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ odenɔ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛzɛ vɛ ɛlɛ abha nɛ Filipi ahaa mɛ shu. Pɔ keplukpa alɛ amanà same mɔmɔ nɛ̀ awɔ̃ lulu ebui teli gɛ Paulo tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gbagbla nɛ Kristo Yesu abha ete kɛlɛ babu ɛlɛ esi.
Kɛgɛ kɔ ɔsɛ tɛ afɔnɔ̃ keplukpa alɛ tsiɔ ɔlɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ ehu Kristoanɛ gɛalɛ Filipi ahɔɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ basɛsɛ yɛ asɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔtɔ ba yɛabha. Awɔa kibe ɛlɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ piapi pɛ atɔɖɔ kɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha akɔ alɛ, sɛ tɛ bamɔ̃ kemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃ lulu odenɔ nɛ bɔtɔ gɛ yɛ nɛ alɛ azamɔɔ mɛ tsyɛ. Akɔ alɛ ɛtakpu asɛ bezhinì ishu esi asɛ kana gɛ Yesu ezhini yɛyɛ esiɛ ana, ɔdɛ ɔsɛ tɛ baza lɔkɔ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃ ebui tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nɛ̀ ishu tifefeke. Abaka alɛ asɛ balɛ ɛkpã gɛlɛ tenikpo nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ nu Owusoso Akaa ɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gɛ alɔkɔ ebhui alɛ ebu nɔ gɛ bayɛkɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, gɛnɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ nɛ Yudanɛ ɛkɔ nabha. Afɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ same mɔmɔ nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ bagɛ alɛ nɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ nɛ̀ Kristoɔ.
Bamɔ asɛ keplukpa alɛ atɔɖɔ kɛklagbu nɛ same mɔmɔ, ohumi kpɛkpɛ anɔ, awɔ̃ lulu, tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ, Kristoanɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ ɛkpã mɛ. Keplukpa alɛ ezebu Paulo tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gidzuɔ mɛ ɔkɔ ɔhaa gɛɔlɛ Filipiɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibui 1.1-11
Paulo bɔtɔɔ gɛ ɔlɛ mɛ yɛagãa1.12-26
Ɛkpã gɛlɛ Kristo mɛ 1.27—2.18
Kibui Tɔtɔɖɔ ɔkɔ Timoteo nɛ Epafrodito 2.19-30
Ɔsha kpɛkpɛ nɛ bagɛ batɔɖɔ banɔ eluɔ, nɛ̀ ebui gɛaba mana butsi shu 3.1—4.9
Paulo nɛ̀ yɛɔbhia alɛ gɛenu Filipianɛ 4.10-20
Ebuigɔgɔɔ4.21-23

Title: FILIPIANƐ 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo nɛ̀ Timoteo, gɛenu Kristo Yesu yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ,
Balɛ asɛsɛ banɔ dadalɛ pete eplukpa nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ nɛ Filipi, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ ɛsofo nɔ nɛ̀ ɛzãkɔ bhlui eleteɛ,
2Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ ɔkɔ.
Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu
3Ihu mɛ Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be gɛ onupɛ ɛbaka wɔnɔ ɛbui. 4Nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukuluɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ petee mɛɛ, ikulu yɛ nɛ̀ same kibe nyia be 5nɛ wɔnɔ ɔha axɔ̃ɛ nɛ̀ kibui gbangbã mɛ odenɔ kiwuiɛ gɛiputɔ nabha ɔlɔkɔ mana otsiɛ, 6gɛ ilù awɔ̃ nɛ ibui ɛlɛ abha soɔ, inyi sɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛakpɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã tɛwɔawɔa esi nɛ ɔnɔ, abavɛ ɛlɛ abha ɔdɛ tɔ̃ nɛ Kristo Yesu kiwui nabha.
7Kɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ kibui ɛlɛ zã mɛ mɛ̀ nɛ wɔnɔ petee shu, gɛ wɔnɔ ibui gbangbã kpasɛ mɛitúɔ mɛ so, ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ alo ibu ishu ulũ alo pɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha tsyɛ, wɔnɔ petee ɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ ɔplɛnɔ mɛ. 8Owusoso Akaa abalà dalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ kana gɛ ɛpɛ sɛ mɔ̃ ɔnɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛlɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.
9Kɛlɛ́ɛ kɛlɛinu mɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu ɔsɛ, tɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ kpè tɔɖɔ nɛ kibui titì nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũɔ gɛedzuɔ mɛ, 10sɛ tɛ nɔlà mɔ kɛgɛ pɛ̃ɔdɛ pɛ kɛlɛishu dalɛ pɛ bamɛ tsitsí ama ɛlɛ shu ɔvɛnɔ Kristo yɛiwuiɛ nabha. 11Nɔkɔ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ busi eyuyuɔ gɛ agã Yesu Kristo abha eyuku ɔnɔ mɛ, tɛ kidzi ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa.
Paulo Ɛɖahuimɛ Zazã Kɔ Kibui Gbangbã Vɛ Otugba
12Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, otsiɛ nɔ, ɛpɛɛ sɛ nɔotì ɔsɛ kɛgɛ ba mɛabha kɛlɛ vɛnɔ kibui gbangbã nɛ Otugba. 13Nɛ ɛlɛ shu soɔ, kɛlɛ mɛ badãlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ epo ekusiupã petee nɛ̀ aka nyia aka tsyɛ sɛ, ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahui mɛ ɔkɔ Kristo. 14Nɛ mɛ ɛɖahui ɛlɛ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ soɔ, kɛkpɛ badzya gelee gɛ akpasɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ emi ɔsɛ tɛ baɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ nɛ kité kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kifu masi masi mɛ.
15Kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ, beteli aɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ nɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ̀ kabhã wɔawlɔ̃akɛ mɛ, pɔ teli xɔnɔ̃ aɖɔ ɛlɛ ɔganà kibui gbangbã mɛ. 16Banɔ ebelũ ɛlɛ mɛ kidegba nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, bakpɛ mɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀ asɛ tɛ mɛba wlɔ̃akɛ kibui gbangbã nɛtakpu. 17Bagɛ eti putɔɔ, balɛ aɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ ɔkɔ balɛ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃, kigi de balɛ etúɔ mɛ, pɔ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana asɛ tɛ bakɔ mɛmɔ buluhũ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ. 18Pɔ kiɖuwoe kɛbhɛtɛɛ dza? Kɛgɛ pɛ ɔdɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abhaa, onupɛ kinu asɛnɛ ibui tɛtɔtɔɖɔ pɛnɔsɛ kibui gbã tsyɛ elo, baɖɔ Kristo ibuiɛ. Kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ ɛmɔ sameɛ.
Ee, ɛbazã ɛlɛ abha zɛmɔ sameɛ, 19ɔmɔsɛ inyi sɛ ganà wɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu nɛ̀ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ Yesu Kristo ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkɔ mɛɛ, kɛgɛ ba mɛabha batsyina dzì mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛ lu nɛ ɛkpã. 20Iɖi idzo mɛ gagalĩi pɛ ilu awɔ̃ sɛ ɛtɛ bà ŋã kiwũi nɛidzo nanà abha, pɔ ɛba mɔ̃ kemì kpɛkpɛ gelee, sɛ tɛ otsiɛ nɔ gɛ babà zakpɛ̀ Kristo inyeɛ nɛitití nɛ mɛ mɛ̀, kɛbà gã ɛkpã mɛ alo butsì mɛ tsyɛo. 21Nɛ mɛ awɔ̃pɛ mɛɛ, Kristo mɛ lɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã ɔkɔ kɛlɛ onupɛ its’ tsyɛɛ, ɛbamɔ kɛdɔ̃ tili. 22Onupɛ ɛbazã nɛ̀ ɛkpãa nɛ ishudzya mɛɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbadzi busi eyuyu gbangbã ɔkɔ mɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Pɔ kiɖuwoe mɛbà lɔkɔ dza? Itinyi! 23Ɛkpasɛ alɛ taabha nɛishi, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ ɛshɛ dɛzã Kristo ɔbha, gɛpɛ̃ ɔdɛ, 24pɔ kɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ xɔnɔ ɔdɛ sɛ tɛ mɛzã ishupiɛ mɛ. 25Gɛ ilũ kibui ɛlɛ esi soɔ, inyi sɛ ɛbazã ishupiɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbavɛ ɛlɛ abha plɛnɔ ɔnɔ petee nɛ ɔnɔ otugbà vɛvɛ nɛ̀ same mɔmɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, 26sɛ tɛ onupɛ ɛzɛba wɔnɔ ɔbhaa, wɔnɔ same mɔmɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ ebeyì agbagbà nɛ mɛ ɛtakpu.
27Kɛka nyia ka gɛzɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔ nyanà ishu ovunɔ nɛ kidzo nɔnɔ abha gɛba shɔnɔ Kristo yɛibui gbangbã. Kɛlɛ edzì asɛ ɛba sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ ɔnɔ alo tɛ mɛilũ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛma wɔnɔ ɔbha tsyɛ elo, ɛbatì sɛ nɔodzi gagalĩi nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa tonikpo mɛ, pɛ nɔbɔ dɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ asɛ anɔ tenikpo ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã 28gɛ kifù nanà tɛbà yi ɔnɔ ɔganà idzo nanà abha nɛ bagɛ alɔɛtití nɛ ɔnɔ shuɔ. Kɛlɛ kasɛ alɛ ɔsɛ bebè tsí, pɔ tɛ bayɛkɛ wɔnɔ elu nɛ̀ ɛkpãa, Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ kɛbà de. 29Ɔmɔsɛ batɛ dɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha nɛ Kristo inyeɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, gɛnɛ yɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ete, pɔ tɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ ɔplɛni tsyɛ, 30gɛ nɔɔgã bɔtɔ ɛlɛ nɛidi mɛ gɛ nɔmɔ ɔsɛ ɛzɛgãa, ɛka tsiɖi bɔtɔ ɔlɛ nɛidi abha.

Title: FILIPIANƐ 2
Content:
Tɛgagã Nɛ Kristo Ishu Esi Zhizhinì Ulũ
1Onupɛ nɔmɔ̃ kemì kpɛkpɛ tieli odenɔ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ Kristoɔ, onupɛ nɔmɔ ishumɛ yɔyɔ tili tsyɛ odenɔ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, onupɛ bɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, onupɛ bɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ yɔyɔ ebui pɛ buɖi banɔ ashagabui, 2kɛlɛ nɔkɔ mɛ same mɔmɔ ana nɛ bɔlɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe tenikpo tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu, gɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ lɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ, pɛ bɔlɛ tenikpo nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ ebui tɔtɔɖɔ mɛ. 3Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kibui nanà ɔlɔkɔ pɛ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃ nɔ, alo ishu fefeke gɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ, pɔ nɔ ozhinì ishu esi, tɛ nɔmɔ babhlatɔ asɛ bapɛ̃ adɛ ɔnɔ shu. 4Wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nanà etiɖì kɛgɛ apɛ akɔ yɛishu ete, pɔ eɖì kɛgɛ bapɛ̃ kɔ babhlatɔ tsyɛ.
5Wɔnɔ ɛkpã zazãna zã ɔmɔasɛ kana gɛ Yesu Kristo yɛ tsyɛ lɛɛ ana.
6Anɔ gɛ alɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛzazã mɛ,
tsyɛ agɛ mɔ yɛishu asɛ ashɔ nɛ̀ tɛzazã asɛ Owusoso Akaa kinu kɛdɔ̃ gɛ abalà nyanà
7pɔ abhɛtɛ ishu asɛ etinu kɛdɔ̃ nanà,
pɛ abhɛtɛ yɛishu asɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ana,
gɛ babhɛtɛ yɛ nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ.
8Pɔ bamɔ yɛ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ asɛ anɔdzyrame ana,
ezhinì yɛishu esi
kɛlɛ elũ atɔ̃ akɔ butsí,
butsiɛ nɛ butsi osiɛ shu tsyɛ!
9Kliso Owusoso Akaa ewunu yɛatɔɖɔ ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ ɔdɛ
kɛlɛ akɔyɛ yɛinyèɛ gɛ ɖama ɔdɛ kinye ka nyia ka ɛdi,
10sɛ tɛ onupɛ bekulu Yesu inyeɛ, tɛ bedzu kikulusi ka nyia ka esi,
nɛ kititiɛ nɛ̀ kesiakpa niesi,
11kɛlɛ kineke ka nyia ka dalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ Yesu Kristo yɛenu Apaleteɛ,
ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa shu tɛdadalɛ.
Titsetsé Asɛ Awɔ̃ɛɛ Ana
12Mɛɔbhia alɛ mɔ, klisoɔ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔolũ atɔ̃ kibè nyia beɛ, anɛ gɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha ete, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ɔdɛ ana gɛ onupɛ ɛma ɔnɔ ɔbha tsyɛ, nɔzã ɛlɛ abha ɔzɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɛkpã tɛyɛyɛkɛ lu nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ kifusisi nɛ̀ tishushukù mɛ, 13ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, flogo tɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɛbui tili, nɛ̀ tɛ obu katsɛɖɛ tieli nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ gbangbã nɔlũ.
14Nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ kibui nanà nɛ ishu kpakpãmɛ alo ebui wɔawlɔ̃akɛ mɛ, 15sɛ tɛ batɛmɔ bamɛ tsitsí nanà nɛ ɔnɔ shu, pɔ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ asɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ gɛ batɛ amɔ kibui zizĩ nɛ ɔnɔ shu, nɛ obo kanɔ kɔklɔ̃ nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ alɛ mɛ gɛ wɔnɔ xɔnɔ̃ otsè asɛ awɔ̃ɛɛ gɛ alɛ kititiɛ ana, 16nɛ kana gɛ nɔnyanà ɛkpã mɛ ibuiɛ ovunɔɔ shu, sɛ tɛ ɛlà tũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ nɛ Kristo kiwui nabha, sɛ ɛgɛ wɔa ɛxɔ̃ɛ alo ɛtɔ bɔwɔãa. 17Pɔ edzi asɛ babalɛ mɛ dzyosu esi odenɔ wɔnɔ ishu tɛlɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ tsyɛ elo, same eekù mɛ nɛ ɔnɔ petee shu. 18Klisoɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔmɔ same plɛnɔ mɛ.
Timoteo Nɛ̀ Epafrodito
19Ilù awɔ̃ nɛ Apalete Yesu abha sɛ ɛbàkpɛ Timoteo nɛ ɔnɔ ɔkɔ odunũ ɔlɛ, sɛ tɛ mɛtsyɛ mɔ same gɛ onupɛ ɛyɛkɛ ɔklasɔ̃ nɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ. 20Ananà bhama mɛahɔɛ ɔdɛ yɛ, gɛ alɔkɔ kibui nɛ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ shu kɛgbãa. 21Ɔmɔsɛ aka nyia aka apɛ yɛishu tɛpɛpɛ̀, gɛnɛ Yesu Kristo ayɛ shu. 22Pɔ nɔonyi ɔsɛ Timoteo alɔkɔ yɛishu akɔ, ɔmɔsɛ asɛ eyi gɛ alɛ yɛakaa ɔbhaa, akpɛ kɛtakpu esi aplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa ebuiɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawa mɛ. 23Klisoɔ, ɛkpɛ kemi, sɛ tɛ mɛ sɛsɛ yɛ gɛ onupɛ ɛmɔ kɛvɛɛ gɛ ebuiɛ avɛ alɛ abha nɛ mɛɛ. 24Kɛlɛ ɛyɛkɛ mɛishu abha aŋã nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ɔsɛ mɛtsyɛ babà tsĩɔɔ ɔlɛ.
25Pɔ ɛmɔ sɛ kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ mɛidzini Epafrodito gɛenu mɛadzya sɛsɛ, nɛ̀ mɛ ɔhagbo xɔ̃ɛwa nɛ keyu atata pɛ enu wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ nɔsɛsɛ ɔsɛ ezeɖi mɛabhaa. 26Edzè gɛ aka mɔ ɔnɔ ɖi, kɛlɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔkpasɛ yɛ mɛ ɔmɔsɛ nɔolũ ɔsɛ yɛishumɛ zĩ. 27Kibui gbã yɛishumɛ zĩ bafala nɔ, gɛ atɔ ɛbɔɛ tɛ etsí. Pɔ Owusoso Akaa eɖi yɛ ashagabui, kɛlɛ gɛnɛ yɛ ete, pɔ mɛtsyɛ, sɛ tɛ ɛtɛba mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ dzinì mɔ. 28Kliso ɛka pɛɛ gagalĩ sɛ tɛ mɛ sɛsɛ yɛ, sɛ tɛ onupɛ nɔzɔmɔ yɛɛ, same ebeku ɔnɔ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ obozhi kesi. 29Nɔtsyanà yɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ nɛ̀ same hohoe, tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ banyɛ gɛ edzì asɛ yɛ ana, 30ɔmɔsɛ agɔ̃ kɛbɔɛ tɛ etsí nɛ Kristo yɛxɔ̃ɛ shu, gɛ alɔkɔ yɛkpã sɛ tɛ akɔ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ nɔgɛ là kɔ mɛɛ shu.

Title: FILIPIANƐ 3
Content:
Awɔ̃lulu Ama Ishupi Lɛ Mɛ
1Gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔmɔ same nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. Kitinu bɔtɔ ɔkɔ mɛ sɛ iwlui kaa fɔnɔ ebui alɛ sɛsɛ ɔnɔ, kɛlɛinu kibui gɛ ba po ɔnɔ.
2Nɔolù awɔ̃ nɛ̀ bebu alɛ piapii, banɔ alɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa, banɔ alɛ gɛ bakpɛ apɔ̃ nɛ ishupiɛ shu. 3Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ nu kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhuiɛ, bɔlɔ agɛ ɛlɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nɔ, gɛ bɔdalɛ Yesu Kristo shu, pɛ buti lu awɔ̃ nɛ ishudzya nabha, 4gɛ mɛtsyɛ kibui tili shu so pɛ awɔ̃ lulu alɛ nɛidi alɛ̀ mɛahɔɛ nɛ ishupiɛ mɛ.
Onupɛ abhɛtɛ anɔ teli asɛ kibui tili shu so pɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ ishudzya ɛlɛ nabha, ebui alɛ mɛahɔɛ ɔdɛ anɔ alɛ, 5gɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ mɛ nɛ kiwui sɛmì nabha, pɛ inu Israel eyi gɛide Benyamin kigbogboɔ mɛ, gɛinu Hebrieyi gbangbã, pɔ nɛ ɔsha nulũɔ, idzi Farisieyi, 6gɛ ɛtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ gagalĩ, pɛ ɛzɛ tɔnɔ ɔha niede, basɛ anɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔshaa nabha xɔnɔ, kibui nanà gɛzã mɛishu.
7Pɔ kɛgɛ ɛta mɔ nɛ ebui alɛ mɛɛ, Kristo soɔ ɛga mɔ alɛ. 8Kɛgɛ zɛdɛɛ, ɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ sɛ ɛgɛ mɔ̃ kɛnanà odenɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, nɛ gɛinu kibui hohoe ɔdɛ ɔkɔmɛ sɛ ɛmɔ̃ Kristo Yesu gɛenu mɛ Apaleteɛ gɛ yɛ shu so pɛ ɛga mɔ̃ kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɔ. Ɛmɔ ebui alɛ sɛ tɛwɔnɔ̃ ete lenu sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ̃ Kristo 9tɛ bamɔ mɛ tsyɛ nɛ yɛ mɛ, gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ ɛmɔ tɛzazã piapii gɛide ɔsha mɛ akɔ mɛishu, pɛ kide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Kristo mɛ gɛ kinu kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛide Owusoso Akaa mɛ pɛ kide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. 10Ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛiti Kristo nɛ̀ ohumi nɔ gɛ ɔlɔkɔ yɛalɔ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, nɛ̀ ɔhakpɛkpɛ gɛ ɔkɔ sɛ bɔmɔ ɔtɔ ɔlɛ plɛni, tɛ budzi asɛ yɛ ana nɛ yɛutsi mɛ, 11klisoɔ, nɛ ɔkɔ toliɛ, tɛ mɛtsyɛ mɔ tɛlɔlɔ denɔ bekpuɔ mɛ.
Tɛwɔawlɔ̃akɛ Ɔkɔ Kabha Ŋaŋã
12Gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ mɛahɔɛ atɛdɔ ebui alɛ pete abha, alo gɛ batɛ bhɛtɛ mɛ mɛidzì anɔ nanà, pɔ ɛwlɔãkɛ sɛ tɛ mɛahɔɛ adɔ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ shu so pɛ Kristo ahɔɛ adɔ mɛ abha. 13Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛtɛ mɔ mɛishu otsiɛ asɛ mɛahɔɛ atɛdɔ ɛlɛ abha. Pɔ kibui tinikpo gɛ ɛbhɛtɛɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, ɛbà dzɛkɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛatɛ fala tɛ ɛwlɔakɛ ɔkɔ kɛgɛ lɛ mɛ otugbà boŋ, 14Ɛwlɔ̃akɛ sɛ tɛ mɛŋã kabha tɛ ɛyɛkɛ kɛbhɛɛ gɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ Owusoso Akaa ekulu mɛ ɔvɛnɔ ititiɛ ɔmana Kristo Yesu mɛ.
15Kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔ agɛ ishèɛ petee zilu awɔ̃ ɖi ebuiɛ ana. Kɛlɛ onupɛ nɛ kawɔ̃pɛ tieli mɛ wɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe bhlatɔ mɛ tsyɛɛ, kɛlɛ tsyɛ Owusoso Akaa abadãlɛ ɛlɛ mɛ akɔ wɔ. 16Nɔkɔ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɛ kɛgɛ bɔtɛ yɛkɛ ete shu.
17Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔbhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ̀ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ tɛ nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ mɛ ɛyɛ ulũ, tɛ nɔ olù awɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɛ edzi nɛ ɛkpã nɛ edzoɔ gɛ bɔkasɛ wɔnɔ shu. 18Ɔmɔsɛ, asɛ gɛ izi tseɖe ɔnɔ bafalanɔ, pɛ ɛkaɖɔ ɛlɛ nɛ̀ ɛwɔmɛɛ, banɔ kpekpèɛ edzi nɛ̀ ɛkpã asɛ banɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ Kristo yɛutsi osiɛ. 19Kɛgɛ babà alɛ abha kɛlɛinu butsí, balɛ obudiɛ ɔlɛonu balɛ kevũɔ, same eku alɛ nɛ kibui nɔnɔ shu gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ baŋã kiwũi. Balɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ etsiɖi kesiakpa abha ɔdɔ̃ abha. 20Pɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔɔ, bɔlɛ epi alɛ itití. Kɛlɛ bulipo agɛ aba yɛkɛ kɔ ɔlɔ edenɔ ɛkɛlɛ gagalĩ, gɛenu Apalete Yesu Kristo, 21anɔ gɛ, ohumi ɔlɛ yɛahɔɛ, pɛ alɔkɔ agbanà kɛka nyia ka ɔkpɛ yɛesi nɔ, ebè tsyina ɔlɔ ishudzya ɛlɛ gɛ ma kɛnanà mɛɛ tɛ bɔzã asɛ yɛɔyɛ dadalɛ.

Title: FILIPIANƐ 4
Content:
1Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ agɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ pɛ ɛpɛ ɔnɔ amɛ sɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ agɛ onu mɛ same nɛ̀ kabha ŋaŋã ikutu, kana kɛlɛ sɛ nɔzã gagalĩi nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ, mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ!
Banɔ Emi Kpɛkpɛ
2Ɛɛkɔ Ewodia nɛ̀ Sintixe ɛtakpu sɛ tɛ nɔolũ bagɔlɔ esi nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. 3Ee, kɛlɛ ibisi odenɔ wɔnɔ agɛ onu mɛ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ, nɔ plɛnɔ badzɛ alɛ gɛ gɛazã aplɛnɔ mɛ gagalĩi nɛ kibui gbangbã axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Klemens nɛ̀ mɛ ɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ balɛ inyeɛ kpasɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ.
4Nɔmɔ same nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ kibe nyia bè, iwlui kaɖɔ ɛlɛ sɛ, nɔmɔ same! 5Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu nyanyana dzi kibui mɔmɔ ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ̀ petee. Apaleteɛ etso aba. 6Nɔtɛ lɔkɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ kɛnanà shu, pɔ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ, nɔ ganà ɛlɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu, kɛdɔ̃ bibisì, nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhú mɛ, nɔ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɛdɔ̃ bibisìɛ lu Owusoso Akaa namɛ. 7Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa ishu yɔyɔɔ gɛidɛ ebui esi lulũ ka nyia ka ɛdiɛ mɛɛ, aba gbanà ɔnɔ etúɔ nɛ̀ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.
8Gɔgɔɛ nɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ dzã kiwuhũ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ pɛ̃, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ ɛlɛ shu dalɛ̃, kɛnɔnɔ gɛlɛ sɛ badɛmɛ nɔ, kɛnɔnɔ gɛ kiku anɔ same, onupɛ kibui gbangbã tili, kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ bakpɛ ɛlɛ nɛititíɛ, nɔ bhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ alɛ nɛidi shu. 9Kɛnɔnɔ gɛ nɔ kpasɛ alo nɔ yɛkɛɛ alo nolũ odenɔ mɛ ɔkɔɔ, alo pɛ nɔmɔ ɛlɛ nɛ mɛ mɛɛ, nɔ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha. Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu ishu yɔyɔ anunɔ abazã aplɛnɔ ɔnɔ.
Ahɔɛ Huhu Ɔkɔ Balɛ Ɔdɔ̃ Kɔkɔ
10Ɛmɔ same hohoe nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ sɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ owlui ɔlɔkɔ tili nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ɔkɔ mɛ. Kibui gbã, nɔ lɔkɔ tili nɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, pɔ nɔgɛ mɔ idzo tɛ nobu ɛlɛ ɔkasɛ. 11Gɛnɛ sɛ kɛdɔ̃ mɛpɛ so pɛ ɛɛɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ, pɔ ɛkpasɛ kana gɛ kɛdɔ̃ ku anɔ awɔ̃ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ. 12Inyi idzi gɛ kidzi nɛ kɛdɔ̃ pɛpɛ ibè, kɛlɛ inyi kana gɛ kidzi tɛ bɔdɔ̃ kpekpè tsyɛ zã wɔahɔɛ. Ɛkpasɛ kibui kpukpũɔ gɛ kpasɛ kiku gɛ kɛdɔ̃ ku anɔ awɔ̃ nɛ kibui ka nyia ka ɛdì mɛ, onupɛ bakɔ wɔ kɛŋaŋã oxui alo bɔbhɛ yì wɔ tsyɛ elo, onupɛ bɔdɔ̃ lɛ wɔahɔɛ alo kɛnanà ma wɔahɔɛ. 13Ɛba là bhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka ɔganà agɛ yɛakɔ mɛ ohumi nɔ abha.
14Pɔ apɛ̃ akɔ ɔnɔ sɛ nɔmɔ ɔtɔ ɔplɛnɔ mɛ. 15Kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, asɛ gɛ wɔnɔ Filipianɛ onyi ɛlɛ anaa, nɛ kesikpɛkpɛ ewuiɛ gɛ atɛ ba fala mɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ kibui gbangbãa, gɛ ɛlɔ de Makedonia nɔɔ, ɔha tenikpo tsyɛ ɔgɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ nɛ ɛlɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛ mɛ, ɔdɛ wɔnɔ ete, 16ɔmɔsɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛzã Tesalonika tsyɛ elo, nɔzɔ sɛsɛ mɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ owlui ɔzɔ sɛsɛ gɛ ɛdanà gɛzã mɛahɔɛ. 17Gɛnɛ sɛ gɛ ɛpɛ ɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ so, pɔ iɖi kɛgɛ badzì tiyuyulà kɔ ɔnɔ. 18Ɛtɛ yɛkɛ mɛ ɛbhɛ babuia petee, kɛlɛ bazabà buia ɛlɛ atɔɖɔ akɔ mɛ ɔdɛ, baakɔ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ kpekpe, pɔ otsi ko mɛ yɛkɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ nɔ sɛsɛ mɛ ɔganà Epafrodito abha. Bunu bɔdɔ̃ gbangbã kɔkɔ, bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bayɛkɛ, gɛ buku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃. 19Kɛlɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa abakɔ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ nɔ nɛ yɛ ehoeyi udɔ̃ dadalɛ gɛ kpasɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.
20Ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ tihɔɔ. Amen.
Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
21Ɛɛsɛnɛ bagɛ alɛishu dalɛ pete nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ. Baadzya gɛalɛ mɛɔbha asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ. 22Banɔ dadalɛ pete asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ, asɛ banunɔ gɛalɛ Romanɛ Ekusi Gbagbla ɔpãmɛ ana.
23Tɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ ɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. Amen.

Title: KOLOSEANƐ OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Paulo eplukpa gɛ afɔnɔ̃ asɛsɛ Koloseanɛ afɔnɔ alɛ asɛsɛ ɔha gɛɔlɛ Kolose ɔma toli nɛ Asia Kiwuiɛ otukɔ gɛɔvɛ Efeso ibeɛ. Gɛnɛ Paulo yɛedzu ɔha alɛ, pɔ ɔha ɔlɛ ɔzã kɛma ɛlɛ mɛ gɛ Paulo azã kɛlɛ amɔ̃ asɛ yɛxɔ̃ɛ kinu ɔsɛ eɖi ɔlɛ ɔkɔ, kliso asɛsɛ baxɔ̃ɛwɔa edenɔ Efeso gɛenu Romanɛ ekusi ɔŋãkɔ nɛ Asia ɔdɔ̃ mɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ Paulo ebelũ asɛ asɛnɛ badɔ̃kasɛ teli afala ku Koloseanɛ ɔha mɛ gɛ bezetũ ɛlɛ akpɛ asɛ flogo tɛ otì Owusoso Akaa tɛ̀ bebu wɔ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ Kristoanɛ akpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ “efɔfuĩa mɛ bekusiɛ nɛ̀ alɛ ɔsha.” Ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ, kɛgɛ badɔ̃ kakasɛ alɛ azaɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ banɔ alɔkɔ balɛishu akpɛ ɛkɔ̀ bhɛbhɛtɛ ebui teli mɛ asɛ kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui ebui mɛ ana tɛ babhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ ɔsha gagalĩɛ gɛ kpa plɛnɔ bɔŋaŋã nɛ̀ ebui bhlatɔ teli tsyɛ.
Paulo afɔnɔ eplukpa alɔkɔ Kristoanɛ ibuiɛ alɔɛtití nɔ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi shu. Kitu mɛ ibuiɛ gɛ alɔkɔ ebu kibui ɛlɛ nulũ nɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, Yesu Kristo abalà ebu anɔ kɛlɛ ebui bhlatɔ abha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ alɛ abha tɛbhɛ bhɛtɛ agbanà banɔ ashɛnɛ nɛ yɛ ɔbha. Ɔgana Kristo abha, Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɔgana yɛabha yɛedzinì alɛ amana yɛɔkɔ. Tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ ete awɔ̃ lulu akɔ tibubu alɛ kɔ kanɔ nɔ̀. Kɛlɛ Paulo abaɖɔ kɛgɛ bɔdɔ̃ gbagbla kakasɛ ɔlɛ bamana nɛ bayɛyɛkɛŋã ɛkpã mɛ.
Babà kpɛ ɛlɛ awɔ̃ elu asɛ Tixiko, anɔ gɛ yɛalɔkɔ keplukpa alɛ avɛnɔ Kolose kɔ Pauloɔ, Onesimo gɛedzì anɔ dzidzi pɛ yɛtakpu Paulo afɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ Filimon tsyɛ agbana yɛavɛnɔ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ1.1-8
Kana gɛ Kristo ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa dziɛ1.9—2.19
Ɛkpã vɔvɔ nɛ Kristo mɛ2.20—4.6
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 4.7-18

Title: KOLOSEANƐ 1
Content:
1Mɛ Paulo gɛinu anɔkpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, nɛ̀ Timoteo gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya,
2Bɔlɔ sɛsɛ eplukpa alɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ banɔ dadalɛ gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya alɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ pɛ nɔɖɔ kibui gbã nɛ Koloseɛ,
Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ kɔ ɔnɔ.
Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu
3Buuhù Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo Yɛakaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be gɛ onupɛ bukulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu, 4ɔmɔsɛ bulu wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Yesu Kristo abha nɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkɔ banɔ dadalɛ petee, 5tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛide kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ebuiɛ gɛ babalɛ elu akɔ ɔnɔ nɛ kititiɛ mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔotilũ nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ kinu kibui gbã mɛ, gɛinu kibui gbangbã 6gɛ ba ɔnɔ kɔ. Nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee nɔ, kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ yù eyuyù kɛlɛ kishe tɔɖɔ, asɛ kana gɛ kɛbhɛtɛ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi odenɔ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha gɛ nɔolũ ɛlɛ pɛ nɔolũ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ɛlɛ kibui gbã petee esi. 7Nɔ kpasɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ Epafro bɔlɔ adzya gɛ aadɛ axɔ̃ɛ aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ ɔkɔ, anɔ gɛ aɖɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebui nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtakpu, 8pɛ yɛetseɖe ɔlɔ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɔ nɔ nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ.
9Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, odenɔ kiwuiɛ gɛ kɛlɛ abha bulũ wɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ɔ, bɔkà yɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu kɔ ɔnɔ pɛ bubisi Owusoso Akaa sɛ eyuku ɔnɔ mɛ nɛ̀ kibuititì nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũ ɔganà ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ bubuti nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũɔ petee mɛ. 10Kɛlɛ bukulù Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛkpã gɛ ɛshɔ̃ ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ pɛ lɛbàku yɛawɔ̃ nɛ kidzo ka nyia ka abha, tɛ̀ nɔoyu eyuyù nɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ gbangbã ka nyia ka wɔawɔa mɛ̀, tɛ̀ nɔoshè nɛ Owusoso Akaa kibuititìɛ mɛ, 11tɛ̀ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ̀ ohumi petee nɛ yɛ ohumi dadalɛ nulũ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔmɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kitu esi lulu tɛ nozohu Akaa 12ahɔɛ nɛ̀ same, anɔ gɛ akɔ nɔ shɔnɔ sɛ nɔmɔ tili odenɔ banɔ dadalɛ kaŋãsiɛ gɛalɛ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ gɛ dalɛ. 13Ɔmɔsɛ yɛebu ɔlɔ odenɔ otumũ mɛ kabha ŋaŋã esi, kɛlɛ agbanà ɔlɔ amana Yɛeyianyɛ gɛ adɛmɛnɔ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ, 14anɔ gɛ yɛmɛ bebu ɔlɔ pɛ balɔkɔ ɔlɔ ebui kpa etsye ɔlɔ.
Kristoɔ Gɛadɛɛ
15Yesu yɛakpasɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ bɔtɛ mɔɔ tɛlɛlɛ mɛ, eyi gɛiputɔ gɛ bamɔ̃ pɛ aŋã bɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ petee abha. 16Ɔmɔsɛ ɔganà yɛabha babhɛtɛ bɔdɔ̃ɔ petee, kititì ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ kesiakpa abha ɔyɛ, bɔgɛ bamɔ̃ nɛ̀ awuhũ nɛ̀ bɔgɛ batɛ amɔ̃, edzì asɛ beekusi ugbu alo ihumi elete alo beekusi alo ɔshakɔkɔ tsyɛ elo, yɛabhɛtɛ ɔdɔ̃ petee kɛlɛ bɔlɛ kɔɛ. 17Yɛalɛ flogo pɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee babà, kɛlɛ yɛmɛ bɔdɔ̃ petee nyana agɔlɔ vunɔ. 18Kɛlɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu akɔ ishudzyaa nɛ̀ ɔhaa, yɛenu kesi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ eyi gɛiputɔ gɛ bamɔ̃ pɛ ede bekpuɔ mɛ aba, sɛ tɛ̀ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛɛ, yɛabà amɔ̃ ohumi adɛ. 19Ɔmɔsɛ samè eku Owusoso akaa asɛ yɛakpasɛ yɛmɛ, 20kɛlɛ ɔganà yɛabha tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ̀ yɛishu tenikpo nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ petee, edzì asɛ kesiakpa abha ɔdɔ̃ alo kititi ɔyɛ tsyɛ elo, tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ tenikpo ɔganà yɛ dzyosu nɔ gɛ babalɛ̀ nɛ butsi osiɛ shuɔ mɛ.
21Gɛ noyidè nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu pɛ nɔodzì banɔ gɛ nɔtɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɛ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã kpaa gɛ nɔodzi nɔ shu so. 22Pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ, abhɛtɛ̀ ɔnɔ tenikpo nɛ̀ Kristo ishudzya ɔganà butsi mɛ, tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ishu lɛ dalɛ nɛ yɛamɛ, tɛ̀ batɛmɔ kihututũ nanà nɛ ɔnɔ shu tɛ̀ noboli odenɔ kɛpɔ bubu mɛ, 23onupɛ nɔzã ɛlɛ abha nɛ ɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, pɛ nɔodzi gagalĩ, pɛ nɔgɛ shɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖiɛ gɛlɛ kibui gbangbã mɛ shu. Kibui gbangbã ɛlɛ gɛ nɔolũɔ baɖɔ etseɖe kɛdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka gɛ lɛ kitití niesi, pɛ kɛlɛ shu mɛ Paulo badzi axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔɔ.
Paulo Axɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Ɔkɔ Ɔhaa
24Otsi alɛ ɛmɔ samɛ nɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ shu mɛtɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ, kɛlɛ mɛishu dzya mɛ yuku nɛ̀ kɛgɛ ma mɛahɔɛ nɛ Kristo ɔtɔ shuɔ, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ yɛishu dzya shu soɔ, gɛenu ɔhaa 25Ɛbadzì kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔganà kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ mɛ sɛ ɛkpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ ɔnɔ gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ petee, 26gɛenu ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ balɔkɔ ekpũ agɔ kpekpè nɛ alɛ pɛ bɔmɔ̃ gelee bafala, pɔ otsi bebu ɛlɛ akasɛ banɔ dadalɛ. 27Balɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu elu asɛ bakɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ etì nɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ dadalɛ gɛlɛ ebui kpukpũ alɛ shu, gɛenu Kristoɔ gɛ akpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ, yɛabha bulũ awɔ̃ akɔ ebui dadalɛ.
28Bɔɖɔ yɛebuiɛ ɔkanà, kɛlɛ bɔlɔkɔ bubutì petee kpalà anɔ pɛ bɔkasɛ alɛ ɔdɔ̃, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔkɔ aka nyia aka ana nɛ Kristo mɛ. 29Ɔvɛnɔ kibui ɛlɛ ɔgɔgɔɛ ɔkɔɔ mɛɛtɔ, pɛ ɛwlɔ̃akɛ nɛ̀ yɛohumi nɔ petee, gɛ lɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩi nɛ mɛ mɛ̀.

Title: KOLOSEANƐ 2
Content:
1Ɛpɛ sɛ nɔotì kana gɛ ɛwlɔãkɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ Ladokia nɔ, nɛ̀ banɔ nɔ petee gɛ akamɔ mɛ eɖiɛ. 2Kɛgɛ ɛtɔɖɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bamɔ̃ kemikpɛkpɛ nɛ alɛ etúɔ mɛ tɛ̀ babhɛtɛ tenikpo nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ bamɔ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ petee nɛ ebui esi lulũ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ betì Owusoso Akaa ebui kpukpũɔ gɛ bekulu asɛ Kristoɔ, 3gɛ yɛ mɛ bekpũ bubutì mɛ ehoeyi ɔdɔ̃ gɛinu bubutì nɛ̀ kibuititìɛ. 4Itseɖe ɔnɔ kibui ɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ananà atɛ bawɔɛ ɔnɔ, nɛ̀ ebui wawlɔakɛ gɛ lawɔ̃ɛ asɛ lapɛ̃ɛ. 5Ɛma ɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ishupi mɛ tsyɛ elo, ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa xɔnɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛpɛ sɛ mɛitì kɛlɛ gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ gagalĩ nɛ Kristoɔ mɛ.
Ishu Ahɔɛmɛ Zazã Odenɔ Banɔdzyrame Ɔsha Kɔkɔ Ɔganà Ɛkpã Zazãna Nɛ Kristo Mɛ
6Klisoɔ, asɛ kana gɛ nɔ yɛkɛ Yesu Kristo asɛ Apalete ana, nɔvɛ̀ ɛlɛ abha tɛ̀ nɔzã yɛ mɛ, 7nɔkpɛ̀ igu tɛ̀ nɔbhɔ tɔɖɔ kabha nɛ yɛ mɛ, nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ asɛ kana gɛ bakasɛ ɔnɔ ana, tɛ̀ nɔkɔ ɔnɔ ahɔɛhuhu eyuku gbagbà.
8Nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ ananà agɛmɔ idzo nanà pɛ alɔkɔ asɛnɛ bubuti ebui alɔkɔ awɔɛ wɔnɔ nɔ, ebui gɛ lakpà plɛnɔ banɔdzyrame ɛkɔɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ mɛ ɛkpã zazãna ebui ɔdɛ Kritoɔ.
9Ɔmɔsɛ Kristoɔ mɛ, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ ɛkpã bazã nɛ ishudzya mɛ, 10kɛlɛ balɔkɔ Kristo akɔ ɔnɔ petee, anɔ gɛ yɛenu kɛtakpu akɔ ohumi nɛ̀ ɔsha kɔkɔ ka nyia ka. 11Yɛmɛ bebhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ, gɛ nɔ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, gɛnɛ kɛhɔ̃a gɛ bebhui nɛ̀ banɔdzyrame ahɔɛ, pɔ kɛhɔ̃a gɛ Kristo ebhui, 12gɛ bavɔbɔ wɔnɔ aplɛnɔ yɛ nɛ bulĩ kpɛkpɛ mɛ pɛ befeke wɔnɔ aplɛnɔ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, ɔganà Owusoso Akaa yɛohumi nɔ mɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛefeke yɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ.
13Kibeɛ gɛ nɔotsí nɛ wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, gɛ beke bhui kɛhɔ̃a akɔ ɔnɔ pɛ nɔzã ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tyɛ elo, Owusoso Akaa akɔ nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ̀ Kristo. Alɔkɔ ebui kpa etsye ɔlɔ petee, 14gɛ batsà odì akpɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ kukuɔ nɛ̀ alɛ ɔsha gɛ lɔɛtití nɛ ɔlɔ shuɔ mɛɛ, alɔkɔ alɛ ashɛnɔ adɛ kpalà nɛ butsì osiɛ shu. 15Kibeɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ keyutadɔ̃ nɛ̀ ihumi nɔ nɛ̀ bekusiɛ petee ahɔɛɛ, ebui ɛlɛ akasɛ nɛ banɔɛshi, gɛ alɔkɔ butsí osiɛ amɔ kabhaŋaŋã nɛ alɛ shuɔ.
16Klisoɔ nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà ekulu kebhu nɛ̀ ɔnɔ nɛ kɛgɛ nɔɔŋã alo pɛ nɔwɔ̃ɛ shu, alo nɛ kibui tili gɛ kpa plɛnɔ ɔhamɛ iwui ŋaŋã shu, asɛ woele vɔvɔ iwui ŋaŋã alo nɛ Sabat kimoelewuiɛ shu. 17Ebui alɛ enu kɛtɔwui ɔkɔ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ otugbà abaa, ebuiɛ gɛenu ebui gbã, Kristoɔ mɛ bamɔ̃ alɛ. 18Nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà gɛ adɛmɛ ezhini ishu esi nɛ asɛnɛ mɛ, pɛ aakpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ nɔtɛ mɔ kɛbhɛ̃ babuia nɔ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ anyɔ̃ ebui mɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ amɔ̃ shu, kɛlɛ yɛ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ ama ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ akɔ efeke yɛishu nɛ kɛgɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ shu. 19Ayala idzoɔ gɛ kpasɛ yɛ nɛ agɛ yɛenu Kɛtakpuɔ nɛishi, anunɔ gɛ yɛ mɛ ishudzya petee nyana agɔlɔ ovunɔ pɛ lɛkpɛ tsà nɛ̀ tɛzɛ̃ɛ, pɛ lishe asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ asɛ lisheɛ.
20Gɛ nɔotsí ɔplɛnɔ Kristoɔ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛkpa zazãna shuɔ, kiɖe so pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ asɛ gɛ onupɛ nɔkɔ ɔkpasɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ dza? Nɔkɔɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ ɔsha ɛlɛ gɛ bakpɛ asɛ, 21“Nɔtɛ vɛnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛdɔ̃ ɛlɛ shu! Nɔoti minì kɛɛlɛ̀ oɖi! Nɔotì hunu kɛɛlɛ̀ tsyɛ oɖi!” 22Babhɛtɛ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ asɛ lɛezĩ odenɔ alɛ ishu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ lakpà ɔplɛnɔ banɔdzyrame ɔsha kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ. 23Ɔsha ɛlɛ nɛidi wɔ̃ɛ asɛ bubutì ebui lɛinu, nɛ kanà gɛ lɛitũ kibui kpɛ sɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ ɛlɛ, asɛnɛ ishu esi zhizhini kɔ ɛlɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ lɛɛbhɛtɛ̀ ebui gbudugbudù nɛ̀ ishupiɛ, pɔ kɛgɛ bakɔ ɔsɛ beyi ide nɛ ishudzya mɛ ebui pɛpɛ nɔ ma alɛ ahɔɛ.

Title: KOLOSEANƐ 3
Content:
Ɔsha Gɛ Lɛ Ɔkɔ Ɛkpã Dadalɛ Zazãna
1Gɛ befeke ɔnɔ nɛ̀ Kristo soɔ, nɔlɔkɔ ɔnɔ etúɔ ɔtɔɖɔ kititì ɔdɔ̃ nabha, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Kristo azã esi nɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛŋã mɛɛ. 2Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ɔdɔ̃ gɛide ititíɛ nabha, pɔ anɛ kesiakpa ɔdɔ̃ nabha. 3Ɔmɔsɛ nɔotsí, kɛlɛ otsi alɛ balɔkɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ekpũ nɛ Kristoɔ gɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ. 4Onupɛ Kristoɔ gɛenu ɔnɔ ɛkpã ebe koeyiɛ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ obokoeyì ɔplɛnii nɛ ishu dadalɛ mɛ.
5Klisoɔ nɔŋã kanɔ alɛ mɛ kɛka nyia ka idi gɛ kpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ nabha. Gɛinu asɛ ɔmamɛdɛdɛ, atsɔ̃bui, ishumɛ tɛlɔlɔ nɛ adzɛ shu, ebui zizĩ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ, nɛ̀ mɛ ete tɛpɛpɛ̃ gɛinu ibudi ebui. 6Nɛ ebui alɛ shu soɔ, Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔbɔba. 7Nɔzɔ ɔgã nɛ edzo alɛ abha, nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛzã oɖiɛ mɛ. 8Pɔ otsi alɛ xɔnɔ kɛlɛ sɛ nɔobu ebui alɛ ɔtɛɛ, ebui asɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ kpɛkpɛ, ɔmɔpɔɛ zizĩ gɛɔmana ebela, banɔ shu zizĩ, kaɖɔ kpa ɖɔɖɔ nɛ anɔ shu, nɛ̀ atsɔ̃bui gɛide wɔnɔ olugbũ mɛ. 9Nɔtɛ̀ sɛ asɛnɛ otseɖe agɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔtɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɛkpã gɛ nɔtɛ zã oɖiɛ nɛ̀ alɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ shu 10pɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɛkpã vɔvɔ ɔkpɛ, gɛ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ avɔvɔ nɛ̀ kibuititì nɛ agɛ yɛabhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ kedzi avɔvɔ tɛzazã mɛ. 11Nɛ ɛkɛlɛ Helaeyi alo Yudaeyi nanà ama, kɛhɔ̃a bhui bhui alo kɛhɔ̃a mabhui mabhui ma. Anɔ gɛ ehu buluhũ gɛ betielũ ɔlɛ mɛ tsyɛ ama, alo anɔ gɛ yɛ awuhũ agɛ kpà, anɔ dzidzì alo anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ, pɔ tenikpo balɛ nɛ Kristo mɛ, kɛlɛ Kristo yɛalɛ alɛ petee mɛ.
12Kliso asɛ banɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu elù, gɛ balɛishu dalɛ pɛ adɛmɛ nɛ alɛ ana, nɔlɔkɔ ashagabui ɖiɖi, ɛyamɛ gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, ishu esi zhizhini, ishu nyanyana ovunɔ nɛ̀ kitu esi lulu ɔkpɛ asɛ akpɛkpɛ. 13Nɔolũ agɔlɔ esi tɛ̀ nɔlɔkɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ ɔkpasɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ otsye agɔlɔ. Nɔlɔkɔ tsye asɛ kana gɛ Apaleteɛ tsyɛ alɔkɔ etsye ɔnɔ ana. 14Nɛ ebui piapi alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ edeɛ, nɔlɔkɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ ɛlɛ nyanà ebuiɛ petee ovunɔ nɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ gɛ apɛ̃ mɛ.
15Nɔkɔ Kristo ishu yɔyɔ ŋã wɔnɔ etúɔ nabha, ɔmɔsɛ asɛ banɔ gɛede ishupi tunikpo mɛ ana, bekulu ɔnɔ avɛnɔ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛhuhu. 16Nɔkɔ Kristo ibuiɛ zã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ kedzi yɛyɛkɛ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔkasɛ ɔdɔ̃ pɛ nohu buluhũ ɔkɔ agɔlɔ nɛ bubutì petee mɛ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔɔkalà ɛdzɛ zhazhã eplukpa pɛ nɔzhã ɛfɔfuĩa mɛ ɛdzɛɛ nɛ̀ ahɔɛhuhu nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. 17Kɛlɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛɛ tsyɛɛ, onupɛ kibui ɖɔɖɔ alo ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔbhɛtɛ alɛ petee nɛ Apalete Yesu inyèɛ mɛ, tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ahɔɛ huhu ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔganà yɛabha.
Ɔsha Gɛ Gbanà Kristo Bɔpamɛanɛ
18Banyɛ edzinì mɔ, nɔozhinì ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ, asɛ gɛ kɛshɔnɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ ana.
19Badzɛ enyineɛ, nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ, kɛlɛ nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ kɔ alɛ.
20Bunuvɔɛ nɔ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ elĩ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ akaalɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛ ku Apalete nawɔ̃. 21Beyiakaa tsyɛ, nɔtɛ ɔkpɛ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ, onu gɛnɛ anaa kemikpɛkpɛ atɛ bazã alɛ mɛ. 22Banɔ dzidziɛ, nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ kesiakpa abha apaleteɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, nɔtɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ sɛ gɛ balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi wɔnɔ abha tɛ nɔoku alɛ awɔ̃ so, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ odenɔ ɛyamɛ nɛ̀ kitu gbangbã mɛ tɛ nɔlɔkɔ ɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ nɔ. 23Kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kitúɔ petee mɛ, asɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɔkɔ Apaleteɛ ana, gɛnɛ ɔkɔ banɔdzyrame 24ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ nɔbɔmɔ kaŋãsi odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ asɛ kɛbhɛ babuia ana. Apalete Yesu nɔ ɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ. 25Aka nyia aka gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, babà buia kɛlɛ bhɛ̃ akɔɛ, kɛlɛ bamɛ ɖiɖi nanà mã ɛlɛ mɛ.

Title: KOLOSEANƐ 4
Content:
1Bapaleteɛ, nɔkɔ wɔnɔ anɔ dzidziɛ kɛgɛ shɔnɔ pɛ kɛpɛ̃ ɔsɛ nɔkɔ alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ Apalete alɛ ɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛititíɛ.
Buluhũ Huhuɔ Gɛ Aplɛnɔ Ɔkɔ Alɛ
2Nɔzã ɛlɛ abha tɛ nozo kulu Owusoso Akaa, nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ tɛ̀ nɔ ozohu ahɔɛ. 3Kɛlɛ nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ ɛtakpu, sɛ tɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa adalɛ kedulũ ɔkɔ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔɖɔ Kristo yɛebui kpukpũɔ ɔkanà, kibuiɛ gɛ ɛlɛ shu mɛ kpasɛ ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ. 4Nɔ okulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ̀ ɛlà ɖɔ kibuiɛ piapii asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛɖɔ ɛlɛ. 5Nɔotì bubutì idzoɔ gɛ nɔbɔ lɔkɔ ɔkpɛ ɔha nɛ̀ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa, nɔwɔa kibè ka nyia ka gɛ nɔmɔ̃ shu ɛxɔ̃ɛ piapii. 6Nɔkɔ ɔnɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ akasɛ sɛ bebhui ɔnɔ ebu, kaɖɔ gɛ bɔmɔɛ kpasɛ alɛ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔotì kana gɛ nɔ obobù kibui ulũ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka.
Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
7Tikikus ebètseɖɔ wɔnɔ ebuiɛ petee mɛ gɛ ɛgã. Enu adzya gbangbã, axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã pɛ ewlui enu axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔplɛnɔ ɔlɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ. 8Ɛsɛsɛ yɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ, sɛ tɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tititì nɛ bɔlɔ ɔtɔ shu tɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ emi nɔ. 9Yɛ nɛ̀ Onesimo balɛ aba. Bɔlɔ adzya gbangbã nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ pɛ enu wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ tenikpo nɔ. Bebè tseɖe wɔnɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀.
10Mɛɔhagbo Aristaxo gɛ blɔnii kpasɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. Marko gɛenu elũdzyɔa ɔkɔ Banaba tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. (Nɔtɛ yɛkɛ ɔshakɔkɔ odenɔ yɛɔkɔ ɔbɔfala nɔ, kliso onupɛ aba wɔnɔ kɔɔ tɛ nɔyɛkɛ yɛ.) 11Yesuɔ gɛ bekulu asɛ Yustus tsyɛ asɛnɛ ɔnɔ sɛsɛ. Balɛ ete balɛ enu ɔhagbo Yudanɛ axɔ̃ɛwɔa gɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ukusi ŋaŋãa, kɛlɛ bakɔ asɛ mɛishuɔ mɛ dɔ fɔ̃ɔ. 12Epafrodito gɛenu Kristo Yesu yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ pɛ ede wɔnɔ mɛ tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ. Alɔkɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu kibe nyia be, sɛ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, asɛ anɔ gɛ nɔoshè pɛ bayɛkɛ ɔnɔ abha aŋã ana. 13Kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ akɔ wɔnɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ Ladokia nɛ̀ Hilapolisiɛ. 14Bɔlɔ ɔbhia Luka gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ, anɔ gɛenu awɔa bhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ Demas tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ asɛsɛ. 15Nɔsɛnɛ badzya gɛ alɛ Ladokia, nɛ̀ Nimpa nɛ̀ ɔhaa gɛalɛ yɛɔpã mɛ.
16Onupɛ bakalà eplukpa alɛ akɔ ɔnɔ ebekeɛ, nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ bakalà kalɛ nɛ Ladokianɛ ɔhaa tsyɛ mɛ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ wɔ tsyɛ ɔkalà keplukpa onupɛ kede Ladokia ebeku wɔkɔɔ.
17Nɔotseɖe Akipo ɔsɛ, “Ɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ ɔwɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ ɔyɛkɛ odenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ obeke.”
18Mɛ Paulo, mɛ lɔkɔ mɛahɔɛ pɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ. Nɔbakà ɛɖahuiɛ mɛ gɛ ɛkpasɛ. Tɛ Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Tesalonika edzi ɔma gbagbla ɔkɔ Romanɛ kɛmadiɛ gɛzã Makedonia nɔ. Paulo edzu ɔha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ashɛ nɛ Filipiɛ. Egidze, Yudanɛ teli gɛ alɔkɔ kabhã wɔawlɔakɛ nɛ Paulo shu nɛ otugbà vɛvɛ nɛ Yɛ Kristo kibui gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ shu nɛ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ ishiɛ pɛ balɔkɔ tili nɛ Yudanɛ ɛkɔɔ tishushu shu. Betu ɛlɛ akpɛ Paulo ulũ sɛ ashɛ nɛ Tesalonika tɛ avɛ Berea. Kidegba gɛ ediku Korintoɔ, Paulo ayɛkɛ tititì nɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ odenɔ yɔɛbhia alɛ ɔkɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ avɛ kabha nɛ ɔhaa gɛ ɔlɛ Tesalonika mɛ.
Paulo aba fɔnɔ yɛ keplukpa gɛeputɔ asɛsɛ Tesalonikanɛ tɛ alɔkɔ akpɛ Kristoanɛ kemi nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. Ehu ahɔɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ alɛ yɛelũ nɛ Yudanɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shu, aba balɛ nɛ ɛkpã nɔnɔɛdi gɛ azã akasɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ azã balɛ ɔbha, kɛlɛ ebu ebui bibisiɛ gɛazã ɔhaa shu denɔ Yesu titsyitsyina ba shu, pɔ anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã pɛ etitsiɛ flogo pɛ Yesu tɛbaba bana abalà mɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ gɛ yɛ tɛbaba bamana dza? Kɛlɛ kiwoele Yesu ewlui ababa dza? Paulo alɔkɔ kibe ɛlɛ etseɖe balɛ sɛ “bazã nɛ̀ awɔ̃ tɛ baŋã balɛ ishu abha” nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bazã eɖi kidzo mɛ akɔ Kristo yɛ tɛbaba (5.6).
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1
Ahɔɛhuhu nɛ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití 1.2—3.13
Buluhũ huhu ɔkɔ ɛkpã zazãna nɛ Kristo mɛ 4.1-12
Ɔshakɔkɔanɔ nɛ Kristo tɛbaba shu 4.13—5.11
Buluhũ huhu gɔgɔɛ nɔ 5.12-22
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 5.23-28

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 1
Content:
1Paulo, Silvano Nɛ̀ Timoteo, balɔkɔ keplukpa alɛ asɛsɛ Tesalonika ɔhaa nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo balɛ inyeɛ mɛ, tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ zã ɔplɛnɔ wɔnɔ.
Ahɔɛhuhu Tesalonikanɛ Nɛ Alɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Shu
2Buuhu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be kɔ wɔnɔ pete pɛ bukulu wɔnɔ kpɛ ɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu mɛ̀. 3Butsiɖi ɛlɛ abha bakà wɔnɔ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa namɛ, anɔ gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ wɔnɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ mana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu, wɔnɔ bɔtɔ mana tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɛ̀ wɔnɔ kemi kpɛkpɛ gɛ mana ohumi kpɛkpɛ nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo mɛ.
4Ɔmɔsɛ bunyi sɛ, Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ baadzya, kliso pɛ ebu wɔnɔ, 5ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ ibui gbangbã ba wɔnɔ ɔkɔ anɛ nɛ kaɖɔ bhlui ete, pɔ nɛ̀ ohumi, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã nɛ̀ ebuesilulũ gɛ alɛ mɛ edzuɔ. Nonyi kanà gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔɛshi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu. 6Nobodzi banɔ gɛ nɔgã nɛ bɔlɔ nɛ̀ Apaleteɛ bɔwɔalũɔ mɛ, nɛ bɔtɔ lɛ pete ede tsyɛ, nɔyɛkɛ kibuiɛ nɛ sameɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã ɔkɔɔ. 7Klisoɔ nobodzì banɔ gɛ bayɛyɛkɛŋã pete nɛ Makedonia nɛ̀ Axarya beɖi wɔnɔ pɛ bagã atɔɖɔ. 8Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ gɛiku wɔnɔ batɔ̃ mɛ̀ nɛ Makedonia nɛ̀ Axaya ete, bebetì wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha nɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ. Klisoɔ kɛbha ma ɔsɛ tɛ bɔkaɖɔ kibui nyiɛ bui nɛ kɛlɛ shu, 9ɔmɔsɛ batɛɖɔ kɛlɛ nɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ kana gɛ nɔyɛkɛ bɔlɔ shu. Betseɖe bɔlɔ nɛ kana gɛ notsyina odenɔ ibudiɛ ɔkɔ pɛ nɔba ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa gbangbã gɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpãa pɛ enu enunuɔ, 10nɛ tɛ buupo Yɛeyianyɛ gɛ ede kititiɛ anɔ gɛ anyɛmɛ edenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, Yesu, gɛ ayɛkɛ bɔlɔ edenɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ gɛ lɔbaa shu.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 2
Content:
Paulo Axɔ̃ɛ Wɔawɔa Nɛ Tesalonika
1Mɛadzya alɛ, nɔonyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ tɛbaba dzi kibui gɛ shɔ̃. 2Bɔtɛ mɔ bɔtɔ bafalanɔ pɛ bazakwala bɔlɔ nɛ Filipi, asɛ gɛ nonyi ana, pɔ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa anɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛɛ, bɔkpɛ kité pɛ ɖɔ yɛibuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ kititì lɔlɔ gagalĩ ɛlɛ mɛ tsyɛ. 3Ɔmɔsɛ tibibisiɛ gɛ bubisiɛ gɛide kesitata alo ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ yɛishuɔ gɛ dalɛ mɛ alo sɛ tɛ bɔwɔɛ wɔnɔ. 4Nɛ kidzo bhlatɔ abhaa, bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ asɛ banyɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ abha pɛ alɔkɔ yɛibuiɛ akpɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ. Bɔtɛ pɛɛ sɛ tɛ buku banɔdzyrame awɔ̃ pɔ Owusoso Akaa boŋ gɛ efeke bɔlɔ etúɔ mɛ eɖiɛ. 5Nɔonyi ɔsɛ bɔtɛ ɖɔ olugbũ mɛ dzyɛdzyɛ ebui, alo pɛ bukumu bɔdɔ̃ nɛ bamɛ asɛ tɛ bukpũ bɔlɔ ishu tɛpɛpɛ̃ɛ, Owusoso Akaa yɛenu agɛ yɛamɔ ebuiɛ aplɛnɔ bɔlɔ. 6Gɛnɛ banɔ tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití bɔpɛ odenɔ banɔ ɔkɔ, bɔtɛ pɛ ana odenɔ wɔnɔ, alo anɔ nanà tsyɛ ɔkɔ.
Asɛ banɔkpɛkpɛ ana, tsyɛ alo bɔtadzì bɔtɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, 7pɔ budzi banɔ yɔyɔ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi, asɛ kana gɛ eyielĩ eɖi yɛeyi alɛ abha ana. 8Bɔdɛmɛ wɔnɔɛbui popoopo, klisoɔ bɔmɔ same nɛ wɔnɔ sɛ anɛ Owusoso Akaa ɛbuiɛ ete bɔmana wɔnɔ pɔ tɛ nɔkpasɛ bɔlɔ ɛkpã zazãna tsyɛ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔɛbui baku bɔlɔ awɔ. 9Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, kibui gbã, bɔtɔ nɛ ɛkpã zazãna gɛ gagalĩ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ, bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ elishi nɛ̀ kemuze sɛ tɛ butidzi bɔtɔ ɔkɔ ananà gɛ onupɛ bɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa kibuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ.
10Wɔnɔ onu bagɛ bazã pɛ bamɔ ebuiɛ alɛ, kana Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ bɔlɔ ishuɔ dalɛ, kibui gbangbã nɛ kɛpɔ maŋã maŋã gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛŋã nɛishi. 11Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi kana gɛ bɔnyana wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka vunɔ asɛ kana gɛ eyiaka abhɛtɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ ana, 12pɛ bɔkpɛ wɔnɔ kemi, bɔyɔ wɔnɔ ishuɔ mɛ̀ pɛ bɔkpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔza nɛ̀ ɛkpã gɛ pɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa, anɔ gɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ ɔkpɛ yɛ bukusiŋaŋã nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ mɛ. 13Kɛlɛ butsiɖi ɛlɛ abha hu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ nolũ odenɔ bɔlɔ ɔkɔɔ, nɔgɛ yɛkɛ ɛlɛ asɛ banɔdzyrame ɛbui kinu, pɔ asɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ nulũ, Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ gɛ ɛwɔa kɛxɔ̃ɛ nɛ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛŋã mɛ. 14Mɛ adzya alɛ, ɔmɔsɛ wɔnɔ obodzì banɔ gɛ bagã nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa nɛ Yudea gɛ akpasɛ Yesu Kristo mɛ. Nɔtɔ odenɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ kesiakpa abha anɔ nɔ̀ tɛhɔɛ mɛ, bɔtɔ lɛ nɛidi ɔha alɛ tsyɛ amɔ denɔ Yudanɛ ahɔɛ mɛ, 15banɔ gɛeyí Apalete Yesu nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɔ nɔ kɛlɛ baza kakà bɔlɔ tsyɛ eyinɔ. Begiku Owusoso Akaa nawɔ̃ kɛlɛ benu banɔ gɛ batɛ dɛmɛ banɔɛbui 16babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana tɛ badã kidzo akɔ bɔlɔ tɛ bɔtɛ ɖɔ kibuiɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ betinu Yudanɛ sɛ tɛ bayɛkɛ balɛ elu nɛkpã. Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, bakaa bhɔ balɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ sɛ tɛ lewu kabha. Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ tɛba balɛ abha otsi alɛ.
Kana Gɛ Paulo Apɛ Asɛ Tɛ Amɔ Tesalonika Ɔhaa
17Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, gɛ bɔshɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɔbha nɛ kibe gulũi mɛ (nɛ ishupi mɛ, gɛnɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ), nɛ kana gɛ bɔpɛɛ sɛ mɔ wɔnɔ soɔ, bɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka tɛ bɔmɔ ɔnɔ. 18Ɔmɔsɛ bɔpɛ sɛ tɛ bɔba wɔnɔ kɔ, kibui gbã mɛ Paulo, ɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ zɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ-pɔ Satana edzu ahɔɛ nɛ bɔlɔ abha. 19Pɔ kiɖuwoe gɛ kɛlɛinu bɔlɔ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖiɛ, bɔlɔ sameɛ, alo kikutuɔ gɛ kɛlɛ mɛ bɔba mɔ ishu dadalɛ nɛ Apalete Yesu amɛ gɛ onupɛ abaa dza? Gɛnɛ wɔnɔ dza? 20Kɛgbã, wɔnɔ onu bɔlɔ tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ sameɛ.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 3
Content:
1So gɛ bɔzalà kɛlɛ ulũ zãa, bɔbhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ sɛ tɛ bɔlɔ ete zã Atene. 2Bɔsɛsɛ Timoteo, gɛenu bɔlɔ adzya nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛwɔa ɔkɔ Kristo yɛibuiɛ tɛkakanà, sɛ tɛ akpɛ wɔnɔ ohumi nɛ̀ tɛ̀ akpɛ wɔnɔ kemi nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, 3sɛ tɛ ananà atɛba mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ denɔ tifefekeɖi lɛ mɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi piapii ɔsɛ babhɛtɛ bɔlɔ ɔkɔ tifefekeɖi ebui alɛ. 4Kibui gbã, kibeɛ gɛ bɔzã wɔnɔ ɔbhaa, buzi tseɖe wɔnɔ ɔsɛ babatɔnɔ bɔlɔ kede. Kɛlɛ kɛba ɛlɛ mɛ anà, asɛ gɛ nɔonyi piapii nɔ. 5Nɛ kibui ɛlɛshu, gɛ ɛzaka là zã kɛlɛ ulũ soɔ, ɛkpɛ banɔ sɛ tɛ̀ milũ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu ebuiɛ. Kifu ziyi mɛ sɛ nɛ kidzo tili abhaa, Satana gɛ efeke banɔ eɖiɛ ebe feke wɔnɔ kɛlɛ bɔlɔ katsɛɖɛ bubuɔ abawɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ.
Timoteo Ohumi kpɛkpɛ Gɛ Amana
6Pɔ otsi ko Timoteo ede wɔnɔ ɔkɔ aba bɔlɔ ɔbha, kɛlɛ amana bɔlɔ ɔklasɔ̃ gbangbã nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shu. Etseɖe bɔlɔ asɛ nɔkɔ baka ebui gbangbã nɛ bɔlɔ shu kɛlɛ nɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔmɔ bɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ bɔmɔ wɔnɔ ana. 7Klisoɔ, mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, nɛ bɔlɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ kede tɛtɔtɔnɔ pete mɛɛ, nɔzɔkpɛ bɔlɔ kemì nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu. 8Otsiɛ nɔ bɔlɛ nɛkpã gɛ nodzi gagalĩ nɛ Apaleteɛ mɛ so. 9Kɛlɛ́ bɔbà là hu Owusoso Akaa nɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ kɛtakpu ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ sameɛ gɛ nɔkpɛ ɔlɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ dza? 10Elishi nɛ̀ kemuze bukulu Owusoso Akaa gagalĩi sɛ tɛ̀ buwlui mɔ wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ bɔkɔ wɔnɔ kɛgɛ ma wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.
11Otsiɛ nɔ tɛ̀ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu adalɛ kidzoɔ mɛ akɔ ɔlɔ sɛ tɛ bɔbà wɔnɔ ɔbha. 12Tɛ̀ Apaleteɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ wlui kpè tɔɖɔ tɛ kiyuku balɛ̀ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ tsyɛ, asɛ gɛ bɔlɔ ɛyɛ bhɛtɛ kɔ wɔnɔ. 13Tɛ̀ Yesu akpɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ ohumi sɛ tɛ betibu wɔnɔɛpɔ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ gɛ onupɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu aba nɛ yɛ̀ banɔ dadalɛ petee.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 4
Content:
Ɛkpã Zazãna Gɛ Shɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa
1Otsi alɛ mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔsha nɛ kana gɛ nɔbɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã pɛ lɛba shɔnɔ Owusoso Akaa, asɛ ɛkpã gɛ nodzinɔ. Otsi nɔ bubisi denɔ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ kɛlɛ bɔkpalà wɔnɔ nɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu mɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kana odzinɔ bhɛtɛ. 2Ɔmɔsɛ nonyi ɔsha gɛ bɔkpɛ kɔ wɔnɔ gana Apalete Yesu ohumi nabha. 3Kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔyɔlɔ ɔmamɛdɛdɛ, 4sɛ tɛ wɔnɔ mɛ aka nyia aka akpasɛ kana gɛ aba nyanà yɛishu evunɔ, nɛ kidzo dadalɛ 5gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ tɛwɔwɔsɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ zɛlɔ̀ nɛ wɔnɔ shu mɛ asɛ bagɛ bakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ ibudi gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa, 6kɛlɛ nɛ kibui lɛ mɛ, ananà atɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nɛ yɛelé shu alo tɛ efeke yɛeɖi. Apaleteɛ abapɔ batɔ akɔ banɔ nɛ ebui kpa alɛ nɛidi shu, asɛ gɛ buti tseɖe wɔnɔ ɔbɔfalanɔ pɛ itseɖe nɛ wɔnɔ. 7Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egi kulu bɔlɔ asɛ bututru shu, pɔ tɛ bɔza nɛ ɛkpã gɛ ɛlɛ shu dalɛ. 8Klisoɔ, anunɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ ɔsha kɔkɔ ɔlɛ gɛnɛ anɔ yagɛ yɛkɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa, gɛ akɔ wɔnɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã.
9Otsi nɛ adzya tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ shuɔ, kɛga shɔnɔ ɔsɛ bɔfɔnɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa atɛ kasɛ wɔnɔ sɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ. 10Kɛlɛ nɛ kibui gbã mɛɛ, nɔdɛmɛ nɛ baadzya petee nɛ Makedonia. Mɛ adzya alɛ, pɔ bɔkà kpalà wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kana odzi nɔ bhɛtɛ.
11Nɔlɔkɔ kɛlɛ ɔtɔɖɔ ishu abha sɛ tɛ nɔzãnà ɛkpã yɔyɔ, tɛ noɖi wɔnɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ tɛ nɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛhɔɛɛ, asɛ kana gɛ butseɖe wɔnɔ, 12sɛ tɛ kɛkɔ sɛ wɔnɔ kibe nyia be ɛkpã zazãna sɛ tɛ bagɛ etinu Kristoanɛ bamɔ wɔnɔ tɛpɛpɛ, tɛ nɔtɛ zã ananà yɛabha.
Apaleteɛ Tɛbaba
13Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ notì kibui nɛ bagɛ etsiɛ shu, alo tɛ nɔmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ asɛ banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ betieɖi kidzo mɛ akɔ kibui nanà. 14Bɔyɛkɛ ŋã sɛ Yesu etsi kɛlɛ azalɔ, klisoɔ bɔyɛkɛŋã ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa aba nyɛmɛ bagɛ betsi nɛ Yesu mɛɛ aplɛnɔ yɛ. 15Nɛ Apaleteɛ kibuiɛ gɛ aɖɔ mɛɛ, butseɖe wɔnɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ bagɛ bɔkà lɛ nɛ ɛkpãa, pɛ bɔlɛ odi yinɔ Apaleteɛ tɛbabaa, bɔtɛbà putɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ etitsíɛ. 16Ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ ebezhi aba odenɔ kititiɛ, nɛ ɔsha kɔkɔ nɛ̀ ozĩ, nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛeɖi ulugbũ nyanyã aɖaka nɔ nabha yɛozĩ kpɛkpɛ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa kexoele nɔ gɛ ebe kulu banɔ nɔ, kɛlɛ́ bagɛ etitsí nɛ Kristo mɛɛ bebè putɔ alɔ. 17Nɛ kɛlɛ́ niedeɛ, bɔlɔ bagɛ kalɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã bebè feke ɔlɔ ewunɔ kitsù nɛ alɛ nɛ ɔmɔlɔ nɔ mɛ tɛ̀ bɔtsyanà Apaleteɛ nɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ mɛ. Klisoɔ, bɔbaza plɛnɔ Apaleteɛ tihɔɔ. 18Klisoɔ nɔkpɛ bagɔlɔ kemi nɛ̀ ebui alɛ.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 1 5
Content:
1Mɛ adzya alɛ mɔ, otsi alɛ, nɛ kiwuiɛ nɛ̀ kibeɛ shuɔ, anɛ ibui kinu sɛ tɛ bɔfɔnɔ sɛsɛ wɔnɔ, 2ɔmɔsɛ nonyi piapii ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ nɛewuiɛ labatɔnɔ wɔnɔ asɛ kɛba gɛ ezĩ aba elishi ana. 3Gɛ banɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ishuyɔyɔ nɛ̀ tɛzazã piapii,” kizizĩ babà alɛ abha nɛ matì matì mɛ, asɛ kɛtã gɛ ɛya tã ayamunu ana, kɛlɛ batɛ balà ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ulũ.
4Pɔ mɛadzya alɛ, nɔma otumũ mɛ̀ ɔsɛ tɛ kiwui ɛlɛ̀ babhɛtɛ wɔnɔ asɛ ezĩ tɛbaba ana. 5Wɔnɔ petee onu beyi nɛ ɔdadalɛ ɔkɔ nɛ̀ beyi nɛ kiwui mɛ. 6Klisoɔ, nɔtɛkɔ bɔzã asɛ bagɔgɔ̃ gɛ adɔ taɖa, pɔ nɔkɔ bɔzã nɛ awɔ̃ tɛ bɔnyana ishu ovunɔ. 7Ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ apɛ asɛ adɔ taɖa, badɔ tɛlɛ elishi, kɛlɛ bagɛ awɔɛ ebukuɔ tsyɛ awɔ̃ɛ ebuku elishi. 8Pɔ gɛ bɔlɛ kɔ kelizaza soɔ, nɔkɔ bɔnyana ishu vunɔ, tɛ bɔkpɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ asɛ kitelũ ɔɖa akpɛkpɛ ana, tɛ bukumũ kidzo mɛ ɖiɖi ɔkɔ tibubu asɛ kikutu ana. 9Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egi bu ɔlɔ asɛ tɛ bɔtɔ nɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ esi, pɔ tɛ bɔyɛkɛ tibubu ɔgana Apalete Yesu Kristo abha. 10Etsi akɔ ɔlɔ, sɛ tɛ edzi asɛ budzi nɛ̀ awɔ̃ alo bɔdɔ̃ taɖa tsyɛ elo, bɔba zã ɛkpã plɛni. 11Klisoɔ, nɔkpɛ bagɔlɔ kemi tɛ nɔbhɔ bagɔlɔ owunɔ, asɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana.
Ɔshakɔkɔ Gɔgɔɛ
12Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, otsiɛ alɛ bubisi denɔ wɔnɔ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ, nozhinɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ nɛ wɔnɔɛshi, pɛ bagbanà nɔ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ pɛ behu buluhũ akɔ ɔnɔ. 13Nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ alɛ tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ alɛ piapii nɛ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa shu so. Nɔzã ishu yɔyɔ mɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ. 14Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, bɔkpalà ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ notseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ benu banɔ zhɔzhɔrɛ, nɔkpɛ bagɛ kitu bhui balɛ ohuiɛ kemi, nɔplɛnɔ bagɛ ebotsoɔ, tɛ̀ nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ anɔ ka nyia ka. 15Noɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ ananà agɛ lɔkɔ kibui kpa abuia kɛbhɛ akɔ kibui kpa nɔ, pɔ nɔkpɛ kemi ɔsɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ nɛ aka nyia aka tsyɛ.
16Nɔmɔ samɛ kibe nyia be, 17Nɔzã kɛlɛ abha tɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa, 18Nɔohu ahɔɛ nɛ ebui ka nyia ka mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ nɛ Kristo Yesu mɛ.
19Notilĩ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɛifúɔ, 20nɔtɛ lɔkɔ ebuiɖɔlu ebuiɛ wɔ ufù nɔ. 21Nɔlũ awɔ̃ oɖi kɛka nyia ka piapii. Nɔnyana kɛgɛ pɛ̃ɛ ovunɔ. 22Nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ kibui kpa ka nyia ka shu.
23Owusoso Akaa, yɛahɔɛ ishu yɔyɔ, dalɛ wɔnɔ shu tɛ̀ edzinɔ adalɛ. Tɛ̀ Wɔnɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ petee, kɛtɔwuiɛ nɛ̀ ishudzyaa zã kɛpɔ mabu mabu nɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo tɛbabaa shu.
24Anunɔ gɛ ekulu wɔnɔ enu kibui gbã ɖɔɖɔ elete, kɛlɛ ababhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha.
25Bɔlɔ adzya alɛ mɔ, nokulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ ɔlɔ. 26Nɔsɛnɔ baadzya petee nɛ̀ ahɔɛ kpɛkpɛ dadalɛ nɛ balɛ olí. 27Ɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ kpɛ̀ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ Apaleteɛ inye mɛ sɛ̀ tɛ̀ nɔkalà keplukpa alɛ ɔkɔ badzya petee.
28Apalete Yesu Kristo tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ.

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 2 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Bagɔlɔ esi malũ malũ ebui nɛ Yesu Kristo yɛtitsyi tsyina ba gɛ bezeɖi kidzo mɛ akɔ shuɔ zɛvɛ ɛlɛ abha gɛzɛ mana ebelà ebui nɛ ɔhaa gɛ ɔzã Tesalonika mɛ. Paulo yɛeplukpa bhalà gɛ afɔnɔ asɛsɛ Tesalonikanɛ ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu ɔsɛ, Apaleteɛ tɛbaba kiwuiɛ tɛba ku. Paulo ewoese kibui ɛlɛ, pɛ aɖɔ asɛ flogo tɛ Kristo ebetsyina aba, ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ atakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui ebe wu abha, nɛ otugbà anɔ ɛdi tili gɛ bekulu asɛ, “Kɛtakpumɛ gagalĩ elete” (2.3) anɔ gɛ abà lɔɛtití nɛ Kristo shu.
Anɔkpɛkpɛ aɖɔ atɔɖɔ kibui ɛlɛ abha gagalĩ ɔkɔ bagɛ aba kalà keplukpa alɛ nɛ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bazã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, gɛ bɔtɔ nɛ̀ buluhũ kpɛkpɛ baba tsyɛ elo, tɛ bawɔa axɔ̃ɛ akɔ balɛ ɛkpã zazãna asɛ kana gɛ Paulo nɛ̀ bagɛ awɔa axɔ̃ɛ aplɛnɔ yɛ tsyɛ abhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ tɛ bakpɛ emi nɛ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-2
Anɔ tɛkpɛkpɛ Nɛitití nɛ̀ yɛishu dadalɛ 1.3-12
Ɔsha kɔkɔ anɔ nɛ Kristo tɛbaba shu 2.1-17
Buluhũ huhu ɔkɔ Kristoanɛ ɛkpã zazãna 3.1-15
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 3.16-18

Title: TESALONIKANƐ 2 1
Content:
1Paulo, Silvano Nɛ̀ Timoteo, bɔlɔ sɛsɛ ɔhaa nɛ Tesalonika gɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo mɛ keplukpa alɛ,
2Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ɔkɔ.
Ahɔɛhuhu Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu
3Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ buhu Owusoso Akaa ahɔɛ kibe nyia be ɔkɔ wɔnɔ, kɛpɛ ana, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kpe tɔɖɔ soɔ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ tsyɛ kpe tɔɖɔ. 4Klisoɔ, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔhaa nɛishiɛ, butũ ahɔɛ nɛitélũ nɛ kana gɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, kede tɛtɔtɔnɔ nɛ̀ tifefekeɖiɛ gɛ nɔkpɛ emi ɔkɔ.
