35Kliso nɔtɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔnɔ awɔ̃ luluɔ shu olu, ɔmɔsɛ kɛbhɛ babuia hohoe lɛ kɛlɛishu ɔkɔ ɔnɔ. 36Nɔkpɛ emi, pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ lu abhaa, nɔbɔ yɛkɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ elu asɛ abakɔ ɔnɔɔ. 37Ɔmɔsɛ nɛ kibe gulũi mɛ koɔ,
“Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛabaa, atɛ bawɔ ede.
38Mɛ anɔ gbangbã pɔɔ, abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã gana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.
Kɛlɛ etsodzi etsyina avɛ kideɛ,
yɛibui zaazã mɛuli.”
39Bɔlɔ xɔnɔ bɔma banunɔ gɛ betsodzi etsyina avɛ ideɛ pɛ betsíɛ nɛishi, pɔ bɔlɔ nu bagɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã, pɛ bebu ɔlɔ.

Title: HEBRIANƐ 11
Content:
Gana Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Mɛ
1Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nu kɛgɛ olu awɔ̃ nɛ ɛlɛ abha pɛ oɖi kɛdɔ̃ gɛ ɔtɛ ɔmɔ nɛidzo mɛ. 2Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa ebelianɛ nɛibui ku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃.
3Denɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, bulũ kɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, kibui Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ alɔkɔ abhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ nɔ̀. Kliso kɛgɛ bɔmɔ otsiɛ nɔ, babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ edenɔ kɛgɛ bɔtɛlà mɔ mɛ. 4Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Abel akɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gbangbã ɔdɛ Kain. Gana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, yɛibui ku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃ kɛlɛ aɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔɔ shu. Abel etitsí, pɔ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, akaɖɔaɖɔ.
5Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ kide sɛ befeke Henox avɛnɔ itití nɛ yɛkpã mɛ, egitsí so bagɛlà amɔɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛefeke ashɛnɔ. Flogo tɛ befeke yɛɛ, edzi anunɔ gɛ yɛibui ku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃. 6Kɛba gagalĩ sɛ tɛ oku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃, onupɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ma wɔahɔɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ aba yɛamɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã asɛ Owusoso Akaa alɛ, kɛlɛ abuia ɛbhɛ akɔ bagɛ apɛ yɛ nɛ̀ awuhũ dzadzã.
7Gana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, gɛ bakɔ Noa yɛeti asɛ kɛgɛ kabaɖi bàba ɛlɛ mɛɛ, alɔkɔ atɔ̃ lulũ gbangbã afatɛ kelĩabha ohu pɛ alɔkɔ ebu yɛɔpã nɔ. Alɔkɔ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ebu kanɔ mɛanɛ nɛpɔ nɔ̀, kɛlɛ edzi kaŋãsiɛelete gbangbã gɛide tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.
8Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɔ ɔsɛ gɛ betseɖe Abraham asɛ ashɛ avɛ esiakpa bhlatɔ abha tɛ kebe dzi yɛayɛ idegbaa, elũ atɔ̃, kɛlɛ avɛ, gɛ etinyi ɛkɛlɛ gɛ avɛ kura tsyɛ flogo. 9Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Abraham ebhui bɔpã nɛ esiakpa gɛ kebe dzi yɛayɛ nabha, asɛ efu ana nɛ kɛmadi bhlatɔ mɛ. Abraham, Isak ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ Yakob pete nɔ, apɔtɛ ɔgba mɛ baazã, gɛ balɛ tsyɛ enu kaŋãsi alɛ gɛ batɔɖɔ elu alɛ elete. 10Ɔmɔsɛ ezeɖi idzo mɛ akɔ ɔma hohoe toli gɛ ɔlɛ tidzudzu esi kpɛkpɛ ɛklagbueleteɛ, nɛ̀ agɛ atá ɔma pɛ ebhui ɔlɛ, yɛenu Owusoso Akaa.
11Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, gɛ Abraham edzì anyɛ sheshè, kɛlɛ Sara tsyɛ edzì anɔ gɛ bɔmɔ gɛzã yɛishu tsyɛ elo, ebedzi banɔ gelee akaa, ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ atɔɖɔ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ akɔɛ asɛ enu anunɔ gɛ àbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nabha aŋã. 12Kliso denɔ Abraham tenikpo alɛ gɛ asɛ etsí ebeke mɛɛ, yɛeyi mɔmɔ́ alɛ ebékpè asɛ awɔ̃ɛ nɛititíɛ kɛlɛ asɛ ayisɛ nɛ aƒutɔ̃, gɛ lama tɛkaklà mɛ ana.
13Banɔ alɛ pete nɔ, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɛlɛ zã alɛ ahɔɛ flogo pɛ bétsí. Pɔ bagɛ yɛkɛ ɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɔɖɔ elu akɔ alɛ. Bamɔ bɔlɛ ete, kɛlɛ batsyana ɔlɛ edenɔ kitsí. Badɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ɛlɛ abha asɛ befu nɛ̀ baafafala ete benu nɛ esiakpa nabha. 14Bànɔ nɔ̀ gɛ baɖɔ ebui alɛ nɛidiɛ, kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ baapɛ esiakpa gɛenu balɛ ahɔɛ ayɛ. 15Pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ baza baka esiakpa mɛ gɛ bedeɛ, tsyɛ alo batɛ mɔ ɛdzo etsyina avɛ. 16Nɛ kɛlɛ nɛinye mɛɛ, baapɛ balɛ ahɔɛ esiakpa gɛ apɛ adɛ gɛ kenu itití ayɛ. Kliso kiwũi tiyi Owusoso Akaa asɛ bezekului asɛ balɛ Owusoso Akaa, ɔmɔsɛ ebhui ɔma hohoe toli elu akɔ alɛ.
17Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa efeke Abraham eɖiɛ, alɔkɔ Isak akɔ, asɛ ɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ana. Gɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ɛlɛ elu akɔ tsyɛ elo, adɛmɛ alɔkɔ eyiɛ gɛenu yɛeyianyɛ tenikpo nɔ asɛ ɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ, 18gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Denɔ Isak mɛɛ, babàmɔ wɔɛeyi mɔmɔ́ alɛ.” tsyɛ elo 19Abraham ayɛkɛ aŋã asɛ, Owusoso Akaa abalà akɔ anɔ alɔ ede bekpu mɛ, kliso kidzi ibui gbã sɛ edzinɔ Isak ayɛkɛ edzu nɛ ɛkpã.
20Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Isak eyula tutu esi akɔ Yakob nɛ̀ Esau, nɛ kɛgɛ bebèdzi nɛ alɛ ɛkpã mɛ nabha.
21Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, flogo tɛ Yakob adã olugbũɔ, eyula tutu esi akɔ Yosef yɛeyi alɛ, kɛlɛ gɛ edzyui paŋãa nɛ yɛosi vuvũ abhaa, akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa.
22Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Yosef gɛ yɛitsíbe naa, aɖɔ ibui elu nɛ Israeleyiɛ tɛshɛshɛ nɛ Egipte shu, kɛlɛ ashɔrɔ ebui elu nɛ yɛaxɔa shu.
23Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Mose yɛakaa nɛ̀ yɛelĩ bekpũi nɛ bewoele tatá mɛ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bamɔɛ, edzi eyi gbangbã teli idi, kɛlɛ begisí ifu nɛ Farao yɛɔsha kpɛkpɛɛ shu.
24Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɔ ɔsɛ gɛ Mose esheɛ, agaadɛmɛ asɛ Farao yɛeshui yɛenu. 25Pɔ adɛmɛ asɛ tɛ amɔ bɔtɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ ɔdɛ ɔsɛ tɛ aŋã kanɔ mɛ ɛkpã dzyɛdzyɛ gɛ lɛtɛ bazã tihɔɔ nɔ. 26Adɛmɛ asɛ tɛ aŋã kiwuĩ nɛ Kristo ɛtakpu, gɛ kɛyɛkɛ edzi ɔdɛ ehoeyi udɔ̃ gɛ abamɔ edenɔ Egipte, ɔmɔsɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛbhɛ gɛ bababuia akɔɛ idegbaa nabha. 27Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, ashɛ nɛ Egipte, kɛlɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ gɛ ekusiɛ akpɛɛ logiku yɛifu, pɔ akpɛ emi avɛ ɛlɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ azamɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ tikpukpũ mɛɛ. 28Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Mose akpɛ Tɛdɔdɔfala nɛ̀ dzyosu hɔɛhɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔɔ, sɛ tɛ anunɔ gɛ eyí beyikusiɛ nɛ Egipteɛ, etibeyí Israelanɛ xɔnɔ ayɛ.
29Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ kide sɛ Israelanɛ balà agãfala nɛ Aƒu Dzadzã mɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ kesiakpa kpakpa abha ana, pɔ gɛ Egipteanɛ tsyɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ batsakɛ anaa, bulĩɛ vũ alɛ.
30Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, Yeriko bɔkã egiliɛ atsaɖà ebu alɛ, gɛ Israelanɛ baagã akana ɔma nɛ ewui tegegene mɛ.
31Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ kɛkɔ sɛ kedulũazazã Raxab egitsí aplɛnɔ batɔ̃ gagalĩelete, ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ Israelanɛ gɛ bakpɛ asɛ bedilu awɔ̃ eɖi udɔ̃ abaɖɔɔ.
32Kɛlɛ kiɖuwoe lu mɛzɛ baɖɔ plɛnɔ? Kibeɛ mà mɛahɔɛ gɛ ɛbalɔkɔ ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ Gideon, Barak, Simson, Yefta, David, Samuel nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɛ shu, 33kɛlɛ denɔ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛɛ, beté ɛmadi, bekulu bubhu, kɛlɛ bayɛkɛ kɛgɛ batɔɖɔ elu akɔ alɛ, kɛlɛ teli xɔnɔ badzyata ilugbũ bazanyana amɔnɔ̃, 34beteli elĩ efuɔ gɛ azatã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ, baabɛtɛ̀ ilugbũ tɛbha ŋaŋã gɛité alɛ, kɔ ɔsɛ ohumi ozoku bagɛ bebotsoɔ mɛ, pɛ bazawɔa bunye nɛ buyu ɔtakɔ pɛ beté bagɛ alɔkɔ ɔyu nɛ balɛishuɔ. 35Banɔ teli anyɛmɛ beyi teli gɛ etsí flogo nɔ, pɛ bedzini alɛ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ balɛ elĩ alɛ. Bawɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ beteli shu, pɔ bagɛkɔ ɛtakpu asɛ tɛ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ balɛishu, sɛ tɛ babamɔ tɛlɔlɔ gbangbã odenɔ bekpu mɛ. 36Bebu olugbũ mɛ nɛ beteli shu pɛ behusi teli, banyã beteli pɔ nɛ̀ ɛɖahui pɛ bakpɛ alɛ nɛ ɛɖavũ mɛ. 37Behu teli aklagbu kɛlɛ bayɛ teli mɛ akpa bɔwɔ̃pɛ tɔɔbha mɛ nɛ̀ saa, teli xɔnɔ beté alɛ eyí nɛ̀ babɛtɛ̀. Beteli pɔɔ, ibhoshi nɛ̀ bepidzyapi mɛ bazazã, bazafala akpakpa nɛ̀ bɔbhɛ, bazatɔnɔ̃ alɛ ede pɛ bazawɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ alɛishu, 38kanɔ alɛ mɛ etinu ɔgbangbã ɔkɔ kɔ alɛ. Bazanyɔ̃ afala nɛ ixui nɛ̀ betu abha, bazafala nɛ ɛxɔɛishi nɛ̀ izĩ mɛ.
39Banɔ alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ nɔ, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã dalɛ balɛishu, pɔ balɛ mɛ anɔ nanà agɛ yɛkɛ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ eluɔ. 40Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ ibui gbangbã tili elu akɔ ɔlɔ, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ apɛɛ nɔ kɛli nu ɔsɛ, nɛ tenikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, abakɔ kɛka nyia ka ba ɛlɛ mɛ, nɛ alɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ ulũ.

Title: HEBRIANƐ 12
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Apɔ Batɔ̃ Akɔ Yɛeyi Alɛ
1Gɛ bagazã pɛ amɔ ebuiɛ alɛ asɛ ɔmɔlɔ̃ dodo toli gɛ ɔkpɛ ɔkã kana ɔlɔ soɔ, nɔkɔ bubú kɛka nyia ka, nɛ̀ ebui kpa gɛ làkɔ bɔdɔ̃ oboeɛ lu, tɛ bubú tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ bubuɔ gɛlɛ ɔlɔ otugbàa nɛ̀ emi. 2Nɔkɔ ɔlɔ awuhũ àzã Yesu abha, yɛ gɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ esi pɛ ewoese ɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋãa, kɛlɛ gɛ enyi same nɔnɔ́ gɛ alɛ akɔɛ idegba soɔ, akpɛ emi nɛ butsí osiɛ abha zazã bɔtɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ butsí osi abha zazã gɛiku yɛiwũi nanà. Otsi alɛ ezhi azã Owusoso Akaa bukusiegbu nɛŋã mɛ. 3Noɖi bɔtɔ gɛ anɔ alɛ akpɛ emi amɔ edenɔ banɔ kpa gɛ alɔɛtití nɛishuɔ ahɔɛ mɛɛ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nyia anɔ akpɛ emi tɛ yɛitú titsyina ɔtɔ.
4Gɛ nɔgɔ̃lɛ nɛ̀ ebui kpa tsyɛ elo, kɛkà ba ɛlɛ mɛ sɛ tɛ bàbalɛ wɔnɔ dzyosu esi xɔnɔ. 5Pɔ nɔ dzɛkɛ kemi kpɛkpɛ anɔ ibuiɛ gɛ balɔkɔ ekulu wɔnɔ nɔ̀ asɛ mɛeyianyɛ alɛ mɔɔ dza? Aɖɔ asɛ,
“Mɛeyi, tɛɔlɔkɔ Apaleteɛ yɛatɔ̃ pɔpɔ ɔmɔ asɛ bɔwufu ibui
kɛlɛ onupɛ etseɖe ni wɔɔ, tɛkɔ kɛpɔɛ wɔ,
6ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ Apaleteɛ adɛmɛ nɔɔ yɛ yɛapɔ batɔ̃ akɔ,
kɛlɛ apɔ batɔ̃ akɔ eyi nɔnɔ́ gɛ ayɛkɛ asɛ eyiɛ.”
7Nɔkpɛ emi nɛ wɔnɔ ɔtɔ gɛlɛ asɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ana mɛ, tɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛapɔ atɔ̃ akɔ yɛeyi alɛ ana. Pɔ eyi ɖuwoe lu gɛ alɛ pɛ yɛakaa atɛpɔ yɛatɔ̃ mɔɔ dza? 8Onupɛ bagɛpɔ wɔatɔ̃ (kɛlɛ anɔ nyia anɔ pɔɔ, azã batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ esi), kɛlɛ notinu bɔpã mɛeyi, ɔma mɛ eyi nonu. 9Kɛgɛ zɛdɛɛ nu ɔsɛ bakaa alɛ ɔlɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ahɔɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ gɛ bapɔ atɔ̃ akɔ ɔlɔ, kɛlɛ bɔkpɛ alɛ inye nɛitití nɛ ɛlɛ takpu. Kiɖuwoe gɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔtaa zhinɔ ishu esi kpɛ bɔlɔ ɛfɔfuĩa mɛ Akaa niesi pɛ bɔbazã nɛ ɛkpãa dza? 10Nɛ kibe gulũi tili mɛɛ, bɔlɔ akaa alɛ akɔ ɔlɔ atɔ̃ pɔpɔ nɛ kɛpɛ gɛ bapɛ ulũ. Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ àpɔ ɔlɔ atɔ̃ asɛ tɛ bɔpɛ, tɛ bɔbazã yɛtɛdadalɛ mɛ. 11Same atɛzã batɔ̃ ɛpɔbe nanà mɛ, bɔtɔ ɛbe kinu. Nɛ kɛlɛ idegba pɔɔ, kɛmana tɛzazã piapii nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ bagɛ bazã tɛgbagbana niesiɛ.
12Kliso nɔtɛkɔ wɔnɔ ɛhɔɛ tsí, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ ekluisi nɔ tsyɛ eti botsò. 13“Nowoese edzoɔ tɛ ladɔ akɔ wɔnɔ ɛtsɛɖɛkpɔ,” sɛ tɛ banɔ gɛ agbã atɛgbã atɔɖɔ, pɔ tɛ bamɔ ishu mɛ gagalĩ.
Tɛshɛ Nɛ̀ Ahɔɛ Nɛ Owusoso Akaa Shu
14Nɔgã idzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ nɔzã nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ nɛ̀ anɔ ka nyia ka tɛ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ, ɔmɔsɛ onu anɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛɛ, anɔ nanà atɛ balà amɔ Apaleteɛ. 15Nɔnyana ishu piapii sɛ tɛ noti tsodzi nɛ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ shu. Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa anɔ nanà atɛzã asɛ tɛwɔa kɛtɛtɛ́ gɛ tishè pɛ tɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ abɔɛ zĩ udɔ̃ gelee nɔ ana. 16Nɔnyana ishu piapii sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà etidzi ɔmamɛadɛdɛ elete alo anɔ gɛ akaa ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ma yɛmɛ asɛ Esau ana, gɛ atsrakɛ yɛeyianyɛ ukusi ɔzãkɔ nɛ̀ kɛŋaŋã esugba tienikpo nɔ ana. 17Kidegba gɛ azapɛ tiyuyula asɛ eyianyɛ ekusi anaa, bagɛ kɔɛ. Gɛ alɔkɔ yoyo bibi tsyɛ elo, anɔ nanà agalà etsyina kibuiɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ.
18Anɛ butuɔ gɛ nɔtɛ bɔlà ohunɔ shu nɔba, nɛ̀ butuɔ gɛ sɔlɛ ɛtã, otumũ kuku, kawlagoe alo fluflũ mɛ nɛ̀ kɛlɛ́ gagalĩ fufù, 19ɛkɛlɛ gɛ babɔ exoele nɛ̀ ozĩ kpɛkpɛ toli idi, kɛlɛ bagɛ elũɔ akɔ ɛtakpu asɛ batɛ aɖɔ ibui nanà etseɖe alɛ, 20ɔmɔsɛ batɛ akalà azã ɔsha gɛ bakpɛ akɔ alɛ niesi. “Agã yɛete yɛehunɔ butuɔ tsyɛ elo, kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ behui aklagbu eyí.” 21Kɛgɛ Mose amɔɔ ku yɛifu, so aɖɔ asɛ, “Ishuku nɛ̀ kifusisi.”
22Otsi alɛ nɔba Zion Butuɔ, gɛinu kitití Yerusalem, Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ yɛɔma gbagbla mɛ. Noboku baxɔ̃ɛdɛ ihotu, ihotuɔ nɛ̀ balɛ same mɔmɔ̃ ɛzaa mɛ. 23Nɔba, wɔnɔ ɔhamɛeyi gɛ oputɔ, bagɛ alɛ enye bafɔnɔ elu nɛititíɛ. Nɔba Owusoso Akaa, gɛ yɛekulu ebhu nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ, nɛ̀ banɔ gbangbã ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ piapii nɔ, 24Yesu gɛ evũ iboe nɛ̀ olugbũ nyanya vɔvɔ, nɛ̀ dzyosu hɔɛhɔ̃ɛ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã ɔdɛ Abel dzyosu nɔɔ.
25Nolu awɔ̃ tɛ notitso dzi nɛibuiɛ gɛ anunɔ aɖɔ niede. Onupɛ bagɛlà ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ anunɔ gɛ etseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ alɛ nɛ esiakpa alɛ nabhaa, kɛlɛ bɔlɔ pɔ balà bu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ onupɛ butso dzi nɛ anunɔ gɛ etseɖe nɔ ɔlɔ nɛ kititíɛ ɔbha? 26Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ, yɛaɖɔ ezeshuku esiakpa, pɔ otsi alɛ atɔɖɔ elu asɛ, “Anɛ esiakpa ete mɛba suku, kititíɛ tsyɛ baplɛnɔ.” 27Ebui alɛ asɛ, “Ɛzɛbabhɛtɛɛ” kɛkasɛ kibu gɛ bebèbu bɔdɔ̃ gɛ balà shukuɔ atɛɛ-gɛ bunu kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃-sɛ tɛ kɛgɛ batɛ balà eshukuɔ tɛ kɛwɔ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ.
28Kliso gɛ bɔyɛkɛ bukusi ŋaŋã ɛlɛ gɛ bɔtɛbalà shukuɔ, nɔkɔ buhu ahɔɛ, tɛ bɔlɔkɔ ɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛɛ gɛshɔnɔ, nɛ̀ kifu sisíɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa,
29ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa, enu kifu gɛpɔɛ bɔdɔ̃.”

Title: HEBRIANƐ 13
Content:
Buluhũ Huhu Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
1Nɔvɛ ɛlɛ abha tɛ nɔɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bagɔlɔ. 2Nɔdɛmɛ befu yɛyɛkɛ ibui, ɔmɔsɛ nɛ mati matì mɛɛ, beteli bayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛɛ. 3Nɔbaka bagɛ alɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ, asɛ wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ bakpɛ nɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ ana, kɛlɛ bagɛ bawɔa alɛ ɔnyɔnyɔ̃ nɔ, ɔmɔ asɛ wɔnɔ tsyɛ wɔnɔ mɔ ɔtɔ ɔlɛ ana.
4Wɔnɔ badzɛenyine nɛ̀ banyɛedziniɛ, nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɛ bagɔlɔ shu nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɔwɔ̃sɔkɔ tsyɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa ebekulu ebhu nɛ̀ agɛ adɛ ɔma mɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ baŋã agɔlɔ. 5Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ehoeyi pɛpɛ ɔfala nɛifu tɛzã ɔnɔ mɛ, pɔ nɔkɔ kɛgɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ ku wɔnɔ awɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ,
“Ɛtɛba shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔshu alo
tɛ mɛshɛ̃ yɔlɔ wɔ ɖa.”
6Kɛlɛ bɔɖɔ nɛ̀ awɔ̃ lulu ɔsɛ,
“Apaleteɛ yɛenu anunɔ gɛ aaplɛni mɛ, kifu tɛbayi mɛ.
Kiɖuwoe anɔ abalà abhɛtɛ ni mɛ?”
7Nɔbaka banɔlũazazã gaɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ akɔ ɔnɔɔ. Nolũ awɔ̃ oɖi balɛ ɛkpã tɛzazã mɛ tɛ nɔkpasɛ alɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã. 8Yesu Kristo tenikpo alɛ gɛ azã ivũɔ, yɛalɛ oboɔ nɛ̀ tihɔɔ.
9Nɔtɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ka nyia ka ɛdi zɛgbana ɔnɔ. Kɛpɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ etúɔ asɛ tɛ lamɔ ohumi ɔgana tibhui bhuibu mɛ, pɔ anɛ bɔŋaŋã ɔsha gɛ ɛlɛ beshu pɛ lɛ tɛ plɛnɔ banunɔ gɛ baŋã ɔdɔ̃. 10Bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha toli ɔlɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ gɛ bagɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ trɛwɔɛgba mɛɛ, bagɛ mɔ idzo aŋã ɔlɛ abha ɔdɔ̃.
11Banɔlũazazã gbagbla alɔkɔ bagã dzyosu avɛnɔ Ɔdadalɛ Ɔkɔ Ɔdɛɛ, asɛ bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ́ nɛ ebui kpa ɛtakpu ana, bagã pɔɔ, baapɔɛ alɛ nɛ kagba niede. 12Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, Yesu tsyɛ amɔ̃ bɔtɔ nɛ ɔma ɔlɛ kakãdeɛ ɔsɛ tɛ alɔkɔ yɛdzyosu nɔ adalɛ banɔ shu nɔ. 13So nɔkɔ bukoeyi vɛ Yesu yɛɔbha nɛ buvũ niede tɛ bakpɛ ɔlɔ tsyɛ awuĩ nɛidi gɛ bakpɛ yɛ. 14Ɔmɔsɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛɛ, ɔma nanà ɔma gɛ ɔbɔkpɛ emi ɔzã tihɔɔ, pɔ buuɖi ɔgɛ ɔbɔba nɛidzo mɛ.
15Kliso gana Yesu abhaa, nɔkɔ bɔzɛ lɔkɔ kitití kpɛkpɛ gɛlɛ asɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ anaa zɛkɔ Owusoso Akaa- gɛenu ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ adalɛ yɛinyeɛ shu nɔ. 16Nɔtɛ dzɛkɛ ibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kɛdɔ̃ kɔkɔ banɔ bhlatɔ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi ku Owusoso Akaa awɔ̃. 17Nolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ bagɛ alɛ̀ ɔnɔ lũɔ, tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ alɛ gɛ balɛ eɖi wɔnɔ abha, pɛ balɛ enu banunɔ gɛ babàkɔ akɔnta nɛ wɔnɔ shuɔ. Nolũ atɔ̃ nɛ alɛ, sɛ tɛ balɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa etsyina edzi same ibui, pɔ nɔtɛkpɛ bɔtɔ gɛ tɛba mana ɔnɔ ibui gbangbã nanà nɔ.
18Nookulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ ɔlɔ ɛtakpu. Bɔyɛkɛ ŋã sɛ bɔlɛ nɛ etú dadalɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔɔpɛ sɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã dadalɛ nɛidzo nyiɛ idzo abha. 19Ɛkpalà ɔnɔ ɔsɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa sɛ tɛ adalɛ idzo akɔ mɛ tɛ mɛitso dzi tsyina ba ɔnɔ ɔbha nɛibe gulũi mɛ.
20Tɛ ishu yɔyɔeleteɛ gɛenu Owusoso Akaa, anunɔ gɛ gana olugbũ nyanyã tihɔɔ dzyosu alɛ mɛ, pɛ akɔ Apalete Yesu alɔ ede bekpu mɛ, gɛ yɛenu Ibhoshi agbagbanaelete gbagblaa, 21alɔkɔ ɔdɔ̃ gbangbã ka nyia ka idi akɔ ɔnɔ sɛ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ nɛ yɛibui tɔtɔɖɔ nabha, tɛ abhɛtɛ kɛgiku yɛawɔ̃ nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ ɔgana Yesu Kristo abha. Yɛyɛ́ kɛlinu ishu dadalɛ odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ, tihɔ. Amen.
22Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, ɛɛkpalà ɔnɔ gagalĩi sɛ tɛ nɔyɛkɛ uluhũɔ gɛihu kɔ ɔnɔ gana eplukpa gulũi alɛ gɛ ɛfɔnɔ sɛsɛ ɔnɔ mɛ.
23Ɛkɔ ɔnɔ tititì sɛ bashɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ ɔlɔ adzya Timoteo shu, kɛlɛ kibeɛ gɛ anya ebeku mɛɔbha koɔ, bɔnɛ yɛ babá tɛ ɛbaɖi unɔ.
24Nɔsɛnɔ bagɛ agbana ɔnɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa anɔ petee. Bagɛ bede Italia aba pete asɛnɔ ɔnɔ.
25Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ zã plɛnɔ wɔnɔ petee.

Title: YAKOBO OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Yakobo eplukpa enu bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ebui gɛ beshogò pɛ bafɔnɔ asɛsɛ banɔ dadalɛ gɛ apɔɛ afalanɔ avɛ busiakpa bhlatɔ abha nɛ Kanunɔ mɛ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ afɔnɔ eplukpa alɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ ediedi ashɔnɔ bagɔlɔ pɛ alɔkɔ akasɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ nɛ bubuti shu axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, kɛgã gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ Kristo elete abagã, nɛ̀ ɛkpã nɔnɔ gɛ shɔnɔ sɛ tɛ azazãa shu. Nɛ Kristo elete ɔdɔ̃ ɖiɖi ulũɔ, aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ebui ediedi shu, ehoeyi udɔ̃ mɔmɔ nɛ̀ kitsyui dɔdɔ, tifefekeɖi, ɛkpã gbangbã tɛzazã, wɔ anɔ ɛpɔ bubú, tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ ɔkɔɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, kineke axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, bubuti, ebla pɛpɛ, ishu fefeke nɛ̀ ishu zhizhinɔ esi, kebhu kukulu nɛ̀ banɔ bhlatɔ, ahɔɛ tutũ nɛitélũ, kitú esi lulu nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu.
Keplukpa ezehusi atɔɖɔ gagalĩ nɛ kana gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã azagã nɛ Kristoanɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nulũ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba Ibuiɛ 1.1
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ bubuti 1.2-8
Kitsyui dɔdɔ nɛ̀ ehoeyi tɛmɔmɔ 1.9-11
Tifefekeɖi nɛ̀ tɛwɔɛwɔɛ kpɛ ibui mɛ 1.12-18
Lũ ibui tɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha 1.19-27
Buluhũ huhu nɛ bubo kpɛkpɛ nɛ banɔɛishi 2.1-13
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa 2.14-26
Kristo elete nɛ̀ yɛinike 3.1-18
Kristo elete nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ 4.1—5.1-6
Bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ediedi bhlatɔ 5.7-20

Title: YAKOBO 1
Content:
1Keplukpa alɛ kede mɛ Yakobo, Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ.
Ɛfɔnɔ alɛ sɛsɛ egbogbo lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha gɛ apɔɛ afalanɔ pɛ bakpasɛ ɛmadi bhlatɔ mɛ.
Nɔyɛkɛ mɛ ɔsɛsɛnɔo.
Tifefekeɖi Nɛ̀ Anɔ Tɛgbagbana Kpɛ Ebui Kpa Mɛ
2Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ tifefekeɖi ediedi aba ɔnɔ abhaa, nɔkɔ ilidzi same ibui kɔ ɔnɔ, 3ɔmɔsɛ nonyi ɔsɛ gana ɔnɔ tifefekeɖi mɛɛ, wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã zɛiwlui mɔ emi kpɛkpɛ ɔtɔɖɔ. 4Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ emi kpɛkpɛ azã wɔnɔ ɛkpã mɛ ɔdɛtɔ̃, tɛ nodzi banɔ gɛ eshe, pɛ nɔna nɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ, gɛ nɔtɛ bɔpɛ ɛdɔ̃ nanà. 5Onupɛ bubutì ma wɔnɔ ɔmayɛmɛ teli ahɔɛɛ, ebisi Owusoso Akaa gɛ àkɔ anɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɛyamɛ fãa nɔ, pɛ etiɖi ibui kpa nɛ anɔ shu flogo nɔ, kɛlɛ abalɔkɔ akɔɛ. 6Pɔ onupɛ ebisiɛ, ayɛkɛ aŋã, anɛ sɛ tɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ ɔkpɛ, ɔmɔsɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ ɔkpɛ, alɛ asɛ aƒulĩ gɛitsu guɖaguɖa gɛ kɛlɛ́ fu falanɔ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ odzinɔ mana ana. 7Anɔ alɛ ètiɖi asɛ abamɔ ɛdɔ̃ tili ayɛkɛ edenɔ Apaleteɛ ɔkɔ, 8ɔmɔsɛ yɛekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ ama tenikpo kɛlɛ kibui tinikpo bhɛbhɛtɛ ma yɛebuiɛ pete mɛ.
9Adzya nɔnɔ́ gɛ elu ishu esiɛ, tɛ efeke ishu nɛ yɛɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ shu. 10Adzya gɛenu ehoeyielete pɔɔ, tɛ efeke ishu nɛ yɛesi ɔzãkɔ bhlui nɔ shu, ɔmɔsɛ abashɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ asɛ kifutu mɛ usi efufu ana. 11Ɔmɔsɛ iwiɛ tu nɛ̀ kɛlɛ tinyenye gagalĩɛ, kɛkɔ ɔsɛ busiɛ atã pɔɛ, awlɔakpa wɔwɔ tsyɛ atãpɔɛ, kɛlɛ latɛ kapɔ ɖi. Nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa ehoeyieleteɛ nulũ bafala, gɛ abazã yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa abha tsyɛ flogo.
12Bebè yula akɔ anyɛ nɔnɔ gɛ akpɛ emi nɛ yɛtifefekeɖi mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ alàkpɛ emiɛ avɛnɔ adɛtɔ̃ɔ, abayɛkɛ ɛkpã ɛkutuɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ elu akɔ bagɛ adɛmɛ niyɛ.
13Onupɛ befeke anɔ teli eɖiɛ, atɛɖɔ asɛ, “Owusoso Akaa yɛefeke mɛ eɖi.” Ɔmɔsɛ kibui zizĩ tɛbalà feke Owusoso Akaa eɖi, alo tɛ yɛtsyɛ etɛefeke anɔ nanà eɖi, 14pɔ anɔ nyia anɔ, yɛibui zizĩɛ gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ abhɛtɛɛ, kɛlɛ gba nii pɛ kɛwɔɛ yɛakpɛ tifefekeɖi mɛ. 15Kɛlɛ onupɛ wɔ tɛpɛpɛ nɔ munɔ ɛya bekeɛ, kɛmɔ kibui kpa, kɛlɛ onupɛ kibui kpa shè piapii nɔ, kɛmɔ butsí.
16Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛkɔ anɔ nanà awɔɛ ɔnɔ. 17Bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ gbangbã nɛ̀ bɔgɛ na piapii nɔ, kitití bude, nɛ kitití udɔ̃ gɛitseɛ bɔlɛ Akaa ɔkɔ, anunɔ gɛ etitsyina asɛ atɔwui gɛ tsrakɛ ɔzãkɔ ana. 18Adɛmɛ ayɛkɛ ɔlɔ amɔ aganà yɛibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ budzi asɛ yɛɔdɔ̃ eyuyu gɛiputɔ odenɔ yɛɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛishi.
Kibui Tilulũ Nɛ̀ Kɛlɛ Abha Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ
19Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nolu awɔ̃ nɛ̀ ibui ɛlɛ ɔsɛ, anɔ nyia anɔ àhɔa nɛ ibui tilulũ mɛ, tɛ adɔfɔ̃ nɛ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ̀ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ mɛ, 20ɔmɔsɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔtɛkɔ ɔsɛ anɔ azã nɛ ɛkpã gbangbã gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔɔ. 21Kliso nɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ atsɔ̃bui idi ka nyia ka bhɛbhɛtɛ, nɛ̀ ɛkpã zizĩ ka nyia ka gɛ likpũ kpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛɛ shu olu, tɛ nozhinɔ ishu esi tɛ nɔyɛkɛ yɛibui gbangbã gɛ baɖa kpɛ wɔnɔ mɛ. Gɛ kɛlɛ balà yɛkɛ ɔnɔ olu nɛ ɛkpãa.
22Notɛ odzi kibuiɛ elulũelete ete, tɛ nɔzɔwɔɛ ɔnɔ shu. Nɔzɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ibuiɛ tseɖe ɔnɔɔ. 23Ɔmɔsɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ eelũ ibui pɛ atɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abhaa, alɛ asɛ anyɛ teli gɛ eɖi yɛamɛ nɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ mɛ, 24kɛlɛ tsĩɔ ɔlɛ gɛ etsyina ashɛ koɔ, atɛ dzɛkɛ kidzi gɛ edziɛ kukuuku. 25Anunɔ pɔ gɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔsha gɛɔná, pɛ lɔkɔ anɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã, pɛ avɛ ɛlɛ abha, atɛ dzɛkɛ pɛ adɛmɛ aabhɛtɛ nɛ kɛgɛ elũ nabhaa, bebeyulà atɔɖɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ abhɛtɛ nabha.
26Onupɛ anɔ teli akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa, pɔ pɛ atɛ nyana yɛinike piapii nɛ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛɛ, awɔɛ yɛishu kɛlɛ yɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛɛ ma kɛnanà mɛ. 27Kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ gɛ kɛli shu bhui pɛ kibo nanà ma kɛlɛishu, nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa namɛɛ nu ɔsɛ tɛ nɔplɛnɔ batsyãnbhi nɛ̀ bavɛvɛ edzini nɛ balɛ ɔtɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ tɛ anɔ alà yɛishu ebu nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebuiɛ gɛ letuturu anunɔɔ mɛ.

Title: YAKOBO 2
Content:
Banɔ Amɛɖiɖi Ibui Ma Ɛlɛ Mɛ
1Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, wɔnɔ asɛ banɔ gɛ ɔyɛkɛ ishu dadalɛ anɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo abha ɔŋãa, nɔotɛ oɖi anɔ amɛ. 2Kɛba ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ anɔ teli akpɛ sikã ɛsikpɛ pɛ adã ɛpɔtɛ gbangbã amana wɔnɔ ɔtsyɔakɔ, pɛ etsyuitsyui teli tsyɛ akpɛ ɔdɔ̃ tsatsã amana, 3onupɛ anunɔ nɛ yɛehoeyiudɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ so pɛ notseɖe yɛɔsɛ, “Zã ɔgbangbãkɔ ɔlɛ,” pɔ notseɖe etsyuitsyuiɛ xɔnɔ ɔsɛ, “Wɔ xɔnɔ lɔ itití nɛ ɛkɛlɛ,” alo “Zã esiakpa nɛ mɛotugbà, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ.” 4Nɔbhɛtɛ ana pɔ, anɛ ɔtɔ nɔkpɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ ishi, pɛ nɔlɔkɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ zizĩ okulu ebhu nɔ mɔɔ dza?
5Mɛdzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ atɔ̃ tɛ nolũ. Pɛnɔsɛ anɛ bagɛ beɖì asɛ balɛ enu betsyutsyuiɛ, balɛ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ ebú bedzi ehoeyielete nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, kɛlɛ anɛ balɛ abaŋã itití ukusiɛ gɛ atɔɖɔ elu akɔ agɛ adɛmɛ yɛibuiɛ mɔɔ dza? 6Wɔnɔ pɔ nɔkwɔala betsyutsyuiɛ. Pɛnɔsɛ anɛ ehoeyieleteɛ balɛ ezhini ɔnɔ ɔkpɛ esiɛ mɔɔ dza? Kɛlɛ anɛ balɛ enu banunɔ gɛ agbana ɔnɔ avɛnɔ ebhu okulukɔ mɔɔ dza? 7Anɛ ehoeyielete alɛ balɛ ebu olugbũ mɛ nɛinye gbangbã gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ Yesu ede zazã mɛ mɔɔ dza?
8Onupɛ nɔnyana ukusi ɔŋãkɔ ɔsha, nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Dɛmɛ nɛ wɔhagbo asɛ kɛdɛmɛ gɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛishu anaa,” kɛlɛ nɔbhɛtɛ piapii. 9Pɔ onupɛ noɖi anɔ amɛɛ, nɔbhɛtɛ ibui kpa, kɛlɛ nɔŋã ɛpɔ asɛ banunɔ gɛ batɛ bhɛtɛ ɔsha abha ana. 10Ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ɔsha pete abha, pɔ pɛ atá esi nɛ toli shuɔ, kɛlɛ ata esi nɛ ɔlɛ pete shu. 11Ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ àɖɔ asɛ, “Tɛɔdɛ ɔma mɛɛ,” yɛɛ ke yɛazaɖɔ asɛ, “Tiyí anɔ.” Onupɛ ɔgɛdɛ ɔma mɛ, pɔ oyì anɔ xɔnɔɔ, kɛlɛ odzi anunɔ gɛ ɔgɛbhɛtɛ nɛ ɔsha abha.
12Nɔɖɔaɖɔ tɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ibui asɛ banunɔ gɛ babàlɔkɔ ɔsha gɛ lɔkɔ anɔ ishu mɛ ahɔɛ zazã ekulu ebhu akɔ nɔ nɔ̀, 13ɔmɔsɛ babalɔkɔ ashagabui maɖimaɖi ekulu ebhu akɔ bagɛ etiɖi anɔ ashagabuiɛ. Yɛ pɔɔ, ashagabui ɖiɖi yɛenu yɛtɛtɔtɔ ɖɔ nɛ yɛebhu kukulu mɛ. Ashagabui ɖiɖi pɔ yɛaŋã abha nɛ yɛebhu kukulu mɛ.
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Nɛ̀ Ebui Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ
14Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kɛgbangbã ɖuwoe lu kinu, onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ asɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ yɛahɔɛ, pɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nanà pɔ ma kɛlɛishuɔ, kɛlɛ́ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ balà bui mɔ dza? 15Kɛba ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, wɔadzya alo woelɛ adzɛ teli alɛ pɛ kɛpɔtɛ alo kɛdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ ma yɛahɔɛ, alo kɛŋaŋã ete tsyɛ ma yɛahɔɛ ɔkɔ kiwui nyiɛ wui udɔ̃ ŋaŋã, 16onupɛ wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ etseɖe yɛasɛ, “Gavɛ nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ, tɛ kɛkpɛkpɛ ku wɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ ɔŋã ɔdɔ̃ tɛ oxuiɛ,” tixuxui ɖuwoe luidi yɛabamɔ, onupɛ agɛkɔɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ nanà nɛ yɛɔtɔ mɛ pɔɔ dza? 17Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha anɔ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ́, onupɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ma kɛlɛishuɔ, kinu kɛlɛ́ mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã.
18Anɔ teli abaɖɔ asɛ, “Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã lɛ wɔahɔɛ, kɛlɛ mɛ pɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa kɛlɛ ɛlɛ mɛahɔɛ.” Ɛbabu kɛliulũ kɔɛ ɔsɛ,
kasɛ mɛ wɔtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ ɛxɔ̃ɛ mawɔa mawɔa, tɛ mɛ tsyɛ ɛkasɛ wɔ mɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gana mɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ ɛwɔaa mɛ. 19Nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tenikpo ko yɛalɛ. Gɛ kɛpɛ ana tsyɛ! Ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩɛ tsyɛ yɛkɛŋã ana-kɛlɛ ɛkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ lishuku wawawa.
20Awɔaga, ɔpɛ ɔsɛ bebu akasɛ wɔ asɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa nanà ma kɛlɛishuɔ ma kɛnanà mɛɛ dza? 21Kiɖuwoe gɛkɔ ɔsɛ balɔkɔ ɔlɔ ashuĩ Abraham asɛ anɔ gbangbã yɛenu? Anɛ gɛ alɔkɔ yɛeyi Isak avɛnɔ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha nabha soɔ dza? 22Yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa alɛ tenikpo, kɛlɛ yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã wɔ̃ɛ ɔgana ɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ mɛ. 23Kɛkɔ ɔsɛ ibui fɔfɔnɔ lu ɛlɛ bá ɛlɛ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Abraham ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋã, kɛlɛ balɔkɔɛ ɛlɛ akɔɛ asɛ, enu anɔ gbangbã,” kɛlɛ bekului asɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔbhia. 24Kinu ibui gbã ɔsɛ, bebu utsyɔa akɔ anɔ ɔgana yɛebuiɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ anɛ gana yɛtɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ ete.
25Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha balɔkɔ Rahab gɛedzi kedulũ azazãelete asɛ enu anɔ gbangbã, nɛ kɛgɛ abhɛtɛ pɛ ayɛkɛ bagɛ bakpɛ asɛ bedi zuru, elu awɔ̃ eɖi esiakpa mɛ, pɛ akasɛ alɛ idzo bhlatɔ pɛ bashɛ mɔɔ dza? 26Ɔmɔ asɛ kinu gɛ anɔ teli enu anɔ tsitsí onupɛ ɔfɔfuĩa ɔma yɛmɛɛ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tsyɛ nui idɔ̃ tsitsí onupɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa gɛ plɛnɔ nɔ ɛlɛ.

Title: YAKOBO 3
Content:
Bɔlɔ Inike Abha Tiɖiɖi
1Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, anɛ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ ka nyia ka kɛlɛ sɛ yɛalɔkɔ ishu asɛ enu adɔ̃kasɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ kinyeɛ gɛ nonyi ana, bebèkulu ebhu gagalĩ akɔ bɔlɔ agɛ ɛkasɛ ɔdɔ̃ ɔdɛ anɔ nyia anɔ. 2Bɔlɔ pete ɛta esi nɛ ebui gelee mɛ. Onupɛ anɔ teli atɛtà esi nɛ kɛgɛ aɖɔ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ anɔ alɛ ana piapii, kɛlɛ abalà eɖi yɛishu pete tsyɛ abha.
3Onupɛ bɔkpɛ ɛɖa nɛ ilugbũ mɛ ɔkɔ basɔ asɛ tɛ belũ atɔ̃ɔ, bɔlà tsyina alɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ bɔpɛ ɔsɛ tɛ bavɛɛ. 4Alo ɔmɔ asɛ kelĩabha ihu ana. Gɛ linu ihu hohoe pɛ kɛlɛ́ gagalĩ kɛlɛ ifu ɛlɛ ɛvɛnɔ tsyɛ elo, ogegè bhlui toli ko ɔlɛ otsyina ɔlɛ ɔvɛnɔ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ anunɔ gɛ egè ɔlɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ lɔvɛɛ. 5Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kineke tsyɛ nu idzya bhlui tili ko nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛdzya shu, pɔ kinu idɔ̃ gɛifeke ishu. Kɛlɛ̀ asɛ ɛsɔlɛ gɛ ofuɖà ɔsɔlɛ ɔtã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ, pɛ eplelee bhlui mɛ ete kide ana. 6Kineke tsyɛ inu ifu. Kinu kanɔ alɛ mɛ ɛdɔ̃ zizĩ tili gɛinu ɔlɔ ishudzya awɔ̃pɛ tieli. Kituturu anɔ pɛ kitsu anunɔ yɛkpã zazã nɛifú, kɛlɛ̀ xɔnɔ pɔɔ, kifu gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ kɛlɛ batsu ɛlɛ ifu.
7Banɔ abalà akɔ baagã petee gɛenu, bɔzhɔɛ, bagã gɛetsì nɛ kesiakpa, nɛ̀ aƒu mɛ agã ka nyia ka idi amɔ̃ awɔ̃, 8kineke xɔnɔ anɔ nanà atɛlà ɛlɛ akpakà. Kinu kɛdɔ̃ zizĩ gɛiti moele, gɛ kabɔɛ kpa kalɛ alɛ ɛlɛ ulũ.
9Bɔlɔkɔ inikeɛ kpɛ Apaleteɛ nɛ̀ Akaa enye nɛitití nɔ, kɛlɛ bɔlɔkɔ ɛlɛ ɖɔ ibui kpɛ anunɔ tsyɛ, anunɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa abhɛtɛ nɛ yɛtɛzazã mɛɛ. 10Nɛ olugbũ tonikpo ɔlɛ mɛɛ, Apalete nɛinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɔ, nɛ̀ kibui ɖɔɖɔ kpɛ anɔ ede ekoeyi. Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, kidzo ma sɛ tɛ kɛzã ana. 11Kɛpɛ sɛ tɛ bulĩ gbangbã nɛ̀ bɔmɔɛlĩ zide koeyi nɛ ulĩhɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛɛ dza? 12Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã ɔsɛ nɛ kamɔtɔ̃si tunikpo ɔlɛ nabhaa, bɔbaapɔ̃ bɔbɔ osi eyuyu dza? Alo wain ihui balà yu kibisɛ busi eyuyu tsyɛ dza? Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kɛhɔ mɛ gɛ bɔmɔɛlĩ kuɔ, bulĩ gbangbã tsyɛ tɛ balà ziku nɛ kɛhɔ tinikpo ɛlɛ mɛ.
Bubutiɛ Gɛide Kitití
13Afana gɛenu ebuitinɛ nɛ̀ ebui esi lulũelete nɛ wɔnɔ mɛ? Anɔ alɛ alɔkɔ ɛkpã gbangbã ebu ɛlɛ akasɛ ɔgana yɛebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ tɛ abhɛtɛ alɛ ɔgana ishu esi zhizhinɔ gɛide ubuti mɛ. 14Onupɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã kɛtɛ́kɛtɛ́, nɛ̀ mɛ ete yɛtɛpɛpɛ ebui alɛ akpasɛ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, nɔtɛotũ itelũ nɛ alɛishu alo tɛ nɔzɔdɛ adã nɛ ibui gbangbã shu. 15“Bubuti” ɛlɛ nɛidiɛ, anɛ kitití bude ba, pɔ kanɔ mɛ ɔyɛ bunu, gɛ ɔfɔfuĩa ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ, Abosam ɔyɛ ulinu. 16Ɔmɔsɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ kiwuhũ dzadzã nɛ̀ mɛete ɛyɛ ko kɛlɛ pɛ lɛ̀ɛ, ɛkɛlɛ ɔtɔ bubú nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka idi tsyɛ azã.
17Bubutiɛ gɛide kititíɛ pɔɔ, putɔ nɔɔ, bɔlɛishu dalɛ, gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ anɔ nɛishu yɔyɔ mɛ, ɔhagbo esi tilulũ, ishu esi tizhizhinɔ, gɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ̀ eyuyu gbangbã akpasɛ, banɔ amɛ maɖimaɖi nɛ̀ ebui mɛ dadalɛ alɛ. 18Iboe evuvũeleteɛ gɛ aɖa ɔdɔ̃ nɛishu yɔyɔ mɛɛ, bapɔ ɔdɔ̃ gɛinu ibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ.

Title: YAKOBO 4
Content:
Nozhinɔ Ishu Esi Ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa
1Kiɖe gɛ mana ekpli tatá nɛ̀ ebala nɛ wɔnɔɛishi? Pɛnɔsɛ anɛ ebuiɛ gɛ lakpasɛ ɔnɔ mɛ pɛ latɛ eyu nɛ ɔnɔ mɛɛ ledeɛ dza? 2Nɔpɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili, pɔ nɔgɛ mɔɛ ɛlɛ. Noyí anɔ pɛ nɔdzã awuhũ nɛ ɔdɔ̃ shu, pɔ nɔtɛ ɔlà mɔ ɛdɔ̃ɔ gɛ nɔ pɛ nɔ. Nohu ebala pɛ nɔta ekpli. Nɔtɛ ɔmɔ ɔdɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ notɛ obisi Owusoso Akaa. 3Nobisiɛ, nɔtɛ ɔmɔ ɔyɛkɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nobisi nɛ idzo kpa abha, noo bisi udɔ̃ sɛ tɛ nɔwɔɛ ɛlɛ shu axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ŋaŋã ete.
4Wɔnɔ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛelete, notinyi ɔsɛ nɔɔŋã ɛbhia nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛɛ, kɛlɛ notsyina odzi banɔ gɛ banyana Owusoso Akaa akpɛ ɛya mɛɛ dza? Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ edzi ɔbhia ɔkɔ kanɔ alɛɛ, kɛlɛ etsyina edzi anunɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa. 5Pɛnɔsɛ noɖi ɔsɛ kibui ete ko baɖɔ elu nɛ Kibui fɔfɔnɔ luuɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ akɔ asɛ lɔzã ɔlɔ mɛɛ ɔwlɔãkɛ abhã gagalĩi. 6Pɔ ebhui ɔlɔ ebu popopo. Kliso pɛ Yɛibuiɛ ɖɔ ɔsɛ,
“Owusoso Akaa alɔɛtití nɛ bagɛ befeke ishuɔ shu
pɔ ebhui bagɛ ezhinɔ ishu esiɛ ebu.”
7Nozhinɔ ɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa. Nɔ lɔɛtití nɛ Abosam shu tɛ ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ ɔnɔ ɔbha. 8Nótsu ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛ yɛtsyɛ etsu aplɛnɔ ɔnɔ. Ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ, noplu ɔnɔ ahɔɛ, tɛ nɔdalɛ ɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ, wɔnɔ gɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ aya taabhaa. 9Kitúɔ tã ɔnɔ, nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, tɛ nobi yoyò. Wɔnɔ ɛmɔɛ dzi ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, kɛlɛ ɔnɔ samɛ mɔmɔ edzi bamɛ tsɛtsɛ́ kpɛ esi. 10Nozhinɔ ɔnɔ ishu esi nɛ Apalete namɛ tɛ efeke ɔnɔ ewunɔ abha.
11Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ ɔzɔɖɔ ebui kpa nɛ bagɔlɔ shu. Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ ebui kpa nɛ yɛadzya shu alo ekulu ebhu niyɛɛ, alɔɛtití nɛ ɔshaa shu, kɛlɛ ekulu ebhu nɛ ɔlɛ. Onupɛ nokulu ebhu nɛ̀ ɔshaa, kɛlɛ anɛ ɔlɛ abha bhɛbhɛtɛelete nonu, pɔ nodzi ebhu ekukuluelete ɔkɔ ɔshaa. 12Anɔ tenikpo ko yɛenu Ɔshakpɛkpɛelete nɛ̀ Kebhukluanɔ, yɛenu anunɔ gɛ alà elu anɔ ɛkpã kɛlɛ yɛalà ezĩ udɔ̃ tsyɛ. Wɔnɔ pɔ, afana nɔonu pɛ nokulu ebhu nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɔhagbo alɛ?
Kitelũ Tutũ Ɔkɔ Ivũ
13Nɔtatɔ̃ tɛ nolũ, wɔnɔ agɛ nɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Oboɔ alo kivũ bɔbavɛ ɔma ɔlɛ alo odzyiedeɛ mɛ, bɔba dɛzã ɛkɛlɛ gã kedzì tɛ bɔlɔ ehoeyiɛ amɔ atɔɖɔ.” 14Kiɖeso, otinyi kɛgɛ bàba ɛlɛ mɛ ivũ. Kiɖe gɛinu wɔnɔ ɛkpã? Ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ oku nɛ kibe gulũi tili mɛ pɛ lozo wlui ɔyala ko nonu. 15Nɛ kɛlɛ nɛinye mɛɛ, nɔzɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Onupɛ Apalete adɛmɛɛ, bɔbazã nɛ ɛkpã kɛlɛ bɔba bhɛtɛ kɛlɛ̀ nɛ̀ tili tsyɛ. 16Otsiɛ nɔ, notũ itelũ pɛ nobu olugbũ mɛ. Kitelũ tutũ ɛlɛ nɛidi pɔɔ, kibui zizĩ kinu. 17Kliso anunɔ gɛ enyi ibui gbangbã gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ abhɛtɛ pɛ atɛ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛɛ, abhɛtɛ ibui kpa.

Title: YAKOBO 5
Content:
Titsetseɖenɔ Nɛ̀ Ehoeyielete Gagalĩɛ
1Wɔnɔ ehoeyieleteɛ nɔtatɔ̃ tɛ nolũ otsi alɛ, nobi yoyo, tɛ nɔwɔa awuwoe, nɛ bɔtɔ gbagbla gɛ bàba ɔnɔ abhaa shu. 2Wɔnɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ ɔtsɔmɔ, kɛlɛ iklusɛ tã ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛɛ. 3Wɔnɔ sikãɛkpã nɛ̀ sikã fufú edzyewoele. Bɔdɔ̃ tidzyedzyewoele ɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shu nɛ kɛtã gɛ kɛbatã ɔnɔ asɛ ifu ana. Nɔyalɛ ehoeyiudɔ̃ gelee ɔbalɛ olu nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ alɛ mɛ. 4Noɖi mɔ! Abhɛɛ gɛ nɔgɛ buia ɔkɔ ɔnɔ apaeyiɛ gɛ adzyaa wɔnɔ bayaa mɛ, ebieyo nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu. Bagɛ apɔ ɔdɔ̃ akɔ ɔnɔ, balɛ yoyo bibiɛ ku Apalete Ohumielete natɔ̃ mɛ. 5Nɔzã kanɔ alɛ mɛ, pɛ nɔŋã ɛkpã nɛ̀ ehoeyiudɔ̃. Nɔŋã ɔdɔ̃ olu bɔ, pɛ noopo banɔ yiyíwui. 6Nobú bagɛ agɛ bhɛtɛ ibui kpa nɛpɔ, pɛ noyí alɛ, gɛ anɛ kitití bazalɔ nɛ ɔnɔ shu tsyɛ flogo.
Tɛdɔdɔ Fɔ̃ɔ Nɛ Bɔtɔ Mɛ
7Kliso mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔvɛnɔ Apalete nɛbabe. Nolu awɔ̃ nɛ kɛdɔ gɛ ayadɛ àdɔ fɔ̃ɔ akɔ esiakpa sɛ tɛ kakɔ ɔdɔ̃eyi eshè nɛ alɛ abha, nɛ̀ kipoɔ gɛ epo subha nɛ yɛdɔbeɛ oɖi. 8Wɔnɔ tsyɛ elo, nɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ tɛ nɔzã gagalĩi, ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ nɛbabe na beke. 9Nɔtɛ ɔvɛnɔ olugbũ nɛ bagɔlɔ ɔkɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, sɛ tɛ batɛ bekulu ebhu nɛ ɔnɔ. Ɖio, kebhukulueleteɛ tsyɛ yɛeli edulũɔ alɛ!
10Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, tɛ kidzi tɛlɔlɔkɔ shɔnɔ nɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ shuɔ, nɔbaka ebuiɖɔluanɛ gɛ azaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ ayɛ oɖi. 11Asɛ gɛ nonyi ana, bagɛ beyulaa, balɛ edzi anɔ gɛ bakpɛ emi. Nolũ kɛkpɛ gɛ Hiob akpɛ emi, kɛlɛ nɔmɔ kɛgɛ Apaleteɛ abhɛtɛ akɔɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ. Apaleteɛ ɛyamɛ yɔ kɛlɛ eɖi anɔ ashagabui.
12Nɛ̀ kɛgɛdɛ pete nɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ tanà ɔdɔ̃, kitití udɔ̃ loo kesiakpa ɔyɛ, alo kɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka ɛdi. Nɔkɔ ɔnɔ, “Ee” edzi ee, kɛlɛ ɔnɔ “Ao” tsyɛ edzi ao, tɛ Owusoso Akaa etibebu ɔnɔ ɛpɔ.
Owusoso Akaa Tikukulu Nɛ Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Mɛ
13Bɔtɔ bá ɔnɔ mɛ teli abhaa, ekulu itití ayɛ. Anɔ teli amɔ sameɛ, azhã same ɛdzɛ tɛ akpɛ Akaa nɛinye nɛitití. 14Wɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli ishu mɛ izĩ dza? Ekulu ɔhamɛ esheshèɛ tɛ bekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ yɛtakpu tɛ basara bɔbɔ́ akɔɛ nɛ Apalete nɛinye mɛ. 15Nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ pɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa, kɛbakɔ ɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ yɛishu mɛ zĩɛ, Apaleteɛ abakɔ asɛ yɛalɔ gagalĩi. Onupɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpaa, babàlɔkɔ ɛlɛ etsye. 16Kliso nɔdalɛ ɔnɔ ebui kpa mɛ ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, tɛ nokulu Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ nɔmɔ ishu mɛ gagalĩ. Bupu lɛ anɔ gbangbã yɛ Akaa tikukulu mɛ kɛlɛ kɛwɔa axɔ̃ɛ tsyɛ popopo.
17Anɔdzyrame ko Eliya tsyɛ edzi asɛ ɔlɔ ana. Pɔ gɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa popopo asɛ subha atɛdɔɔ, agɛdɔ ɛgbã nɛ agɔ tatá nɛ̀ bewoele tehlo mɛ. 18Gɛ ezekulu Owusoso Akaa, kɛkɔ ɔsɛ kititíɛ dalɛ ɔkɔ subha yɛazadɔ, kɛlɛ bɔŋaŋã zikoeyi nɛ esiakpa nabha. 19Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, onupɛ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ teli etsyina nɛ ibui gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ niede pɛ anɔ teli edzini yɛetsyina amanaa, 20nɔbaka ɔsɛ, anunɔ gɛ etsyina ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛelete nɛ yɛesitatá edzo nabhaa, ebui nɛ utsí ahɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ gelee nɔ etsyee.

Title: PETRO 1 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Keplukpa gɛeputɔ ede Petro ɔkɔ, afɔnɔ alɛ asɛsɛ Kristoanɛ gɛ bekulu nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀ asɛ, “Banɔ nɔ gɛ Owusoso Akaa ebuɔ”, banɔ gɛ bapɔɛ akanà nɛ Asia bɔbhiabha ibeɛ gɛonu kawɔ̃pɛ bhlui nɔ. Kibui nɛtakpu so pɛ afɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ akpɛ bagɛ abà kalà keplukpa niemi, banɔ nɔ gɛ baza tɔnɔ alɛ ede pɛ baza mɔ ɔtɔ edenɔ balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ. Agɛ yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa abhɛtɛ kibui ɛlɛ ana asɛ tɛ alɔkɔ abakà bagɛ abà kalà kibui gbangbã nɛ Yesu Kristo shu, anunɔ gɛ yɛutsí, nɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpù mɛ, nɛ̀ yɛibuiɛ gɛ atɔtɔɖɔ elu asɛ aza babaa kɔ aasɛ tɛ bezeɖi otugbà mɛ. Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ mɛ tɛdadalɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ badɛmɛ tɛ bakpɛ emi nɛ balɛ ɔtɔ shu. Beze elu awɔ̃ asɛ tifefekeɖi baabhɛtɛ ɔkɔ alɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã kɛlɛ babà buia ɛbhɛ kɔ alɛ nɛ “kiwui nabha gɛ Yesu ebekoeyìɛ”. (1.7).
Gɛ akpɛ alɛ emi nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔtɔ zɛba alɛ abha ebekeɛ, agɛ yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa aza kpalà bagɛ aba kalà yɛeplukpa asɛ bazana alɛ ɛkpã asɛ banɔ gɛenu Kristo ayɛ ana.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-2
Anɔ tɛbabakà ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa anɔ tibubú 1.3-12
Buluhũ huhu kɔanɔ ɔkɔ ɛkpã dadalɛ tɛzazãna 1.13—2.10
Kɛgɛ kɛlɛ sɛ Kristoanɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ bɔtɔ ibe 2.11—4.19
Kristoanɛ ishu esi zhizhini nɛ̀ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa 5.1-11
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 5.12-14

Title: PETRO 1 1
Content:
1Mɛ Petro anɔ gɛenu Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ,
mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ sɛsɛ bagɛ Owusoso Akaa ebu luɔ, pɛ bunu bafafala nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, pɛ bapɔɛ akanà nɛ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia nɛ̀ Bitania, ɔdɔ̃ mɛ 2banɔ gɛ bebu alɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ akpɛ otugbà nulũ, ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa adalɛ, ɔkɔ batɔ̃ lulũ ɔkɔ Yesu Kristo nɛ yɛ dzyosu hɔɛhɔ̃ɛ niesi.
Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ.
Owusoso Akaa Nɛinye Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití Ɔkɔ Ɛkpã Gɛ Buɖi Kidzo Mɛ Ɔkɔ
3Bɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu Akaa ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo nɛinyè nɛitití! Nɛ yɛ ashagabui ɖiɖi gbagbla mɛɛ, akɔ bedzinì ɔlɔ amɔ̃ avɔvɔ akpɛ ɛkpã gɛ buɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ɔgana Yesu Kristo yɛ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, 4nɛ̀ kaŋãsiɛ gɛetibe belè ɖìɛ mɛ, gɛ ketìbezĩ alo pɛ kalɛ ulũ bafalàa, kalɛ babalɛ nɛititíɛ elu akɔ wɔnɔ 5banɔ gɛ ɔgana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ohumi nɔ akpɛ ɔkã nɛ wɔnɔ shu, ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ anɔ tibubuɔ gɛ babalɛ elu akɔ nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ mɛ babà. 6Nɛ alɛ mɛ nɔmɔ same hohoe, pɔ otsiɛ nɔ, agɔ kibè gulũi gɛ nɔbɔ mɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ tifefekeɖi ediedi mɛ. 7Ebui alɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ ana sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, gɛ kigbogbolo ɔdɛ sikãɛkpã gɛ bazĩ, gɛ balɔkɔ kifù adalɛ ɛlɛ shu nɔ pɔ flogo. Tɛ babhɛtɛ ɛlɛ kidzi kibui ɛgbã gɛ babakpɛ ɛlɛ inye nɛitití, pɛ ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ inyè gbangbã tsyɛ bazã ɛlɛ shu gɛ onupɛ Yesu Kristo ebekoeyìɛ. 8Nɔkɔ mɔ yɛoɖì pɔ, pɔ nɔdɛmɛ yɛibui, kɛlɛ gɛ nɔtɛ ɔmɔ yɛ otsiɛ tsyɛ elo, nɔyɛkɛ yɛabha ɔŋã kɛlɛ nɔtɛ bɔlà ɖɔaɖɔ nɛ same mɔmɔ hohoe alɛ shu. 9Ɔmɔsɛ nɔyɛkɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ gɛ ɛlɛ shu so pɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã, gɛinu wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ tibubu.
10Nɛ atɔwui tibubu kibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, ebuiɖɔluanɛ, gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ babaa ɔkɔ ɔnɔ shuɔ, kibui gɛ belu awɔ̃ eɖi ɛlɛ piapii pɛ beɖi ɛlɛ abha piapii, 11gɛ baapɛ asɛ tɛ̀ betì kibeɛ nɛ̀ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ alɛishu Yesu Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔkpasɛ alɛ mɛ ɔzɔ ɖɔaɖɔ, aɖɔ Yesu bɔtɔ mɔmɔ akpɛ otugbà elu, nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ gɛ babà nɛ̀ kɛlɛ idegbaa. 12Bebu ɛlɛ akasɛ alɛ sɛ gɛnɛ balɛishu baakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ pɔ wɔ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ bagɛ baɖɔ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ etitseɖe wɔnɔ ɔganà Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gɛ basɛsɛ ɔnɔ odenɔ kititiɛ mɛ. Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tsyɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bapɔɛ ebui alɛ mɛ eɖi.
Kɔ Wɔshu Dalɛ
13Klisoɔ, nɔ balɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ ɔkɔ kɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa, nɔŋã wɔnɔ shu abha tɛ nozoɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ tibhui bhuibuɔ gɛ babà kɔ wɔnɔ gɛ onupɛ Yesu Kristo ebè ekoeyìɛ. 14Asɛ beyi gɛ belũ atɔ̃ ana, nɔtɛ̀ dɛmɛ ɔtɔɖɔ abosam yɛebuiɛ gɛ lazã wɔnɔ mɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔzã matì matiɛ mɛ. 15Pɔ asɛ gɛ agɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ shu dalɛ anaa, kana nɔkɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ shu dalɛ nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbhɛtɛ mɛ, 16ɔmɔsɛ bafɔnɔ elu asɛ, “Nɔkɔ wɔnɔ shu dalɛ̃, ɔmɔsɛ mɛishu dalɛ̃.”
17Gɛ nokulu Akaa gɛ ekulù kebhu nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa pɛ etiɖì banɔ amɛɛ soɔ, nɔzã nɛ̀ wɔnɔ ɛkpã asɛ bafafala ana nɛ ishu esi zhizhini nɛ̀ kifusisi mɛ̀. 18Ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ gɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔbàzĩ asɛ sikãfufù nɛ̀ sikãɛkpã shu so pɛ bebú wɔnɔ odenɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ ɛkpã zazãna gɛ wɔnɔ ashuĩ alɛ alɔkɔ elu akɔ wɔnɔ mɛ. 19Pɔ nɛ Kristo dzyosu dadalɛ gɛenu obhoshi eyiɛ gɛ ɔkɔ nanà ogizĩ nɛ ɔlɛ shuɔ mɛ. 20Bebu yɛelu flogo pɛ babà bhɛtɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, pɔ bebu yɛakasɛ nɛ ewui gɔgɔ alɛ mɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu. 21Gana yɛabha nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha ɔŋã, anɔ gɛ yɛefeke yɛedenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ pɛ akɔ yɛ ishu dadalɛ, klisoɔ wɔnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã nɛ̀ otugbà mɛ gɛ nɔoɖiɛ ɔlɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ.
22Otsiɛ gɛ nɔoplu ishu pɛ nɔolũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ kibui gbã, sɛ tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ adzya alɛ, tɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bagɔlɔ denɔ kitúɔ mɛ piapii. 23Ɔmɔsɛ bedzinì wɔnɔ amɔ, gɛnɛ denɔ busi eyuyuɔ gɛebetsíɛ mɛ, pɔ denɔ busi eyuyuɔ gɛ etibè etsì ɖiɛ mɛ, ganà Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gɛ lɛ nɛkpã pɛ kɛlɛ ulu tɛ fala mɛ. 24Ɔmɔsɛ,
“Banɔ petee edzì asɛ tɛwɔa ana,
kɛlɛ balɛ ishu dadalɛ petee dzì asɛ osiefufù nɛ ayakpa mɛ ana,
tɛwɔa tãpɔɛ kɛlɛ efufùɔ awɔlɛ,
25pɔ Apaleteɛ nɛibuiɛ lɛ tihɔɔ.”
Kɛlɛ inu kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ etseɖe wɔnɔ.

Title: PETRO 1 2
Content:
1Klisoɔ nɔobu ishu oyinɔ odenɔ banɔ shu zizĩ nɛ̀ banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ mɛ, asɛnɛ sɛsɛ, kawɔ̃kpɛ nɛ̀ banɔ ishutibui tɛɖɔɖɔ ka nyia ka ɛdi mɛ. 2Asɛ beyì vɔvɔ gɛ bamɔ ana, nɔobisi ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ kɛmɔlĩ gbangbã, sɛ tɛ nɛ bɔlɛ mɛɛ nɔobo shè oku wɔnɔ tibubuɔ mɛ, 3kibè ɛlɛ gɛ nɔtɛ omini oɖi sɛ Apaleteɛ apɛ.
Kɛklagbuɔ Gɛlɛ Nɛkpã Nɛ̀ Banunɔ Gɛ Bebú Eluɔ
4Asɛ gɛ nɔba yɛɔbha, kɛklagbuɔ gɛlɛ nɛkpã, pɛ banɔ nɔ agɛ yɛkɛ ɛlɛ pɔ Owusoso Akaa xɔnɔ ebu ɛlɛ gɛ kɛyɛkɛ edzi kɔɛ- 5wɔnɔ tsyɛ, asɛ aklagbu gɛalɛ nɛkpã ana, balɔkɔ ɔnɔ abhɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ buvũ tɛ̀ budzi bukusi ɔŋãkɔ gɛ dalɛ, gɛ bɔkɔ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ tɔɖɔ bɔlɛ abha ɔganà Yesu Kristo abha. 6Ɔmɔsɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ aɖɔ asɛ,
“Ɖio, idzu kɛklagbu nɛ Zion,
odekrekpui iklagbuɔ gɛ bebu pɛ kɛyɛkɛ kedziɛ,
kɛlɛ̀ anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha ŋã
batɛ bàkpɛ̀ yɛ kiwũi eɖi.”
7Otsiɛ nɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ ɔyɛkɛ ɔŋãa, kɛklagbu ɛlɛ yɛkɛ kedzi ɔkɔ ɔnɔ. Pɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ ɔŋã xɔnɔ,
“Kɛklagbuɔ gɛ bevũbhɔ atɛɛ elúɔ
kɛlɛ badzì odekrekpu kɛklagbuɔ,
8kɛlɛ
“Kɛklagbuɔ gɛkɔ asɛ bɔnɔ akpatà
nɛ̀ ɔxɔa gɛɔkɔ asɛ baadɔ oboeɛ.”
Bakpatà bɔdɔ̃ ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ kibuiɛ, kibuiɛ gɛ babalɛ elu asɛ kɛba alɛ abha.
9Pɔ nɔonu banɔ gɛ bebú elú, bukusi ɔŋakɔ gɛ nɔonu ekusi, kɛmadi gɛdalɛ, banɔ gɛ benu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ, sɛ tɛ nɔɖɔaɖɔ ɔkpɛ anunɔ gɛ ekulu wɔnɔ yɛinyeɛ nɛitití, anunɔ gɛ ebu wɔnɔ eyinɔ odenɔ otumũɔ mɛ amana tɛdadalɛ gɛ bhɛtɛ ibiɛ mɛ. 10Kibè tili bafala gɛ nɔ ogi dzi anɔ, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ nɔonu Owusoso Akaa anɔ, kibè tili begiɖì wɔnɔ ashagabui, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔ beɖi wɔnɔ ashagabui.
11Ɛbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɛɛkpalà wɔnɔ, wɔnɔ asɛ beefù ana nɛ̀ bafafala nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔobu wɔnɔ ishu oyinɔ odenɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ebui kpa, gɛ laatà keyù nɛ̀ wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ. 12Nɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛidi nɛ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋã nɛishi, sɛ gɛ bebu wɔnɔ kɛpɔ sɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ebui kpa tsyɛ elo, babàmɔ wɔnɔ ebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ kɛlɛ babà dalɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinyeɛ shu nɛ kiwui ɛlɛ nabha gɛ ababa ebeɖi ɔlɔ.
Ishu Esi Zhizhinì Ɔkɔ Beekusiɛ Nɛ̀ Bapaleteɛ
13Nɛ Apaleteɛ nɛtakpu soɔ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ ɔsha ka nyia ka gɛ bakpɛ nɛ banɔishi, ezedzi asɛ ekusiɛ gɛ yɛeɖi ɔsha gbagbla nabha o, 14alo amadi ekusiɛ, gɛ ekusiɛ akpɛ asɛ apɔ̃ batɔ̃ kɔ bagɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa tɛ akpɛ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ elete nɛitití. 15Ɔmɔsɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ɔsɛ ganà kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, tɛ̀ nɔkɔ bawɔaga gɛ baɖɔ matì matì kaɖɔ ataatɔ̃. 16Nɔzanà ɛkpã asɛ banɔ gɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ ana, pɔ nɔtɛ̀ lɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ zazã ɔlɔkɔ ɔdã wɔnɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nulũ, pɔ nɔzã nɛkpã asɛ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ ana. 17Nɔkpɛ kɛtakpu esi gbangbã ɔkɔ aka nyia aka. Nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bayɛyɛkɛŋã balɛ kɛdzya bhɛbhɛtɛ, nɔosì Owusoso Akaa nɛifù, tɛ nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ ekusiɛ.
18Banɔ dzidzi mɔ, nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bapaleteɛ nɛ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ petee mɛ, gɛnɛ banɔ alɛ gɛapɛ pɛ beeɖì banɔ ashagabui ete, pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ bagbanà wɔnɔ nɛ tɛgagalĩɛ mɛ tsyɛ. 19Ɔmɔsɛ baɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ kemi azã bɔtɔ nɔnɔɛdi gɛ kɛma sɛ azã bɔliesi pɔ aza bɔlɛ esiɛ shu, nɛ gɛ elu awɔ̃ nɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha so. 20Kɛbhɛ babuia ɖuwoe nɔbɔ mɔ onupɛ behuisi wɔnɔ nɛ wɔnɔ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ takpu pɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ? Pɔ onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɛtakpu pɛ nɔkpɛ kemi nɛ ɛlɛ shuɔ, kinu ishu dadalɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. 21Kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ bekulu wɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ Kristo atɔ nɛ wɔnɔ ɛtakpu, kɛlɛ abhɛtɛ kɛlɛ akasɛ wɔnɔ, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔgã asɛ gɛ agã ana.
22“Agɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa nanà,
kɛlɛ begi lu banɔ wɔɛwɔɛ ibui nanà nɛ yɛolugbũ mɛ.”
23Kibeɛ gɛ baza kwɔalà yɛɛ tsyɛ elo, egibu kɛlɛilũ, gɛ azamɔ bɔtɔɔ, agɛkã ɔkɔ ananà. Pɔ alɔkɔ yɛishu ɔkɔ agɛ yeekulù kebhu gbangbãa. 24Yɛalɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa akpɛ yɛishuɔ mɛ̀ nɛ busiɛ shu, sɛ tɛ butsì ɔkɔ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tɛ̀ bɔzã nɛkpã ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ, ganà yɛapɔ̃ mɛ bebu banyã akɔ wɔnɔ. 25Ɔmɔsɛ nɔzã asɛ ibhoshi gɛ ɛzɛ tsaɖakɛ idzo ana, pɔ otsiɛ xɔnɔɔ, nozotsyina ba ibhoshi agbagbana eleteɛ nɛ̀ agɛ yɛeɖi wɔnɔ atɔwuiɛ nabha ɔkɔ.

Title: PETRO 1 3
Content:
Banyɛedzini Nɛ̀ Badzɛenyine
1Banyɛedzini mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ enyine alɛ sɛ tɛ̀, onupɛ balɛ ɔmaɛyɛmɛ teli agɛ yɛkɛ kibui nabha ŋãa tsyɛ elo, tɛ bè tsyina ɔganà wɔnɔ ɛkpã zazãna mɛ, 2gɛ onupɛ bamɔ ɛkpã dadalɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ balɛ ɛkpã shu. 3Wɔnɔ bubite yiyiɛ tìde ishupi tiwoewoese mɛ, asɛ kɛtakpù yuyu nɛ̀ sikã ɔdɔ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ apɔtɛ ɔdɔ̃ gbangbã kpɛkpɛ mɛ. 4Pɔ nɔkɔ wɔnɔ bubite yiyìɛ dè kitúɔ mɛ, bubite yiyiɛ gɛ bɔtɛ balà bele gɛide ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛɔtɔ ɖɔaɖɔ mɛ̀ pɛ lɔtɛ ɖɔaɖɔ mɛ, gɛ kɛyɛkɛ kedzì hohoe nɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. 5Ɔmɔsɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abha badzɛ dadalɛ gɛ atɛzã afala pɛ beeɖi otugbà mɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ ewoese balɛishu nɔ. Bezhinì ishu esi akɔ balɛ enyine alɛ, 6adzɛ asɛ Sara, gɛ elũ atɔ̃ akɔ Abraham pɛ ezekulu yɛasɛ yɛapalete. Wɔnɔ onù yɛeyi adzɛ alɛ onupɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kibuiɛ gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ pɛ nɔgɛ kɔ kifù sisi idzoɔ.
7Badzɛenyine mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abhaa, wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔolũ ebui esi ɔkɔ wɔnɔ edzinì alɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ nɔlɛ ɔplɛnɔ alɛ, tɛ nɔgbanà alɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ alɛ asɛ ohumi bhlui elete ana gɛ wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ ɔbɔ mɔ kaŋãsiɛ nɛ̀ tibhui bhuibu idɔ kɔkɔ ɔkɔ ɛkpã, sɛ tɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà tɛbà kɔ nɔyɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu.
Bɔtɔ Mɔmɔ Denɔ Kibui Gbangbã Tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ Mɛ
8Gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɔ, wɔnɔ petee, nɔzã tenikpo nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, nɔobì ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, nɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ asɛ baadzya ana, nɔoɖi ashagabui tɛ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi. 9Nɔtɛ lɔkɔ kibui kpa ɔlɔkɔ buia kɛbhɛ ɔkɔ kibui kpa nɔ, alo nɔtsɛɖakɛ̀ aklɔatu, pɔ nɔoyulà ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu so pɛ bekulu wɔnɔ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbɔmɔ tiyuyulà. 10Ɔmɔsɛ,
“Anunɔ gɛ abadɛmɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpãa
tɛ amɔ ewui gbangbãa
kɛlɛ sɛ ebu yɛinekeɛ eyinɔ nɛ ebui kpa ɖɔɖɔ shu
nɛ̀ tɛ ebu olugbũ odenɔ kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ gɛawɔɛ banɔ shu.
11Kɛlɛ sɛ etsyinà edenɔ kibui kpa shu tɛ̀ abhɛtɛ kɛgbangbã,
kɛlɛ sɛ apɛɛ ishu yɔyɔ tɛ abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ abha.
12Ɔmɔsɛ Apaleteɛ yɛawuhũɔ etsiɖì banɔ dadalɛ nabha
kɛlɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ balɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukulu,
pɔ Apaleteɛ namɛ alɔɛtití nɛ̀ bagɛ babhɛtɛ̀ ebui kpa shu.”
13Afana gɛ abà bhɛtɛ kizizĩ nɛ̀ wɔ gɛ onupɛ ɔpɛɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔbhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã dza? 14Pɔ onupɛ edzi asɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɔmɔ bɔtɔ nɛ kibui gɛpɛ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ shu tsyɛ elo, beyulà ɔkɔ wɔnɔ. “Nɔotɛ osifù nɛ̀ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ besì kifù nɔɔ, nɔtɛkɔ kifù yi wɔnɔ.” 15Pɔ nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛɛ, nɔlɔkɔ Kristo asɛ wɔnɔ Apalete. Nɔbalɛ kibe nyia be tɛ̀ nɔobu kibui ulũ ɔkɔ aka nyia aka gɛ ebisì wɔnɔ kibui sɛ tɛ̀ nɔɖɔ kɛnɔnɔ shu sopɛ nɔoɖì kidzo mɛ ɔkɔ ebui alɛ. Pɔ nɔbhɛtɛ alɛ nɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ̀ kaɖɔ gbangbã tɛɖɔɖɔ mɛ, 16tɛ̀ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ ebuiɛ adalɛ piapi, sɛ tɛ̀ kiwũi yi bagɛ balɛ aɖɔaɖɔ kpa pɛ beezhinì olugbũ esi nɛ wɔnɔ ɛkpã gbangbã tɛzazãna nɛ Kristo mɛ shu. 17Apɛ adɛ gɛ onupɛ kinu Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛɛ́, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɔ̀ ɔkɔ kibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ɔdɛ kibui zizĩ bhɛbhɛtɛ̀. 18Ɔmɔsɛ Kristo etsí butsì tunikpo akɔ ɔlɔ ebui kpa, anɔ gbangbã ebetsí akɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ sɛ tɛ̀ agbanà wɔnɔ amana Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Beyíi nɛ ishudzya mɛ, pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔkɔ yɛazã nɛ ɛkpã, 19ɔfɔfuĩa gɛ ganà ɔlɛ abha, yɛavɛ adɛ ɖɔ kibuiɛ etseɖe ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛkpasɛ ɔɖavũɔ mɛ 20ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɛgagalĩ batɔ̃ mɛ kibe dzlolo nɛlɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɔ yɔɔ nɛ Noa ibèɛ gɛ azafatɛ aɖakaohu hohoeɛ. Banɔ kasasà tieli balɛ azã aɖakaohu hohoeɛ mɛ, banɔ tasɛ balɛ bayɛkɛ odenɔ bulĩɛ mɛ, 21kɛlɛ bulĩ ɛlɛ kasɛ bulĩkpɛkpɛ nɛ kɛtakpu ɔkɔ anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ wɔnɔ elu nɛkpã otsiɛ. Gɛnɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bebù kibò nɛ anɔ shu, pɔ kibui tɔtɔɖɔ lu ɔganà kitú mɛibui gbangbã nɛ Owusoso Akaa shu. Kɛlɛ yɛkɛ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ ganà Yesu Kristo yɛ̀ tɛlɔlɔ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ, 22anɔ gɛavɛ kititiɛ pɛ avɛ Owusoso Akaa kɛŋã mɛ, ɔplɛnɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ, ɔshaeleteɛ nɛ̀ ihumieleteɛ tɛ bezhinì balɛ ishu esì akɔɛ.

Title: PETRO 1 4
Content:
Ɛkpã Zazãna Ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa
1Klisoɔ, gɛ Kristo abamɔ bɔtɔ nɛ ishupiɛ mɛɛ soɔ, wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔ balɛ wɔnɔ ishu ɔkɔ ɛkpã zazãna ɛlɛ nɛidi, ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ amɔ bɔtɔ nɛ yɛishudzya mɛɛ, aŋã kibui kpa abha. 2Nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, agazã yɛ ɛkpã gɔgɔɛnɔ nɛ esiakpa abha nɛ anɔdzyrame yɛebui kpa tɛpɛpɛɛ ulũ, pɔ azã nɛkpã akɔ kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ nɔ. 3Ɔmɔsɛ nɔotizĩ kibè dzlolo nɛ ewuiɛ gɛ atɛ fala mɛ pɛ nɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ ibudì eleteɛ azatɔɖɔ abhɛtɛ mɛ, nɔzã nɛkpã nɛ kɛgɛ ishudzya pɛ ulũ, kanɔ mɛ same mɔmɔ, bunù bubuku, akpɛnɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ, bunù ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ibudì ɛkɔ tishushù. 4Kɛbhɛtɛ balɛibi nɛ kibui nɔnɔ shu so pɛ, nɔgɛ dɛmɛ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔkpà plɛnɔ balɛ nɛ ɛkpã kpa zazãna ɛlɛ mɛ, kliso bakɔalà wɔnɔ. 5Pɔ babà bhɛtɛ̀ akɔnta akɔ anunɔ gɛ abalɛ̀ eli akɔ kebhu kukulu nɛ̀ benunuɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ etsitsíɛ tsyɛ. 6Ɔmɔsɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu baɖɔ kibui gbangbã ɔkɔ bagɛ etitsíɛ tsyɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bekulù kebhu nɛ̀ alɛ nɛ banɔdzyrame ishupiɛ mɛ̀, pɔ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa xɔnɔ mɛɛ, babazã asɛ Owusoso Akaa anà.
7Ebuiɛ petee alɛ ɔtɔ̃kɔ tso ɔbà. Klisoɔ nɔkɔ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖeɛ mɛ adalɛ tɛ nɔŋã wɔnɔ ishu abha sɛ tɛ̀ nɔlà okulu Owusoso Akaa. 8Kɛgɛ dɛ alɛ peteɛ, nu ɔsɛ nɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ piapii, ɔmɔsɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ dã ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ gelee ulũ. 9Nɔyɛkɛ agɔlɔ kpɛ bapãmɛ ɔkɔ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ zɔɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ kɛlɛ shu. 10Anɔ ka nyia ka alɔkɔ yɛdɔkɔkɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ tɛ̀ aplɛnɔ bagɔgɔɛ nɔ, gana tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ibui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ edzo gelee abha. 11Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔaɖɔɔ, abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ asɛ anɔ gɛ aɖɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛibui ana. Onupɛ anɔ teli adɛ axɔ̃ɛ, abhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛ̀ ohumiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɛ nɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ nɛ ebui petee mɛɛ, babà kpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití ɔganà Yesu Kristo abha. Ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi ɔlɛ onu yɛ ɔyɛ odenɔ otsiɛ vɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen.
Bɔtɔ Nɛ Kristo Mɛzazã Shu
12Mɛɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, tifefekeɖiɛ mɛ gɛ nɔgã tɛbhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ibì, asɛ gɛ onupɛ kibui gɛ ɛbhɛtɛ ibi kɛlɛ bà wɔnɔ abha ana. 13Pɔ nɔmɔ same sɛ nɔɔtɔ̀ asɛ Kristo ana, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔbɔ mɔ same ɔfalanɔ kifu gɛ onupɛ bebebù yɛishu dadalɛ akasɛ. 14Onupɛ bakwala ɔnɔ nɛ Kristo yɛtakpù tsyɛ elo, beyulà akɔ ɔnɔ, ɔmɔsɛ ishu dadalɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa otsiɖì wɔnɔ abha. 15Onupɛ nɔmɔ ɔtɔɔ, kɛtɛ zã asɛ anɔ gɛeyì anɔ, ezĩ alo anɔ kpa nanà idi, alo asɛ anɔ gɛ akpɛ olugbũ nɛ ebui gɛ lagɛ kpà plɛnɔ yɛɛ mɛ. 16Klisoɔ, onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ asɛ Kristoeyi ana, nɔ tɛkɔ kiwũi yi wɔnɔ, pɔ nɔkpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití sɛ nɔyɛkɛ kinye ɛlɛ nɛidi. 17Ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ na ɔkɔ kebhu kukulu, kɛlɛ kɛbà kpɛ esi edenɔ Owusoso Akaa bɔpã mɛ, kɛlɛ onupɛ kakpɛ esi nɛ̀ bɔlɔɔ pɔ, kɛlɛ kɛbà zã ɔkɔ bagɛ agɛ abhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛibui gbangbã nabhaa dza? 18Kɛlɛ,
“Onupɛ aba gagalĩ sɛ tɛ̀ bayɛkɛ banɔ dadalɛ elù nɛkpã pɔ,
kɛlɛ kɛbà zã ɔkɔ bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ eleteɛ tsyɛ mɔ, dza?
19Klisoɔ otsiɛ nɔ, bagɛ bamɔ ɔtɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, balɔkɔ balɛishu akɔ Agɛ yɛabhɛtɛ̀ alɛ pɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã tɛ̀ bazã ɛlɛ abha azabhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã.

Title: PETRO 1 5
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Ibhoshiɛ
1Mɛ asɛ ɔhamɛ sheshè ana, ɛɛkɔ wɔnɔ ɔhamɛ esheshèɛ gɛ alɛ wɔnɔ ɛshiɛ ɛtakpu, asɛ anɔ gɛazã amɔ Kristo yɛɔtɔ nɛ̀ anɔ tsyɛ gɛ aba mɔ ishu dadalɛ gɛ bebebu akasɛ. 2Nɔodzì ibhoshì agbagbana elete ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ibhoshiɛ gɛ bakpɛ nɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ, asɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛeɖi bɔdɔ̃ abha ana, gɛnɛ sɛ kibui gɛ batɔɖɔ akɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ kibui gɛ nɔdɛmɛ ɔsɛ nɔbɔ bhɛtɛ̀ asɛ kana gɛ Owusoso Akaa apɛ asɛ nɔbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ ana, gɛnɛ tɛ̀ nɔpɛ ehoeyi ɔkɔ ishu, pɔ tɛ̀ nɔdɛmɛ ɔsɛ ɔbɔ ɔdɛ kɛxɔ̃ɛ, 3gɛnɛ tɛ̀ nɔodzì bapalete ɔkɔ bagɛ bakpasɛ wɔnɔ esiɛ, pɔ tɛ̀ ibhoshiɛ ɖi wɔnɔ ɛkpã tɛ̀ bazã balɛ ɛyɛ nɛ ɛlɛ ulũ. 4Kɛlɛ onupɛ Ibhoshiɛ Agbagbana Ekusiɛ ebekoeyìɛ, nɔbɔ yɛkɛ ishu dadalɛ ɛkpã kikutuɔ gɛ ɛtɛbà zĩ ɖiɛ.
5Bayisɔ̃ mɔ, nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɛ eshè adɛ ɔnɔ. Wɔnɔ petee nɔozhinì ishu esi ɔkɔ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ,
“Owusoso Akaa alɔɛtití nɛ bagɛ beefeke balɛishuɔ shu
pɛ ebhui bagɛ bezhinì balɛ ishu esiɛ xɔnɔ ebú.”
6Nɔozhinì wɔnɔ ishu esi nɛ Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ ahɔɛ niesi, sɛ tɛ̀ efeke wɔ ewunɔ kabha nɛ kibè gulũi mɛ. 7Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ petee ɔtɔɖɔ yɛabha ɔmɔsɛ, yɛeɖì wɔnɔ abha.
8Nɔŋã wɔnɔ ishu abha tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ̀ awɔ. Agɛ atɛadɛmɛ wɔnɔ ɛbui gɛenu abosamuɔ aafala asɛ dzata gɛ aadzɔ̀ pɛ apɛ anɔ asɛ tɛ̀ evũ atã. 9Nɔlɔɛtití nɛishu, tɛ̀ nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ wɔnɔ adzya alɛ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ petee tsyɛ bagã bɔtɔ ɔlɛ nɛidi mɛ.
10Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛenu tibhui bhuibu eleteɛ petee nɔ, anɔ gɛ yɛekulu wɔnɔ amana Kristo yɛ sameɛ gɛ etibeleɛ mɛɛ, gɛ onupɛ nɔmɔ bɔtɔ̀ ebekeɛ nɛ kibè gulũi lɛ, yɛabàkɔ nɔzã gagalĩi pɛ nɔ otɛbɔ hɔa. 11Yɛahɔɛ ohumi ɔlɛ denɔ otsiɛ vɛnɔ tihɔɔ. Amen.
Bɔdɔ̃ Sɛsɛnɔ Gɔgɔɛ
12Denɔ Sila anɔ gɛ ɛlɔkɔ yɛasɛ anɔ gɛ ɛyɛkɛŋã, denɔ yɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ mɛ ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ gulũi kɔ wɔnɔ pɛ̀ ɛkpɛ wɔnɔ kemi tɛ̀ ɛɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛ mɛ sɛ, kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ. Nɔzã gagalĩ nɛ kɛlɛ mɛ̀. 13Ɔhaa gɛ ɔlɛ Babilonia pɛ bebu aplɛnɔ wɔnɔ tsyɛ asɛnɛ wɔnɔ, kana mɛeyianyɛ Marko tsyɛ asɛnɔ wɔnɔ. 14Nɔlɔkɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔsɛnɛ bagɔlɔ nɔ. Ishuyɔyɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔkpasɛ̀ Kristoɔ mɛ petee.

Title: PETRO 2 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Keplukpa bhalà gɛede Petro ɔkɔ, afɔnɔ alɛ sɛsɛ Kristoanɛ kɛma hohoe gɛeputɔ yɛkɛŋã. Kɛgɛ kɛlɛishu so pɛ afɔnɔ keplukpa kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ alɔkɔ alɛ alɔɛtití nɛ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ kakasɛ eleteɛ, nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa gɛide koeyi nɛ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi shu. Babà mɔ kibui ulũ bubu ɔkɔ bɔtɔ ebui alɛ, odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Apalete Yesu bubutiɛ tɛnyanyanà mɛ ovunɔɔ mɛ. Kibuititì ɛlɛ bagamɔ̃ Yesu nɛ̀ awuhũɔ pɛ belu yɛakasɛ ɔdɔ̃ alɔkɔ ɛlɛ adɛ kanà. Kɛgɛ agɛ afɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ apɛ kɛlɛinu tɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛɖɔ ɔsɛ Yesu azaka aba shu. Aɖɔ asɛ kɛgɛ kɛlɛ ishu so pɛ kɛwɔ̃ɛ ɔsɛ Yesu tɛbaba wɔ idè kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa “agɛ pɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ananà abamɔ butsì, pɔ apɛ asɛ tɛ anɔ ka nyia ka etsyina edenɔ yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ flogo.” (3.9)
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibui 1.1-2
Kristo yɛanɔ kukulu 1.3-21
Asɛnɛ badɔkasɛ 2.1-22
Kristo tɛbaba gɔgɔɛ nɔ 3.1-18

Title: PETRO 2 1
Content:
1Mɛ Simon Petro, gɛinu Yesu Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ anɔkpɛkpɛ,
Mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ sɛsɛ, bagɛ ɔganà ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yesu Kristoɔ gɛebu ɔlɔ bayɛkɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã ɛlɛ gɛ yɛkɛ edzi asɛ bɔlɔ ɛyɛ ana.
2Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ ɔganà Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu kibui titìɛ mɛ̀.
Bhɛtɛ Wɔ Tikukuluɔ Nɛ̀ Tibubuɔ Tɛ Kɛzã Ɛlɛ Ɔzãkɔ
3Yɛohumi nɔ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bɔɔpɛ ɔkɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã nɛ̀ Akaa mɛ tɛzazã, ɔganà kanà gɛ bɔbatì yɛ gɛ ekulu ɔlɔ amanà yɛishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ yɛebui gbangbã mɛ. 4Ɔganà alɛ mɛɛ, akɔ ɔlɔ yɛɔdɔ̃ gbagbla nɛ̀ bɔgbangbã gɛ atɔɖɔ elu akɔ ɔlɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ ɔganà bɔlɛ mɛɛ, ɔbàzã yɛohumi nɔ mɛ, tɛ̀ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ nɔobu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ɔshɛ̃ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui tsɔtsɔmɔ̃ gɛide kalɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ nɔ mɛ.
5Kibui ɛlɛ shu soɔ, nɔga kidzo ka nyia ka abha tɛ̀ nɔlɔkɔ kibui gbangbã plɛnɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã tɛ̀ ebui gbangbã tsyɛ plɛnɔ kibuititì, 6kɛlɛ tɛ̀ kibuititiɛ plɛnɔ ishu abha ŋaŋã, ishu abha ŋaŋã, kemi kpɛkpɛ, tɛ̀ kemi kpɛkpɛ aplɛnɔ Akaa mɛ tɛzazã, 7tɛ̀ Akaa mɛ tɛzaã plɛnɔ ɛyamɛ gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ adzya, tɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ adzya plɛnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ. 8Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ ɛkpã gbangbã ɛlɛ nɛidi lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ nɛ tikpekpè mɛɛ, kɛbà kɔ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa avɛ kabha nɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛibui titìɛ mɛ. 9Pɔ onupɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ nɛidi ma anɔ teli ahɔɛ, enu anɔ gɛ atɛ amɔ piapii kɛlɛ enu awuhũpú, pɛ adzɛkɛ asɛ betiplu yɛebui kpa gɛ abhɛtɛ abafala nɔ.
10Klisoɔ, mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔ owlui ɔkpɛ emi gagalĩ tɛ kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ wɔnɔ tikukuluɔ nɛ̀ tibubuɔ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ onupɛ nɔbhɛtɛ̀ ana, nɔtɛ bɔdɔ̃ oboe oɖi, 11kɛlɛ nɔbɔ mɔ tɛtsyatyanà gbangbã otsoku ɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristoɔ gɛ ebu ɔlɔ yɛukusi ŋaŋã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ.
Kibuiɛ Gɛ Baɖɔ Elúɔ
12Klisoɔ ɛba zɛbakà wɔnɔ kibè nyia bè nɛ ebui alɛ shu, gɛ nɔonyi alɛ pɛ nɔkpɛ igu nɛ kibui gbã gɛ nɔyɛkɛ mɛ tsyɛ flogo. 13Nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ɛkà lɛ nɛkpã nɛ ishupi ɛlɛ mɛ koɔ kɛpɛ ɔsɛ ɛzɛ nyɛmɛ ɔnɔ nɛ ebui alɛ shu, 14ɔmɔsɛ inyi ɔsɛ ezedzè pɛ ɛbà lɔkɔ ɛlɛ lù kɛwɔ̃a, asɛ gɛ Apalete Yesu Kristo adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ kɔ mɛ ana. 15Kliso ɛbà bhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka tɛ mɛiɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ onupɛ ɛba shɛɛ, nɔbɔ zɔbakà ebui alɛ kiwui nyia iwui.
16Anɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ gɛ bafatɛ ede bɔza pɛ bɔɖɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo ohumi nɛ̀ yɛ tɛbaba shu ebui tseɖe ɔnɔ, pɔ bɔza pɛ bɔmɔ yɛohumi nɔ nɛ̀ awuhũ. 17Ɔmɔsɛ ayɛkɛ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ozĩ oyì odenɔ Ohumi Ishudadalɛ Eleteɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ, “Mɛeyianyɛ nɛ alɛ, yɛibui mɛdɛmɛ, yɛ shu mɛmɔ same.” 18Bɔlɔ atɔ elũ kaɖɔ alɛ gɛeyì odenɔ ititiɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bɔzã Yesu ɔbhà nɛ butu dadalɛ nabha.
19Kɛkɔ ɔsɛ bɔba mɔ sɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ akpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ, klisoɔ nɔ olu awɔ̃ piapii nɛ kibuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ shu, asɛ kitséɛ gɛ kifu tsè nɛ otumũ mɛ ɔvɛnɔ olizatɔɔ, pɛ kɛvɔlɔ ɛwɔ̃ɛ tsyɛ kpaa tsé nɛ wɔnɔ etúɔ mɛ. 20Kɛgɛ dɛ alɛ petee kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ, kibui ɖɔɖɔlu nanà ma gɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ aɖɔ nɛ balɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ. 21Ɔmɔsɛ kibui gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ tide anɔ nanà tɛpɛpɛ ulũ, banɔ aɖɔaɖɔ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ gɛ onupɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã gbanà alɛ kanà.

Title: PETRO 2 2
Content:
Asɛnɛ Baadɔkasɛ Nɛ̀ Kana Gɛ Bebeyì Alɛ
1Asɛ kɛzã gɛ asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ atɛzã banɔɛishi abafala nɔ, kidzo ɛlɛ nabha asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ tsyɛ abekoeyì nɛ wɔnɔɛshi. Babà gã bɔshɛ mɛ abalɔkɔ asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛ bazĩ udɔ akasɛ ɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ, babàdã kadã nɛ Apaleteɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ balɛ edziɛ shu, gɛ balɛ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ aba gbanà alɛ akpɛ butsì mɛ gulũi. 2Banɔ gelee abàzã ebui kpa elete alɛ edzo niede pɛ babà zaɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛidzoɔ gɛinu kɛgbangbã shu. 3Nɛ balɛ awuhũ dzadzã nɛ bɔdɔ̃ shu soɔ, asɛnɛ badɔkasɛ alɛ abalɔkɔ alɛ ɛdzɛdzɛ gɛ bafatɛ zhinì wɔnɔ kpɛ nɔ. Balɛ ɛpɔ bubuɔ dzi po alɛ kukuku, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ bayì alɛ, lɛ nɛ̀ awɔ̃.
4Onupɛ Owusoso Akaa agɛ lɔkɔ etsye baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ ebui kpa, pɛ avɛnɔ alɛ nɛifúɔ gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ tɛ̀ bezepo kebhu kukuluɔ, 5onupɛ agɛ lɔkɔ etsye kibelianɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ amana budekelĩ hohoe pɛ buvũ bagɛ egi tì Owusoso Akaa, pɛ ebú Noah, anɔ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kibui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, nɛ̀ baanɔ tegegene gɔgɔɛ nɔ, 6onupɛ ebu Sodom nɛ̀ Gomora ɛma gbagbla ɛpɔ pɛ apɔɛ ɛlɛ lɛidzì bɔtɔ̃ɔ, pɛ abhɛtɛ ana sɛ tɛ̀ banɔ amɔ̃ elu nɛ kɛgɛ babà bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa nabhaa, 7kɛlɛ onupɛ ebu Lot anɔ dadalɛ yɛkpã, anɔ gɛamɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ odenɔ ɛkpã zizĩ nɛ̀ ɔshabha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ eleteɛ ahɔɛ mɛɛ, 8(ɔmɔsɛ anɔ dadalɛ alɛ́ gɛ azã banɔ nɔ̀ nɛishi kiwui nyia iwui. Yɛtɔwui dadalɛ mɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gelee odenɔ balɛ̀ ɔsha bha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ ebuiɛ gɛ azamɔ pɛ elũɔ shu), 9onupɛ ana kɛlɛ́ɛ, kɛlɛ notì ɔsɛ Apaleteɛ enyi ibu gɛ ebebù bagɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa odenɔ tifefekeɖi mɛ, bagɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ ebui gbã nɛ kebhu kukulu iwui nabha, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ kɔ alɛ ɛtsiɖi ɛlɛ abha avɛ. 10Kibui ɛlɛ inu kɛgbã ɔkɔ banɔ nɔ̀ gɛ bazana ɛkpã kpa nɛ alɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulu pɛ bagɛ lɔkɔ ɔsha niesi gɛ balɛ akpɛ kɛnanà mɛ betielũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɔsha.
Nɛ kitè kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ishu fefeke mɛɛ, balà ɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ kititì banɔ nɔ shu 11gɛ Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ agagalĩ adɛ pɛ benu ohumi elete tsyɛ elo, batɛ aɖɔaɖɔ alɔkɔ ebhui kititì anɔ alɛ nɛidi ulũ nɛ Apaleteɛ amɛ. 12Pɔ banɔ alɛ aaɖɔ atsɔ̃bui nɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ̀ begilũ alɛ esi mɛ. Bedzi asɛ kifutù mɛ bagãhoe, gɛ bamɔ alɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bevu alɛ eyí, kɛlɛ balɛ tsyɛ ebetsì asɛ bagãhoe ana.
13Babà mɔ ɔtɔ odenɔ bɔtɔ gɛ balɛ tsyɛ akɔ anɔ bhlatɔ shu. Kɛgɛ bapɛ nɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ sɛ tɛ̀ bawɔ̃ɛ tɛ̀ bebukù gɛ nɛ kiwui nyenyé hrɛrɛrɛ mɛ. Benu banɔ gɛ babhɛtɛ̀ awuĩ ebui nɛ̀ ebui kpɛnɛ̀ kpɛnɛ̀ gɛ bamɔ̃ samè nɛ ɛkpã ŋaŋã kibeɛ gɛ baŋã bɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ. 14Balɛ awuhũɔ etsiɖi ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ shu, kliso batɛ balà yɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ. Bawɔɛ bagɛ agɛ kpɛ iguɔ, bedzi beyì gɛ baɖɔ kibui akpɛ! 15Bashɛ̀ nɛ kidzoɔ gidzì tĩi nabha pɛ betsyina atɔnɔ̃ Balam gɛenu Boa yɛeyianyɛ edzoɔ niede, anɔ gɛ adɛmɛ kɛbhɛ babuia nɛ̀ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui. 16Pɔ etukusɔ ete yɛetseɖe nii nɛ yɛ ebui kpa bhɛtɛ bhɛbhɛtɛ shu, agãhoe gɛ atɛaɖɔaɖɔ, yɛaɖɔ anɔdzyrame aɖɔ pɛ agɛ dɛmɛ atɔɖɔ ebuiɖɔluanɔ egugu dɔdɔ ibuiɛ nabha.
17Banɔ alɛ edzi asɛ bulĩ ahɔ gɛiti ku ulĩ, nɛ̀ ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ lɔkɔ ɔlɛ vɛnɔɔ. Otumũɔ gɛ ɔlɔ ɔnɔ ɔdɛɛ babalɛ elú akɔ alɛ. 18Pɔ baaɖɔ kɛlɛ́ɛ mɛ ebui alɔkɔ ahɔɛ etũ etelũ nɔ, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ishupiɛ nɛ̀ ebui kpa gɛ badɛmɛ nɔ, awɔɛ bagɛ akpɛ esi ebù tɛtsɛɖɛ̀ mɛ ashɛ nɛ bagɛ azanà ɛkpã kpa ɔbha. 19Asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ alɛ atɔɖɔ ishu ahɔɛmɛ zazã elu kɔ anɔ, gɛ balɛ pɔ enu banɔ dzidzi ɔkɔ kɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩ ebui, ɔmɔsɛ̀ anɔdzyrame edzì anɔ dzidzì akɔ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ kɛŋã yɛabha. 20Onupɛ bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ ashɛ nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ shu pɛ bebetì Apalete Yesu pɛ banyana yɛ mɛ evunɔ gagalĩ pɛ bezetsodzì avɛ ɛkpã kpa gɛ ɛlɛ batɛzã mɛɛ eɖi pɛ lɛŋã alɛ abha, kidegba ɛkpã gɛ babà zanàa bazĩ ɔdɛ ɛgɛ batɛzã bafala nɔ. 21Kɛtapɛ̃ ɔkɔ alɛ ɔdɛ sɛ begitì edzo dadalɛ, ɔdɛ sɛ betì ɛlɛ pɛ bewlui tsyina ede kpɛ ɔsha dadalɛ gɛ bakɔ alɛ. 22Buluhũ sheshèɛ gɛ behu nɛ alɛ shu sɛ, “Ebú etsodzì avɛ̀ yɛoyukukùɔ shu, kɛlɛ ɛhàa gɛ bewulunɔ piapii nɔ tsyɛ eze etsyina avɛ̀ edi wulu nɛ apɔtɔ mɛ̀.”

Title: PETRO 2 3
Content:
Apaleteɛ Yɛiwuiɛ
1Mɛ ɔbhialɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, mɛ eplukpa bhlàa gɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ. Nɛ buplukpa tɔbhaa gɛ ɛfɔnɔ sɛsɛ wɔnɔ mɛɛ, ɛlɔkɔ bakà wɔnɔ nɛ ebui alɛ shu tɛ wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ana. 2Ɛpɛ ɔsɛ nɔ bakà ebuiɛ gɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ dadalɛ aɖɔ elù aba falanɔ nɛ̀ ɔsha gɛ bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ gɛ ebu ɔlɔ akɔ ɔlɔ ɔganà wɔnɔ banɔkpɛkpɛ nabha.
3Putɔnɔ kɔ ɛlɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ nɔolũ kɛlɛ esi ɔsɛ̀ nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ banɔ gɛezĩ banɔ shuɔ ebekoeyì, bebè zĩ anɔ shu pɛ babà za nɛ̀ ɛkpã kpa nɛ alɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũ. 4Babàɖɔ asɛ, “Gɛ atɔɖɔ asɛ ‘abaa’ pɔ yɛɛxɔ? Denɔ kibeɛ gɛ bɔlɔ akaalɛ etsíɛ, kɛka nyia ka vɛ ɛlɛ abha asɛ kana gɛ kɛzã odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esi kpɛkpɛ ibè.” 5Pɔ badzɛkɛ asɛ kibè dzlolo nɛlɛ gɛ ɔganà Owusoso Akaa kaɖɔ ɖɔɖɔ mɛ babhɛtɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ odenɔ bulĩ mɛ gɛ kede bulĩ mɛ̀. 6Denɔ beelĩ alɛ mɛ, balɔkɔ budekelĩ zĩ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ nɔ. 7Ganà kibui ɛlɛ tinikpo mɛɛ, babàlɛ obo iwusosonɔ nɛ̀ kesiakpa elu akɔ kebhu kukulu iwui nabha ɔkɔ bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa balɛ tiyiyí.
8Mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, pɔ nɔtɛ̀ dzɛkɛ kibui tinikpo ɛlɛ ɔsɛ̀, “Nɛ apaleteɛ namɛ, kiwui tinikpo dzì asɛ agɔ ihotu, kɛlɛ agɔ ihotu tsyɛ dzì asɛ kiwui tinikpo ana. 9Anɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ atɛ ahɔa nɛ yɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ shu asɛ ilũɔ gɛ beteli elu tɛmahɔa mahɔa esi anà. Adɔ fɔ̃ɔ kɔ ɔnɔ, gɛ atɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ananà ɛkpã zĩ, pɔ tɛ̀ aka nyia aka etsyinà yɛitúɔ mɛ.
10Pɔ Apaleteɛ nɛiwuiɛ babà asɛ kɛba gɛ ezĩ aba ana. Nɛ iwui ɛlɛ nabhaa, kititíɛ bayalà nɛ̀ ozĩ gagalĩ, kifu bapɔɛ kititì udɔ̃, kɛlɛ kesiakpa nɛ̀ kalɛ kɛka nyia ka batã.
11Gɛ bebè zĩ kɛka nyia ka nɛidzo ɛlɛ nabha soɔ, banɔ ɖuwoe idì kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ̀ nɔodzìɛ dza? Kɛlɛ sɛ nɔzã ɛkpã dadalɛ nɛ̀ kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ 12nɛ kibèɛ gɛ nɔoɖì idzomɛ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa iwuiɛ tɛbaba tsĩɔɔ nɔ. Kiwui ɛlɛ kifu bazĩ kititì ɔdɔ̃, kɛlɛ kititì ɔdɔ̃ balolò ganà kɛkpɛkpɛ hohoe mɛ̀. 13Pɔ gɛ bupo kɛgɛ Owusoso Akaa atɔɖɔ eluɔ soɔ, buuɖì kidzo mɛ tsyɛ ɔkɔ kititì vɔvɔ nɛ̀ kesiakpa vɔvɔ, bɔpã lɛ mɛ̀ gɛ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ alɛ.
14Klisoɔ, mɛ ɔbhialɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ nɔoɖì idzomɛ ɔkɔ ebui ɛlɛ soɔ, nɔbhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ nɔbɔlà tɛ̀ batɛ mɔ kibò nɛ̀ bamɛtsitsí ibui nanà nɛ wɔnɔ shu, tɛ̀ nɔzã nɛ ishu yɔyɔ mɛ ɔplɛnii. 15Nɔkɔ kɛzã wɔnɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ ɔsɛ, Apaleteɛ tɛdɔdɔ fɔ̃ɔ nu tɛyɛyɛkɛ kɔ ɔlɔ, asɛ kana gɛ Paulo bɔlɔ adzya gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ̀ tsyɛ alɔkɔ bubutiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔɛ afɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ wɔnɔ nɔ. 16Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, yɛtsyɛ afɔnɔ yɛ̀ buplukpa petee gɛ asɛsɛ wɔnɔ, pɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ ebui alɛ shu nɛ bɔlɛ mɛ. Ebui teli idi akpasɛ yɛuplukpa mɛ gɛ alɛ esi lulũ agagalĩ, ebuiɛ gɛ matì matì mɛ anɔ gɛ agɛ kpɛ iguɔ etsyina etũ, asɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ ebui fɔfɔnɔ bhlatɔ tsyɛ shu ana, ɔkɔ alɛ ishu tizizĩ.
17Klisoɔ, mɛ ɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ nonyi kibui ɛlɛ soɔ, nɔzã nawɔ̃ sɛ tɛ̀ bagɛ betie shù ɔshaa atɛba gbanà wɔnɔ ata esi, tɛ̀ nɔotibo dɔ oboe nɛ ɔzãkɔ gɛ nodzi gagalĩɛ. 18Pɔ nɔzã ɛlɛ tɛ nozoshè nɛ tibhui bhuibuɔ nɛ̀ bubutiɛ gɛ Apaleteɛ Yesu Kristo gɛ ayɛkɛ akɔ bɔlɔ mɛ. Yɛ bakɔ ishu dadalɛ odenɔ otsiɛ, ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ! Amen.

Title: YOHANES 1 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Keplukpa gɛiputɔ ede Yohanes ɔkɔɔ, ebui tɔtɔɖɔ taabha alɛ akpasɛ kalɛ mɛ, tɛ akpɛ bagɛ aba kalà keplukpa niemi tɛ baza ɔha kpɛkpɛ mɛ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo, nɛ̀ tɛ akpɛ alɛ ɔsha nɛ asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ gɛbà yɛɛ ɔhakpɛkpɛ ɔlɛ shu. Babhɔ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɔlɛ atɔɖɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ kasɛ sɛ ebui kpa ede ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ kanɔ alɛ mɛ, klisoɔ Yesu gɛenu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyiɛ etinu anɔdzyrame gɛazã. Badɔkasɛ alɛ aɖɔ tsyɛ asɛ, flogo tɛ bebù anɔ elu nɛ̀ ɛkpãa, kɛlɛ sɛ atɛ lɔkɔ kɛnanà nɛ kanɔ mɛ ebui alɛ shu, kɛlɛ bewlui akasɛ ɔdɔ̃ tsyɛ asɛ anɔdzyrame tibubu gɛide ɛkpã gbangbã alo ɛkpã kpa nɛ̀ ɔhagbo dɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.
Adɔfɔnɔ alɔɛtití nɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ shu kɛlɛ adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ, Yesu edzi anɔdzyrame gɛ abazã, kɛlɛ atɔɖɔ kɛklagbu nɛ ɛlɛ abha tsyɛ asɛ banɔ nɔ̀ petee gɛ ayɛkɛ Yesu abha aŋã pɛ badɛmɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛibuiɛ, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ badɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ tsyɛ.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1.1-4
Tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ otumũ 1.5—2.29
Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ nɛ̀ Abosam yɛeyi alɛ3.1-24
Kibui gbã nɛ̀ kesi tatá 4.1-6
Kɛxɔ̃ɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ wɔa 4.7-21
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ ŋã kabha 5.1-21

Title: YOHANES 1 1
Content:
Ɛkpã Ibui
1Kibuiɛ gɛ zã odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ, gɛ butilũ ɖiɛ, pɛ bɔtɛ mɔɖi tsyɛ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ awuhũɔ, pɛ bulu awɔ̃ oɖi pɛ bɔlɔ ɛhɔɛ tsyɛ hunùɔ, ebui alɛ bɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ ɛkpa Ebuiɛ shu. 2Gɛ ɛkpã ibuiɛ ekoeyìɛ, bɔmɔ ɛlɛ kɛlɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ ɛlɛ shu, kɛlɛ bɔɖɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ ebuiɛ tseɖe wɔnɔ, ebuiɛ gɛ lazã Akaa ɔkɔ pɛ lebekoeyi ɔkɔ bɔlɔ. 3Bɔɖɔ ebuiɛ gɛ bɔmɔ pɛ bulũɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ wɔnɔ tsyɛ nɔzã ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ̀ nɛ ɔlɔ. Kɛlɛ bɔlɔ ɔhakpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Akaa nɛ̀ Yɛeyì anyɛ Yesu Kristo 4Bɔfɔnɔ ebui alɛ asɛ tɛ̀ bɔkɔ bɔlɔ same mɔmɔ aná.
Tɛgagã Nɛ Tɛdadalɛ Mɛ
5Ebuiɛ gɛ bulũ odenɔ yɛɔkɔ pɛ̀ bɔɖɔ tseɖe wɔnɔ nɛ alɛ sɛ, Owusoso Akaa enu tɛdadalɛ, otumũ nanà ɔmã yɛmɛ. 6Onupɛ bɔɔɖɔ ɔsɛ bɔkpasɛ ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ ɔplɛnɔ yɛɛ, pɛ bɔkà gã nɛ otumũɔ mɛɛ, bɔsɛ asɛnɛ kɛlɛ bɔgɛ gã nɛ kibui gbã shu. 7Pɔ onupɛ bɔgã nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛɛ, asɛ kana gɛ yɛtsyɛ agã nɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ anaa, kɛlɛ bɔkpasɛ ɔhakpɛkpɛ mɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, kɛlɛ Yɛeyì Yesu dzyosu nɔ, abadalɛ bɔlɔ shu nɛ ebui kpa ka nyia ka mɛ.
8Onupɛ bɔɔɖɔ ɔsɛ kibui kpa nanà ma bɔlɔ shuɔ, ishu bɔwɔɛ kɛlɛ kibui gbã ma bɔlɔ mɛ. 9Onupɛ bɔɖɔ ebui kpa gɛ bɔbhɛtɛ, enu anɔ gɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã ɔsɛ, abalɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ etsye bɔlɔ tɛ̀ eplu ɔlɔ odenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ. 10Onupɛ bɔɖɔ ɔsɛ bɔgɛ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa, kɛlɛ bɔbhɛtɛ yɛ asɛ asɛnɛ elete ana, kɛlɛ yɛeibuiɛ ama ɔkɔ nanà nɛ bɔlɔ ɛkpã mɛ.

Title: YOHANES 1 2
Content:
1Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ̀ bhɛtɛ kibui kpa. Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, anɔ teli alɛ bɔlɔ ahɔɛ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ ebu bɔlɔ ulũ nɔ nɛ Akaa namɛ, yɛenu Yesu Kristo, Anɔ Dadalɛ. 2Yɛenu bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, gɛnɛ bɔlɔ ete pɔ ɔkɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ petee kalɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tsyɛ.
3Onupɛ bɔbhɛtɛ tɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabhaa, kɛlɛ kɛkasɛ ɔsɛ̀ bunyi yɛ. 4Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Inyi yɛ,” pɛ atɛa abhɛtɛ̀ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabhaa enu asɛnɛ elete, kɛlɛ kibui gbã ma yɛ mɛ. 5Pɔ onupɛ anɔ teli abhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabha, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ná nɛ yɛmɛ. Kidzo ɛlɛ aba buutì ɔsɛ bɔkpasɛ yɛ mɛ yɛ. 6Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ agã asɛ Yesu anà tsyɛ.
7Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛnɛ ɔshà vɔvɔ mɛfɔnɔ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ, pɔ okukuɔ gɛ ɛlɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ. Ɔsha kuku ɛlɛ inù ebuiɛ gɛ nolũɔ. 8Pɔ ɛfɔnɔ ɔsha vɔvɔ kɔ wɔnɔ, bɔmɔ ɛlɛ ebui gbã nɛ yɛ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ otumũ nulũ ɔbafala kɛlɛ kifúigbã vɛlɛ dɛkɛ.
9Anunɔ gɛ aɖɔ asɛ akpasɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ, pɛ anyanã yɛadzya akpɛ ɛyamɛɛ, anɔ alɛ aka kpasɛ otumũ mɛ. 10Anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛadzyaa, anɔ alɛ akpasɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ kibui nanà ma yɛmɛ gɛ bakɔ yɛakpatà bɔdɔ̃. 11Pɔ anunɔ gɛ anyana yɛadzya akpɛ ɛyamɛ xɔnɔ akpasɛ otumũ mɛ kɛlɛ anyɔ afalà nɛ otumũ mɛ, kɛlɛ etinyi ɛkɛlɛ gɛ avɛɛ, ɔmɔsɛ otumũɔ opú yɛahũɔ.
12Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ, mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ
ɔmɔsɛ balɔkɔ wɔnɔ ebui kpa etsye wɔnɔ nɛ yɛinye nɛtakpu.
13Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ, bakaa
ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi anunɔ gɛenu odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ.
Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bayisɔ̃,
ɔmɔsɛ nɔ ɔŋã anɔ kpa nabha.
Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ beyiɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ,
ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi Akaa.
14Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ beyiakaa,
ɔmɔsɛ nɔonyi anunɔ gɛenu odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ.
Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bayisɔ̃,
ɔmɔsɛ nɔgagalĩ,
kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa nibuiɛ kpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ,
kɛlɛ nɔŋã anɔ zizĩɛ nabha.
Nɔtɛ̀ Dɛmɛnɔ Nɛ̀ Kanɔ Nɔ̀
15Nɔtɛ̀ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ alo kɛdɔ̃ nanà nɛ kalɛ mɛ tsyɛ. Onupɛ anɔ teli adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Akaa ma yɛmɛ. 16Ɔmɔsɛ kɛka nyia ka nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, lɛenu ɔdɔ gɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ elete adɛmɛ nɔ, yɛ awuhũ ɔdɔ pɛpɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ tutu nɛitélũ nɛ kɛgɛ lɛ yɛahɔɛ nɛ̀ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛɛ shu, ebui alɛ gide Akaa ɔkɔ, pɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ ɔkɔ ledè. 17Kanɔ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ kalɛ mɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɛpɛ ulũ baafala, pɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛpɛpɛ nabha xɔnɔ abazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã tihɔɔ.
Ɔshakpɛkpɛ Nɛ Asɛnɛ Kristoeleteɛ Shu
18Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, ɔɖà tata gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔlɛ, nɛ̀ asɛ kana gɛ notilũ ɔsɛ asɛnɛ kristoelete abaa, otsiɛ nɔ tsyɛ asɛnɛ kristoeleteɛ atɛba eku. Kana bɔlɔkɔ tì ɔsɛ ɔɖà tata gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔlɛ. 19Bekoeyì nɛ bɔlɔ ishi, pɔ betinù banɔ tsyɛ gɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ ishi. Ɔmɔsɛ pɛ otɛ ɔsɛ bɔlɔ ishi bakpasɛɛ, tsyɛ alo batɛ azã bɔlɔ mɛ̀, pɔ balɛ tɛshɛshɛ kasɛ sɛ̀ balɛ ɔmayɛmɛ nanà ama bɔlɔ ishi.
20Pɔ nɔmɔ bɔbɔ sasara odenɔ Anɔ Dadalɛ Ɔkɔ, kɛlɛ wɔnɔ petee onyi kibui gbã. 21Ɛtɛ fɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ sɛ gɛ nɔotinyi kibui gbã so, pɔ gɛ nɔonyi ɛlɛ, pɛ asɛnɛ ebui nanà eti odekoeyì nɛ kibui gbã mɛ so. 22Afana gɛenu asɛnɛ eleteɛ? Yɛenu anunɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ tɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha sɛ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidiɛ yɛenu asɛnɛ kristoɔ, yɛenu anɔ gɛ yɛatɛ ayɛkɛ Akaa nɛ̀ Eyianyɛ nabha aŋã. 23Anɔ nanà ma gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Eyianyɛ pɛ ebetì Akaa xɔnɔ, anunɔ gɛenyi Eyianyɛɛ yɛenyi Akaa tsyɛ.
24Nɔoɖi kɛlɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ kɛgɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔɔ zã wɔnɔ mɛ. Onupɛ kɛzãa ana, wɔnɔ tsyɛ ɔbɔzã Eyianyɛ nɛ̀ Akaa mɛ. 25Kɛlɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ elú akɔ bɔlɔ kɛlɛinu, ɛkpã gɛlɛ tihɔɔ nɔ.
26Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ nɛ bagɛ bapɛ asɛ agbanà wɔnɔ atsaɖakɛ kidzoɔ shu. 27Wɔnɔ xɔnɔɔ, bɔbɔ sasara gɛ nɔyɛkɛ odenɔ yɛ mɛɛ kakpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛ. Nɔgɛ pɛ ananà tɛ akasɛ wɔnɔ ɔdɔ̃. Pɔ gɛ yɛɔbɔ sasara kasɛ wɔnɔ bɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebuiɛ petee shu pɛ butinu asɛnɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛɛ, bɔdɔ̃ gɛ bɔbɔ sasara kasɛ wɔnɔɔ, nɔzã yɛ mɛ ana.
Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyi Alɛ
28Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, otsiɛ nɔ, nɔzã yɛmɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ ebekoeyìɛ, bɔbàmɔ awɔ̃ lulu kɛlɛ kiwũi tɛbàyì bɔlɔ nɛ yɛamɛ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ ebekuɔ.
29Onupɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ anɔ dadalɛ yɛenuɔ, pɛ nɔonyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ aka nyia aka gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ kibui gbangbã edekoeyì nɛ yɛmɛ.

Title: YOHANES 1 3
Content:
1Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gbagbla ɖuwoe idi nɛ ɛlɛ gɛ Akaa alɔkɔ akɔ ɔlɔ mɔ dza, sɛ̀ bekulu ɔlɔ asɛ yɛeyi alɛ bunu! Kɛlɛ yɛeyi alɛ bunu ɛgbã! Kɛgɛ kɛlɛ shu so pɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ etinyi ɔlɔ kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ gɛ betinyi yɛ so. 2Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, otsi alɛ bunu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ, kɛlɛ bekebu kɛgɛ bɔbà dziɛ kasɛ. Pɔ bunyi sɛ onupɛ ebekoeyìɛ, bɔbà zã asɛ yɛanà, ɔmɔsɛ bɔbà mɔ yɛ asɛ kana gɛ alɛɛ ana. 3Anunɔ gɛ eɖì idzomɛ akɔ yɛɛ adalɛ yɛishu, asɛ kana gɛ yɛishuɔ dalɛ ana.
4Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa, ɔshaa yɛayɛɛ, kibui gbã kinu ɔsɛ, kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ nu ɔshabha abha mabhɛtɛ mabhɛtɛ. 5Pɔ nɔonyi ɔsɛ, aba sɛ tɛ̀ ebu ɔlɔ ebui kpa shɛnɛ. Kɛlɛ kibui kpa ma yɛ mɛ. 6Ananà ma gɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛ pɛ azazã kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha. Ananà mɛ gɛ etsiɖi kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha pɛ abàɖɔ asɛ amɔ̃ yɛ alo enyi yɛ.
7Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ kɔ ananà agbanà wɔnɔ atsaɖakɛ idzo. Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ enu anɔ dadalɛ asɛ gɛ Kristoɔ tsyɛ ishu dalɛ ana. 8Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpaa, yɛenu anɔ gɛedè abosam ɔkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ abosam xɔnɔɔ, ebui kpa abhɛbhɛtɛ elete yɛenu odenɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ esi ɔkpɛkɔ. Kibui nɔnɔ shu so pɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyianyɛ aba kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ebezĩ abosam yɛaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. 9Anɔ nanà ama gɛenu Owusoso Akaa anɔ pɛ abazã kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ bamɔ́ yɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ. 10Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ buuti bagɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ enu abosam yɛeyi alɛ tsyɛ. Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ atɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ etinu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi, kana anɔ yia anɔ gɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ yɛadzya tsyɛ alɛ.
Nɔdɛmɛ Bagɔlɔ Ibui
11Kibui ɛlɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ ɔsɛ̀, kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ. 12Nɔtɛ̀ zã asɛ Kain ana, anɔ gɛenu Abosam ayɛ pɛ eyí yɛadzyaa. Kɛlɛ kiɖuwoe so pɛ eyíi? Ɔmɔsɛ yɛ ahɔɛ edzoɔ enu edzo kpa pɛ yɛadzya ayɛ xɔnɔ adalɛ. 13Mɛadzya alɛ mɔ, nɔtɛ kɔ kɛbhɛtɛ wɔnɔ ibì gɛ onupɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ agɛ dɛmɛ wɔnɔ ibuiɛ. 14Bunyi sɛ̀ budekoeyì nɛ butsi mɛ ba ɛkpã mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔdɛmɛ bɔlɔ adzya alɛ ibui. Anunɔ gɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ akakpasɛ butsì mɛ. 15Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ yɛadzya ibuiɛ enu anɔ gɛ eyianɔ, kɛlɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ anɔ gɛ eyianɔ atɛ bàmɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ mɛ azã.
16Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ butì kɛgɛ inu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, Yesu Kristo alɔkɔ yɛkpã elú akɔ ɔlɔ. Bɔlɔ tsyɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔkɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã lu ɔkɔ ɔlɔ adzya alɛ. 17Onupɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ lɛ anɔ teli ahɔɛɛ pɛ amɔ asɛ yɛadzya apɛ ɛdɔ̃ɔ pɛ egibì yɛ ashagabuiɛ, kɛlɛ́ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ baza yɛ mɛ̀ dza? 18Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛkɔ bɔlɔkɔ kineke lɔkɔ dɛmɛ nɛ anɔ nɔ, pɔ nɔkɔ bɔlɔkɔ ɔlɔ ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ nɛ̀ kibui gbã builɛ ɔkasɛ. 19Alɛ abha bɔbà gã pɛ bɔbà tisɛ bɔkpasɛ kibui gbã mɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ bɔlɔkɔ bɔlɔ etúɔ lu awɔ̃ nɛ yɛabha 20gɛ onupɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ bu ɔlɔ ɛpɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa egbogblo adɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ kɛlɛ enyi kɛka nyia ka.
21Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, onupɛ bɔlɔ etúɔ etiebu ɔlɔ ɛpɔɔ, kɛlɛ́ bulu awɔ̃ nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nabha 22asɛ bɔbà yɛkɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bubusì odenɔ yɛahɔɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bulũ batɔ̃ akɔ yɛɔsha pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ kɛgɛ kikù yɛawɔ nabha. 23Kɛlɛ yɛɔsha ɔlɛ onu ɔsɛ, tɛ̀ bɔyɛkɛ Yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo abha ŋã, nɛ̀ tɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ bagɔlɔ asɛ gɛ ɔkpɛ ɔshà akɔ ɔlɔ ana. 24Bagɛ babhɛtɛ atɔɖɔ yɛɔsha nabha balɛ akpasɛ yɛmɛ, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ balɛ mɛ. Kana bɔbhɛtɛ pɛ buutì ɔsɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ. Bunyi kibui ɛlɛ gana ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ ɔlɛ yɛakɔ ɔlɔ mɛ.

Title: YOHANES 1 4
Content:
Nɔolu Awɔ̃ Oɖi Ɛfɔfuĩa Nɔ
1Mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔtɛ yɛkɛ ɛfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka abha ɔŋã, pɔ nɔolũ awɔ̃ oɖi ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ tɛ̀ nɔmɔ ɔsɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ lide, ɔmɔsɛ asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ kpekpèɛ etsoku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. 2Kidzo ɛlɛ abha nɔbɔ gã pɛ nɔbɔ mɔ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔɔlɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka gɛ lɔonyi ɔsɛ Yesu Kristo aba nɛ ishudzya mɛɛ, ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ ode Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ, 3pɔ ɔfɔfuĩa ka nyia ka gɛ lɔotinyi Yesuɔ, logidè Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Ɔfɔfuĩa ɔlɛ onù asɛnɛ kristoelete ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, gɛ nɔolũ ɔsɛ lɔbàa, pɛ lɔotibo ku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ otsiɛ nɔ.
4Wɔnɔ mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɔodè kɛlɛ nɔŋã alɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ agɛ yɛakpasɛ wɔnɔ mɛɛ egbogblo adɛ agɛ yɛalɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. 5Kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ balɛ, kliso baaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ kanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ mɔmɔ ulũ, kɛlɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ alɛ. 6Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ bɔlɔ xɔnɔ dè, kɛlɛ aka nyia aka gɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ, pɔ anunɔ gɛ egide Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ atɛ atàaatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ. Kidzo ɛlɛ abha bɔgã pɛ bɔmɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛonu kibui gbã nɛ̀ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ gɛ lɔonù asɛnɛ ɔyɛ.
Owusoso Akaa Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ Nɛ̀ Bɔlɔ Ɔyɛ
7Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔkɔ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ, ɔmɔsɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ de Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Aka nyia aka gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ anɔ, enu anɔ gɛ bamɔ́ yɛ edenɔ Owusoso Akaa mɛ kɛlɛ enyi Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ. 8Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ atɛ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ, etinyi Owusoso Akaa, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɛ̀ anɔ. 9Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha Owusoso Akaa akasɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ bɔlɔ ishi, akpɛ Yɛeyianyɛ tenikpo nɔ asɛsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ asɛ tɛ bɔzã nɛ̀ ɛkpã gana yɛabha. 10Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛnɛ kana gɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛenu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, pɔ yɛadɛmɛ ɔlɔ ɛbui sopɛ asɛsɛ Yɛeyianyɛ asɛ tɛ̀ abedzi bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ ɔkɔ bɔlɔ ebui kpa etsye bɔlɔ. 11Mɛɔbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ ɔlɔ ibui soɔ, kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔ tsyɛ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ. 12Anana akamɔ Owusoso Akaa eɖi, pɔ onupɛ bɔdɛmɛ agɔlɔ ibuiɛ, Owusoso Akaa abazã ɔlɔ mɛ kɛlɛ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ bana nɛ ɔlɔ mɛ.
13Bunyi sɛ bɔkpasɛ yɛmɛ kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, Ɔmɔsɛ yɛakɔ ɔlɔ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ. 14Kɛlɛ bɔmɔ pɛ bɔɖɔ kaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛ shu sɛ, Akaa yɛakpɛ Yɛeyiɛ sɛ tɛ̀ abayɛkɛ akɔ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. 15Onupɛ anɔ teli adalɛ ɛlɛ mɛ asɛ Yesu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ, Owusoso Akaa akpasɛ yɛmɛ kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ. 16Kliso bunyi, kɛlɛ bɔkpà plɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bɔlɔ.
Owusoso Akaa enu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɛ anɔ. Anunɔ gɛ edzinɔ yɛkpã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, anɔ alɛ akpasɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ akpasɛ yɛ mɛ. 17Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabhaa, tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ná nɛ bɔlɔ mɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔkɔ zipo kebhukulu kiwuiɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɛ asɛ yɛ ana nɛ kanɔ alɛ mɛ. 18Kifù sisi ma tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. Pɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛnáa bu kifù sisi oyinɔ, ɔmɔsɛ kifusisi mɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ azã. Anunɔ gɛ esi kifuɔ yɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ tɛnà.
19Bɔdɛmɛ nɔ, ɔmɔsɛ yɛeputɔ adɛmɛ nɛ bɔlɔ. 20Onupɛ anɔ teli aɖɔ asɛ “Ɛdɛmɛ nɔ Owusoso Akaa,” pɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛadzyaa, asɛnɛ elete yɛenu. Ɔmɔsɛ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛadzyaa, anɔ gɛ amɔ nɛ̀ awuhuɔ, atɛ balà adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa gɛ atɛ amɔ nɛ̀ awuhũ. 21Kɛlɛ akɔ ɔlɔ ɔsha ɔlɛ asɛ, kɛlɛ sɛ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ adɛmɛnɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, tɛ adɛmɛ nɛ̀ yɛadzya tsyɛ.

Title: YOHANES 1 5
Content:
Tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã Nɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyianyɛ Nabha
1Anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã sɛ̀ Yesu yɛenu Kristoɔ, enu Owusoso Akaa ayɛ, kɛlɛ aka nyia aka gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ Akaa adɛmɛ nɔ yɛeyiɛ tsyɛ. 2Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha bɔgã pɛ buti sɛ̀ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ, gɛ onupɛ bɔdɛmɛ nɔ Owusoso Akaa pɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ yɛɔshaa nabhaa. 3Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ̀, tɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ yɛɔshaa nabha. Kɛlɛ yɛɔshaa tsyɛ gɛ gagalĩ, 4ɔmɔsɛ aka nyia aka gɛede Owusoso Akaa mɛ aŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha. Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu kabha ŋaŋã gɛŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha, gɛenu ɔlɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã. 5Afana gɛenu anɔ gɛ aŋã kanɔ nɔ̀ nabha? Anunɔ gɛ yɛayɛkɛ aŋã sɛ̀ Yesu yɛenu Owusoso Akaa yɛeyiɛ ete.
6Anɔ alɛ yɛagã bulĩ nɛ̀ dzyosu mɛ aba, yɛenu Yesu Kristoɔ. Agɛ gã bulĩ ete mɛ̀ pɛ aba, pɔ bulĩ nɛ̀ dzyosu mɛ yɛagã aba. Kɛlɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ ɖɔaɖɔ dalɛ̃ kɛlɛishu, ɔmɔsɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔlɛ onu kibui gbã. 7Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ edì tata balɛ aɖɔaɖɔ dalɛ kɛlɛishu, 8Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ, bulĩɛ nɛ̀ dzyosu nɔ, kɛlɛ banɔ edi tata alɛ tenikpo. 9Bɔyɛkɛ anɔdzyrame ebui ɖɔɖɔ, pɔ Owusoso Akaa ebui ɖɔɖɔ egbogblo adɛ, ɔmɔsɛ alɛenu Owusoso Akaa ebui gɛaɖɔ nɛ Yɛeyianyɛ shu. 10Kibui ɛlɛ gɛ baɖɔ adalɛ yɛishuɔ bazã anɔ ka nyia ka yɛitúɔ mɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa Eyi nabha aŋãa. Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa nabha aŋãa abhɛtɛ yɛ yɛedzi asɛnɛ elete, ɔmɔsɛ agɛ yɛkɛ kibuiɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ adalɛ Yɛeyiɛ shuɔ nabha aŋã. 11Kibui ɛlɛ yɛaɖɔ adalɛ yɛishu asɛ, Owusoso Akaa akɔ ɔlɔ ɛkpã tihɔɔ, kɛlɛ ɛkpã ɛlɛ kpasɛ Yɛeyianyɛ mɛ. 12Anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ Eyiɛ nabha ŋã ɛkpã lɛ yɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ ɛkpã ma anunɔ gɛ agɛ yɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi nabha mɛ.
Ebuiɖɔɖɔ Gɔgɔɛ Nɔ
13Ɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ kɔ wɔnɔ bagɛ nɔyɛkɛ Owusoso Akaa Eyiɛ ninye nabha aŋã, sɛ tɛ̀ nɔotì ɔsɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ. 14Awɔ̃ lulu alɛ yɛakpasɛ ɔlɔ mɛ sopɛ butso ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa, sɛ tɛ̀ onupɛ bubisì kɛdɔ̃ tiliɛ nɛ yɛ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ, aba taatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ. 15Kɛlɛ onupɛ bunyi sɛ ataatɔ̃ nɛ̀ ɔlɔ nɛ kɛka nyia ka gɛ bubisiɛ shuɔ, bunyi sɛ bɔbà mɔ kɛgɛ bubisi odenɔ yɛɔkɔɔ.
16Onupɛ anɔ teli amɔ yɛadzya gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui kpa tili gɛ kɛtɛ bagbanà yɛ ɔvɛnɔ butsì mɛɛ, ekulu Owusoso Akaa tɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ̀ anɔ alɛ amɔ ɛkpã. Ɛɖɔaɖɔ nɛ banɔ alɛ gɛ balɛ kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ tɛ gbanà alɛ kpɛ butsi mɛ shu. Kibui kpa tili lɛ gɛ kɛgbanà anɔ ɔvɛnɔ butsì mɛ. Ɛtɛɖɔ ɔsɛ ekulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ kibui ɛlɛ shu. 17Kesitata ka nyia ka ɛdi nu kibui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ, kɛlɛ kibui kpa tili lɛ gɛ kɛtɛ gbanà anɔ vɛnɔ butsì mɛ.
18Bunyi sɛ aka nyia aka gɛ bamɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ atɛzã kɛlɛ abha pɛ aza bhɛtɛ̀ kibui kpa, anunɔ gɛ bamɔ nɛ Owusoso Akaa mɛ yɛakɔ anɔ alɛ nɛidi azã piapii, kɛlɛ abosam atɛ balà kpɛ̀ kɛpɔ̃ nɛishu. 19Bunyi sɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ bunu, kɛlɛ bunyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ tɛgbagbana kpasɛ abosam esi. 20Bunyi tsyɛ ɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ aba kɛlɛ abakɔ bulũ kɛlɛ esi, ɔsɛ tɛ̀ butì anunɔ gɛ yɛaɖɔ kibui gbã. Kɛlɛ bɔkpasɛ agɛ yɛaɖɔ kibui gbã mɛ, gɛ yɛenu Yɛeyianyɛ Yesu Kristo. Yɛenu Owusoso Akaa kibui gbã nɛ̀ ɛkpã tihɔɔ elete.
21Mɛeyi alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nobu wɔnɔ ishu oyinɔ nɛ ibudì shù.

Title: YOHANES 2 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Keplukpa bhalà gɛede Yohanes ɔkɔ, “Ɔhamɛ Sheshè” yɛafɔnɔ alɛ sɛsɛ “Adzɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ” gɛ kɛlɛ esi kɛlɛinu ɔsɛ ɔha niampɛ tieli nɛ̀ ɔlɛ mɛ anɔ nɔ. Kibuiɛ gulũi nɔ gɛide yɛɔkɔ kɛlɛinu kibui bibisi asɛ badɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ bagɔlɔ nɛ̀ ɔshakpɛkpɛ nɛ asɛnɛ badɔkasɛ nɛ̀ balɛ bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ shu.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1-3
Tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛ dɛɛ 4-6
Ɔshakpɛkpɛ ɔkɔ asɛnɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ 7-11
Ebui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 12-13

Title: YOHANES 2 1
Content:
1Denɔ Esheshèɛ ɔkɔ,
Ɔsɛsɛ apãlĩɛ gɛ bebu eluɔ nɛ̀ yɛeyi alɛ, gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ alɛ nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, gɛnɛ mɛ ete pɔ bagɛ balɛ enyi kibui gbã tsyɛ petee, 2ɔmɔsɛ kibui gbã kpasɛ bɔlɔ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ kɛkpasɛ ɔlɔ mɛ ɖaa.
3Tibhui bhuibu, ashagabui ɖiɖi nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ode Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yesu Kristo gɛenu bɔlɔ Akaa Yɛeyiɛ ɔkɔ, balɛ abazã aplɛnɔ ɔlɔ nɛ kibui gbã nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ̀.
4Kɛkɔ mɛ same gbagbla sɛ ɛmɔ wɔnɔ eyi alɛ teli sɛ bagã nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, asɛ kana gɛ Akaa akpɛ ɔsha akɔ wɔnɔ ana. 5Kɛlɛ otsiɛ nɔ, apalĩɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, gɛnɛ ɔsha vɔvɔ mɛfɔnɔ pɔ ɔgɛ ɔlɛ ɔlɔ ahɔɛ odenɔ kesi ɔkpɛkɔ. Ibisi ɔsɛ tɛ̀ bɔdɛmɛ nɛ̀ agɔlɔ. 6Kɛlɛ kɛlɛinu tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔgã nɛ yɛɔsha nabha nɛ batɔ̃ lulũ mɛ. Asɛ gɛ nɔolũ odenɔ kesiɛ ɔkpɛkɔ ana, yɛɔsha gɛ akpɛ ɔlɛ onù ɔsɛ tɛ̀ nɔgã nɛ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.
7Asɛnɛ elete gelee, gɛ bagɛ mɔ̃ Yesu Kristo sɛ̀ aba nɛ ishudzya mɛ, betsoku kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ. Anɔ alɛ nɛidì enu anɔ gɛ awɔɛ anɔ nɛ̀ asɛnɛ kristoelete. 8Nɔoɖi ɛlɛ ɔkɔ sɛ̀ nɔgɛ yala kɛnanà gɛ nɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ, pɔ sɛ tɛ̀ babuia ɛlɛ shu kɛbhɛ akɔ wɔnɔ tɛ̀ kɛna. 9Anunɔ gɛ atɛ fala eputɔ pɛ agɛ akasɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ Kristo yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ nabhaa, Owusoso Akaa ama yɛmɛ, pɔ anunɔ gɛ etsiɖì ɛlɛ abha pɛ akasɛ Kristo ɔdɔ̃ɔ, yɛahɔɛ Akaa nɛ̀ Eyiɛ pete alɛ. 10Onupɛ anɔ teli aba wɔnɔ ɔhha pɛ agɛ mana bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ, nɔtɛ̀ gbanà yɛ kpɛ wɔnɔ bɔpã mɛ alo tɛ̀ nɔyɛkɛ yɛ tsyɛ. 11Anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ anɔ alɛ ayɛkɛ yɛtakpumɛ zizĩ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa tsyɛ.
12Ebui kpekpè alɛ mɛahɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ ɔnɔ, pɔ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ tɛ ɛwɔa keplukpa nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ uli shu axɔ̃ɛ. Pɔ ɛpɛ sɛ̀ tɛ̀ mɛba wɔnɔ ɔbha tɛ̀ ɛbaɖɔaɖɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ bamɛ nɛ̀ amɛ, sɛ tɛ̀ bɔlɔ same mɔmɔ ana.
13Wɔada nɔ gɛ bebu eluɔ, yɛeyi alɛ asɛnɛ ɔnɔ o.

Title: YOHANES 3 OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Keplukpa tramɛ gɛede Yohanes ɔkɔ, “ɔhamɛ sheshèɛ” yɛafɔnɔ alɛ asɛsɛ ɔhamɛulũ azazã gɛ beze kulu yɛasɛ Gayoɔ. Agɛ yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa akpɛ Gayo inye nɛitití nɛ tɛpɛplɛnɔ gɛ akɔ Kristoanɛ so, kɛlɛ akpɛ ɔsha nɛ anyɛ teli shu gɛ bezekulu yɛasɛ Deyotrofi.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1-4
Bakpɛ Gayo inyè nɛitití 5-8
Bebu Deyotremo ɛpɔ 9-10
Bakpɛ Demetrio inye nɛ kabha 11-12
Ebui Gɔgɔɛ nɔ 13-15

Title: YOHANES 3 1
Content:
1Mɛ asɛ ɔhamɛ anɔ sheshè ana,
Ɛsɛsɛ wɔ Gayo epluka alɛ, wɔ anɔ gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ nɛ kibui gbã mɛ.
2Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, iikulu Owusoso Akaa kɔwɔ sɛ tɛ̀ ɔmɔ ishumɛ gagalĩ, sɛ tɛ kɛka nyia ka vɛ ɛlɛ abha piapii nɛ̀ wɔ, asɛ kana gɛ inyi ɔsɛ ɔgagalĩ nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ mɛ. 3Kiku mɛ samè ɔsɛ badzya teli aba aɖɔ nɛ kana gɛ ɔlɛ piapi nɛ kibui gbã mɛ, nɛ̀ kana gɛ otsiɖì ɛlɛ abha ɔgã nɛ kɛlɛ shuɔ. 4Same mɔmɔ hohoe nanà abhama mɛahɔɛ ɔdɛ sɛ tɛ̀ ilũ sɛ mɛeyi alɛ aagã nɛ kibui gbã mɛ.
5Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛnɔ, ɔbhɛtɛ kibuiɛ gɛ lɛ ɛlɛ ɔzakɔ nɛ kɛgɛ ɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔ badzya shu, gɛ beefu pɔ benu akɔ wɔ flogo. 6Baɖɔ wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ etseɖe ɔhaa. Ebedzi kibui piapi akɔwɔ ɔsɛ tɛ̀ ɔtɔɖɔ alɛ nɛ kidzoɔ gɛpɛ̃ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa nabha. 7Kinyeɛ shu sopɛ bavɛ ada ɔnyɔ̃ɔ, pɔ batɛ amɔ tɛpɛplɛnɔ odenɔ bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛŋã ɔkɔ tsyɛ flogo. 8Kɛlɛ ɔsɛ bɔbhɛtɛ̀ ɛyamɛ gbangbã ɔkɔ banyɛ alɛ nɛidi sɛ tɛ̀ bɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ kpɛitsù ɔkɔ kibui gbã.
9Ɛfɔnɔ keplukpa kɔ ɔhaa, pɔ Ɖiotrefo, gɛ apɛ asɛ tɛ̀ eku anɔ awɔ̃ soɔ, atɛ eɖi ɔlɔ akpɛ kɛnanà mɛ. 10Kliso onupɛ ɛba, ɛbakɔ notì kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛ̀ɛ, agã olugbũ edzì alɔkɔ ezĩ bɔlɔ shu nɔ. Gɛ kɛlɛ gɛikpè ɔkɔɛ soɔ, agɛpɛ tsyɛ asɛ tɛ̀ ayɛkɛ baadzya. Etsodzì bagɛ apɛ asɛ ayɛkɛ alɛ tsyɛ, kɛlɛ ebu alɛ eyinɔ nɛ ɔhaa mɛ.
11Mɛɔbhia gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, tiɖi kibui kpa tɛ̀ ɔbhɛtɛ̀ nɛ kɛlɛ ulũ, pɔ ɖi kɛgɛ pɛ̃ tɛ ɔbhɛtɛ̀ nɛ ɛlɛ shu. Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ kibui gbangbã, enu anɔ gɛ ede Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ. Anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ̀ ebui kpa etinyi Owusoso Akaa. 12Anɔ ka nyia ka aɖɔ ebui gbangbã nɛ Demetrio shu, kibuiɛ tsyɛ ɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛishu ana. Bɔlɔ tsyɛ ɖɔaɖɔ gbangbã nɛ yɛishu, kɛlɛ nɔonyi ɔsɛ bɔlɔ kibuiɛ gɛ bɔɖɔ dalɛ yɛishuɔ nu kibui gbã.
