13Ebui kpekpè alɛ mɛ ahɔɛ gɛ kɛlɛ sɛ ɛfɔnɔ kɔ wɔ, pɔ ɛgɛ pɛ sɛ lɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ ishìi nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ bulĩ bhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɔ. 14Iɖì kidzomɛ ɔsɛ tɛ ɛmɔ wɔ gulũi, kɛlɛ bɔbà ɖɔaɖɔ bamɛ nɛ̀ amɛ. 15Ishuyɔyɔ kɔ wɔ. Badzya nɛ ɛkɛlɛ̀ asɛnɛ wɔ. Ɛsɛnɔ wɔnɔ ɛbhia alɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ piapi.

Title: YUDA OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Bafɔnɔ eplukpa gɛede Yuda ɔkɔ tɛ bakpɛ ɔsha nɛ asɛnɛ badɔkasɛ gɛ aabhɛtɛ ishu asɛ bayɛyɛkɛŋã benuɔ. Nɛ keplukpa gulũi alɛ mɛ, gɛ kalɛ ebuiɛ ashɔnɔ Petro yɛeplukpa bhalà mɛ ayɛ, agɛ yɛafɔnɔ keplukpa akpɛ bagɛ aba kalà yɛeplukpa emi asɛ “batà eyu akɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ Owusoso Akaa alɔkɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ yɛanɔ nɔ nɛ butu tunikpo mɛɛ”.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba ibuiɛ 1-2
Ɛkpã zazãna, bɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ, nɛ̀ kɛgɛ babà asɛnɛ adɔkasɛ nabha 3-16
Buluhũ huhu nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ tɛnyanyanà vunɔ shu 17-23
Tiyuyulà 24-25

Title: YUDA 1
Content:
1Mɛ Yuda, Yesu Kristo yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ Yakobo yɛadza ɔkɔ.
Mɛfɔnɔ keplukpa alɛ ɛsɛsɛ bagɛ bekulu pɛ Owusoso Akaa adɛmɛ nɔ pɛ Yesu Kristo abalɛ alɛ elúɔ.
2Ashagabui ɖiɖi, ishu yɔyɔ nɛ̀ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ lidzì wɔnɔ ɔyɛ nɛ tikpekpè mɛ.
Ebui Kpa Nɛ̀ Butsiɛ Gɛbabà Bagɛetinyi Owusoso Akaa Nabha
3Mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, gɛ kinù mɛ same ɔsɛ tɛ̀ mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ ɔnɔ nɛ tibubuɔ gɛ bɔmɔ̃ shu tsyɛɛ, ɛmɔsɛ kɛlɛ ɔsɛ mɛ fɔnɔ keplukpa akɔ wɔnɔ tɛ̀ ɛlɔkɔ kpalà wɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ nɔkɔ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã gɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ bayɛyɛkɛŋã ku balɛ awɔ̃. 4Ɔmɔsɛ banɔ teli gɛ batɛ fɔnɔ balɛ ɛpɔ bubuɔ elù kibè tili gɛ bafalaa, banɔ alɛ abafala eku wɔnɔɛshi nɛ tikpukpũ mɛ. Benu banɔ gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa, gɛ balɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibuɔ asɛ kidzo kɔkɔ anɔ ɔkɔ kɛgɔlɔ ŋaŋã kɛlɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ Yesu Kristoɔ gɛenu bɔlɔ Apalete nɛ̀ Ekusi Gbagbla tenikpo nɔ.
5Nɔonyi ebui alɛ nyɔ̃ɔ, pɔ ɛpɛ sɛ bakà wɔnɔ sɛ̀ Apaleteɛ ebu yɛanɔ nɔ̀ odenɔ Egipte, pɔ kidegbaa ebeyì bagɛ agɛ yɛkɛ aŋãa. 6Kɛlɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ bagɛ wɔa balɛ axɔ̃ɛ nɛ ohumi nɔ gɛ bakɔ alɛ shu pɛ bashɛ nɛ balɛ ɛzãkɔ, balɛ yɛalɔkɔ akpɛ otumũɔ mɛ elu, pɛ banyã alɛ nɛ̀ ɛɖahuiɛ odiyinɔ Kebhu kukulu Kiwui nabha. 7Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha, Sodom nɛ̀ Gomora nɛ̀ ɛma nɛ ɛma ɛlɛ mɛ alɔkɔ balɛishu akpɛ agɔlɔ ŋaŋã nɛ̀ tɛwɔwɔsɔ̃ nɛ bagɔlɔ mɛ. Banɔ alɛ edzì kibui mɔmɔlu ɔkɔ bagɛ bamɔ bɔtɔ nɛ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ɔkɔ kifúɔ gɛtã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ.
8Nɛ kidzo ɛlɛ abha, banɔ alɛ gɛ baza bɔlala akpɛ balɛ̀ishu dzya nɔtsɔ̃, batɛ abhɛtɛ̀ tɔɖɔ ɔsha abha, kɛlɛ baɖɔaɖɔ kpa nɛ kititì banɔ nɔ shu. 9Pɔ otugbà axɔ̃ɛdɛ Mixael, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ aza wlɔãkɛ kibui nɛ̀ abosam nɛ Mose ishudzya shu tsyɛ, agɛ kpɛité aɖɔaɖɔ kpa alɔɛtití nɛ yɛishu, pɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Apaleteɛ etseɖenɔ nɛ̀ wɔ!” 10Pɔ banɔ alɛ xɔnɔ baɖɔ akwalatu ebui alɔɛtití nɛ kibui nɔnɔ gɛ begilũ kɛlɛ esiɛ shu. Asɛ efutumɛ agã gɛ batɛ abhɛtɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ, ebui nɛ alɛ gɛezĩ alɛ.
11Aba gagalĩ akɔ alɛ! Balɔkɔ Kain idzoɔ, bebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ avɛ̀ tɛ badɛ mɔ ɛdɔ̃ gɛmɔ tɔɖɔ odenɔ Baalam kesi tata mɛ, beyì alɛ nɛ Korax kititì lɔlɔ mɛ.
12Banɔ alɛ enu kihututũ nɛ wɔnɔ tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ ɔdɔ̃ ɔŋãkɔ, gɛ baŋã ɔdɔ nɛ̀ wɔnɔ gɛ kɛtɛ wɔa axɔ̃ɛ bhlui nɛ balɛishu mɛ tsyɛ, ibhoshi agbagbana elete gɛ beeɖì balɛ ete ishu abha. Bedzi asɛ ɔmɔlɔ̃ gɛ subhà ma ɔlɛ mɛ, gɛ kɛlɛ́ɛ nɔ fù ɔlɛ ɔshɛnɔ, ekpemɛ beesìɛ gɛ etieyù eyuyù nanà pɛ bakpà ebho pɛ betsí pete nɔ. 13Benu aƒuɔ gɛetsu guɖaguɖà, gɛebu balɛ awũi ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ akasɛ, awɔ̃ɛ gɛ anyɔ̃ akanà, banɔ gɛ babalɛ otumũ tutũ gɛɔdɛ elu akɔ tihɔɔ.
14Henox, anɔ gegenemiɛ odenɔ Adamu mɛ̀, aɖɔ ebui elú nɛ banɔ alɛ nɛidì shu asɛ̀, “Nɔoɖi mɔ, Apaleteɛ aba nɛ̀ yɛanɔ dadalɛ nɛ ihotu, ihotu mɛ 15tɛ̀ ebekulu kebhu nɛ̀ aka nyia aka, tɛ̀ bebù bagɛ etinyi Owusoso Akaa petee ɛpɔ nɛ̀ ubui kpa petee gɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ gɛ betinyi Owusoso Akaa so, nɛ̀ kaɖɔ kpa gɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ̀ elete gɛ beti esì Owusoso Akaa ifùɔ aɖɔ nɛ yɛishuɔ.” 16Banɔ alɛ enù banɔ gɛ̀ bakpɛmɛ ishu pɛ bapɛ̀ kizizĩ nɛ anɔ shu, batɔnɔ balɛ ahɔɛ ebui kpa tɛpɛpɛɛ ede, beetũ ahɔɛ etelũ ɔkɔ balɛishu pɛ beedzyinì banɔ akpɛ̀ akɔ balɛishu tɛpɛpɛ so.
Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Kemì kpɛkpɛ
17Pɔ mɛadzya alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ, nɔ bakà ebuiɛ gɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛanɔkpɛkpɛ aɖɔ akpɛ otugbàa. 18Betseɖe wɔnɔ asɛ, “Nɛ ewui gɔgɔɛ nɔ mɛɛ, bagɛ amɔ̃ɛ anɔ ababa, banɔ gɛ abazã alɛ mayɛkɛ mayɛkɛŋã edzoɔ niede.” 19Banɔ alɛ balɛ ebù wɔnɔ ɔtɔ, banɔ gɛ batɔnɔ ishupi mɛ ebui ede pɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ma balɛ mɛ.
20Pɔ mɛbhia alɛ gɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔ xɔnɔ, nɔbhɔ wɔnɔ shu owunɔ kabha nɛ wɔnɔ ishu dadalɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ̀, tɛ̀ nokulu Owusoso Akaa nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa Gbangbã mɛ̀. 21Nɔlɔkɔ wɔnɔ ishu ɔzã Owusoso Akaa tɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ mɛ̀ kibeɛ gɛ nopo Apalete Yesu Kristo yɛashagabui ɖiɖiɛ, tɛ̀ amanà wɔnɔ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔ mɛ.
22Nɔobì bagɛ batɛ ayɛkɛ aŋã ashagabui, 23nɔbhɛ̃ bagɔgɔɛ odenɔ kifúɔ gɛta mɛ tɛ̀ nɔyɛkɛ ɔkɔ alɛ. Banɔ gɔgɔɛ nɔ nɔobì alɛ ashagabui nɛ kifu sisi mɛ̀, kɛlɛ nɔtɛ dɛmɛnɔ nɛ̀ balɛ akpɛkpɛ gɛ etuturu edenɔ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ tsyɛ.
Tikukulu Ɔkɔ Kinyè Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití
24Ishu dadalɛ ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ yɛakɔ asɛ tɛ̀ nɔtɛ dɔ oboe, sɛ tɛ̀ alɔkɔ ɔnɔ elù anɔ dadalɛ amɛ tɛ̀ kibui kpa tɛzã wɔnɔ shu pɔ nɛ same mɛɛ, 25ishu dadalɛ, bukusi ŋaŋã, ohumi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ete gɛenu anɔ gɛ ebu ulɔ, ɔgana Apalete Yesu Kristo abha, nɛ agɔ gɛ latɛ bafala petee mɛ, odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ mɛ! Amen.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ OTUGBA IBUIƐ
Content:
Otugba Ibuiɛ
Bafɔnɔ Tibubu kasɛ ɛlɛ akasɛ Yohanes nɛ kibeɛ gɛ baza tɔnɔ Kristoanɛ niede, ɔmɔsɛ gɛ bayɛkɛ Yesu Kristo abha aŋã asɛ Apalete ana so. Keplukpa fɔfɔnɔeleteɛ tɛtɔtɔɖɔ nu ɔsɛ tɛ akɔ bagɛ abakalà alɛ awɔ̃ lulu nɛ̀ kemi kpɛkpɛ, kɛlɛ akpalà alɛ asɛ bazã balɛ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã abha, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bamɔ̃ bɔtɔ nɛ̀ kede tɔtɔnɔɔ.
Nɛ keplukpa ɛkɔ gelee mɛɛ, ɔbɔkalà ebui bubu kasɛ nɛ̀ balàla mɛ ebui mɔmɔ, gɛ bafɔnɔ alɛ nɛ sahɔ̃ɛ uluhũ mɛ gɛ Kristoanɛ gazã ibe ɛlɛ ezelũ aliesi pɔ banɔ bhlatɔ xɔ̃nɔ lezedzi ebui kpukpũ akɔ alɛ. Asɛ ɛzhã gɛ bazhã ɔdzɛ pɛ bedzinì azhã anaa, kana ɛbe baɖɔ kibui osiɛ nɛ eplukpa mɛ edzinì aɖɔ ɔgana balàla ediedi tɛzazã mɛ. Gɛ banɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ agã ɔtɔ nɛ eplukpa mɛ ebui niesi bubu mɛ tsyɛ elo, kibui osiɛ xɔ̃nɔ mɛ ɔdalɛ ɔsɛ, gana Apalete gɛenu Kristo abhaa, Owusoso Akaa abaŋã bagɛ atɛ adɛmɛ yɛibuiɛ nyɔ̃ɔ abha, gɛ Satana tsyɛ akpasɛ alɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ababuia ɛbhɛ akɔ banunɔ gɛ bayɛkɛ yɛabha aŋã nyɔ̃ɔ nɔ, nɛ̀ tiyuyula ɔkɔ ɛtití vɔvɔ nɛ̀ esiakpa vɔvɔ, onupɛ kabha ŋaŋã alɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ ebeke.
Keplukpa Mɛ Ebuiɛ
Otugba Ebuiɛ 1.1-8
Tibubu kasɛ gɛiputɔ nɛ̀ buplukpa fɔfɔnɔ ɔkɔ bahá tegegeneɛ 1.9—3.22
Buplukpa nulũ gɛ badã nɛ̀ badadã tegegene 4.1—8.1
Buxoele tugegeneɛ 8.2—11.19
Kɛtsɔpɛ nɛ̀ bagãhoe taabhaa 12.1—13.18
Bɔdɔ̃ edi edi tibubu kasɛ 14.1—15.8
Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ sugba tugegene 16.1-21
Babilonia tɛyɛyɛ, agãhoe nabha tɛŋaŋã, asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanunɔ nɛ̀ Abosam 17.1—20.10
Kebhu gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ tikukulu 20.11-15
Kitití vɔvɔ, kesiakpa vɔvɔ nɛ̀ Yerusalem vɔvɔ 21.1—22.5
Kibui gɔgɔɛ nɔ 22.6-21

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 1
Content:
Otugba Ibui
1Ebui bubu kasɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ Yesu Kristo asɛ tɛ ebu akasɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ etibedze pɛ labàbaa alɛ mɛɛ shu. Akɔ tititì ɛlɛ ɔgana yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ akpɛ asɛsɛ Yohanɛs ɔkɔɔ. 2Yohanes adalɛ kɛka nyia ka mɛ gɛ amɔɔ, gɛinu Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ nɛ̀ Yesu Kristo yɛishu dadalɛ shu. 3Tiyuyula ɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ aakalà ebuiɖɔluanɔ ebui alɛ, kɛlɛ tiyuyula ɔkɔ banunɔ gɛ belũ alɛ pɛ bayɛkɛ kɛgɛ bafɔnɔ eluɔ akpɛ itúɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ tsu ba.
Tɛsɛsɛnɔ Nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa Nɛinye Kpɛkpɛ Nɛitití
4Mɛ Yohanes,
Mɛfɔnɔ ebui alɛ sɛsɛ baha tegegeneɛ galɛ Asia ɔdɔ̃ mɛ ɔsɛ,
Tibhui bhuibu nɛ̀ ishu yɔyɔ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ odenɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ pɛ atɛzã eɖi, pɛ azabàbaa, nɛ̀ odenɔ ɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ nɛ yɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà, 5kɛlɛ odenɔ Yesu Kristo gɛenu anunɔ gɛ adalɛ ebuiɛ alɛ nɛ àlɛ ɔzãkɔ shu, pɛ enu eyi gɛ eputɔ ede bekpuɔ mɛ, pɛ aŋã ukusi nɛ kesiakpa abha ekusi nabha.
Yɛenu anunɔ gɛ adɛmɛ nɛ ɔlɔ pɛ ebu ɔlɔ edenɔ ebui kpa mɛ nɛ̀ yɛdzyosu nɔ, 6edzu ukusi aŋãsi akɔ ɔlɔ pɛ abhɛtɛ ɔlɔ bunu banɔlũazazã sɛ tɛ bɔdɛ axɔ̃ɛ ɔkɔ yɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Yɛakaa, yɛyɛ́ kɛlɛinu ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi odenɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ tihɔ! Amen.
7Noɖio abà nɛ̀ ɔmɔlɔ̃,
kɛlɛ kiwuhũ ka nyia ka bamɔɛ,
bagɛ bashɔɛ nɛ̀ bɔɖadɔ̃ tsyɛ abamɔɛ,
yɛ soɔ, kanɔmanɛ pete abamɔ̃ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ.
Kana kɛbàba ɛlɛ mɛ! Amen.
8Apalete Owusoso Akaa aɖɔ asɛ, “Mɛinu agɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ tsyɛ, gɛ ɛlɛ otsiɛ, pɛ ɛtɛzã ɖi, pɛ ɛzɛbàbaa, mɛinu Ohumieleteɛ.”
Yesu Tibubu Kasɛ
9Mɛ, wɔnɔ adzya Yohanɛs, gɛ bɔzã itsu nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ pɛ bɔkpɛ emi, dɔ fɔ̃ɔ ɔkɔ bukusiɛ gɛinu ɔlɔ ɔyɛ ɔgana Yesu mɛ, ɛzã Patmo bulĩetukpɔ nabha, nɛ Owusoso Akaa ibuiɛ gɛ ɛɖɔ dalɛ Yesu shu so. 10Nɛ Apalete Nɛiwui nabhaa, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ oku mɛ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ izilũ ozĩ toli gagalĩ asɛ kexoele babɔ nɛ mɛedeɛ, 11kaɖɔ asɛ, “Fɔnɔ kɛgɛ ɔmɔ ɔtɔɖɔ eplukpa abha ɔsɛsɛ baha tegegeneɛ gɛ alɛ Efeso, Smina, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia nɛ̀ Ladokia.” 12Itsyina sɛ tɛ mɛiɖi anunɔ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ akɔ mɛ. Gɛ itsyinaa, ɛmɔ sikãefu isí tigegene, 13kɛlɛ nɛ kifu isí nɛishiɛ, ɛmɔ anɔ teli “gɛ azã asɛ anɔdzyrame yɛeyianyɛ ana,” gɛ azã akpɛkpɛ dzlolo gɛ ezhi aba yɛtɛtsɛɖɛ pɛ atsa sikã atsatsatɔɖɔ nɛ yɛitéɛ mɛ. 14Yɛtakpuɔ nɛ̀ tɛkã fuli asɛ obhoshi tɛkã, alo asɛ kɛmɔɛklagbu, kɛlɛ yɛawuhũɔ azã asɛ kifu gɛ kɛtã hanyã ana. 15Yɛtɛtsɛɖɛ dzã hanyã asɛ ɔɖa dzadzã nɛ kifu gɛtã mɛ, kɛlɛ yɛozĩ ozoyi ɔmɔ asɛ kelĩkekpu gɛ akpɛ hɔa nɔ ana. 16Awɔ̃ɛ tegegene azã kɛŋã ɔhɔɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɛtɛ̀, ilugbũ tɛbha ŋaŋã teli ikoeyì odenɔ yɛolugbũɔ mɛ. Kɛlɛ yɛamɛ ezetse ɔmɔ asɛ kiwi gɛinye nɛ ɛlɛ tɛdadalɛ mɛ ana.
17Gɛ ɛmɔ yɛ, izhi kumu nɛ yɛotugbà ɔmɔ asɛ anɔtsitsí ana. Pɔ alɔkɔ yɛŋã ahɔɛ atɔɖɔ mɛabha pɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛ osí ifu. Mɛinu agɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ. 18Mɛinu Enunuɔ, ititsí bafalanɔ, pɔ otsi alɛ ɛlɛ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔ, tihɔ! Kɛlɛ butsí nɛ̀ bekpu ipupukɔɔ lɛ mɛahɔɛ.
19Kliso, fɔnɔ agɛ ɔmɔ̃ɔ. Agɛ alɛ otsiɛ nɔ nɛ̀ agɛ abàba nɛ idegba olu. 20Kibui kpukpũɔ gɛlɛ awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ gɛ ɔmɔ̃ nɛ mɛŋã ɔhɔɛ mɛ nɛ̀ sikãefu isí tigegeneɛ nu ɛlɛ. Awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ enu baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ ɔkɔ baha tegegene, kɛlɛ ifu isí tegegeneɛ nu bahá tegegeneɛ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 2
Content:
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Efeso Ɔha
1“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Efeso ɔha mɛ.
Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ anyana awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ evunɔ nɛ kɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ, pɛ agãfala nɛ sikã efu isí tigegene nɛishiɛ, yɛebui nu alɛ. 2Inyi ebuiɛ gɛ ɔbhɛtɛɛ, wɔaxɔ̃ɛ gagalĩ wɔawɔa nɛ̀ emi kpɛkpɛ. Inyi sɛ ɔtɛ dɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ ɛtakpu mɛ gagalĩelete ibui, kɛlɛ nolu awɔ̃ oɖi agɛ beekulu alɛishu asɛ anɔ kpɛkpɛ benu, pɔ anɛ ana flogo nɔ, pɛ nɔmɔ alɛ ɔsɛ asɛnɛ elete benu. 3Inyi ikpɛ gɛ ɔkpɛ emi nɛ̀ ilu gɛ olu itú esi nɛ bɔtɔ mɛ gɛ ɔgã nɛ mɛtakpu, pɔ ɔgɛkɔ ɛtakpu.
4Pɔ kɛgɛ mɛmɔ nɛ wɔshuɔ nu ɔsɛ, ɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ gɛiputɔ shu olu. 5Baka ɔɖaɖama ɔkɔ gɛ ɔwɔlɛ odeɛ. Tsyina itú mɛ tɛ owlui ɔbhɛtɛ ebui asɛ kuku ibeɛ. Onupɛ ogitsyina wɔɛtúɔ mɛɛ, ɛbàba wɔkɔ bàbu wɔɛfu osíɛ nɛ ɔlɛ ɔzãkɔ. 6Pɔ kɛgiku mɛawɔ̃ nɛ wɔshuɔ nu ɔsɛ, ɔgɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ Nikolainɛ ede azazã ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ asɛ kɛdɛmɛ gɛ mɛtsyɛ gɛ dɛmɛ balɛ ibui ana.
7Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛidzo yɛaŋã busiɛ gɛ ɛkɔ ɛkpã, pɛ lɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa Bɔkã mɛɛ.
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Smirna
8“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Smirna ɔha mɛ.
Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛenu anɔ gɛ Eputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ, gɛ etsí pɛ azamɔ ɛkpãa, nɛibui nɛlɛ. 9Inyi ampɔɛ ebuiɛ gɛ ɔmɔ nɛ̀ wɔɛtsyui dɔdɔɔ, pɔ ehoeyielete wonu nɛ ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ flogo! Inyi ishu zizĩ ebuiɛ gɛ bagɛ basɛ Yudanɛ benu, pɔ anɛ alɛ benu flogo nɔ, pɛ benu Satana ɔtsyɔakɔ azazã. 10Tɛ osí ifu nɛ bɔtɔ gɛ bàba wɔabha shu. Itseɖe wɔ ɔsɛ, Abosam abakpɛ ɔnɔ eteli nɛ ɔɖavũ mɛ, sɛ tɛ efeke ɔnɔ eɖi, kɛlɛ nɔbɔmɔ ede tɔtɔnɔ nɛ ewui gulũi mɛ. Onupɛ butsí ibui tsyɛ elo, nɔzã kɛgɛ nɔyɛkɛ ɔŋã niede, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ ɔnɔ ɛkpã ekusikutu.
11Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, butsí bhalà tɛbabhɛtɛ ibui nanà nii.
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Pergamo
12“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Pergamo ɔha mɛ,
Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ bɛtɛ̀ ilugbũ tɛbha ŋaŋã lɛ yɛahɔɛɛ, yɛebui nu alɛ. 13Inyi wɔzãkɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Satana yɛekusiegbuɔ alɛ, pɔ ogitso dzi nɛ miede. Ɔgɛɖɔ ɔsɛ ɔshɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ mɛabha tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã shu olu. Nɛibeɛ gɛ Antipa azaɖɔ mɛibuiɛ nɛ kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ pɛ beyí nɛ wɔnɔ ɔma hohoe mɛ tsyɛ elo, owlui ɔzã miede kokoko nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Satana alɛɛ.
14Pɔɔ, ebui teli xɔnɔ alɛ mɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔshu. Banɔ teli alɛ wɔahɔɛ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ banyana Bileam yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ evunɔ. Yɛ gɛ akɔ asɛ tɛ Balak awɔɛ Israelanɛ akpɛ ebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛ ɔgana bɔdɔ̃ tɔtɔ ɔkɔ ibudi tɛŋaŋã, nɛ̀ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ mɛ. 15Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha wɔnɔ mɛ beteli tsyɛ anyana Nikolaianɛ ɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛ evunɔ. 16Kliso notsyina etúɔ mɛ! Onu gɛ nanàa, kɛtɛ badzè, ɛbàba wɔnɔkɔ, kɛlɛ ɛbaté banɔ alɛ nɛ̀ bɛtɛ̀ gɛ ede mɛolugbũɔ mɛ nɔ.
17Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛ tɛ elũ ibuiɛ gɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe bahá. Kɛlɛ anɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔɛ manà kpukpũɔ teli. Ɛbakɔɛ kɛklagbu fufuɔ tsyɛ gɛ bafɔnɔ kinye vɔvɔ atɔɖɔ kɛlɛ abha ɔplɛnɔ, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ kɛklagbuɔ ete yɛebeti kinyeɛ.
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ɔha Nɛ Tiatira
18“Fɔnɔ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Tiatira.
Owusoso Akaa Yɛeyiɛ gɛ yɛawuhũɔ edzi ɔmɔ asɛ kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ, pɛ yɛtsɛɖɛ dzi asɛ ɔɖa dzadzã gɛ bewoese ɔlɛishu piapii ana. 19Inyi ebuiɛ gɛ ɔbhɛtɛ, wɔtɛdɛdɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã, wɔaxɔ̃ɛ dɛdɛ nɛ̀ wɔemi kpɛkpɛ, kɛlɛ ɔwɔa axɔ̃ɛ otsiɛ, ɔdɛ kuku ibeɛ.
20Pɔ kibui tili lɛ mɛahɔɛ nɛ wɔshu ɔsɛ, ɔdɛmɛ obuidzo ɔkɔ adzɛ alɛ gɛ enu Izebel, gɛ ekulu yɛishu asɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ yɛenuɔ. Kɛlɛ gana yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ mɛɛ, awɔɛ mɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ asɛ tɛ bedzi ɔmamɛ dɛdɛeleteɛ, tɛ bazaŋã ɔdɔ̃ gɛ batɔ akɔ ibudiɛ. 21Ɛkɔ yɛibe sɛ tɛ etsyina itúɔ mɛ, nɛ yɛɔmamɛ dɛdɛ ebui kpaa shu, pɔ atɛ adɛmɛ. 22Ɛbakɔ yɛadɔ ɔnyã, atɔ nɛ oputso abha, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ bagɛ awɔ̃sɔ niyɛ amɔ ɔtɔ nyagãa, onupɛ begitsyina nɛ yɛebui kpa niedeɛ. 23Ɛbahu yɛeyi alɛ bho bebètsí. Kɛlɛ baha nyɔ̃ɔ bebèti asɛ mɛinu anunɔ gɛ ɛmɔ banɔ etúɔ nɛ̀ alɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ. Kɛlɛ ɛbabuia ɛbhɛ ɔkɔ ɔnɔ mɛ anɔ nyia anɔ nɛ wɔ tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ulũ. 24Wɔnɔ Tiatiranɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ gɛ nɔgɛ nyana yɛɔdɔ̃ kakasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ ovunɔ, pɛ nɔgɛ kpasɛ Satana yɛotumũ mɛedzoɔ (ɛtɛ bawlui kpɛ ɔnɔ bɔtɔ bhlatɔ nanà.) 25Nɔnyana kɛgɛ lɛ wɔnɔ ahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ piapii, ɔvɛnɔ mɛ babeɛ.
26Anunɔ gɛ akpɛ emi, pɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ mɛ tɛtɛtɔtɔɖɔ nabha ɔvɛnɔ kibe gɔgɔɛ nɔɔ, ɛbakɔɛ ohumi nɛ ɛmadiɛ nabha.
27‘Abaŋã balɛ abha nɛ̀ ɔɖaɛshi,
kɛlɛ abayɛ alɛ wluiwlui asɛ ketsukpu ana’,
asɛ kɛyɛkɛ gɛ ɛyɛkɛ ohumi odenɔ Mɛakaa ɔkɔ ana. 28Ɛbalɔkɔ kabha ŋaŋã tsyɛ kɔɛ. 29Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe baháa.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 3
Content:
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Sardis Ɔha
1“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Sardis ɔha mɛ.
Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛanyana Owusoso Akaa Ɛfɔfuĩa tigegene nɛ̀ awɔ̃ɛ tegegeneɛ evunɔɔ, yɛebuiɛ nɛ alɛ. Inyi wɔebui bhɛbhɛtɛ ɔsɛ, ɔyɛkɛ kinye ɔsɛ, ɔlɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã, pɔ anɔ tsitsí wonu. 2Nyɛmɛ! Nyana kɛgɛ gɔ̃ nɛ wɔahɔɛ pɛ kɛɛvɛ otsikɔ mɛ ovunɔ gagalĩi, ɔmɔsɛ wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa akaná ebeke nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛ. 3Kliso bakà kɛgɛ olũ pɛ ɔyɛkɛɛ, lũ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ ɛlɛ tɛ otsyina itú mɛ. Pɔ ɔgɛ nyɛmɛɛ, ɛbàba asɛ ezĩ ana, kɛlɛ oti botì kibeɛ gɛ ɛbaba yi nɛ̀ wɔɔ.
4Pɔ banɔ asasà teli alɛ Sardis, gɛ alɛ xɔ̃nɔ egi tuturu alɛ akpɛkpɛɛ. Babàzã alɛ akpɛkpɛ frɛrɛ mɛ pɛ babàgã nɛ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ balɛ tɛzazã mɛ ku awɔ̃. 5Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, yɛtsyɛ abazã bakpɛkpɛ frɛrɛ mɛ asɛ balɛ ana. Ɛtɛba xoele yɛinye nɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ ɖi ɖa, pɔ ɛbabui kasɛ nɛ Mɛakaa nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ namɛ. 6Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe bahá.
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Filadelfia Ɔha
7“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Filadelfia ɔha mɛ.
Ebui alɛ enu anunɔ gɛ yɛenu anɔ dadalɛ, pɛ aɖɔ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ, pɛ yɛevunɔ David ukusiupã opupuiakɔɔ. Kɛgɛ adalɛɛ, anɔ nanà atɛ kalà ɛlɛ adã, kɛlɛ kɛgɛ adãa anɔ nanà atɛ kalà adalɛ ɛlɛ. 8Inyi wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Ɖio, ɛlɔkɔ opupuɔ gɛ ɔdalɛ odziɛ ilu wotugbàa, gɛ anɔ nanà atɛ balà ɔlɛ adã. Gɛ inyi sɛ ohumi bhlui toli ko ɔlɛ lɛ wɔahɔɛ pɔ tsyɛ elo, ɔnyana mɛibuiɛ mɛ ovunɔ kɛlɛ ogitso dzi nɛ miede. 9Bagɛ benu Satana yɛɔtsyɔakɔanɔ pɛ balɔkɔ ishu asɛ Yudanɛ benu, pɔ anɛ balɛ benu, pɔ asɛnɛ elete benuɔ-ɛbakɔ ɔsɛ bebèdzu ekluisi esi nɛ wòtugba tɛ bamɔ asɛ, ɛdɛmɛ nɛ wɔ. 10Gɛ ɔkpɛ emi olu itú esi pɛ ɔbhɛtɛ mɛɔsha nabha soɔ, mɛ tsyɛ ɛbabu wɔ odenɔ tifefekeɖi ibe gagalĩɛ gɛbàba kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ pete abhaa mɛ, sɛ tɛ befeke bagɛ alɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ eɖiɛ. 11Ɛbàba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ. Nyana kɛgɛ lɛ wɔahɔɛ mɛ ovunɔ, sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà atɛ yɛkɛ wɔekusikutuɔ nɛ wɔahɔɛ. 12Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛedzi bubhiashaka nɛ mɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ mɛ. Ezekoeyì nɛ ɛkɛlɛ eɖi ɖa. Ɛbafɔnɔ mɛ Owusoso Akaa inyeɛ, nɛ̀ yɛɔma gbagbla gɛonu Yerusalem vɔvɔ, gɛ ezhi ede itití odenɔ mɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔɔ, ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔɔ, ɛbafɔnɔ mɛinye vɔvɔ tsyɛ nɛishu. 13Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ etseɖe aháa.
Ɔklasɔ̃ Ɔkɔ Ladokia Ɔhaa
14“Fɔnɔ ebui alɛ ɔsɛsɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ Ladokia ɔhaa mɛ.
Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛakɔ ebuiɛ aba ɛlɛ mɛ, gɛenu agɛ aɖɔ kibui gbã, nɛ̀ kibui mɛ adadalɛelete, pɛ yɛaŋã ukusi nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛanɔ mɛ ɔdɔ̃ nulũɔ, yɛebui nɛ ɛlɛ. 15Inyi wɔaxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa. Ɔgɛyɔ loo ovuifu. Mɛ tɛpɛpɛ tadzi ɔsɛ tɛ odzi anɔ yɔyɔ loo anɔ gɛ evũifu! 16Kliso, gɛ ɔlɛ ete pɛ ɔgɛyɔ loo ovuifu soɔ, ɛbàpí wɔ tɛ bu nɛ mɛolugbũ mɛ. 17Ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, ‘Inu ehoeyielete, gɛ ɛmɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ gɛ ɛtɛpɛ ɛdɔ̃ nanà.’ Pɔ ɔgɛmɔ wɔshu ɔsɛ onu ahɔɛ kpaelete, ashagabuielete, etsyuitsyui, awuhũpu nɛ̀ ɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ nɛishu anɔ. 18Ihu uluhũ kɔ wɔ ɔsɛ tɛ odzi sikã gɛ bewoese nɛ ifu mɛɛ, sɛ tɛ ɔlà otsyina odzi ehoeyielete. Dzi apɔtɛ fufu tɛ ɔdã, tɛ ɔlɔkɔ obu wɔ ɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ iwuĩ nɔ nɛishu, nɛ̀ awuhũ bɔwa tɛ ɔkpɛ nɛ awuhũɔ mɛ tɛ ɔzɔmɔ piapii.
19Bagɛ ɛdɛmɛ nɔɔ, balɛ mɛitseɖe nɔ pɛ ɛpɔ̃ atɔ̃ ɔkɔ. Kliso nɔkpɛ emi tɛ notsyina etú mɛ. 20Mɛ nɛ alɛ! Ili itití nɛ edulũɔ pɛ ibho opupuɔ. Onupɛ anɔ teli elũ mɛɔdɔ̃ pɛ adalɛ opupuɔ, ɛbatsoku buvũɔ mɛ kɛlɛ ɛbaŋã ɔdɔ̃ nii, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ abaŋã nɛ̀ mɛ. 21Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, ɛbakɔ yɛidzo yɛazã aplɛnɔ mɛ nɛ mɛekusiegbu nabha, ɔmɔ asɛ kɛŋã gɛ ɛŋã abha, pɛ izhidzi plɛnɔ Mɛakaa, nɛ yɛekusiegbu nabha. 22Anɔ gɛ atɔ̃ alɛ yɛ, tɛ elũ kɛgɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ otseɖe baháa.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 4
Content:
Ekusiegbu Nɛititíɛ
1Kidegbaa, ilu awɔ̃ ɖi kɛlɛ ɛmɔ opupu toli gɛ ɔdalɛ ɔzã nɛ kititíɛ. Kɛlɛ kaɖɔ gɛ itilũ putɔ ɔmɔ asɛ exoele olimɛ ana, lɔzɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Wù ɔba ɛkɛlɛ tɛ mɛibu kɛgɛ bàba ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ ɛlɛ̀ niedeɛ kasɛ wɔ.” 2Tsĩɔ ɔlɛ koɔ, Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ otsoku mɛ mɛ̀ kɛlɛ mɛmɔ ekusiegbu tieli nɛititíɛ gɛ anɔ teli azã kalɛ abha. 3Kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ azã ekusiegbu nabha shu dalɛ asɛ yaspa nɛ̀ sardis aklagbu dadalɛ ana. Enegèɛ gɛ azã asɛ ɛklagbu gɛitse ana kana ekusiegbuɔ shu ɔfala nɔ. 4Bukusiugbu afɛtaabha nɛ̀ tɔlɛ bhlatɔ tuli tsyɛ zɛ kana kalɛ, kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛ gɛ akpɛ akpɛkpɛ fufu pɛ bekumũ sikã ekusiekutuɔ nɛ alɛ atakpuɔ zã bɔlɛ abha. 5Denɔ ekusiegbuɔ mɛɛ, subhaɛfu ezeboele, ɛkɛlɛ ozogũ kɛlɛ subha azalɛ́ɛ. Efu tegegene azatã nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà. Alɛ enu Owusoso Akaa yɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ. 6Nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbàa, kɛdɔ̃ tili tsyɛ lɛ ɔmɔ asɛ aƒu gɛ edzi asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ dadalɛ teli idi, gɛ yɛmɛ adalɛ eli lĩalĩalĩa.
Nɛ kɛmamɛ gɛ ekusiegbuɔ azãa, bagã talɛ azã gɛ beyi awuhũ nɛ otugbà nɛ̀ kedeɛ. 7Agã gɛ eputɔ azã asɛ dzyata, abhalà eyi nɛtsyɔɛnye, atramɛ namɛ eyi anɔdzyrame ayɛ, kɛlɛ alɛlɛmɛ asɛ odì gɛ opruɖu ana. 8Bɔsɛ tuxlo zã bagã talɛ alɛ aka nyia aka shu, kɛlɛ awuhũ gelee azã balɛishu ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ bɔsɛ niesi tsyɛ. Kɛlɛ kibe nyiɛ be bazaɖɔ asɛ,
“Tɛdadalɛ, tɛdadalɛ, tɛdadalɛ
yɛenu Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ,
gɛ atɛzã eɖi, pɛ alɛ, pɛ azabàbaa.”
9Kibe nyiɛ be gɛ bagã alɛ alɔkɔ ishu dadalɛɛ, kɛtakpu esi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ahɔɛ huhu akɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ ekusiegbu nabha pɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã tihɔɔ nɔɔ, 10kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛɛ bedzu ekluisi esi akɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ ekusiegbu nabha pɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ anunɔ gɛ alɛ nɛ ɛkpã odenɔ tihɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ nɔ. Batsɛ balɛ ekusiekutuɔ elu ekusi egbuɔ otugbà pɛ baɖɔ asɛ,
11“Bɔlɔ Apalete nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa, wɔ kɛshɔnɔ ɔsɛ,
tɛ ɔyɛkɛ tɛdadalɛ, tɛ kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ohumi
ɔmɔsɛ wɔbhɛtɛ kanɔ mɛɔdɔ̃ nyɔ̃ɔ,
kɛlɛ gana wɔ tɛpɛpɛ ulũɔ babhɛtɛ kɛka nyia ka
kɛlɛ wɔkɔ ɔsɛ bɔlɛ.”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 5
Content:
Keplukpa Nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ
1Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ, ɛmɔ anunɔ gɛ azã esi nɛ ekusiegbu nabha yɛevunɔ keplukpa nɛ yɛŋã ahɔɛ mɛ gɛ bɔdɔ̃ fɔfɔnɔ zã kalɛ ɛmɛ nɛ̀ kedeɛ nyɔ̃ɔ, kɛlɛ bedere alɛ amɔnɔ nɛ̀ badadã tegegene. 2Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gagalĩ teli gɛ akpɛ ɛlɛ amana nɛ ozĩ asɛ, “Afana gɛ ashɔnɔ asɛ tɛ ayɛɛ badadã alɛ tɛ adalɛ eplukpaa dza?” 3Pɔ anɔ nanà ama ititíɛ alo kesiakpa nabha alo kesiakpa niesi gɛ abalà adalɛ eplukpa mɛ pɛ abalà eɖi alɛ mɛ ete tsyɛ. 4Ibi yoyo popopo ɔmɔsɛ bagɛ mɔ anɔ nanà pɛ ashɔnɔ asɛ tɛ adalɛ eplukpa alo tɛ eɖi alɛ mɛ. 5Kɛlɛ anɔ sheshèɛ tenikpo etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛ obi yoyo! Ɖio, Dzyata gɛede Yuda igbogboɔ mɛ pɛ enu David yɛeshui nɔɔ, aŋã abha. Yɛabalà eplukpa adalɛ nɛ̀ badadã tegegeneɛ.”
6Kɛlɛ ɛzɛmɔ obhoshieyi, gɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bebhui ɔlɛ, pɛ loli bagã talɛ nɛ̀ banɔ sheshèɛ gɛ ebu kɛma akpɛ ekusiegbuɔ nɛishi. Asha tegegene nɛ̀ awuhũ tegegene lɔkpɛ. Gɛenu Owusoso Akaa Ɛfɔfuĩa tigegeneɛ gɛ akpɛ asɛsɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ peteɛ. 7Aba kɛlɛ abayɛkɛ eplukpa edenɔ anunɔ gɛ azã ekusiegbu nɛ ŋãmɛ ahɔɛ. 8Kɛlɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ eplukpaa ebekeɛ, bagã talɛ nɛ̀ anɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛ akpɛ bamɛ esi nɛ Obhoshieyiɛ otugbà. Ohuisaŋgũ nɛ̀ sikãesugba azã balɛ mɛ anɔ ka nyia ka ahɔɛ gɛ beyuku nɛ̀ aɖuɖo huhuhudɔ̃. Kɛlinu banɔ dadalɛ balɛ Owusoso Akaa tikukuluɔ. 9Kɛlɛ bazhã ɔdzɛ vɔvɔ asɛ,
“Wonu anunɔ gɛ ɔshɔnɔ ɔsɛ tɛ bɔlɔkɔ eplukpa kɔ
tɛ ɔdalɛ kalɛ adadã,
Ɔmɔsɛ wɔ bebhui,
kɛlɛ wɔdzyosu nɔ, wɔlɔkɔ odzi banunɔ ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa
odenɔ egbogboɔ nyɔ̃ɔ mɛ, beluhũ, banɔdzyrameeyi nɛ̀ ɛmadi.
10Ɔbhɛtɛ alɛ sɛ tɛ bedzi ekusiupã nɛ̀ banɔlũazazã sɛ tɛ badɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔ ɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa,
kɛlɛ babàŋã ukusi nɛ esiakpa nabha.”
11Gɛ iɖi pɛ ilũ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ ihotu, ihotu gelee ozĩ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ alɛ ihotu lɔfɔ edi lɔfɔ. Bebu kɛma akana ekusiegbuɔ, bagã nɛ̀ banɔ sheshèɛ. 12Bazazhã ɔdzɛ nɛ̀ ozĩ asɛ,
“Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ beyiɛ, ɔlɛ ɔshɔnɔ ɔsɛ,
tɛ lɔyɛkɛ ohumi, ehoeyiudɔ̃, bùbuti, nɛ̀ bupu
kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití, tɛdadalɛ nɛ̀ same kpɛkpɛ!”
13Kɛlɛ ilũ idɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ ka nyia ka nɛitití nɛ̀ esiakpa, kesiakpa niesi nɛ̀ aƒu nabha, nɛ̀ kɛka nyia ka gɛlɛ alɛ mɛɛ bazazhã ɔdzɛ asɛ,
“Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ
kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití, tɛdadalɛ, ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi,
odenɔ tihɔ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ!”
14bagã talɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Amen,” kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè akpɛ bamɛ esi pɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Akaa.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 6
Content:
Badadã Tegegeneɛ
1Gɛ ilu awɔ̃ pɛ iɖiɛ, ɛmɔ Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ ɔzadalɛ badadã tegegeneɛ gɛeputɔ. Kɛlɛ ilũ bagã talɛ ɔmayɛmɛ tenikpo gɛ azaɖɔ kaɖɔ ɔmɔ asɛ subha gɛ alɛ́ɛ asɛ, “Ba!” 2Kɛlɛ tɛ mɛiɖiɛ, ɔmɔ ɛsɔ fufu teli nɛ mɛotugbà. Bɔnyɔ̃ zã anunɔ gɛ azã yɛabha ahɔɛ kɛlɛ bakɔɛ ekusikutu tili. Kɛlɛ ekoeyì nɛ̀ ɛsɔ nɔ asɛ kabha ŋaŋãelete gɛ avɛ adɛŋã abha nɛ keyutu ana.
3Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã bhalàa, ilũ gɛ agã bhalà aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” 4Kɛlɛ ɛsɔ bhlatɔ ekoeyì aba, gɛ adzã hanyã. Bakɔ anunɔ gɛ etsiɖi yɛabha ohumi asɛ tɛ ebu ishu yɔyɔ nɛ kesiakpa nabha tɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ tɛ banɔ bezeyí bagɔlɔ. Kliso balɔkɔ bɛtɛ̀ hohoe teli akpɛ yɛahɔɛ.
5Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã tramɛɛ, ilũ gɛ agã tramɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” kɛlɛ gɛ iɖiɛ, ɛmɔ ɛsɔ tutũ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ yɛazã yɛabha anyana buyintse tɔɔbha gɛ badɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɔ̀ evunɔ nɛ ahɔɛ mɛ 6Kɛlɛ izilũ ozĩ toli gɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bagã talɛɛ nɛishi loyi odenɔ pɛ baɖɔ asɛ, “Agɔ̃lɛ bɔna kayintse tienikpo tɛdɛdɛ ayɛkɛ kiwui zɛzɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛbhɛ, kɛlɛ nikpèe bɔna buyintse tɔɔta bɔyɛkɛ kiwui zɛzɛ ɛxɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa ɛbhɛ gɛinu sikã ɛhoeyi tinikpo. Kɛlɛ notizĩ bɔbɔ́ nɛ̀ wain!”
7Gɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adalɛ adadã lɛlɛ̃mɛɛ, ilũ kaɖɔ odenɔ agã lɛlɛ̃mɛ ɔkɔ ɔsɛ, “Ba!” 8Gɛ iɖiɛ ɛmɔ ɛsɔ teli gɛ azã pɔlɔ̃ɔ. Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ azã yɛabha nɛinye nu Butsí, kɛlɛ bekpuɔ azã yɛede aba kpakpa mii. Bakɔ alɛ ohumi nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ kalɛ awɔ̃pɛ lɛlɛ̃mɛ ɔsɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bɛtɛ̀, bɔbhɛ, banyã kpa nɛ̀ bagãhoeɛ nɛ kesiakpa nabhaa, tɛ beyí banunɔ.
9Gɛ adalɛ adadã trimiɛ, ɛmɔ bagɛ beyí nɛ Owusoso Akaa ibui nɛtakpu, nɛ̀ bagɛ anyana yɛibui dadalɛ mɛ evunɔ, balɛ atɔwuiɛ nɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha niesi. 10Bakpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ pɛ bebisi asɛ, “Apalete Ekusi Dadalɛ nɛ̀ kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔelete, kibe ɖuwoelu wobòkulu ebhu nɛ̀ kesiakpa abhaeleteɛ pɛ obobisi ulɔ dzyosu nɔ gɛ babàlɛ nɛibui ɔkɔ ɔlɔɔ dza?” 11Kɛlɛ balɔkɔ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo fufu akɔ balɛ mɛ anɔ nyia anɔ, kɛlɛ betseɖe alɛ asɛ, bewlui adɔfɔ̃ kɛbɔɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ beyí balɛ ɔhagbo baxɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛ̀ balɛ adzya alɛ gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ gɛ batɔɖɔ asɛ bebèyíɛ ebeke.
12Izilu awɔ̃ ɖi gɛ adalɛ adadã hlomiɛ. Kesiakpa eshuku gagalĩ. Kiwiɛ tsyina nɔ tututũ ɔmɔ asɛ ɔkpɛtɛ gɛ balɔkɔ epidzya tutũ tɛkã ɛpɔtɛ akamɛ ɔlɛ nɔ ana. Kɛlɛ woele nɔ pɔ etsyina adzã ɔmɔ asɛ dzyosu ana, 13kɛlɛ awɔ̃ɛ awɔlɛ ede ititíɛ abadɔ nɛ esiakpa asɛ kɛzã gɛ kɛzã onupɛ kɛlɛ́ gagalĩ fu pɛ kamɔtɔ̃síyuyu awɔlɛ̀ ana. 14Kititíɛ yalá ku kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛkã gɛ bakã eplukpa ewunɔ itití ana, kɛlɛ butu nɛ̀ kelĩ mɛ etukpɔ ka nyia ka agazã alɛ ɔzãkɔ.
15Kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ekusi, bekusieyi, keyuta agbagbla, ehoeyielete, ohumielete, banɔ dzidzi nɛ̀ bagɛ alɛ alɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ bebè kpũ ishu nɛ izĩ nɛ̀ aklagbuɔ galɛ butu shuɔ nɛishi. 16Bekulu etseɖe betuɔ nɛ̀ aklagbuɔ asɛ, “Nɔwɔlɛ ɔdɔ ɔlɔ abha, tɛ nokpũ ɔlɔ sɛ tɛ anunɔ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha atɛmɔ ɔlɔ tɛ Obhoshieyiɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ ɔtɛba ɔlɔ abha! 17Ɔmɔsɛ balɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ kpa ɛkpɛbe iwuiɛ na, kɛlɛ wɔafana gɛ ɔbɔlàzã ɔlɛ ulũ?”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 7
Content:
Banɔ Kɛkpã Zɛzɛ Nɛ̀ Afɛtalɛ Nɛ̀ Talɛ Gɛ Bebu Eluɔ
1Nɛ kɛlɛ niɛdeɛ, ɛmɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ talɛ gɛ bazã kitití nɛ esiakpa idekrekpu tɛlɛ nabha, gɛ badã idzo akpɛ esiakpa abha alɛɛ́ nɔ asɛ tɛ letifu afala nɛ esiakpa, aƒu alo, busi nanà abha. 2Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ gɛ ede kiwiɛ otukɔ aba, gɛ evunɔ agɛ Owusoso Akaa enunuɔ alɔkɔ etũ inye nɔ. Akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ ekulu baxɔ̃ɛdɛ talɛ gɛ bakɔ ohumi asɛ tɛ bezĩ esiakpa nɛ̀ aƒuɔ asɛ, 3“Notɛ ozĩ esiakpa alo aƒuɔ alo besiɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ bedere adadã nɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ nɛutukpe nɔ.” 4Kɛlɛ ilũ banɔ tɛkakalà mɛ nɔnɔ́ gɛ betũ inye nɛ alɛ abha gɛenu banɔ ihotu kɛkpã zɛzɛ̀ nɛ̀ afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ talɛ (144,000) gɛ bebu edenɔ Israelanɛ egbogboɔ pete mɛ.
5Banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha betũ enye akɔ odenɔ Yuda igbogboɔ mɛ,
bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha odenɔ Ruben igbogboɔ mɛ,
denɔ Gad igbogboɔ mɛɛ bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
6Aser igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Naftali igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Manase igbogbɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
7nɛ Simɔn igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Levi igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Issaka igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
8nɛ Zebulon igbogboɔ mɛɛ, bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Yosef igbogboɔ mɛɛ bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha,
nɛ Benyamin igbogboɔ mɛɛ bebu banɔ ihotu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɛɛbha.
Banɔɛza Kpekpè Tili Nɛ Bakpɛkpɛ Dzlolo Frɛrɛ Mɛ
9Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ ɛmɔ banɔɛza kpekpè tili gɛ anɔ nanà atɛ balà akalà nɛ mɛotugbà, bede ɛmadi ka nyia ka, egbogbo, banɔ edi edi nɛ̀ beluhũ ka nyia ka mɛ, pɛ balɔ itití nɛ ekusiegbuɔ nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ otugbà. Bakpɛ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo frɛrɛ, pɛ bevunɔ trɛwɔ̃a nɛ balɛ ahɔɛ mɛ. 10Bakpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ,
“Tibubu de bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ,
anunɔ gɛedzi ekusiegbu nabha,
nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ.”
11Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ pete alɔɛtití akana ekusiegbuɔ, banɔ sheshèɛ nɛ̀ bagã talɛɛ. Bakpɛ amɛ esi nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà kɛlɛ bazakpɛ kɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa, 12baɖɔ asɛ,
“Amen!
Kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití nɛ̀ ishu dadalɛ
bubuiti, ahɔɛ huhú nɛ̀inye tɛkpɛkpɛ nɛitití
ohumi nɛ̀ bupu
onu bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛ denɔ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ tihɔɔ.
Amen!”
13Kɛlɛ banɔ sheshèɛ mɛ anɔ tenikpo ebisi mɛasɛ, “Banɔ alɛ gɛ bakpɛ akpɛkpɛ fufu dzlolo alɛ pɔ, fakɔ anɛ benu kɛlɛ fakɔ bedeɛ dza?”
14Ibuiliulũ asɛ, “Apalete, wonyi.”
Kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Balɛ enu banunɔ gɛ bagã ekoeyì nɛ bɔtɔ gagalĩɛ mɛ, pɛ beplu balɛ akpɛkpɛ dzloloɔ, pɛ babhɛtɛ alɛ befuli frɛrɛrɛ nɛ Obhoshieyiɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ. 15Kliso pɛ,
balɛ Owusoso Akaa ekusiegbuɔ otugbà
pɛ badɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ nɛ yɛuvũɔ mɛ kemuze nɛ̀ elishi,
kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ edzi ekusiegbu nabha ebefe yɛpɔtɛ agba nɛ balɛ abha.
16Bɔbhɛ zaayi alɛ oɖi,
oluwɔ̃ɛ ozoyi alɛ oɖi.
Kiwi zɛbanye tã alɛ,
kɛlɛ kɛkpɛkpɛ nanà tsyɛ zakpɛ alɛ ɔtɔ.
17Ɔmɔsɛ Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ ɔlɛ ekusiegbu nabha nɛ kɛma nɛishiɛ, ɔlɛ obodzi balɛ agbagbana,
abagbana alɛ avɛnɔ ɛkpã ulĩ gɛ ikoeyi ɔmɔ asɛ Kahɔɛ ana shu.
Kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa ebetsuru ɛwɔ̃mɛ ka nyia ka nɛ balɛ amɛ.”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 8
Content:
Adadã Gegenemiɛ Nɛ̀ Kilifi Sikãesugbaa
1Gɛ adalɛ adadã gegenemiɛ, kitití udɔ̃ mɛ nyɔ̃ɔ tatɔ̃ klananá ɔvɛnɔ asɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo egulũ ana.
2Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene gɛ balɔɛtití nɛ Owusoso Akaa otugbà kɛlɛ bakɔ alɛ buxoele tugegene.
3Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ gɛ evunɔ sikã ilifi itsikpi nɔ tsyɛ aba, pɛ alɔɛtití nɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha shu. Bakɔɛ ilifi gelee sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ aplɛnɔ banɔ dadalɛ balɛ Akaa tikukulu, atɔɖɔ sikãosubha gɛ ɔlɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà nabha. 4Kilifi ɔnyɔ̃, nɛ̀ banɔ dadalɛ Akaa tikukuluɔ wu ɔvɛ Owusoso Akaa otugbà gana axɔ̃ɛdɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ. 5Axɔ̃ɛdɛ alɔkɔ kilifi itsikpi nɔ, ebu kifu nɛ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha mɛ akpɛ itsikpi nɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ awãnya ɛlɛ akpɛ kesiakpa nabha. Kɛlɛ subha lɛlɛ́, subha gugũ, subha ifu bubú nɛ̀ kesiakpa tishushukù ba ɛlɛ mɛ.
Buxoele Tugegeneɛ Tɛbɔbɔ̀
6Kɛlɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ ahɔɛ gɛ buxoele tugegeneɛ zãa, babálɛ ishu asɛ tɛ babɔ buxoele nɔ.
7Gɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛeputɔ abɔ̀ yɛexoele nɔ, amɔklagbu nɛ̀ kifu gɛ batsa nɛ̀ dzyosu ezhi abalɛ esiakpa nabha. Kɛlɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ awɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ atã pɔɛ, beesi nɛ awɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ nɛ̀ tɛwɔa wɔwɔ pete tsyɛ tãpɔɛ.
8Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhalà abɔ yɛexoele nɔ, kɛlɛ kɛdɔ̃ tili gɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ butu hohoe gɛ bɔtã ana, awãnya akpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ. Aƒuɔ yɛawɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ etsyina edzi dzyosu, 9bɔdɔ̃ gɛlɛ nɛ ɛkpã nɛ aƒuɔ mɛ awɔ̃pɛ tramɛ etsí, kɛlɛ kidzo ɛlɛ nabha kelĩabhahuɔ awɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ gɛzã ɛkɛlɛ lɛyɛ.
10Axɔ̃ɛdɛ tramɛ abɔ̀ yɛexoele nɔ, kɛlɛ kɛwɔ̃ɛ hohoe tili gɛezebu ifu asɛ ɔbía nɔ obozhi oku bulĩkekpu nɛ̀ belĩɛ gɛ bedekoeyì nɛ ɛxɔa mɛɛ, ɛlɛ ɔwɔ̃pɛ tɔɔta, 11kɛwɔ̃ɛ nɛinye nu ɔsɛ, Osì Kɛtɛtɛ́. Belĩɛ ɔwɔ̃pɛ tɔɔta tsyina dzi belĩ kɛtɛtɛ́, kɛlɛ banɔ gelee etsí ɔgana belĩ alɛ titsyitsyina mɛ.
12Axɔ̃ɛdɛ lɛlɛ̃mɛ abɔ yɛexoele nɔ gɛ kalɛ ozĩɛ odihu kiwiɛ, woele nɔ nɛ̀ awɔ̃ɛ, alɛ ɔwɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ, gɛ kɛkɔ ɔsɛ balɛ ɔwɔ̃pɛ tramɛ ɛlɛ tsyina dzi otumũ. Nɛ kiwuiɛ awɔ̃pɛ tramɛ mɛɛ kiwi nyenye gɛzã, kɛlɛ elishiɛ awɔ̃pɛ tramɛ tsyɛ otumũɔ ozodo ɔtɔɖɔ.
13Gɛ ilu awɔ̃ pɛ iɖiɛ, ilũ odi toli gɛ lozopruru ɔfala nɛ kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ pɛ lɔzɔɖɔ gagalĩi ɔsɛ, “Kɛba gagalĩ! Kɛba gagalĩ! Kɛba gagalĩ ɔkɔ wɔnɔ esiakpa abha anɛ, nɛ buxoele nɔ gɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tatá gɔgɔɛ nɔ abàbɔ nɛ idegba shu so!”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 9
Content:
1Axɔ̃ɛdɛ trimiɛ abɔ yɛexoele nɔ, kɛlɛ ɛmɔ kɛwɔ̃ɛ tili gɛ wɔlɛ de ititíɛ pɛ kɛbadɔ esiakpa nabha. Balɔkɔ ozĩ dzudzu opupuiakɔ akpɛ ahɔɛ akɔ kɛwɔ̃ɛ. 2Gɛ adalɛ ozĩ dzudzu nulũɔ, ɔnyɔ̃ dodó toli ode okoeyi ɔmɔ asɛ kifu gɛtã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ ana. Ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ odekoeyì nɛ ozĩɛ mɛɛ, ɔkɔ ɔsɛ kiwiɛ nɛ̀ kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ ku otumũ. 3Ahɔaye ekoeyì ode ɔnyɔ̃ mɛ ezhi aba kesiakpa nabha, kɛlɛ bakɔ alɛ ohumi ɔmɔ asɛ esiakpa abha katabuiadzyɔ ɔyɛ ana. 4Bagɛkɔ alɛidzo asɛ tɛ bezĩ tɛwɔa nanà, bɔdɔ̃eyi alo beesi nanà nɛ esiakpa nabha, pɔ bagɛ begitũ Owusoso Akaa ɛnyeɛ nɛ alɛ utuɔ ete. 5Bagɛ kɔ alɛ ohumi ɔsɛ tɛ beyí alɛ, pɔ sɛ tɛ bawɔa alɛ ɔnyɔnyɔ̃ nɛ bewoele teti mɛ ete. Kɛlɛ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ gɛ bamɔɔ, ɔzã asɛ ishu gɛtã anɔ onupɛ katabuiadzyɔ atá anɔ teli ana. 6Nɛ kibe ɛlɛ banɔ abaapɛ butsí asɛ tɛ betsí, pɔ batɛ bamɔ ɔlɛ, baba pɛ asɛ tɛ betsí, pɔ butsí tɛba dɛmɛ ɔkɔ alɛ.
7Ahɔaye nɔ azã ɔmɔ asɛ basɔ nɔ gɛ babálɛ alɛ àkɔ keyu tatá ana. Kɛdɔ̃ tili zã alɛ atakpuɔ ɔmɔ asɛ sikã ekusikutu bekumu ana, kɛlɛ balɛ amɛ azã ɔmɔ asɛ anɔdzyrame ayɛ ana. 8Balɛ tɛkã dzi ɔmɔ asɛ adzɛ tɛkã, kɛlɛ balɛ eneɛ eyi dzyata ayɛ. 9Bupiɛ nɛ balɛitéɛ mɛ zã asɛ ɔɖa apɛ nɛidi gɛ buyuelete atɔɖɔ kité mɛ ana, kɛlɛ ozĩɛ gɛ oyi ode balɛ ɔsɛɛ mɛɛ, oyi basɔ gelee tɛlɛlɛ̀ ozĩ, kɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ apaka ihu gɛ bege avɛnɔ keyutu. 10Balɛ itseɛ nɛ̀ kiwuɔ gɛ batà anunɔ lɛ asɛ katabuiadzyɔ ɛyɛ ana, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ alɛ itseɛ gɛ ohumi ɔkpasɛ ɛlɛ mɛ awɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ̀ banunɔ nɛ bewoele teti mɛ. 11Ekusiɛ galɛ alɛ ahɔɛ yɛenu axɔ̃ɛdɛ galɛ ozĩ dzudzu nulũ. Nɛ Hebrianɛ uluhũɔ mɛɛ, bekului asɛ Abadon, kɛlɛ nɛ Helanɛ ɔyɛ mɛ pɔɔ, bekului asɛ Apolion.
12Bɔtɔ gagalĩɛ gɛiputɔ lũ bafala, pɔ bɔtɔ gagalĩ bhlatɔ tɔɔbha lɛ gɛzɛ babá.
13Axɔ̃ɛdɛ hlomiɛ abɔ yɛexoele nɔ, kɛlɛ ilũ ozĩ oyi odenɔ asha galɛ sikãosubha gɛ ɔlɛ Owusoso Akaa namɛɛ mɛ. 14Etseɖe axɔ̃ɛdɛ hlomiɛ gɛ evunɔ kexoele nɔ asɛ, “Boele baxɔ̃ɛdɛ talɛ̃ gɛ banyã elu nɛ Frat kelĩkekpu hohoe nɔ tɔ̃ɔ.” 15Kɛlɛ beboele baxɔ̃ɛdɛ talɛ̃ gɛ babálɛ elu akɔ ɔɖatatá ɔlɛ, kiwui, woele nɛ̀ kɛgɔɔ mɛ sɛ bèyí banɔdzyrame kawɔ̃pɛ tramiɛ mɛ. 16Ilũ sɛ bagɛ azã basɔ nabha akɔ keyu tatá tɛkakalà mɛ zã ihotu edi ihotu akpã taabha.
17Bebu basɔ nɔ nɛ̀ agɛ azã alɛ abha akasɛ mɛ nɛ bɔlala mɛ anii. Balɛ itelũ ɔɖa dzã hanyãa, ɛkɔ tili kpɛ blu tutũ kɛlɛ ɛkɔ tili tsyɛ linu ɔkɔkɔbɔ. Basɔ nɔ atakpuɔ edzi ɔmɔ asɛ badzyata ayɛ, kɛlɛ kifu, ɔnyɔ̃ nɛ̀ iɖuaklagbu ekoeyì odenɔ balɛ ilugbũɔ mɛ. 18Balɔkɔ banɔ yiyíudɔ̃ tɔɔta ɛlɛ̀ gɛinu kifu, ɔnyɔ̃ nɛ̀ kifu aklagbu gɛ ezekoeyì edenɔ basɔ nɔ ilugbũɔ mɛɛ, eyí banɔdzyrameɛ tɛkaklà bɔwɔ̃pɛ tɔɔta nɔ. 19Ilugbũ nɛ̀ itseɛ mɛ ihumi nɔ zã ɔkɔ basɔ̃nɔ. Balɛ itseɛ zã ɔmɔ asɛ beblidzya, kɛlɛ atakpu nɛidi gɛzã alɛ ahɔɛ, bazalɔkɔ akpɛ ebi nɛ banɔdzyrameɛ shu nɔ.
20Banunɔ gɛ agɔ̃, pɛ banɔ yiyíudɔ̃ ɔlɛ giyí alɛ tsyɛ elo, begitsyina nɛ balɛ ahɔɛ ɔdɔ̃ bhɛbhɛtɛ niede. Bagɛ yɔlɔ ɛtakpu esi ukpɛ ɔkɔ ɛfɔfuĩa kpa, nɛ̀ ibudi gɛ balɔkɔ sikã, sikã fufu, ɔɖa dzadzã, aklagbu nɛ̀ isí abhɛtɛ nɔ—ibudiɛ gɛ lɛtɛlà mɔ̃ nɛ̀ awuhũ, alo lilũ, alo lɛgã. 21Begitsyina etú mɛ nɛ banɔ yiyí niede, alo ihui yɛyɛkɛ ebui, ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ alo tizuzru mɛ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 10
Content:
Axɔ̃ɛdɛ Nɛ̀ Keplukpa Bhlui Nɔ
1Ɛzɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ohumielete bhlatɔ gɛ ede ititíɛ ezezhi. Balɔkɔ ɔmɔlɔ̃ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo akpɛ akɔɛ, kɛlɛ enegè eyi akanà yɛtakpuɔ, yɛamɛ mɛ̀ azã asɛ kiwi, kɛlɛ yɛtɛtsɛɖɛ zã ɔmɔ asɛ kifu gɛtã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ. 2Evunɔ eplukpa bhlui tieli gɛ kadalɛ edzi nɛ yɛahɔɛ mɛ. Edzu yɛŋã ɔtsɛɖɛ nɛ aƒu nabha, kɛlɛ kɛblɛkpɛ ɔyɛ nɛ esiakpa, 3kɛlɛ akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ ɔmɔ asɛ dzyata ɔyɛ kpɛkpɛ ana. Gɛ akpɛ ozĩɛ, subha lɛlɛ̀ tegegeneɛ aɖɔaɖɔ. 4Kɛlɛ gɛ subha lɛlɛ̀ tegegeneɛ aɖɔaɖɔɔ, ɛpɛ sɛ tɛ mɛfɔnɔ alɛ lu, pɔ ilũ kaɖɔ odenɔ ititíɛ ɔsɛ, “Dere kɛgɛ subha lɛlɛ̀ tegegeneɛ aɖɔɔ, pɔ tɛfɔnɔ kɛlɛ olu.”
5Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ ɛmɔ yɛalɔɛtití nɛ aƒuɔ nɛ̀ kesiakpa nabhaa, ebu yɛŋã ɔhɔɛ akpɛ ititíɛ. 6Kɛlɛ atanà anunɔ gɛ alɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpã tihɔɔ, pɛ yɛabhɛtɛ itití nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ gɛlɛ ɛkɛlɛ́, nɛ̀ kesiakpa nɛ̀ alɛ mɛ ɔdɔ̃, aƒu nɛ̀ yɛmɛ ɔdɔ̃, aɖɔ asɛ, “Kɛzɛbadze kura! 7Pɔ nɛ kiwui nabha gɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gegenemiɛ ababɔ yɛexoele nɔɔ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa ebui kpukpũɔ nyɔ̃ɔ ababá alɛ mɛ, asɛ kɛɖɔ gɛ aɖɔ etseɖe yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛenu ebuiɖɔluanɛ.”
8Kɛlɛ kaɖɔ gɛ itilũ odenɔ ititíɛ bafalanɔ zɛetseɖe mɛasɛ, “Gavɛ, tɛ ɔyɛkɛ eplukpa gɛ adalɛ edzi nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ eli itití nɛ aƒuɔ nɛ̀ esiakpa nabha ahɔɛ.”
9Kliso ɛvɛ̀ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ɔkɔ sɛ alɔkɔ eplukpa bhlui nɔ akɔ mɛ. Etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Yɛkɛ tɛ ɔtã alɛ. Kabazã nyagbãnyagba nɛ wɔya mɛ, wɔolugbũɔ mɛ pɔɔ, kabazã dzyɛdzyɛɛdzyɛ ɔmɔ asɛ betsí ana.” 10Ɛyɛkɛ keplukpa bhlui nɔ nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ahɔɛ kɛlɛ ɛtã alɛ. Kamɔ ɔdzyɛ nɛ mɛolugbũɔ mɛ asɛ betsí. Pɔ gɛ ɛtã alɛ bekeɛ, kazã nyagbãnyagba nɛ mɛ ɛyamɛ. 11Kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Kɛlɛ sɛ owlui ɔdɛɖɔ ibui olu nɛ banɔ, amadi, beluhũ nɛ̀ bekusi gelee shu.”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 11
Content:
Kibui Mɛadadalɛelete Taabha Teli
1Balɔkɔ kishi gɛ bedzyidzyi udɔ̃ nɔ̀ pɛ kɛlɛ ɔmɔ asɛ kɛgbɛ̃ ishi nɔ akɔ mɛ kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Vɛ tɛ odi dzyidzyi Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubhaa, tɛ ɔkalà banunɔ gɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 2Pɔ etseɖe mɛasɛ iti dzyidzyi kevude ɔkɔ, ɔmɔsɛ batɛ lɔkɔ ɛkɛlɛ akɔ bagɛ etinu Yudanɛ. Kɛlɛ nɛ bewoele afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ taabha mɛɛ, bebètũ ɛtsɛɖɛ nɛ ɔma dadalɛ ɔlɛ nabha. 3Ɛbakɔ mɛibui mɛadadalɛelete taabhaa ohumi tɛ baɖɔ ebui elu nɛ ewui ohotu zɛzɛ̃, akpã taabha nɛ̀ afɛtehlo (1,260) mɛ, gɛ akpanyã apɔtɛ mɛ babàzã.” 4Balɛ enu bɔbɔ̀ isí tɛɛbhaa nɛ̀ ifu isíi tɛɛbhaa gɛzã kesiakpa Apalete namɛɛ. 5Onupɛ anɔ teli apɛ asɛ tɛ awɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ alɛɛ, kifu koeyi odenɔ alɛ ilugbũɔ mɛ pɛ kɛpɔɛ bagɛ batɛ dɛmɛ nɛ̀ alɛ. Kidzo ɛlɛ nabha anunɔ gɛ apɛ asɛ awɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ̀ alɛɛ ebetsì. 6Ohumi ɔlɛ balɛ ahɔɛ, sɛ tɛ badã kititíɛ akpɛ subha dɔdɔ nɛ kibeɛ gɛ baaɖɔ ebui eluɔ, kɛlɛ nɛ ohumi ɔlɛ nulũɔ, balà bhɛtɛ bulĩ butsyina dzi dzyosu, kɛlɛ bakɔ banyã kpa ka nyia ka idi azaba esiakpa nabha, asɛ kɛpɛ gɛ bapɛ. 7Onupɛ badalɛ alɛ ebuiɛ mɛ ebekeɛ, agãhoeɛ gɛ ekoeyì ede ozĩ dzudzuɔ mɛɛ, aba bágɔ̃lɛ nɛ̀ alɛ, gɛ aŋã alɛ abha, kɛlɛ eyí alɛ. 8Balɛ etsitsíɛ abawɔ tipɔ nabha nɛ ɔma gbagbla ɔlɛ gɛ bekulu ɔlɛ inye nɛ sahɔ̃ɛ aɖɔ mɛ asɛ, Sodom alo Egipte, nɛ̀ ɛkɛlɛ tsyɛ gɛ bakpala balɛ Apaleteɛ nɛ butsí osí shuɔ. 9Nɛ ewui tata nɛ̀ apɛ mɛɛ, banɔ bebède ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ, egbogbo, beluhũ nɛ̀ amadi ababá ebeɖi banɔ tsitsíɛ, pɔ batɛ bakɔ ɛdzo asɛ tɛ bavɔbɔ alɛ. 10Kanɔ mɛ anɛ pete abamɔ same, aŋã iwui nɛ banɔ taabha alɛ utsíɛ shu, kɛlɛ bebebu alɛ same mɔmɔ akasɛ ɔgana bɔdɔ̃ kɔkɔ́ bagɔlɔ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ taabha alɛ awɔa ɔfɔ̃ nɛ bagɛ alɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛɛ, shu fanɔ.
11Pɔ nɛ ewui tata nɛ̀ apɛ niedeɛ, Owusoso Akaa akɔ yɛɔfɔfuĩa nɔ oboku alɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ bamɛ ɛkpã alɔ. Kɛlɛ kifu dɛ bagɛ amɔ kɛgɛ ba ɛlɛ mɛɛ. 12Kɛlɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ taabha belũ ozĩ gagalĩ odenɔ ititíɛ ɔsɛ, “Nowu ɔba ɛkɛlɛ.” Kɛlɛ bewu avɛ ititíɛ nɛ ɔmɔlɔ̃ mɛ, nɛ kibeɛ gɛ bagɛ atɛ adɛmɛ nɛ alɛ ezeɖi alɛ asɛsɛ.
13Nɛ ɔɖa tatá ɔlɛ tututu mɛɛ, kesiakpa eshuku gagalĩ kɛlɛ ɔma ɔlɛ awɔ̃pɛ lɔfɔmiɛ ɔyɛ obho. Banɔ ihotu tigegene etsí nɛ esiakpaa tishushukùɔ mɛ. Kifu dɛ bagɛ azã nɛ ɛkpãa, kɛlɛ bakpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití.
14Bɔtɔ bhalà gagalĩ ɛlɛ bafala, pɔ bɔtramɛ babà gulũi.
Kexoele Gegenemiɛ Tɛbɔbɔ̀
15Axɔ̃ɛdɛ gegenemiɛ abɔ yɛexoele nɔ, kɛlɛ izĩ kpɛkpɛ gagalĩ yi nɛititíɛ ɔsɛ,
“Kanɔ mɛ ukusi ŋaŋãa tsyina dzi bɔlɔ Apaleteɛ, nɛ̀ yɛ Kristo ɔyɛ,
kɛlɛ yɛabaŋã ukusiɛ ovɛnɔ tihɔ, tihɔ.”
16Kɛlɛ banɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛ̃ gɛ bazã ekusiugbu nabha nɛ Owusoso Akaa otugbà ezhi ekumu, pɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa, 17Pɛ bazaɖɔ asɛ,
“Buhu wɔahɔɛ Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumielete,
anunɔ gɛ alɛ pɛ atɛzã eɖi,
ɔmɔsɛ ɔlɔkɔ wɔohumi gbagbla
ɔkpɛ wɔkusi ŋaŋã niesi nɔ.
18ɛmadiɛ kpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ,
kɛlɛ wɔmɔpɔɛ nɔ ɔba.
Kebhu kukulu ɔkɔ banɔ tsitsí nɛibe na,
kɛlɛ kɛbhɛ buiabe na ɔkɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ benu ebuiɖɔluanɛ
nɛ̀ wɔanunɔ dadalɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ elũ atɔ̃ akɔ wɔɛinyeɛ,
bunuvɔɛ nɛ̀ besheshè-
kɛlɛ kibe na sɛ tɛ beyí banunɔ gɛ bezĩ esiakpa.”
19Badalɛ Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɛititíɛ, kɛlɛ nɛ yɛuvũɔ mɛɛ, bamɔ yɛolugbũ nyanyã aɖaka nɔ. Kɛba ɛlɛ mɛɔsɛ, subhaɛfu ziboele, ɛkɛlɛ ozogũ kɛlɛ subha azalɛ́ɛ, kɛlɛ kesiakpa ezeshuku pɛ amɔklagbu hohoe azadɔ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 12
Content:
Adzɛ Nɛ̀ Kɛtsɔpɛ Hohoeɛ
1Kibui hohoe nɛ̀ kɛgɛ̀ bhɛtɛ ibiɛ tili bu ishu kasɛ nɛ kititíɛ. Adzɛ teli alɔkɔ kiwiɛ akpɛ asɛ akpɛkpɛ, woele nɔ azã yɛtsɛɖɛ niesi kɛlɛ ekumu ekusikutuɔ gɛ awɔ̃ɛ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha azã kɛlɛ ishuɔ. 2Adzɛ emunɔ ɛya, kɛlɛ azakpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ gɛ ɛya zɛtãɛ pɛ avɛ ɔmɔkɔɔ. 3Kɛdɔ̃ bhlatɔ tsyɛ zibu ishu kasɛ nɛititíɛ. Kɛtsɔpɛ dzadzã hohoe tili gɛ kɛtá atakpu tegegene pɛ kidzu asha lɔfɔɔ, kumu bekusi ekutu tegegene nɛ atakpuɔ. 4Kɛlɛ otse hohoeɛ xoele awɔ̃ɛ nɛawɔ̃pɛ tramɛ afalanɔ nɛ ititíɛ atsɛ akpɛ esiakpa. Kɛtsɔpɛ lɔɛtití nɛ adzɛ gɛ azã kamɔ̃tuɔ otugbà sɛ tɛ tsĩɔ ɔlɛ gɛ amɔ̃ eyiɛ koɔ tɛ alɔkɔɛ amɛnɔ. 5Adzɛ amɔ̃ eyianyɛ. Yɛenu anunɔ gɛ abalɔkɔ ɔɖaɛshi agbana ɛmadiɛ pete nɔ. Kɛlɛ babhɛ eyiɛ nɛ adzɛ ahɔɛ ewunɔ avɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ eyiɛ ekusiegbuɔ shu. 6Adzɛ ebu tɛtsɛɖɛ mɛ avɛ oxui, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa abálɛ elu akɔɛ, kɛlɛ beɖi yɛabha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ, nɛ ewui ohotu zɛzɛ̀, akpã taabha nɛ̀ tehlo mɛ (1,260).
7Bakpa keyu tá nɛititíɛ. Mixael nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ alɔkɔ eyu nɛ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ shu, kɛlɛ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ abatsyɔa nɛ̀ alɛ ɔkɔ keyuɔ tɛtatá. 8Pɔ ohumi ɔgɛzã kɛtsɔpɛ nɛ̀ kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ahɔɛ, kliso balɛ ɔzãkɔ ɔyala nɛititíɛ. 9Balɔkɔ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ awɔanyã akpɛ esiakpa, eblidzya alɛ gɛ bekulu asɛ Abosam alo Satana pɛ agbana kanɔ nɔ̀ pete aganà kidzo kpa abhaa, balɔkɔ yɛ nɛ̀ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ awɔanyã akpɛ esiakpa.
10Kɛlɛ ilũ ozĩ gagalĩ loyi odenɔ kititíɛ ɔsɛ,
“Otsi alɛ bɔlɔ tibubu, ohumi nɛ̀ ɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa ukusi ŋaŋã ba,
nɛ̀ yɛ Kristo ukusi ŋaŋã.
ɔmɔsɛ anunɔ gɛ ebhui ɔlɔ adzya alɛ nulũɔ,
anunɔ gɛ ebhui alɛ ulũ nɛ Owusoso Akaa na mɛ elishi nɛ̀ emuzeɛ,
bawɔanyã yɛakpɛ esiakpa.
11Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ aŋã kɛtsɔpɛ nabha
ɔgana Obhoshieyiɛ dzyosu nɔ mɛ
nɛ̀ yɛibui gbangbã tɛdadalɛ mɛ,
bagɛ adɛmɛ nɔ nɛ̀ balɛ ɛkpã adɛ
pɛ besì butsí ifu.
12Kliso wɔnɔ ititíeleteɛ nɔmɔ same
nɛ̀ wɔnɔ agɛ ɔlɛ alɛ mɛɛ!
Pɔ kɛba gagalĩ ɔkɔ kesiakpa nɛ̀ aƒuɔ,
ɔmɔsɛ Abosam ezhi aba ɔnɔ ɔkɔ!
Ɔmɔpɔɛ nyɔ̃ɔ ɔlɔ ɔkpasɛ yɛmɛ,
ɔmɔsɛ enyi asɛ yɛibe ɛlɛ gulũi.”
13Gɛ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ mɔ ɔsɛ balɔkɔ yɛ atɛ akpɛ kesiakpaa soɔ, atɔ̃nɔ adzɛ gɛ amɔ eyianyɛ niede. 14Balɔkɔ bɔsɛ gbagbla tɔɔbha gɛ buyi odi ɔyɛ nɛidiɛ akɔɛ asɛ tɛ alɔkɔ epruru avɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ babálɛ elu akɔɛ nɛ oxuiɛ, sɛ tɛ beɖi yɛabha nɛ ɛkɛlɛ nɛ agɔ tata nɛ̀ kapɛ mɛ. Kɛbakɔ ɔsɛ kɛtsɔpɛ tɛbamɔ adzɛ. 15Kɛlɛ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ pí bulĩ odenɔ olugbũɔ mɛ asɛ kelĩkekpu ana sɛ tɛ bulĩɛ bhui adzɛ nulũ tɛ buvũi. 16Pɔ kesiakpa ebhui adzɛ ebu. Kesiakpa yaka olugbũ mɛ, pɛ kamɛnɔ̀ bulĩɛ gɛ kɛtsɔpɛ pí sɛsɛ̀. 17Kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ kpɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ nyagã nɛ adzɛ shu, kɛlɛ kikoeyi vɛ sɛ dɛtá eyu nɛ̀ adzɛ yɛeyi alɛ gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ-gɛ abhɛtɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔsha nabha pɛ banyana ebui dadalɛ mɛ nɛ Yesu shu evunɔɔ. 18Kɛlɛ kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ lɔɛtití nɛ aƒu nɔ ɔtɔ̃.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 13
Content:
1Kɛlɛ agãhoeɛ alɔɛtití nɛ aƒu nɔtɔ̃.
Agãhoe Edekoeyì Nɛ aƒuɔ Mɛ
Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ agãhoe teli gɛ edekoeyì nɛ aƒuɔ mɛ. Edzu ashà lɔfɔ, atakpu tegegene alii kɛlɛ ekusikutu itsiɖi kɔsha ka nyia ka abha. Bafɔnɔ kibusoinye nɛ kɛtakpuɔ ka nyia ka shu. 2Agãhoeɛ gɛ ɛmɔ̃ eyì awɔɛkɔ, pɔ yɛtsɛɖɛ xɔ̃nɔ zã asɛ agudu ɛyɛ, kɛlɛ olugbũɔ oyi dzyata ɔyɛ. Kɛtsɔpɛ hohoeɛ shɛnɛ ahɔɛ nɛ yɛohumi, ekusiegbuɔ nɛ̀ bukusi ŋaŋãa shu akɔ agahoeɛ. 3Nɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɖiɖi ulũɔ, agãhoe alɛ atɛ nyã kɛpɔ̃ hohoe tili nɛ yɛtakpuɔ tinikpo eɖi, flogo pɛ kibe ɛlɛ babá. Kɛbhɛtɛ kanɔ mɛ anɛ pete ibi, kɛlɛ bazã agahoeɛ niede. 4Banɔ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ kɛtsɔpɛ, ɔmɔsɛ kɛlɔkɔ ɛlɛ ukusi ŋaŋã akɔ agãhoeɛ. Bazakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoeɛ pɛ bezebisi asɛ, “Afana gɛ alɛ asɛ agãhoe alɛ dza? Afana gɛ abalà ata keyu nɛ̀ yɛ dza?
5Bebuidzo akɔ agãhoeɛ asɛ tɛ aɖɔ ishu fefeke nɛ̀ ebusoebui, kɛlɛ tɛ aŋã bukusi nɛ bewoele afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ taabha mɛ. 6Azaɖɔaɖɔ akɔalà Owusoso Akaa, etuturu yɛinyeɛ nɛ̀ yɛɔzãkɔ, nɛ̀ banunɔ gɛ alɛ ititíɛ. 7Bakɔɛ ohumi sɛ tɛ alɔkɔ keyu nɛ banɔ dadalɛ shu, tɛ eté alɛ. Kɛlɛ ayɛkɛ bukusi ŋaŋã ohumi nɛ egbogbo, banɔ, beluhũ nɛ̀ ɛmadi ka nyia ka ahɔɛ. 8Kesiakpa abha anɛ pete abakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoeɛ, bagɛ alɛ enye bagɛ fɔnɔ akpɛ ɛkpã eplukpa gɛenu Obhoshieyiɛ gɛ beyiɛ ayɛ mɛ, denɔ kanɔ mɛ esi kpɛkpɛ mɛ.
9Anunɔ gɛ batɔ̃ alɛ yɛahɔɛ, tɛ elũ.
10Onupɛ kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ anɔ teli azã anɔ esiɛ,
anɔ esi yɛbavɛ adɛzã.
Onupɛ kɛlɛ sɛ bɛtɛ̀ balɔkɔ tɛ beyí anɔ teli nɔɔ,
bɛtɛ̀ babàlɔkɔ eyí nɔ.
Baɖɔ kɛlɛ ana, sɛ tɛ bagɛ badalɛ balɛishuɔ tɛ baadɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ̀ kemi kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ tɛyɛyɛkɛŋã mɛ.
Agãhoe Ekoeyì Ede Kesiakpa Mɛ
11Kɛlɛ ɛzɛmɔ agãhoe bhlatɔ gɛ ekoeyì ede kesiakpa mɛ. Edzu asha taabha asɛ obhoshieyi, pɔ azaɖɔaɖɔ gɛ keyì kɛtsɔpɛ ayɛ. 12Awɔa ohumi nɔ gɛ ɔzã agãhoe gɛ eputɔ shu axɔ̃ɛ, nɛ yɛinye mɛ. Akɔ asɛ kesiakpa nɛ̀ kalɛ mɛ anunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoe gɛeputɔ gɛ kɛpɔ̃bi zã yɛishuɔ. 13Agã alɛ abhɛtɛ ohumi nɛ̀ atsyindzye ebui akasɛ, gɛ alà ekulu kifu edenɔ kititíɛ ɔmana kesiakpa gɛ banɔ bazamɔ. 14Nɛ bɔdɔ̃ bubú kasɛ ɛlɛ shu soɔ bakɔɛ ohumi sɛ tɛ azawɔa axɔ̃ɛ nɛ agãhoeɛ gɛeputɔ nɛinye mɛ, kɛlɛ azawɔɛ banunɔ nɛ esiakpa nabha. Akɔ balɛ ɔsha asɛ bafatɛ osí nɛ agãhoe gɛ beté nɛ̀ bɛtɛ̀ pɛ akalɛ nɛ̀ ɛkpãa, yɛtɛzazã mɛ. 15Bakɔɛ ohumi asɛ tɛ akɔ agãhoeɛ gɛeputɔ yɛafafatɛ ɔfɔfuĩa sɛ tɛ aɖɔaɖɔ, tɛ akɔ asɛ anunɔ gɛ agɛ dɛmɛ asɛ tɛ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ afafatɛɛ, tɛ beyìi. 16Kidzi ɔsha nyanyã ɔsɛ, anuvɔ nɛ̀ esheshè, ehoeyielete nɛ̀ etsyuitsyui, anɔ gɛ alɛ yɛishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ̀ anɔ dzidzì, sɛ tɛ batsa ɛná akɔɛ nɛ kɛŋã ɔhɔɛ alo nɛ ketuɔ, 17sɛ tɛ anɔ nanà atɛmɔ ɛdzo edzi alo adɛ kɛdɔ̃ nanà, onupɛ agɛtsa ɛná gɛinu agãhoe nɛinye alo kɛlɛ tɛkakalàa mɛ.
18Kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ bubutì agã ibui ɛlɛ mɛ nɔ. Anunɔ gɛelũ ebui esiɛ, tɛ avɛ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ aná alɛ tɛkakalà shu eɖi, gɛ anɔ teli udɔ̃ kakalà ete bunu. Yɛanà tsatsà tɛkakalà mɛ lɛ akpã tehlo, afɛtehlo nɛ̀ tehlo (666).

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 14
Content:
Obhoshieyiɛ Nɛ̀ Banɔ Ihotu Ikpã Zɛzɛ̃ Nɛ̀ Afɛtalɛ Nɛ̀ Talɛ
1Izilu awɔ̃ ɖi kɛlɛ ɛmɔ obhoshieyiɛ gɛ ɔzã ititíɛ nɛ Zion Butu nabha, nɛ banɔ ohotu ikpã zɛzɛ̃ nɛ̀ afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ talɛ, bagɛ alɛ utúɔ bafɔnɔ yɛ nɛ̀ Yɛakaa nɛinye atɔɖɔɔ nɛishi. 2Kɛlɛ ilũ kaɖɔ odenɔ ititíɛ ɔmɔ asɛ bulĩ gɛɛtsɛ̀ gagalĩ, nɛ̀ asɛ subha tɛlɛlɛ̀ɛ ana. Kɛlɛ ozĩɛ gɛ izilũɔ oyi asɛ ihui asangũelete gɛ bebho balɛ asangũ ana. 3Kɛlɛ bazhã ɔdzɛ̃ vɔvɔ nɛ ekusiegbuɔ, bagã talɛ nɛ̀ banɔ sheshèɛ otugbà. Anɔ nanà agɛlà akpasɛ ɔdzɛ̃ ɔdɛ banɔ ohotu ikpã zɛzɛ̃ nɛ̀ afɛtalɛ nɛ̀ talɛ ete ko, gɛ balɛ enu bagɛ bebhui ebu nɛ esiakpa nabha. 4Balɛ enu anɔ gɛ bagɛ dɛ badzɛ̃ shu eɖi, kɛlɛ bazã ishu dadalɛ mɛ. Bazã Obhoshieyi niede avɛ ɔkɔ nyia ɔkɔ gɛ avɛɛ. Bedzi alɛ edenɔ banɔ gelee ishi, kɛlɛ balɔkɔ alɛ akɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ, ɔmɔ asɛ busieyuyu gɛ bapɔ eputɔ ana. 5Asɛnɛ ɛbui agɛzã balɛ olugbũ mɛ oɖi, kɛlɛ bamɛ tsitsí ibui nanà tsyɛ ma balɛishu.
Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ Tatá Teli
6Ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ teli gɛ ezepruru afala nɛ kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ gɛ evunɔ Kibui Gbangbã gɛbazã tihɔɔ sɛ tɛ adɛɖɔ etseɖe esiakpa abhanɛ kɛmadi ka nyia ka, egbogbo, beluhũ nɛ̀ banunɔ pete. 7Akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ, “Nosì Owusoso Akaa nɛifu, tɛ nɔkɔɛ ishu dadalɛ, ɔmɔsɛ yɛebhu kukulu ibeɛ na ɛkɛlɛ́. Nɔkpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ yɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ itití, kesiakpa, aƒu nɛ̀ belĩɛ gɛ bepí edekoeyì nɛ ɛxɔa nɛishiɛ.”
8Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhalà tsyɛ azaba, kɛlɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ayɛmɔo! Babilonia Gbagbla ayɛ mɔo. Yɛ gɛ akɔ ɛmadi bazabhɛtɛ ɔmamɛdɛdɛ ebui, ɔmɔ asɛ kibuku gɛ bunu buku anɔ ana.”
9Axɔ̃ɛdɛ tramɛ tsyɛ azaba nɛ taabha alɛ niede kɛlɛ akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ, “Onupɛ anɔ teli akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoeɛ nɛ̀ yɛtɛzazã mɛ fafatɛɛ pɛ atsà yɛná nɛ ketúɔ alo nɛ ɔhɔɛɛ, 10anɔ alɛ tsyɛ abawɔ̃ɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ wain gɛ bakɔ akpɛ nɛ̀ ohumi pɛ keyi pɔɛ nɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ mɛ. Babàwɔa anɔ alɛ ɔnyɔnyɔ̃ nɛ kifu aklagbuɔ, nɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ dadalɛ nɛ̀ Obhoshieyi namɛ. 11Kɛlɛ ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ obokoeyi ode balɛ bɔtɔ ɔmɔ ɔkɔɔ, lɔbɔ vɛ abha ana tihɔ, tihɔ. Elishi nɛ̀ kemuzeɛ, timoemoele tɛbazã ɔkɔ bagɛ akpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoe nɛ̀ yɛtɛzazã mɛ fafatɛ alo anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ agãhoe nɛná nɛ̀ yɛinye lɛ yɛishuɔ. 12Kɛlɛ sɛ tɛ bagɛ balɛishu badalɛ, pɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔsha nabha, pɛ begi tsodzi nɛ Yesu edeɛ, tɛbadɔ fɔ̃ɔ nɛ kemi kpɛkpɛ mɛ.
13Kɛlɛ ilũ ozĩ loyi odenɔ ititíɛ ɔsɛ, “Fɔnɔ ɔsɛ, beyula bagɛ bazã Apaleteɛ mɛ flogo pɛ betsíɛ, denɛ otsiɛ ɔvɛnɔ.”
Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ ɔɖɔ ɔsɛ, “Ee, bebèmoelɛ odenɔ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ balɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa abazã alɛ ede avɛ.”
Kesiakpa Abha Bɔdɔ̃ Pɔpɔ̃
14Kɛlɛ ilu awɔ̃ iɖi kɛlɛ ɛmɔ ɔmɔlɔ̃ fufu toli, kɛlɛ anɔ teli azã ɔlɛ abha “asɛ anɔdzyrame yɛeyi ana” gɛ ekumu sikã ekusikutu kɛlɛ ɛhɛakpa gɛ bapɔɛ amɔ nɔ azã yɛahɔɛ. 15Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ tsyɛ ezekoeyì ede owusoso akaavũɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ akpɛ ozĩ agagalĩ ekulu anunɔ gɛ etsiɖi ɔmɔlɔ̃ nabha asɛ “Lɔkɔ wɔhɛakpa, tɛ ɔpɔɛ bɔdɔ̃, ɔmɔsɛ kibe na ɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ tɛpɔpɔ̃ nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɖaɖa nɛ esiakpa nabha shè. 16Kliso anunɔ gɛ azã ɔmɔlɔ̃ nabha awɔa yɛhɛakpa shu axɔ̃ɛ akana afala nɔ nɛ esiakpa nabha, kɛlɛ apɔ̃ kesiakpa abha ɔdɔ̃ eyuyuɔ.
17Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ ezekoeyì ede owusoso akaavũɔ mɛ nɛititíɛ kɛlɛ ɛhɛakpa ŋaŋã teli azã yɛtsyɛ ahɔɛ. 18Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ gɛ bakɔɛ ohumi nɛ kifu abha tsyɛ ekoeyì ede bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha shu, kɛlɛ akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ etseɖe axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ evũ nɔ ɛhɛakpa asɛ, “Lɔkɔ wɔhɛakpa ŋaŋãa tɛ ɔpɔ̃ wain asa nɛ wain aya mɛ nɛ esiakpa, ɔmɔsɛ wain eshè akɔ tɛpɔpɔ̃.” 19Axɔ̃ɛdɛ awɔ̃anya yɛhɛakpa afalanɔ nɛ kesi nabha, eshogò yɛɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ pɛ abalɛ bɔlɛ akpɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔmɔpɔɛ wain izitɔ mɛ. 20Bezhi eku izitɔ mɛ pɛ betũ ɛtsɛɖɛ nɛ wain nabha nɛ ɔma nɛakãdeɛ kɛlɛ dzosu akpɛ ekoeyì ede kizĩɛ mɛ. Dzyosu nɔ mɛ edzu ɔmɔ asɛ bɔtsɛɖɛkpɔ tuti, kɛlɛ akpɛ avɛ asɛ ɛtsɛkɔ ɛkpã zɛzɛ̃ nɛ̀ afɛtasɛ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 15
Content:
Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ Tegegene Nɛ̀ Bɔtɔ Ebui Tegegeneɛ
1Ɛmɔ ibui hohoe bhlatɔ tili nɛititíɛ gɛ kɛbhɛtɛ ibi popopo. Ɛmɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene gɛ bevunɔ utɔ ebui tegegene gɔgɔɛ nɔ, lenu bɔtɔ ebui gɔgɔɛ, ɔmɔsɛ alɛ bu Owusoso Akaa yɛɔmɔpɔɛ gɔgɔɛ nɔ ɔkasɛ. 2Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ aƒu teli idi gɛ alɛ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ ana gɛ kifu kpasɛ yɛmɛ kɛlɛ ɛmɔ bagɛ aŋã agãhoeɛ, yɛafafatɛ nɛ̀ yɛinye nabha, alɔɛtití nɛ aƒu nɔtɔ̃ nɛ̀ bagɛ aŋã yɛenye nabha. Basangũ gɛ Owusoso Akaa akɔ alɛ azã alɛ ahɔɛ 3kɛlɛ bazazhã Owusoso Akaa axɔ̃ɛdɛ Mose nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ ɔdzɛ asɛ,
“Wɔebui bhɛbhɛtɛ egbogblo kɛlɛ labhɛtɛ ibi,
Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumielete
wɔebuiɛ alɛ àlɛ ɔzãkɔ kɛlɛ wɔedzoɔ enu ebui gbã,
Wonu Ekusi galɛ odenɔ kuku ibe.
4O Apalete, afana gɛ etibesi wɔɛfu,
pɛ atɛ badalɛ wɔɛnyeɛ shu?
Ɔmɔsɛ wɔ ete wonu anɔ dadalɛ.
Ɛmadiɛ pete ababá
abakpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ wɔotugbà,
ɔmɔsɛ bebu wɔebui gbangbã tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ akasɛ.”
5Kidegba ilu awɔ̃ ɖi kɛlɛ ɛmɔ akaavũɔ nɛititíɛ gɛ bunu Trɛwɔɛagbaa mɛ gɛ baɖɔ Kibui Dadalɛ nɛ alɛ mɛɛ, kadalɛ azã. 6Denɔ akaavũɔ mɛɛ, baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ nɛ̀ bɔtɔ ebui tegegeneɛ ekoeyì aba. Bazã bɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ gɛ bɔlɛishu dalɛ pɛ buzitsé ŋelĩŋelĩɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ batsà sikã ɛpɔtɛ ɛwɔ̃ atɔɖɔ nɛ kitéɛ mɛ. 7Kɛlɛ bagã talɛ ɔmayɛmɛ tenikpo alɔkɔ sikã buyintse tugegeneɛ mɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa gɛ alɛ nɛkpã tihɔɔ tihɔɔ ɔmɔpɔɛ oyukuɔ, akɔ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ. 8Ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ ode okoeyi nɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdadalɛ ohumi nɔ mɛɛ oyuku akaavũɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ anɔ nanà aga là ɔlɛ mɛ etsoku eɖi, ɔlɔkɔ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene bɔtɔ ebui tegegeneɛ aba alɛ mɛ ebeke.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 16
Content:
Owusoso Akaa Ɔmɔpɔɛ Buyintse Tugegeneɛ
1Izilũ ozĩ gagalĩ toli odenɔ akaavũɔ mɛ lozo otseɖe baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegeneɛ asɛ, “Nokoeyi ɔvɛ oditsyina Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ buyintse tugegeneɛ ɔbalɛ esiakpa nabha.”
2Axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ eputɔ avɛ adɛ balɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ nɛ esiakpa nabha kɛlɛ bagɛ batsà agã yɛná pɛ bazakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ yɛ tɛzazã afafatɛɛ, badɔ ebi kpa teli idi nɛ̀ apɔ̃ zizĩ.
3Axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhalà avɛ adɛ balɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ akpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ etsyina edzi dzyosu ɔmɔ asɛ anɔ tsitsí ayɛ ana, kɛlɛ ɛkpã ɛdɔ̃ ka nyia ka nɛ aƒuɔ mɛ tsí.
4Axɔ̃ɛdɛ tramɛ abalɛ̀ yɛayintse nɔ akpɛ bulĩkekpuɔ nɛ̀ belĩɛ gɛ ekoeyì edenɔ ɛxɔɛishiɛ mɛ kɛlɛ betsyina edzi dzyosu. 5Kɛlɛ ilũ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ ezeɖi belĩ nabha yɛaɖɔ asɛ,
“Obhui ebui mɛ piapii nɛ wɔbhu kukulu ulɛ mɛ,
wɔ gɛ ɔlɛ pɛ ɔtɛzã oɖi, pɛ onu Anɔ Dadalɛɛ,
ɔmɔsɛ wɔebhu kukluɔ alɛ kàlɛ ɔzãkɔ,
6ɔmɔsɛ balɛ eyí wɔanɔ dadalɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɛ,
kɛlɛ wɔkɔ alɛ dzyosu ɔsɛ tɛ bawɔ̃ɛ asɛ gɛ kɛshɔ̃ nɔ kɔ alɛ.”
7Kɛlɛ ilũ kaɖɔ odenɔ bɔdɔ̃ pɔpɔɛ osubha mɛ ɔsɛ,
“Kɛgbã Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumielete,
kɛgbã wɔ bubhu kukuluɔ mɛ dalɛ.”
8Axɔ̃ɛdɛ lɛlɛ̃mɛ abalɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ nɛ kiwi nabha, kɛlɛ kiwiɛ yɛkɛ ohumi ɔsɛ tɛ kinye pɔɛ anɔ asɛ kifu. 9Kɛkpɛkpɛ́ɛ gagalĩɛ gɛide kiwiɛ mɛ tã banunɔ, kɛlɛ bazaɖɔ ebui akpɛ Owusoso Akaa nɛinyeɛ, anɔ gɛ yɛahɔɛ ohumi ɔlɛ nɛ bɔtɔ ebui alɛ nulũɔ, pɔ bagɛ dɛmɛ etsyina pɛ bákpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔɛ.
10Axɔ̃ɛdɛ trimiɛ abalɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ atɔɖɔ agãhoe ekusiegbu nabha, kɛlɛ otumũ oku nɛ yɛukusiaŋãsiɛ mɛ. Banɔ azatã balɛ enike nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, 11kɛlɛ bazaɖɔ ebui kpa akpɛ Owusoso Akaa, nɛ balɛ ɔtɔ nɛ̀ apɔ̃ gɛ bazanyãa shu, pɔ bagɛ dɛmɛ etsyina eté mɛ nɛ ebui kpa gɛ baza bhɛtɛ shu.
12Axɔ̃ɛdɛ hlomiɛ abalɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ akpɛ Frat Kelĩkekpu hohoeɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ kalɛ mɛ bulĩɛ pete butsì, sɛ tɛ olĩdiɛ otsyina odzi kidzo ɔkɔ bekusiɛ gɛ bede kiwiɛ otukɔɔ. 13Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ tɛtá gɛ leyì avɔbɔ, gɛ lekoeyì ede kɛtsɔpɛ, agãhoeɛ nɛ̀ asɛnɛ elete ebuiɖɔluanunɔ ilugbũɔ mɛ. 14Linu ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ gɛ lɛbhɛtɛ atsyindzye ebui akasɛ, kɛlɛ likoeyi vɛ dɛgã kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ ekusi nabha, sɛ tɛ eshogò alɛ ɔkɔ keyu tɛtatá nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa ohumielete nɛiwui gbagbla nabha.
15“Ɖio, ɛba ɔmɔ asɛ ezĩ ana! Beyula anunɔ gɛ alɛ nɛ awɔ̃, pɛ alɔkɔ yɛɔdɔ̃ kpɛkpɛ elu yɛɔbha sɛ tɛ atɛzã bɔdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ, sɛ tɛ etibu yɛishu elu nɛ awuĩ mɛ.”
16Kɛlɛ ɛfɔfuĩa nɔ gbanà bekusiɛ edi shogò nɛ ɔkɔ toli gɛ bekulu nɛ Hebrianɛ uluhũɔ mɛ asɛ, Armagedon.
17Axɔ̃ɛdɛ gegenemiɛ abalɛ̀ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kayintse nɔ akpɛ kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ ozĩ gagalĩ toli oyi odenɔ akaavũɔ mɛ ɔsɛ, “Kibele oo!” 18Kɛlɛ subha ìfu bubú kpɛ esi, ɛkɛlɛ ozogũ, subha azalɛ́ɛ, kɛlɛ kesiakpa tsyɛ ezeshuku gagalĩ. Kesiakpa shushukù alɛ nɛidi nanà kaba ɛlɛ mɛ ana oɖi denɔ kibeɛ gɛ babhɛtɛ anɔdzyrame atɔɖɔ kalɛ abha, kalɛ tishushukù nulũ gagalĩ. 19Kɛlɛ ɔma hohoeɛ ɔyɛ ɔkpɛ bɔwɔ̃pɛ tɔɔta mɛ, kɛlɛ ɛmadi ɛlɛ ɛma hohoeɛ lɛyɛ zĩ. Owusoso Akaa abakà Babilonia ɔma Gbagbla kɛlɛ alɔkɔ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ wain kayintse nɔ gɛ keyiɛ akɔɛ nɛ yɛɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ gagalĩɛ mɛ. 20Bulĩmɛetukpɔ ka nyia ka yala, kɛlɛ ɛgamɔ betu nanà. 21Amɔklagbu hohoe gɛ alɛ mɛ bupu zã asɛ kilo afɛeti ana ezezhi adɔ banɔ abha. Kɛlɛ bazaɖɔ ebui akpɛ Owusoso Akaa, nɛ amɔklagbuɔ gɛ lazadɔɔ shu, ɔmɔsɛ bɔtɔ gɛzɛ baa, kuifu fanɔ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 17
Content:
Adzɛ Kedulũ Azazãeleteɛ Nɛ̀ Agãhoeɛ
1Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene gɛ ɔmɔpɔɛ buyintse zã alɛ ahɔɛ ɔmayɛmɛ tenikpo aba pɛ ebetseɖe mɛasɛ, “Ba, ɛbakasɛ wɔ batɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ ɔkɔ adzɛ kedulũ azazã gbagbla, gɛ ezhi azã belĩ gelee abhaa. 2Gana adzɛ alɛ abhaa, kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ abhɛtɛ ɔmamɛ dɛdɛ ebui, kɛlɛ kanɔ mɛanɛ awɔ̃ɛ, yɛɔmamɛ dɛdɛ unuɔ ebuku.”
3Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ agbana mɛ nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ avɛnɔ oxui toli. Ɛkɛlɛ mɛdɛ mɔ adzɛ teli gɛ ezhi azã agãhoe dzadzã teli gɛ ebuso enye edi, edi azã yɛishuɔ akana. Atakpu tegegene alɛ azã yɛishu kɛlɛ edzu asha lɔfɔ. 4Adzɛ akpɛ akpɛkpɛ teli gɛ yɛɔkɔ toli okpelĩ kɛlɛ ɔkɔ toli xɔ̃nɔ ɔdzã, kɛlɛ ezetsé edenɔ sikã ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ aklagbu gbangbã nɛ̀ bakukɔliɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ edzi mɛ. Sikãiyintse azã yɛahɔɛ gɛ keyukù nɛ̀ atsɔ̃bui nɛ̀ ebuitsyutsyulĩɛ gɛ amɔ edenɔ yɛɔmamɛ dɛdɛ axɔ̃ɛ wɔawɔa mɛ. 5Bafɔnɔ kinye ɛlɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ yɛishuɔ nɛ kɛtakpuɔ asɛ,
KIBUI ƐLƐ KPŨ
BABILONIA GBAGBALA
BUDULŨ AZAZÃELETE ELĨƐ
NƐ̀ KANƆ MƐ PETEE ATSƆ̃BUI ELETE.
6Ɛmɔ sɛ adzɛ ebuku ɔgana banɔ dadalɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ bazaɖɔ kaɖɔ nɛ Yesu shuɔ, balɛ dzyosu tɛwɔɛwɔɛ mɛ, banɔ alɛ gɛaza dalɛ Yesu shuɔ dzyosu nɔ.
Gɛ ɛmɔ yɛ, kɛbhɛtɛ mɛibi popopo. 7Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ebisi mɛasɛ, “Kiɖeso pɛ kɛbhɛtɛ wɔɛibi? Ɛbaɖɔ kibui kpukpũɔ nɛ adzɛ alɛ nɛ̀ agãhoe nabha gɛ etsiɖi, pɛ atakpu tegegene nɛ̀ asha lɔfɔ alɛ yɛishuɔ tseɖe wɔ. 8Agãhoeɛ gɛ ɔmɔɔ, atɛzã eɖi, otsiɛ xɔnɔ abha ma, kɛlɛ ebekoeyì ede ozĩ dzudzuɔ mɛ aba pɛ bebèyíi. Banunɔ gɛ alɛ esiakpa nabha, pɛ bagɛ fɔnɔ balɛ enye akpɛ ɛkpãelete nɛeplukpa mɛ odenɔ kibeɛ gɛ kanɔ alɛ akpɛ esiɛ, kɛbabhɛtɛ alɛ ibi, onupɛ bamɔ agãhoeɛ. Ɔmɔsɛ atɛzã eɖi kɛlɛ abha ma, pɔ azababa.
9“Kɛlɛ sɛ bɔlɔkɔ ekpeɖekpeɖe mɛ nɛ̀ bubutì olu awɔ̃ oɖi kibui ɛlɛ mɛ. Atakpu tegegeneɛ enu butukpɔ tugegeneɛ gɛ bɔlɛ abha adzɛ ezhi azã. 10Balɛ tsyɛ enu bekusi tegegene. Teetì nɛ alɛ mɛ abha ma, tenikpo nɔ alɛ, pɔ tenikpo nɔ aka aba otsiɛ. Pɔ onupɛ abaa, abazã nɛ kibe gulũi mɛ ete. 11Agãhoeɛ gɛ atɛzã eɖi pɛ abha ma, yɛenu ekusi asɛmiɛ. Enu bekusi tegegeneɛ mɛ anɔ tenikpo gɛ etsiɖi idzo mɛ avɛ yɛutsi mɛ.
12“Asha lɔfɔɔ gɛ ɔmɔɔ, enu bekusi lɔfɔ gɛ bakamɔ bukusi ɔŋãkɔ kaku alɛ ahɔɛ, pɔ nɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo mɛɛ, babà yɛkɛ ohumi sɛ tɛ bedzi bekusi aplɛnɔ agãhoeɛ. 13Tɛtɔtɔɖɔ tinikpo kɛlɛ lɛ̀ alɛ ahɔɛ sɛ tɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ohumi nɛ̀ bukusi ŋaŋã akɔ agãhoeɛ. 14Babà lɔkɔ eyu nɛ Obhoshieyiɛ shu, pɔ Obhoshieyiɛ abaŋã alɛ abha, ɔmɔsɛ yɛenu Apalete akɔ bapaleteɛ nɛ̀ Ekusi akɔ bekusiɛ-bagɛ babà plɛni yɛɛ, balɛ enu bagɛ ekuluɔ, bagɛ ebuɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ ayɛkɛ yɛabha aŋãa.”
15Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Belĩɛ gɛ ɔmɔ pɛ kedulũazazã eleteɛ ezhi azã balɛ abhaa, benu banɔ aza, ɛmadi nɛ̀ beluhũ edi edi. 16Agãhoeɛ nɛ̀ asha lɔfɔ gɛ ɔmɔɔ, atɛ badɛmɛ nɔ̀ nɛ̀ kedulũ azazã eleteɛ nɛibui. Babà gbani yɛakpɛ tizizĩ mɛ, kɛlɛ babà shɛ ayɔlɔ yɛ kɛdɔ̃ makpɛ makpɛ nɛishu. Babàtã yɛɔdzya kɛlɛ babàpɔɛ yɛ nɛ̀ kifu. 17Ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa akpɛ ɛlɛ nɛ alɛ etúɔ mɛ asɛ tɛ babhɛtɛ nɛ kɛgɛ atɔɖɔ eluɔ nabha, sɛ tɛ badɛmɛ tɛ balɔkɔ balɛ ohumi nɔ akɔ agãhoeɛ tɛ alɔkɔ aŋã ukusiɛ nɔ, ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛibuiɛ babà ɛlɛ mɛ. 18Adzɛ gɛ ɔmɔɔ, yɛenu ɔma gbagbla gɛ lɔŋã bukusi nɛ kesiakpa bekusi nabha.”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 18
Content:
Babilonia Ayɛɛ
1Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ bhlatɔ gɛ ezhi ede ititíɛ àba. Kabha ŋaŋã ohumi ɔzã yɛahɔɛ, kɛlɛ yɛ tɛdadalɛ kɔ ɔsɛ kesiakpa adalɛ. 2Akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ,
“Ayɛ mɔo! Babilonia hohoeɛ ayɛmɔo!
Etsyina edzi ɔma ɔkɔ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ
nɛ̀ okpukpũ ɔkɔ, ɔkɔ ɛfɔfuĩa zizĩ ka nyia ka
edzì ɔzãkɔ ɔkɔ bagã nɛ̀ bɔzhɔɛ gɛ batɛtã okpũkɔ.
3Ɔmɔsɛ amadiɛ pete awɔ̃ɛ yɛunuɔ ebuku
yɛegugù unuɔ gɛ amɔ edenɔ yɛɔmamɛ dɛdɛ mɛ.
Kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ awɔ̃sɔ nɛ̀ adzɛ alɛ,
kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha edzinigã bedzi ehoeyielete ɔgana yɛehoeyiudɔ̃ kpekpèɛ gɛzɛ pɔɖiɛ mɛ.”
4Kɛlɛ izilũ ozĩ odenɔ ititíɛ gɛɔɖɔ ɔsɛ,
“Nokoeyi nɛ yɛ mɛ, mɛeyi alɛ mɔ
sɛ tɛ notɛ bodzi ebui kpa abhɛbhɛtɛelete asɛ yɛ ana,
sɛ tɛ yɛɔtɔ̀ kpa nanà tɛbàba ɔna abha,
5ɔmɔsɛ yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ ewu adɛtɔ̃ ititíɛ,
kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa abakà yɛ ɛtakpumɛ gagalĩɛ.
6Nɔbhɛtɛ ɔkɔɛ asɛ ɛbhɛtɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ ɔnɔɔ,
nɔbuia ɛbhɛ kɛlɛ edi taabha ɔkpɛ yɛyɛ́ nulũ ɔkɔɛ.
Noshì kayintse nɔ gɛ eshi akɔ ɔnɔɔ, edi taabha ɔkpɛ bɔlɛulũ ɔkɔɛ.
7Nɔhɔhɔli piapii tɛ amɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ
nɛ yɛishu dadalɛ ɔdɔ̃ nɛ̀ ehoeyiudɔ̃ gɛ abhɛtɛ akɔ yɛishuɔ.
Efeke ishu nɛ yɛitúɔ mɛ,
‘Ɛzã esi asɛ adzɛekusi ana, itinu avɛvɛ yɛedzini,
kɛlɛ yoyo bibí tɛbàba mamɛ oɖi.’
8Klisoɔ bɔtɔ zizĩ babà yɛabha kiwui tili,
gɛinu butsí, yoyò bibi nɛ̀ bɔbhɛ.
Kifu bapɔɛ yɛ,
ɔmɔsɛ ohumielete yɛenu Apalete Owusoso Akaa gɛ ekulu ebhu nii.
9“Onupɛ kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ gɛ baza wɔ̃sɔ nɛ̀ adzɛ alɛ pɛ baza amɔ same nii amɔ ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ ode okoeyi gɛ onupɛ atãa, bebèbi yoyo pɛ babàmɔ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ nɛ yɛtakpu. 10Gɛ kifù badɛ alɛ nɛ yɛɔtɔ̀ shu soɔ, babazã itsí pɛ bebèebi yoyò akɔɛ.
“ ‘Kɛba gagalĩ! Kɛba gagalĩ, ɔkɔ wɔ ɔma hohoe,
Ɔma hohoe Babilon gɛ ohumi ɔzã ɔlɛ ahɔɛ!
Nɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo mɛ koɔ kɛlɛ bagbã wɔakpɛ!’
11“Kesiakpa abha edzinigã ebebi yoyò nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ ɔmɔsɛ anɔ nanà etikedzi balɛ ɔdɔ̃ dɛdɛɛ, 12kedzi gagã ɔdɔ̃ gɛinu sikã, sikãfufu, aklagbu gɛ ayɛkɛ edzì nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ gbangbã, aklalɛ kplɔkpɔlɔ nɛ̀ blɔɔ apɔtɛ, apɔtɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ edzi, silikì nɛ̀ apɔtɛ dzadzã. Bɔdɔ̃ bhlatɔ tsyɛ nu besi gɛ alɔ̃ huhuhù edi edi, nɛ̀ bɔdɔ̃ gɛ balɔkɔ kifutu mɛenyi yɛ onotsó afatɛ nɔ, isí gɛ lɛ yɛkɛ edzi, ɔɖa dzadzã nɛ̀ ɔɖa tutũ nɛ̀ aklagbuɔ gɛ ayɛkɛ edzí, 13etuku gɛenu osí huhuhù toli gɛ bekulu asɛ sinamɔn nɛ̀ babɔ̀ huhuhù gɛ basara, pepere, kilifi nɛ̀ ahaliwɔɛ, wain nɛ̀ bɔbɔ́ ŋaŋã, bɔna hɔhɔ nɛ̀ agɔlɛ, banɛtsyɔɛ nɛ̀ ibhoshi, basɔɔ nɛ̀ bapakahu, ɔlɔkɔ plɛnɔ banɔdzyrame nɛ̀ balɛ atɔwuiɛ. 14“Bedzinigã abaɖɔ asɛ, ‘Beesi eyuyuɔ gɛ ɔdɛmɛ nɔ koeyì nɛ wɔahɔɛ. Wɔehoeyi udɔ̃ pete nɛ̀ kana gɛ otséɛ ɔyala, gɛ ɔzɛɔmɔ ɔlɛ oɖi.’ 15Bedzinigã gɛ bazadɛ bɔdɔ̃ ɔlɛ pɛ bazamɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ edenɔ adzɛ ɔkɔɔ, babazã kitsí, nɛifusisí mɛ ɔkɔ yɛatɔ̃ pɔpɔ̃ɔ. Bebèbi yoyò pɛ babà nyɔnɔ awɔ̃. 16kɛlɛ babà kpɛ ozĩ asɛ,
“ ‘Kɛba gagalĩ! Kɛba gagalĩ, Wɔ ɔma hohoe,
wɔ gɛ ɔɔzã apɔtɛ kplɔkpɔlɔ, apɔtɛ gɛ ayɛkɛ edzi nɛ̀ apɔtɛ dzadzã mɛ,
pɛ ozotsé nɛ sikãdɔ̃ nɛ̀ aklagbu gɛ ayɛkɛ edzi nɛ̀ bakukɔli gbangbã mɛɛ!
17Nɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo mɛɛ, ehoeyiudɔ̃ ɛlɛ nyɔ̃ɔ zĩ!’
“Kelĩabha ihu anɔ gbagbla, bagɛ azazã ɛlɛ mɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ bezege ɛlɛ nɛ̀ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ azamɔ alɛ ehoeyiudɔ̃ edenɔ aƒu nabha, abàzã itsí. 18Onupɛ bamɔ ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ okoeyi nɛ ɔma gɛ ɔtã mɛɛ, bebee bisi asɛ, ‘Ɔma hohoe toli ɔtɛzã asɛ ɔma hohoe ɔlɛ nɛidi oɖi dza?’ 19Babà yalɛ osubhududu awɔ̃anya akpɛ atakpuɔ mɛ kɛlɛ nɛ̀ yoyò bibí nɛ̀ ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ mɛɛ, babàkpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ asɛ,
“ ‘Kɛba gagalĩ! Kɛba gagalĩ, O ɔma hohoeɛ,
ɛkɛlɛ gɛ banɔ gelee ahɔɛ gɛ kelĩabha ihu zã nɛ aƒu nabha
bamɔ ehoeyiudɔ̃ edenɔ yɛ ehoeyiudɔ̃ mɔmɔ mɛɛ!
Nɛ ɔɖa tatá tonikpo mɛ koɔ yɛka nyia ka zĩ!
20O kititíanɛ, nɔmɔ same nɛ Babilonia tɛyɛyɛ nɔ shu!
Nɔmɔ samɛ banɔ dadalɛ, nɛ̀ banɔ kpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ ebuiɖɔluanɛ!
Owusoso Akaa ekulu kebhu nii nɛ kana gɛ awɔa ɔfɔ nɛ ɔnɔ.’ ”
21Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ ohumielete teli alɔkɔ kɛklagbu hohoe tili gɛ kɛlɛ asɛ bɔhɔ hohoe tuli anaa, awɔanyã atɛ́ akpɛ aƒuɔ mɛ, pɛ aɖɔ asɛ,
“Gana agbagbà ibui tɛbhɛbhɛtɛ ɛlɛ nɛidi mɛɛ
Babà wɔanyã Babilonia ɔma hohoeɛ atɛ́ ehu esi,
gɛ baza amɔ ɔlɛ eɖi.
22Ɛdzɛ gɛ sangũelete, ɛdzɛ afafatɛelete, babe elete nɛ̀ buxoele abɔbɔ̀ azabɔɔ,
bezelũ ɛlɛ odenɔ wɔ mɛ eɖi ɖa.
Ahɔɛmɛ axɔ̃ɛwɔa nanà azawɔa ɛxɔ̃ɛ
bazamɔ alɛ nɛ wɔ mɛ eɖi ɖa.
Bɔdɔ̃ hɔhɔ gɛ bezelũɔ
bezelũ nɛ wɔ mɛ eɖi ɖa.
23Kani mɛifu
zatã nɛ wɔ mɛ oɖi.
Adzɛenyine nɛ̀ anyɛedzini aɖɔ
bezelũ alɛ nɛ wɔ mɛ oɖi.
Wɔedzinigã balɛ edzì kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ anɔ gbagbla.
Gana wɔ ihui ebui bhɛbhɛtɛ mɛɛ, ɔgbana ɛmadiɛ pete ɔtsrakɛ idzo.
24Nɛ yɛ mɛɛ, bamɔ ebuiɖɔluanɛ nɛ̀ banɔ dadalɛ dzyosu nɔ,
nɛ̀ banunɔ nyɔ̃ɔ gɛ beyí nɛ esiakpa nabha.”

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 19
Content:
Kpɛ Owusoso Akaa Nɛinye Nɛitití
1Nɛ kɛlɛ niedeɛ, ilũ ozĩ hohoe toli gɛ ɔmɔ asɛ banɔɛza gbagbla tili odenɔ kititíɛ gɛ baakpɛ ɔlɛ asɛ,
“Nɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití!
Tibubu, ishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ ohumi onu bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔyɛ,
2yɛebhu kukulu nɛ̀ ebui mɛ bhui bhui lɛ alɛ ɔzãkɔ.
Ebu kedulũ azazã gbagbla nepɔ
gɛ ezĩ esiakpa nɛ̀ yɛedulũ zazã axɔ̃ɛ.
Ebisi yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ dzyosu nɔ otití odenɔ yɛɔkɔ.”
3Bazakpɛ ozĩ bɔbhalà asɛ,
“Nɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití!
Ɔnyɔ̃ gɛ okoeyi ode adzɛ mɛɛ, obowu abha tihɔ, tihɔ.”
4Banɔ sheshè afɛtaabha nɛ̀ talɛ, nɛ̀ bagã talɛ akpɛ amɛ esi pɛ bakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ Owusoso Akaa gɛ azã ekusiegbu nabhaa. Kɛlɛ bakpɛ ozĩ asɛ,
“Amen! Nɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití!”
5Kɛlɛ ozĩ oyi odenɔ ekusiegbuɔ shu ɔsɛ,
“Nɔkpɛ bɔlɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛinye nɛitití,
wɔnɔ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ nyɔ̃ɔ,
wɔnɔ agɛ osi yɛifuɔ
bunuvɔɛ nɛ̀ esheshè!”
6Kɛlɛ ilũ ozĩ gɛ oyi asɛ banɔɛza kpekpè tili ɔyɛ ana, nɛ̀ asɛ ɔtsɛtsɛ toli gɛ ɔtsɛ, nɛ̀ subha gɛ azalɛ́ɛ nɔ, aɖɔ asɛ,
“Nɔkpɛ yɛinye nɛitití!
Ɔmɔsɛ bɔlɔ Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumielete yɛaŋã ukusiɛ.
7Nɔkɔ bɔkpɛ same tɛ bɔmɔ same
tɛ bɔkɔɛ ishu dadalɛ!
Ɔmɔsɛ Obhoshieyiɛ adzɛ gbagbana ɛbeɛ na,
kɛlɛ adzɛ gɛ akpɛ uluwɔ̃a eluɔ, etiwoese yɛishu ebeke.
8Balɔkɔ aklalɛ kplɔkpɔlɔ gɛ etse pɛ yɛamɛ ebhuiɛ,
balɔkɔ akɔɛ asɛ tɛ akpɛ.”
(Balɔkɔ aklalɛ kplɔkpɔlɔɔ, ashɔnɔ banɔ dadalɛ ebui gbangbã bhɛbhɛtɛ.)
9Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Fɔnɔ olu ɔsɛ, ‘Beyula akɔ bagɛ bekulu alɛ amana Obhoshieyiɛ adzɛ gbagbana ɔwlɔago ɔdɔ̃ ɔŋãkɔɔ!’ ” Kɛlɛ aɖɔ aplɛnɔ asɛ, “Owusoso Akaa, yɛolugbũ mɛ ebuiɛ gɛenu ɛgbã nu alɛ.”
10Nɛ yɛibui ɛlɛ shuɔ, idzu ekluisi esi sɛ tɛ mɛkpɛ ɛtakpu esi kɔɛ, pɔ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛbhɛtɛ ibui ɛlɛ! Wɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛdɛ mɛinu plɛnɔ wɔ, ɔlɔkɔ ɔplɛnɔ wɔadzya alɛ gɛ baɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ Yesu shuɔ. Kpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa! Ɔmɔsɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ adalɛ Yesu shuɔ alɛ enu ɔfɔfuĩa mɛ ebui gɛ baɖɔ eluɔ.”
Anɔ Nɔ̀ Gɛ Azã Ɛsɔ Fufu Nabha
11Ɛmɔ ititíɛ dalɛ zã kɛlɛ ɛmɔ ɛsɔ fufu teli, gɛ bekulu anunɔ gɛ azã yɛabha asɛ, Kibui gɛlɛ ɛlɛ ɔzãkɔelete nɛ̀ Kibui gbã elete. Alɔkɔ bamɛ maɖi maɖi ekulu ebhu pɛ atà eyu nɔ. 12Yɛawuhũɔ alɛ asɛ kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ ana, kɛlɛ bukusi ekutu gelee alɛ yɛtakpuɔ. Bafɔnɔ kinye nɛishu gɛ anɔ nanà etinyi, pɔ yɛ ete ko kɛlɛ̀ tititì mɛ ɔkɔ. 13Akpɛ akpɛkpɛ dzlolo teli gɛ batɔɛ nɛ dzyosu mɛ, kɛlɛ bekulu yɛasɛ Owusoso Akaa Yɛibui. 14Kitití uyuaza azã basɔ fufu abha nɛ yɛede. Bakpɛ aklalɛ kplɔkpɔlɔ, gɛ efuli pɛ yɛishu dalɛ piapii nɔ. 15Bɛtɛ̀ ŋaŋã teli edekoeyì nɛ yɛolugbũɔ mɛ, gɛ abalɔkɔ eté ɛmadiɛ nɔ. “Abaŋã ukusi nɛ alɛ abha nɛ̀ ɔɖaɛshi.” Alɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ɔmɔpɔɛ kpɛkpɛ, agã alɛ abha asɛ ɛgɛ gɛ bagã waian eyuyu abha nɛ yɛɔkãkɔ ana. 16Bafɔnɔ kinye ɛlɛ nɛ yɛakpɛkpɛ dzlolo nɛ̀ ɛtsrɛta nabha asɛ,
BEKUSI ABHA EKUSI NƐ̀ BAPALETE ABHA APALETE.
17Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ teli yɛalɔɛtití nɛ kiwi nabha. Akpɛ ozĩ gagalĩ etseɖe bɔzhɔɛ nɔ nɛ kɛlɛ́ nɔ mɛ asɛ, “Nobo shogò ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛɔwlɔago ɔdɔ̃ ŋaŋã hohoeɛ, 18sɛ tɛ nɔbɔtã bekusi, buyuaza lũazazãnɔ gbagbla nɛ̀ ohumi anɔ gbagbla, basɔ nɛ̀ bagɛ azã alɛ abha, nɛ̀ banɔ edi edì, banɔ gɛ alɛ ishu ahɔɛ mɛ nɛ̀ banɔ dzidzi, bunuvɔɛ nɛ̀ besheshè ɔdzya.”
19Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ agãhoeɛ nɛ̀ esiakpa abha ekusiɛ nɛ̀ balɛ buyuaza gɛ eshogò asɛ tɛ batá eyu nɛ̀ anunɔ gɛ etsiɖi ɛsɔ nabhaa, nɛ̀ yɛeyuiza. 20Pɔ bevũ agãhoeɛ, nɛ̀ yɛasɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanɔ gɛ azabhɛtɛ atsyindzye ebui akasɛ nɛ yɛinye mɛɛ. Bɔdɔ̃ bubú kasɛ ɛlɛ yɛalɔkɔ awɔɛ bagɛ ayɛkɛ agãhoe ɛná tsatsà, pɛ bazakpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ yɛafafatɛɛ. Balɔkɔ banɔ alɛ enunuɔ taabha atɛ́ akpɛ aklagbuifuɔ, gɛtã nɛ̀ ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. 21Bagɔgɔɛ nɔ xɔ̃nɔ beyí alɛ nɛ̀ bɛtɛ̀ɛ gɛ ekoeyì ede anunɔ gɛ azã ɛsɔ nabha olugbũɔ mɛ, kɛlɛ bɔzhɔɛ nɔ petee batsyuĩ alɛ ɔdzya aŋã.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 20
Content:
Agɔ Ohotu Zɛzɛɛ
1Ɛmɔ axɔ̃ɛdɛ teli gɛ ezhi ede ititíɛ, gɛ evunɔ ozĩ dzudzuɔ, ɔlɛ opupukɔ nɛ̀ ɔɖaohui gagalĩ toli. 2Evũ kɛtsɔpɛ, gɛinu ebeliɛ eblidzya, gɛenu abosamuɔ alo Satana, kɛlɛ anya yɛelu agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀. 3Awɔanyã yɛatɛ akpɛ ozĩ dzudzuɔ mɛ, adã ɔlɛ pɛ edere ɔlɛ ulũ akpii, sɛ tɛ atɛ mɔ idzo nanà tɛ ewlui azawɔɛ ɛmadiɛ, ɔvɛnɔ agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀ ede flogo. Nɛ agɔ alɛ niedeɛ, bebebui gɛ azabazã nɛ kibe gulũi mɛ.
4Ɛmɔ bagɛ bakɔ alɛidzo asɛ tɛ bekulu ubhuɔ bazã beekusi ugbu abha. Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ bagɛ alɛ atakpu bebhuiɛ atɔwuiɛ, bagɛ bazaɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ Yesu nɛ̀ Owusoso Akaa yɛibuiɛ shu soɔ. Bagɛ kpɛ ɛtakpu esi akɔ agãhoeɛ alo yɛafafatɛ, kɛlɛ bagɛ yɛkɛ yɛná tsatsà nɛ butúɔ alo ɛhɔɛ tsyɛ. Bazã nɛ̀ ɛkpã, kɛlɛ baŋã ukusi aplɛnɔ Kristo agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀. 5(Banɔ tsitsí gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ xɔ̃nɔ egi tsodzi anyɛmɛ ɔvɛnɔ kibeɛ gɛ agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀ ulũ bafala.) Kɛlinu tɛlɔlɔ́ odenɔ bekpuɔ mɛ gɛiputɔ. 6Tiyuyulà nɛ̀ tɛdadalɛ ɔkɔ bagɛ amɔ tɛlɔlɔ́ gɛiputɔ ɔlɛ. Butsí bhalà tɛbamɔ ohumi nɛ alɛ abha, pɔ bebèdzi Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Kristo balɛ anɔlũazazã, kɛlɛ babàŋã ukusi aplɛnii agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀.
Beté Satana
7Onupɛ agɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀ ɔbɔfalaa, bebèbu Satana odenɔ yɛɔɖavũɔ mɛ 8kɛlɛ azabavɛ adɛwɔɛ ɛmadiɛ nɛ kesiakpa idekrekpu tɛlɛ nabha, gɛenu Gɔg nɛ̀ Magɔg tɛ edi shogò alɛ akɔ keyu tatá. Balɛ tikpekpè mɛ lɛ asɛ aƒutɔ̃ ayisɛ ana. 9Batsà ɛha afala nɛ kanɔ nɔ̀ mɛ, kɛlɛ bebu kɛma akpɛ Owusoso Akaa anɔ dadalɛ nɛ̀ ɔma hohoeɛ gɛ adɛmɛ nɔ. Pɔ kifù wɔlɛ ide kititíɛ pɛ kɛpɔɛ alɛ. 10Kɛlɛ balɔkɔ abosamuɔ gɛ awɔɛ alɛ, awɔanyã atɛ́ akpɛ aklagbuifuɔ gɛ ɛtã mɛ, nɛ ɛkɛlɛ gɛ batɛ́ɛ agãhoeɛ nɛ̀ asɛnɛ ebuiɖɔluanunɔ akpɛ. Babà hɔhɔlɛ alɛ elishi nɛ̀ emuze ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ, tihɔ.
Kebhu Gɔgɔɛ Kukulu Nɛ̀ Bekpuɔ
11Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ ekusiegbu hohoe fufú tieli, nɛ̀ anunɔ gɛ azã alɛ abhaa. Kesiakpa nɛ̀ kitití shɛ̃ nɛ yɛamɛ, kɛlɛ ɔzãkɔ nanà ɔgɛ ɔzã ɔkɔ alɛ. 12Kɛlɛ ɛmɔ banɔ tsitsí, besheshè nɛ̀ bunuvɔɛ gɛ bazã itití nɛ ekusiegbuɔ otugbà, kɛlɛ badalɛ uplukpa mɛ elu. Baza dalɛ eplukpa bhlatɔ tsyɛ gɛenu ɛkpã eplukpa. Bekulu ebhu nɛ̀ banɔ tsitsíɛ nɛ kɛzã gɛ bazã nɛ ɛkpã, pɛ bafɔnɔ elu nɛ buplukpa mɛ nulũ. 13Aƒu ebu bagɛ betsí nɛ yɛmɛ amana, kɛlɛ butsí nɛ̀ bekpuɔ ɔzãkɔ tsyɛ obu banɔ tsitsíɛ gɛ balɛ alɛ mɛɛ amana. Kɛlɛ bekulu ebhu akɔ anɔ nyia anɔ nɛ kɛgɛ yɛabhɛtɛ nulũ. 14Kɛlɛ balɔkɔ butsí nɛ̀ bekpuɔ ɔzãkɔ atɛ́ akpɛ kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. Kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ ɔlɛ nu butsí bhalà. 15Onupɛ bágɛmɔ anɔ teli yɛinye sɛ bafɔnɔ ɛlɛ akpɛ ɛkpãeplukpa mɛɛ, balɔkɔ yɛatɛ́ akpɛ kifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ mɛ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 21
Content:
Kitití Vɔvɔ Nɛ̀ Kesiakpa Vɔvɔ
1Kidegbaa ɛmɔ itití vɔvɔ nɛ̀ esiakpa vɔvɔ. Ɔmɔsɛ kititíɛ gɛiputɔ nɛ̀ esiakpa gɛeputɔ ulũ tɛba fala, kɛlɛ aƒu nanà tsyɛ agabazã. 2Ɛmɔ Ɔma Dadalɛ gɛonu Yerusalem vɔvɔ loozhi ode Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɛititíɛ ɔba. Bewoese ɔlɛ piapii asɛ kiwoese gɛ bewoese adzɛ gɛ bakpɛ buluwɔ̃a akɔ anyɛ sɛ tɛ agbana ana. 3Kɛlɛ ilũ ozĩ loyi gagalĩ ode ekusiegbuɔ shu ɔsɛ, “Otsi alɛ Owusoso Akaa ɔzãkɔ lɛ banɔdzyrame ishi, kɛlɛ abazã aplɛnɔ alɛ. Bebedzi yɛanɔ, kɛlɛ Owusoso Akaa abazã balɛ ɔbha, pɛ yɛebedzi alɛ Owusoso Akaa. 4Ebetsuru ɛwɔ̃mɛ ka nyia ka nɛ alɛ amɛ. Butsí, ɔwɔ̃nyɔnɔ, yoyò bibi alo bɔtɔ nanà zɛbazã, ɔmɔsɛ ebui kukuɔ gɛazã ulũ tɛbafala.”
5Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ azã ekusiegbu nabha aɖɔ asɛ, “Idzinɔ kɛka nyia ka bhɛtɛ ɛdɔ̃ vɔvɔ.!” Kɛlɛ azaɖɔ asɛ, “Fɔnɔ ɛlɛ olu, ɔmɔsɛ ebuiɛ alɛ àlɛ, alɛ ɔzãkɔ kɛlɛ lɛenu kɛgbã.”
6Etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Kɛka nyia ka na. Mɛinu anɔ gɛ eputɔ, pɛ ɛka wlui nu Agɔgɔɛ nɔ tsyɛ, mɛinu Kesikpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Ɔtɔ̃kɔɔ. Anunɔ gɛ olũwɔɛ oyi yɛ ɛbakɔ yɛulĩ yɛawɔɛ odenɔ bulĩɛ gɛ bukoeyi odenɔ ɛkpã bulĩ ozĩɛ mɛ, gɛ atɛ babuia ɔlɛ ɛbhɛ. 7Anunɔ gɛ aŋã abhaa, bɔdɔ̃ ɛlɛ nyɔ̃ɔ badzi yɛɔyɛ, kɛlɛ ɛbadzi yɛ Owusoso Akaa, kɛlɛ yɛtsyɛ ebedzi mɛeyi. 8Pɔ kifusisíelete, bagɛ agɛyɛkɛ aŋã, atsɔ̃bui abhɛbhɛtɛelete, bagɛ beyì anɔ, aglɔŋaŋãelete, behuinɛ, ibudielete nɛ̀ asɛnɛ sɛsɛelete peteɛ xɔ̃nɔɔ-balɛ ɔzãkɔ obodzi kifu gɛtã nɛ̀ aklagbuifu ɔɖɛklɛmɛ nɔ mɛ. Kɛlinu butsi bhalàa.”
9Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ tegegene gɛ bevunɔ buyintse tugegene gɛ buyuku nɛ̀ bɔtɔ gɔgɔ̃ɛ nɔ gɛ bàba, ɔmayɛmɛ tenikpo aba kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Ba, ɛbakasɛ wɔ adzɛ gɛ bakpɛ buluwɔ̃a eluɔ, gɛenu Obhoshieyiɛ yɛedzini.” 10Nɛ Ɔfɔfuĩa mɛɛ, efeke mɛ adɛ tɔɖɔ butu hohoe, ɖaɖama tuli abha, kɛlɛ ebu Ɔma Dadalɛ, gɛonu Yerusalem gɛode Owusoso Akaa ɔkɔ nɛititíɛ ozhiɛ akasɛ mɛ. 11Owusoso Akaa ishu dadalɛ zitse nɛ ɔlɛ mɛ, kɛlɛ ɔlɛ titsetseɛ zã ɔmɔ asɛ yaspa ɛklagbu, gɛ kɛlɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔmɔ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ mɛ. 12Babhɔ egli dodó, ɖaɖama akana ɔmaa, gɛ budulũ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɔɔbha zã alɛishu. Baxɔ̃ɛdɛ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha azã budulũɔ. Nɛ budulũɔ shuɔ, bafɔnɔ Israel egbogbo lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha enye atɔɖɔ. 13Bebu budulũ tɔɔta nɛ kiwiɛ otukɔ nɛibe, tɔɔta lɛ piabhaɛbeɛ, tɔɔta lɛ pialɛ ibe kɛlɛ tɔɔta tsyɛ lɛ kiwiɛ ɔdɔkɔ nɛibe. 14Buvũ esikpɛkpɛ egli edi lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha babhɔ akɔ ɔma egiliɛ. Kɛlɛ nɛ kɛka nyia aka abhaa, bafɔnɔ Obhoshieyiɛ yɛanɔ kpɛkpɛ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha enyeɛ atɔɖɔ. 15Axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ nɛ mɛɛ, evunɔ sikãishi tili idi gɛ alɔkɔ edzyidzyi ɔmaa, ɔlɛ budulũɔ nɛ̀ egiliɛ nɔ. 16Ɔma gɛ bebhuiɛ, ɔlɛ tidzedze mɛ nɛ̀ ɔlɛ tɛnɛnɛ̀ɛ mɛ pete ashɔ̃. Axɔ̃ɛdɛ edzyidzyi ɔma ɔlɛ kɛwɔã zɛ̀zɛ nɛ̀ ɔɖɛishì nɔ, kɛlɛ ɔlɛ tidzedzeɛ mɛ lɛ asɛ ɛtsɛkɔ ohotu zɛzɛ̀ nɛ̀ akpã talɛ̃. Ɔma ɔlɛ tidzedzeɛ, nɛ̀ tɛnɛnɛ̀ mɛ̀ pete shɔ̃. 17Axɔ̃ɛdɛ edzyidzyi egiliɛ tsyɛ kɛlɛ alɛ tɛɖaɖama mɛ zã asɛ bɔtsrɛkpɔ akpã taabha, kishi nɔ gɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ alɔkɔ nu anɔdzyrame ɔdɔ tidzyi dzyidzyí ɔyɛ. 18Balɔkɔ yaspa aklagbu abhɔ egiliɛ nɔ, kɛlɛ babhɔ ɔma nɛ̀ sikã gbangbã gɛ yɛmɛ adalɛ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ ana. 19Balɔkɔ aklagbu gbangbã edi edi ewoese kesikpɛkpɛ egiliɛ nɔ. Kesikpɛkpɛ aklagbuɔ gɛeputɔ enu yaspa, tɛbhɔbhɔ tɔɖɔ ɔbhalà nu safir, atramɛ enu kalkedon, kɛlɛ alɛlɛmɛ enu emaragad, 20etrimiɛ enu sardonik, ehlomiɛ enu sardis, egegenemiɛ enu krisolit, asɛmiɛ enu beril, ezhitamiɛ enu topas, kɛfɔ̀miɛ nu krisopras, kɛfɔ̀ nɛ̀ toliɛ nu hiakink kɛlɛ kɛfɔ̀ nɛ̀ taabhaa nu ametist. 21Balɔkɔ bɔdɔ̃ gɛitse ŋelĩŋelĩɛ ewoese ɔma ɔlɛ budulũ lɔfɔ nɛ̀ tɔɔbhaa nɔ. Sikã gbangbã adɛ gɛ ɔbɔlà ɔmɔ bɔdɔ̃ ɔgana yɛmɛ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ anaa, yɛ balɔkɔ akpɛ ɔma tipɔ hohoeɛ nɔ.
22Ɛgɛmɔ Owusoso Akaavũ nanà nɛ ɔmamɛ, Apalete Owusoso Akaa Ohumieleteɛ nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ balɛ enu Owusoso Akaavũɔ nɛ ɛkɛlɛ. 23Kiwi nɛ̀ woele etienye nɛ ɔma mɛ, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa tɛdadalɛ yɛakɔ ɔsɛ ɔlɛ mɛ ɔdalɛ, kɛlɛ Obhoshieyiɛ yɛenu ɔlɛ kifuɔ. 24Yɛtɛdadalɛ mɛ ɛmadiɛ abàgã, kɛlɛ kesiakpa abha ekusiɛ abalɔkɔ alɛ tɛpɔpɔɖiɛ mana ɔlɛ mɛ. 25Batɛ badã ɔma ɔlɛ budulũɔ eɖi, ɔmɔsɛ elishi nanà atɛ bazã ɛkɛlɛ. 26Ɛmadiɛ abalɔkɔ balɛishu dadalɛ nɛ̀ kinye kpɛkpɛ nɛitití amana ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ. 27Kɛdɔ̃ gɛ ɛlɛ shu gɛdalɛ nanà tɛbaku ɔma ɔlɛ mɛ ɖi, alo bagɛ babhɛtɛ awuĩ ebui alo asɛnɛ elete atɛ bazã ɔlɛ mɛ. Pɔ bagɛ alɛ enye bafɔnɔ akpɛ Obhoshieyiɛ ɛkpã eplukpa mɛ ete ko balɛ abazã ɛkɛlɛ.

Title: KIBUI BUBÚ KASƐ 22
Content:
Ɛkpã Kelĩkekpuɔ
1Kɛlɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ akasɛ mɛ kelĩkekpuɔ gɛ kalɛ mɛ ulĩ kɔ ɛkpãa. Bulĩɛ mɛ dalɛ ɔmɔ asɛ ahuhɔ̃ɛ ana, kɛlɛ bɔkpɛ odenɔ Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ ekusiegbuɔ mɛ. 2Bɔkpɛ gã ɔma ɔlɛ tipɔ hohoe nɛishi tɛbha. Nɛ kelĩkekpuɔ ogbogbò ka nyia kaa, ɔbɔmɔ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpã tonikpo. Gɛ eyu eyuyu lɔfɔ nɛ̀ taabha tɔɖɔ nɛ woele ka nyia ka mɛ. Kɛlɛ busiɛ awɔlakpa enu bɔwa akɔ ɛmadiɛ. 3Kibui ɖɔɖɔ kpɛ anɔ nanà zaazã. Owusoso Akaa nɛ̀ Obhoshieyiɛ ekusiegbuɔ abazã ɔma mɛ kɛlɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ abaadɛ axɔ̃ɛ akɔɛ. 4Baba mɔ yɛamɛ kɛlɛ yɛinye bazã balɛ utukpe nɔ. 5Elishi azaazã. Ananà azapɛ kifu gɛkɔ tɛdadalɛ alo kiwi nyenye, ɔmɔsɛ Owusoso Akaa yɛabakɔ alɛ tɛdadalɛ. Kɛlɛ babà ŋã bukusi ɔvɛnɔ tihɔ, tihɔ. 6Axɔ̃ɛdɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Ebui alɛ, lalɛ alɛ ɔzãkɔ kɛlɛ lɛenu ebui igbã. Apalete, Owusoso Akaa gɛenu ɛfɔfuĩa ɔkɔ ebuiɖɔluanɛ, yɛasɛsɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ asɛ tɛ akasɛ bagɛ adɛ yɛaxɔ̃ɛ ebui nɔnɔ gɛ ababà alɛ mɛ gulũi nɔ.”
Yesu Aaba
7“Noɖio ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ! Beyulà anunɔ gɛ anyana ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ evunɔ.”
8Mɛ, Yohanes, mɛinu anunɔ gɛ ilũ pɛ ɛmɔ ebui alɛ. Kɛlɛ gɛ ilũ pɛ ɛmɔ alɛɛ, izhi kumu sɛ tɛ mɛkpɛ ɛtakpu esi nɛ axɔ̃ɛdɛ gɛ ezebu ebui alɛ akasɛ mɛ otugbà. 9Pɔ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tɛbhɛtɛ ana! Wɔhagbo axɔ̃ɛdɛ ete mɛinu ɔplɛni wɔ nɛ̀ wɔadzya alɛ ebuiɖɔluanɛ nɛ̀ bagɛ anyana ebuiɛ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ evunɔ. Kpɛ ɛtakpu esi ɔkɔ Owusoso Akaa ete!”
10Kɛlɛ etseɖe mɛasɛ, “Tidere ɔdɔ̃ nɛ ebui alɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ ulũ, ɔmɔsɛ kibeɛ tso ba. 11Nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui kpa azã yɛebui kpa bhɛbhɛtɛ abha, anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ atsɔ̃buiɛ, tɛ azã alɛ abha tɛ azabhɛtɛ, nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ abhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã, tɛ azã alɛ abha tɛ azabhɛtɛ ebui gbangbã, kɛlɛ nɔkɔ anunɔ gɛ enu anɔ dadalɛ tsyɛ azã yɛ tɛdadalɛ nabha.”
12“Noɖio, ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ! Ivũnɔ kɛbhɛ gɛ ɛbabuia nɔ, kɛlɛ ɛbakɔ anɔ ka nyia ka nɛ kɛbhɛtɛ gɛ abhɛtɛ nulũ. 13Mɛinu anɔ Gɛeputɔ nɛ̀ Agɔgɔɛ nɔ, Agɛ alɛ Otugba nɛ̀ agɛ yɛalɛ Kedeɛ, Kesikpɛkpɛ nɛ̀ Ɔtɔ̃kɔ.
14Beyulà banunɔ gɛ beplu balɛ akpɛkpɛ dzloloɔ, sɛ tɛ bakɔ alɛ idzo nɛ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpãa shu, kɛlɛ tɛ bamɔ idzo agã afala nɛ budulũɔ tɛ betsoku ɔma mɛ. 15Bagɛ babàwɔ kevudeɛ, balɛ enu beebu, behuinɛ, bagɛ baaŋã agɔlɔ, bagɛ beyi anɔ, ibudielete nɛ̀ anɔ ka nyia ka gɛ adɛmɛ asɛnɛ sɛsɛ ebui pɛ asɛɔsɛ.
16Mɛinu Yesuɔ, gɛ ɛkpɛ mɛaxɔ̃ɛdɛ sɛ tɛ adalɛ ebui alɛ shu akɔ wɔ tɛ odi tseɖe bahameɛ. Mɛinu David yɛogu nɛ̀ Yɛeshui nɔ, nɛ̀ Kɛvɔlɔ Ɛwɔ̃ɛ gɛ kɔ tɛdadalɛɛ.”
17Ɔfɔfuĩa nɔ nɛ̀ anyɛedziniɛ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” Anunɔ gɛ elũɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ba!” Anunɔ gɛ oluwɔ̃ɛ oyi yɛɛ, nɔkɔ yɛaba, kɛlɛ anunɔ gɛ apɛɛ nɔ, nɔkɔ yɛabawɔ̃ɛ bulĩɛ gɛkɔ ɛkpã faa, kɛbhɛ mabuia, mabuia.
18Itseɖe nɔ nɛ̀ anɔ nyia anɔ gɛ elũ ebui alɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛ asɛ, onupɛ anɔ teli alɔkɔ kibui tili aplɛnɔ alɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa abalɔkɔ bɔtɔ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, aplɛnɔ akɔɛ. 19Kɛlɛ onupɛ anɔ teli ebu ebui teli tsyɛ eyinɔ nɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ elu nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, Owusoso Akaa tsyɛ abayɛkɛ anɔ alɛ yɛɔŋãkɔ gɛ ɔlɛ busiɛ gɛ akɔ ɛkpãa nɛ̀ ɔma dadalɛ ebuiɛ gɛ baɖɔ nɛ eplukpa alɛ mɛɛ, nɛ yɛahɔɛ.
20Anɔ nɔ̀ gɛ aɖɔaɖɔ adalɛ ebui alɛ shuɔ aɖɔ asɛ, “Ee, ɛɛba otsiɛ tsĩɔɔ.”
Amen, Apalete Yesu ba.
21Apalete Yesu tibhui bhuibu zã ɔplɛnɔ Owusoso Akaa yɛeyi alɛ oo. Amen.
